Wang received financial support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72503264]. J. Yu received financial support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72141304 and 72342020]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06850 .
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 外推中的时间变异与异常现象
abstract_cn: 我们发现，投资者信念中的外推加权程度（DOX）对股票市场中与过度反应相关的一系列异常现象具有强预测能力。这些异常现象的平均收益差异在高 DOX 期间约为每月 [公式：见正文] ，而在低 DOX 期间约为每月 [公式：见正文] 。与此形成鲜明对比的是，DOX 对与不足反应相关的异常现象具有相反但较弱的预测能力。此外，经过广泛的经济因素控制后，DOX 的预测能力依然稳健。此外，DOX 对长短异常收益的影响大部分来自这些过度反应相关异常的短头寸，这表明 DOX 的时间变化导致了相较于低估更高的时间变化可能与卖空障碍有关。本文由 Lukas Schmid 接受，领域为金融。资助信息：Z. Su 获得了岭南大学的财政支持 [教职工研究资助 DB25A5 和 103664]。Y. Wang 获得了中国国家自然科学基金的财政支持 [资助号 72503264]。J. Yu 获得了中国国家自然科学基金的财政支持 [资助号 72141304 和 72342020]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06850 获取。

title: In Search of Shares: Benchmarked Ownership, Short Covering, and Price Efficiency
abstract: We examine whether ownership by benchmarked investors constrains short sellers’ ability to quickly cover their positions following positive earnings news and thereby exacerbates price pressure from short covering. We find that high benchmarked ownership is related to greater price overshooting in highly shorted stocks at positive earnings announcements. This effect is driven by benchmarked ownership amplifying both price and volume impacts of short covering. Exploring shocks from Russell index reconstitutions and examining other settings such as management guidance and analyst recommendation revisions yield similar inferences. Overall, our findings highlight a novel mechanism that benchmarked ownership can constrain short-selling activities. This paper was accepted by Eric So, accounting. Funding: The authors acknowledge financial assistance from their respective schools. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07231 .
title_cn: 寻找股份：基准化所有权、空头回补与价格效率
abstract_cn: 我们研究了标杆投资者的持有是否限制空头在积极盈利消息发布后快速平仓的能力，从而加剧了空头回补带来的价格压力。研究发现，高比例的标杆持有与在积极盈利公告时高度被做空股票的价格过度波动相关。这一效应是由于标杆投资者的持有放大了空头回补对价格和成交量的影响。通过探索罗素指数重组所带来的冲击，并考察管理指导和分析师推荐修订等其他情境，得出相似的推论。总体而言，我们的研究揭示了一种新的机制，即标杆持有可能限制做空活动。本文已被会计学者Eric So接受。资助：作者感谢各自学校的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07231 获取。

title: Bond Risk Characteristics and Factor Risk Premia
abstract: Assuming no arbitrage and that a polynomial in the time to maturity approximates spot-rate increments, we develop a consistent approach to estimate factor risk premia in the bond market. This approach is attractive, as the underlying risk factors are the time-varying coefficients of the polynomial specification, and the factor loadings correspond to familiar bond risk characteristics, such as duration and convexity. Our two-factor model—with a positive (negative) duration-factor (convexity-factor) risk premium—is easy to estimate and provides straightforward economic intuition for the concave term structure of bond risk premia and the downward-sloping term structure of bond Sharpe ratios. Our model decomposes the conditional factor risk premia into a “status quo” component—the expected factors’ realizations when expected spot-rate increments are zero—and the factors’ forecasts. The status quo factor risk premia provide measures of the state of fixed income markets that both outperform alternative measures and are easily estimated in real time; moreover, the underlying risk factors and their loadings are familiar to and readily interpreted by investors and traders. This paper was accepted by Lukas Schmid, finance. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00212 .
title_cn: 债券风险特征与因子风险溢价
abstract_cn: 假设不存在套利机会，并且以到期时间的多项式近似现货利率增量，我们建立了一种一致的方法来估计债券市场的因子风险溢价。这种方法具有吸引力，因为基本风险因子是多项式规范的时间变动系数，因子负载对应于熟悉的债券风险特征，如久期和凸性。我们的双因子模型—具有正（负）久期因子（凸性因子）风险溢价—易于估计，并为债券风险溢价的凹形期限结构及债券夏普比率的下滑期限结构提供了直接的经济直觉。我们的模型将条件因子风险溢价分解为“现状”成分—即当预期现货利率增量为零时因子的预期实现—以及因子的预测。现状因子风险溢价提供了固定收益市场状态的度量，这些度量不仅优于替代度量，而且在实时中易于估计；此外，基本风险因子及其负载对投资者和交易者来说是熟悉且易于解读的。本文已被Lukas Schmid接受，领域为金融。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00212获取。

title: Nudging Green-but-Slow Shipping Choices in Online Retail
abstract: Faster e-commerce fulfillment often comes at a cost to the environment because of energy-intensive transportation modes and more frequent, less consolidated last-mile deliveries. Despite these environmental implications, most retailers feel pressure to provide fast fulfillment to remain competitive. But what if consumers could be nudged to voluntarily choose green-but-slow shipping? In practice, a variety of information strategies are used to nudge such decisions, but it is unclear which strategy is best and why. This study examines these questions in two logistical contexts, each involving a different type of process change to support green-but-slow shipping: shipping mode and order consolidation. We first introduce a conceptual framework for selecting information strategies based on their influence on customer perceptions related to key stakeholders in each context: delivery convenience (self), environmental impact (society), and sustainability intention (retailer). Then, drawing on behavioral research and industry practices, we identify and test the effect of a comprehensive set of information strategies (i.e., Process, Green Label, Green Process, and Green Outcome) through controlled experiments involving 3,800 participants. Experimental results suggest that different logistical contexts require distinct nudging strategies, aligning with our conceptual framework. We find that including a green label is particularly effective for the shipping mode context, especially when combined with outcome information. In contrast, process information is more promising in the order consolidation context. Also, adding financial incentives can enhance the effectiveness of information strategies without a clear environmental signal, whereas pairing them with a simple green label may be effective for low eco-conscious individuals. This paper was accepted by Elena Katok, operations management. Funding: This work was supported by the Institute on the Environment, University of Minnesota [MF-0009-23]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00239 .
title_cn: 在在线零售中推动环保但速度较慢的运输选择
abstract_cn: 快速的电子商务履行往往会对环境造成成本，因为这涉及高能耗的运输方式以及更频繁、但不够集中的最后一公里配送。尽管存在这些环境影响，大多数零售商仍感受到提供快速履行的压力，以保持竞争力。但是，如果消费者能够被引导自愿选择绿色但较慢的配送方式，会怎么样呢？在实践中，采用了多种信息策略来引导这样的决策，但尚不清楚哪种策略最佳及其原因。本文在两个物流背景下探讨了这些问题，每种背景都涉及一种不同类型的流程变更，以支持绿色但较慢的配送：运输方式和订单合并。我们首先介绍一个基于各背景中与关键利益相关者相关的客户认知影响的信息策略选择概念框架：配送便利性（自我）、环境影响（社会）和可持续性意图（零售商）。然后，借鉴行为研究和行业实践，我们识别并测试了一套全面的信息策略（即流程、绿色标签、绿色流程和绿色结果）的效果，以上述3,800名参与者进行的受控实验为基础。实验结果表明，不同的物流背景需要不同的引导策略，与我们的概念框架相一致。我们发现，在运输方式背景下，采用绿色标签尤其有效，尤其是与结果信息结合时。相反，在订单合并背景下，流程信息更具前景。此外，增加经济激励可以提升信息策略的有效性，尽管没有明确的环境信号，而将其与简单的绿色标签结合可能对低生态意识个体有效。本文由运作管理领域的Elena Katok接受。资助：本研究得到了明尼苏达大学环境研究所的支持 [MF-0009-23]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.00239 获取。

title: Gender Gap in Debt Renegotiation
abstract: We study the role of gender in corporate debt renegotiation. Using in-court reorganizations from Brazil, we find that male-led creditors are more likely to reject plans put forward by female-led debtors. Although we cannot definitively identify the underlying mechanism driving this pattern, our findings align more consistently with gender-based discrimination compared with alternative explanations. This behavior may be costly: Female-led debtors deliver higher recoveries under reorganization than under liquidation, implying that rejections potentially create deadweight losses. Supporting a miscalibrated-beliefs explanation, we observe that the gender-based rejection gap narrows when male creditors have prior exposure to successful female-led businesses, pointing to a potential path for mitigation. This paper was accepted by Bo Becker, finance. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05802 .
title_cn: 债务重组中的性别差距
abstract_cn: 我们研究了性别在企业债务重组中的作用。通过分析巴西的法庭重组案例，我们发现男性主导的债权人更有可能拒绝女性主导的债务人提出的计划。尽管我们无法明确识别驱动这一模式的潜在机制，但我们的发现与基于性别的歧视解释更为一致，而不是其他替代解释。这种行为可能带来成本：女性主导的债务人在重组后的回收率高于清算，意味着拒绝可能会产生无谓损失。支持一种错误校准信念的解释，我们观察到当男性债权人曾接触到成功的女性主导企业时，基于性别的拒绝差距缩小，这表明潜在的缓解路径。本文已被Bo Becker接受，涉及金融领域。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05802获取。

title: Can Autonomous Vehicles Solve the Commuter Parking Problem?
abstract: This paper investigates how autonomous vehicles (AVs) may reshape morning commute travel patterns and impact parking in a central business district (CBD). We develop a continuous-time game-theoretic traffic model that takes into account key economic deterrents to driving, such as parking fees and traffic congestion, and characterize the departure time and parking location (inside or outside the CBD parking area) patterns of commuters in equilibrium. Our analysis shows that all AV commuters may choose to park outside the CBD in equilibrium, increasing both vehicle hours and vehicle miles traveled as compared with the case with all human-driven vehicles. This change increases the total system cost and suggests a potential for CBD land use changes (e.g., repurposing CBD parking spots as commercial and residential areas) after the mass adoption of AVs. To reduce the total system cost, an urban planner may regulate commuters’ decisions by adjusting parking fees and/or imposing congestion tolls as a short-term measure, or adjusting infrastructure, for example, converting CBD parking spaces to drop-off spots for AVs. Our results indicate that these measures can reduce the total system cost substantially (e.g., up to [Formula: see text] when calibrating our model to data from Pittsburgh). This paper was accepted by Chung Piaw Teo, optimization and decision analytics. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01213 .
title_cn: 自动驾驶车辆能解决通勤停车问题吗？
abstract_cn: 本文研究了自动驾驶汽车（AVs）如何重塑早高峰通勤出行模式以及对中央商务区（CBD）停车的影响。我们开发了一个连续时间博弈论交通模型，该模型考虑了驾驶的关键经济制约因素，如停车费用和交通拥堵，并在均衡状态下描述了通勤者的出发时间和停车位置（CBD停车区内或外）的模式。我们的分析表明，在均衡状态下，所有AV通勤者可能选择在CBD外停车，与全人驾驶车辆的情况相比，这将增加车辆小时数和行驶里程。这一变化增加了总系统成本，并暗示在AVs大规模普及后，CBD土地使用可能发生变化（例如，将CBD停车位改为商业和住宅区域）。为了降低总系统成本，城市规划者可以通过调整停车费用和/或征收拥堵费来规范通勤者的决策，作为短期措施，或者调整基础设施，例如，将CBD停车位改为AV的上下车点。我们的结果表明，这些措施可以显著降低总系统成本（例如，当将我们的模型校准到匹兹堡的数据时，降低幅度可达[公式：见文本]）。本文由Chung Piaw Teo接受，涉及优化和决策分析。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01213获取。

title: The Impacts of “Baby-Friendly” Hospital Designations
abstract: This study considers a voluntary hospital certification program and how it shapes patient health outcomes. The Baby-Friendly Hospital Initiative designates participating hospitals as “Baby-Friendly” if they adhere to various practices thought to promote breastfeeding. We estimate the effect of being born in a Baby-Friendly hospital on breastfeeding initiation and infant health. Identification relies on a within-mother analysis that compares siblings who were born in the same hospital: one when the hospital was not certified and another when the hospital was certified. Data come from South Carolina birth certificates from 2010 to 2019 linked to subsequent emergency department records, hospital records, and death certificates. The results indicate that Baby-Friendly accreditation has no widespread effects on breastfeeding initiation. It does, however, increase breastfeeding rates among a subset of Black mothers with a history of bottle-feeding. Infants exposed to the designation are more likely to leave the hospital in under two days, and there is also some evidence of subsequent reductions in healthcare utilization in the next year. We do not find precise changes in all-cause one-year mortality, although we do observe a marginally significant reduction in deaths caused by “extreme immaturity.” This paper was accepted by Anita Carson, healthcare management. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06422 .
title_cn: “母乳喂养友好”医院认证的影响
abstract_cn: 本研究考虑了一个自愿医院认证项目及其对患者健康结果的影响。婴儿友好医院倡议将参与的医院指定为“婴儿友好”，前提是它们遵循一些促进母乳喂养的做法。我们估计在婴儿友好医院出生对母乳喂养启动和婴儿健康的影响。识别通过以内母亲为基础的分析来实现，比较在同一家医院出生的兄弟姐妹：一个在医院未获得认证时出生，另一个则在医院获得认证后出生。数据来自2010年至2019年的南卡罗来纳州出生证明，与后续的急诊记录、医院记录和死亡证明相连接。结果表明，婴儿友好认证对母乳喂养启动没有普遍影响。然而，它确实提高了部分有瓶喂历史的黑人母亲的母乳喂养率。接受该认证的婴儿更有可能在不到两天内出院，并且有一些证据表明在接下来的一年里医疗服务的使用有所减少。我们没有发现全因一岁死亡率的精确变化，尽管我们观察到因“极端早产”导致的死亡有所边际显著降低。该论文由医疗管理领域的Anita Carson接受。补充材料：数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06422 上获取。

title: Eliciting Supplier Cooperation for Value Chain Decarbonization: A Field Experiment with Smallholder Farmers in India
abstract: Many firms are pledging to reduce greenhouse gas emissions across their value chains. However, this requires their suppliers to also adopt more climate-friendly practices for decarbonization. This can involve addressing gaps in not only the suppliers’ ability but also, their willingness to adopt such practices, which can be challenging if the suppliers perceive the practices as risky or potentially detrimental to their economic well-being. We examine the effectiveness of relational investments to help mitigate this challenge, arguing that such investments can serve as a signal of the firm’s commitment toward joint value creation. In a field experiment conducted with supplier farmers in a multinational firm’s agricultural supply chain in India, we examine the impact of two kinds of relational investments in providing the farmers with customized agricultural services that they valued. In the first intervention, the firm’s field officers offered the farmers support specific to the crop that the firm sourced from them. The second intervention additionally involved bringing in expert agronomists to also provide the farmers with support on broader agricultural matters of interest to them. Relative to a control condition in which the farmers only received training on the relevant climate-friendly practices, both interventions improved the farmers’ adoption of the recommended practices. The second intervention was more impactful than the first in improving the farmers’ practice adoption as well as their retention with the firm. Exploratory mediation analysis and post-experiment field interviews suggest that these findings are partly driven by the farmers’ positive perception of the firm’s relational investments. This paper was accepted by Anita McGahan, business strategy. Funding: The authors acknowledge financial support from INSEAD [Kurt Björklund Research Fund]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05744 .
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 引导供应商合作实现价值链脱碳：与印度小农户的实地实验
abstract_cn: 许多企业承诺在其价值链中减少温室气体排放。然而，这要求其供应商也采取更为气候友好的脱碳实践。这可能涉及到不仅要填补供应商能力上的差距，还要解决他们愿意采取这些实践的意愿问题，如果供应商将这些实践视为有风险或可能对其经济福祉产生不利影响，这将变得更加困难。我们考察了关系投资在缓解这一挑战中的有效性，认为此类投资可以作为企业对共同创造价值承诺的信号。在一项针对印度一家跨国公司农业供应链供应农户的现场实验中，我们研究了两种关系投资的影响，这些投资为农民提供了他们所重视的定制化农业服务。在第一次干预中，企业的现场工作人员为农民提供了与企业从他们那里采购的作物相关的具体支持。第二次干预则进一步邀请了专家农业学家，为农民提供更广泛的农业知识支持。与仅接受气候友好实践相关培训的对照组相比，这两项干预都改善了农民对推荐实践的采用。第二次干预在提高农民实践采用率及其与企业的粘性方面的效果优于第一次干预。初步的中介分析和实验后的现场访谈表明，这些发现部分是由于农民对企业关系投资的积极评价所驱动。本文由Anita McGahan接受，主题为商业战略。资金支持：作者感谢INSEAD [Kurt Björklund研究基金]提供的财政支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05744获取。

title: The Need for Fees at a DEX: How Increases in Fees Can Increase DEX Trading Volume
abstract: We model endogenous trading and liquidity provision at a decentralized exchange (DEX) and demonstrate that increasing DEX trading fees can increase DEX trading volume. DEXs employ a mechanical pricing rule whereby price impacts decrease with inventory that DEXs acquire by offering fee revenues to investors. Consequently, higher DEX fees can incentivize higher inventory, thereby reducing price impacts. Moreover, the reduction of price impact can offset the increase in fees so that the marginal cost of DEX trading declines despite charging a higher trading fee. In turn, lower DEX marginal trading costs lead to an increase in DEX trading volume. This paper was accepted by Agostino Capponi, finance.
title_cn: DEX收取费用的必要性：费用增加如何能提升DEX交易量
abstract_cn: 我们对去中心化交易所（DEX）中的内生交易和流动性提供进行了建模，并证明了提高DEX交易费用可以增加DEX交易量。DEX采用一种机械定价规则，即价格影响随着DEX通过向投资者提供费用收入而获得的库存量的增加而减少。因此，更高的DEX费用可以激励更高的库存，从而减少价格影响。此外，价格影响的减少可以抵消费用的增加，使得尽管收取更高的交易费用，DEX的边际交易成本仍然下降。反过来，较低的DEX边际交易成本会导致DEX交易量的增加。本文已被Agostino Capponi接受，属于金融领域。

title: Simple and (Approximately) Optimal Mechanism in Efficiency and Equality Tradeoff
abstract: Many large cities have adopted a policy of restricting the number of new vehicle licenses in order to address the challenges of traffic and air pollution problems. An important question that then arises is how to allocate these limited new license quotas among a large set of demanders while taking both social efficiency and equality into consideration. Inspired by this practical problem, we study the problem of designing simple and optimal mechanisms to tradeoff between efficiency and equality in a similar public goods allocation problem. We first propose a truthful two-group mechanism framework that is both general and simple and then use it to compute the optimal solution that maximizes social efficiency while guaranteeing a certain level of equality. Interestingly and surprisingly, under some natural conditions regarding the players’ private values, we show that the optimal mechanisms within the proposed framework are always the mechanisms that first run an auction and then run a lottery (ATL for short). In addition, beyond the framework and those conditions, we prove that the ATL mechanism can always guarantee at least [Formula: see text] ([Formula: see text] is the minimum equality level) of the optimal solution efficiency. This approximation ratio can in practice be further improved to near-optimal when resources are scarce and the natural conditions hold. We further establish a theoretical connection between these natural conditions and common value distributions, demonstrating that these conditions are widely satisfied in practice. Finally, we implement several experiments to verify the ATL mechanism’s optimality and robustness. This paper was accepted by Chung Piaw Teo, optimization. Funding: This work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72401252, 72192830, 72192832, 62472428, 72192804, 72301235, 72394360 and 72394363]; the Public Computing Cloud, Renmin University of China, the fund for building world-class universities (disciplines) of Renmin University of China; the Beijing Natural Science Foundation [Grant Z220001]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02785 .
title_cn: 效率与公平权衡中的简单与（近似）最优机制
abstract_cn: 许多大城市采取限制新车牌数量的政策，以应对交通和空气污染问题的挑战。由此产生的一个重要问题是如何在考虑社会效率和公平的情况下，在大量需求者之间分配这些有限的新车牌配额。受到这一实际问题的启发，我们研究了设计简单且最佳机制的问题，以在类似的公共物品分配问题中权衡效率与公平。我们首先提出了一个既通用又简单的诚实双组机制框架，并利用它计算出能够最大化社会效率且保证一定公平水平的最优解。有趣且令人惊讶的是，在关于参与者私人价值的一些自然条件下，我们表明，在所提出的框架内，最优机制始终是先进行拍卖，然后再进行抽签的机制（简称为ATL机制）。此外，超出该框架及其条件之外，我们证明ATL机制始终能保证最优解效率的至少[公式见文本]（[公式见文本]为最低公平水平）。当资源稀缺且自然条件成立时，这一近似比率在实践中还可以进一步提高到接近最优。我们进一步建立了这些自然条件与共同价值分布之间的理论联系，证明这些条件在实践中被广泛满足。最后，我们实施了若干实验以验证ATL机制的最优性和稳健性。本文已被Teo Chung Piaw接受，涉及优化。资助：本工作得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [项目编号72401252, 72192830, 72192832, 62472428, 72192804, 72301235, 72394360 和 72394363]；中国人民大学公共计算云、世界一流大学（学科）建设资金；北京市自然科学基金 [资助编号Z220001]。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02785 获取。

title: Optimal Tax Timing with Transaction Costs
abstract: We develop a dynamic portfolio model incorporating capital gains tax (CGT), transaction costs, and year-end taxation. We find that even tiny transaction costs can lead to significant deferral of large losses and that transaction costs affect loss deferrals much more than gain deferrals. Our model can thus help explain the puzzle that even when investors face equal long-term/short-term CGT rates, they may still defer realizing large capital losses for an extended period of time, displaying the disposition effect. In addition, we find that misestimating transaction costs is costly. We also provide several unique, empirically testable predictions and shed light on recently proposed tax policy changes. This paper was accepted by Agostino Capponi, finance. Funding: M. Dai was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72432005 and 12071333], the Research Grants Council of Hong Kong [Grants 15217123, 15212324, 15213422, and T32-615/24), and The Hong Kong Polytechnic University [Grants P0039114, P0042456, and P0042708]. Y. Lei was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72271112]. C. Yang acknowledges support from the Research Grants Council, University Grants Committee, Hong Kong [Grants ECS 24207621 and GRF 14207723]. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03118 .
title_cn: 交易成本下的最佳税收时机选择
abstract_cn: 我们开发了一个动态投资组合模型，结合了资本利得税（CGT）、交易成本和年末税收。我们发现，即使是微小的交易成本也能导致大额损失的显著递延，而交易成本对损失递延的影响远大于对收益递延的影响。因此，我们的模型可以帮助解释一个难题，即使投资者面临相等的长期/短期CGT税率，他们仍可能会将大额资本损失递延很长一段时间，表现出处置效应。此外，我们发现错误估计交易成本是代价高昂的。我们还提供了几个独特的、可实证检验的预测，并对近期提议的税收政策变化提供了启示。本论文已被Agostino Capponi接受，审稿领域为金融学。资金支持：M. Dai得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持[资助号72432005和12071333]，香港研究资助局的支持[资助号15217123、15212324、15213422和T32-615/24]，以及香港理工大学的支持[资助号P0039114、P0042456和P0042708]。Y. Lei得到了中国国家自然科学基金[资助号72271112]的支持。C. Yang感谢香港研究资助局、大学资助委员会的支持[资助号ECS 24207621和GRF 14207723]。补充材料：数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03118获取。

title: How Do Different Remote Work Arrangements Impact Employee Job Satisfaction and Retention?
abstract: We study how working remotely impacts employee job satisfaction and retention using unique data on the remote work arrangements of nearly 165,000 employees. Our findings show that the positive association between working remotely more frequently and job satisfaction diminishes substantially after controlling for employee compensation, occupation, demographics, and workplace characteristics (e.g., feeling appreciated at work). Moreover, remote work is associated with a higher intention to leave the firm after considering these other factors. This suggests that workplace characteristics beyond remote work have a more consequential association with job satisfaction and retention than remote work itself. Using variation in job tasks and worker–manager relationships, we find that working remotely more frequently confers higher job satisfaction for employees in low-coordination roles or those who perceive their direct supervisors unfavorably. The findings suggest that remote work plays a more limited role in shaping job satisfaction and retention relative to broader workplace characteristics, and that its value depends on how well work arrangements are matched to employees’ strengths, coordination requirements, and managerial context. This paper was accepted by Shiva Rajgopal, accounting. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07017 .
title_cn: 不同的远程工作安排如何影响员工的工作满意度和留任率？
abstract_cn: 我们研究了远程工作如何影响员工的工作满意度和保留率，使用了近165,000名员工的远程工作安排的独特数据。我们的研究结果显示，远程工作与工作满意度之间的正相关关系在控制了员工薪酬、职业、人口统计特征和工作场所特征（例如，感受到工作的认可）后显著减弱。此外，考虑到这些其他因素后，远程工作与员工的离职意图更高相关。这表明，除了远程工作以外的工作场所特征与工作满意度和保留率的关联性更重要。通过分析工作任务和员工与管理者的关系的变化，我们发现，对于低协调角色的员工或那些对直接上司持负面看法的员工，频繁远程工作能带来更高的工作满意度。研究结果表明，相较于更广泛的工作场所特征，远程工作在塑造工作满意度和保留率方面的作用更为有限，其价值取决于工作安排与员工的优势、协调需求和管理环境的匹配程度。本文被Shiva Rajgopal（会计学）接受。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07017 获取。

title: Information Provision and the Curse of Knowledge
abstract: Common wisdom suggests that the “curse of knowledge” (COK), whereby better-informed individuals are unable to ignore their private information when forecasting others’ beliefs, reduces the quality of communication. We study how this bias affects costly information provision by a founder who wants to raise financing from an outside investor. When the founder exhibits COK about the content of her communication, there is less information provision and payoffs tend to be lower for both players. However, we show that when the founder exhibits COK about the context of her message, the bias can lead to more information production and better investment decisions. Moreover, this can exacerbate the conflict of interest between the founder and the outsider. This paper was accepted by Ranjani Krishnan, accounting. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01839 .
title_cn: 信息提供与知识的诅咒
abstract_cn: 常识认为，“知识诅咒”（COK）使得信息更丰富的个体在预测他人信念时无法忽视其私有信息，从而降低了沟通质量。我们研究这种偏见如何影响希望从外部投资者那里筹集资金的创始人在提供信息时的成本。当创始人对于其沟通内容表现出知识诅咒时，信息提供减少，且两位参与者的收益往往较低。然而，我们表明，当创始人对于其信息的背景表现出知识诅咒时，这种偏见可以导致更多信息的产生以及更好的投资决策。此外，这可能加剧创始人与外部投资者之间的利益冲突。本文已被Ranjani Krishnan接受，属于会计学领域。补充材料：数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01839获取。

title: Tail-Driven Nonparametric Estimation for State Price Densities
abstract: This paper proposes and implements a novel nonparametric method for estimating the state price density (SPD) over the entire state space, including the tails. This SPD estimator achieves shape consistency properties in theory, particularly at the tails. Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate the accuracy and robustness of our method. In particular, our estimator accurately captures the risk-neutral tail distribution, which is often underestimated by existing alternative methods. In an empirical analysis based on Standard and Poor’s 500 options data, we evaluate the out-of-sample performance of our SPD estimation method and demonstrate that the estimates can serve as effective indicators for market conditions and exhibit predictive power for asset returns. Combining these perspectives, we suggest that our SPD estimator renders a valuable tool for risk management and asset pricing. This paper was accepted by Kay Giesecke, finance. Funding: The research of C. Li was supported by the Guanghua School of Management, the Center for Statistical Science, the High-Performance Computing Platform, and the Key Laboratory of Mathematical Economics and Quantitative Finance (Ministry of Education) at Peking University as well as the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72173003]. The research of X. Song was supported by the Guanghua School of Management, the Center for Statistical Science, and the Key Laboratory of Mathematical Economics and Quantitative Finance (Ministry of Education) at Peking University as well as the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72373007 and 72333001]. The research of Y. Wan was supported by the School of Management Science and Engineering and the Coordinated Innovation Center for Computable Modeling in Management Science at Tianjin University of Finance and Economics as well as the Tianjin Municipal Education Commission [Grant 2022SK188]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03236 .
title_cn: 尾驱动非参数估计状态价格密度
abstract_cn: 本文提出并实现了一种新颖的非参数方法，用于估计整个状态空间（包括尾部）的状态价格密度（SPD）。该状态价格密度估计器在理论上实现了形状一致性特性，特别是在尾部。蒙特卡洛模拟验证了我们方法的准确性和稳健性。特别是，我们的估计器能够准确捕捉风险中性尾部分布，而这一点在现有的替代方法中常常被低估。在基于标准普尔500期权数据的实证分析中，我们评估了我们的状态价格密度估计方法的样本外表现，并证明这些估计可以作为市场状况的有效指标，并对资产回报具有预测能力。综合这些视角，我们建议我们的状态价格密度估计器为风险管理和资产定价提供了一个有价值的工具。本文已被凯·吉塞克（Kay Giesecke）接受，专业为金融。资助信息：C. Li的研究得到了北京大学光华管理学院、统计科学中心、高性能计算平台以及数学经济与数量金融重点实验室（教育部）的支持，同时也得到了中国国家自然科学基金[资助编号72173003]的支持。X. Song的研究得到了北京大学光华管理学院、统计科学中心以及数学经济与数量金融重点实验室（教育部）的支持，同时也得到了中国国家自然科学基金[资助编号72373007和72333001]的支持。Y. Wan的研究得到了天津财经大学管理科学与工程学院及可计算建模协同创新中心的支持，同时也得到了天津市教育委员会[资助编号2022SK188]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03236 访问。

title: Expectations Matter: When (Not) to Use Machine Learning Earnings Forecasts
abstract: We comprehensively examine the usefulness of machine learning technology to predict a firm’s earnings and offer three main findings. First, although prior literature suggests machine learning can offer better earnings forecasts than analysts, we show that this result is highly sensitive to machine learning model specification choices (i.e., 80% of evaluated machine forecasts fail to beat analysts). Second, we examine why the most accurate machine learning forecast consistently beats analysts, finding that they correct for predictable analyst biases that are both linear and nonlinear and largely relate to analysts’ prior forecast errors, forecasted earnings levels, and the firm’s stock price. Finally, we find that investors’ earnings expectations, as revealed through stock prices, largely—but do not fully—correct for these predictable analyst biases, with delayed price realization up to nine months. In additional analysis, we find that optimal machine learning specification choices remain stable over time and that, although the machine’s outperformance narrows in recent periods, it remains substantial among small-cap stocks. Overall, our study moves beyond the question of whether machine forecasts are superior to human forecasts and instead focuses on which machine forecast specifications matter, as well as when and why machine forecasts are most superior. In so doing, we provide code and estimates for the most accurate machine forecast specification and demonstrate that investors’ expectations appear to largely (but not fully) align with them. This paper was accepted by Suraj Srinivasan, accounting. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05808 .
title_cn: 期望很重要：何时（不）使用机器学习盈利预测
abstract_cn: 我们全面考察了机器学习技术在预测公司收益方面的有效性，并提供了三项主要发现。首先，虽然既往文献表明机器学习能够提供比分析师更好的收益预测，但我们发现这一结果在很大程度上依赖于机器学习模型的具体选择（即评估的机器预测中有80%未能超越分析师）。其次，我们考察了为何最精准的机器学习预测始终优于分析师，发现它们能够纠正分析师可预测的偏差，这些偏差既包含线性也包含非线性，并且主要与分析师之前的预测错误、预测的收益水平及公司的股价相关。最后，我们发现投资者的收益预期通过股价反映出来，在很大程度上——但并非完全——纠正了这些可预测的分析师偏差，价格实现存在延迟，最长可达九个月。在进一步分析中，我们发现最佳的机器学习模型选择在时间上保持稳定，尽管机器的超越表现近年来有所收窄，但在小盘股中仍然显著。总体而言，我们的研究超越了机器预测是否优于人类预测的问题，而是聚焦于哪些机器预测规格更为重要，以及机器预测在何时何因表现最优。在此过程中，我们提供了最准确的机器预测规格的代码和估计，并展示投资者的预期在很大程度上（但并未完全）与之对齐。本文由会计学的Suraj Srinivasan接受。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05808 获取。

title: Is Multicloud the Future? Desirability of Compatibility in Cloud Computing Market
abstract: Leading online service providers, as major customers of cloud computing services, are increasingly adopting a multicloud strategy to enhance service delivery across different locations. However, compatibility issues among various cloud platforms complicate the implementation of this strategy. To address this challenge, cloud providers can offer a multicloud management platform that acts as a bridge between distinct cloud environments. Although such a platform can enhance customers’ multicloud experience, it also entails additional costs for the cloud providers. Our paper examines cloud providers’ compatibility decisions and the impact of compatibility on competing cloud providers and their customers. Our findings reveal that, when compatibility is established in equilibrium, cloud providers consistently set higher prices for their resources than when compatibility is absent. Additionally, we find that a cloud provider with greater market dominance always attracts more demand, whereas the rival with smaller market dominance may experience a demand decrease. Interestingly, when a cloud provider establishes compatibility in equilibrium, the competitor’s profit always increases, although customer welfare can decline under compatibility. These insights, along with other findings presented in the paper, can support cloud providers in deciding when to establish compatibility and how to price their resources effectively. Furthermore, we provide guidelines for policymakers on when compatibility could enhance customer welfare, supporting effective implementation of compatibility strategies. This paper was accepted by D. J. Wu, information systems. Funding: S. Kumar thanks Temple Center for International Business Education and Research for partially supporting this research. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01359 .
title_cn: 多云是未来吗？云计算市场中兼容性的重要性
abstract_cn: 领先的在线服务提供商作为云计算服务的主要客户，越来越多地采用多云策略，以增强在不同地点的服务交付。然而，各种云平台之间的兼容性问题使这一战略的实施变得复杂。为了解决这一挑战，云服务提供商可以提供一个多云管理平台，作为不同云环境之间的桥梁。尽管这样的平台可以提升客户的多云体验，但这也为云服务提供商带来了额外的成本。我们的论文探讨了云服务提供商的兼容性决策以及兼容性对竞争云服务提供商及其客户的影响。我们的研究结果显示，当兼容性在均衡状态下建立时，云服务提供商对其资源的定价通常高于缺乏兼容性时的定价。此外，我们发现，市场主导力较大的云服务提供商总是能够吸引更多的需求，而市场主导力较小的竞争者可能会经历需求下降。有趣的是，当云服务提供商在均衡状态下建立兼容性时，竞争对手的利润总是会增加，尽管客户福利在兼容性下可能会下降。这些洞察以及论文中提出的其他研究发现，可以帮助云服务提供商确定何时建立兼容性以及如何有效定价其资源。此外，我们为政策制定者提供了关于何时兼容性可能增强客户福利的指导，以支持兼容性战略的有效实施。本论文已被信息系统领域的D. J. Wu接受。资助：S. Kumar感谢坦普尔国际商业教育与研究中心对本研究的部分资助。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01359 获取。

title: A Note on “Corporate Provision of Public Goods”
abstract: Morgan and Tumlinson (2019, Management Science 65(10), 4489–4504) study a game in which citizens first fund a company venture or purchase bonds, and then bondholders and the firm’s manager, acting on behalf of the shareholders, contribute to a public good. One of their major results is that the venture is funded with positive probability in all trembling-hand perfect Nash equilibria. The purpose of this note is to prove the existence of economies in which the venture is not funded in all trembling-hand perfect Nash equilibria. This paper was accepted by Joshua Gans, business strategy.
title_cn: 关于“企业公共物品提供”的一则说明
abstract_cn: Morgan和Tumlinson（2019年，《管理科学》65(10)，4489–4504）研究了一个游戏，在这个游戏中，公民首先资助一个公司项目或购买债券，然后债权人和公司的经理（代表股东）共同为公共产品做出贡献。他们的一个主要结果是，在所有颤抖手完美纳什均衡中，该项目以正概率获得资金。本笔记的目的是证明存在一些经济体，在这些经济体中，该项目在所有颤抖手完美纳什均衡中都没有获得资金。本文由商业战略领域的Joshua Gans接受。

title: Forecasting Earnings from Home
abstract: We examine the impact of working from home (WFH) practices on the financial services industry, focusing on sell-side equity analysts. We find that analysts who previously benefited from access to in-person interactions with other informed parties experience a greater decline in earnings forecast accuracy following the COVID lockdown and the shift to WFH. Notably, the informational advantage associated with the in-person access disappears during the lockdown and returns once restrictions are lifted. Our results are stronger for all-star analysts and analysts with shorter coverage periods, suggesting that all-star analysts rely relatively more on access to in-person interactions prelockdown and that accumulated firm-specific knowledge mitigates the loss of in-person interactions. Our results remain robust across alternative analyst performance measures. We conclude that, despite recent advances in communications technology, AI, and machine learning, in-person interactions remain a unique and difficult to substitute information channel for sell-side research providers and that WFH impedes information flows between market participants in capital markets. This paper was accepted by Suraj Srinivasan, accounting. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.04637 .
title_cn: 家庭收入预测
abstract_cn: 我们研究了远程办公（WFH）实践对金融服务行业的影响，重点关注卖方股权分析师。我们的发现表明，曾经受益于与其他知情方进行面对面互动的分析师，在经历COVID封锁和转向远程办公后，盈利预测的准确度出现了更大的下降。值得注意的是，面对面接触带来的信息优势在封锁期间消失，并在限制解除后恢复。我们的结果在明星分析师和覆盖期较短的分析师中更为显著，这表明明星分析师在封锁前相对更依赖于面对面互动的机会，而累积的公司特定知识则缓解了面对面互动丧失带来的影响。我们的结果在其他分析师表现衡量标准下依然稳健。我们得出结论，尽管通信技术、人工智能和机器学习近期有所发展，面对面的互动仍然是卖方研究提供者一个独特且难以替代的信息渠道，而远程办公阻碍了资本市场中市场参与者之间的信息流动。本文已由Suraj Srinivasan（会计学）接受。补充材料：数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.04637 获取。

title: Multidimensional Signaling with Supplier Credit Guarantees
abstract: This paper investigates credit guarantees in a supply chain setting involving a supplier, a capital-constrained buyer, and a bank. We find that under complete information, credit guarantees increase order quantities but paradoxically raise wholesale prices, overall rendering the credit guarantee not useful for improving the operational efficiency. However, under information asymmetry, either a partial or full guarantee emerges in equilibrium, with the wholesale price maintained at its optimal full-information level. This underscores the pivotal role of credit guarantees in effective signaling and delineates the distinct functions of the wholesale price and the guarantee—the former on operational efficiency and the latter on signaling efficacy. Further comparative analysis of the supplier and buyer performances under the two contract types reveals that credit guarantees do not always benefit both parties. This paper was accepted by Jayashankar Swaminathan, operations management. Funding: H. Liu was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72272149 and 72394374]. H. Song was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72501259 and W2411062]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07052 .
title_cn: 具有供应商信用担保的多维信号传递
abstract_cn: 本文研究了在供应链环境中涉及供应商、资金受限的买方和银行的信用担保问题。我们发现，在完全信息的情况下，信用担保增加了订单数量，但悖论地导致批发价格上升，整体上使得信用担保对于提高运营效率并不实用。然而，在信息不对称的情况下，平衡状态下会出现部分或完全保证，批发价格维持在其最优的完全信息水平。这强调了信用担保在有效信号传递中的关键作用，并区分了批发价格和担保的不同功能——前者与运营效率相关，后者则与信号有效性相关。进一步对两种合同类型下供应商和买方表现的比较分析显示，信用担保并不总是惠及双方。本文由操作管理领域的Jayashankar Swaminathan接受。资助项目：H. Liu得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助编号72272149和72394374]。H. Song得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助编号72501259和W2411062]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07052获取。

title: Matchmaking Strategies for Maximizing Player Engagement in Video Games
abstract: Managing player engagement is vital to the online gaming industry, given that many games generate revenue through subscription models and microtransactions. We scrutinize engagement management in the prevalent category of competitive video games, where players are frequently matched against one another, and matchmaking systems substantially impact engagement. We propose a dynamic model to analyze player dynamics and optimize matchmaking policies for maximum engagement. Our model takes into account two essential factors in competitive games: heterogeneous skill levels and players’ aversion to losing. Additionally, the model enables us to consider pay-to-win strategies and AI-powered bots, which are contentious methods of influencing player engagement and endogenously affect the optimal matchmaking policy. To provide sharp insights, we analyze a specific case where there are two skill levels, and players churn only after experiencing a losing streak. The optimal matchmaking policy considers both short-term rewards by matching players myopically and long-term rewards by adjusting skill distribution. The pay-to-win system can positively impact player engagement when the majority of players are low-skilled, because adopting pay-to-win also affects skill distribution. This result challenges the conventional wisdom that typically regards pay-to-win as trading player experience for revenue. When incorporating AI-powered bots, we demonstrate that optimizing the matchmaking policy can significantly reduce the number of required bots. We then extend our model and conduct a case study with real data from an online chess platform. The optimal policy can improve engagement by 4%–6% or reduce the percentage of bots by 3% in comparison with skill-based matchmaking. This paper was accepted by Jeannette Song, operations management. Funding: A. N. Elmachtoub is partially supported by NSF [Grant CMMI-1944428]. X. Lei is partially supported by the Hong Kong Research Grants Council [Early Career Scheme 27503123]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02957 .
title_cn: 最大化视频游戏中玩家参与度的配对策略
abstract_cn: 管理玩家参与度对于在线游戏行业至关重要，因为许多游戏通过订阅模式和微交易来产生收入。我们深入研究在竞争性电子游戏这一普遍类型中的参与管理，在这种游戏中，玩家经常被匹配对战，而匹配系统对参与度具有重要影响。我们提出了一种动态模型，以分析玩家动态并优化匹配政策，以实现最大参与度。我们的模型考虑了竞争游戏中的两个基本因素：异质的技能水平和玩家对失败的厌恶。此外，该模型使我们能够考虑付费获胜策略和人工智能驱动的机器人，这些都是影响玩家参与度的有争议的方法，并内生性地影响最佳匹配政策。为了提供明确的见解，我们分析了一个特定案例，其中有两种技能水平，且玩家只能在经历连败后流失。最佳匹配政策在短期内通过直观匹配玩家来考虑短期奖励，同时通过调整技能分布来考虑长期奖励。当大多数玩家为低技能时，付费获胜系统可以积极影响玩家参与度，因为采用付费获胜策略也会影响技能分布。这个结果挑战了传统认知，即通常将付费获胜视为用玩家体验换取收入。当引入人工智能驱动的机器人时，我们证明优化匹配政策可以显著减少所需机器人的数量。随后，我们扩展了模型，并使用来自在线国际象棋平台的真实数据进行了案例研究。与基于技能的匹配相比，最佳政策可以将参与度提高4%-6%，或将机器人比例减少3%。本文已被运营管理领域的Jeannette Song接受。资助：A. N. Elmachtoub部分获得NSF资助[Grant CMMI-1944428]。X. Lei部分获得香港研究资助局 [早期职业计划27503123]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02957获得。

title: An Economic Analysis of Online Ad Fraud Deterrence
abstract: Ad fraud is increasingly becoming a major concern in online advertising, with publishers being one of the key sources of fraudulent ad traffic. Although ad fraud deterrence is a critical problem from both technical and economic perspectives, past research has not considered their interplay. Our paper fills this critical gap by building a game-theoretic model wherein an ad network (an intermediary between publishers and advertisers) strategically leverages its technological tool (the configuration of a given fraud detection technology) and economic tool (the payment to publishers) to deter ad fraud and maximize profits effectively. Our analysis generates several interesting findings. For example, as the fraud detection technology and fraud generation techniques improve, we show that although the ad network needs to respond by making the technology configuration stricter to dampen fraud motives and admit less ad traffic, it may sometimes need to increase the payment. Furthermore, although many stakeholders advocate instituting strict legislation and policies to reduce malicious publishers, we show that this may sometimes fail to reduce fraud traffic and even hurt an ad network’s profit. In addition, our results provide other useful implications that present a new theoretical perspective on the incentive problems in ad fraud generation and detection. Our study also draws valuable insights for ad networks into implementing effective ad fraud deterrence policies and for advertisers to audit and monitor their ad campaign performance. This paper was accepted by Hemant Bhargava, information systems. Funding: S. Kumar thanks the Temple Center for International Business Education and Research for partially supporting this research. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02201 .
title_cn: 在线广告欺诈威慑的经济分析
abstract_cn: 广告欺诈在在线广告中日益成为一个主要问题，出版商是欺诈广告流量的关键来源之一。尽管从技术和经济角度来看，广告欺诈的威慑是一个重要问题，但过去的研究并未考虑这两者之间的相互作用。我们的论文填补了这一关键空白，构建了一个博弈论模型，其中广告网络（作为出版商和广告主之间的中介）战略性地利用其技术工具（特定欺诈检测技术的配置）和经济工具（对出版商的支付）来有效地威慑广告欺诈并最大化利润。我们的分析产生了几个有趣的发现。例如，随着欺诈检测技术和欺诈生成技术的提升，我们表明，尽管广告网络需要通过使技术配置更严格来抑制欺诈动机并减少广告流量，但有时它可能需要增加支付。此外，尽管许多利益相关者倡导实施严格的立法和政策以减少恶意出版商，但我们表明，这有时可能无法减少欺诈流量，甚至会损害广告网络的利润。此外，我们的结果提供了其他有用的启示，为广告欺诈生成和检测中的激励问题提供了新的理论视角。我们的研究还为广告网络实施有效的广告欺诈威慑政策提供了宝贵的见解，并为广告主审计和监控其广告活动表现提供了参考。本文已被信息系统领域的Hemant Bhargava接受。资助：S. Kumar感谢坦普尔国际商业教育与研究中心对本研究的部分支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02201获取。

title: An Integer Programming Approach for Quick-Commerce Assortment Planning
abstract: In this paper, we explore the challenge of assortment planning in the context of quick commerce, a rapidly growing business model that aims to deliver time-sensitive products. In order to achieve quick delivery to satisfy the immediate demands of online customers in close proximity, personalized online assortments need to be included in brick-and-mortar store offerings. With the presence of this physical linkage requirement and distinct multinomial logit choice models for online consumer segments, the firm seeks to maximize overall revenue by selecting an optimal assortment of products for local stores and by tailoring a personalized assortment for each online consumer segment. We employ an integer programming approach to solve this NP-hard problem to global optimality. In particular, we derive convex hull results to represent the consumer choice of each online segment under a general class of operational constraints, and to characterize the relation between assortment decisions and choice probabilities of products. Our convex hull results, coupled with a modified choice probability–ordered separation algorithm, yield formulations that provide a significant computational advantage over existing methods. Finally, we illustrate how our convex hull results can be used to address other assortment optimization problems. This paper was accepted by Chung Piaw Teo, optimization. Funding: Y. Rong’s work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72025201 and 72221001]. T. He’s work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72101146 and 72231003], and Y. Wang’s work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72331006]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02996 .
title_cn: 一种用于快速商业组合规划的整数规划方法
abstract_cn: 在本文中，我们探讨了快速商业背景下的产品组合规划挑战，这是一种快速增长的商业模式，旨在提供时间敏感的产品。为了实现快速配送，以满足附近在线客户的即时需求，个性化的在线产品组合需要纳入实体店的商品提供中。考虑到这种物理连接需求以及针对在线消费者细分市场的独特多项式对数选择模型，企业旨在通过为本地商店选择最佳产品组合，并为每个在线消费者细分市场量身定制个性化产品组合来最大化整体收入。我们采用整数规划方法来解决这一 NP-hard 问题，以达到全局最优。特别是，我们推导出凸包结果，以表示在一般运营约束条件下，每个在线细分市场的消费者选择，并刻画产品组合决策与产品选择概率之间的关系。我们的凸包结果，结合经过修改的选择概率有序分离算法，提供了相较于现有方法显著的计算优势。最后，我们说明了如何利用我们的凸包结果来解决其他产品组合优化问题。本文由 Chung Piaw Teo 接收，领域为优化。资助信息：Y. Rong 的工作得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持[资助号 72025201 和 72221001]。T. He 的工作得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持[资助号 72101146 和 72231003]，Y. Wang 的工作得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持[资助号 72331006]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02996 获取。

title: The Value of Flexibility from Opaque Selling
abstract: An opaque product refers to a subset of products that only differ in some secondary attribute (such as color or style). After a customer purchases an opaque product, one of the products in the subset is then allocated to the customer. Selling opaque products has become popular on e-commerce platforms, because it is a source of flexibility that reduces demand variability and hence inventory cost. In this paper, we seek to understand how the design of opaque product configurations and the fraction of customers choosing opaque products impact the value of flexibility arising from opaque selling. The key finding from our study is the following insight: A modest opaque selling strategy where (i) the opaque options contain small subsets and (ii) only a small fraction of customers buy opaque products achieves substantial cost savings (compared with nonopaque traditional selling). Moreover, the cost savings of this modest opaque strategy is on the same order as a fully flexible scenario where all customers buy an opaque product. Our analysis relies on exploring a novel connection of multiproduct inventory management to the balls-into-bins framework along with a simple balancing policy for opaque selling. As a byproduct of our analysis, we show that the simple balancing policy is asymptotically optimal. For extensions outside of our theoretical analysis, we conduct extensive numerical experiments to show that our core insights continue to hold. This paper was accepted by Jayashankar Swaminathan, operations management. Funding: This work was supported by the Division of Civil, Mechanical and Manufacturing Innovation [Grant 1944428]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2019.02983 .
title_cn: 不透明销售的灵活性价值
abstract_cn: 不透明产品是指一类仅在一些次要属性（如颜色或款式）上有所不同的产品子集。在客户购买了一个不透明产品后，便会将该子集中的一个产品分配给客户。在电子商务平台上销售不透明产品已经变得越来越流行，因为它能够降低需求波动，从而减少库存成本。本文旨在研究不透明产品配置的设计以及选择不透明产品的客户比例如何影响由不透明销售带来的灵活性价值。我们研究的主要发现是：一种适度的不透明销售策略，其中（i）不透明选项包含小的子集，以及（ii）只有一小部分客户购买不透明产品，能够实现显著的成本节约（与传统的非不透明销售相比）。此外，这种适度的不透明策略所带来的成本节约与一种完全灵活的情境下所有客户购买不透明产品时的成本节约在同一数量级。我们的分析依赖于将多产品库存管理与球入箱框架之间的新颖联系，以及针对不透明销售的简单平衡策略。作为我们分析的副产品，我们展示了这种简单的平衡策略是渐近最优的。为了扩展我们的理论分析之外，我们进行了广泛的数值实验，以验证我们的核心见解仍然有效。本文已被运营管理领域的Jayashankar Swaminathan接受。资助信息：本研究得到了土木、机械与制造创新部的支持 [资助编号1944428]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2019.02983 获取。

title: Joint Assortment and Inventory Planning Under the Markov Chain Choice Model
abstract: We address the joint assortment and inventory optimization problem for an online retailer facing a set of N substitutable products. The retailer must determine both the assortment and inventories of these products before the start of the selling season to maximize the expected profit. We consider a setting with dynamic SOBS, where consumers’ choices follow the Markov chain choice model. This is a challenging problem, and even computing the expected profit for a given assortment and inventory solution requires solving an intractable dynamic program. We present a sample average approximation-based algorithm for the problem that achieves a regret of [Formula: see text] with respect to an linear program (LP) upper bound. Our algorithm first selects an assortment by balancing the expected revenue (from a single consumer) and the inventory cost. We do this by identifying a subset of products that can pool demand from the universe of substitutable products without significantly cannibalizing the revenue in the presence of dynamic substitution behavior of consumers. We then use a sample average approximation-based LP to decide on the inventory level for each item in the selected assortment. We numerically show that our algorithm considerably improves the performance over standard approaches from the literature on a wide range of instances of the Markov chain choice model and demonstrate that it carefully handles the inventory of products in the long tail (i.e., products with small mean total demand). This paper was accepted by Chung Piaw Teo, optimization. Funding: This work was supported by Amazon [Research Award (V. Goyal and O. El Housni)] and the National Science Foundation [Grants CMMI 1636046 (V. Goyal) and 2226900 (O. El Housni)]. The research was partially supported by RGC from Hong Kong [Grant 16215820 (G. Gallego)]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01322 .
title_cn: 在马尔可夫链选择模型下的联合产品组合与库存规划
abstract_cn: 我们探讨了一个在线零售商面临N个可替代产品的联合商品组合和库存优化问题。该零售商必须在销售季节开始前确定这些产品的组合和库存，以最大化预期利润。我们考虑了动态自我调节行为的环境，其中消费者的选择遵循马尔可夫链选择模型。这是一个具有挑战性的问题，甚至计算给定商品组合和库存方案的预期利润也需要解决一个难以处理的动态规划问题。我们提出了一种基于样本平均近似的算法，该算法在相对于线性规划（LP）上限的情况下，实现了[公式见文本]的遗憾值。我们的算法首先通过权衡预期收入（来自单个消费者）和库存成本来选择商品组合。我们通过识别一个可以在不显著侵蚀收入的情况下，汇聚来自可替代产品的需求的产品子集来实现这一点，同时考虑到消费者的动态替代行为。然后，我们使用基于样本平均近似的线性规划来决定所选商品组合中每个项目的库存水平。我们通过数值分析表明，我们的算法在广泛的马尔可夫链选择模型实例中，显著提高了性能，且展示了它仔细处理长尾产品（即总需求较小的产品）的库存。本文由Chung Piaw Teo接受，主题为优化。资助：本工作得到了亚马逊的支持[研究奖（V. Goyal和O. El Housni）]和国家科学基金会[资助号CMMI 1636046（V. Goyal）和2226900（O. El Housni）]的支持。研究部分得到了来自香港研究资助局的支持[资助号16215820（G. Gallego）]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01322获得。

title: Optimal Contests with Negative Prizes: Theory and Experiment
abstract: This paper examines the optimal design of contests in the presence of negative prizes and establishes the optimality of a modified all-pay auction with entry fee and reserve. The entry fee always equals the contestants’ liability, and the reserve is weakly higher than in contests without negative prizes. The modification involves awarding all contestants a strictly positive prize if none meet the reserve. This optimal contest better incentivizes high-ability contestants by offering them a higher prize augmented by entry fees, while still ensuring full participation from low-ability contestants. Theoretical analysis demonstrates that when contestants’ liability is sufficiently high, the same contest maximizes both the expected total effort and winner’s effort, with both measures increasing with liability. Numerical simulations show that even with low liability, predictions from the two optimal contests are closely aligned. To test these predictions, we conduct an experiment comparing optimal contests across different liability levels, confirming the “killing-two-birds-with-one-stone” prediction. This paper was accepted by Elena Katok, operations management. Funding: The authors gratefully acknowledge the financial support of the UTS Business School Research Grant, UTS Behavioural Lab Grant and National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72192842, 72203099, 72422018]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03580 .
title_cn: 带有负奖励的最优竞赛：理论与实验
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了在存在负奖品的情况下竞赛的最佳设计，并确立了修改版全支付拍卖的最优性，该拍卖设有入场费和保底金。入场费始终等于参赛者的责任，而保底金则弱于没有负奖品的竞赛中的水平。此修改涉及在没有参赛者满足保底金要求时向所有参赛者颁发严格正值的奖品。这一最佳竞赛通过提供更高的奖品（增加入场费）来更好地激励高能力的参赛者，同时确保低能力参赛者的完全参与。理论分析表明，当参赛者的责任足够高时，同一竞赛能够最大化预期总努力和胜利者的努力，这两项指标随着责任的增加而提高。数值模拟结果显示，即便在责任较低的情况下，两个最佳竞赛的预测依然相似。为了验证这些预测，我们进行了一个实验，比较不同责任水平下的最佳竞赛，证实了“一石二鸟”的预测。本文由Elena Katok接受，属于运营管理领域。资助：作者感谢UTS商学院研究基金、UTS行为实验室基金和中国国家自然科学基金（资助号72192842, 72203099, 72422018）的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03580获得。

title: Forced Ranking Systems and Gender Gaps in Job Tenure
abstract: Using career history data from employees’ online profiles, we provide empirical evidence regarding how human resources systems can affect the gender gap in job tenure. Our results indicate that female workers experience shorter average job tenure than male workers. Our results further show that abandoning forced ranking systems helps to narrow this gender gap. We present experimental evidence indicating that in forced ranking environments, women experience shorter tenure than men and are more likely to exit their roles. This is true even when women are on equal footing with men. Finally, we present survey evidence that under forced ranking systems, more women resign as compared with men. In sum, our empirical, experimental, and survey results indicate that forced ranking systems may contribute to a gender gap in job tenure. Accordingly, abandoning such systems may help promote workplace gender equality. This paper was accepted by Yan Chen, behavioral economics and decision analysis. Funding: This work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72472068, 72422022, 72272055, 72321001, 72342009, 72325010, and 72172085], the Key Project of Philosophy and Social Science Research of the Chinese Ministry of Education [Grant 22JZD012], Shenzhen Natural Science Foundation [Grant JCYJ20250604144252069], and Macau University of Science and Technology (MUST) Faculty Research Grant [Project No. FRG-25-013-MSB]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03264 .
topics: Labor market dynamics and wage inequality
title_cn: 强制排名系统与就业任期中的性别差距
abstract_cn: 使用员工在线个人资料的职业历史数据，我们提供了人力资源系统如何影响工作任期性别差距的实证证据。我们的结果表明，女性员工的平均工作任期短于男性员工。我们的结果进一步显示，废除强制排名系统有助于缩小这一性别差距。我们提供了实验证据，表明在强制排名环境中，女性的工作任期短于男性，且更可能退出他们的岗位。即使在女性与男性处于平等地位的情况下，这一现象依然成立。最后，我们提供了调查证据，显示在强制排名系统下，女性辞职的人数较男性更多。总之，我们的实证、实验和调查结果表明，强制排名系统可能导致工作任期的性别差距。因此，废除此类系统可能有助于促进职场性别平等。本文被行为经济学和决策分析领域的颜晨接受发表。资金支持：本研究得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持[资助号72472068, 72422022, 72272055, 72321001, 72342009, 72325010, 和72172085]，中国教育部哲学社会科学研究重点项目[资助号22JZD012]，深圳市自然科学基金[资助号JCYJ20250604144252069]以及澳门科技大学（MUST）教师研究基金[项目编号FRG-25-013-MSB]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03264获取。

title: Searching for Rewards
abstract: Loyalty programs are widespread across various markets, offering members rewards based on their past purchases for future benefits. This study offers new insights into the strategic use of loyalty programs and their impact on market competition by exploring the dynamics of loyalty programs within a repeated ordered search framework, in which consumers sequentially search for the optimal product across multiple firms over two periods. Our findings highlight distinct roles for price discounts and rewards in influencing consumer decisions. Price discounts discourage further search in the current shopping period, whereas rewards encourage consumer loyalty by inducing prominence in subsequent visits. As search costs increase, firms tend to offer lower price discounts but higher rewards, and this results in a higher industry profit but lower consumer surplus. Compared with their absence, loyalty programs decrease both industry profit and consumer welfare, leading to a lose–lose outcome. Moreover, we demonstrate that, when the firms are heterogeneous in terms of their network sizes, those with larger networks tend to offer lower rewards yet achieve greater consumer loyalty in contrast to the firms with smaller networks, which compensate with higher rewards. This paper was accepted by Dmitri Kuksov, marketing. Funding: T.T. Ke acknowledges financial support from the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72422003 and 72394395] and the Hong Kong Research Grants Council [Grant 14503122]. X. Zhu acknowledges support from INFORMS Society for Marketing Science Doctoral Early Stage Research Grant (awarded in 2023). Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05203 .
title_cn: 寻找奖励
abstract_cn: 忠诚度计划在各个市场中广泛存在，为会员提供基于过去购买行为的奖励，以获取未来的好处。这项研究通过在一个重复的有序搜索框架中探索忠诚度计划的动态，提供了对忠诚度计划战略性使用及其对市场竞争影响的新见解。在这个框架中，消费者在两个时期内顺序搜索多个公司的最优产品。我们的研究结果强调了价格折扣和奖励在影响消费者决策方面的不同作用。价格折扣会抑制当前购物期间的进一步搜索，而奖励则通过提高后续访问的显著性来促进消费者忠诚度。随着搜索成本的增加，企业倾向于提供较低的价格折扣但更高的奖励，这导致行业利润增加但消费者剩余减少。与缺乏忠诚度计划相比，忠诚度计划会降低行业利润和消费者福利，导致双输的结果。此外，我们还展示了，当企业在网络规模上存在异质性时，网络规模较大的企业倾向于提供较低的奖励，但在消费者忠诚度方面却取得更大的成就，而网络规模较小的企业则通过提供更高的奖励来进行补偿。本文已被Dmitri Kuksov（市场营销）接受。资助信息：T.T. Ke承认获得了中国国家自然科学基金 [资助编号72422003和72394395] 及香港研究资助局 [资助编号14503122] 的财政支持。X. Zhu获得了INFORMS市场科学学会博士早期研究资助（2023年授予）。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.05203 获取。

title: Female Equity Analysts and Corporate Environmental and Social Performance
abstract: This paper examines the impact of female analyst coverage on firms’ environmental and social (E&S) performance. Exploiting broker closures as a quasi-exogenous shock to analyst coverage, we find that firms experiencing an exogenous decline in female analyst coverage subsequently show a significantly larger drop in E&S scores than those experiencing an equivalent decline in male analyst coverage. To explore the underlying mechanisms, we develop novel machine-learning models to analyze more than 2.4 million analyst reports and 120,000 earnings call transcripts. Our analysis shows that, compared with their male counterparts, female analysts are more likely to address E&S issues, particularly those involving regulatory compliance, stakeholders, and the environment, in both research reports and earnings conference calls. They also display distinct cognitive and linguistic patterns when discussing E&S issues. Furthermore, female analysts are more likely to issue lower stock recommendations and target prices (lower stock recommendations) following negative E&S discussions in their reports (E&S incidents) than male analysts. Finally, investors respond more strongly to female analysts’ negative tones when discussing E&S issues. Overall, our findings suggest that gender diversity among analysts plays a significant role in shaping corporate E&S practices and provide new insights into the origins of gender differences in skills within the equity analyst profession. This paper was accepted by Will Cong, finance. Funding: We acknowledge financial support from the Social Sciences and Humanities Research Council of Canada [Grant 435-2022-0285] and the Sauder Exploratory Research Grants Program. K. Li acknowledges financial support from the Canada Research Chair in Corporate Governance. T. Zhang acknowledges data support from the Whitcomb Center for Research in Financial Services at Rutgers University. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06429 .
topics: Impact of AI and Big Data on Business and Society
title_cn: 女性股票分析师与企业环境与社会表现
abstract_cn: 本文考察了女性分析师覆盖对企业环境与社会（E&S）绩效的影响。利用经纪商关闭作为分析师覆盖的准外生冲击，我们发现经历女性分析师覆盖下降的企业，其E&S评分的下降幅度显著大于经历男性分析师覆盖相应下降的企业。为探讨其背后的机制，我们开发了新颖的机器学习模型，分析了超过240万份分析师报告和12万份财报电话会议记录。我们的分析显示，与男性同行相比，女性分析师在研究报告和财报电话会议中更可能关注E&S问题，特别是涉及合规、利益相关者和环境的议题。此外，女性分析师在讨论E&S问题时表现出明显不同的认知和语言特征。更重要的是，女性分析师在其报告中出现负面E&S讨论后，发出的股票推荐和目标价格往往比男性分析师更低。最后，投资者对女性分析师在讨论E&S问题时的负面语气反应更为强烈。总体而言，我们的发现表明，分析师中的性别多样性在塑造企业E&S实践方面发挥着重要作用，并为理解股权分析师职业中性别技能差异的起源提供了新的见解。本文由财经领域的Will Cong接受。资助：我们感谢来自加拿大社会科学与人文学科研究委员会的资助 [拨款编号 435-2022-0285]，以及Sauder探索性研究资助项目的支持。K. Li感谢加拿大公司治理研究主席的资助。T. Zhang感谢罗格斯大学Whitcomb金融服务研究中心的数据支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在以下网址获得：https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06429 .

title: Earnings Conference Calls and the SEC Comment Letter Process
abstract: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) reviews firms’ financial reports and issues comment letters to ensure compliance with applicable disclosure and accounting requirements. We explore the nature, determinants, and consequences of SEC comment letters that refer to information disclosed in voluntary earnings conference calls. Using hand-collected data, we document that the SEC primarily references these voluntary disclosures to illustrate insufficiencies and, less commonly, inconsistencies in mandatory filings across a wide range of topics. These letters are more likely to be issued when filing reviews are more complex, SEC staff are less resource constrained, and for firms with more institutional investors and analysts. Conference call–related comments tend to occur during higher-quality review processes and require greater remediation costs than other comments. The SEC’s use of call disclosures also leads to more pronounced changes in firms’ subsequent mandatory filings, particularly when the firm indicates agreement with SEC comments. However, we observe a mixed effect on the overall information environment, consistent with possible unintended consequences for the quality of firms’ voluntary disclosures. This paper was accepted by Suraj Srinivasan, accounting. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02065 .
title_cn: 收益电话会议与证券交易委员会评论信函流程
abstract_cn: 美国证券交易委员会（SEC）审查公司的财务报告并发布评论信，以确保遵守适用的披露和会计要求。我们探讨了SEC评论信的性质、决定因素及其对自愿性收益电话会议披露信息的影响。通过手工收集的数据，我们记录到SEC主要引用这些自愿披露来说明强制性文件中的不足情况，较少提及不一致性，涵盖广泛的主题。这些信件在以下情况下更容易发出：申报审核更复杂、SEC工作人员资源较为充足，以及公司拥有更多机构投资者和分析师时。与电话会议相关的评论往往出现在更高质量的审核过程中，并且需要的补救成本比其他评论更高。SEC对电话披露的使用还导致企业后续强制性申报发生更显著的变化，尤其是在公司表示同意SEC评论时。然而，我们观察到对整体信息环境的影响是混合的，与企业自愿披露质量可能产生的意外后果一致。本文已被Suraj Srinivasan审计接收。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02065获取。

title: Dynamic Unraveling
abstract: This paper studies price and liquidity dynamics in the presence of costly short-selling when uninformed traders have limited willingness-to-pay to trade securities. In this setting, unraveling and Bayesian social learning interact to produce a novel mechanism, dynamic unraveling: Unraveling that generates signals that lead to future unraveling. Applying the theory, I show how dynamic unraveling explains low-volume crashes: falls in the prices of securities on low or declining trading volume. In this context, short-selling restrictions can make low-volume crashes more likely by intensifying dynamic unraveling, but liquidity injections have the opposite effect. This paper was accepted by Agostino Capponi, finance. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02412 .
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 动态解构
abstract_cn: 本文研究了在信息不对称交易者有限的支付意愿下，存在高成本卖空情况下的价格和流动性动态。在这一环境中，揭开（unraveling）与贝叶斯社会学习相互作用，产生一种新机制——动态揭开：揭开过程生成的信号导致未来的揭开。通过应用该理论，我展示了动态揭开如何解释低交易量崩盘：即证券价格在低或下降交易量下的下跌。在这一背景下，卖空限制可能通过加剧动态揭开使低交易量崩盘的发生更为可能，而流动性注入则产生相反的效果。本文由Agostino Capponi接受，研究领域为金融。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.02412获取。

title: Delegation and Chief Financial Officer Retention: Evidence from Chief Accounting Officers on the Executive Team
abstract: In recent years, chief financial officer (CFO) responsibilities and resignations have increased. Given these trends, we examine whether delegating accounting is associated with CFO retention. We develop a methodology to identify voluntary CFO departures using the firm’s public messaging around the CFO’s exit. Our results suggest that CFOs are less likely to voluntarily depart when accounting is delegated. Further, we find evidence that the negative association between delegating accounting and voluntary CFO departures is stronger when accounting demands are higher. Moreover, we find evidence that delegating accounting increases the CFO’s human capital. When CFOs do leave, they are more likely to become a chief executive officer and less likely to make a lateral move to another CFO position. Taken together, this study finds evidence consistent with the delegation of accounting increasing CFO retention and human capital. This paper was accepted by Suraj Srinivasan, accounting. Funding: The authors appreciate research funding support from Coggin College of Business, University of North Florida and Tippie College of Business, University of Iowa. A. Rhodes gratefully acknowledges support from the Michael and Sandra Rocca Fellowship in Accounting. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06802 .
title_cn: 委派与首席财务官留任：来自执行团队首席会计官的证据
abstract_cn: 近年来，首席财务官（CFO）的职责和辞职现象有所增加。鉴于这一趋势，我们考察了会计外包是否与CFO留任相关。我们开发了一种方法，利用公司在CFO离职时的公开信息来识别自愿辞职的CFO。我们的结果表明，当会计职能外包时，CFO自愿离职的可能性较低。此外，我们发现，当会计需求较高时，会计外包与自愿CFO离职之间的负相关关系更强。此外，我们还发现，会计外包提高了CFO的人力资本。当CFO确实离职时，他们更有可能晋升为首席执行官，而较少选择转岗为其他CFO职位。综合来看，这项研究发现了会计外包与CFO留任和人力资本增加之间的一致证据。本论文由Suraj Srinivasan接受，属于会计领域。资助：作者感谢佛罗里达大学Coggin商学院与爱荷华大学Tippie商学院的研究资助支持。A. Rhodes对迈克尔和桑德拉·罗卡会计奖学金的支持表示感谢。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06802获取。

title: Identifying Demand Curves in Index Option Markets
abstract: We identify latent demands in index option markets using a sign-restricted vector autoregression (VAR) and highlight the bias from treating (equilibrium) net demand as exogenous. Market-maker and end-user demand curves are far from infinitely elastic as assumed by some models, but elasticities exceed existing estimates for equities. Characterizing demand curves provides insights into the structure of index option markets. Deteriorating market conditions are associated with right shifts of the latent demand curves. The at-the-money (ATM) (out-of-the-money (OTM)) markets for calls and puts are mainly driven by end-user (market-maker) demand, and end-user (market-maker) ATM (OTM) call option demand predicts S&P500 returns. This paper was accepted by Lukas Schmid, finance. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.04263 .
title_cn: 识别指数期权市场中的需求曲线
abstract_cn: 我们使用有符号限制的向量自回归（VAR）方法识别指数期权市场中的潜在需求，并强调将（均衡）净需求视为外生的偏差。市场制造者和最终用户的需求曲线远非某些模型假设的那样无限弹性，但其弹性超过了现有的股票估计。对需求曲线的描述为理解指数期权市场的结构提供了深入见解。市场条件的恶化与潜在需求曲线的右移有关。平价（ATM）看涨期权和看跌期权市场主要受最终用户（市场制造者）需求的驱动，而最终用户（市场制造者）的ATM（OTM）看涨期权需求能够预测标准普尔500指数的回报。本文已被Lukas Schmid接受，属于金融领域。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.04263获取。

title: The Role of Success and Failure in Fluid Teams: Evidence from the Motion Picture Industry
abstract: Many business settings involve fluid teams, where team members come together to work on a project, after which the team is disbanded. It is well-known that coordination can be challenging and affect the performance outcomes of fluid teams. The literature has studied how several facets of experience can facilitate learning and improve outcomes for fluid teams. However, the role of experience with success and failure and its effect on improving outcomes for fluid teams has remained unexplored. In this study, we use data from the motion picture industry to examine how the experience with success and failure resident within key members of a movie production team affects profitability. Our analysis of the data for 2,091 movies released in the United States between 1999 and 2018 reveals that a movie’s profitability depends on the production team’s history with success and failure. Additionally, we find that teams with a history of success result in movies with higher profits, whereas teams with a history of failure result in movies with lower profits. We also find that increased relative dispersion in the team’s experience does not affect the movie’s profitability. Further analysis of the composition of movie teams indicates that financial performance can be significantly impacted when movie teams are predominantly composed of members with a history of success or failure. We contribute by illustrating a new measure of team experience relevant for fluid teams and by providing insights on how to compose teams based on members’ experience with success and failure. This paper was accepted by Elena Katok, operations management. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03756 .
title_cn: 流动团队中成功与失败的作用：来自电影产业的证据
abstract_cn: 许多商业环境涉及流动团队，团队成员聚集在一起进行项目工作，之后团队解散。众所周知，协调可能会面临挑战，并影响流动团队的绩效结果。文献研究了多种经验的不同方面如何促进学习并改善流动团队的结果。然而，成功与失败经验的角色及其对改善流动团队结果的影响仍未得到探讨。在本研究中，我们利用来自电影行业的数据，考察电影制作团队中关键成员的成功与失败经验如何影响盈利能力。对1999年至2018年间在美国上映的2,091部电影数据的分析表明，一部电影的盈利能力取决于制作团队的成功与失败历史。此外，我们发现拥有成功历史的团队制作的电影盈利更高，而拥有失败历史的团队制作的电影盈利则较低。我们还发现，团队经验的相对分散程度增加并不会影响电影的盈利能力。对电影团队构成的进一步分析表明，当电影团队主要由拥有成功或失败历史的成员构成时，财务表现可能会受到显著影响。我们的研究通过展示一个与流动团队相关的新团队经验度量，贡献了对如何基于成员的成功与失败经验来组建团队的见解。本文已被局部管理领域的Elena Katok接受。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03756 上获取。

title: Do Financial Advisors Charge Sustainable Investors a Premium?
abstract: Despite growing regulatory concerns about potential overcharging of sustainable investors, empirical evidence is lacking. In two controlled laboratory-in-the-field experiments with 415 professional financial advisors from Europe and the United States and an incentivized survey, we identify two distinct but interacting effects. First, advisors charge sustainable investors a premium. This premium persists even when accounting for differences in skill, effort, and costs. Second, advisors impose higher fees on clients with low financial literacy. These factors interact. Sustainable investors with low financial literacy are charged the highest fee, whereas those with high financial literacy do not pay a sustainability premium. Our findings suggest that advisors extract additional fees for sustainable investment mandates but avoid overcharging sustainable investors with high financial literacy. This paper was accepted by Camelia Kuhnen, finance. Funding: P. Smeets was supported by the Nederlandse Organisatie voor Wetenschappelijk Onderzoek [Grant VI.Vidi.221E.011]. The experiments were financially supported by the Graduate School of Business and Economics at Maastricht University, Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam, and Radboud University. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.00232 .
title_cn: 金融顾问是否向可持续投资者收取额外费用？
abstract_cn: 尽管对可持续投资者潜在过度收费的监管担忧日益增长，但实证证据仍然不足。在两项针对来自欧洲和美国的415名专业金融顾问的受控实地实验及一项激励调查中，我们识别出两个相互作用的独特效应。首先，顾问对可持续投资者收取溢价。即使在考虑到技能、努力和成本差异的情况下，这一溢价依然存在。其次，顾问对财务素养低的客户收取更高的费用。这些因素之间存在相互作用。财务素养低的可持续投资者被收取最高费用，而财务素养高的投资者则不需支付可持续性溢价。我们的研究结果表明，顾问会对可持续投资委托提取额外费用，但对于财务素养高的可持续投资者则避免过度收费。本文由金融领域的Camelia Kuhnen接受。资助：P. Smeets获得了荷兰科学组织的支持[资助号VI.Vidi.221E.011]。该实验得到了马astricht大学、阿姆斯特丹自由大学和拉德布德大学的商学院的财务支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.00232获取。

title: The Rapid Adoption of Generative AI
abstract: Generative artificial intelligence (genAI) is a potentially important new technology, but its impact on the economy depends on the speed and intensity of adoption. This paper reports results from a series of nationally representative U.S. surveys of genAI use at work and at home. As of late 2024, 45% of the U.S. population age 18–64 uses genAI. Among employed respondents, 27% used genAI for work at least once in the previous week: 10% used it every workday and 17% on some but not all workdays. Relative to each technology’s first mass-market product launch, work adoption of genAI has been faster than the personal computer (PC), and overall adoption has outpaced both PCs and the internet by an even wider margin. Between 1% and 7% of all work hours are currently assisted by genAI, and respondents report time savings equivalent to 1.4% of total work hours. Potential productivity gains vary widely by industry, and firm climate and policies play an important role in adoption patterns. This paper was accepted by Alfonso Gambardello, business strategy. Funding: This work was supported by the Walmart Foundation [Grant 252882]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.02523 .
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 生成式人工智能的快速普及
abstract_cn: 生成性人工智能（genAI）是一项潜在重要的新技术，但其对经济的影响取决于其采用的速度和强度。本文报告了一系列全国性代表性美国调查的结果，调查内容涉及genAI在工作和家庭中的使用情况。截至2024年底，45%的美国18至64岁人口使用genAI。在受雇的受访者中，27%在前一周至少在工作中使用过genAI：10%每天工作日都使用，17%在某些工作日使用，但并非每个工作日。与每项技术首次进入大众市场时的产品发布相比，genAI在工作中的采用速度快于个人电脑（PC），而整体采用速度则更是大大超过了个人电脑和互联网。目前，1%到7%的工作时间是由genAI辅助的，受访者报告的时间节省相当于总工作时间的1.4%。潜在的生产力提升因行业而异，企业气候和政策在采用模式中发挥着重要作用。本文由商业战略专家阿方索·甘巴德罗接受。资助：这项工作得到了沃尔玛基金会的支持 [资助编号 252882]。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2025.02523 上获得。

title: Spatial Distribution of Access to Service: Theory and Evidence from Ride-Sharing
abstract: We study access to ride-sharing across geographical regions using both theoretical and empirical analyses. We specifically model and examine the effects of economies of density in ride-sharing. Our model predicts that (i) economies of density skew access to ride-sharing away from less dense regions; (ii) the skew will be more pronounced for smaller platforms (i.e., “thinner markets”); and (iii) ride-sharing platforms do not find this skew efficient and thus, use price and wage levers to mitigate (but not eliminate) it. We show that these insights are robust to whether the source of economies of density is the supply side or the demand side. We then calibrate our model using ride-level Uber data from New York City. We use the model to simulate counterfactual scenarios, offering a quantitative evaluation of our theoretical results and informing platform strategy and policy. This paper was accepted by Omar Besbes, revenue management and market analytics. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2021.02699 .
title_cn: 服务获取的空间分布：理论与共享出行的证据
abstract_cn: 我们通过理论和实证分析研究了不同地理区域的共享骑行访问情况。我们具体建模并考察了共享骑行中的密度经济效应。我们的模型预测：（i）密度经济效应使得共享骑行的访问机会偏向于密集地区，而较少密集地区的机会则相对较少；（ii）这种偏差在较小的平台上（即“市场较薄”）会更加明显；（iii）共享骑行平台并不认为这种偏差是有效的，因此会利用价格和工资杠杆来缓解（但无法消除）这一现象。我们证明这些见解在密度经济效应来源于供给方还是需求方的情况下都具有稳健性。随后，我们利用来自纽约市的Uber骑行级别数据对我们的模型进行了标定。我们使用该模型模拟反事实情景，提供我们理论结果的定量评估，并为平台策略和政策提供信息。本文已被Omar Besbes接受，关于收益管理和市场分析。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2021.02699 获取。

title: Spatial Information Sharing on On-Demand Service Platforms
abstract: We investigate how an on-demand service platform’s mechanism to share demand-supply mismatch information spatially affects drivers’ relocation decisions and the platform’s matching efficiency. We consider three mechanisms motivated by practice; the platform shares demand-supply mismatch information about either zones(s) with excess demand with all drivers (surge information sharing, common practice today), all zones with all drivers (full information sharing), or zone(s) with excess demand only with drivers sufficiently close by (local information sharing). We develop a game-theoretic model with three zones wherein drivers in two non-surge zones decide whether to relocate to the surge zone with excess demand. We incorporate two spatial aspects: drivers’ relocation costs and initial supply across different non-surge zones. Theoretically, full information sharing can hurt the platform’s matching efficiency compared with surge information sharing under low relocation costs because drivers in non-surge zones facing high demand locally do not chase the surge as much. Local information sharing is strictly dominated by other mechanisms in terms of matching efficiency when the supply of drivers near the surge zone is limited and weakly dominated otherwise by surge information sharing. We test these theory predictions in the laboratory with human participants as drivers in an environment where theoretical matching efficiency is highest with surge and lowest with local information sharing. Experimentally, the platform serves fewer customers than predicted with surge information sharing because drivers relocate too often, compromising efficiency in non-surge zones. In contrast, the platform serves more customers than predicted with full and local information sharing, and these mechanisms perform at least as well in matching efficiency as surge. Therefore, sharing demand-supply mismatch information either fully or in a targeted manner (as in local) can help to alleviate coordination problems on a platform. A behavioral equilibrium incorporating loss aversion through mental accounting and decision errors describes drivers’ behavior in our experiments better than the rational equilibrium. This paper was accepted by Elena Katok, operations management. Funding: This research was funded in part by the National Science Foundation [Award #2049872]. The authors also gratefully acknowledge partial support from the Business Analytics Center at Georgia Tech Scheller College of Business. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2021.03426 .
title_cn: 按需服务平台上的空间信息共享
abstract_cn: 我们研究了一种按需服务平台分享供需不匹配信息的方法如何空间性地影响司机的迁移决策以及平台的匹配效率。我们考虑了三种源于实践的机制；平台与所有司机分享关于超额需求区域的信息（激增信息分享，今日的常见做法），与所有司机分享所有区域的信息（全面信息分享），或者仅与距离较近的司机分享超额需求区域的信息（局部信息分享）。我们开发了一个博弈论模型，其中有三个区域，两个非激增区域的司机决定是否迁移到超额需求的激增区域。我们纳入了两个空间因素：司机的迁移成本和不同非激增区域的初始供给。从理论上讲，与激增信息分享相比，在低迁移成本下，全信息分享可能会损害平台的匹配效率，因为在非激增区域面临高需求的司机并不那么积极追逐激增。当靠近激增区域的司机供给有限时，局部信息分享在匹配效率方面严格被其他机制所主导，反之则被激增信息分享弱主导。我们在实验室中测试了这些理论预测，参与者作为司机在理论匹配效率最高的激增信息分享环境中进行实验，局部信息分享的效率最低。在实验中，平台服务的客户数量少于激增信息分享的预测，因为司机迁移过于频繁，损害了非激增区域的效率。相反，平台在全面和局部信息分享下服务的客户数量超过预测，这些机制在匹配效率方面至少与激增信息分享相当。因此，无论是全面分享还是目标性分享（如局部分享），都可以帮助缓解平台上的协调问题。一种通过心理账户和决策错误引入损失厌恶的行为均衡比理性均衡更好地描述了我们实验中司机的行为。本文被运营管理领域的Elena Katok接受。资助：本研究部分由国家科学基金会资助[编号#2049872]。作者还感激乔治亚理工大学Scheller商学院商业分析中心的部分支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2021.03426 获取。

title: Does Agglomeration Enhance Property Value?
abstract: Does agglomeration within a building and/or neighborhood enhance or weaken property value? The valuation impact is unclear ex ante, given that agglomeration tradesoff enhanced productivity at the expense of a more concentrated tenant base. We find that a value premium exists only when agglomeration at both the building and neighborhood levels consists of firms in the same industry. This premium represents capitalized knowledge spillover externalities. Additionally, we show the stock market rewards real estate investment trusts that transact specialized buildings. The valuation consequences arising from agglomeration in the underlying real estate market are thus consistent with the public real estate market. This paper was accepted by Tomasz Piskorski, finance. Funding: This work was supported by the Real Estate Research Institute. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02773 .
title_cn: 集聚效应是否提升了房地产价值？
abstract_cn: 建筑和/或社区内的聚集是增强还是削弱物业价值？考虑到聚集在提高生产力的同时可能会牺牲租户的多样性，其估值影响在事前并不明确。我们的研究发现，仅当建筑和社区层面的聚集由同一行业的公司构成时，才存在价值溢价。该溢价代表了资本化的知识溢出外部性。此外，我们还显示，股票市场对交易专业建筑的房地产投资信托给予奖励。因此，基础房地产市场中聚集带来的估值后果与公共房地产市场的情况是一致的。本文已被财务学者Tomasz Piskorski接受。资助：本研究得到了房地产研究院的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.02773 获取。

title: Chasing Market Growth and Matching Performance in Two-Sided Platforms: Evidence from the Lazy-Minting Policy in an NFT Marketplace
abstract: A common challenge faced by two-sided marketplaces is to expand the market while ensuring satisfactory matching of the two sides.
