We study a new platform growth strategy that increases market thickness with free entry while allowing suppliers to discretionarily signal product quality to buyers, thus forming a tiered market structure that maintains matching performance. We consider such an example with nonfungible token (NFT) markets where suppliers could choose to delay the entry cost of the NFT creation fee until an NFT is sold (lazy minting) or pay the fee up front at the time of NFT creation (gas minting). We use the difference-in-differences strategy to identify the impact of this lazy-minting policy on market matching performance. We find that the impacts of this policy are multifaceted: Although the introduction of lazy minting reduces the average matching likelihood of an NFT by 98.2%, it increases the gas-minting segment’s matching likelihood by 112.3% and first-sale price by 126.5%. Overall, this new growth strategy benefits the platform because of increased total sales and higher revenues. We unravel two mechanisms: the market thickness effect and the quality signaling effect. For the latter, we introduce a systematic framework to empirically establish the quality signaling mechanism with a separating equilibrium, where suppliers prefer gas minting for their high-quality creations. This effectively sends a quality signal that buyers could rely on to recognize high-quality NFTs. This new platform growth strategy provides generic implications for platforms endeavoring to balance market thickness and matching performance. This paper was accepted by Anindya Ghose, information systems. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03573 .
title_cn: 追求市场增长与匹配表现的双边平台：来自NFT市场懒惰铸造政策的证据
abstract_cn: 双边市场面临的一个共同挑战是如何在确保两方满意匹配的同时扩展市场。我们研究了一种新的平台增长策略，通过允许供应商可自由地向买方传递产品质量信号，从而实现市场的厚度增加，并在自由进入的情况下形成一个维持匹配性能的分层市场结构。我们以非同质化代币（NFT）市场为例，其中供应商可以选择在NFT出售之前推迟支付NFT创作费用（懒惰铸造），或在NFT创作时预付费用（气体铸造）。我们运用差异中的差异策略来识别这一懒惰铸造政策对市场匹配性能的影响。发现这一政策的影响是多方面的：尽管懒惰铸造的引入使NFT的平均匹配概率降低了98.2%，但它却使气体铸造部分的匹配概率提高了112.3%，首售价格提高了126.5%。总体而言，这一新的增长策略使平台受益于总销售额的增加和更高的收入。我们揭示了两个机制：市场厚度效应和质量信号效应。对于后者，我们引入一个系统框架，以实证建立一个具有分离均衡的质量信号机制，在这一机制中，供应商更倾向于为其高质量创作选择气体铸造。这有效地发出了一个质量信号，使买方能够识别高质量的NFT。这一新的平台增长策略为努力在市场厚度和匹配性能之间取得平衡的平台提供了普遍的启示。本文由信息系统领域的Anindya Ghose接受。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可通过 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03573 获取。

title: Do Mutual Funds Respond to Mechanical Changes in ESG Ratings?
abstract: Using a quasi-experimental setting, we study whether mutual fund investors respond to a purely mechanical change in environmental, social, and governance (ESG) ratings—that is, a change independent of concurrent changes in firms’ actual ESG activities. We find that when a firm experiences a mechanical increase in ESG ratings, the probability of being selected by an ESG fund increases (extensive margin). In contrast, if the firm is already in the fund’s portfolio, its holdings do not change (intensive margin), consistent with portfolio weighting being based on market capitalization. The selection effect is observable not only among funds that follow an ESG index but also among active ESG funds, which presumably should have the resources and ability to identify and filter out the mechanical increase in ESG ratings. Among active ESG funds, the selection effect is stronger for funds with less assets under management, larger portfolios of firms, and lower expense ratios, consistent with the notion that resource constraints may impede a fund’s screening ability. Our findings imply that passive investing based on commercial ESG ratings—whether due to resource constraints or portfolio indexing—might result in portfolio allocations that do not reflect the actual ESG activities of firms. This paper was accepted by Suraj Srinivasan, accounting. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06184 .
title_cn: 共同基金是否会对ESG评级的机械变化作出反应？
abstract_cn: 利用准实验设置，我们研究投资者是否会对环境、社会和治理（ESG）评级的纯机械性变化作出反应——即，与公司实际的ESG活动同时发生的变化无关。当一家公司经历ESG评级的机械性上升时，被ESG基金选择的概率增加（广泛边际）。相反，如果这家公司已经在基金的投资组合中，其持股不会发生变化（密集边际），这与基于市值的投资组合加权一致。选择效应不仅在跟随ESG指数的基金中可观察到，在主动管理的ESG基金中同样存在，这表明这些基金可能具备识别和滤除ESG评级机械性上升的资源和能力。在主动管理的ESG基金中，选择效应在资产管理规模较小、投资组合中公司数量较多以及费用比率较低的基金中更为显著，这与资源限制可能妨碍基金筛选能力的观点相符。我们的研究结果意味着，基于商业ESG评级的被动投资——无论是由于资源限制还是投资组合编制——可能导致投资组合分配无法反映公司的实际ESG活动。本文由会计领域的Suraj Srinivasan接受。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06184获取。

title: Beyond O(T) Regret: Decoupling Learning and Decision Making in Online Linear Programming
abstract: Breaking the [Formula: see text] Barrier in Online Linear Programming How can fast first-order methods for online linear programming (OLP) match the performance of more computationally intensive LP-based approaches? In the paper “Beyond [Formula: see text] Regret: Decoupling Learning and Decision Making in Online Linear Programming,” the authors develop a new framework that improves the regret guarantees of scalable first-order algorithms for online linear programming. They show that when the dual problem satisfies a mild error bound condition, first-order methods can achieve [Formula: see text] regret, including [Formula: see text] in continuous support settings and [Formula: see text] in finite support settings. The key insight is to decouple learning and decision making. The algorithm first learns an approximate dual solution and then localizes decisions to a neighborhood around that solution using an adaptive procedure. This decoupling narrows the gap between efficient gradient-based methods and LP-based benchmarks, providing strong theoretical guarantees while maintaining scalability for applications such as revenue management, online advertising, and cloud computing.
title_cn: 超越 O(T) 后悔：在线线性规划中学习与决策的解耦
abstract_cn:
在线线性编程中的[公式：见文本]障碍如何突破  
快速的一阶方法如何在在线线性编程（OLP）中与计算密集型的基于线性规划（LP）的方法匹配其性能？在论文《超越 [公式：见文本] 后悔：在在线线性编程中解耦学习与决策》中，作者开发了一个新框架，提高了可扩展的一阶算法在在线线性编程中的后悔保证。他们展示了当对偶问题满足温和的误差界条件时，一阶方法可以实现[公式：见文本]的后悔，包括在连续支持设置中的[公式：见文本]和在有限支持设置中的[公式：见文本]。关键见解在于解耦学习与决策。算法首先学习一个近似的对偶解，然后通过自适应程序将决策局限于该解附近的邻域。这样的解耦缩小了基于梯度的高效方法与基于LP的基准之间的差距，同时为收入管理、在线广告和云计算等应用提供了强有力的理论保证，并保持了可扩展性。

title: Risk Minimization as a Framework for Online Allocation in Display Advertising
abstract: “Risk Minimization as a Framework for Online Allocation in Display Advertising,” by Davood Shamsi, Robert Luenberger, and Yinyu Ye, revisits a foundational approach to real-time resource allocation. The study draws a conceptual bridge between earlier risk minimization models and more recent dual mirror descent methods, two influential paradigms in online optimization. Although both frameworks generate similar exponential price update rules, this research shows they arise from distinct modeling perspectives: one grounded in convex risk minimization and the other in Bregman divergence and mirror descent. By framing dual updates through a risk-aware lens, the authors recover widely used allocation strategies—including greedy, linear, and multiplicative weights—as special cases. The paper broadens the theoretical toolkit for online resource allocation and highlights how incorporating uncertainty directly into the optimization framework can yield flexible, interpretable, and robust algorithms across stochastic and adversarial settings.
title_cn: 风险最小化作为展示广告在线分配的框架
abstract_cn: “风险最小化作为展示广告在线分配的框架”，由达沃德·沙姆西、罗伯特·吕恩伯格和叶寅宇撰写，重新审视了实时资源分配的基础方法。该研究在早期风险最小化模型与近期的双重镜像下降方法之间架起了一个概念桥梁，这两者都是在线优化中的重要范式。尽管这两个框架产生了相似的指数价格更新规则，但研究表明，它们源于不同的建模视角：一个基于凸风险最小化，另一个则基于布雷格曼散度和镜像下降。通过以风险意识的视角框定双重更新，作者恢复了广泛使用的分配策略——包括贪婪策略、线性加权和乘法加权——作为特殊案例。该论文扩展了在线资源分配的理论工具包，并强调如何将不确定性直接纳入优化框架，可以在随机和对抗环境中产生灵活、可解释和稳健的算法。

title: Dynamic Programming in Ordered Vector Space
abstract: Dynamic Programming in Ordered Vector Space
title_cn: 有序向量空间中的动态规划
abstract_cn: 有序向量空间中的动态规划

title: Erratum to Online Allocation and Pricing: Constant Regret via Bellman Inequalities
abstract: Theorem 3 of the paper Online Allocation and Pricing: Constant Regret via Bellman Inequalities (Operations Research 69(3):821–840) states a constant regret result for a menu-pricing problem. In this erratum, the authors correct the theorem’s proof.
title_cn: 在线分配与定价的更正：通过贝尔曼不等式实现恒定遗憾
abstract_cn: 论文《在线分配与定价：通过贝尔曼不等式实现常量遗憾》（《运筹学》69(3):821–840）的定理3给出了菜单定价问题的常量遗憾结果。在此更正中，作者修正了该定理的证明。

title: Assortment and Price Optimization Under a Multiattribute (Contextual) Choice Model
abstract: Context-Dependent Choice and Retail Decisions Traditional assortment models assume that consumers evaluate products independently of the alternatives available (i.e., the “context”). In “Assortment and Price Optimization Under a Multiattribute (Contextual) Choice Model,” the authors challenge this assumption by analyzing assortment and pricing decisions under a context-dependent choice framework known as the contextual concavity (CC) model. The CC model incorporates reference dependence across multiple attributes, such as price and quality, and captures well-documented context effects, including compromise and decoy effects. The study makes several contributions. It characterizes the structure of optimal assortments under multiattribute loss aversion, develops a polynomial-size mixed-integer linear programming formulation for solving the general problem, and analyzes the joint assortment and pricing decision. Numerical experiments show that ignoring context effects, by relying on standard context-independent models such as the multinomial logit, can lead to substantial profit losses, with gaps ranging from 3% to 63%. These findings highlight the strategic importance of incorporating contextual effects into retail decisions.
title_cn: 多属性（情境）选择模型下的品类和价格优化
abstract_cn:
情境依赖选择与零售决策

传统的品类选择模型假设消费者在评估产品时独立于可用的替代品（即“情境”）。在《多属性（情境）选择模型下的品类与价格优化》一文中，作者通过分析在一个称为情境凹性（CC）模型的情境依赖选择框架下的品类和定价决策，挑战了这一假设。CC模型纳入了多属性的参考依赖性，例如价格和质量，并有效捕捉了已被充分证实的情境效应，包括妥协效应和诱饵效应。该研究做出了若干重要贡献。它描述了多属性损失厌恶下最优品类的结构，开发了一种多项式大小的混合整数线性规划公式来解决一般问题，并分析了联合的品类与定价决策。数值实验表明，忽视情境效应，通过依赖标准的独立于情境的模型（如多项式Logit），可能导致可观的利润损失，差距范围从3%到63%不等。这些发现突显了将情境效应纳入零售决策的战略重要性。

title: Tail Optimality and Performance Analysis of the Nudge*(M) Scheduling Algorithm
abstract: Many systems traditionally use a basic first-come, first-served scheduling policy. It is simple to implement and perceived as fair to arriving jobs. In recent years, Nudge policies were introduced, showing that large delays occur less frequently by allowing small changes in the order in which jobs are served—often improving all delay quantiles. In “Tail Optimality and Performance Analysis of the Nudge*(M) Scheduling Algorithm,” Charlet and Van Houdt introduce the Nudge*(M) policy and show that this policy is optimal among a broad class of Nudge-like policies. A key feature of these policies is that they do not exploit arrival time information, only the arrival order and job labels. The authors provide an explicit formula for the asymptotic tail improvement ratio and show how to numerically find the waiting and response time distributions.
title_cn: 尾部最优性与Nudge*(M)调度算法的性能分析
abstract_cn: 许多系统传统上使用基本的先到先服务调度策略。该策略简单易行，被认为对到达的作业公平。在近年来，出现了"Nudge"政策，表明通过允许对作业处理顺序进行小的调整，可以减少大延迟的发生频率——通常能够改善所有延迟分位数。在“尾部最优性与Nudge*(M)调度算法的性能分析”一文中，Charlet和Van Houdt引入了Nudge*(M)政策，并证明该政策在广泛的Nudge类政策中是最优的。这些政策的一个关键特征是，它们不利用到达时间信息，仅依赖于到达顺序和作业标签。作者提供了渐进尾部改善比的显式公式，并展示了如何数值求解等待时间和响应时间的分布。

title: No-Regret Bayesian Recommendation to Homogeneous Users
abstract: No-Regret Bayesian Recommendation to Homogeneous Users We introduce and study the online Bayesian recommendation problem for a recommender system platform. The platform has the privilege to privately observe a utility-relevant state of a product at each round and uses this information to make online recommendations to a stream of myopic users. This paradigm is common in a wide range of scenarios in the current internet economy. The platform commits to an online recommendation policy that utilizes its information advantage on the product state to persuade self-interested users to follow the recommendation. Because the platform does not know users’ preferences or beliefs in advance, we study the platform’s online learning problem of designing an adaptive recommendation policy to persuade users while gradually learning users’ preferences and beliefs en route. Specifically, we aim to design online learning policies with no Stackelberg regret for the platform, that is, against the optimal benchmark policy in hindsight under the assumption that users will correspondingly adapt their responses to the benchmark policy. Our first result is an online policy that achieves double logarithmic regret dependence on the number of rounds. We also present an information-theoretic lower bound showing that no adaptive online policy can achieve regret with better dependency on the number of rounds. Finally, by formulating the platform’s problem as optimizing a linear program with membership oracle access, we present our second online recommendation policy that achieves regret with polynomial dependence on the number of states but logarithmic dependence on the number of rounds.
title_cn: 无遗憾的贝叶斯推荐系统对同质用户的应用
abstract_cn:
无悔贝叶斯推荐给同质用户

我们提出并研究了推荐系统平台的在线贝叶斯推荐问题。该平台能够在每一轮私下观察与产品效用相关的状态，并利用这些信息向一系列短视用户进行在线推荐。这种范式在当前互联网经济中广泛存在。平台承诺采取一种在线推荐策略，利用其在产品状态上的信息优势，劝导自利的用户遵循推荐。由于平台事先并不知道用户的偏好或信念，我们研究了平台设计自适应推荐策略的在线学习问题，以在逐步了解用户的偏好和信念的过程中说服用户。具体而言，我们旨在设计对平台没有斯塔克尔堡悔恨的在线学习策略，即在假设用户会相应调整其对基准策略反应的前提下，针对事后最佳基准策略。我们的第一个结果是一个在线策略，其悔恨与轮次的依赖关系为双对数级。我们还提出了一个信息论下界，表明没有任何自适应在线策略能够实现与轮次更好依赖关系的悔恨。最后，通过将平台的问题表述为优化一个具有成员查询访问的线性程序，我们提出了第二个在线推荐策略，其悔恨与状态数量呈多项式依赖关系，而与轮次数量呈对数依赖关系。

title: Pricing Shared Rides
abstract: Pricing Based on Matching Outcomes Improves Shared Rides Operations Shared rides aspire to mitigate congestion and promote more sustainable urban transportation, but many platforms struggle to maintain a healthy and profitable shared rides product. Why have shared rides struggled, and how can platforms design a successful product? In “Pricing Shared Rides,” Chiwei Yan, Julia Yan, and Yifan Shen discuss the drawbacks of platforms’ existing pricing policies and show that a common approach to pricing suppresses demand and may even drive the platform out of the market. They then propose adjusting the price according to the extent she is matched with another rider—which proves to benefit both platform and riders alike in increased profitability and reduced payments. These benefits are especially pronounced in regimes with high cost and low demand, expanding shared rides access to areas where they have historically been most challenging to sustain.
title_cn: 共享乘车定价
abstract_cn: 基于匹配结果的定价改善了共享出行的运营。共享出行旨在缓解拥堵并促进更可持续的城市交通，但许多平台在维持健康且盈利的共享出行产品方面面临挑战。共享出行为何会遇到困难，平台又该如何设计出成功的产品？在《共享出行定价》中，Chiwei Yan、Julia Yan和Yifan Shen讨论了平台现有定价政策的缺陷，并显示出一种常见的定价方法抑制了需求，甚至可能将平台挤出市场。然后，他们建议根据用户与其他乘客的匹配程度来调整价格，这对平台和乘客都能带来盈利增加和支付减少的好处。这些效益在成本高且需求低的情况下尤为明显，从而扩大共享出行在历史上难以维持的地区的可及性。

title: Long-History Principal Component Analysis in a Dynamic Factor Model with Weak Loadings
abstract: Stabilizing the Unstable: How Long-History PCA Sharpens Portfolio Risk Forecasts Investors focus on market volatility, but a more subtle challenge is “second-order risk”—the discrepancy between a portfolio’s predicted risk and its actual performance. Standard practice relies on short snapshots of data (typically one year) to estimate the covariance structure under the assumption that older data are irrelevant in fast-changing markets. However, this “short-memory” approach often mistakes random noise for real market signals, leading to optimized portfolios that are riskier than they appear. In “Long-History PCA in a Dynamic Factor Model with Weak Loadings,” Anderson, Kim, and Ryu challenge this norm. They introduce Long-History Principal Component Analysis (LH-PCA), demonstrating that extending the data history to six years acts as a crucial stabilizer. Theoretically, the authors prove PCA remains a consistent estimator even in dynamic markets with “weak” loadings, provided the historical timeline is sufficiently large. Both simulation and empirical tests on U.S. and European markets confirm that looking back six years significantly reduces estimation bias.
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 动态因子模型中具有弱载荷的长期主成分分析
abstract_cn:
稳定不稳定性：长历史主成分分析如何提升投资组合风险预测

投资者关注市场波动性，但更微妙的挑战是“二阶风险”——即投资组合预测风险与其实际表现之间的差异。标准做法依赖于短期数据快照（通常为一年）来估算协方差结构，假设在快速变化的市场中，较老的数据是无关的。然而，这种“短期记忆”方法常常将随机噪声误认为是真实市场信号，导致优化后的投资组合比表面上看起来更具风险。在《具有弱载荷的动态因子模型中的长历史主成分分析》一文中，安德森、金和柳挑战了这一规范。他们引入了长历史主成分分析（LH-PCA），证明将数据历史延长至六年会充当关键的稳定器。从理论上讲，作者证明即使在具“弱”载荷的动态市场中，主成分分析也是一个一致的估计量，只要历史时间线足够长。对美国和欧洲市场的模拟和实证测试确认，回溯六年显著减少了估计偏差。

title: Dynamic Pricing Under Self-Exciting Arrival Processes
abstract: Pricing with a Ripple Effect How should firms price when each sale sparks the next? In their paper, “Dynamic Pricing Under Self-Exciting Arrival Processes,” Quan Yuan, Longyuan Du, and Ming Hu study pricing decisions in markets where customer purchases actively stimulate future demand through word-of-mouth and social influence. Using a self-exciting (Hawkes) process to model the demand process, the authors show that optimal prices depend on both time and an “excitement level” summarizing accumulated customer influence. A key insight is that optimal prices may rise or fall with demand momentum, depending on whether the market is in a growth or saturation phase. The paper further demonstrates that simple, easy-to-implement deterministic (nonstationary) pricing heuristics can perform nearly as well as fully dynamic policies at large demand volumes. These results provide actionable guidance for firms operating in social media–driven markets, where this hour’s customers shape the next hour’s demand, and highlight the importance of explicitly accounting for the ripple effect of purchases in pricing design.
title_cn: 自激到达过程下的动态定价
abstract_cn: 具有涟漪效应的定价：当每笔销售激发下一笔销售时，企业应如何定价？在他们的论文《基于自激到达过程的动态定价》中，袁全、杜龙源和胡明研究了客户购买积极刺激未来需求的市场定价决策，这种刺激通过口碑和社会影响实现。通过使用自激（霍克斯）过程来建模需求过程，作者展示了最优价格不仅依赖于时间，还依赖于总结累计客户影响的“激励水平”。一个重要的见解是，最优价格可能会随着需求动能的变化而上升或下降，这取决于市场是处于增长阶段还是饱和阶段。论文进一步证明，简单、易于实施的确定性（非平稳）定价启发式方法在大需求量时可以与完全动态政策的表现几乎相当。这些结果为在社交媒体驱动市场中运营的企业提供了可行的指导，其中本小时的客户塑造了下小时的需求，并强调了在定价设计中明确考虑购买的涟漪效应的重要性。

title: Stochastic Gradient Descent with Adaptive Data
abstract: Stochastic Gradient Descent with Adaptive Data Stochastic gradient descent (SGD) is a central tool in modern optimization, but its classical theory relies on the assumption that data are independent of the decisions being optimized. In many operations research settings, this assumption fails: policies influence system dynamics, and the resulting data feed back into subsequent updates. In “Stochastic Gradient Descent with Adaptive Data,” Che, Dong, and Tong address this challenge by developing a general framework for analyzing SGD when data are generated adaptively by policy-dependent Markov processes. Their analysis shows that fully adaptive SGD can still attain convergence rates comparable to the classical i.i.d. setting, provided the underlying system satisfies mild ergodicity and continuity conditions. The theory is illustrated through canonical applications in operations research and reinforcement learning. Overall, the paper provides rigorous and reassuring theoretical foundations for deploying learning algorithms in dynamic environments where decisions and data are fundamentally intertwined.
title_cn: 自适应数据的随机梯度下降法
abstract_cn: 自适应数据的随机梯度下降方法 随机梯度下降（SGD）是现代优化中的一个核心工具，但其经典理论依赖于数据与被优化决策相互独立的假设。在许多运筹学的场景中，这一假设并不成立：决策会影响系统动态，而由此产生的数据又反馈到后续的更新中。在“自适应数据的随机梯度下降”一文中，Che、Dong和Tong通过开发一个通用框架来分析在数据由政策依赖的马尔可夫过程自适应生成的情况下的SGD，解决了这一挑战。他们的分析表明，只要基础系统满足温和的遍历性和连续性条件，完全自适应的 SGD 仍然可以达到与经典独立同分布（i.i.d.）设定相当的收敛速度。该理论通过运筹学和强化学习中的经典应用进行了阐述。总体而言，本文为在决策与数据基本交织在一起的动态环境中部署学习算法提供了严谨且令人安心的理论基础。

title: Beyond Discounted Returns: Robust Markov Decision Processes with Average and Blackwell Optimality
abstract: Novel Insights on Robust Markov decision Processes with Average Reward and Blackwell Optimality Criteria Robust Markov decision processes (RMDPs) have been studied extensively when the objective is the discounted return, but little is known for average optimality and Blackwell optimality. We show that average optimal policies can be chosen stationary and deterministic for sa-rectangular RMDPs, but perhaps surprisingly, we show that for s-rectangular RMDPs average optimal policies may not exist, and if they do exist, they may not be stationary. We also study Blackwell optimality for sa-rectangular RMDPs, where we show that approximately Blackwell optimal policies always exist, although exact Blackwell optimal policies may not exist. We provide a general sufficient condition for their existence. We then discuss the connection between average and Blackwell optimality, and we describe several algorithms to compute the optimal average return. Interestingly, our approach leverages the connections between RMDPs and stochastic games. Overall, our paper emphasizes the superior practical properties of distance-based sa-rectangular models over s-rectangular models for average and Blackwell optimality.
title_cn: 超越折扣回报：具有平均最优性和布莱克威尔最优性的鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程
abstract_cn:
关于具有平均奖励和布莱克威尔最优性标准的鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程的新见解

鲁棒马尔可夫决策过程（RMDPs）在目标为贴现回报时得到了广泛研究，但对于平均最优性和布莱克威尔最优性知之甚少。我们表明，对于s-矩形RMDPs，平均最优策略可以选择为平稳和确定性，但或许令人惊讶的是，我们展示了对于s-矩形RMDPs，平均最优策略可能并不存在，如果存在，则可能不是平稳的。我们还研究了s-矩形RMDPs的布莱克威尔最优性，证明了近似的布莱克威尔最优策略总是存在，尽管精确的布莱克威尔最优策略可能不存在。我们提供了它们存在的一般充分条件。接着，我们讨论了平均最优性和布莱克威尔最优性之间的联系，并描述了几种计算最优平均回报的算法。有趣的是，我们的方法利用了RMDPs与随机博弈之间的联系。总体而言，我们的论文强调了基于距离的s-矩形模型在平均和布莱克威尔最优性方面优于s-矩形模型的优越实际特性。

title: Regime-Dependent Approximations for the Single-Item Dynamic Pricing Problem
abstract: Optimizing Prices for Viral Demand and Scarcity Dynamic pricing models often assume that inventory and demand scale proportionally, but this “fluid” view breaks down when products go viral. In “Regime-Dependent Approximations for the Single-Item Dynamic Pricing Problem,” Tarek Abdallah and Josh Reed investigate market extremes, specifically the “large market regime,” where inventory is scarce relative to surging demand. Their analysis reveals critical pitfalls in common heuristic approaches. The authors demonstrate that intuitive “price high and wait” policies are ineffective and, remarkably, that fluid static policies are not even first-order optimal in this context. Instead, they establish that a dynamic run-out-rate policy is essential to achieve both first- and second-order asymptotic optimality. Leveraging Extreme Value Theory, this research provides a robust framework for managing severe supply-demand imbalances, ensuring that firms can effectively capture value in inventory-constrained environments.
title_cn: 基于制度的单一商品动态定价问题的近似方法
abstract_cn: 优化病毒需求和稀缺性定价的策略 动态定价模型通常假设库存与需求成比例变化，但当产品迅速走红时，这种“流动”视角会崩溃。在“单品动态定价问题的政制依赖近似”一文中，Tarek Abdallah 和 Josh Reed 研究了市场极端情况，特别是“大型市场政制”，即库存相对于激增的需求而言稀缺。他们的分析揭示了常见启发式方法中的关键陷阱。作者们证明，直观的“高价并等待”策略是无效的，令人瞩目的是，在这种情况下，流动静态政策甚至都不是一阶最优的。相反，他们确定动态耗尽率政策对于实现一阶和二阶渐近最优性是至关重要的。利用极值理论，本研究提供了一种强有力的框架，以应对严重的供需失衡，确保企业在库存受限环境中能够有效地捕捉价值。

title: On the Complexity of Finding Locally Optimal Solutions in Bilevel Linear Optimization
abstract: On the Complexity of Finding Locally Optimal Solutions in Bilevel Linear Optimization
title_cn: 双层线性优化中局部最优解的寻找复杂性
abstract_cn: 双层线性优化中寻找局部最优解的复杂性

title: Two-Stage Learning to Branch in Branch-Price-and-Cut Algorithms for Solving Vehicle Routing Problems Exactly
abstract: Smarter Branching Speeds Up Leading Exact Vehicle Routing Solvers Researchers have introduced a learning-based branching strategy that substantially accelerates exact algorithms for vehicle routing problems, a core challenge in logistics and transportation systems. The study proposes the first learning-to-branch framework tailored for branch-price-and-cut methods, where dynamic variables and dense constraints make traditional branching decisions computationally expensive. The novel two-stage learning-based branching (2LBB) approach effectively filters promising candidates using inexpensive features and then applies selective, partial testing to reduce costly evaluations. A theoretical model further guides dynamic adjustment of branching effort, balancing decision time with solution quality. Extensive experiments show runtime reductions of 45%–50% on standard CVRP and VRPTW benchmarks and a 47% speedup over the state-of-the-art VRPSolver when integrated into the open-source RouteOpt. These results highlight the growing potential of disciplined machine learning to enhance exact optimization algorithms.
title_cn: 在精确求解车辆路径问题的分支-定价-剪切算法中，二阶段学习进行分支选择
abstract_cn:
更智能的分支加速了领先的精确车辆路径规划求解器

研究人员提出了一种基于学习的分支策略，显著加速了车辆路径规划问题的精确算法，车辆路径规划是物流和交通系统中的核心挑战。该研究提出了首个专为分支-定价-切割方法定制的学习分支框架，其中动态变量和密集约束使得传统分支决策在计算上非常昂贵。新颖的两阶段基于学习的分支方法（2LBB）有效地利用低成本特征筛选出有前景的候选解，并随后应用选择性、部分测试以减少高昂的评估成本。一个理论模型进一步指导了分支努力的动态调整，实现决策时间与解的质量之间的平衡。大量实验表明，在标准的 CVRP 和 VRPTW 基准测试中，运行时间减少了 45%–50%；并且在集成到开源的 RouteOpt 后，相比现有最先进的 VRPSolver 速度提升了 47%。这些结果突显了规范机器学习在增强精确优化算法方面的潜力。

title: A Note on Piecewise Affine Decision Rules for Robust, Stochastic, and Data-Driven Optimization
abstract: Sharper Approximation for Multistage Decisions Under Uncertainty In “A Note on Piecewise Affine Decision Rules for Robust, Stochastic, and Data-Driven Optimization,” Thomä, Schiffer, and Wiesemann revisit piecewise affine decision rules, a widely used approximation for multistage stochastic programs. Building on the framework of Georghiou et al. (2015), the authors propose an algorithmic refinement that yields strictly better policies in stochastic settings while retaining tractability. Beyond stochastic programming, the framework naturally extends to multistage robust optimization and to modern data-driven models based on Wasserstein ambiguity sets. The paper shows how the resulting policies can be computed efficiently and provides numerical evidence demonstrating consistent performance improvements.
title_cn: 关于鲁棒性、随机性和数据驱动优化的分段仿射决策规则的说明
abstract_cn: 多阶段不确定性决策的更锐利近似 在《关于鲁棒、随机和数据驱动优化的分段仿射决策规则的说明》一文中，Thomä、Schiffer 和 Wiesemann 重新审视了分段仿射决策规则，这是一种广泛应用于多阶段随机程序的近似方法。基于 Georghiou 等人（2015）的框架，作者提出了一种算法改进，能够在随机环境中产生严格更优的策略，同时保持可处理性。超越随机编程，该框架自然而然地扩展到多阶段鲁棒优化以及基于 Wasserstein 模糊集的现代数据驱动模型。论文展示了如何高效计算所得到的策略，并提供了数值证据，证明了其在性能上的一致改进。

title: Fair Fares for Vehicle Sharing Systems
abstract: Vehicle sharing systems—such as bike, scooter, and car sharing—play a key role in urban transportation, yet algorithmic pricing can lead to inequalities across locations. This paper studies how platforms can incorporate fairness into pricing decisions and the resulting outcomes. We propose two notions of fairness: price fairness, which limits price differences across locations, and access fairness, which equalizes the proportion of demand at each location that has access to the system, determined by affordability and availability. Using a stylized two-location model, the paper analyzes how fairness constraints affect platform revenue, consumer surplus, and social welfare. Although price fairness can sometimes increase consumer surplus at both locations, access fairness always reduces consumer surplus at both locations. A convex relaxation approach is developed for larger networks, and a case study using New York City data illustrates the tradeoffs between fairness and efficiency in practice.
title_cn: 共享交通系统的合理 fare 设定
abstract_cn: 车辆共享系统，如自行车、滑板车和汽车共享，在城市交通中发挥着关键作用。然而，算法定价可能导致不同地点之间的不平等。本文研究了平台如何将公平性纳入定价决策及其带来的结果。我们提出了两种公平性概念：价格公平性，限制不同地点之间的价格差异；以及可及性公平性，平衡各个地点接入系统的需求比例，该比例由可负担性和可用性决定。通过一个简化的两个地点模型，本文分析了公平性约束如何影响平台收入、消费者剩余和社会福利。尽管价格公平有时可以在两个地点都增加消费者剩余，但可及性公平始终会在两个地点减少消费者剩余。本文为更大网络开发了一种凸松弛方法，并通过使用纽约市数据的案例研究，说明实践中公平性与效率之间的权衡。

title: Online Learning and Optimization for Queues with Unknown Arrival Rate and Service Distribution
abstract: End-to-End Optimization for Queues Beyond PTO Most queueing optimization methods rely on a predict-then-optimize (PTO) paradigm, which first estimates key model primitives (e.g., demand rates and service-time distributions) and then optimizes system decisions using these estimates as if they were exact. In practice, however, queueing performance formulas are often highly sensitive to estimation errors, especially under congestion, making such approaches fragile and potentially misleading. In “Online Learning and Optimization for Queues with Unknown Arrival Rate and Service Distribution,” X. Chen, G. Hong, and Y. Liu develop a new end-to-end online learning framework for jointly optimizing pricing and capacity decisions in service systems, called LiQUAR (learning in queue with unknown arrival rate). LiQUAR is specialized to queueing systems by explicitly leveraging workload dynamics and transient behavior, allowing it to learn directly from arrival and service data without requiring prior knowledge of the demand function or the service-time distribution. Designing online learning algorithms for queues poses unique challenges: Data are temporally correlated, system dynamics are disrupted by policy updates, and performance is highly sensitive to congestion. LiQUAR addresses these challenges through queue-aware algorithm design and analysis, establishing regret bounds that capture the effect of traffic intensity and demonstrating superior performance to PTO and gradient-based reinforcement learning methods, particularly in heavily loaded systems.
title_cn: 未知到达率和服务分布的排队系统的在线学习与优化
abstract_cn:
端到端排队优化超越PTO

大多数排队优化方法依赖于“预测-再优化”（PTO）范式，该方法首先估计关键模型原始参数（例如需求率和服务时间分布），然后利用这些估计作为确切值来优化系统决策。然而，在实践中，排队性能公式往往对估计误差高度敏感，尤其是在拥堵情况下，这使得此类方法脆弱且可能产生误导。在“针对未知到达率和服务分布的排队在线学习与优化”一文中，X. Chen、G. Hong和Y. Liu开发了一种新的端到端在线学习框架，旨在共同优化服务系统中的定价和容量决策，称为LiQUAR（在未知到达率的队列中学习）。LiQUAR专门针对排队系统，通过明确利用工作负载动态和暂态行为，允许其直接从到达和服务数据中学习，而无需事先了解需求函数或服务时间分布。为排队设计在线学习算法面临独特挑战：数据具有时间相关性，系统动态受到政策更新的干扰，并且性能对拥堵极为敏感。LiQUAR通过队列感知的算法设计与分析来应对这些挑战，建立了捕获交通强度影响的后悔界限，并证明其在重载系统中表现优于PTO和基于梯度的强化学习方法。

title: Survey of Data-driven Newsvendor: Unified Analysis and Spectrum of Achievable Regrets
abstract: Unifying the Regret Spectrum in Data-Driven Newsvendor The data-driven newsvendor problem seeks to optimize inventory decisions using samples from an unknown demand distribution. Although this problem has attracted significant attention, previous studies have typically analyzed specific distribution classes or regret definitions in isolation. In “Survey of the Data-Driven Newsvendor Problem: Unified Analysis and Spectrum of Achievable Regrets,” Chen and Ma present a unified analysis that synthesizes these settings and simplifies existing proofs. The study utilizes a notion of clustered distributions defined via the cumulative distribution function (CDF). This approach demonstrates that the achievable regret covers the entire spectrum of convergence rates between $1/\sqrt{n}$ and $1/n$. Beyond the theoretical unification, the authors show through simulations that this CDF-based notion accurately predicts the empirical regret and captures how the difficulty of the problem evolves with sample size. This work provides insights into understanding the value of data in the newsvendor problem and, more broadly, decision making under uncertainty.
title_cn: 数据驱动型新闻供应商的调查：统一分析与可达到遗憾的范围
abstract_cn:
统一数据驱动新闻贩子问题中的懊悔光谱

数据驱动新闻贩子问题旨在利用来自未知需求分布的样本来优化库存决策。尽管该问题受到广泛关注，前人的研究通常只分析特定的分布类或独立的懊悔定义。在“数据驱动新闻贩子问题的综述：统一分析和可实现懊悔的光谱”一文中，陈和马提出了一种统一分析，综合了这些设置并简化了现有的证明。本研究利用了通过累积分布函数（CDF）定义的聚类分布的概念。该方法展示了可实现的懊悔覆盖了从 $1/\sqrt{n}$ 到 $1/n$ 之间的整个收敛速率光谱。除了理论上的统一，作者通过模拟展示了基于CDF的概念准确地预测了经验懊悔，并捕捉到问题的难度如何随着样本大小的变化而演变。这项工作为理解数据在新闻贩子问题中的价值以及更广泛的不确定性决策提供了深入的见解。

title: Reducing Manual Labeling Effort in Imbalanced Data Sets: Active Learning for Detecting Illicit Massage Business Reviews
abstract: Smarter Labeling to Detect Hidden Human Trafficking Risks Human trafficking investigators face the immense challenge of sifting through vast amounts of online data to uncover illicit activities. In their article, Reducing Manual Labeling Effort in Imbalanced Data Sets: Active Learning for Detecting Illicit Massage Business Reviews, Tobey, Mayorga, Bosisto, and Özaltın present a novel framework that uses reinforcement learning–based active learning to reduce the burden of manual data labeling, improving detection of illicit massage business reviews on Yelp. By strategically selecting the most informative reviews for expert annotation, the approach achieves strong performance despite limited and imbalanced data sets, easing the emotional and time costs of reviewing disturbing content. The study demonstrates that their method outperforms benchmark active learning strategies, remains effective even with large query batches, and generalizes across regions. Beyond combating human trafficking, the framework offers a scalable solution for other domains with scarce, sensitive, or costly-to-label data.
title_cn: 减少不平衡数据集中的人工标注工作量：用于检测非法按摩商业评论的主动学习方法
abstract_cn:
更智能的标注以发现隐藏的人类贩运风险

人类贩运调查人员面临着从大量在线数据中筛选出非法活动的巨大挑战。在他们的文章《减少不平衡数据集中的手动标注工作：用于检测非法按摩商业评论的主动学习》中，Tobey、Mayorga、Bosisto 和 Özaltın 提出了一个新颖的框架，该框架利用基于强化学习的主动学习来减少手动数据标注的负担，从而改善对Yelp上非法按摩商业评论的检测。通过战略性地选择最具信息量的评论进行专家注释，这一方法在数据集有限且不平衡的情况下，依然取得了优异的性能，减轻了审查令人不安内容的情感和时间成本。研究表明，他们的方法在性能上优于基准主动学习策略，即使在大规模查询批次中也依然有效，并且在不同地区具有良好的泛化能力。除了打击人类贩运，该框架还为其他数据稀缺、敏感或标注成本高昂的领域提供了可扩展解决方案。

title: Online Demand Fulfillment Problem with Initial Inventory Placement: A Regret Analysis
abstract: Studying How Inventory Placement Shapes Online Fulfillment Performance A growing share of e-commerce operations involves deciding not only how to fulfill incoming orders, but also where to position inventory beforehand. In “Online Demand Fulfillment Problem with Initial Inventory Placement: A Regret Analysis,” Arlotto, Keskin, and Wei examine how these two decisions interact. The authors introduce a joint regret framework that evaluates the performance of a fulfillment policy together with the initial allocation of inventory across warehouses. Their analysis shows that probabilistic fulfillment inevitably accumulates regret that grows with the length of the planning horizon, regardless of how inventory is initially placed. By contrast, when combined with an appropriate offline inventory placement, the score-based approach achieves a regret bound that remains stable over time and scales only with the size of the system. The study offers insight into the role of initial placement in shaping fulfillment policy performance.
title_cn: 在线需求满足问题及初始库存配置：一种悔恨分析
abstract_cn:
研究库存摆放如何塑造在线履约表现

越来越多的电子商务运营不仅涉及如何履行进来的订单，还包括如何事先定位库存。在《具有初始库存摆放的在线需求履行问题：一种遗憾分析》中，Arlotto、Keskin 和 Wei 探讨了这两项决策是如何相互作用的。作者引入了一个联合遗憾框架，该框架评估了履约政策的表现，以及库存在各个仓库之间的初始分配。分析表明，概率性履约不可避免地累积遗憾，而这种遗憾会随着规划时间范围的延长而增加，与初始库存摆放的方式无关。相比之下，当与适当的离线库存摆放相结合时，基于得分的方法能够实现一个随时间保持稳定并仅随着系统规模变化的遗憾界限。本研究提供了有关初始摆放在塑造履约政策表现中的作用的深入见解。

title: Mean-Risk Traffic Assignment Under the Continuously Distributed Risk-Aversion Factor
abstract: From Discrete to Continuum: Risk Preference Heterogeneity in Traffic Equilibrium How do travelers with heterogeneous risk preferences choose routes in congested networks with uncertain travel times? Conventional models characterize risk preference heterogeneity using a small number of discrete user classes. In “Mean-Risk Traffic Assignment Under the Continuously Distributed Risk-Aversion Factor,” Xu, Li, Xie, Chen, and Liu develop a new traffic equilibrium framework that directly accommodates a continuous distribution of risk aversion. The resulting model generalizes the classical Wardrop equilibrium to settings with both stochastic travel times and continuous preference heterogeneity, providing a more refined representation of real-world routing behavior. This study demonstrates that the continuous approach outperforms the discrete approach by not only eliminating the inherent discretization bias—that can mislead infrastructure investment decisions—but also delivers superior computational performance, requiring less run time and memory. More broadly, the framework could be potentially applied to a wide range of biobjective congestion routing games where user preferences are continuously distributed.
title_cn: 基于连续分布风险厌恶因子的均值-风险交通分配
abstract_cn: 从离散到连续：交通均衡中的风险偏好异质性 具有异质风险偏好的旅行者在拥堵网络中如何选择路线，尤其是在旅行时间不确定的情况下？传统模型通过少数离散用户类别来表征风险偏好异质性。在“基于连续分布风险厌恶因子的均值-风险交通分配”一文中，Xu、Li、Xie、Chen和Liu开发了一种新的交通均衡框架，直接考虑了风险厌恶的连续分布。由此产生的模型将经典的Wardrop均衡推广到具有随机旅行时间和连续偏好异质性的情境，提供了对现实世界路线选择行为的更精细化表征。本研究表明，连续方法优于离散方法，不仅消除了固有的离散化偏差——这种偏差可能会误导基础设施投资决策——而且在计算性能上也表现更佳，所需的运行时间和内存更少。更广泛地说，该框架可能适用于广泛的双目标拥堵路线游戏，其中用户偏好是连续分布的。

title: Optimal Feature-Based Market Segmentation and Pricing
abstract: Operationalizing Semipersonalized Pricing How can modern firms leverage feature information to set prices in way that is both profitable and practical? A new study in Operations Research addresses this question by analyzing feature-based market segmentation and pricing (FBMSP), a semipersonalized approach to pricing where firms use customer characteristics to group buyers and set segment-specific prices. Although businesses often rely on heuristic “segment-then-price” methods, in their article the authors show that under realistic statistical assumptions, the jointly optimal segmentation and pricing policy can be computed efficiently. Further, using structural results about the optimal FBMSP, the authors prove that semipersonalized pricing quickly converges to the performance of fully personalized pricing, motivating its use in practice. Finally, in a case study on U.S. home mortgage data, they apply their method and show it significantly outperforms traditional heuristics, achieving near-maximal revenue with only a few segments. This research offers both practical tools and theoretical insights for firms navigating the balance between personalization and implementability in pricing.
title_cn: 基于最佳特征的市场细分与定价
abstract_cn: 实现半个性化定价：现代企业如何利用特征信息以既盈利又实用的方式设定价格？《运筹学研究》中的一项新研究探讨了这一问题，通过分析基于特征的市场细分与定价（FBMSP），这是一种半个性化的定价方法，企业利用客户特征将买家分组并设定特定细分市场的价格。尽管企业通常依赖启发式的“先细分后定价”方法，但本文的作者指出，在现实的统计假设下，联合最优的细分与定价政策可以高效计算。此外，通过基于最优FBMSP的结构性结果，作者证明了半个性化定价很快就能达到完全个性化定价的绩效，从而激励其在实践中的应用。最后，在对美国住房抵押贷款数据的案例研究中，他们应用了该方法，并显示其显著优于传统启发式方法，以仅少数几个细分市场实现近乎最大化的收入。这项研究为企业在定价中平衡个性化与可实施性提供了实用工具和理论见解。

title: Online Tensor Inference
abstract: From Big Data to Real-Time Decisions: Online Tensor Inference Modern digital platforms, from e-commerce and online advertising to mobile health, generate massive streams of high-dimensional data that must be analyzed in real time. In their paper “Online Tensor Inference,” Xin Wen, Will Wei Sun, and Yichen Zhang develop a new statistical framework that enables both efficient learning and rigorous inference for streaming tensor data. The authors propose an online low-rank tensor estimation method based on stochastic gradient descent that processes observations sequentially without storing historical data, overcoming the memory and scalability limitations of traditional offline approaches. Beyond estimation, the paper introduces a novel online debiasing technique that delivers valid confidence intervals and hypothesis tests on the fly without data splitting. Theoretical results establish near-minimax-optimal convergence rates and asymptotic normality for general linear functionals of tensors. Together, these advances provide a principled foundation for real-time, statistically grounded decision making in fast-changing, data-rich environments.
title_cn: 在线张量推断
abstract_cn:
从大数据到实时决策：在线张量推理 

现代数字平台，如电子商务、在线广告和移动健康，生成大量高维数据流，这些数据必须实时分析。在其论文《在线张量推理》中，Xin Wen、Will Wei Sun和Yichen Zhang开发了一种新的统计框架，使得对流式张量数据的高效学习和严格推断成为可能。作者提出了一种基于随机梯度下降的在线低秩张量估计方法，该方法顺序处理观测数据而无需存储历史数据，从而克服了传统离线方法的内存和可扩展性限制。除了估计之外，论文还介绍了一种新颖的在线去偏技术，能够即时提供有效的置信区间和假设检验，而无需进行数据拆分。理论结果建立了张量的广义线性泛函的近最小极大最优收敛速率和渐近正态性。这些进展为在快速变化、数据丰富的环境中进行实时、具有统计基础的决策提供了系统化的基础。

title: Pre-hedging
abstract: The paper “Pre-hedging” studies a dealer that pre-hedges an anticipated potential trade and analyses how this affects the client’s overall execution outcome. It shows that pre-hedging can benefit both parties: Improved risk management over an extended horizon then enables the dealer to charge reduced spreads that more than offset any adverse impact the pre-hedging activity has on the execution price. However, when a dealer pre-hedges too aggressively, this can be detrimental to the client. Timing uncertainty of the potential trade is an effective control held by the client to mitigate any counterproductive pre-hedging. Our results are robust to a setting where competing dealers simultaneously pre-hedge.
title_cn: 预对冲
abstract_cn: 论文《预对冲》研究了一个经销商在预期潜在交易前进行预对冲的情况，并分析了这如何影响客户的整体执行结果。研究表明，预对冲可以使双方受益：在较长时间范围内改善风险管理，使经销商能够收取降低的点差，从而大幅抵消预对冲活动对执行价格的任何不利影响。然而，当经销商过于激进地进行预对冲时，这可能对客户产生不利影响。潜在交易的时机不确定性是客户有效控制的一种手段，用以缓解任何适得其反的预对冲。我们的结果在竞争经销商同时进行预对冲的情况下也具有稳健性。

title: Deep Learning for High-Dimensional Continuous-Time Stochastic Optimal Control Without Explicit Solution
abstract: Multiasset Optimal Execution via Deep Learning for High-Dimensional Continuous-Time Stochastic Control In “Deep Learning for High-Dimensional Continuous-Time Stochastic Optimal Control Without Explicit Solution,” Dupret and Hainaut introduce the generalized policy iteration physics-informed neural network, a novel deep learning algorithm for solving high-dimensional continuous-time stochastic optimal control problems even when the optimal control does not admit explicit solution. The method combines physics-informed neural networks with an actor-critic structure based on generalized policy iteration and uses separate networks to approximate both the value function and the multidimensional optimal control. This approach provides a global approximation of the solution across time and space, enabling fast online evaluation. Theoretical guarantees on convergence and optimality are provided, whereas its accuracy and efficacy are empirically validated through two important numerical examples from operations research. Thereby, the authors generalize the Almgren–Chriss framework arising from optimal execution in finance by allowing both temporary and permanent price impacts to be fully nonlinear and by considering a multidimensional setting with multiple cointegrated assets.
title_cn: 高维连续时间随机最优控制的深度学习方法，无需显式解法
abstract_cn:
多资产最优执行的深度学习在高维连续时间随机控制中的应用

在《无显式解的高维连续时间随机最优控制的深度学习》中，Dupret和Hainaut提出了一种广义策略迭代物理信息神经网络，这是一种新颖的深度学习算法，用于解决高维连续时间随机最优控制问题，即使在最优控制没有显式解的情况下。该方法将物理信息神经网络与基于广义策略迭代的演员-评论家结构相结合，并使用独立的网络来近似价值函数和多维最优控制。此方法提供了解在时间和空间上的全局近似，能够实现快速的在线评估。文章提供了收敛性和最优性的理论保证，而其准确性和有效性通过来自运筹学的两个重要数值示例进行了实证验证。通过允许暂时性和永久性的价格影响完全非线性，并考虑具有多个协整资产的多维设置，作者将阿尔姆格伦-克里斯（Almgren–Chriss）框架从金融中的最优执行进行了推广。

title: Algorithms for Loot Box Design
abstract: From Loot Boxes to Better Design: Pricing Randomized Products Randomized rewards—often described as “mystery packs” or “blind-box” mechanics—are now a familiar feature in many video games. Yet choosing a loot box’s price and the odds of each possible drop is not just a design decision; it is a challenging optimization problem. In their accepted Operations Research paper, “Algorithms for loot box design” (Han, Ryan, and Tong, forthcoming), the authors develop an algorithmic framework for designing loot boxes by selecting a purchase price and item drop probabilities to maximize expected revenue under player choice behavior. They show that the general problem is computationally hard, but also identify economically motivated restrictions on player utilities that make the design problem tractable. When the number of items is fixed, the paper provides an exact polynomial-time algorithm under one class of utility structures and efficient approximation algorithms with provable guarantees under another. The analysis also links loot-box design to classic pricing ideas, offering guidance on how to translate item-level values and rarity into transparent, well-performing randomized reward systems.
title_cn: 战利品箱设计的算法
abstract_cn:
从战利品箱到更好的设计：随机产品定价

随机奖励——通常被称为“神秘包”或“盲盒”机制——如今已成为许多视频游戏中的一种常见特征。然而，选择战利品箱的价格及每种可能掉落的几率不仅仅是设计决策；这实际上是一个具有挑战性的优化问题。在他们即将发表的运筹学论文《战利品箱设计的算法》（Han, Ryan, and Tong, forthcoming）中，作者开发了一个算法框架，用于通过选择购买价格和物品掉落概率来设计战利品箱，以最大化在玩家选择行为下的期望收入。他们展示了一般问题在计算上是困难的，但也确定了经济上合理的玩家效用限制，使得设计问题变得可处理。当物品数量固定时，论文在一种效用结构下提供了精确的多项式时间算法，而在另一种结构下则提供了高效的近似算法，并附有可证明的保证。该分析还将战利品箱设计与经典定价理念联系起来，为如何将物品级别的价值和稀有性转化为透明且表现良好的随机奖励系统提供了指导。

title: Convergence and Inference of Stream Stochastic Gradient Descent, with Applications to Queueing Systems and Inventory Control
abstract: Stream SGD: Fast Learning and Valid Inference from Dependent Data Many online optimization problems in operations research rely on data generated by Markovian systems whose dynamics depend on the decision parameters, creating both statistical dependence and biased gradient information. This paper, “Convergence and Inference of Stream Stochastic Gradient Descent, with Applications to Queueing Systems and Inventory Control,” develops a unified theory for stream stochastic gradient descent (SGD), a sample-efficient method that uses just one observation per iteration. Using Poisson-equation techniques, the authors quantify and control gradient bias and dependence, proving an optimal [Formula: see text] convergence rate and a state-of-the-art O(log T) regret bound. Beyond optimization performance, the paper introduces an online inference framework for uncertainty quantification and establishes a functional central limit theorem that underpins valid asymptotic inference. A new Wasserstein-type divergence yields verifiable conditions via coupling arguments tailored to operations research models. Applications to queueing and inventory problems demonstrate how the theory translates into practical, scalable algorithms.
title_cn: 流状态随机梯度下降的收敛性与推断，以及在排队系统和库存控制中的应用
abstract_cn: 流式随机梯度下降：从依赖数据中快速学习和有效推断 许多运筹学中的在线优化问题依赖于由马尔可夫系统生成的数据，这些系统的动态与决策参数相关，从而产生统计依赖性和偏差的梯度信息。本文“流式随机梯度下降的收敛性和推断，及其在排队系统和库存控制中的应用”提出了一种流式随机梯度下降（SGD）的统一理论，这是一种每次迭代仅使用一个观测值的样本高效方法。通过使用泊松方程技术，作者量化并控制了梯度偏差和依赖性，证明了最优的收敛速率和先进的O(log T)遗憾界限。除了优化性能外，本文还引入了一个在线推断框架用于不确定性量化，并建立了一个支持有效渐近推断的函数中心极限定理。新的Wasserstein型散度通过针对运筹学模型的耦合论证提供了可验证的条件。对排队和库存问题的应用展示了该理论如何转化为实用的、可扩展的算法。

title: Technical Note—Error Noted in “Robust Contract Designs: Linear Contracts and Moral Hazard” by Yu and Kong (2020)
abstract: One of the key claims in the paper “Robust Contract Designs: Linear Contracts and Moral Hazard” by Yu and Kong (2020) is proposition 4. This proposition states that when designing the best robust contract—assuming the agent’s utility function is piecewise linear and concave—the optimal solution involves only progressive fixed payments and linear rewards with progressive commission rates. In this note, we provide a clear counterexample backed by a detailed proof to show that this claim is actually incorrect. We further use numerical examples to demonstrate that the contract design suggested by Yu and Kong can perform significantly worse than expected. Lastly, we identify and explain the specific mistakes in their mathematical proofs that led them to this incorrect conclusion.
title_cn: 技术说明——关于Yu和Kong（2020）“稳健合同设计：线性合同与道德风险”中的错误注意事项
abstract_cn: 在Yu和Kong（2020）的论文《稳健合同设计：线性合同与道德风险》中，核心论点之一是命题4。该命题指出，在设计最佳稳健合同时——假设代理人的效用函数是分段线性且凹形的——最佳解决方案仅涉及渐进式固定支付和带有渐进佣金率的线性奖励。在此笔记中，我们提供了一个清晰的反例，并附以详细证明，以表明该论点实际上是错误的。我们进一步使用数值示例来演示Yu和Kong提出的合同设计可能表现得远不如预期。最后，我们识别并解释了他们数学证明中的具体错误，这些错误导致他们得出了这个不正确的结论。

title: Capacity Management in Networks: A Structural Estimation Approach for Hospital Inpatient Wards
abstract: Problem definition: Addressing capacity management within a multifaceted network of resources is a critical challenge in service operations management. As resources are often shared to serve multiple classes of customers in such systems, customer routing often depends on the congestion levels of these resources, which in turn are affected by customer routing, creating a feedback loop. Consequently, when evaluating the impact of substantial capacity changes in the network, one must account for the complexity resulting from resource sharing, endogenous routing policies, and the feedback loop between routing policies and congestion levels that has the potential to alter the equilibrium of the system. This complexity renders conventional approaches insufficient for an accurate assessment. Methodology/results: To tackle these challenges, we develop a structural estimation approach that relies on two key components. First, we estimate the routing policy via a choice model that allows the routing policy to depend on not only the focal resource’s utilization but all connected resources’ utilization. We adopt a control function approach with instrumental variables to estimate the loads’ effect in routing without bias. Second, we incorporate the estimated routing policy into a queueing network model that captures the detailed system dynamics and evaluates the equilibrium performance of the entire network. We apply our approach to the specific empirical setting of the hospital inpatient ward network. We show that our proposed approach outperforms two alternative models and highlight the importance of accounting for network equilibrium effects when evaluating substantial capacity changes. Managerial implications: We provide prescriptive capacity allocation recommendations to hospital managers. More generally, our findings underscore the importance of a comprehensive understanding of the interdependencies between customer routing decisions and the levels of congestion present at various resources, shedding light on broader strategies for improving the operational performance of service networks. Funding: This work was supported by the Division of Civil, Mechanical and Manufacturing Innovation [Grant 1944209].
title_cn: 网络中的容量管理：针对医院住院病房的结构估计方法
abstract_cn: 问题定义：在多元资源网络中解决容量管理是服务运营管理中的一个关键挑战。由于资源通常被共享以服务于多个客户类别，因此客户路由往往依赖于这些资源的拥堵水平，而拥堵水平又受到客户路由的影响，从而形成了一个反馈循环。因此，在评估网络中重大容量变化的影响时，必须考虑由于资源共享、内生路由政策以及路由政策与拥堵水平之间的反馈循环所带来的复杂性，这些因素有可能改变系统的均衡。这种复杂性使得传统方法无法进行准确的评估。 方法论/结果：为了解决这些挑战，我们开发了一种依赖于两个关键组成部分的结构性估计方法。首先，我们通过选择模型估计路由政策，该模型使得路由政策不仅依赖于焦点资源的利用率，还依赖于所有连接资源的利用率。我们采用控制函数方法和工具变量来估计路由中负载的影响，以避免偏差。其次，我们将估计的路由政策纳入一个排队网络模型，该模型捕捉了系统的详细动态并评估整个网络的均衡表现。我们将这种方法应用于医院住院病房网络的具体经验情境。我们表明，所提出的方法优于两种替代模型，并强调在评估重大容量变化时考虑网络均衡效应的重要性。 管理启示：我们向医院管理者提供了具体的容量分配建议。更一般而言，我们的发现强调了全面理解客户路由决策与各种资源存在的拥堵水平之间相互依赖关系的重要性，为改善服务网络的运营绩效提供了更广泛的策略视角。 funding: 本项工作得到了土木、机械和制造创新部的支持 [资助号 1944209]。

title: The Dating Heuristic: A Provably Strong Matching Algorithm for Dating Platforms
abstract: Problem definition: Motivated by online dating platforms, we study the problem of selecting which subset of profiles to display to each user in each period. Users observe the profiles set by the platform and decide which of them to like, and a match occurs if and only if two users mutually like each other, potentially across different periods. The platform aims to maximize the expected number of matches produced over the entire time horizon, and users’ behavior—captured by their like probabilities—may depend on their history. Methodology/results: We develop a general theoretical model that captures the dynamic, two-sided nature of the problem and the influence of users’ past experiences on their future behavior. We focus on one-lookahead policies and propose the Integral Dating Heuristic (DH-int), providing formal performance guarantees: DH-int achieves a uniform [Formula: see text] approximation across all platform designs under reasonable assumptions. Our empirical analysis, using proprietary data from a major U.S.-based dating app, confirms that DH-int consistently outperforms other benchmarks such as Greedy, Perfect Matching, and Dating Heuristic (DH) and approaches the theoretical upper bound across multiple platform designs and variants of the history effect. The superior performance of DH-int is driven primarily by its careful balancing of initial and follow-up interactions, which accounts for the two-sided nature of the market. Managerial implications: DH-int offers a simple, implementable framework that can substantially improve matching outcomes. Our results provide actionable guidance for curated dating platforms on sequencing, allocation, and leveraging behavioral dynamics. More broadly, the insights extend to other complex, dynamic, two-sided marketplaces—such as freelancing, ride-sharing, and accommodation platforms—where careful sequencing and allocation decisions are critical to optimizing overall outcomes. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1053 .
title_cn: 约会启发式：一种可证明强大的匹配算法用于约会平台
abstract_cn: 问题定义：受在线约会平台的启发，我们研究了在每个时期选择向每个用户展示哪些个人资料子集的问题。用户观察平台设置的个人资料，并决定喜欢其中的哪些，如果两个用户互相喜欢，则会产生匹配，这种情况可能发生在不同的时期。平台旨在最大化整个时间范围内产生的匹配的期望数量，而用户的行为——通过他们的喜欢概率来捕捉——可能依赖于他们的历史。方法论/结果：我们开发了一个通用理论模型，捕捉了问题的动态双边性质以及用户过去经验对其未来行为的影响。我们聚焦于一次展望政策，并提出了积分约会启发式（DH-int），提供了正式的性能保证：在合理假设下，DH-int在所有平台设计中实现了均匀的[公式：见文本]近似。我们使用来自美国某大型约会应用的专有数据进行了实证分析，确认DH-int在多个平台设计和历史效应变体中，始终优于其他基准，如贪婪算法、完美匹配和约会启发式（DH），并接近理论上限。DH-int的卓越表现主要得益于其对初始及后续互动的谨慎平衡，这考虑到了市场的双边性质。管理启示：DH-int提供了一个简单、可实施的框架，可以显著改善匹配结果。我们的结果为策划的约会平台提供了关于序列、分配和利用行为动态的可操作指导。更广泛地说，这些见解扩展到其他复杂、动态的双边市场——如自由职业、拼车和住宿平台——在这些市场中，谨慎的序列和分配决策对优化整体结果至关重要。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1053获取。

title: Managing Multitier Inventory Networks with Expediting Under Normal and Disrupted Modes
abstract: Problem definition: We collaborate with an industrial partner whose supply chain uses multiple tiers, locations, and shipping speeds to efficiently serve customers. In practice, our partner also faces the possibility of upstream disruptions, which limit inventory availability. We model these key features of our partner’s network as a multiechelon distribution system (central warehouse and retailers) with expediting and disruptions. Methodology/results: We prove a novel stochastic program lower bound on optimal cost in this model and use this program to develop a heuristic base-stock policy. Our analysis demonstrates that there is a pronounced benefit from centralized inventory (i.e., holding inventory at the central warehouse) in distribution systems with expediting and disruptions as it can be used to both clear backlogs through expediting and hedge against future disruptions. Further, in the disrupted mode, we provide a simple criterion to determine when decentralization (i.e., holding inventory at the retailers) is preferred over complete centralization. Then, we validate our policies using data from our partner’s nationwide distribution network in the United States. Managerial implications: We provide novel inventory policies for managing a distribution system with expediting and disruptions that are understandable and implementable in practice. Our analysis provides the insight that facilitating the right level of central warehouse inventory is a critical hedge for improving performance in these systems. Finally, our industrial partner’s data suggest that our policies can provide significant cost savings in practice. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0249 .
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 在正常和干扰模式下管理多层库存网络与加速处理
abstract_cn: 问题定义：我们与一家工业合作伙伴合作，该合作伙伴的供应链使用多个层级、地点和运输速度以高效地服务客户。在实际操作中，我们的合作伙伴还面临上游中断的可能性，这限制了库存的可用性。我们将合作伙伴网络的这些关键特征建模为一个多层次的分销系统（中央仓库和零售商），涉及加速交付和干扰。 方法论/结果：我们证明了在该模型中最优成本的一个新颖的随机程序下界，并利用该程序开发了一种启发式基础库存策略。我们的分析表明，在具有加速和干扰的分销系统中，集中库存（即在中央仓库保持库存）带来了显著的益处，因为它可以用于通过加速交付来清除积压，并对未来的干扰进行对冲。此外，在干扰模式下，我们提供了一个简单标准，以确定何时去中心化（即在零售商处保持库存）相较于完全集中更为优选。随后，我们使用美国合作伙伴的全国分销网络数据验证了我们的策略。 管理启示：我们提供了新颖的库存策略，用于管理一个具有加速和干扰的分销系统，这些策略在实践中易于理解和实施。我们的分析提供了这样的见解，即适当水平的中央仓库库存对提升这些系统的绩效至关重要。最后，我们的工业合作伙伴的数据表明，我们的策略在实践中能够显著节省成本。 附加材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0249 获取。

title: OM Forum—Supply Chain Management in the AI Era: A Vision Statement from the Operations Management Community
abstract: Problem definition: Artificial intelligence (AI) is rapidly transforming the research and practice of supply chain management. Yet its impact depends on how effectively it is integrated with the theories, methods, and fundamental principles of operations management (OM), which must also evolve to account for the informational, incentive, and institutional changes brought by AI. The OM community has an important role and responsibility to lead in shaping not only how AI transforms supply chains but also how the supply chains that enable AI are designed to be sustainable, resilient, and equitable. Methodology/results: This vision statement organizes the discussion around five layers of the interaction between AI and supply chain management: intelligence, execution, strategy, human, and infrastructure. It synthesizes recent research and industry practice to show how AI enhances forecasting, planning, decision making, risk management, and human–machine collaboration and also examines the supply chains that support AI. Finally, it highlights persistent challenges in data quality, model integration, governance, and workforce adaptation. Managerial implications: Realizing AI’s promise in supply chain management requires reliable data and infrastructure, integration of learning and optimization, transparent and explainable decision systems, and a long-term commitment to human–AI collaboration. Together, these elements form the foundation for resilient, adaptive, and trustworthy supply chains in the AI era.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: OM论坛——人工智能时代的供应链管理：运营管理社区的愿景声明
abstract_cn: 问题定义：人工智能（AI）正在迅速改变供应链管理的研究与实践。然而，其影响力取决于AI与运营管理（OM）的理论、方法和基本原则的有效整合，而这些原则也必须随着AI带来的信息、激励和制度变化而发展。OM社区在塑造AI如何转变供应链以及支持AI的供应链设计成可持续的、有韧性的和公平的方面，承担着重要的角色和责任。 方法论/结果：该愿景声明围绕AI与供应链管理之间交互的五个层面进行讨论：智能、执行、战略、人类和基础设施。它综合了近期的研究和行业实践，展示了AI如何增强预测、计划、决策、风险管理和人机协作，同时也考察了支持AI的供应链。最后，强调了在数据质量、模型整合、治理和劳动力适应性方面的持续挑战。 管理启示：在供应链管理中实现AI的潜力需要可靠的数据和基础设施、学习与优化的整合、透明且可解释的决策系统，以及对人机协作的长期承诺。这些要素共同构成了AI时代中韧性、适应性和可信赖的供应链基础。

title: Early Reservation for Follow-up Appointments: Enhancing Patient Care Continuity
abstract: Problem definition: In the context of outpatient care, physicians often decide at the end of a consultation session whether to schedule follow-up appointments for patients with likely future needs. Those appointments are referred to as prioritized follow-up (PFU) appointments. We study mechanisms that encourage physicians to schedule the optimal quantity of PFUs, aiming to enhance continuity of care (COC), minimizing no-shows and late cancellations. Methodology/results: Utilizing both empirical analysis and modeling, this paper examines strategies for enhancing COC within an appointment scheduling framework. It presents empirical evidence indicating that a greater frequency of PFUs is associated with improved COC. Subsequently, a queueing model is introduced that delineates the impact of PFU appointments on revenue generation and COC levels. The model reveals a discrepancy between physician and health system preferences regarding the number of PFUs with doctors inclined to schedule fewer and health systems favoring more. We apply a principal–agent model to examine the optimal decisions of both the clinic (principal) and the doctor (agent). For situations involving symmetric information, we identify a performance-based payment structure that effectively aligns the incentives of both stakeholders. When information is asymmetric, we theoretically compare four distinct contract types and identify the most promising candidate. Managerial implications: Our findings suggest that health systems ought to implement incentive schemes that reward physicians for a higher proportion of PFUs in their appointment schedules. Such rewards are more cost-effective than those based on the aggregate number of PFU appointments. History: This paper was selected as part of the 1RR initiative between the M&SOM journal and the MSOM Society. This paper was part of the 2024 MSOM Service Operations SIG Conference. Funding: This research was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72471244 and 72101102], the Natural Science Foundation of Hunan Province [Grant 2024JJ6536], and the Natural Sciences and Engineering Research Council of Canada [Grants RGPIN-2025-05592 and RGPIN-2019-05539]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0321 .
title_cn: 提前预约后续就诊：提升患者护理连续性
abstract_cn:
问题定义：在门诊护理的背景下，医生通常在咨询会话结束时决定是否为未来可能需要的患者安排后续预约。这些预约被称为优先后续（PFU）预约。我们研究了鼓励医生安排最佳数量PFU的机制，旨在加强护理的连续性（COC），减少缺席和临时取消的情况。

方法论/结果：本论文利用实证分析和建模的方法，考察了在预约调度框架内增强COC的策略。我们提供的实证证据表明，更高频率的PFUs与改善COC相关。随后，引入了一个排队模型，阐明了PFU预约对收入生成和COC水平的影响。模型揭示了医生和健康系统在PFU数量上的偏好存在差异，医生倾向于安排较少的PFU，而健康系统则偏好更多。我们应用主-agent模型考察诊所（主）与医生（代理）的最佳决策。在信息对称的情况下，我们识别出一种基于绩效的支付结构，能够有效地对齐双方利益。当信息不对称时，我们理论上比较了四种不同的合同类型，并确定了最有前景的候选者。

管理启示：我们的研究结果表明，健康系统应实施激励机制，奖励医生在其预约调度中安排更高比例的PFU。这样的奖励比基于PFU预约总数的奖励更具成本效益。

历史：本文作为M&SOM期刊与MSOM学会之间1RR倡议的一部分被选中，并且是2024年MSOM服务运营特别兴趣小组会议的一部分。资助：本研究得到了中国国家自然科学基金[资助编号72471244和72101102]、湖南省自然科学基金[资助编号2024JJ6536]以及加拿大自然科学与工程研究委员会[资助编号RGPIN-2025-05592和RGPIN-2019-05539]的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0321获取。

title: Cancer Screening Outreach Guided by Machine Learning: The Benefits of Proactive Care
abstract: Problem definition: With the advance of data analytics, many disease prediction models have been developed with the intent of detecting diseases earlier and improving patient outcomes through earlier treatment. The operationalization of interventions and care based on these predictive models is critical to attaining these goals. We study the real-world effects of a machine learning-guided colorectal cancer screening outreach program deployed at a health system in Pennsylvania. Methodology/results: Using a regression discontinuity design based on the predicted risk score for having cancer, we find that the program increases the likelihood of colonoscopy uptake in three and six months by 6.0 percentage points (214% increase relative to the control sample within the bandwidth) and 6.9 percentage points (117% increase), respectively. Importantly, we also find significant effects on mortality. We estimate that the program decreases two-year mortality by 6.2 percentage points (43% decrease). Managerial implications: Our finding suggests that a proactive cancer screening outreach program where individuals are selected for intervention based on a machine learning algorithm could significantly improve patient outcomes in addition to achieving higher disease detection rates. Our analysis demonstrates an analytical framework for rigorously evaluating machine learning-aided outreach programs for other cancers and diseases. Establishing unbiased estimates of the impact of machine learning-aided screening outreach is critical for capacity planning of screening resources, such as colonoscopies. History: This paper has been accepted as part of the 2025 Manufacturing & Service Operations Management Practice-Based Research Competition. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1353 .
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 基于机器学习的癌症筛查推广：主动护理的好处
abstract_cn: 问题定义：随着数据分析技术的发展，许多疾病预测模型相继被开发，旨在更早地检测疾病并通过早期治疗改善患者的预后。基于这些预测模型的干预和护理的实施对于实现这些目标至关重要。我们研究了在宾夕法尼亚州某卫生系统部署的机器学习引导的结直肠癌筛查外展项目的实际效果。方法与结果：使用基于预测患癌风险评分的回归不连续设计，我们发现该项目在三个月和六个月后分别提高了结肠镜检查参与的可能性6.0个百分点（相较于对照样本，增加了214%）和6.9个百分点（增加了117%）。重要的是，我们还发现对死亡率产生了显著影响。我们估计该项目减少了两年死亡率6.2个百分点（降低了43%）。管理启示：我们的研究结果表明，基于机器学习算法选择个体进行干预的主动癌症筛查外展项目可能会显著改善患者预后，同时提高疾病检测率。我们的分析展示了一种评估机器学习辅助外展项目在其他癌症和疾病上有效性的严谨分析框架。建立机器学习辅助筛查外展影响的无偏估计对于计划结肠镜等筛查资源的能力至关重要。历史：本文已被接受作为2025年制造与服务运营管理实践基础研究竞赛的一部分。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.1353获取。

title: Frontiers in Operations: Last-Mile Delivery in Healthcare: Drone Delivery for Blood Products in Rwanda
abstract: Problem definition: Last-mile delivery is one of the most challenging and costly facets of the supply chain. Using data from Rwandan public hospitals that transfuse blood, we examine whether and the extent to which the adoption of a technological innovation—delivery drones—for the last-mile delivery of blood products impacts the way hospitals manage the inventory of these products and the downstream health outcomes for patients. Methodology/results: To estimate causal effects, we exploit the staggered rollout of the drone delivery system and use a generalized difference-in-differences approach. We find that all hospitals, regardless of their distance to the drone port, substantially decrease their on-hand inventory of red blood cells, most notably for the most flexible product (i.e., type O blood). Hospitals also meaningfully reduce their wastage of red blood cells, especially for “in-between” products that are neither the most flexible nor the least flexible (i.e., type B blood). With respect to patient health outcomes, we document large reductions in in-hospital mortality for two health conditions where timely access to blood is a critical input for treatment: postpartum hemorrhage and trauma. Interestingly, this change is concentrated among hospitals closer to the drone port, and these are the same set of hospitals that increase the transfusion of blood products. This increase is especially pronounced among blood products that cannot be held in stock at the hospital, including platelets and fresh frozen plasma. Managerial implications: Our results highlight key considerations for decision makers allocating scarce resources to improve hospital operations and health outcomes. Given that health improvements are not realized by all hospitals, operational decisions—such as the number and location of drone ports—should ensure clinically meaningful delivery windows for time-sensitive medical care. History: This paper has been accepted in the Manufacturing & Service Operations Management Frontiers in Operations Initiative. Funding: This work was supported by the Wharton Dean’s Research Fund, Wharton Global Initiatives Research Program, Claude Marion Endowed Faculty Scholar Award, Mack Institute Research Fellowship, and Fishman-Davidson Center for Service and Operations Management. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0055 .
title_cn: 运营前沿：医疗最后一公里配送：卢旺达的血液制品无人机配送
abstract_cn: 问题定义：最后一公里配送是供应链中最具挑战性和成本最高的环节之一。我们利用卢旺达公共医院输血的数据，研究技术创新——配送无人机——在最后一公里输送血液产品中的应用，是否以及在多大程度上影响医院对这些产品的库存管理以及患者的下游健康结果。 方法论/结果：为了估计因果效应，我们利用无人机配送系统的分阶段实施，并采用广义差异中的差异方法。我们发现，所有医院，无论与无人机机场的距离如何，均显著减少其红细胞的库存，特别是对于最灵活的产品（即O型血）。医院还显著减少红细胞的浪费，特别是对于既不是最灵活也不是最不灵活的“中间”产品（即B型血）。在患者健康结果方面，我们记录到有两个健康状况在医院内的死亡率大幅降低，这两种状况中及时获得血液是治疗的关键输入：产后出血和创伤。有趣的是，这一变化主要集中在靠近无人机机场的医院，而这些医院正是那些增加了血液产品输血的医院。这样的增加在无法在医院库存的血液产品（包括血小板和冷冻新鲜血浆）中尤为明显。 管理启示：我们的结果强调了决策者在分配稀缺资源以改善医院运营和健康结果时需考虑的关键因素。鉴于并非所有医院都能实现健康改善，运营决策——例如无人机机场的数量和位置——应确保在对时间敏感的医疗服务中实现临床上有意义的交付窗口。 历史：本文已被《制造与服务运营管理》接受，属于运营前沿倡议的一部分。 资金支持：此项工作得到了沃顿商学院院长研究基金、沃顿全球倡议研究项目、克劳德·马里翁教授奖、马克研究所研究奖学金以及费希曼-戴维森服务与运营管理中心的支持。 附加材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0055 中获取。

title: Robust Allocation Policies for Distribution Inventory Systems with Replenishment
abstract: Problem definition: This paper investigates a periodically reviewed distribution inventory system where a central warehouse replenishes multiple retailers facing uncertain demand. Only moment information about demand at each retailer is available, and unmet demand is backlogged. Methodology/results: We develop a robust multiperiod inventory model for the system based on the central limit theorem–based uncertainty set and transform the inventory planning problem into a transportation problem. We characterize two conditions under which a Monge sequence exists for the transportation problem and derive the optimal ordering decisions for the robust inventory model. Building on the robust optimal policy structure, we propose a priority-based inventory policy with look-up-to-k-period reservation. Under this policy, each retailer maintains both an order-up-to level and a reservation target based on the number of periods each retailer looks ahead. Managerial implications: Numerical experiments show that our policy outperforms the other benchmark policies from the literature. The advantage is particularly pronounced under robust performance measures and with real-world demand data that exhibit high variability, skewness, and tail risk. This highlights the strong ability of our policy to handle extreme cases in real-world data sets. Funding: L. Wang is supported by the Humanities and Social Science Research Project of Anhui Educational Committee [Grant 2024AH052105]. C. Yang is partially supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China (NSFC) [Grants NSFC-72531005, 72122012, and 72071126] and the Program for Innovative Research Team of Shanghai University of Finance and Economics. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0502 .
title_cn: 补货的分配库存系统的稳健分配政策
abstract_cn: 问题定义：本文研究了一个定期审查的分销库存系统，其中一个中央仓库为多个面临不确定需求的零售商进行补货。每个零售商仅有关于需求的瞬时信息，并且未满足的需求会积压。方法论/结果：我们基于中心极限定理构建了一个多期库存模型，并将库存规划问题转化为运输问题。我们描述了运输问题中存在Monge序列的两个条件，并导出了稳健库存模型的最佳订购决策。在稳健最优政策结构的基础上，我们提出了一种基于优先级的库存政策，并采用向k期的预留策略。在此政策下，每个零售商根据其前瞻的期数维持一个订货上限和一个预留目标。管理启示：数值实验表明我们的政策在文献中的其他基准政策上表现优越。尤其在稳健的性能衡量标准和具有高变异性、偏度以及尾部风险的真实需求数据下，这一优势尤为显著。这突显了我们政策在处理真实数据集中的极端案例的强大能力。资助：L. Wang得到安徽省教育委员会人文社会科学研究项目的支持[资助号2024AH052105]。C. Yang部分获得国家自然科学基金[资助号NSFC-72531005、72122012和72071126]以及上海财经大学创新研究团队方案的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0502获取。

title: Favorable Risk Selection in Medicare Advantage: The Effect of Allowing Non-Medical Services
abstract: Problem definition: Following recent legislation, private insurers participating in Medicare Advantage (MA) are allowed to expand their set of supplementary services to include benefits that are not primarily health related. This policy is meant to lead to lower costs and better care, but questions have been raised about how this affects the incentives of private insurers. We investigate the implications of the policy for MA offerings, beneficiary enrollment, and social welfare. Methodology/results: We develop a game-theoretical model of the interactions between a social planner, an MA insurer, and beneficiaries. We posit that, even after risk-adjustment based on clinical factors, the beneficiary population is heterogeneous in their vulnerability to severe health events due to social determinants of health (SDOH). Owing to this heterogeneity and the broadened remit of the new legislation, the insurer can therefore introduce (i) preventive supplementary services, reducing the risk of severe health events and therefore mostly benefiting vulnerable beneficiaries, or (ii) general well-being supplementary services that entail the same level of non-health-related utility for all beneficiaries. We demonstrate that the policy change incentivizes the insurer to provide preventive supplementary services—which have the largest health impact—if and only if it receives high capitation payments for enrolled beneficiaries. Otherwise, the insurer offers general well-being supplementary services at prices tailored to attract less vulnerable beneficiaries. Moreover, for intermediate values of the capitation payment, the insurer enrolls fewer beneficiaries than under status quo policies—highlighting how the policy change can backfire by exacerbating favorable beneficiary selection (cream skimming) issues inherent in capitation payment systems. Finally, we investigate whether the social planner can mitigate favorable selection by adjusting the capitation payment. We find that the planner may need to choose between inducing improved health outcomes at a high cost (via preventive services) and higher overall welfare (via general well-being services). Managerial implications: While allowing private insurers to offer a wider range of supplementary services has the potential to result in more preventive offerings (thereby lowering treatment costs), policymakers should be aware of the conditions under which the policy might, instead, increase cream skimming and reduce social welfare. Avoiding such outcomes may be costly. Funding: W. Hwang acknowledges support from the National Research Foundation of Korea (NRF) grant funded by the Korean government (MSIT) [Grant RS-2024-00410082]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0474 .
title_cn: 医疗保险优势计划中的有利风险选择：允许提供非医疗服务的影响
abstract_cn: 问题定义：根据最近的立法，参与医疗保险优势计划（Medicare Advantage, MA）的私人保险公司被允许扩展其补充服务的范围，包括非主要与健康相关的福利。这项政策旨在降低成本并提供更好的护理，但人们对这如何影响私人保险公司的激励机制提出了质疑。我们研究了该政策对MA产品、受益人注册和社会福利的影响。方法论/结果：我们建立了一个社会规划者、MA保险公司和受益人之间互动的博弈理论模型。我们假设，即使在基于临床因素的风险调整之后，受益人群体在对严重健康事件的脆弱性方面仍然存在异质性，这种脆弱性受到社会健康决定因素（SDOH）的影响。由于这种异质性以及新立法的扩大范围，保险公司可以引入（i）预防性补充服务，降低严重健康事件的风险，从而主要惠及脆弱的受益人，或（ii）一般福祉补充服务，为所有受益人提供相同水平的非健康相关效用。我们证明，政策变化激励保险公司提供预防性补充服务——这些服务对健康影响最大——当且仅当它为注册的受益人获得高额的按人头支付。否则，保险公司将提供一般福祉补充服务，价格设定旨在吸引较少脆弱的受益人。此外，在中等水平的按人头支付下，保险公司注册的受益人数量少于现状政策下的数量——这突显了政策变化可能适得其反，加剧了按人头支付系统中固有的有利受益人选择（优质选择）问题。最后，我们研究了社会规划者是否可以通过调整按人头支付来缓解优质选择问题。我们发现，规划者可能需要在以高成本诱导改善健康结果（通过预防性服务）和提高整体福利（通过一般福祉服务）之间进行选择。管理启示：虽然允许私人保险公司提供更广泛的补充服务有可能导致更多的预防性产品（从而降低治疗成本），但政策制定者应意识到在何种条件下该政策可能反而增加优质选择并降低社会福利。避免此类结果可能会带来高昂的成本。资助：W. Hwang 感谢韩国政府（MSIT）资助的韩国国家研究基金会（NRF）资助 [资助编号 RS-2024-00410082]。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2023.0474 获取。

title: Dynamic Irrigation Management Under Weather Uncertainty and Soil Heterogeneity
abstract: Problem definition: This paper studies dynamic irrigation management under weather uncertainty and spatial soil heterogeneity of the field. Irrigation is a key method for increasing agricultural yield, addressing growing concerns about food insecurity in recent years. However, managing irrigation effectively is a complex task, particularly under uncertain weather conditions. With rising concerns about freshwater scarcity, increasing production costs, and the impacts of climate change, it is imperative to develop efficient and sustainable irrigation strategies. This paper proposes an (s, S)-type irrigation policy designed for farmers facing uncertain weather conditions and spatial soil heterogeneity. Methodologically, we build on and extend the existing operations management literature on the optimality of (s, S)-type policies by incorporating endogenous demand, providing a novel approach to irrigation management. Methodology/results: We formulate our problem as a stochastic dynamic program. We demonstrate that an (s, S)-type irrigation policy is optimal for an approximate system with homogeneous soil structure. Building on this foundation, we derive performance bounds and develop effective heuristic policies for the more general case that incorporates soil heterogeneity. Our numerical results reveal significant improvements over current irrigation management practices. Managerial implications: Our proposed policies could substantially enhance farmers’ profit margins and water savings compared with commonly used irrigation practices. Moreover, we demonstrate that the benefits of these policies become increasingly significant as water scarcity intensifies. Consequently, the proposed irrigation policies present a compelling option for farmers prioritizing profitability and sustainability. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2020.0187 .
title_cn: 在天气不确定性和土壤异质性下的动态灌溉管理
abstract_cn: 问题定义：本文研究在天气不确定性和土壤空间异质性背景下的动态灌溉管理。灌溉是提高农业产量的关键方法，近年来日益引发人们对粮食安全的关注。然而，在不确定的天气条件下，有效管理灌溉是一项复杂的任务。随着人们对淡水短缺、生产成本上升以及气候变化影响的关注加剧，开发高效且可持续的灌溉策略显得尤为重要。本文提出了一种针对面临不确定天气条件和土壤空间异质性的农民的(s, S)型灌溉政策。在方法论上，我们基于现有的运筹管理文献，拓展了关于(s, S)型策略的最优性研究，通过引入内生需求，为灌溉管理提供了一种新颖的方法。方法论/结果：我们将问题表述为一个随机动态规划问题。我们证明了在近似均质土壤结构的系统中，(s, S)型灌溉政策是最优的。在此基础上，我们推导了性能界限，并为更一般的、考虑土壤异质性的情况开发了有效的启发式政策。我们的数值结果显示，与当前的灌溉管理实践相比，显著提高了灌溉管理的效果。管理启示：与常用的灌溉做法相比，我们提出的政策能够显著提升农民的利润率和用水节约。此外，随着水资源短缺加剧，这些政策的益处表现得愈加显著。因此，所提出的灌溉政策为优先考虑盈利能力和可持续发展的农民提供了一个有吸引力的选择。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2020.0187 获取。

title: Frontiers in Operations: When Does Schedule Consistency Improve Shift Worker Productivity?
abstract: Problem definition: Shift workers make up a significant portion of the labor force in major countries and are widespread across industries. Their work schedules often involve odd hours and inconsistencies over time, deviating from regular day workers. Lu et al. (2022) introduced a two-dimensional measure for shift worker schedule consistency, namely, the hour-of-the-day and the day-of-the-week consistencies, and demonstrated their efficacy in improving labor productivity for grocery store cashiers. We expand this nascent literature in several ways. Methodology/results: Using data collected from warehouse workers performing picking and loading tasks, our context is differentiated by the inclusion of night hours and a piece-rate pay structure. The former enables us to show that hour-of-the-day consistency improves productivity only during day hours; it is in fact detrimental to productivity, at an even larger magnitude, during sleep hours. We revise the rhythm-synchronizing theory proposed by Lu et al. (2022) to accommodate this heterogeneity. The latter affords a comparison of effect sizes across the two most common pay structures for shift workers. We demonstrate that hour-of-the-day and day-of-the-week consistencies’ impact on productivity are four and eight times larger, respectively, under piece-rate pay than under hourly pay. We further consider how two environmental factors, inclement weather and extreme temperature, both of which are easily accessible via weather forecasts by schedulers, attenuate hour-of-the-day consistency’s effect. Managerial implications: Departing from existing perspective that both schedule consistency dimensions are effective, we show robust evidence that day-of-the-week consistency not only has a larger impact, improving productivity by 9.20% for a first- to third-quartile change compared with hour-of-the-day consistency’s 2.03%, but is also relatively stable across days and resistant to moderation by environmental factors. Thus, it should be the primary operational lever for schedulers, especially given its relative ease of use in practice. We also find schedule consistency to be most beneficial for new hires, with its impact waning as workers accumulate experience. However, the speed of this attenuation is much slower than previously reported. We illustrate how these insights can be easily incorporated into a consistency-aware scheduling policy through numerical studies. History: This paper has been accepted in the Manufacturing & Service Operations Management Frontiers in Operations Initiative. Funding: This study was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72172027, 72293563, and 72232001]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0019 .
title_cn: 运营前沿：排班一致性何时能提高班组工人的生产力？
abstract_cn: 问题定义：换班工人占主要国家劳动力的相当大一部分，并且在各行业中广泛存在。他们的工作时间通常涉及不规律的工作时段和随时间变化的差异，偏离常规日班工人。Lu等人（2022）提出了一种测量换班工人日程一致性的二维指标，即“时段一致性”和“星期一致性”，并展示了其在提高杂货店收银员劳动生产率方面的有效性。我们从几方面扩展了这一新兴文献。 方法论/结果：通过收集在仓库从事拣货和装载任务的工人的数据，我们的研究背景因纳入夜间工作时段和计件工资结构而有所不同。前者使我们能够展示，时段一致性在日间工作时段内提高生产率，而在睡眠时间内却对生产率产生更大的负面影响。我们对Lu等人（2022）提出的节奏同步理论进行了修订，以适应这种异质性。后者则使我们能够比较换班工人两种最常见的工资结构下的效果大小。我们展示，时段一致性和星期一致性对生产率的影响在计件工资下分别是每小时工资下的四倍和八倍。我们进一步考虑了两个环境因素，即恶劣天气和极端温度，这两者均可通过调度人员的天气预报轻松获取，如何削弱时段一致性的效果。 管理启示：不同于现有观点认为这两种日程一致性维度都是有效的，我们提供了强有力的证据表明，星期一致性不仅具有更大的影响，改变从第一四分位到第三四分位的生产率提升达9.20%，而时段一致性仅为2.03%，而且在各天之间相对稳定，且不容易受到环境因素的调节。因此，它应该是调度人员的主要操作杠杆，尤其是考虑到其实践中的相对易用性。我们还发现，日程一致性对新员工的帮助最大，随着工人积累经验，其影响逐渐减弱。然而，这种减弱的速度远比之前报道的要慢。我们通过数值研究展示了如何将这些见解轻松纳入关注一致性的调度政策中。 历史：本文已被《制造与服务运营管理》接受，属于运营学前沿计划。 资金来源：本研究得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [项目号72172027、72293563和72232001]。 补充材料：在线附录可访问 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2025.0019 。

title: Enhancing Volunteer Retention: The Role of Experienced Volunteers
abstract: Problem definition: Volunteers play a pivotal role in the daily operations of nonprofit organizations (NPOs). However, retaining volunteers remains a critical challenge for NPOs because of declining volunteering rates and high turnover. We explore a cost-effective approach to improving volunteer retention by leveraging the potential of experienced volunteers. Methodology/results: Using data from 49,378 volunteers at a food bank over a five-year period, we explore how interactions between experienced and new volunteers affect the latter’s retention.
