Problem definition: We study how RFQ design interacts with the time-cost trade-off in project execution and compare two common contract forms: time-incentive contracts (penalizing lateness) and cost-sharing contracts (reimbursing direct costs). Methodology/results: Using a game-theoretic model, we characterize optimal RFQ designs under incomplete information about contractors’ direct cost efficiency. Time-incentive contracts weaken competition, whereas cost-sharing contracts strengthen it, increasing work rates and shortening completion times. Clients prefer cost-sharing contracts, with this preference being stronger when time urgency is high, contractor heterogeneity is substantial, or the contractor pool is small; time-incentive contracts yield higher overall system efficiency in low-urgency settings, consistent with their prevalence in public projects. We derive a closed-form bound on the relative decrease in the client’s payoff when using a fixed-term RFQ instead of a more complex upfront-fee RFQ and numerically show that fixed-term RFQs lose less than 0.28% of client payoff. Audit noise has no effect when correction costs are negligible or very high, but it introduces bidding frictions and lowers the optimal cost-sharing ratio when correction costs are moderate. Managerial implications: These insights guide contract selection by time urgency and market conditions and support the use of simple fixed-term RFQs with minimal profit loss. Funding: This work was partially supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72501203, 72525012, 72188101, and 72242107]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.0894 .
title_cn: 惩罚迟交或分担成本：通过报价请求进行项目外包
abstract_cn: 请求报价（RFQ）是项目外包中最常用的承包商选择机制。问题定义：我们研究RFQ设计如何与项目执行中的时间-成本权衡相互作用，并比较两种常见的合同形式：时间激励合同（惩罚延迟）和成本分担合同（报销直接成本）。方法论/结果：通过使用博弈论模型，我们在对承包商的直接成本效率信息不完全的情况下，描述了最优RFQ设计。时间激励合同削弱了竞争，而成本分担合同则增强了竞争，提高了工作效率并缩短了完成时间。客户更倾向于选择成本分担合同，当时间紧迫性高、承包商异质性显著或承包商池较小时，这种偏好更为明显；在低紧迫性环境下，时间激励合同则能带来更高的整体系统效率，这与其在公共项目中的普遍性相一致。我们推导出使用固定期限RFQ而非更复杂的预付费RFQ时，客户收益相对下降的封闭形式界限，并通过数值分析显示，固定期限RFQ的客户收益损失不到0.28%。当纠正成本微不足道或非常高时，审计噪声没有影响，但在纠正成本适中时，它引入了投标摩擦并降低了最优成本分担比例。管理启示：这些见解为根据时间紧迫性和市场条件指导合同选择提供了依据，并支持使用简单的固定期限RFQ以实现最小的利润损失。资助：本研究部分得到了中国国家自然科学基金的支持 [资助号 72501203, 72525012, 72188101, 和 72242107]。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/msom.2024.0894 获取。

title: EXPRESS: Will Machines Take Over? Algorithms for Human-Machine Collaborative Decision Making in Healthcare
abstract: Despite significant advancements in predictive artificial intelligence (AI), organizations continue to grapple with determining the most effective integration of AI into their operations, particularly in combining AI with human capabilities in task execution. This paper introduces a diagnostic system aimed at minimizing costs while maintaining patient safety in hospitals by efficiently allocating mammography interpretation tasks between AI algorithms and radiologists. The optimal diagnostic system employs algorithm-generated risk scores for mammograms to determine if additional assessment by a radiologist is necessary. It evaluates the costs of two approaches—automation, where AI completely replaces human interpretation, and delegation, where AI and radiologists share interpretation tasks–compared to the current expert-alone strategy. When AI performance does not exceed that of radiologists, the optimal design is a simple two-threshold policy: AI recommends no follow-up for low-risk cases, recommends follow-up for high-risk cases, and delegates ambiguous cases in between to radiologists; the thresholds are analytically derived and state-independent. This two-threshold policy is state-independent and that optimal thresholds are not contingent on the diagnostic system’s prior history. We demonstrate our system’s performance by back-testing against real-life scenarios, utilizing data from a mammography AI contest and real-world cost and performance metrics. Backtesting demonstrates potential cost savings of up to 20.9% compared to the expert-alone approach. Beyond radiology imaging, our work holds significant implications for the design of workflows in the AI era and human-machine collaboration contexts.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: EXPRESS：机器会接管吗？医疗保健中的人机协作决策算法
abstract_cn: 尽管预测人工智能（AI）经历了显著的进步，组织仍在努力确定如何最有效地将AI整合到其运营中，特别是在任务执行中将AI与人类能力结合。本文提出了一种诊断系统，旨在通过高效分配乳腺X光检查的解读任务于AI算法和放射科医生之间，最小化成本同时保持医院中的患者安全。该最优诊断系统使用算法生成的乳腺X光检查风险评分，以决定是否需要放射科医生的进一步评估。它评估了两种方法的成本——自动化，即AI完全取代人工解读，以及委托，即AI和放射科医生共享解读任务——与当前的专家单独策略进行比较。当AI的性能未超过放射科医生时，最优设计是一种简单的双阈值策略：对于低风险案例，AI建议不进行后续检查；对于高风险案例，建议进行后续检查；而对于不明确的案例则委托给放射科医生。该阈值是通过分析推导出来的，并且与状态无关。我们展示了系统的性能，通过利用来自乳腺X光AI比赛的真实数据及相关的成本和性能指标进行回测。回测显示，与专家单独策略相比，潜在成本节约可达20.9%。除了放射学影像外，我们的研究对AI时代及人机协作环境下的工作流程设计有着重要的启示。

title: EXPRESS: Waiting Time Externality Awareness in Socially Responsible Queueing
abstract: In service systems, customers tend to overutilize resources, resulting in high congestion. We study a noncoercive way to alleviate congestion based on customers’ awareness of the negative waiting externalities they impose. To this end, we revisit Naor’s rational-queue model by adding a term that captures the cost a customer associates with the waiting time generated for other customers encountered during their sojourn. First, we show that this modification preserves the threshold structure of customers’ joining strategy. Using lattice-path counting techniques, we derive a closedform expression for the expected generated waiting time, conditional on the number of customers observed upon arrival. The generated wait is increasing and concave in the queue length at arrival. Viewing expected waiting time as allocated across arrivals, the queue length associated with an arbitrary unit of expected generated waiting time is first-order stochastically lower than the queue length associated with a unit of expected personal waiting time. We prove that the maximum generated wait is increasing and convex in the joining threshold and provide tight bounds with exact light/heavy traffic asymptotics. Internalizing social awareness (weight on generated wait) lowers the joining threshold and reduces waiting; in high-demand regimes, it can also increase social welfare. When the operator can also influence the weight on personal wait, that lever reduces congestion more strongly than waiting externality awareness. Finally, we quantify the awareness level needed to reach Naor’s social threshold and show that it is lowest at a non-extreme demand level.
title_cn: 表达：在社会责任排队中等待时间外部性意识
abstract_cn: 在服务系统中，顾客往往过度利用资源，导致高拥堵。我们研究了一种非强制性的方法来缓解拥堵，基于顾客对其所施加的负等待外部性的认识。为此，我们重新审视了Naor的理性排队模型，增加了一个项，以捕捉顾客在其逗留期间为其他顾客产生的等待时间所关联的成本。首先，我们展示了这一修改保留了顾客加入策略的阈值结构。利用格子路径计数技术，我们推导出了在到达时观察到的顾客数量条件下，预期生成等待时间的封闭形式表达式。生成的等待时间在到达时的队列长度上是递增且凹的。将预期等待时间视为在到达之间分配，与任意单位的预期生成等待时间相关的队列长度在一阶随机意义上低于与单位预期个人等待时间相关的队列长度。我们证明了最大生成等待时间在加入阈值上是递增且凸的，并提供了精确的轻/重交通渐近界限。内化社会意识（对生成等待的权重）降低了加入阈值并减少了等待；在高需求情况下，它还可以增加社会福利。当运营者也能影响个人等待的权重时，这一杠杆比等待外部性意识更强烈地减少拥堵。最后，我们量化了达到Naor社会阈值所需的意识水平，并表明在非极端需求水平下，该水平最低。

title: EXPRESS: Scheduling Additive Manufacturing Systems: Complexity and Algorithms to Minimize the Number of Late Parts
abstract: Additive Manufacturing (AM) is a process by which three-dimensional products are made via the addition of material in a layer-by-layer fashion. This manufacturing technique is growing in commercial usage given its advantages in creating very dense or complex geometries as well as highly customizable components. In healthcare, for example, AM can be used to improve patient outcomes by providing timely medical devices (or parts) required for treatments. Minimizing the number of late parts in this context will directly improve the patients’ welfare. This paper studies the nesting and scheduling problem within the AM context and shows the problem of minimizing the number of late parts is strongly NP-hard even if the nesting of parts-into-jobs is given. We also develop efficient algorithms to minimize the number of late parts, both when nesting is fixed beforehand and when nesting is part of the algorithm. The theoretical results, including algorithm performance bounds, developed in this paper are new contributions to the literature. An extensive computational study evaluates the performance of both algorithms. The nesting and scheduling algorithm performs within 7% of the lower bound on average and shows an effective way to nest and schedule systems containing challenging problem instances. Providing efficient, high-performing algorithms such as these will allow AM managers to quickly schedule parts for AM production with a minimum number of late parts and consequently improve both customer satisfaction and profitability of the firm.
title_cn: 调度增材制造系统：复杂性及算法以最小化延迟零件的数量
abstract_cn: 增材制造（AM）是一种通过逐层添加材料来制造三维产品的工艺。这种制造技术因其能够创建非常密集或复杂的几何形状以及高度可定制的组件而在商业使用中日益增长。例如，在医疗保健领域，增材制造可以通过提供及时所需的医疗器械（或部件）来改善患者的治疗效果。在这种情况下，减少延迟部件的数量将直接改善患者的福祉。本文研究了增材制造背景下的嵌套与调度问题，并指出即使在给定的部件嵌套到工作中情况下，最小化延迟部件数量的问题也是一个强NP难题。我们还开发了高效的算法来最小化延迟部件的数量，分别在嵌套事先固定和嵌套作为算法一部分的情况下。本文中提出的理论结果，包括算法性能界限，是对现有文献的新贡献。通过广泛的计算研究，对这两种算法的性能进行了评估。嵌套与调度算法的表现平均处于下界的7%以内，并展示了处理具有挑战性问题实例的嵌套与调度系统的有效方法。提供高效且高性能的算法将使增材制造管理人员能够快速为增材制造生产调度部件，同时减少延迟部件的数量，从而提高客户满意度和公司的盈利能力。

title: EXPRESS: Empowering Supply Chain Energy Efficiency: Merits and Pitfalls of Buyer Collaboration
abstract: Government environmental agencies are increasingly partnering with large, foreign corporate buyers in the energy efficiency improvement process to encourage investments at small manufacturers that can enhance the value of local manufacturing. Using a stylized supply chain model, we show that while buyer collaboration enhances energy efficiency investments, its impact on the value of local manufacturing varies. Specifically, buyer collaboration improves the value of local manufacturing only when both the cost of the buyer’s outside sourcing option and the environmental impact of energy are either high or low. In cases where one factor is high and the other is low, buyer collaboration reduces the value of local manufacturing. Moreover, we find that the higher penetration of renewable sources in the energy mix can either amplify or mitigate the beneficial impact of buyer collaboration. When the manufacturer is more competitive in the global market, a greener energy mix can negate the beneficial impacts of buyer collaboration on the value of local manufacturing. Our study provides valuable insights for designing environmental initiatives and policies to boost both energy efficiency and local manufacturing, underscoring the importance of supply chain interactions in synchronizing climate change policies.
title_cn: EXPRESS: 赋能供应链能源效率：采购方合作的优势与陷阱
abstract_cn: 政府环境机构越来越多地与大型外国企业买家合作，推动能源效率提升过程，以鼓励对小型制造商的投资，从而增强地方制造业的价值。通过一个简化的供应链模型，我们展示了买方合作虽然能增强能源效率投资，但其对地方制造业价值的影响却有所不同。具体而言，买方合作仅在买方的外部采购选项成本和能源的环境影响均高或均低时，才能改善地方制造业的价值。在一个因素高而另一个因素低的情况下，买方合作反而会降低地方制造业的价值。此外，我们发现可再生能源在能源结构中的更高渗透率可以放大或减轻买方合作的积极影响。当制造商在全球市场上更具竞争力时，更环保的能源结构可能会抵消买方合作对地方制造业价值的积极影响。我们的研究为设计环境倡议和政策以提升能源效率和地方制造业提供了宝贵的见解，强调了供应链互动在协调气候变化政策中的重要性。

title: EXPRESS: The Negative Spillover Effect of Electronic Prescribing for Controlled Substances on the Opioid Epidemic
abstract: The opioid epidemic poses widespread societal challenges. In response, electronic prescribing for controlled substances (EPCS), which requires prescribers to use the e-prescribing system, has begun attracting attention to combat the opioid epidemic by helping prescribers detect doctor shoppers and prevent forged prescriptions. However, a concern is that limited access to opioids after EPCS mandates may cause drug users to cross borders and travel to other areas without EPCS. Grounded in the tension on the efficacy of EPCS, this study aims to assess the impact of EPCS on the opioid dispensing rate. Leveraging a US county-level data set from 2010 to 2020 and employing a quasi-experiment setup with matching, we find that counties without an EPCS mandate but adjacent to a state with an EPCS mandate experience an increase in opioid dispensing rates. Specifically, a neighboring-state EPCS mandate is associated with a 7.56% increase in the opioid dispensing rate in an adjacent county on average. The findings reveal that the negative spillover effect spreads deeper in areas with lenient illicit drug controls, in urban regions, and in areas with high poverty levels. Moreover, we estimate the overall efficacy of EPCS mandates by combining both the positive direct effect and the negative spillover effect of EPCS. We discuss theoretical and policy insights for the effective operation of EPCS mandates.
title_cn: 快递：电子处方对管制物质的负面溢出效应对阿片类药物危机的影响
abstract_cn: 阿片类药物危机带来了广泛的社会挑战。为应对这一问题，需要处方者使用电子处方系统的控制药物电子处方（EPCS）开始引起关注，旨在通过帮助处方者识别“医生购物者”和防止伪造处方来应对阿片类药物危机。然而，有一种担忧是，在EPCS强制实施后，有限的阿片类药物获取途径可能导致药物使用者跨越州界前往没有EPCS的地区。基于对EPCS有效性的紧张关系，本研究旨在评估EPCS对阿片类药物配发率的影响。我们利用2010年至2020年间的美国县级数据集，并采用匹配的准实验设计，发现那些没有EPCS强制但紧邻实施EPCS的州的县，其阿片类药物配发率显著上升。具体而言，邻近州的EPCS强制实施与相邻县的阿片类药物配发率的平均增加相对应，增幅为7.56%。研究结果表明，在毒品管控较宽松的地区、城市区域和贫困水平较高的地区，负面溢出效应更为显著。此外，我们通过结合EPCS的积极直接效应和负面溢出效应来估算EPCS强制实施的整体有效性。我们讨论了EPCS强制实施的理论和政策见解，以便于其有效运作。

title: EXPRESS: Turbocharging the Competitor: Unintended Spillovers of Personnel On-road Insurance Implementation in Ride-sourcing Industry
abstract: In response to social protests, transportation network companies introduced incentive programs to improve hourly utilization and retain drivers. While such initiatives assume increased driver commitment, their impact on labor allocation across competing gig economy platforms remains unexplored. This study uses a quasi-experimental design and analyzes 20 weeks of data comprising over 75 million trips to examine spill-over effects of an East Asian platform’s comprehensive personnel on-road insurance (PI) policy on a competitor platform. The research uncovers significant changes in labor allocation patterns by identifying multi-homing and dedicated drivers through license plate matches. A difference-in-difference analysis provides evidence of cross-platform spillovers of PI: multi-homing drivers allocated 16.4% more hours to food delivery and reduced ride-hailing hours by 10.69% on the competitor platform, while dedicated drivers reduced food-delivery hours by 34.6% but added 12.81% more ride-hailing hours. These shifts in hours corresponded to changes in earnings. To explore the mechanisms of such spill-over effects, the study observes multi-homing drivers’ labor allocation patterns on the implementing platform: Multi-homing drivers shifted toward food delivery, increasing hours by 17.3% and decreasing ride-hailing hours by 11.2% on the platform. The study further links such cross-platform shifts in drivers’ labor allocation by estimating job aggregation among multi-homing drivers and provides multiple robustness analyses to validate these effects. The study highlights the interconnectedness of gig economy stakeholders by empirically linking policy changes on one platform to cross-platform labor dynamics. Practical insights are provided on how the PI policy influenced platform utilization, driver behavior, and productivity, emphasizing that gig-economy platforms operate within a highly interdependent ecosystem rather than in isolation.
title_cn: EXPRESS: 为竞争对手注入动力：乘车共享行业人员道路保险实施的意外溢出效应
abstract_cn: 针对社会抗议活动，交通网络公司推出了激励计划，以提高司机的小时利用率并留住司机。尽管这些举措假设会增加司机的承诺，但其对竞争性零工经济平台劳动分配的影响仍未被探讨。本研究采用准实验设计，分析了为期20周的数据，涵盖超过7500万次出行，旨在考察东亚平台综合人员道路保险（PI）政策对竞争平台的溢出效应。研究发现，通过车牌匹配识别出多平台驾驶员和专属驾驶员后，劳动分配模式发生了显著变化。差异中的差异分析提供了PI跨平台溢出的证据：多平台驾驶员在竞争平台上将食物配送的小时增加了16.4%，而打车小时减少了10.69%；而专属驾驶员则将食物配送小时减少了34.6%，却增加了12.81%的打车小时。这些小时的变化与收入变化相对应。为了探讨溢出效应的机制，研究观察了实施平台上多平台驾驶员的劳动分配模式：多平台驾驶员向食物配送转移，增加了17.3%的小时，同时减少了11.2%的打车小时。研究进一步通过估算多平台驾驶员的工作聚合，链接了司机劳动分配在跨平台的转变，并提供多项稳健性分析以验证这些效果。研究强调了零工经济利益相关者之间的相互联系，通过实证将一个平台的政策变动与跨平台劳动动态联系在一起。提供了关于PI政策如何影响平台利用、司机行为和生产力的实用见解，强调了零工经济平台在一个高度相互依存的生态系统中运营，而非孤立存在。

title: EXPRESS: Why Full Refunds Prevail: A Product Fit Perspective
abstract: This paper studies how an online seller designs a menu of return contracts to manage consumer heterogeneity arising from product misfit risk. In the model, informed consumers know the product fits, whereas uninformed consumers face uncertainty about fit. We show that when only misfit risk exists, a single full-refund contract can implement the optimal menu. The return price insures consumers against misfit, and the selling price extracts full surplus. This finding aligns with the widespread adoption of lenient return policies and demonstrates that uniform contracts can emerge endogenously from incentive compatibility rather than as ad hoc assumptions. Introducing quality risk—an additional source of uncertainty in the valuation of fit products—fundamentally changes this outcome. The seller then shifts from full to partial refunds. Under high quality risk, the optimal menu becomes differentiated: a low-price, no-frills option for informed consumers and a high-price, insurance-heavy option for uninformed consumers. To induce self-selection, the seller distorts the return price upward for uninformed consumers to strengthen the insurance effect, trading off allocative efficiency for screening. Interestingly, when quality risk becomes extreme, refunds not only mitigate information rents but also enhance social surplus by preventing consumers from retaining low-quality products. Extensions incorporating misfit valuation, seller-side costs, and return hassle costs show that the uniform contract remains robust when only misfit risk is present, rationalizing diverse return policy practices in online markets.
title_cn: 全额退款为何占主导地位：产品匹配视角
abstract_cn: 本文研究了在线卖家如何设计退货合同菜单，以管理因产品不适合风险而产生的消费者异质性。在模型中，知情消费者了解产品的适配性，而不知情消费者则面临适配性的不确定性。我们表明，当仅存在不适合风险时，单一的全额退款合同可以实现最优菜单。退货价格为消费者提供了对不适合的保险，而销售价格则提取了全部剩余。这一发现与宽松退货政策的广泛采用相一致，并表明均匀合同可以从激励相容性中内生出现，而不是作为临时假设。引入质量风险——一种对适配产品估值的不确定性额外来源——根本改变了这一结果。此时，卖家从全额退款转向部分退款。在高质量风险下，最优菜单变得差异化：为知情消费者提供低价、无附加服务的选项，为不知情消费者提供高价、保险成分较重的选项。为了诱导自我选择，卖家提高了不知情消费者的退货价格，以增强保险效应，在分配效率与筛选之间进行权衡。有趣的是，当质量风险变得极端时，退款不仅减轻了信息租金，还通过防止消费者保留低质量产品来增强社会剩余。扩展研究包括不适合估值、卖方成本和退货麻烦成本，显示当仅存在不适合风险时，均匀合同依然稳健，从而合理化了在线市场中多样化的退货政策实践。

title: EXPRESS: The Online Election Campaign Planning Problem: Optimizing Election Campaign Strategies with Inaccurate Information
abstract: Effective management of election campaigns involves dynamic decision-making under uncertainty. Traditional approaches rely heavily on pre-planned strategies that often fail to adapt to real-time changes in voter sentiment and external factors. This paper introduces the Online Election Campaign Planning Problem (OECPP) to optimize the scheduling of campaign activities in the context of U.S. presidential elections. OECPP incorporates sequentially updated predictions that represent assessments of the impact of campaign activities over the course of the campaign. Since these predictions evolve in response to new information and their accuracy cannot be fully assessed without perfect information, we develop deterministic and randomized online algorithms for OECPP that can operate effectively under unreliable and evolving predictions. We evaluate the performance of our algorithms using the competitive ratio (CR), a metric particularly useful when probabilistic modeling is impractical. We begin by establishing a tight upper bound on the CR of the online algorithms for the OECPP under unreliable reward predictions. We then introduce a sequential setup-based CR metric to capture the value of reoptimization as new predictions arrive, and we design deterministic and randomized algorithms that are optimal under this metric. Using data from U.S. presidential elections, we show that randomized online algorithms can significantly outperform their deterministic counterparts in terms of empirical CR. We also find that the effectiveness of randomized algorithms is driven by two factors: the selection of prediction samples for generating activity scenarios and the randomization cut-off, which determines the scenarios to be randomized. The benefit of randomization is nonmonotonic, and the best empirical CR is achieved by selectively adding prediction samples to the randomization set.
title_cn: 在线选举活动规划问题：利用不准确信息优化选举活动策略
abstract_cn: 有效的选举活动管理涉及在不确定性下的动态决策。传统方法往往依赖于预先制定的策略，这些策略无法及时适应选民情绪和外部因素的实时变化。本文引入了在线选举活动规划问题（OECPP），旨在优化美国总统选举中的活动安排。OECPP包含顺序更新的预测，这些预测反映了对活动影响的评估。由于这些预测会根据新信息而变化且其准确性无法在没有完全信息的情况下完全评估，我们为OECPP开发了可在不可靠和不断变化的预测下有效运行的确定性和随机在线算法。我们使用竞争比（CR）作为评估算法性能的指标，这在概率建模不切实际时尤其有用。我们首先为OECPP的不可靠奖励预测下的在线算法建立了一个紧致的上界。接着，我们引入了一种基于序列设置的CR指标，以捕捉新预测到达时重新优化的价值，并设计了在该指标下优化的确定性和随机算法。利用美国总统选举的数据，我们展示了随机在线算法在经验CR方面显著优于其确定性版本。我们还发现，随机算法的有效性受到两个因素的驱动：用于生成活动场景的预测样本选择和随机化截止点，即决定需要随机化的场景。随机化的好处是非单调的，最佳的经验CR是通过选择性地将预测样本加入随机化集合来实现的。

title: EXPRESS: Customer Acquisition Through Intermediaries (vs. Brand) Shapes Lifetime Value: Evidence from the Hotel Industry
abstract: Third-party distribution channels or intermediaries have become ubiquitous across a wide range of industries, offering firms access to new prospects and an opportunity to expand their customer base. Although prior work has investigated the short-term aggregate demand implications of intermediaries, the long-term customer relationship perspective has remained unexplored. Using customer-level data from a large U.S. hotel brand, we show that customers acquired via travel intermediaries (such as online travel agents or OTAs) have persistently different behaviors on several dimensions that matter for long-term value. Compared to customers acquired through brand-owned (direct) channels, intermediary-acquired customers spend 4.1% less per stay and purchase 3.8% less frequently. Intermediary-acquired customers, while displaying stronger channel inertia and lower multichannel engagement, purchase across a wider variety of brands (multi-brand behavior). When we combine these behavioral estimates into a customer lifetime value (CLV) computation, we find that while intermediary-acquired customers have positive CLV, their CLV is 19.94% lower than customers acquired through brand-owned channels, revealing, for the first time, the long-term implications of such customer acquisition strategies. Through an optimal allocation model we show that, although the CLVs are lower for intermediaries, a CLV-maximizing firm typically invests in both channels: the optimal share allocated to intermediaries rising proportionally with the intermediary’s acquisition efficiency and accessible prospect pool, and falling when the hotel is operating at capacity. In sum, our results show that although using intermediaries may be a viable strategy for customer acquisition, the purchase behaviors of these customers are significantly and meaningfully different from customers acquired via brand-owned channels, thus urging managers to adopt a more nuanced ‘frenemies’ approach to building a channel portfolio.
title_cn: 通过中介（与品牌相比）进行客户获取的方式影响终身价值：来自酒店行业的证据
abstract_cn: 第三方分销渠道或中介在各行业中已变得无处不在，为企业提供了接触新客户和扩大客户基础的机会。尽管以往的研究探讨了中介对短期整体需求的影响，但从长期客户关系的视角出发的研究仍然缺乏。通过使用来自一家大型美国酒店品牌的顾客级数据，我们展示了通过旅行中介（如在线旅行代理商或OTA）获取的顾客在几个与长期价值相关的维度上表现出持续的不同行为。与通过品牌自有（直接）渠道获取的顾客相比，中介获取的顾客每次住宿的消费少了4.1%，且购买频率降低了3.8%。虽然中介获取的顾客表现出更强的渠道惯性和较低的多渠道参与度，但在多个品牌之间的购买行为（多品牌行为）更加广泛。当我们将这些行为估计结合到客户终身价值（CLV）的计算中时，我们发现，尽管中介获取的顾客的CLV为正，但其CLV比通过品牌自有渠道获取的顾客低19.94%，首次揭示了这类客户获取策略的长期影响。通过最优配置模型，我们表明，尽管中介的CLV较低，追求CLV最大化的企业通常会同时投资于这两种渠道：分配给中介的最优比例与中介的获取效率和可接触的潜在客户群成正比，而在酒店达到满负荷运营时则会下降。总之，我们的研究结果表明，尽管使用中介可能是一个可行的客户获取策略，但这些顾客的购买行为与通过品牌自有渠道获取的顾客显著且有意义地不同，因此呼吁管理者采取更细致的“好友兼敌”策略来构建渠道组合。

title: Please Arrive On Time: The Impact of Early and Delayed Delivery on Product Ratings
abstract: In digital marketplaces, product ratings play a critical role in shaping consumer demand and seller success, yet their relationship with logistical factors remains unexplored. This study investigates how deviations from promised delivery dates, whether early or delayed, influence product ratings. Using transaction-level data from a major e-commerce platform encompassing over 11M product purchases and 500K customers, we estimate the causal effect of deviating from the promised delivery time on both rating incidence and valence. To overcome the challenges of matching imposed by an unbalanced treatment and control distribution, we used a machine learning-based estimator, R-learner, to estimate the effects of interest. We find that both delayed and early deliveries increase customers’ likelihood of leaving a rating but reduce rating valence. Delayed deliveries lower rating valence by an average of 0.4, with some categories seeing a drop of up to 0.6. Early deliveries also reduce rating valence, with an average decrease of 0.2 and reductions of up to 0.5 depending on the product category. The negative effect of early delivery is consistent across all categories, except for food and beverages, where experienced customers show a small positive response. This is due to reduced uncertainty from reordering previously purchased products, a pattern that does not occur as often in other categories. We contribute to the service and logistics performance literature by establishing the causal link between delivery performance and product ratings by quantifying the direction and magnitude of these effects across various product categories and customer segments. We propose managerial implications for mitigating customer dissatisfaction arising from both early and delayed deliveries.
title_cn: 请准时到达：提前和延迟交付对产品评分的影响
abstract_cn: 在数字市场中，产品评级在塑造消费者需求和卖家成功方面发挥着关键作用，但其与物流因素之间的关系仍未得到探讨。本研究调查了提前或延迟交货日期的偏差如何影响产品评级。我们使用来自一个主要电子商务平台的交易级数据，涵盖超过1100万笔产品购买和50万名客户，估计偏离承诺交货时间对评级发生率和评级价值的因果影响。为了克服不平衡的处理和控制分布所带来的匹配挑战，我们使用了一种基于机器学习的估计器R-learner来估计感兴趣的效应。我们发现，无论是延迟交货还是提前交货，都增加了客户留下评级的可能性，但降低了评级的价值。延迟交货使评级价值平均降低0.4，在某些类别中降幅可达0.6。提前交货同样降低评级价值，平均减少0.2，具体减少幅度根据产品类别可达0.5。提前交货的负面影响在所有类别中均是一致的，唯独在食品和饮料类别中，经验丰富的客户表现出小幅的正面反应。这是因为重新订购之前购买的产品减少了不确定性，而这种模式在其他类别中并不常见。我们通过量化这些效应在不同产品类别和客户细分中的方向和幅度，建立了交付表现与产品评级之间的因果联系，从而为服务和物流绩效文献做出了贡献。我们提出了管理建议，以减轻因提前和延迟交货而引发的客户不满。

title: EXPRESS: Faith in Disaster Preparedness: Insights on the Influence of Religion on Humanitarian Volunteer Relief Operations
abstract: Religious beliefs have often served as a lens through which communities interpret and cope with disasters. Not surprisingly, many non-governmental organizations (NGOs) that support disaster relief have roots in religious traditions. The religious orientation of an NGO is a key concern as it can influence volunteer outcomes and operational performance. This is important because volunteers are an indispensable asset for NGOs, playing a pivotal role in the efficacy of humanitarian aid efforts. This study employs social capital and person-organization fit theories to examine how NGO religiousness influences social capital, volunteer behaviors, and operational performance. It also analyzes how NGO and volunteer religiousness “fit” affects these relationships. The hypotheses were tested using two scenario-based video experiments: Experiment 1, which collected data from 100 students in a laboratory setting, and Experiment 2, which involved 198 online volunteers. Results from Tobit and Poisson regressions indicate that increased NGO religiousness may diminish volunteer social capital, commitment, and operational performance. However, NGO and volunteer religiousness “fit” mitigates the adverse effects of NGO religiousness, enhancing volunteer behaviors. A large-scale survey of 503 respondents supports these findings and provides insights to guide future research into volunteer motivations. This study contributes to the Humanitarian Operations Management literature and informs the strategies of NGOs regarding religious alignments, volunteer recruitment and retention, and operational performance.
title_cn: 表达：对灾难准备的信仰：宗教对人道主义志愿救援行动影响的见解
abstract_cn: 宗教信仰常常作为一个透镜，帮助社区解释和应对灾难。因此，许多支持灾难救助的非政府组织（NGO）往往根植于宗教传统并不足为奇。NGO的宗教导向是一项关键关注点，因为它能够影响志愿者的表现和运营绩效。这一点至关重要，因为志愿者对NGO而言是不可或缺的资产，在人道主义援助效率中发挥着关键作用。本研究运用社会资本和人组织适配理论，探讨NGO的宗教性如何影响社会资本、志愿者行为和运营绩效。同时也分析了NGO与志愿者的宗教性“适配”如何影响这些关系。假设通过两个情景视频实验进行检验：实验1在实验室环境中收集了100名学生的数据，实验2则涉及198名在线志愿者。Tobit和Poisson回归的结果表明，NGO宗教性增加可能会降低志愿者的社会资本、承诺和运营绩效。然而，NGO与志愿者的宗教性“适配”减轻了NGO宗教性的负面影响，增强了志愿者的行为。一项对503名受访者的大规模调查支持了这些发现，并为未来有关志愿者动机的研究提供了洞见。本研究为人道主义运营管理文献作出了贡献，并为NGO在宗教对齐、志愿者招募与留存以及运营绩效方面制定策略提供了参考。

title: EXPRESS: VotingWait Times and Political Misinformation on Social Media
abstract: The direct impacts of long wait times in elections, such as lost wages for voters and suppressed turnout, are well-documented. Drawing upon the service operations literature, we hypothesize that such operational inefficiencies may have far-reaching consequences beyond the immediate voter experience, in particular, the spread of political misinformation. Using a novel dataset that combines granular measures of voter wait times from cellphone location data, social media content, and demographic information at the county level, we find evidence that longer wait times are associated with greater sharing of political fake news on Reddit in the aftermath of the 2016 U.S. presidential election. Importantly, this relationship exhibits significant heterogeneity based on the racial composition of counties, with more diverse counties experiencing greater increases in misinformation spread due to wait times. To shed light on the mechanisms underlying this link, we leverage individual-level survey data on voters’ polling place experiences and perceptions of electoral integrity. Our analysis reveals that experiencing long wait times erodes voters’ confidence in the integrity of the election process, particularly at the local level. These findings underscore the societal importance of efficient election operations management and highlight how they can have profound implications for the health of democracy. Our work introduces a new factor—the operational efficiency of election administration—into the study of political misinformation, thus opening up avenues for operations management research to contribute to a pressing social challenge.
title_cn: 投票等待时间与社交媒体上的政治虚假信息
abstract_cn: 选举中长时间等待的直接影响，如选民的工资损失和投票率降低，已有充分记录。基于服务运营文献，我们假设这种操作效率低下可能对选民体验之外产生深远的影响，尤其是政治虚假信息的传播。利用一个新颖的数据集，该数据集结合了通过手机定位数据获得的选民等待时间的详细测量、社交媒体内容以及县级的人口统计信息，我们发现，较长的等待时间与2016年美国总统选举后在Reddit上更大范围的政治假新闻分享存在关联。值得注意的是，这一关系在不同种族构成的县之间显示出显著的异质性，更具多样性的县在等待时间的影响下，假信息传播的增加更为明显。为了解这一联系背后的机制，我们利用关于选民投票地点体验和对选举诚信感知的个体级调查数据。我们的分析表明，经历长时间等待会削弱选民对选举过程诚信的信心，尤其是在地方层面。这些发现凸显了高效选举运营管理的社会重要性，并强调其对民主健康的深远影响。我们的研究将选举管理的操作效率这一新因素引入了政治虚假信息研究，从而为运营管理研究在应对这一紧迫社会挑战中的贡献开辟了新途径。

title: EXPRESS: The Impact of Ecosystem Shocks on the Operational Performance of Worker-heavy Systems in the Agricultural Domain: The Role of Cognitive Load
abstract: Temporary economic shocks in local employment ecosystems – events that create temporary alternate employment opportunities for workers – tend to create operational challenges for firms. We investigate two dimensions of these challenges faced by firms that engage workers performing low-skilled tasks in the agricultural industry. We seek to understand (i) which workers leave during these shocks, and (ii) whether workers who choose to stay exhibit any change in their productivity. Both of these answers ultimately determine the resilience of firms during the shocks. We present data from a natural experiment in an agricultural company. The data is for two farms, where workers performed the same task but used two different protocols that differ in cognitive load – the mental effort required to manage and coordinate tasks – at two levels: Higher and Lower. Our findings indicate that, at an aggregate level, shocks in the labor ecosystem increase the strain on farming companies by increasing worker turnover rates. However, during the shock period, the workers who remained with the focal firm demonstrated increased productivity. In the subsequent post hoc analysis, we examine whether worker performance before a shock (as measured by pre-shock productivity) impacts turnover and productivity during shock periods. We find that workers following the lower cognitive load protocol were more likely to leave during the shock if their productivity was low. In contrast, workers following the higher cognitive load protocol were equally likely to leave at all productivity levels. Similarly, for the lower cognitive load protocol, the productivity change during shock was proportional to a worker’s original productivity. In contrast, workers following the higher cognitive load protocol increased their productivity by the same amount across all levels of pre-shock productivity. As such, these findings highlight the differential impacts of cognitive engagement and workload on worker retention and productivity in manufacturing and production settings within a low-skill context. Our findings suggest that work design strategies, especially those that keep workers cognitively engaged at work are crucial for mitigating the negative effects of labor shocks. By recognizing the role of cognitive load in low-skill work, managers can help create more stable teams and more predictable productivity levels, thereby increasing organizational resilience in a volatile labor market.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 生态系统冲击对农业领域劳动密集型系统运营绩效的影响：认知负荷的作用
abstract_cn: 地方就业生态系统中的临时经济冲击——即为工人创造临时替代就业机会的事件——往往给企业带来运营挑战。我们研究了农业行业中从事低技能任务的工人所面临的这两种挑战维度。我们旨在了解（i）在这些冲击期间，哪些工人选择离开，以及（ii）选择留下的工人是否在生产力上表现出任何变化。这两个答案最终决定了企业在冲击期间的韧性。我们展示了一家农业公司的自然实验数据。数据来自两个农场，工人们执行相同的任务，但使用了两种不同的协议，这两种协议在认知负荷——管理和协调任务所需的心理努力——上有所不同，分为高和低两个级别。我们的研究结果表明，从整体上看，劳动生态系统中的冲击通过增加工人流动率加大了农业公司的压力。然而，在冲击期间，留在核心公司的工人表现出了生产力的提升。在随后的事后分析中，我们考察了冲击前工人的表现（以冲击前的生产力衡量）是否会影响冲击期间的流动率和生产力。我们发现，遵循低认知负荷协议的工人在冲击期间如果生产力较低，更可能选择离开。相反，遵循高认知负荷协议的工人在所有生产力水平下离开的可能性相同。同样，对于低认知负荷协议，冲击期间的生产力变化与工人原始的生产力成正比。相比之下，遵循高认知负荷协议的工人在所有冲击前生产力水平下的生产力提升幅度相同。因此，这些发现突显了认知参与和工作负荷在低技能环境中的工人留任和生产力方面的差异性影响。我们的研究结果表明，工作设计策略，特别是那些能够保持工人在工作中认知参与的策略，对于减轻劳动冲击的负面影响至关重要。通过认识到认知负荷在低技能工作中的作用，管理者可以帮助创造更稳定的团队和更可预测的生产力水平，从而提高在动荡劳动市场中的组织韧性。

title: Information Design in Consumer-to-Consumer (C2C) Marketplaces: The Roles of Anonymity and Product Quality Uncertainty
abstract: Recently, there has been a notable increase in the prevalence of consumer-to-consumer (C2C) online marketplaces offering integration with social networks. Platforms such as eBay, Facebook Marketplace, Zhuanzhuan, and Poshmark have led such initiatives. In such marketplaces, the structure of social relationships revealed to platform participants can influence the choice of transacting partners as well as the terms of transactions. We study the role of different levels of information design policies on offers and acceptance decisions in a social commerce marketplace setting. We propose a novel information design policy, for C2C marketplaces, called partial anonymity in which the transacting parties are provided with limited social information about each other. Using a theoretical model and experimental data, we show that a partial-anonymity information design allows sellers to be more strategic than a social commerce marketplace with no anonymity. Further, with a partial-anonymity design, the likelihood of a successful transaction is higher than in a fully anonymous marketplace. Our results are robust to different product categories and uncertainty in product quality.
title_cn: 消费者对消费者（C2C）市场中的信息设计：匿名性和产品质量不确定性的作用
abstract_cn: 近年来，消费者对消费者（C2C）在线市场的普及率显著上升，这些市场提供与社交网络的整合。eBay、Facebook Marketplace、转转和Poshmark等平台在这方面走在了前列。在这些市场中，平台参与者所揭示的社交关系结构可以影响交易伙伴的选择以及交易条款。我们研究了不同信息设计政策在社交商务市场环境中对报价和接受决策的作用。我们提出了一种新颖的信息设计政策，称为部分匿名性，适用于C2C市场，其中交易双方仅获得有限的社交信息。通过理论模型和实验数据，我们表明，部分匿名性的信息设计使得卖家在战略上比没有匿名性的社交商务市场更具优势。此外，在部分匿名性设计下，成功交易的可能性高于完全匿名的市场。我们的结果在不同产品类别和产品质量不确定性下依然稳健。

title: The Role of Opinion Leaders in Crowd Wisdom: An Information Cascade Perspective
abstract: Specialized investment platforms significantly influence financial service operations by enhancing collective intelligence and uncovering trading opportunities. However, the large volume of data, particularly the prevalence of noise, hinders effective decision-making. Opinion leaders constitute a distinct and influential group of users on these platforms, and the question of whether their presence can help financial institutions make better decisions remains open. To address this key operational question, we focus on two indicators in investment platforms: investor disagreement and prediction accuracy. Our findings reveal that the presence of opinion leaders leads to reduced investor disagreement and increased accuracy in predicting future stock returns. This effect is more pronounced when opinion leaders participate earlier in a discussion or contribute posts that are more innovative, longer, or express vivid opinions. Our subsequent experiment further reveals the psychological and cognitive mechanisms behind these findings: the presence of opinion leaders enhances investors’ cognitive abilities by providing them with more information and boosts their confidence in the information they acquire. These results contribute to information cascade theory by demonstrating how varied communication patterns result in different qualities of crowd decision-making. Additionally, we contribute to the operations management literature by highlighting the crucial role of opinion leaders in enhancing both financial services and social media operations. We suggest that financial institutions develop trading strategies based on opinion leaders’ posts and that platforms tailor features to leverage opinion leaders’ participation.
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 意见领袖在群体智慧中的角色：信息级联视角
abstract_cn: 专业投资平台显著影响金融服务的运作，通过增强集体智能和发掘交易机会。然而，大量的数据尤其是噪声的普遍存在，阻碍了有效的决策。意见领袖构成了这些平台上一个独特且有影响力的用户群体，而他们的存在是否能帮助金融机构做出更好的决策这一问题依然开放。为了解决这个关键的运营问题，我们重点关注投资平台的两个指标：投资者分歧和预测准确性。我们的研究结果显示，意见领袖的存在能够减少投资者之间的分歧并提高未来股票回报的预测准确性。当意见领袖在讨论中较早参与或发表更具创新性、更长或表达生动观点的帖子时，这种效果更为显著。我们后续的实验进一步揭示了这些发现背后的心理和认知机制：意见领袖的存在通过提供更多信息提升了投资者的认知能力，并增强了他们对获取信息的信心。这些结果为信息级联理论作出贡献，展示了多样化的沟通模式如何导致不同质量的集体决策。此外，我们也为运营管理文献贡献了新的视角，强调了意见领袖在提升金融服务和社交媒体运营中的关键作用。我们建议金融机构基于意见领袖的帖子制定交易策略，并且平台应调整功能以利用意见领袖的参与。

title: EXPRESS: Bridging the Divide? The Differential Impact of Health Information Exchange (HIE) on Healthcare Professionals’ Productivity in Urban and Rural Settings
abstract: Health information exchanges (HIEs) facilitate the secure, electronic sharing of patient medical information/records across providers, enabling healthcare professionals to access timely, comprehensive data and thereby improve care coordination and quality. Yet, despite these expected benefits, empirical evidence shows that healthcare professionals often spend substantial time and effort interacting with HIE platforms without discernible productivity gains. Moreover, although HIEs are promoted as a potential solution for addressing geospatial disparities in healthcare, their impact on healthcare professionals’ productivity across urban and rural hospitals remains unclear. Using data envelopment analysis (DEA) to construct a measure of healthcare professionals’ productivity and applying the difference-in-differences (DiD) approach, we investigate the impact of HIE adoption on healthcare professionals’ productivity in urban and rural hospitals in the United States (U.S.). Our findings show that hospitals that have adopted HIE experience a significant increase in healthcare professionals’ productivity. However, this effect is more pronounced in urban hospitals than in rural hospitals. We attribute this result to urban healthcare professionals having workflows with greater information intensity and higher technology capabilities than healthcare professionals in rural hospitals. Furthermore, our study reveals that HIE adoption improves communication and the quality of clinical decision-making among urban healthcare professionals, but not among those in rural hospitals. We also find that the productivity gains from HIE adoption are greater for nurses than for physicians. We discuss the theoretical and practical implications of these findings.
title_cn: EXPRESS：弥合差距？健康信息交换（HIE）对城市和农村环境中医疗专业人员生产力的差异影响
abstract_cn: 健康信息交换（HIE）促进了患者医疗信息/记录在不同提供者之间的安全电子共享，使医疗专业人员能够及时获取全面的数据，从而改善护理协调和质量。然而，尽管预期有这些好处，实证证据表明，医疗专业人员在与HIE平台互动时往往花费大量时间和精力，却没有明显的生产力提升。此外，尽管HIE被宣传为解决医疗服务地理差异的潜在解决方案，但其对城市和农村医院医疗专业人员生产力的影响仍不明确。我们使用数据包络分析（DEA）构建医疗专业人员生产力的衡量标准，并应用差异中的差异（DiD）方法，研究HIE采用对美国（U.S.）城市和农村医院医疗专业人员生产力的影响。我们的研究结果显示，采用HIE的医院在医疗专业人员的生产力上有显著提高。然而，这一效果在城市医院中比在农村医院中更为明显。我们将这一结果归因于城市医疗专业人员的工作流程具有更高的信息密集度和更强的技术能力。此外，我们的研究还揭示，HIE的采用改善了城市医疗专业人员之间的沟通和临床决策质量，但对农村医院的医疗专业人员则没有这种改善。我们还发现，HIE采用带来的生产力提升对护士的影响大于对医生的影响。我们讨论了这些发现的理论和实践意义。

title: EXPRESS: Quality Verification in the Presence of Review Bias
abstract: Over time, firms across industries have adopted quality verification as a costly yet credible tool to signal product excellence and convey reliable information to consumers. With the prosperity of E-commerce, consumers increasingly rely on online reviews—an accessible but inherently biased source of product information—to guide their purchase decisions. In practice, companies now frequently combine quality verification with consumer reviews to influence the perception of product quality. This study examines how firms can strategically determine their optimal quality verification approach to mitigate the negative effects of review bias, and how the timing of verification affects outcomes. We consider two quality verification formats: pre-release verification, conducted before reviews are available, and responsive verification, conducted after reviews are observed. Pre-release verification helps shape early consumers’ expectations and improves late consumers’ interpretation of biased reviews. As the magnitude of review bias increases, firms are more likely to proactively adopt pre-release verification, although this leads to a decline in expected profits due to higher upfront costs. By contrast, responsive verification allows firms to selectively react to negatively biased reviews, preserving the upside potential of favorable reviews. When review volatility is high, this reactive strategy can lead to higher profits. Our results show that each verification format can enhance firm profitability under specific conditions, depending on the cost of verification and the degree of review bias. These findings offer actionable insights into how firms can manage information flows and strategically balance third-party verification with user-generated content in dynamic market environments.
title_cn: EXPRESS：在评审偏见存在下的质量验证
abstract_cn: 随着时间的推移，各行业的企业已将质量验证作为一种昂贵但可信的工具，以向消费者传递产品卓越性和可靠的信息。随着电子商务的繁荣，消费者越来越依赖在线评论——这种易得但本质上存在偏见的产品信息源——来指导他们的购买决策。在实际操作中，企业现在经常将质量验证与消费者评论相结合，以影响产品质量的感知。本研究探讨了企业如何战略性地确定其最佳质量验证方法，以减轻评论偏见的负面影响，以及验证时机如何影响结果。我们考虑了两种质量验证形式：发布前验证（在评论可用之前进行）和响应性验证（在观察到评论之后进行）。发布前验证有助于塑造早期消费者的期望，并改善后期消费者对偏见评论的解读。随着评论偏见程度的加大，企业更有可能主动采用发布前验证，尽管这会因较高的前期成本导致预期利润下降。相反，响应性验证使企业能够选择性地对负偏见评论作出反应，从而保留有利评论的潜在收益。当评论波动性较高时，这种反应性策略可以带来更高的利润。我们的研究结果表明，在特定条件下，每种验证形式都能增强企业的盈利能力，这取决于验证的成本和评论偏见的程度。这些发现为企业如何管理信息流以及在动态市场环境中战略性地平衡第三方验证与用户生成内容提供了切实可行的见解。

title: Internal Proactive Learning or External Technology Acquisition: ICT-Enabled Promotion in Assembly Operations
abstract: Recently, leading manufacturers have started adopting information and communication technologies (ICTs) to assist operators in capturing assembly operational errors. These manufacturers choose to develop internal ICTs and decide whether to implement proactive experiential learning to continuously improve the rate of recognizing assembly operational errors, or acquire external ICTs from third-party technology providers that increase the rate of recognizing assembly operational errors but fail to achieve experiential learning. These two ICT adoption models may cause different effects on assembly operations, which subsequently affects manufacturers’ profitability. However, there is a limited body of relevant research that focuses on this topic. Hence, our study aims to bridge this gap by examining a manufacturer’s decisions for the ICT adoption, internal experiential learning, and subsequent pricing strategy. First, we reveal that it is sometimes beneficial for the manufacturer to forgo ICTs rather than adopt ICTs. This is because the lower recognition capability leads to a weaker scale effect, reducing the positive effect of ICTs on operational error losses. Next, we find that even if the internal learning effect is stronger, the manufacturer may still choose to acquire external ICTs. Moreover, as the operational error loss increases, the manufacturer or third-party technology provider may sometimes invest less in ICTs. Further, our results show that the ICT adoption benefits consumer surplus and social welfare, and external ICTs sometimes generate more social welfare but less consumer surplus than internal ICTs. Additionally, we find that the ICT adoption changes the relationship between the assembly operational accuracy and product demand. Following the ICT adoption, our study offers invaluable insights to managers on how ICTs can yield better assembly operational outcomes.
title_cn: 内部主动学习还是外部技术获取：信息通信技术驱动的装配操作提升
abstract_cn: 最近，主要制造商开始采用信息与通信技术（ICT）来帮助操作员捕捉装配过程中的操作错误。这些制造商选择开发内部ICT，并决定是实施主动的经验学习，以持续提高识别装配操作错误的能力，还是从第三方技术提供商那里获取外部ICT，以提高识别装配操作错误的能力，但未能实现经验学习。这两种ICT采纳模型可能对装配操作产生不同的影响，从而影响制造商的盈利能力。然而，相关研究相对较少，因此我们的研究旨在填补这一空白，考察制造商在ICT采纳、内部经验学习及后续定价策略方面的决策。首先，我们揭示了制造商有时放弃ICT而不是采用ICT是有益的。这是因为较低的识别能力会导致较弱的规模效应，从而减少ICT对操作错误损失的积极影响。接着，我们发现即使内部学习效应较强，制造商仍可能选择获取外部ICT。此外，随着操作错误损失的增加，制造商或第三方技术提供商有时可能会减少对ICT的投资。进一步，我们的结果表明，ICT采纳有利于消费者剩余和社会福利，并且外部ICT有时能够产生比内部ICT更多的社会福利但较少的消费者剩余。此外，我们发现ICT采纳改变了装配操作准确性与产品需求之间的关系。在ICT采纳后，我们的研究为管理者提供了关于ICT如何带来更好的装配操作成果的宝贵见解。

title: The Impacts of Electronic Health Record Note Usage by Physicians on Efficiency and Quality of Care: An Analysis Using EHR Audit Logs
abstract: Electronic health record (EHR) clinical notes constitute a core documentation subsystem through which physicians externalize clinical assessments and care plans in narrative form. Yet clinical documentation is time intensive and is frequently viewed as an administrative burden, leaving limited evidence on whether and how physician note usage improves inpatient operational efficiency and downstream quality outcomes. This study examines the impact of lead physician note activity on discharge efficiency and post discharge outcomes using granular EHR audit logs from a major U.S. teaching hospital. Leveraging more than 6.8 million audit log access events across 30 services, we model discharge as a time to event outcome at an hourly resolution and address endogeneity in documentation intensity using an instrumental variable strategy. We find that increased lead physician note activity predicts faster discharge. Specifically, a 1% increase in lead physician note activity measured 12 h earlier is associated with approximately a 0.075% decrease in expected remaining time to discharge, and the result is directionally consistent under alternative lag specifications. We further test an operational mechanism grounded in knowledge transfer and care team coordination. Higher lead physician note activity is followed by greater near-term nurse information access, operationalized as nurse non-note chart activity within a short response window after physician documentation, and this timely information access is associated with shorter time to discharge in the mediated survival specification. In an additional analysis, we model time to readmission within 30 days using a time to event framework and find that greater lead physician documentation during the index stay is associated with a longer expected time to readmission, providing complementary evidence that documentation practices are linked to downstream outcomes. Collectively, the results advance healthcare operations and information systems research by identifying physician note activity as an operationally consequential form of clinical work and by clarifying a coordination mechanism through timely care team information access in the EHR. This study contributes to healthcare operations management literature and practical implications include optimizing EHR note utilization, implementing tailored training programs, and investing in user-friendly EHR infrastructure to balance efficiency and quality of care improvements and time constraints.
title_cn: 电子健康记录笔记使用对医生效率和护理质量的影响：基于电子健康记录审计日志的分析
abstract_cn: 电子健康记录（EHR）中的临床笔记构成了一个核心文档子系统，医生通过该系统以叙述形式外化临床评估和护理计划。然而，临床文档的撰写非常耗时，常常被视为行政负担，这导致关于医生笔记的使用是否以及如何改善住院患者的操作效率和下游质量结果的证据有限。本研究利用来自美国一家主要教学医院的详细EHR审计日志，考察了主治医生笔记活动对出院效率和出院后结果的影响。我们利用超过680万条跨越30个科室的审计日志访问事件，将出院建模为以小时为分辨率的事件发生时间，并使用工具变量策略解决文档强度的内生性问题。研究发现，主治医生笔记活动的增加可以预测更快的出院。具体而言，在早期12小时内主治医生笔记活动增加1%与预计剩余出院时间约0.075%的减少相关，且在不同的滞后规格下结果一致。我们进一步测试一个以知识转移和护理团队协调为基础的操作机制。主治医生笔记活动的增加后，护士的信息访问也会随之增加，具体表现为在医生文档后的短时间内护士非笔记表格活动的增加，而这种及时的信息访问与出院时间的缩短在中介生存模型中存在关联。在进一步分析中，我们使用事件发生时间框架对30天内再入院的时间进行建模，发现住院期间更多的主治医生文档与更长的再入院预计时间相关，这为文档实践与下游结果之间的联系提供了补充证据。综合来看，这些结果通过识别医生笔记活动作为一种在操作上具有重要意义的临床工作形式，推动了医疗操作和信息系统研究，并阐明了通过及时的护理团队信息访问在EHR中的协调机制。本研究为医疗运营管理文献作出贡献，实际意义包括优化EHR笔记的利用，实施量身定制的培训方案，以及投资于用户友好的EHR基础设施，以平衡效率与护理质量改善及时间限制之间的关系。

title: Predictive Hotspot Mapping for Data-Driven Crime Prediction
abstract: Predictive hotspot mapping is an important problem in crime prediction and control. An accurate hotspot mapping helps in appropriately targeting the available resources to manage crime in cities. With an aim to make data-driven decisions and automate policing and patrolling operations, police departments across the world are moving toward predictive approaches relying on historical data. In this paper, we create a nonparametric model using a spatiotemporal kernel density formulation for the purpose of crime prediction based on historical data. The proposed approach is also able to incorporate expert inputs coming from humans through alternate sources. The approach has been extensively evaluated in a real-world setting by collaborating with the Delhi police department to make crime predictions that would help in effective assignment of patrol vehicles to control street crime. The results obtained in the paper are promising and can be easily applied in other settings. We release the algorithm and the dataset (masked) used in our study to support future research that will be useful in achieving further improvements.
title_cn: 基于数据驱动的犯罪预测的预测热点地图绘制
abstract_cn: 预测热点映射是犯罪预测与控制中的一个重要问题。准确的热点映射有助于合理配置可用资源以管理城市中的犯罪活动。为了做出基于数据的决策并自动化执法与巡逻操作，世界各地的警察部门正朝着依赖历史数据的预测方法迈进。本文基于历史数据创建了一个非参数模型，采用时空核密度公式用于犯罪预测。所提出的方法还能够通过其他来源整合来自专家的输入。该方法已在与德里警察部门合作的实际环境中进行了广泛评估，以便进行犯罪预测，从而有效分配巡逻车辆以控制街头犯罪。论文中获得的结果令人鼓舞，并且可以轻松应用于其他环境。我们发布了本研究中使用的算法和数据集（已进行掩码处理），以支持未来的研究，从而实现进一步的改善。

title: Getting to the Green: Should a Profit-Maximizing Firm Buy Carbon Offsets or Invite Consumers to Buy Them?
abstract: Many firms, such as American Airlines, Patagonia, Google, and Apple, have publicly stated their goal of becoming carbon neutral at some point in the future. These firms are pursuing multiple emissions reduction initiatives within their value chains, such as the use of renewable energy, zero-emissions vehicles, and low-carbon materials and supplies. But despite these efforts, some residual emissions cannot be further reduced, necessitating the purchase of carbon offsets, which increase firms’ costs. While environmentally conscious consumers may be willing to pay a higher price for a low-emissions product or service, a significant segment of climate change–disengaged consumers is not willing to do so, as demonstrated by multiple studies. In this article, we identify when it is optimal for a profit-maximizing firm to offer its consumers carbon-reduction offsets for purchase with the product, in addition to potentially purchasing offsets at the firm level. Through a stylized analytical model, we show that it is not optimal for firms to both buy offsets at the firm level and offer them to consumers for purchase at the same time. Rather, when the offset cost is low enough, the firm buys enough offsets to compensate for all of its emissions at the firm level, resulting in a higher overall product price; when the offset cost is in the middle range, the firm offers offsets to consumers for purchase at an offset price lower than offset cost, ensuring that green consumers buy offsets; and when the offset cost is high, offsets cannot be optimally used in any way. The thresholds depend on the green-segment size and disutility from emissions (at the consumer-consumption and firm levels), and on the product’s own carbon footprint. Providing offsets for purchase to consumers allows consumers to self-select into their preferred product/price bundle, thus providing the firm with a market-segmentation and price-discrimination mechanism that increases profits and reduces the firm’s carbon footprint.
title_cn: 走向绿色：一家追求利润最大化的公司应该购买碳抵消还是邀请消费者购买碳抵消？
abstract_cn: 许多公司，如美国航空、巴塔哥尼亚、谷歌和苹果，已公开表示将在未来某个时候实现碳中和。这些公司正在其价值链内推动多项减排举措，例如使用可再生能源、零排放车辆以及低碳材料和供应。但尽管有这些努力，仍然存在一些无法进一步减少的残余排放，这就需要购买碳抵消，这会增加公司的成本。虽然环保意识较强的消费者可能愿意为低排放产品或服务支付更高的价格，但大量对气候变化漠不关心的消费者并不愿意这样做，这一点在多项研究中都有所体现。在本文中，我们识别出在何种情况下，利润最大化的公司向消费者提供与产品捆绑销售的碳减排抵消是最优的，此外公司还可能在自身层面购买碳抵消。通过简化的分析模型，我们表明，公司同时在自身层面购买抵消和向消费者提供抵消购买的方式并不最优。相反，当抵消成本足够低时，公司会购买足够的抵消以补偿其所有的排放，并导致整体产品价格提高；当抵消成本处于中间范围时，公司会以低于抵消成本的价格向消费者提供抵消，以确保环保消费者购买抵消；而当抵消成本较高时，抵消在任何形式上的使用都不是最优的。这些阈值取决于绿色消费群体的规模、排放的不适感（在消费者消费和公司层面）及产品自身的碳足迹。向消费者提供抵消的购买选项使消费者能够根据自己的偏好选择产品/价格组合，从而为公司提供了一种市场细分和价格歧视机制，这不仅增加了利润，还减少了公司的碳足迹。

title: Raise the Expectation Bar and Lower the Tolerance? Effects of Being Listed in a Restaurant Guide on Customers’ Online Rating Behavior
abstract: Creating curated guides or lists (e.g., Top 100 Places to Eat) is a common operational strategy employed by platforms as part of their reputation systems to assist customers in decision-making. Prior research has largely highlighted the effects of such guides on customer word-of-mouth (WOM) volume and valence. Moving beyond these aggregate WOM metrics, we extend this stream to examine how being listed in a guide (BLG) influences customers’ likelihood of providing ratings and rating composition across valence types (compliments, complaints, and neutral ratings), drawing on the zone of tolerance framework. Using large-scale empirical data, we find that BLG increases customers’ likelihood of rating but reduces overall valence, with a higher proportion of complaints and neutral ratings and a lower proportion of compliments. The effect is particularly pronounced among merchants with additional high-quality signals (e.g., higher prices, greater popularity, and superior prior ratings). Evidence from both observational data and a randomized experiment further reveals the underlying mechanisms, showing that BLG increases customer involvement and raises desired expectations more dramatically than adequate ones. These triangulated findings contribute to the literature by providing in-depth insights into how and why BLG affects customer rating behaviors and thus, merchants’ WOM. Our findings underscore the importance of strategic operations management for platforms when designing and managing their reputation systems, with significant implications for technology management.
title_cn: 提高期望标准与降低容忍度？餐厅被列入指南对顾客在线评分行为的影响
abstract_cn: 创建策划指南或列表（例如，最佳100个用餐地点）是平台作为其声誉体系的一种常见运营策略，旨在帮助客户进行决策。先前的研究主要强调了此类指南对客户口碑（WOM）数量和质量的影响。在超越这些总体口碑指标的基础上，我们扩展了这一研究领域，考察了被列入指南（BLG）如何影响客户提供评分的可能性以及评分在不同情感类型（赞美、抱怨和中性评分）中的构成，借助容忍区框架。通过大规模实证数据，我们发现BLG增加了客户评分的可能性，但降低了整体评价情感，出现了更高比例的抱怨和中性评分，而赞美的比例则较低。这一效果在拥有额外高质量信号的商户中尤为明显（例如，价格更高、人气更旺以及之前评分更优）。观察数据和随机实验的证据进一步揭示了其潜在机制，表明BLG显著提高了客户的参与度，并使期望值的上升显著高于充分的期望。这些三角验证的研究结果为文献贡献了深入的见解，解释了BLG如何以及为什么影响客户评分行为，因此也影响了商户的口碑。我们的研究结果凸显了平台在设计和管理其声誉体系时战略运营管理的重要性，对技术管理具有重要的启示。

title: Effects of Peer Voting and Followers on User Contribution to Online Knowledge Sharing Platforms: Evidence From a Field Experiment
abstract: Online knowledge-sharing platforms such as Quora and Zhihu (a leading knowledge-sharing platform in China) often use both peer voting and followers to encourage user knowledge contributions. However, these platforms diverge in whether they highlight followers, upvotes, or both as reputation symbols. To better understand the consequences of these platform design choices, we conduct a field experiment with 1,696 focal users on Zhihu where we exogenously increase upvotes or/and followers for treated users over a 53-day intervention period. We monitor focal users’ activities for 303 days, covering both pre- and post-intervention periods. We further use a large language model to gauge the quality of 12,998 answers contributed by these users during this time. We find that increasing upvotes significantly boosts users’ answer contributions (in volume, total length, and quality), while increasing followers has mostly no overall effect on contributions. Additionally, increasing upvotes can encourage contribution for up to 100 days, particularly among lower-reputation (i.e., with fewer upvotes or followers), less active, female users, and those answering soft topic questions. In contrast, increasing followers only reduces contribution volume (not length or quality) for higher-reputation, more active, and male users. Moreover, while peer voting primarily only affects answer contributions, the follower treatment leads to negative spillovers, reducing users’ upvoting on fellow users’ answers, following fellow users, or purchasing Zhihu Lives hosted by fellow users. Our research suggests the possibility that users on knowledge-sharing platforms may associate peer voting with contributions, treating it as peer recognition that offers intrinsic motivation. In contrast, users may interpret additional followers as a symbol of status enhancement, which could, in some cases, dampen their motivation to contribute. Overall, our study suggests that platforms aiming to foster active, high-quality contributions should highlight upvotes rather than followers as a reputation symbol. To our knowledge, this study is among the first field experiments to identify and compare the causal effects of peer voting and followers on user contribution to knowledge-sharing platforms.
title_cn: 同侪投票和关注者对用户在在线知识共享平台上的贡献影响：来自一项实地实验的证据
abstract_cn: 在线知识共享平台如Quora和知乎（中国领先的知识共享平台）常常利用同行投票和关注者来鼓励用户贡献知识。然而，这些平台在是否突出关注者、点赞数或两者兼顾作为声誉标志方面存在差异。为了更好地理解这些平台设计选择的后果，我们在知乎上进行了为期53天的干预实验，涉及1,696名目标用户，并外生增加了处理用户的点赞数和/或关注者数。我们监控了目标用户的活动，持续了303天，涵盖了干预前和干预后两个阶段。此外，我们还使用了大型语言模型来评估这些用户在此期间贡献的12,998个回答的质量。我们发现，增加点赞数显著提升了用户的回答贡献（包括数量、总字数和质量），而增加关注者对贡献几乎没有整体影响。此外，增加点赞数可以持续鼓励贡献长达100天，尤其是在低声誉（即点赞数或关注者较少）、较少活跃、女性用户以及回答软话题问题的用户中。相比之下，增加关注者只会减少高声誉、更活跃和男性用户的贡献量（但不影响字数或质量）。此外，虽然同行投票主要影响回答贡献，但关注者的处理却导致了负面溢出效应，减少了用户对同伴用户回答的点赞、对同伴用户的关注或购买同伴用户主持的知乎直播。我们的研究表明，知识共享平台上的用户可能将同行投票与贡献联系在一起，将其视为提供内在动机的同行认可。相反，用户可能将额外的关注者视为地位提升的象征，这在某些情况下可能削弱他们的贡献动机。总体而言，我们的研究建议，旨在促进活跃、高质量贡献的平台应更强调点赞数而非关注者作为声誉标志。据我们所知，本研究是在现场实验中首次识别并比较同行投票和关注者对用户贡献于知识共享平台的因果影响。

title: Pricing Limited Capacity Under Consumer Deliberation
abstract: The pricing of limited capacity is a pivotal issue in many business contexts such as event ticket sales and online flash sales. Prior studies overlook consumer deliberation behavior in the presence of supply limits, leading to ineffective pricing decisions. This motivates investigation of consumer deliberation behavior under supply limits, and the capacity-constrained firm’s pricing and operational strategies. We first show that severe supply limits inhibit consumers’ costly deliberation, while moderate supply limits enhance consumer deliberation as the availability enhancement effect of deliberation reaches its highest potency. Accordingly, the firm with intermediate capacity tends to adopt a normal pricing strategy, that is, pricing as in the market of informed consumers. However, when the capacity is relatively low (sufficiently high), the firm can charge a relatively high (low) price to induce (deter) consumer deliberation, that is, transgressive (regressive) pricing; when the capacity is sufficiently low, the firm should adopt a prior value pricing strategy because consumers never deliberate. Second, on the supply side, it is not always necessary to fully utilize the limited capacity in supplying products, and for firms with high capacity, a low-quality strategy may be preferable even if quality improvement is costless. Finally, extensions to imperfect learning and heterogeneous deliberation costs show the robustness of our baseline model and offer new insights. Interestingly, the presence of demand uncertainty may benefit firms. Our study sheds light on the pricing of limited capacity and elucidates several strategic decisions when considering consumer deliberation behavior.
title_cn: 在消费者思考下的有限容量定价
abstract_cn: 有限容量定价是许多商业环境中的关键问题，例如活动门票销售和在线闪购。已有研究忽视了在供给限制下消费者的深思行为，导致定价决策不有效。这促使我们对供给限制下的消费者深思行为进行调查，以及容量受限公司的定价和运营策略。我们首先表明，严重的供应限制抑制了消费者的高成本深思，而适度的供应限制则增强了消费者的深思，因为深思的可用性增强效应达到了其最高效力。因此，具有中等容量的公司倾向于采用正常定价策略，即在知情消费者市场中的定价。然而，当容量相对较低（或相对较高）时，公司可以收取相对高（低）的价格以引导（抑制）消费者深思，即采用过度定价（回归定价）；当容量低到一定程度时，公司应采用先前价值定价策略，因为消费者根本不会深思。其次，在供给方面，并不总是需要充分利用有限容量来供应产品，对于高容量的公司，即使质量改善没有成本，低质量策略可能更可取。最后，对不完善学习和异质深思成本的扩展显示了我们基线模型的稳健性，并提供了新的见解。有趣的是，需求不确定性的存在可能对公司有利。我们的研究阐明了有限容量的定价问题，并在考虑消费者深思行为时阐释了若干战略决策。

title: Substitution or Emergency Order? Averting O-Negative Blood Shortages
abstract: Blood type substitution is an effective policy for improving the blood supply chain resilience in responding to shortages at hospitals. However, while compatibility of certain blood types provides an opportunity to better manage volatility in supply (donation) and demand (transfusion), in practice, it remains challenging to decide whether to use a compatible blood unit from the on-hand inventory (substitution) or to place an urgent or emergency order. Available evidence indicates that, in Australia, current practices for deciding on blood type substitution over emergency orders result in a significant imbalance in supply and demand for the most widely compatible units: O-negative blood units. This challenge is particularly critical in blood inventory management and represents a significant research opportunity for the operations management community. It can be addressed using state-of-the-art methodologies in data-driven decision making and perishable inventory under stochastic supply and demand. This study proposes a stochastic optimization model based on sample-average approximation (SAA) to aid the blood type substitution decisions at hospitals. We take into account the historical demand data, the type and age of blood units in the inventory, as well as the shelf-life variability of the units arriving at hospitals. We compare the SAA results with several policies, including a single-period myopic model, no-substitution, over-order practice, and an empirical guideline. Results indicate that the proposed SAA model outperforms all the above policies. It thus creates significant opportunities for improvement in the management of blood units, as it reduces the imbalance in the supply and demand of O-negative blood units, allowing practitioners to benefit from substitution while avoiding the over-ordering of O-negative units.
title_cn: 替代还是紧急订单？避免O型阴性血液短缺
abstract_cn: 血型替代是一项有效的政策，可提升医院应对血液短缺的供给链韧性。然而，尽管某些血型的兼容性为更好地管理供给（捐献）和需求（输血）的波动提供了机会，但在实践中，决定是使用现有库存中的兼容血液单位（替代）还是立即下达紧急订单，仍然具有挑战性。现有证据表明，在澳大利亚，目前关于是否进行血型替代与紧急订单的决策实践，导致了供需之间对最广泛兼容单位（O型阴性血液单位）显著的不平衡。这一挑战在血液库存管理中尤为关键，也为运作管理领域提供了重要的研究机会。可以运用先进的方法论，在数据驱动决策和处理随机供需的易腐烂库存方面加以解决。本研究提出了一种基于样本平均近似（SAA）的随机优化模型，以辅助医院的血型替代决策。我们考虑了历史需求数据、库存中血液单位的类型和年龄，以及到达医院单位的保质期波动。我们将SAA模型的结果与包括单周期短视模型、不替代、过量订购做法和经验指导在内的几种政策进行了比较。结果表明，所提出的SAA模型优于以上所有政策。因此，它为血液单位管理的改进创造了显著机会，因为它减少了O型阴性血液单位的供需不平衡，使从业者能够在避免O型阴性单位过量订购的同时，获得替代的好处。

title: Prosocial Project Management in Conflict Areas
abstract: Armed conflicts, terrorism, and political instability disrupt the implementation of thousands of prosocial projects in the developing world. In this unstable, fast-paced environment, managers may need to change course and adapt projects to new circumstances. Could adaptive management be a solution? Leveraging a groundbreaking pilot run by the World Bank, we evaluate the performance of all 429 adaptive projects implemented between 1998 and 2013, when the Bank launched the “adaptable program loan.” Our study—covering 91 countries, 25 development sectors, and approximately $55 billion in funding resources—examines how armed conflict and adaptability influence project performance. We find that adaptability, reinforced by experience and learning, counteracts conflict’s negative effect on project performance. However, this moderating effect diminishes as project complexity increases and reverses in non-conflict areas due to cost overruns and overoptimistic formulations .
title_cn: 冲突地区的亲社会项目管理
abstract_cn: 武装冲突、恐怖主义和政治不稳定严重干扰了发展中国家数千个亲社会项目的实施。在这种不稳定且快速变化的环境中，管理者可能需要调整方向并适应新的情况。适应性管理是否可以成为解决方案？通过利用世界银行开展的一项开创性试点，我们评估了在1998年至2013年间实施的429个适应性项目的表现，这一时期银行推出了“可适应项目贷款”。我们的研究涵盖91个国家、25个发展领域及约550亿美元的资金资源，考察了武装冲突和适应性如何影响项目表现。我们发现，适应性在经验和学习的增强下，有效对抗了冲突对项目表现的负面影响。然而，随着项目复杂性的增加，这种调节效应减弱，并在非冲突地区因成本超支和过于乐观的设想而逆转。

title: Equity-Driven Workload Allocation for Crowdsourced Last-Mile Delivery
abstract: Crowdshipping, a rapidly growing approach in Last-Mile Delivery (LMD), relies on independent crowdworkers to fulfill delivery orders. Building a sustainable network of crowdshippers is crucial for the long-term success of such systems, as participation is primarily driven by fair compensation. This is especially important for workers who rely on crowdwork as their main source of income, making equitable pay not just a matter of fairness but of financial well-being. In this study, we address several key questions that gig-economy platforms concerned with fair pay may ask: How can equity be measured? What are the associated cost implications? And how can potential drawbacks be managed? Our main contribution is the development of a practical, equity-oriented framework tailored to crowdshipping within an LMD environment. Inspired by the real-world operations of several crowdshipping platforms, the framework operates in real time and is built around a bi-objective optimization model that balances equity and cost. This allows us to systematically explore trade-offs and identify the equity measures that most effectively capture this balance. We demonstrate that even a modest reduction in cost efficiency (e.g., 2.5%) can lead to substantial improvements in equity; potentially up to 65%. Our results provide actionable insights for practitioners, including guidance on selecting appropriate equity measures. We also find that the best equity outcomes occur when the crowdshipper pool is kept relatively small. Furthermore, we quantify the performance loss of high- and low-performing crowdshippers as the pool size increases, offering valuable insights for workforce planning and management. Along similar lines, we demonstrate that our framework remains effective in managing vehicle shortages in dynamic environments while achieving comparable levels of equity improvement.
title_cn: 以公平为驱动的众包最后一公里配送工作量分配
abstract_cn: 众包运输是一种快速发展的最后一公里配送（LMD）方法，依赖独立的众包工作者来完成配送订单。建立一个可持续的众包运输网络对这类系统的长期成功至关重要，因为参与主要依赖于公平的报酬。这对于依赖众包工作作为主要收入来源的工作者尤为重要，使得公平报酬不仅仅是一个公平的问题，更是财务健康的问题。在本研究中，我们探讨了几个与公平报酬相关的关键问题，这些问题可能是寻求公平支付的零工经济平台所关心的：如何衡量公平？相关的成本影响是什么？以及如何管理潜在的缺点？我们的主要贡献是开发了一个实用的、以公平为导向的框架，该框架专门针对LMD环境中的众包运输。该框架受到多个众包运输平台实际操作的启发，实时运作，围绕一个双目标优化模型构建，以平衡公平与成本。这使我们能够系统地探索权衡并识别最有效捕捉这种平衡的公平衡量标准。我们的研究表明，即使是成本效率的适度降低（例如2.5%），也可以显著改善公平；潜在提升可达到65%。我们的结果为从业者提供了可操作的见解，包括关于选择适当的公平衡量标准的指导。我们还发现，当众包运输池保持相对较小的规模时，最佳的公平结果会出现。此外，我们量化了高绩效和低绩效众包工作者在池规模增大时的表现损失，为劳动力规划和管理提供了有价值的见解。同样地，我们展示了在动态环境中管理车辆短缺时，我们的框架仍然有效，并能够实现可比的公平改善。

title: Exploring the Divide Between Retail Apps and Light Apps: Insights and Implications
abstract: The proliferation of mobile commerce channels has fundamentally reshaped retail ecosystems, particularly in digital markets like China where smartphone adoption approaches saturation among internet users. While extant literature has extensively examined the impact of new channel introductions (e.g., online, offline, mobile) on firm performance, less attention has been paid to consumer behavioral nuances within established digital interfaces. Addressing this gap, our study pioneers a comparative analysis of purchasing dynamics across two dominant yet technologically distinct channels: native apps versus light-app channels (e.g., WeChat mini-programs). While both channels share core mobile attributes (e.g., small screen sizes, on-the-go accessibility), their divergent technological architectures (Swift, Kotlin, and Java vs. HTML, CSS, WXML, and WXSS) create systematically differentiated consumer experiences. Through econometric analysis of 185,437 transaction records from a multichannel B2C platform, we reveal that consumers tend to spend more, purchase more items, and exhibit a lower likelihood of product returns when shopping through the light-app channel compared to native apps. More importantly, these behavioral divergences are moderated by product categories, price levels, and discount depths. Our findings contribute to the multichannel retailing literature by providing new insights into consumers’ behavioral differences between the two popular, yet distinct, mobile channels. Based on these insights, we suggest that multichannel retailers should prioritize channel convenience and accessibility and reconsider their investments in mobile native apps. Additionally, retailers should tailor assortments, pricing, and discount strategies to each channel to effectively engage consumers and stimulate purchases. Our research also emphasizes the importance of aligning marketing, operations, and finance strategies in multichannel retailing.
title_cn: 探索零售应用与轻量级应用之间的差异：洞察与启示
abstract_cn: 移动商务渠道的快速发展根本上重塑了零售生态系统，尤其是在中国这样的数字市场中，智能手机的普及程度接近饱和。现有文献虽然广泛研究了新渠道引入（例如线上、线下、移动）对企业绩效的影响，但对已建立数字界面中消费者行为细微差别的关注相对较少。为了填补这一空白，我们的研究首次对两种主导但技术上截然不同的购买渠道进行了比较分析：原生应用与轻应用渠道（如微信小程序）。尽管这两种渠道在一些核心移动属性上相似（如小屏幕尺寸、便捷访问），但它们所采用的不同技术架构（Swift、Kotlin和Java与HTML、CSS、WXML和WXSS）却创造了系统性差异的消费体验。通过对来自一家多渠道B2C平台的185,437条交易记录进行计量经济学分析，我们发现，消费者在通过轻应用渠道购物时，往往会花费更多、购买更多商品，并且产品退货的可能性较低。这些行为差异更是受到产品类别、价格水平和折扣深度的调节。我们的研究为多渠道零售文献提供了新见解，揭示了消费者在这两种流行但截然不同的移动渠道之间的行为差异。基于这些见解，我们建议多渠道零售商应优先考虑渠道的便利性和可达性，并重新审视对移动原生应用的投资。此外，零售商应根据每个渠道量身定制商品组合、定价和折扣策略，以有效吸引消费者并刺激购买。我们的研究还强调了在多渠道零售中对市场营销、运营和财务策略进行协调的重要性。

title: A Study of the Attributes of Production and Operations Management Society (POMS) Members and Conference Registrants
abstract: This study examines the composition of attributes among members of the Production and Operations Management Society (POMS). We analyze POMS membership data from 2017 to 2023 and conference registration data from 2011 to 2024. Specifically, the study seeks to: (1) describe the current composition of POMS members and conference registrants in terms of gender, academic rank, and country of affiliation, and (2) provide recommendations for improving representation within professional societies.
title_cn: 关于生产与运营管理学会（POMS）成员及会议注册者特征的研究
abstract_cn: 本研究考察了生产与运营管理学会（POMS）成员的属性构成。我们分析了2017年至2023年的POMS会员数据以及2011年至2024年的会议注册数据。具体而言，本研究旨在：（1）描述POMS成员和会议注册者在性别、学术职级和所属国家方面的当前构成，及（2）提供改善专业学会内部代表性的建议。

title: Revenue Management With Nonparametric Demand Learning and Product Returns
abstract: Product returns are prevalent in practice. Many retailers provide lenient free return policies but with specific return window within which customers are allowed to return products. Motivated by this phenomenon, we consider a single-product online learning and pricing problem with stochastic product returns. A salient feature is that the demand function, depending on price and return window decisions, is initially unknown and must be learned on the fly. The retailer thus faces the classic exploration–exploitation trade-off. Moreover, we consider an inventory constraint, introducing an additional trade-off between earning revenue and managing inventory. We propose a modeling framework to integrate pricing and return window decisions, and develop a deterministic fluid model that serves as the full-information benchmark. To tackle the learning problem, we design a novel nonparametric learning algorithm that seamlessly integrates inverse stochastic gradient descent (SGD) and Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) methods. Under mild assumptions on demand and revenue functions, we establish a regret upper bound for our learning algorithm as <mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>O</mml:mi> <mml:mo stretchy="false">(</mml:mo> <mml:msqrt> <mml:mi>W</mml:mi> <mml:mi>T</mml:mi> </mml:msqrt> <mml:mi>log</mml:mi> <mml:mspace width="0.2em"/> <mml:mi>T</mml:mi> <mml:mo stretchy="false">)</mml:mo> </mml:math> , where <mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>W</mml:mi> </mml:math> denotes the number of return window candidates and <mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>T</mml:mi> </mml:math> denotes the time horizon. This result aligns with lower bounds established in both online pricing and multi-armed bandit (MAB) literature. Numerical experiments are conducted to verify the effectiveness and robustness of our algorithm across various environments. From an operational standpoint, retailers can use our learning framework as a decision-support tool to identify the optimal price and return window.
title_cn: 非参数需求学习与产品退货的收入管理
abstract_cn: 产品退货在实际中普遍存在。许多零售商提供宽松的免费退货政策，但规定了具体的退货时限，顾客必须在此时限内退货。受此现象的启发，我们考虑了一个具有随机产品退货的单产品在线学习和定价问题。一个显著特征是，依赖于价格和退货窗口决策的需求函数最初是不确定的，需要在运行中进行学习。因此，零售商面临经典的探索—利用权衡。此外，我们还考虑了库存约束，引入了在获取收入和管理库存之间的额外权衡。我们提出了一个模型框架，将定价和退货窗口决策整合在一起，并开发了一个确定性的流体模型，作为完全信息基准。为了应对学习问题，我们设计了一种新的非参数学习算法，该算法无缝集成了逆随机梯度下降（SGD）和上置信界（UCB）方法。在对需求和收入函数的温和假设下，我们为我们的学习算法建立了一个遗憾的上界，为 <mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>O</mml:mi> <mml:mo stretchy="false">(</mml:mo> <mml:msqrt> <mml:mi>W</mml:mi> <mml:mi>T</mml:mi> </mml:msqrt> <mml:mi>log</mml:mi> <mml:mspace width="0.2em"/> <mml:mi>T</mml:mi> <mml:mo stretchy="false">)</mml:mo> </mml:math> ，其中 <mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>W</mml:mi> </mml:math> 表示退货窗口候选的数量，<mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>T</mml:mi> </mml:math> 表示时间范围。这个结果与在线定价和多臂赌场（MAB）文献中建立的下界相一致。我们进行了数值实验，以验证算法在各种环境下的有效性和鲁棒性。从运营的角度看，零售商可以使用我们的学习框架作为决策支持工具，以识别最优价格和退货窗口。

title: Multiproduct Dynamic Pricing With Popularity Bias
abstract: Popularity bias reflects the positive impact of popularity information on consumer choices. There are two common display formats for popularity information on online retail platforms: the total-based cumulative sales format, where the total sales of a product are displayed since its launch, and the period-based cumulative sales format, where only sales within a specific recent period are shown. Both types of popularity information are continuously updated. This paper focuses on the multiproduct dynamic pricing problem with popularity bias. We employ the widely used multinomial logit model to investigate the impact of popularity bias on consumer choices. In particular, we examine how popularity bias affects marginal revenue, pricing decisions, and market shares. Moreover, we highlight that ignoring popularity bias can lead to a suboptimal outcome. As the multiproduct dynamic pricing problem suffers from the curse of dimensionality, we propose a semi-myopic pricing policy, which is computationally tractable, and demonstrate its asymptotic optimality under both formats. Our numerical simulations further indicate that ignoring popularity bias can result in substantial revenue losses, while the semi-myopic pricing policy consistently outperforms other heuristics under both formats. Finally, empirical tests on real data provide a comprehensive procedure for identifying the most appropriate choice models, which offer practical insights for implementation.
title_cn: 多产品动态定价与受欢迎程度偏见
abstract_cn: 流行度偏差反映了流行度信息对消费者选择的积极影响。在在线零售平台上，有两种常见的流行度信息展示格式：基于总量的累积销售格式，在此格式下展示产品自发布以来的总销售额；以及基于时期的累积销售格式，在此格式下仅展示特定近期内的销售额。这两种类型的流行度信息均会持续更新。本文聚焦于包含流行度偏差的多产品动态定价问题。我们采用广泛使用的多项式逻辑回归模型来研究流行度偏差对消费者选择的影响。特别地，我们考察流行度偏差如何影响边际收入、定价决策和市场份额。此外，我们强调忽视流行度偏差可能导致次优结果。由于多产品动态定价问题受到维度诅咒的困扰，我们提出了一种半近视定价策略，该策略在计算上是可行的，并证明了其在两种格式下的渐进最优性。我们的数值仿真进一步表明，忽视流行度偏差可能导致显著的收入损失，而半近视定价策略在两种格式下始终优于其他启发式方法。最后，基于真实数据的实证测试提供了一种综合程序，用于识别最适合的选择模型，为实践实施提供了实用见解。

title: EXPRESS: Offline Learning and Optimization for Multi-product Inventory Management with Stockout-based Substitution
abstract: We deal with a retailer’s multi-product inventory system where customers randomly seek acceptable substitutes if their initial requests are not satisfied. Unsuccessful quests for substitutes would result in lost sales. Motivated by a consulting project as well as other real practices, we also choose to deal with further challenges posed by initially unknown base demand distributions and substitution probabilities; moreover, we aim to develop an offline learning method that (i) takes advantage of given data derived from bygone decisions rather than of any learning-while-doing opportunity, (ii) makes inferences about base-demand distributions and pairwise substitution probabilities without knowing whether there have been demand arrivals after inventory depletions, and (iii) is unhindered by the lack of knowledge about the assortments faced by customers and their purchase-or-no-purchase decisions at their individual arrivals. To address these challenges, we propose an innovative approach based on the Kaplan-Meier estimator that circumvents unrealistic data requirements. Our substitution probability estimates employ carefully designed weighting schemes to facilitate rigorous theoretical analysis through tools such as the Cauchy-Schwartz inequality. Both one-time substitution scenarios and more complex Markov-chain substitution patterns would be accommodated. Using large deviation tools, we establish provably optimal convergence rates of our estimates on top of consistency. The precision in parameter estimates would translate into accuracy in replenishment decisions. For inventory management, we take advantage of a submodularity property to obtain an exact algorithm for the two-product case and a good heuristic for the general multi-product problem. Computational studies based on simulated and actual data confirm the merits of our approach.
title_cn: EXPRESS：基于缺货替代的多产品库存管理的离线学习与优化
abstract_cn: 我们研究一个零售商的多产品库存系统，在这个系统中，当客户的初始请求未能满足时，客户会随机寻求可接受的替代品。未能找到替代品的尝试将导致销售损失。受到咨询项目以及其他实际案例的启发，我们决定应对最初未知的基本需求分布和替代概率所带来的进一步挑战。此外，我们旨在开发一种离线学习方法，该方法 (i) 利用来自过去决策的已有数据，而不是任何实践中学习的机会， (ii) 在不知道库存耗尽后是否有需求到来的情况下，推断基本需求分布和成对替代概率，(iii) 不受客户面临的商品组合以及他们在个体到达时的购买或不购买决策的知识缺乏的阻碍。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种基于Kaplan-Meier估计量的创新方法，规避了不现实的数据要求。我们的替代概率估计采用精心设计的加权方案，以便通过如Cauchy-Schwartz不等式等工具进行严格的理论分析。我们将同时处理一次性替代场景和更复杂的马尔可夫链替代模式。借助大偏差工具，我们证明了估计的一致性以及可证明的最优收敛速率。参数估计的精确性将转化为补货决策的准确性。针对库存管理，我们利用次模性质获得了两种产品情况下的精确算法，并为一般的多产品问题提出了良好的启发式算法。基于模拟和实际数据的计算研究验证了我们方法的优势。

title: Blockchain-Enabled Supply Chain Financing (BCF)
abstract: Blockchain technology holds promise for improving access to financing within supply chains, especially for small and under-financed suppliers. Yet, the specific ways in which blockchain technology mitigates financing frictions and the features that contribute to successful platform implementations remain unclear. Following a theory elaboration approach, we close that gap by studying which financing frictions the blockchain-enabled supply chain financing (BCF) solutions aim to address, which blockchain features they use, and the association between the frictions and features. In our analysis, we examine 312 documents with unstructured text describing 11 BCF solutions, both successful and failed. Using AI-based large language models, we identify patterns connecting seven types of financing frictions and three key blockchain features.
