We find that the transactional friction is the most prominent, despite receiving limited attention in the academic literature, while bankruptcy costs and taxes—frictions that are commonly discussed in the literature—are rarely associated with blockchain features in our sample. Among blockchain features, tokenization is used sparingly; and, unlike other features, it appears in successful BCF solutions only. Moreover, connections between frictions and features are not random: while transactional and hidden actions frictions are linked to all three blockchain features, other frictions are typically associated with only one. Our findings offer a deeper understanding of the mechanisms through which blockchain adds value in supply chain finance, suggesting that aligning blockchain features with specific frictions may enhance the chances of success. We also demonstrate a method for using AI to evaluate large amounts of unstructured data in operations management research.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 区块链驱动的供应链融资（BCF）
abstract_cn: 区块链技术有望改善供应链中融资的可获取性，尤其是对于小型和资金不足的供应商。然而，区块链技术缓解融资摩擦的具体方式以及促成成功平台实施的特征仍不清晰。通过理论阐述的方法，我们填补了这一空白，研究区块链驱动的供应链融资（BCF）解决方案旨在解决哪些融资摩擦，使用了哪些区块链特征，以及摩擦与特征之间的关联。在我们的分析中，我们审查了312份描述11种BCF解决方案（包括成功和失败案例）的非结构化文本文件。利用基于人工智能的大型语言模型，我们识别出连接七种融资摩擦和三种关键区块链特征的模式。我们发现，尽管在学术文献中受到的关注有限，交易摩擦是最为显著的，而破产成本和税收——在文献中常被讨论的摩擦——在我们的样本中与区块链特征的关联却很少。在区块链特征中，代币化的使用相对稀少；而且，与其他特征不同，它仅出现在成功的BCF解决方案中。此外，摩擦与特征之间的联系并非随机：交易摩擦和隐性行为摩擦与所有三种区块链特征相关，而其他摩擦通常仅与一种特征相关。我们的研究结果提供了对区块链在供应链金融中增值机制的更深入理解，表明将区块链特征与特定摩擦对齐可能提高成功的机会。我们还展示了一种利用人工智能评估运营管理研究中大量非结构化数据的方法。

title: Joint or Independent? Sourcing and Inspection Decisions in Emerging Economies
abstract: In the presence of supplier quality risk, offering suppliers a higher procurement price or increasing inspection effort are two approaches to motivate a supplier to invest in higher quality. In this paper, we consider three sourcing and inspection strategies for a brand with two branch shops facing supplier quality risk: joint, mixed, and independent strategies. Under the joint strategy, the brand jointly sources for its two shops by offering a uniform procurement price and inspects both shops in a centralized way (joint sourcing and joint inspection). Under the mixed strategy, the brand jointly sources for its two shops by offering a procurement price, and then each shop decides its own inspection probability (joint sourcing and independent inspection). Under the independent strategy, each shop decides its own procurement price and inspection probability (independent sourcing and independent inspection). We find that among the three strategies, the joint strategy mostly relies on the inspection tool to motivate suppliers’ high-quality effort, and the mixed strategy mainly utilizes the procurement price tool by offering the highest price for suppliers’ high quality. We further find that, no matter whether the brand is purely profit-driven or cares about the quantity of low-quality products sold to the market, the mixed strategy is always preferred to the independent strategy. The preference between mixed and joint strategies is jointly determined by the fixed cost incurred in joint sourcing and inspection accuracy. For intermediate fixed cost, if the inspection accuracy is sufficiently high, the mixed strategy is preferred to the joint strategy; otherwise, the joint strategy is preferred to the mixed strategy. Interestingly, when a brand becomes more socially responsible (i.e., it cares more about the quantity of low-quality products sold to the market), it may switch from a reliable supplier to a risky supplier, leading to more low-quality products being sold to the market. This is because with a greater level of social responsibility, the brand’s higher inspection efforts become more credible, which motivates the risky supplier’s higher quality effort.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 联合还是独立？新兴经济体中的采购和检验决策
abstract_cn: 在存在供应商质量风险的情况下，提供给供应商更高的采购价格或增加检查力度是激励供应商投资于更高质量的两种方法。本文考虑了在面临供应商质量风险的品牌及其两个分店的背景下的三种采购和检查策略：联合策略、混合策略和独立策略。在联合策略下，品牌为其两个分店提供统一的采购价格，并以集中方式进行检查（联合采购和联合检查）。在混合策略下，品牌为两个分店共同采购并提供一个采购价格，然后每个分店决定自己的检查概率（联合采购和独立检查）。在独立策略下，每个分店决定自己的采购价格和检查概率（独立采购和独立检查）。我们发现，在三种策略中，联合策略主要依赖于检查工具来激励供应商提高质量努力，而混合策略则主要利用采购价格工具，为供应商的高质量提供最高的价格。我们进一步发现，无论品牌是否纯粹以利润为驱动，还是关注市场上低质量产品的销售数量，混合策略始终优于独立策略。混合策略与联合策略之间的偏好由联合采购中产生的固定成本和检查准确性共同决定。在中等固定成本下，如果检查准确性足够高，则混合策略优于联合策略；否则，联合策略优于混合策略。有趣的是，当品牌变得更加社会责任感强烈（即更关注市场上低质量产品的销售数量）时，可能会从可靠供应商转向风险供应商，从而导致更多低质量产品被销售到市场。这是因为在更高水平的社会责任下，品牌的检查力度变得更加可信，从而激励风险供应商提高质量努力。

title: Risk Aversion in a Data-Driven Multi-period Inventory Control Problem
abstract: We study multi-period risk-averse inventory control in a data-driven setting. In this problem, a risk-averse retailer makes periodic decisions on inventory levels based only on historical demand observations without full knowledge of the demand distribution. We adopt the popular nested formulation for risk-averse programs to formulate this multi-period problem and its data-driven counterpart under a coherent risk measure. Our objective is to study the sample complexity bound such that with high probability, the data-driven policy is near-optimal, that is, the relative error of risk under the data-driven policy compared with the optimal risk is arbitrarily small. Analysis of this problem is inherently challenging, because the multi-period nature requires solving the risk-averse program and its data-driven version recursively backward in time, while the (empirical) risk-to-go functions in this process do not have closed-form derivatives for most risk measures, which renders existing first-order methods for the risk-neutral newsvendor model invalid. In this study, we develop a zeroth-order framework to establish the complexity bound on sample sizes to guarantee near-optimality of the data-driven policy with given accuracy levels. Instead of using first-order derivative information on the risk-to-go function, our analysis directly examines the class of functions that underpins each cumulative risk function and derives maximum inequalities for this functional class by computing the covering numbers. Finite-sample complexity bounds are then used to establish asymptotic properties of the estimated risk, including consistency and convergence rate. Computationally, the time complexity for solving the data-driven policy, which is essentially an empirical dynamic programming (EDP) estimator of the optimal policy, increases exponentially in the length of the planning horizon. To speed up computation, we propose an approximation scheme that recursively approximates the empirical cumulative risk function with a convex piecewise linear function and then minimize it to obtain a modified data-driven inventory policy. We show that with proper control for approximation error, the modified data-driven policy is also near-optimal, and it has the same order of sample complexity bound as that for the original EDP policy.
title_cn: 数据驱动的多期库存控制问题中的风险厌恶
abstract_cn: 我们研究了在数据驱动环境下的多时期风险厌恶库存控制问题。在这个问题中，风险厌恶的零售商仅根据历史需求观察做出周期性的库存水平决策，而并不了解需求分布的完整信息。我们采用流行的嵌套形式对风险厌恶程序进行建模，以制定这个多时期问题及其基于数据的对应问题，基于一致性风险度量。我们的目标是研究样本复杂性界限，使得在高概率下，数据驱动的策略接近最优，即在数据驱动策略下的风险相对于最优风险的相对误差任意小。这个问题的分析本质上具有挑战性，因为多时期的特性要求递归地向回解决风险厌恶程序及其数据驱动版本，而在此过程中（经验）前期风险函数在大多数风险度量下没有闭式导数，这使得现有的针对风险中性报童模型的一阶方法失效。在本研究中，我们开发了一个零阶框架，以建立样本量的复杂性界限，以保证数据驱动策略的近似最优性，满足给定的精度水平。我们的分析不是使用风险函数的前一阶导数信息，而是直接考察支撑每个累积风险函数的函数类，并通过计算覆盖数导出这一函数类的最大不等式。然后使用有限样本复杂性界限建立估计风险的渐近性质，包括一致性和收敛速度。在计算上，解决数据驱动策略的时间复杂度（本质上是最优策略的经验动态规划（EDP）估计器）随着规划期限的延长呈指数增长。为了加速计算，我们提出了一种近似方案，该方案通过递归地用一个凸分段线性函数近似经验累积风险函数，然后最小化它以获得修正后的数据驱动库存策略。我们证明，在适当控制近似误差的情况下，修正后的数据驱动策略同样接近最优，并且其样本复杂性界限与原始EDP策略具有相同的数量级。

title: Multichannel Experience, Product Attributes, and Consumer Return Behavior: An Empirical Analysis
abstract: Omnichannel retailing has changed the way consumers search for, evaluate, and purchase products. At the same time, product returns remain a costly and persistent operational challenge. Conventional wisdom holds that adding sales channels, particularly combining physical and non-physical touchpoints, should improve information about product fit and reduce return rates. However, it is unclear how the shopping experience across multiple channels influences what consumers buy and whether they return those purchases. There is also no clear consensus on why return rates increase in some omnichannel contexts but not others. We address this knowledge gap by focusing on consumers’ multichannel experience (MX) rather than mere channel adoption, and distinguishing two types of MX: remote-only (those who have used only non-physical channels such as online and catalog) versus hybrid (those who have used both non-physical and physical channels). We empirically analyze over 292,000 transactions from a European furniture retailer operating showroom, online, and catalog channels. Using a series of fixed-effects regressions with Heckman selection to address potential channel-selection bias, a control function approach to account for endogeneity due to omitted variable bias associated with MX, and a parallel mediation analysis, we find that consumers with MX are significantly more likely to return products than their counterparts with only single-channel experience (i.e., showroom, online, or catalog). This elevated return propensity is largely driven by MX shoppers’ greater tendency to buy niche products and experience goods, which carry higher uncertainty and return risk. Moreover, consumers with remote-only MX exhibit higher return rates than those with hybrid MX, and this gap is especially pronounced among consumers living farther from a physical showroom store. We conduct multiple robustness checks to verify the results. We also replicate the main findings with a new transaction data set from a U.S. retailer (leveraging a natural experiment). Theoretically, our work challenges assumptions that multichannel access inherently lowers returns, highlighting how MX can increase return risk through its effect on purchase behavior. Managerially, our findings inform product–channel matching strategies and omnichannel design, and point to targeted interventions based on consumer type (remote-only vs. hybrid) and geography (distance to stores) to ameliorate returns.
title_cn: 多渠道体验、产品属性与消费者退货行为：实证分析
abstract_cn: 全渠道零售改变了消费者搜索、评估和购买产品的方式。与此同时，产品退货仍然是一个成本高昂且持续存在的运营挑战。传统观念认为，增加销售渠道，特别是结合实体和非实体接触点，应该能够改善产品适配信息并降低退货率。然而，目前尚不清楚跨多个渠道的购物体验如何影响消费者的购买决策，以及他们是否会退还这些购买的商品。在某些全渠道环境中退货率上升的原因也没有明确的共识。我们通过关注消费者的多渠道体验（MX），而不仅仅是渠道的采用，来填补这一知识空白，并区分两种类型的MX：仅远程（仅使用非实体渠道，如在线和目录）与混合（同时使用非实体和实体渠道）。我们对一家在欧洲运营展厅、在线和目录渠道的家具零售商的292,000多笔交易进行了实证分析。通过一系列固定效应回归和赫克曼选择模型来解决潜在的渠道选择偏差，采用控制函数方法来考虑由于与MX相关的遗漏变量偏差引起的内生性，并进行平行中介分析，我们发现拥有MX的消费者比仅有单一渠道体验（即展厅、在线或目录）的消费者更可能退货。这种较高的退货倾向主要源于MX购物者更倾向于购买小众产品和体验商品，这些商品具有更高的不确定性和退货风险。此外，仅远程MX的消费者的退货率高于混合MX的消费者，尤其是在距离实体展厅较远的消费者中，这一差距尤为明显。我们进行了多项稳健性检验以验证结果。我们还利用美国零售商的新交易数据集（利用自然实验）复制了主要发现。从理论上讲，我们的研究挑战了多渠道接入固有降低退货的假设，强调了MX如何通过其对购买行为的影响增加退货风险。从管理角度来看，我们的发现为产品-渠道匹配策略和全渠道设计提供了参考，并指出基于消费者类型（仅远程与混合）和地理位置（距离商店的远近）进行针对性干预以改善退货的方向。

title: Do More Services Lead to Better Buyer–Supplier Relationships? The Unintended Consequence of Manufacturing Firms Providing Customer Solutions
abstract: The literature has highlighted the value of the solution business model for manufacturing firms. In this research, we investigate the dark side of providing customer solutions and challenge an assumption held by extant research: That shifting from selling individual products to providing customer solutions enhances buyer–supplier relationships. Drawing on the frame problem view and expectation-(dis) confirmation theory, we examine the impact of provision of customer solutions on customer default. We also explore contingent factors that either magnify or mitigate this effect. Using a longitudinal dataset of 2,218 observations from 446 Chinese listed firms between 2012 and 2020, we find that provision of customer solutions increases the likelihood of customer default. Moreover, we show that this positive impact is stronger in industries with higher turbulence and for firms with greater advertising intensity, but weaker for firms with stronger operational capability. These findings suggest that provision of customer solutions can damage buyer–supplier relationships by reducing the likelihood of meeting customer expectations and increasing transaction disputes.
title_cn: 更多的服务是否会导致更好的买方与供应方关系？制造企业提供客户解决方案的意外后果
abstract_cn: 文献强调了解决方案商业模式对制造企业的价值。在本研究中，我们探讨了提供客户解决方案的负面影响，并挑战了现有研究中的一个假设：即从销售单一产品转向提供客户解决方案会增强买卖双方的关系。基于框架问题视角和期望（不）确认理论，我们考察了提供客户解决方案对客户违约的影响。同时，我们还探讨了那些可能放大或减轻这一效应的应变因素。通过分析2012年至2020年间446家中国上市公司的2218个观察数据，我们发现提供客户解决方案增加了客户违约的可能性。此外，我们显示出这一积极影响在动荡程度较高的行业中更为明显，在广告强度更大的公司中更为显著，但在具有更强运营能力的企业中则较弱。这些发现表明，提供客户解决方案可能通过减少满足客户期望的可能性和增加交易争议而损害买卖双方关系。

title: Cross-Platform Spillover Effect of Promotion: Evidence from the PC Game Market
abstract: Platform owners employ strategic promotions (e.g., platform-initiated penetration pricing) to enlarge their customer base. Under the conventional price-driven economic logic, such promotions are expected to divert demand for the identical goods away from competing platforms, as extensively documented in the conventional brick-and-mortar store context. However, they can also boost the demand. In environments where customers can easily access the identical goods on competing platforms, the increased awareness by strategic promotion, coupled with other non-price factors, can stimulate the purchases of such goods on competing platforms. As such, the effect of strategic promotions on competitive dynamics remains unclear despite their importance for platforms and today’s intensifying platform competition. We utilize the context of online PC game marketplaces where Steam and Epic Games Store dominate. Using the synthetic control approach, our analysis finds that the strategic promotion by Epic Games Store, which offers selected games for free for a week, rather increases the sales of the identical games on Steam substantially (by 59.2%) during that week. In essence, although consumers could obtain the games for free on the promoting platform, more consumers purchased the identical games on the competing platform than before. To comprehensively understand the drivers and conditions of this phenomenon, we perform complementary analysis based on the Attention-Interest-Desire-Action framework, following the progression of consumers’ cross-platform purchase decision process. Using consumer survey and product review data, along with the decomposition of the treatment effect, our results suggest that the effect is more prominent when the price gap between platforms is small and externalities between users or between goods offered by Steam are high. Taken together, our study unveils a unique aspect of strategic promotion in the context of platform competition and highlights the crucial role of externalities in shaping the competitive landscape of digital platforms.
title_cn: 促销的跨平台溢出效应：来自PC游戏市场的证据
abstract_cn: 平台拥有者通过战略推广（例如，平台发起的渗透定价）来扩大其客户基础。在传统的以价格驱动的经济逻辑下，这些推广预计会将对相同商品的需求从竞争平台转移过来，这在传统的实体店环境中已有大量文献记载。然而，这些促销也可能会刺激需求。在客户可以轻松地在竞争平台上获取相同商品的环境中，战略推广所提高的认知，加上其他非价格因素，可能会刺激在竞争平台上对这些商品的购买。因此，尽管战略推广对平台及当今日益激烈的平台竞争至关重要，但其对竞争动态的影响仍不明确。我们以在线PC游戏市场为背景，Steam和Epic Games Store占据主导地位。通过合成控制方法，我们的分析发现Epic Games Store的战略推广，即在一周内免费提供精选游戏，实际上使得Steam上相同游戏的销量显著增加（增加了59.2%）。实质上，尽管消费者可以在推广平台上免费获得这些游戏，但在竞争平台上购买相同游戏的消费者人数却比以往更多。为了全面理解这一现象的驱动因素和条件，我们基于注意-兴趣-欲望-行动框架进行补充分析，跟踪消费者的跨平台购买决策过程。通过消费者调查和产品评论数据，以及对处理效应的分解，我们的结果表明，当平台之间的价格差距较小时，以及Steam用户或Steam所提供商品之间的外部性较高时，这一效应更加显著。综上所述，我们的研究揭示了平台竞争中战略推广的独特方面，并强调了外部性在塑造数字平台竞争格局中的关键作用。

title: Behavior-Based Pricing and Delay Commitment in Congestion-Prone Systems
abstract: Recent years have witnessed the widespread use of data to recognize repeat and new consumers to offer them different prices, that is, behavior-based pricing (BBP). While extensive research has explored the market impacts of BBP, most studies overlook the congestion effects arising from increased demand. This study addresses this gap by investigating the impact of BBP in congestion-prone systems, such as food delivery, with a particular focus on how delay commitment strategies influence both firms and consumers. Employing a two-period game-theoretic duopoly model integrated with a queueing system, where service qualities can be dynamically adjusted in each period, our analysis shows that BBP consistently intensifies firm competition, leaving firms worse off while simultaneously benefiting consumers. To enable BBP as a viable equilibrium, we propose a delay commitment strategy. Our findings show that while BBP intensifies price competition, it further alleviates service competition when combined with delay commitment. Notably, when capacity costs are high, the moderating effect on service competition becomes dominant, thereby offsetting the adverse impact of BBP on firms and ultimately leading to higher profits. From a long-term perspective, we further confirm that adopting delay commitment constitutes a Pareto-dominant equilibrium for both firms, irrespective of whether BBP is implemented. We further show that BBP continues to mitigate service competition even under partial coverage and may help increase market coverage. Moreover, when firms differ in their capacity costs, our results show that BBP can enhance social welfare by alleviating the negative externalities associated with congestion, termed the load-balancing effect. In summary, our research highlights the potential drawbacks of BBP for firms in service systems, but suggests that adopting a delay commitment strategy can revitalize BBP.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 基于行为的定价与拥堵易发系统中的延迟承诺
abstract_cn: 近年来，数据的广泛使用使得商家能够识别重复和新客户，以提供不同的价格，即基于行为的定价（BBP）。虽然大量研究探讨了BBP对市场的影响，但大多数研究忽视了由于需求增加而产生的拥堵效应。本研究通过调查BBP在易拥堵系统（如食品配送）的影响，填补了这一空白，特别关注延迟承诺策略如何影响公司和消费者。我们采用一个与排队系统相结合的两阶段博弈论双头垄断模型，在每个阶段服务质量可以动态调整。我们的分析表明，BBP始终加剧公司间的竞争，导致公司状况恶化，同时使消费者受益。为了使BBP成为可行的均衡，我们提出了一种延迟承诺策略。研究结果显示，尽管BBP加剧了价格竞争，但当与延迟承诺结合时，还进一步缓解了服务竞争。值得注意的是，当容量成本较高时，延迟承诺对服务竞争的调节作用占主导，从而抵消了BBP对公司的不利影响，最终导致利润增加。从长期来看，我们进一步确认，采用延迟承诺构成了对两家公司的帕累托主导均衡，无论BBP是否实施。我们还表明，即使在部分覆盖情况下，BBP仍能继续缓解服务竞争，并可能帮助增加市场覆盖率。此外，当公司在容量成本上存在差异时，我们的结果显示，BBP可以通过缓解与拥堵相关的负外部性来增强社会福利，这被称为负荷平衡效应。总之，我们的研究强调了BBP在服务系统中对公司的潜在缺点，但同时表明，采纳延迟承诺策略可以振兴BBP。

title: How Frontline Employees’ Relational Communication in Online Service Interactions Drives Customer Satisfaction
abstract: Organizations lose billions of dollars due to inadequate customer service. To improve service, and enhance customer satisfaction, frontline employees’ (FLEs) use of relational communication may be key. During online customer service chats, FLEs provide key information and offer solutions, but they also can build customer relationships through conversations. In this article, we establish how relational perceptions get evoked in conversations and what influences they have for the outcomes of customer service interactions. Accordingly, we present an empirical field study that illustrates how FLEs influence customer satisfaction by mirroring or complementing four key themes, in line with relational communication theory: intimate communication, task orientation, assertiveness, and composure. Our results indicate that FLEs should mimic customers’ use of intimate communication and task orientation, complement their assertiveness, and exhibit high levels of composure. Moreover, FLEs should emphasize their task orientation at the conversation's outset, gradually incorporate more intimate communication as it progresses, and adopt assertiveness late in the service chat. These insights, corroborated by four experimental studies, underscore the significance of FLEs’ relational communication. Our findings highlight the value of training FLEs to tailor their word choices adeptly, and leverage the potential benefits of text-monitoring tools, which can help FLEs increase relational perceptions and satisfaction among their customers.
title_cn: 前线员工在在线服务互动中的关系沟通如何推动客户满意度
abstract_cn: 组织因客户服务不足而损失数十亿美元。为提升服务质量并增强客户满意度，前线员工（FLEs）运用关系沟通可能是关键。在在线客户服务对话中，前线员工不仅提供关键信息和解决方案，还能够通过谈话建立与客户的关系。本文旨在探讨在对话中如何激发关系感知以及这些感知对客户服务互动结果的影响。为此，我们展示了一项实证研究，说明前线员工如何通过镜像或补充四个关键主题来影响客户满意度，这些主题与关系沟通理论一致：亲密沟通、任务导向、果断性和沉着冷静。我们的结果表明，前线员工应模仿客户在亲密沟通和任务导向上的表现，补充客户的果断性，并表现出高水平的沉着冷静。此外，前线员工在对话开始时应强调任务导向，随着对话的深入逐渐融入更多的亲密沟通，最后在服务对话中后期展现果断性。这些见解通过四项实验研究得到了验证，强调了前线员工关系沟通的重要性。我们的研究结果凸显了培训前线员工灵活调整用词的价值，并利用文本监控工具的潜在优势，这些工具能够帮助前线员工提升客户的关系感知和满意度。

title: Intent-Driven Machine Learning for Fake News Detection: A Referential Domain Adaptation Approach
abstract: Fake news negatively impacts business operations across various sectors, including healthcare, retail, and finance. One promising way to mitigate this problem is through automated content moderation using machine learning (ML). However, existing methodologies have struggled to identify fake news due to its inherent challenges—namely, class heterogeneity, concept drift, context dependency, and adversarial attacks. To address these challenges, we propose a novel strategy that focuses on the heterogeneous intentions behind fake news. Our approach builds on insights from prior social science research indicating that the intent behind creating fake news may differ from that behind disseminating it. This intent-driven variation influences the syntactic structures of fake news, leading to its heterogeneous nature. Accordingly, we argue that developing an ML model focused on the intent dimension of fake news can help overcome the issue of class heterogeneity, which often prevents effective model convergence. Moreover, since intent-driven linguistic patterns are generally less susceptible to temporal shifts and manipulative alterations, we expect this focus to enhance robustness against the other key challenges—concept drift, context dependency, and adversarial attacks. Grounded in a design science approach, we therefore propose a novel ML framework for fake news detection that centers on identifying and leveraging the intent behind fake news. Specifically, we first develop a domain adaptation model to infer the intent behind fake news, specifically targeting contexts where sufficient training data is unavailable—a common limitation in intent detection. Then, based on the intent detection model, we redefine fake news detection by shifting from binary (fake vs. true) to ternary classification (deceptive fake news vs. non-deceptive fake news vs. true news), thereby reducing the computational burden on ML models tasked with processing heterogeneous information within the fake news category. When evaluated against state-of-the-art baselines, our approach demonstrated significant improvements in both intent detection and fake news classification. Robustness checks further demonstrate that our method is less sensitive to distributional shifts in data and is more computationally efficient than baselines. Moreover, post-hoc analyses reveal the underlying mechanisms through which incorporating intent into fake news detection enhances model performance, addressing the key challenges associated with fake news.
title_cn: 意图驱动的机器学习在假新闻检测中的应用：一种参考域适应方法
abstract_cn: 虚假新闻对各个行业的商业运营产生了负面影响，包括医疗、零售和金融等领域。缓解这一问题的一种有前景的方法是通过机器学习（ML）进行自动化内容审核。然而，现有的方法在识别虚假新闻方面面临固有挑战，即类别异质性、概念漂移、上下文依赖性和对抗性攻击。为了解决这些挑战，我们提出了一种新颖的策略，重点关注虚假新闻背后的异质意图。我们的方法基于先前社会科学研究的见解，表明创作虚假新闻的意图可能与传播虚假新闻的意图不同。这种以意图驱动的变化影响了虚假新闻的句法结构，导致其异质性。因此，我们认为，开发一个专注于虚假新闻意图维度的机器学习模型可以帮助克服类别异质性的问题，这通常会阻碍有效的模型收敛。此外，由于以意图驱动的语言模式通常对时间变化和操控性修改的敏感性较低，我们预计这种关注将增强对其他关键挑战（如概念漂移、上下文依赖性和对抗性攻击）的鲁棒性。基于设计科学的方法，我们因此提出了一种新颖的虚假新闻检测机器学习框架，重点在于识别和利用虚假新闻背后的意图。具体而言，我们首先开发一个领域适应模型，以推断虚假新闻背后的意图，特别针对缺乏足够训练数据的上下文——这是意图检测中的一个常见限制。然后，基于意图检测模型，我们通过将虚假新闻检测从二元分类（虚假与真实）转变为三元分类（欺骗性虚假新闻与非欺骗性虚假新闻与真实新闻），重新定义虚假新闻检测，从而减轻了处理虚假新闻类别中异质信息的机器学习模型的计算负担。在与最先进的基线进行评估时，我们的方法在意图检测和虚假新闻分类方面均表现出显著改善。鲁棒性检查进一步表明，我们的方法对数据的分布变化敏感性较低，且在计算效率上优于基线。此外，事后分析揭示了将意图纳入虚假新闻检测如何增强模型性能的潜在机制，从而应对与虚假新闻相关的关键挑战。

title: EXPRESS: Supply chain risk and resolution: An empirical study of stock market reactions
abstract: Firms are exposed to varying levels of supply chain risk and engage in efforts to resolve such risk. This paper examines how disclosures of supply chain risk and resolution during earnings calls affect firms’ stock returns. Using natural language processing, we develop measures of supply chain risk and resolution from quarterly earnings call transcripts for a total of 129,981 firm-quarter observations between 2008 and 2019. We find that higher levels of supply chain risk are associated with lower stock returns around earnings calls, while disclosures of supply chain risk resolution attenuate these negative effects. In particular, stock returns of firms in the highest supply chain risk quintile are 1.07% lower compared to the stock returns of firms in the lowest quintile, and regression analyses indicate that a one-standard-deviation increase in supply chain risk is associated with a 0.56% decline in stock returns. The stock returns of firms in the highest supply chain risk resolution quintile are 0.12% higher compared to the stock returns of firms in the lowest quintile. A one-standard-deviation increase in resolution increases stock returns by 0.08%, and to 0.29% for the subsample of observations where the resolution measure is positive. Exploratory analyses indicate that the effect of supply chain risk on stock returns is significantly greater for smaller firms than for larger firms. In addition, when there is evidence that larger firms’ resolution-related statements are mere rhetoric, the effect of resolution on stock returns is diminished.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 供应链风险与解决方案：股市反应的实证研究
abstract_cn: 企业面临不同程度的供应链风险，并采取措施以应对这些风险。本文考察了在财报电话会议中披露的供应链风险及其解决方案如何影响企业的股票回报。我们利用自然语言处理技术，从2008年至2019年间共129,981个企业季度财报电话会议记录中提炼出供应链风险和解决方案的度量指标。研究发现，较高水平的供应链风险与财报电话会议期间较低的股票回报相关，而对供应链风险解决方案的披露能够缓解这些负面影响。具体而言，处于供应链风险最高五分位的企业股票回报比处于最低五分位企业的股票回报低1.07%，回归分析表明供应链风险每增加一个标准差，股票回报将下降0.56%。而处于供应链风险解决方案最高五分位的企业股票回报比处于最低五分位企业的股票回报高出0.12%。供应链解决方案每增加一个标准差，股票回报增加0.08%，在解决方案为正的观察子样本中则增加至0.29%。探索性分析显示，供应链风险对股票回报的影响对于较小企业而言明显大于较大企业。此外，当有证据表明较大企业的解决方案相关表述仅为修辞时，解决方案对股票回报的影响则减弱。

title: Don’t Count Non-Targeted Seeding Out Just Yet
abstract: In software markets, the sheer number of available applications makes it rather challenging for any given new one to stand out and be noticed by consumers. Moreover, a push towards privacy by regulators and consumers is making it harder to target consumers. As such, firms have to rely on more non-targeted go-to-market strategies. We explore two popular strategies through which developers can catalyze adoption by helping consumers directly or indirectly learn the value of their products— seeding (free full-feature product giveaways to a subset of the consumer base) and time-limited freemium ( TLF ). Seeding, as a business strategy, existed for a long time. On the other hand, the feasibility to offer market-wide TLF became mainstream more recently, with the advent of the Internet and a plethora of digital tools. Thus, a natural question emerges—if TLF represents nowadays a feasible and easily implementable strategy for software applications, has seeding approach been rendered irrelevant in these markets? In this study, we provide managerial recommendations on when each of these strategies with a free full-feature-consumption component is optimal, based on social and self-learning dynamics, consumer priors, adoption costs, and individual product value depreciation. To that end, under a multi-period parsimonious unifying framework, we show that <mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>S</mml:mi> </mml:math> becomes dominated as free trials enter the picture. We identify two specific market factors that, when present, can induce seeding to be optimal when consumers initially underestimate true product value—(i) user adoption costs and/or (ii) individual depreciation of value by usage. Moreover, we show that these two factors have a moderating effect on the impact of word-of-mouth (WOM) effects on the optimality of seeding. In the absence of these factors, stronger WOM effects alone cannot give seeding an edge against the other business strategies. However, once either depreciation or adoption costs are accounted for, strong WOM effects increase the relevance of seeding (enlarging its optimality region in the parameter space). Our results remain qualitatively consistent under a battery of robustness checks.
title_cn: 不要急于排除非目标播种。
abstract_cn: 在软件市场中，数量庞大的可用应用程序使得任何新的应用程序都很难脱颖而出，吸引消费者的注意。此外，监管机构和消费者对隐私的重视使得精准锁定消费者变得更加困难。因此，企业不得不依赖更多非针对性的市场推广策略。我们探讨了两种开发者可以通过直接或间接帮助消费者了解其产品价值来促进采用的流行策略——种子策略（向一部分消费者免费提供全功能产品）和限时免费增值策略（TLF）。种子策略作为一种商业策略已经存在很长时间。另一方面，随着互联网的出现和数字工具的丰富，市场范围内提供TLF的可行性近期才日益普及。因此，一个自然的问题随之而来——如果TLF如今确实是一种可行且易于实施的策略，种子策略在这些市场中是否变得无关紧要？在本研究中，我们提供了管理建议，以确定在何种情况下这两种具有免费全功能消费组件的策略最为理想，基于社交和自我学习动态、消费者的先验知识、采用成本以及单一产品价值的贬值。为此，在一个多期精简的统一框架下，我们展示了随着免费试用的引入，种子策略（<mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" display="inline" overflow="scroll"> <mml:mi>S</mml:mi> </mml:math>）变得被其他策略所主导。我们识别了两个特定的市场因素，当这些因素存在时，可以促使种子策略在消费者最初低估产品真实价值的情况下变得最优——（i）用户采用成本和/或（ii）使用导致的个体价值贬值。此外，我们还表明，这两个因素对口碑（WOM）效应对种子策略最优性的影响有调节作用。在没有这些因素的情况下，单靠较强的口碑效应并不能使种子策略在其他商业策略中占据优势。然而，一旦考虑到贬值或采用成本，强烈的口碑效应则增强了种子策略的相关性（扩展了其在参数空间中的最优区域）。我们的结果在一系列稳健性检验中保持了定性一致性。

title: Experiences, Experience Gaps, and the Moderating Role of Technology Co-Development in Biotech–Pharma Partnerships
abstract: In the life sciences industry, pharmaceutical firms often collaborate with biotechnology firms to access technological expertise and R&D capabilities, enabling them to accelerate innovation and bring products to market more effectively. In this study, we examine the collaboration experiences of biotechnology startups and pharmaceutical firms in 287 biotech–pharma partnerships and analyze how firms’ experience impacts the likelihood of product commercialization. Experience is defined as the number of times each firm has participated in supply-based activities in biotech–pharma partnerships. We also conjecture that products developed through biotech–pharma partnerships are more likely to progress toward commercialization if both firms have similar levels of experience. However, when the partnering firms’ experience gap increases and they collaborate to develop the product jointly, we expect progress toward commercialization to become less likely. Our results show that both the biotechnology startup's experience and the pharmaceutical firm's experience increase the likelihood of progression toward commercialization. Our results also confirm that co-development moderates the relationship between experience gaps and the progression toward commercialization. Based on our findings, partnering experience and experience gaps are critical considerations as pharmaceutical firms engage in co-development projects with biotechnology startups. By focusing on partnering experience, our study contributes to the technology management literature and research on interfirm partnerships, specifically, in the biotechnology and pharmaceutical industries.
title_cn: 经历、经验差距与技术共同开发在生物技术与制药合作中的调节作用
abstract_cn: 在生命科学行业中，制药公司通常与生物技术公司合作，以获取技术专长和研发能力，从而加速创新并更有效地将产品推向市场。在本研究中，我们考察了287个生物技术与制药公司合作伙伴关系中的生物技术初创企业与制药公司的合作经验，并分析了公司的经验如何影响产品商业化的可能性。经验被定义为每家公司在生物技术与制药伙伴关系中参与供给活动的次数。我们还推测，如果两家公司具有相似的经验水平，通过生物技术与制药伙伴关系开发的产品更有可能向商业化推进。然而，当合作公司之间的经验差距增大，并且它们共同合作开发产品时，我们预计向商业化的进展可能性会降低。我们的结果表明，无论是生物技术初创企业的经验还是制药公司的经验，都增加了向商业化进展的可能性。我们的结果还确认，共同开发对经验差距与向商业化进展之间的关系起到调节作用。基于我们的研究结果，合作经验和经验差距是制药公司在与生物技术初创企业进行共同开发项目时的重要考量因素。通过关注合作经验，我们的研究对技术管理文献及跨公司伙伴关系研究，特别是在生物技术和制药行业，做出了贡献。

title: Impact of Server Capability on Pooling Configuration in Stochastic Service Systems
abstract: Resource pooling is often introduced in service systems to cope with the variability in customer demand. The primary motivation behind creating a more flexible system is to utilize resources efficiently—namely, assigning customers whose dedicated resources are fully occupied to available non-dedicated resources (referred to as off-service placement). In such a setup, the service system manager expects to serve more customers within a fixed timeframe. However, recent empirical evidence shows that, due to limited server capability, the service time at non-dedicated providers can be significantly longer than that at dedicated ones. In this study, we develop a two-server stochastic model to examine how server capability levels and other factors—such as overall workload and demand asymmetry—affect pooling configurations. We derive conditions that specify the optimal system flexibility configuration across these parameters. Our findings reveal that a partially flexible system can outperform a fully flexible one, particularly in asymmetric scenarios with low server capability. This advantage is also pronounced when considering a range of system costs, including server capability, cross-serving, and other related costs in stochastic service systems with and without buffers. These insights from our two-server model offer guidance on designing more efficient flexibility in complex multi-class, multi-server service systems.
title_cn: 服务器能力对随机服务系统中资源池配置的影响
abstract_cn: 资源共享通常在服务系统中引入，以应对客户需求的波动。创建更灵活系统的主要动机是高效利用资源——即将那些专用资源已被完全占用的客户分配到可用的非专用资源（称为离线服务安置）。在这种设置中，服务系统管理者期望在固定时间内服务更多客户。然而，最近的实证证据表明，由于服务器能力有限，非专用提供者的服务时间可能显著长于专用提供者。在本研究中，我们开发了一个双服务器随机模型，以考察服务器能力水平及其他因素（如整体工作负载和需求不对称）如何影响资源共享配置。我们推导出在这些参数下最优系统灵活性配置的条件。我们的研究结果表明，在服务器能力较低的非对称场景中，部分灵活系统的表现优于完全灵活系统。当考虑到一系列系统成本，包括服务器能力、交叉服务及其他相关成本时，这一优势尤为明显，适用于有缓冲区和无缓冲区的随机服务系统。我们双服务器模型的这些见解为设计更高效的灵活性提供了指导，适用于复杂的多类、多服务器服务系统。

title: How Do Investors React to Supplier Exploitation? Event Study and Experimental Evidence
abstract: ABSTRACT Supplier exploitation, including financial squeezing, payment delays, and non‐contractual demands, is a pervasive form of corporate misconduct. This multi‐method study examines how investors interpret supplier exploitation amid competing ethical and financial considerations. Using an event study of 233 enforcement actions by the Korea Fair Trade Commission (KFTC), we find a significant negative investor reaction, with firms losing an average of 1.24% in market value. This negative market reaction is stronger for firms receiving greater media attention but weaker for more profitable buyers. To explore the underlying behavioral mechanisms, we conduct an incentivized vignette experiment with experienced investors. The experiment reveals that anticipated public moral judgment (viewing exploitation as wrongful) and profit‐driven considerations (viewing exploitation as rational misconduct) jointly shape investor reactions. Specifically, buyer profitability tips the balance by reducing the weight placed on moral concerns while increasing the emphasis on financial considerations. Supplemented by practitioner interviews, this study provides novel evidence on the overall negative, yet complex economic consequences of supplier exploitation.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 投资者如何应对供应商剥削？事件研究与实验证据
abstract_cn: 摘要 供应商剥削，包括财政压榨、延迟付款和非合同要求，是一种普遍存在的企业不当行为。本研究采用多种方法，考察了投资者在面对竞争的伦理和财务考量时如何解读供应商剥削。通过对韩国公平贸易委员会（KFTC）233起执法行动的事件研究，我们发现投资者反应显著负面，企业的市场价值平均损失1.24%。这种负面市场反应在媒体关注度较高的企业中更为强烈，而在更盈利的买方中则较弱。为探讨潜在的行为机制，我们与经验丰富的投资者进行了激励性情境实验。实验表明，预期的公共道德判断（将剥削视为错误）和基于利润的考虑（将剥削视为合理的不当行为）共同形塑了投资者的反应。具体而言，买方的盈利能力通过降低对道德问题的重视，增加了对财务考量的强调，从而影响了整体判断。通过补充专家访谈，这项研究提供了关于供应商剥削整体负面且复杂经济后果的新证据。

title: Technology Development Outsourcing: When to Join Forces With a Rival?
abstract: ABSTRACT Knowing the challenges of collaborating with a competitor in developing new technologies, firms sometimes still choose a competitor instead of a noncompeting technology provider. To explore why, this study adopts an inter‐organizational trust view to explain the formation of a technology development outsourcing relationship. Using a vignette‐based experiment with procurement managers, results show how three product‐ and competitor‐related factors: product newness, competitor market size, and product substitutability, affect a purchasing manager's intention to choose a competitor. The post hoc analysis confirms the two sources of inter‐organizational trust, competence and integrity, in explaining the influences of the three factors. Using results from two waves of interviews, a behavioral experiment and a rational agent math model, this study explains competitor selection behaviors in a triadic context with a noncompeting provider as the default option. Contributing to the interface of technology outsourcing, co‐opetition in innovation, and supplier selection literature, these findings can help managers assess product and competitor attributes in deciding whether to collaborate with a competitor in a technology development outsourcing context.
title_cn: 技术开发外包：何时与竞争对手联手？
abstract_cn: 摘要 了解与竞争对手合作开发新技术所面临的挑战，公司有时仍会选择与竞争对手合作，而不是与非竞争性的技术提供者进行合作。为了探讨这一现象，本研究采用了跨组织信任的视角，解释技术开发外包关系的形成。通过对采购经理进行基于情境的实验，结果显示，三种与产品和竞争对手相关的因素：产品新颖性、竞争对手市场规模和产品可替代性，影响采购经理选择竞争对手的意图。事后分析确认了跨组织信任的两种来源，能力和诚信，在解释这三种因素的影响时发挥了作用。通过对两轮访谈、行为实验和理性代理数学模型的结果进行分析，本研究在将非竞争提供者视为默认选项的三方情境中解释了竞争对手选择行为。这些发现对技术外包、创新中的合作竞争以及供应商选择文献的交汇处做出了贡献，能够帮助管理者评估产品及竞争对手的属性，从而决定是否在技术开发外包中与竞争对手合作。

title: JOM Forum: Theory Testing Is Theory Generation
abstract: In this paper, we propose that theory-testing research offers just as much potential for generating theory as theory-building and theory-elaborating research, the two variants typically associated with theory generation (Ketokivi and Choi 2014; Lee et al. 1999). Responding to Bendoly and Oliva's (2025) call for searching meaningful theoretical pathways for research contributions, we suggest that theory-testing research has always constituted a meaningful pathway to theoretical contributions when it extends beyond merely applying theory to challenging, expanding, and elaborating it. These extensions can lead to significant adjustments in bodies of knowledge over time as research programs progress. To understand the generative aspect of theory testing, we must distinguish it from theory application. When we apply theory, the objective is usually to address a practical problem, without the interest of contributing to an ongoing theoretical conversation. In empirical operations management (OM) research, the application of factory physics offers an illustrative example: Researchers apply concepts such as Little's Law and laws of variability to improve factory productivity (Schmenner and Swink 1998). In this context, theory consists of the relevant applicable laws that are treated as given, which makes theory effectively axiomatic from an epistemological point of view (Popper 1935/2005, 51).1 In stark contrast to theory application, the fundamental idea in theory-testing research is to place the theory itself under empirical scrutiny. Accordingly, theory is no longer treated as self-evident and certain but propositional and conjectural, subject to revisions (Lakatos 1970; Popper 1963). As an example of theory-testing research, consider Williamson's (1971) question “Why do firms integrate vertically?” This question gave birth to transaction cost economics (TCE), one of the most influential and established research programs on organizational boundaries (Santos and Eisenhardt 2005). The theoretical essence of TCE is succinctly captured by the discriminating alignment hypothesis: “Transactions, which differ in their attributes, are aligned with governance structures, which differ in their costs and competencies, in a discriminating (mainly transaction cost economizing) way” (Williamson 1996, 46–47). Importantly, this statement is not meant as axiomatic but conjectural, as the word ‘hypothesis’ implies: Whether actual governance decisions align transactions and governance structures in a “mainly transaction cost economizing way” is to be settled empirically. Consider Walker and Weber's (1984) seminal TCE-based study that examined the make-or-buy decision in the final assembly of automobiles. TCE-as-conjecture becomes salient in the discussion section where several TCE's central propositions are called into question based on the empirical analysis. For example, the finding that “the effect of transaction costs on make-or-buy decisions was substantially overshadowed by comparative production costs” (Walker and Weber 1984, 387) is inconsistent with TCE's original central proposition that transactions will be aligned with governance structures in “mainly transaction cost economizing” (Williamson 1996, 47, emphasis added) way. When the qualifier “mainly” is interpreted as conjectural and malleable, empirical research not only tests but also informs theory. Walker and Weber's (1984) findings suggest that while transaction costs are relevant, they constitute only a portion of total costs, which are decisive in make-or-buy decisions. Such findings, and many others, have expanded TCE's focus over time from transaction costs to total costs. Another more recent development is that instead of focusing on costs, researchers have incorporated the revenue side into the comparative analysis as well (Ketokivi and Mahoney 2020). More generally, reviews of empirical TCE literature (e.g., Macher and Richman 2008) demonstrate how TCE as a theory has developed significantly over time, mainly through the broadening of its scope. TCE illustrates a general and essential characteristic of theory-testing research: When theory is taken as conjectural, testing theory also generates theory through marginal adjustments. Such adjustments link individual theory-testing research efforts to a broader theoretical conversation and, consequently, enable the accumulation of theoretical knowledge and theory progress. We do not witness similar accumulation in knowledge communities where theories are merely applied.2 Theory-testing research is often described as hypothetico-deductive (Mantere and Ketokivi 2013). We submit that the label “deductive” is accurate for theory application but inaccurate for theory testing; for the latter, the descriptively accurate term is hypothetico-abductive. In this section, we seek to establish this by comparing reasoning in theory testing versus theory application. To understand the role of abduction, we need to distinguish between two central reasoning tasks in theory-testing research: connecting theoretical and observational statements (the theorist's concern) and connecting observational statements with data (the statistician's concern) (Meehl 1990, 116). The statistician's concern is comparatively straightforward, and there is no difference between theory application and theory testing: The statistician's concern is addressed using the established tools of statistical inference, that is, a combination of deductive and inductive reasoning. Differences are found in how the researcher addresses the theorist's concern (Figure 1). In theory application, the theorist's concern is methodologically comparatively simpler. When theory is merely applied, there is no feedback arrow from observational predictions to theory. Furthermore, if theory consists of empirically salient concepts, observational predictions can be deduced from the theoretical foundation (Schmenner and Swink 1998)—hence the term hypothetico-deductive. The case of theory testing is comparatively more complex, as adjustments to theoretical conjectures do not follow a deductive, computational logic (Mantere and Ketokivi 2013). Rather, adjustments are iterative steps of abductive inferences which adjust conjectures based on often surprising findings (Peirce 1877). As an example, let us revisit TCE's discriminating alignment hypothesis. Its central terms (e.g., transaction, governance structure, competence) are theoretical and must be translated from the language of theory into the language of empirical observation. Given that translation involves several possible, non-obvious interpretations (Quine 1951), the reasoning process cannot possibly be deductive. Similarly, since translation does not involve generalization of any kind, it cannot be inductive either. The only remaining form of reasoning is abduction, which is indeed the reasoning tool by which theory-testing researchers bridge the theoretical to the empirical. The abductive translation process is generative because it creates new meaning for theoretical concepts (Gadamer 1975). In their make-or-buy study, Walker and Weber (1984) translated TCE's general concept of uncertainty into volume uncertainty and further into unpredictable fluctuations in demand for components in automobile final assembly. This translation created specific and contextualized—in a word, new—meaning for the concept of uncertainty. The other complicating factor has to do with the feedback arrow to theory (Figure 1). Specifically, testing hypotheses is ultimately a means to the end of testing theoretical conjectures. Empirical evidence that is consistent with the hypothesis constitutes an instance of positive corroboration, whereas inconsistency means negative corroboration (Popper 1935/2005, 264–266). Both kinds not only inform theory but may also lead to adjustments and elaborations. The feedback arrow to theory makes the reasoning process in theory-testing significantly more complex than in theory-application research because it involves the use of modus tollens.3 The use of modus tollens becomes particularly complex in the case of negative corroboration: What conclusions do we draw about theory if the evidence is inconsistent with a theoretical prediction? In his seminal contribution to the literature on theory testing, Lakatos (1970, 133) maintained that in the case of negative corroboration, we are not permitted to direct the modus tollens to the “hard core” of the theory but to its “protective belt” (i.e., measurement issues, data quality, contextual issues, and other problems or oversights that might have given rise to the failed prediction). This is particularly relevant when the theory under scrutiny has amassed a high degree of positive corroboration from past research, or, as Meehl (1990, 108) put it, has “money in the bank.” To suggest that all this money would be forfeited based on just one instance of negative corroboration is both unreasonable and methodologically dubious: There are no defensible methodological principles that permit us to immediately direct the modus tollens to the hard core of the theory. Reasoning about corroboration is an abductive process. The specific form of abduction used in back-translating the empirical to the theoretical differs from the abduction used in translating the theoretical to the empirical; consistent with Bendoly and Oliva's (2025, 7) terminology, we label these “abduction a posteriori” and “abduction a priori,” respectively.4 Understanding how theory testing is theory generation hinges specifically on understanding these two variants of abduction. The connection from abduction to theory generation stems from the fact that abduction is the only form of reasoning that allows the introduction of new ideas in the conclusion of a reasoning process (Locke et al. 2008). Bendoly and Oliva's (2025, 7) observation that abduction is a form of sensemaking offers a useful starting point for establishing that theory testing generates theory. Because both the practices and the objectives of our sensemaking are diverse (Weick 1995), so are the forms of abduction: some forms are selective, others creative; some are theoretical, others empirical; some are explanatory, others non-explanatory; some incorporate only observables while others include unobservables; and so on. title_cn: JOM 论坛：理论检验即理论生成
abstract_cn: 在本文中，我们提出理论测试研究在生成理论方面的潜力与理论构建和理论扩展研究相当，这两种变体通常与理论生成相关联（Ketokivi和Choi 2014；Lee等，1999）。我们回应Bendoly和Oliva（2025）对寻找研究贡献的有意义理论路径的呼吁，建议理论测试研究一直是通向理论贡献的一条有意义的路径，尤其是在它不仅仅是应用理论，而是对其进行挑战、扩展和详细阐述时。这些扩展随着研究计划的发展，可能导致知识体系的重大调整。要理解理论测试的创造性方面，我们必须将其与理论应用区分开来。当我们应用理论时，目标通常是解决一个实际问题，而不是为正在进行的理论讨论做出贡献。在经验性的运营管理（OM）研究中，工厂物理学的应用提供了一个说明性案例：研究人员应用例如Little's Law和变异法则等概念，以提高工厂的生产力（Schmenner和Swink 1998）。在这一背景下，理论包含相关适用法则，这些法则被视为既定事实，从认识论的角度来看，使理论在本质上是公理性的（Popper 1935/2005，51）。与理论应用截然相反，理论测试研究中的根本思想是将理论本身置于经验审视之下。因此，理论不再被视为显而易见和确定的，而是命题性和推测性的，需进行修正（Lakatos 1970；Popper 1963）。作为理论测试研究的一个例子，考虑Williamson（1971）提出的“为什么企业要垂直整合？”这一问题。这一问题催生了交易成本经济学（TCE），这是关于组织边界最具影响力且成熟的研究计划之一（Santos和Eisenhardt 2005）。TCE的理论核心通过选择性对齐假设得到了简洁的定义：“不同属性的交易与不同成本和能力的治理结构以选择性（主要是经济化交易成本的方式）对齐”（Williamson 1996，46-47）。重要的是，这一陈述并没有被视作公理性的，而是推测性的，正如“假设”一词所暗示的那样：实际的治理决策是否以“主要是交易成本经济的方式”对齐交易和治理结构，需要通过实证来决定。考虑Walker和Weber（1984）开创性的基于TCE的研究，该研究考察了汽车最终组装中的自制或购买决策。TCE作为推测在讨论部分变得非常重要，其中根据实证分析对TCE的几个核心命题提出了质疑。例如，“交易成本对自制或购买决策的影响，被比较生产成本所大幅遮蔽”（Walker和Weber 1984，387）的发现与TCE原始的核心命题，即交易将在“主要是交易成本经济的方式”下与治理结构对齐（Williamson 1996，47，强调添加）是不一致的。当“主要”这一限定词被理解为推测性和可塑性时，经验研究不仅测试了理论，还为理论提供了信息。Walker和Weber（1984）的发现表明，尽管交易成本是相关的，但它们只占总成本的一部分，而总成本在自制或购买决策中是决定性的。这种发现和许多其他发现，随着时间的推移，将TCE的重点从交易成本扩展到了总成本。另一个更近期的发展是，研究人员开始将收入方面纳入比较分析，而不仅仅关注成本（Ketokivi和Mahoney 2020）。更一般地说，经验TCE文献的综述显示，TCE作为一种理论随着时间的推移发生了显著的发展，主要是通过其范围的扩展。TCE展示了理论测试研究的一个普遍且重要的特征：当理论被视为推测时，测试理论也通过边际调整产生理论。这些调整将个体的理论测试研究努力与更广泛的理论对话联系起来，从而使理论知识的积累和理论的进步成为可能。在仅仅应用理论的知识共同体中，我们并未观察到类似的知识积累。理论测试研究常常被描述为假设演绎式（Mantere和Ketokivi 2013）。我们认为“演绎”这一标签对理论应用是准确的，但对理论测试则不准确；后者的描述性准确术语是假设演绎-归纳。在本节中，我们通过比较理论测试与理论应用中的推理来建立这一点。要理解归纳的角色，我们需要区分理论测试研究中的两个核心推理任务：连接理论陈述和观察性陈述（理论家的关注）以及连接观察性陈述与数据（统计学家的关注）（Meehl 1990，116）。统计学家的关注相对简单，理论应用与理论测试之间没有区别：统计学家的关注使用统计推理的既定工具来解决，即演绎和归纳推理的结合。在研究者处理理论家的关注时发现差异（图1）。在理论应用中，理论家的关注在方法论上相对简单。当理论仅仅被应用时，从观察预测到理论没有反馈箭头。此外，如果理论由实验体现的重要概念构成，可以根据理论基础推导出观察预测（Schmenner和Swink 1998）——因此称为假设演绎。理论测试的情况相对复杂，因为对理论推测的调整并不遵循演绎的计算逻辑（Mantere和Ketokivi 2013）。相反，调整是基于通常令人惊讶的发现的归纳推理的迭代步骤（Peirce 1877）。例如，让我们回顾TCE的选择性对齐假设。其中心术语（例如交易、治理结构、能力）是理论性的，必须从理论的语言翻译为实证观察的语言。考虑到翻译涉及若干可能的非明显解释（Quine 1951），推理过程显然不可能是演绎性的。同样，翻译既不涉及任何形式的概括，因此也无法是归纳的。最后剩下的推理形式是归纳，这是理论测试研究人员将理论与经验之间架起桥梁的推理工具。归纳翻译过程是生成性的，因为它为理论概念创造了新的意义（Gadamer 1975）。在他们的自制或购买研究中，Walker和Weber（1984）将TCE的普遍概念不确定性翻译为产量不确定性，进一步转化为汽车最终组装中部件需求的不可预测波动。这一翻译为不确定性的概念创造了具体且有上下文的——换句话说，是新的——意义。另一个复杂因素与反馈箭头指向理论有关（图1）。具体而言，测试假设最终是为了测试理论推测的目的。与假设一致的经验证据构成了积极证实的实例，而不一致则意味着消极证实（Popper 1935/2005，264-266）。这两种情况不仅为理论提供信息，而且可能导致调整和扩展。反馈箭头指向理论使理论测试中的推理过程比理论应用研究复杂得多，因为它涉及使用逆向推理。逆向推理在消极证实的情况下变得特别复杂：如果证据与理论预测不一致，我们如何得出关于理论的结论？Lakatos（1970，133）在理论测试文献中的开创性贡献中主张，在消极证实的情况下，我们不应将逆向推理指向理论的“核心”，而是指向其“保护带”（即测量问题、数据质量、上下文问题以及其他可能导致预测失败的问题或疏忽）。这在被检验的理论已经从以往研究中积累了高程度的积极证实时尤其相关，或者正如Meehl（1990，108）所言，已经“有存款”。仅凭一次消极证实就建议将所有这些存款都放弃是既不合理又在方法论上令人怀疑：没有可辩护的方法论原则允许我们立即将逆向推理指向理论的核心。关于证实的推理是一个归纳过程。在将经验翻译回理论的过程中使用的归纳的具体形式与将理论翻译为经验时使用的归纳不同；根据Bendoly和Oliva（2025，7）的术语，我们将这些分别称为“事后归纳”和“事前归纳”。理解理论测试如何是理论生成的关键在于理解这两种归纳变体。归纳与理论生成之间的联系源于归纳是唯一一种允许在推理过程的结论中引入新思想的推理形式（Locke等，2008）。Bendoly和Oliva（2025，7）观察到，归纳是一种意义构建，这为确认理论测试能够生成理论提供了有用的起点。因为我们意义构建的实践和目标是多样的（Weick 1995），因此归纳的形式也是多样的：某些形式是选择性的，其他形式是创造性的；有些是理论性的，其他是经验性的；有些是解释性的，其他则非解释性的；某些相对仅包含可观察的内容，而其他则包括不可观察的内容；等等。考虑到归纳有字面意义上的数十种变体（Hoffmann 2011），我们必须关注具体形式的使用。通过这两种理论测试的推测性理论，在这个背景下，Walker和Weber（1984）研究了自制或购买决策中的角色。这是一个基于TCE的案例，实际上了一个涉及理论的假设，通过对理论的影响进行观察和分析。需要指出的是，理论的假设不仅在理论中被利用，还与对生产过程的具体影响相关。理论的假设不仅被应用于TCE中，还影响了对生产中涉及交易的不确定性等因素的比较分析。在这种上下文中，归纳推理的角色更为重要，因为它不仅达成了具体的信息联结，还引导了我们进行理论发展。整体而言，理论测试中的产生性使得理论测试不仅能够直接影响理论有关的领域，也能在多样的研究背景下实现理论的发展。这一点在本研究中尤为重要，因为研究人员可以通过将理论推测与经验分析结合，从而展开更具实质性的讨论。在理论测试的过程中，研究人员能够在理论上获得必要的反馈，这不仅允许对理论进行必要的校正，也使得研究人员能够进行更深入的讨论并得出更有力的结论。这个过程中归纳推理不仅成就了理论测试的实施，还推动了理论的发展。

title: Empirical Analyses Using Secondary Supply Chain Data
abstract: ABSTRACT The increasing availability of secondary data on supply chain relationships has created new opportunities for empirical research in supply chain management. Datasets from sources including Bloomberg SPLC, FactSet, and CompuStat may support empirical analyses of decision‐making, strategic behaviors, governance mechanisms, and dynamics of inter‐organizational relationships of supply chains. However, the complexity and interconnectedness of supply chains and the inconsistent quality and coverage of supply chain data sources present empirical challenges, which have limited the scope and depth of current empirical research on supply chains. To address these challenges, this study investigates and compares the three commonly used supply chain databases and introduces a data‐focused roadmap for supply chain research using secondary data sources. This roadmap presents a process featuring data source selection, unit‐of‐analysis decisions, and appropriate econometric treatments, for example, endogeneity, selection bias, and correlated errors in supply chains, which contributes to the supply chain management literature by improving consistency, generalizability, and reliability in empirical supply chain research.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 使用次级供应链数据的实证分析
abstract_cn: 摘要 随着供应链关系的二次数据日益可用，为供应链管理的实证研究创造了新的机会。来自包括彭博SPLC、FactSet和CompuStat等来源的数据集可以支持对决策、战略行为、治理机制和供应链间关系动态的实证分析。然而，供应链的复杂性和相互关联性，以及供应链数据来源的不一致质量和覆盖面，给实证研究带来了挑战，这限制了当前供应链实证研究的范围和深度。为了解决这些挑战，本研究调查并比较了三种常用的供应链数据库，并提出了一个以数据为重点的供应链研究路线图，使用二次数据来源。这个路线图展示了一个包含数据源选择、分析单位决策和适当计量经济学处理（例如，内生性、选择偏差和相关误差）的过程，有助于提升供应链管理文献的连贯性、可推广性和实证研究的可靠性。

title: Decision Threshold Setting in Binary Classification Problems—A Behavioral Lens
abstract: ABSTRACT When binary classification models are wrong, managers face misclassification costs. Although false positive outcomes imply unnecessary mitigation efforts, false negative outcomes imply overlooking the class of interest. Humans calibrate these ai models supporting operational systems by adjusting the decision threshold that translates prediction probability into either class. Results of our controlled laboratory experiment show that, despite all relevant information being available, decision makers systematically deviate from the optimal cost‐efficient threshold. We observe a significant interaction effect of class and cost imbalance on this deviation, which increases in high‐stakes settings where more extreme thresholds are optimal. When unit costs are different, we find that participants anchor on the threshold where expected misclassification costs for false alarms and missed hits are equal, whereas mean anchoring cannot explain the pull‐to‐center behavior sufficiently. Surprisingly, we confirm that this impulse balance equilibrium also serves as attractive anchor in our setting, where decisions are made ex ante without loss aversion. To debias decision makers, simulated responses with behavior‐aware costs show that subjects are nudged to make choices closer to the optimum. Managers should be aware of this boundedly rational behavior and complementary debiasing techniques, as sub‐optimal threshold setting results in 53% higher misclassification costs, on average.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 二元分类问题中的决策阈值设定——一种行为视角
abstract_cn: 摘要 当二元分类模型出现错误时，管理者面临着误分类带来的成本。尽管假阳性结果意味着不必要的减轻努力，但假阴性结果则意味着忽视了关注的类别。人类通过调整决策阈值来校准这些支持操作系统的人工智能模型，将预测概率转化为任一类别。我们的控制实验结果表明，尽管所有相关信息均可获取，决策者依然系统性地偏离了最佳成本效率阈值。我们观察到类别和成本失衡对这一偏差有显著的交互效应，尤其在高风险环境中，这种偏差会加剧，因为在此情况下，更极端的阈值是最优的。当单位成本不同时，我们发现参与者会以预期的假警报和漏报的误分类成本相等的阈值为锚，而均值锚定并不能充分解释向中间拉拽的行为。令人惊讶的是，我们确认这种冲动平衡的均衡在我们设置中也作为一种吸引锚点存在，在这里决策是在没有损失厌恶的情况下事先做出的。为了消除决策者的偏见，模拟响应结合了行为意识成本，显示受试者被引导做出更接近最优选择的决策。管理者应意识到这种有限理性行为及其补充的去偏见技术，因为次优的阈值设置平均导致53%的更高误分类成本。

title: When Yes Is a No: Navigating the Façade of Conformity in Continuous Improvement
abstract: ABSTRACT Continuous Improvement (CI) initiatives are central to operational excellence, emphasizing bottom‐up, team‐based problem‐solving. In practice, however, they are embedded within hierarchical systems that require managerial oversight. This duality introduces a structural tension between empowerment and control, giving rise to a behavioral dynamic that we conceptualize as the façade of conformity (FC) in CI, a defensive impression‐management behavior where team members outwardly express agreement with CI decisions while privately withholding dissent. We argue that FC in CI affects operational performance. We further theorize that collective team identification (CTI), a shared sense of belonging and commitment to goals, moderates this negative relationship. We test our theory in two complementary studies: a laboratory experiment involving 71 teams (284 participants) simulating ad‐hoc CI, and a field study of 330 structured CI projects within a large financial services firm. Across both settings, we find that FC has a negative impact on operational performance, while a strong CTI mitigates this effect. We conduct extensive robustness and supplementary analyses to validate our results. This research contributes to behavioral operations and continuous improvement bodies of knowledge by introducing FC in CI as a distinct behavioral failure mode and identifying CTI as a boundary condition, providing managers with guidance on recognizing and addressing FC to safeguard CI efforts and investments.
title_cn: 当是变成否：在持续改进中驾驭顺应的表象
abstract_cn: 摘要 持续改进（CI）倡议是实现运营卓越的核心，强调从基层出发的团队问题解决。然而，在实际操作中，这些倡议嵌入在需要管理监督的等级体系中。这种二元性在赋权与控制之间引入了结构性张力，形成了一种我们将其概念化为持续改进中的从众表象（FC）的行为动态。这是一种防御性的印象管理行为，团队成员在表面上对CI决策表示赞同，但在私下却保留异议。我们认为，CI中的FC对运营绩效有影响。我们进一步理论化集体团队认同（CTI）——对目标的共同归属感和承诺，调节这一负面关系。我们在两个互补的研究中测试我们的理论：一是涉及71个团队（284名参与者）的实验室实验，模拟临时CI；二是对一家大型金融服务公司330个结构化CI项目的实地研究。在这两种环境中，我们发现FC对运营绩效产生负面影响，而强烈的CTI则能减轻这一影响。我们进行广泛的稳健性和补充分析，以验证我们的结果。本研究通过将CI中的FC引入作为一种独特的行为失效模式，并识别CTI作为边界条件，为行为运营和持续改进的知识体系做出了贡献，为管理者提供了识别和应对FC的指导，以保护CI的努力和投资。

title: Political Signaling via Equity Ownership: Impacts on Supplier Financial Performance
abstract: ABSTRACT This study offers a new application of signaling theory to better understand the role of equity linkages and political influence on buyer–supplier relationships (BSRs). We examine the signaling effects of a politician's personal equity investment in a buyer firm on the financial performance of the supplier firms located in the politician's constituency, that is, “constituent suppliers.” Our results show that constituent suppliers' financial performance increases with the home politician ownership of their principal buyers, consistent with home politicians' incentives to benefit their constituencies and gain the support of local voters through promoting supplier–buyer relationships. Interestingly, such positive signaling effects on the financial performances of constituent suppliers vary with interdependence relationships between the home politician, investee buyer, and constituent supplier. The positive performance effect is stronger when investee buyers have greater political engagement, when politician owners hold more powerful congressional positions, and when the economic condition of the politician's constituency is poorer. In contrast, the positive performance effect is attenuated when buyers have higher economic dependence and switching costs vis‐à‐vis their suppliers. Our mechanism analyses reveal that the likelihood of increased sales as well as lowered operating and sales support costs partially mediate the relationship between supplier financial performance and home politician ownership in buyers, representing investee buyers' munificence. The investee buyers are also more likely to select firms located in their politician shareholders' constituencies as new suppliers, another mechanism of promoting business relationships with constituent firms. We further find that buyers with politician shareholders from their suppliers' constituencies receive more valuable government contract awards, and smaller firms exhibit significant performance gains. A series of endogeneity checks based on exogenous shocks and alternative measures highlight the robustness of our results. Our findings suggest that politicians' stock ownership in buyer firms signals secondary stakeholder influence and information sharing that shapes BSRs, promoting profitable business relationships for constituent suppliers.
title_cn: 通过股权拥有进行政治信号传递：对供应商财务表现的影响
abstract_cn: 摘要 本研究提出了一种信号理论的新应用，以更好地理解股权联结和政治影响在买方-供应商关系（BSRs）中的作用。我们考察了政客个人在买方公司的股权投资对位于政客选区内的供应商公司的财务表现的信号效应，即“选区供应商”。我们的结果表明，选区供应商的财务表现随着其主要买家的本地政客持股比例的增加而提高，这与本地政客为了惠及其选区并通过促进供应商-买方关系获得当地选民支持的动机一致。有趣的是，这种对选区供应商财务表现的积极信号效应在本地政客、投资买方和选区供应商之间的相互依存关系中有所不同。当投资买方具有更强的政治参与度、政客所有者拥有更强大的国会职务，以及当政客选区的经济状况较差时，积极的表现效应更为显著。相反，当买方对其供应商的经济依赖度和转换成本较高时，积极的表现效应则会减弱。我们的机制分析表明，销售增长的可能性以及运营和销售支持成本的降低部分中介了供应商财务表现与买方中政客所有权之间的关系，体现了投资买方的慷慨。投资买方也更有可能选择位于其政客股东选区内的公司作为新供应商，这是促进与选区公司业务关系的另一机制。我们进一步发现，拥有来自其供应商选区的政客股东的买方更容易获得更有价值的政府合同奖励，而较小的公司则表现出显著的业绩提升。基于外生冲击和替代指标的一系列内生性检验突显了我们结果的稳健性。我们的发现表明，政客在买方公司中的股票所有权发出次要利益相关者影响和信息共享的信号，这塑造了买方-供应商关系，促进了选区供应商的盈利性商业关系。

title: Supply Chain Guardianship: Why Some Firms Intervene When Other Firms Commit Fraud
abstract: ABSTRACT In supply chains, firms often become aware of illegal actions committed by their partners, prompting the critical question: when and why do those who know become those who act? Drawing on industry examples of supply chain fraud, we introduce the concept of supply chain guardianship to study how firms respond to potential fraud committed by their supply chain partners. We identify key influences on supply chain guardianship and refine these insights into hypotheses, which we test across four behavioral experiments ( n = 1000). Study A finds that the tone at the top of an organization can promote supply chain guardianship and that state moral disengagement is negatively correlated with it. Study B manipulates process moral disengagement and finds that it reduces guardianship behavior. Although the network position of the supply chain guardian emerges as important in industry examples, we do not find a significant effect in the experiments. We replicate and validate these findings in Studies C and D. This study offers an initial foundation for a behavioral theory of interfirm fraud responses in supply chains and offers practical insights into how firms can increase supply chain guardianship across macro‐, meso‐, and microlevels.
title_cn: 供应链守护：为何一些公司在其他公司犯错时进行干预
abstract_cn: 摘要 在供应链中，企业经常意识到其合作伙伴所犯的非法行为，这引发了一个关键问题：那些知道的人何时以及为何变成采取行动的人？通过分析供应链欺诈的行业案例，我们引入了供应链守护概念，以研究企业如何对其供应链合作伙伴可能实施的欺诈行为做出反应。我们识别了影响供应链守护的关键因素，并将这些见解细化为假设，在四个行为实验中进行了检验（n = 1000）。研究A发现，组织的高层语气能够促进供应链守护，而国家道德脱节与之呈负相关。研究B操控了过程道德脱节，发现它降低了守护行为。尽管在行业案例中，供应链守护者的网络位置显得重要，但在实验中我们没有发现显著的影响。我们在研究C和D中复制并验证了这些发现。本研究为供应链中企业间欺诈反应的行为理论奠定了初步基础，并提供了有关企业如何在宏观、中观和微观层面上增强供应链守护的实用见解。

title: Calling It Quits: A Behavioral Perspective on Exploration and Exploitation in R&D Project Termination
abstract: ABSTRACT Not every R&D project will succeed, necessitating a careful selection of which R&D projects to pursue and which to terminate. Timely termination decisions free up scarce resources for more promising projects. Yet, prior research has yielded inconclusive results on how firms terminate exploratory versus exploitative R&D projects. Given that early‐stage R&D project termination is a decision made under high uncertainty, we adopt a behavioral perspective to reconcile the inconsistent findings. We propose that a firm's preference for terminating exploratory versus exploitative projects depends on three sources of contextual feedback: parallel projects, prior collaboration experience, and firm performance. We test our hypotheses using drug development projects from pharmaceutical firms over 11 years, finding that exploratory projects are less likely to be terminated relative to exploitative ones when the number of parallel projects is limited, when they are conducted with an existing partner, or when firm performance falls below aspiration.
title_cn: 结束的呼唤：研发项目终止中的探索与利用的行为视角
abstract_cn: 摘要 不是每个研发项目都能成功，因此需要仔细选择哪些研发项目应当继续，哪些应当终止。及时的终止决策可以将稀缺资源腾出用于更有前景的项目。然而，先前的研究对于公司如何终止探索性与利用性研发项目的结果并不明确。考虑到早期研发项目的终止是在高度不确定的情况下做出的决策，我们采用行为视角来调和这些不一致的发现。我们提出，企业对终止探索性项目与利用性项目的偏好取决于三种上下文反馈源：平行项目、以往的合作经验以及企业绩效。我们通过对制药公司11年的药物开发项目进行检验，发现当平行项目数量有限、与现有合作伙伴共同进行时，或企业绩效低于期望水平时，探索性项目相较于利用性项目更不可能被终止。

title: Second‐Order Between‐Supplier Learning
abstract: ABSTRACT Substantial empirical evidence shows that suppliers in emerging economies can enhance their technological capabilities through direct learning from technologically advanced foreign competitors. However, suppliers in emerging markets may struggle to learn directly from knowledge about competitors’ products that are not widely available on the consumer market. We draw on insights from existing literature, explorative interviews, and anecdotal evidence to hypothesize that firms may resort to indirect learning channels by leveraging downstream customers as knowledge conduits. Using the Chinese manufacturing industry's import data from 2001 to 2015, our quantitative study reveals the innovation premium of such an indirect learning channel that we term as ‘ second‐order between‐supplier learning ’: suppliers’ technological capabilities improve significantly when they supply to domestic customers who have imported from their technologically more advanced foreign competitors. Through a qualitative study, we develop a theoretical framework to account for the mechanisms underlying this indirect learning channel, outlining the motivations , contents , and contingencies that shape the effectiveness of second‐order between‐supplier learning. Our findings contribute to supply chain management and organizational learning literature by building a theory of second‐order between‐supplier learning. Our findings could also inform suppliers in emerging markets about technological development and guide policymakers on cross‐border supply chain management.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 二阶供应商之间的学习
abstract_cn: 摘要 大量实证证据表明，处于新兴经济体的供应商可以通过直接向技术先进的外国竞争者学习来增强其技术能力。然而，来自新兴市场的供应商可能难以直接获取关于在消费市场上不广泛可得的竞争对手产品的知识。我们借鉴现有文献、探索性访谈和个例证据，假设企业可能会通过利用下游客户作为知识传递渠道来寻求间接学习。通过对2001年至2015年中国制造业进口数据的定量研究，我们揭示了一种我们称之为“供应商之间的二阶学习”的间接学习渠道的创新溢价：当供应商向已从其技术更为先进的外国竞争者进口产品的国内客户供货时，其技术能力显著提升。通过定性研究，我们发展了一个理论框架，以解释这一间接学习渠道的机制，概述了影响二阶供应商之间学习效能的动机、内容和偶发因素。我们的研究为供应链管理和组织学习文献做出了贡献，建立了二阶供应商之间学习的理论。我们的研究结果还可以为新兴市场的供应商提供技术发展的信息，并为政策制定者在跨境供应链管理方面提供指导。

title: To Adopt or Not: The Paradox of AR Fitting Technology in Retail Channels
abstract: As brick-and-mortar retail rebounds, congestion in fitting rooms has reemerged as a critical operational challenge. Augmented reality (AR) fitting applications offer a scalable solution by enabling rapid virtual trials and reducing in-store delays, yet imperfect assessments may increase product mismatches. This study provides actionable guidance for retailers on AR adoption and pricing strategies by clarifying the economic roles of the substitution and complementarity effects. Our findings underscore the importance of a market-contingent approach to AR adoption and system upgrades. Rather than presuming that improvements in accuracy or usability will uniformly enhance performance, retailers and IT managers should rigorously evaluate how technological capabilities interact with market size, price fluctuations, and congestion dynamics. We also inform targeted marketing by demonstrating how heterogeneity in consumer technology preferences shapes channel selection and effective transaction outcomes. More broadly, our results caution policymakers that emerging digital technologies—while intended to reduce friction—may generate unintended welfare losses if mismatch risks and strategic responses are overlooked. These insights provide actionable guidance for digital transformation initiatives in retail and other capacity-constrained service systems characterized by heterogeneous consumers.
title_cn: 采用还是不采用：零售渠道中增强现实试衣技术的悖论
abstract_cn: 随着实体零售的复苏，试衣间的拥堵再次成为一个关键的运营挑战。增强现实（AR）试衣应用提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，通过快速的虚拟试穿来减少店内延误，但不完美的评估可能会增加产品不匹配的风险。本研究通过明确替代效应和互补效应的经济角色，为零售商提供了关于AR采纳和定价策略的可行指导。我们的研究结果强调了市场依赖性方法在AR采纳和系统升级中的重要性。零售商和IT经理不应假设准确性或可用性的提升会均匀地增强绩效，而应严格评估技术能力如何与市场规模、价格波动和拥堵动态相互作用。我们还通过展示消费者技术偏好的异质性如何影响渠道选择和有效交易结果，来为针对性营销提供信息。更广泛地说，我们的结果提醒政策制定者，尽管新兴数字技术旨在减少摩擦，但如果忽视不匹配风险和战略响应，可能会产生意想不到的福利损失。这些见解为零售及其他以异质消费者为特征的容量受限服务系统的数字化转型倡议提供了可行的指导。

title: More Can Be Less: The Economics of Answer Viewing on Paid Q&A Platforms
abstract: Paid Q&A platforms increasingly experiment with an answer-viewing feature that allows users to pay a small fee to access answers already given to others. At first glance, this model appears to expand access and create new revenue streams. Our research, however, shows that the reality is more complex. Using a game-theoretic model, we demonstrate that answer viewing can sometimes harm platform profits due to market cannibalization: Users who might have paid for personalized answers switch to cheaper viewing options. Surprisingly, we find that answerers may raise their consulting fees when platforms share a large portion of viewing revenue with them, and users do not always benefit because personalized answers become more expensive. These results reveal a central paradox—more can be less—as adding another monetization channel may backfire. For practice, our findings highlight the need for Q&A platforms to carefully calibrate revenue-sharing policies to avoid undermining their core market. For policy, the study underscores the importance of safeguards to protect small knowledge providers when platform incentives diverge from those of answerers and users. Beyond Q&A, the insights apply to broader contexts where platforms repackage personalized services into standardized products.
title_cn: 更多可能意味着更少：付费问答平台上答案查看的经济学
abstract_cn: 付费问答平台越来越多地实验一种答案查看功能，允许用户支付少量费用以访问已经提供给他人的答案。乍一看，这种模式似乎扩展了访问渠道，并创造了新的收入来源。然而，我们的研究表明，现实情况更为复杂。我们使用博弈论模型证明，答案查看有时可能因市场蚕食而损害平台利润：那些本可能为个性化答案付费的用户转向了更便宜的查看选项。令人惊讶的是，我们发现，当平台与回答者分享大量查看收入时，回答者可能会提高他们的咨询费用，而用户并不总是受益，因为个性化答案变得更加昂贵。这些结果揭示了一个核心悖论——更多可能意味着更少——因为增加另一个货币化渠道可能适得其反。从实践的角度来看，我们的研究结果强调了问答平台需要谨慎调整收入分配政策，以避免削弱其核心市场。从政策层面来看，该研究强调了在平台激励与回答者和用户利益不一致时，保护小型知识提供者的重要性。超越问答领域，这些见解适用于更广泛的背景，即平台将个性化服务重新包装成标准化产品的情形。

title: Forget Me If You Can: Auditing User Data Revocation in Recommendation Systems
abstract: Research Spotlight: Auditing the “Right to Be Forgotten” in AI Recommender Systems Personalized recommendation systems power today’s e-commerce and streaming platforms, but they also raise regulatory concerns about user privacy. Under regulations such as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), individuals have the “right to be forgotten.” Whereas companies can remove user records from databases, it remains unclear whether trained AI models truly forget the behavioral patterns or preferences learned from that data. If not, platforms may continue profiling users even after deletion requests. This study introduces RecAudit, a practical auditing tool that tests whether a recommender system has genuinely removed a user’s influence from its trained model. RecAudit acts as an independent verification mechanism that identifies users whose behavioral traces persist after data deletion. Across multiple real-world data sets, RecAudit substantially outperforms existing auditing and membership inference methods. By enabling organizations to detect high-risk cases and target corrective machine unlearning efforts, RecAudit provides a concrete technical pathway to operationalize data revocation rights. The framework supports platform operators and regulators in strengthening accountability and ensuring AI systems comply with evolving data protection laws.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 如果你可以，忘掉我：推荐系统中的用户数据撤销审计
abstract_cn:
研究聚焦：审计人工智能推荐系统中的“被遗忘权”

个性化推荐系统推动了当今的电子商务和流媒体平台，但它们也引发了用户隐私的监管担忧。根据《通用数据保护条例》（GDPR）等法规，个人拥有“被遗忘权”。虽然公司可以从数据库中删除用户记录，但尚不清楚训练好的人工智能模型是否真的会忘记从这些数据中学习到的行为模式或偏好。如果没有，这些平台可能在删除请求后仍会继续对用户进行画像。本研究提出了RecAudit，这是一种实用的审计工具，用于测试推荐系统是否真正从其训练模型中去除了用户的影响。RecAudit作为一个独立的验证机制，可以识别在数据删除后仍然存在行为痕迹的用户。在多个真实数据集上，RecAudit的性能显著优于现有的审计和成员推断方法。通过使组织能够检测高风险案例和针对性地实施机器学习去除，RecAudit为落实数据撤回权提供了具体的技术路径。该框架支持平台运营商和监管机构加强问责制，确保人工智能系统遵循不断演变的数据保护法律。

title: Robust Predictive Modeling Under Unseen Data Distribution Shifts: A Methodological Commentary
abstract: Predictive models are widely used to support decision making, yet they are typically built assuming that future data will follow the same distribution as the training data. In practice, data distributions often change in unseen ways, leading to poor model performance and reduced reliability. This methodological commentary highlights the risks of unseen data distribution shifts and shows how they are frequently overlooked in predictive modeling practice. Drawing on transfer learning, domain generalization, and distributionally robust optimization, we organize existing approaches to handling data shifts and illustrate how uncertainty-aware modeling can be implemented in practice. We conclude with actionable recommendations to guide the design, evaluation, and use of predictive models in uncertain data environments. Our work has implications for policy and practice related to trustworthy and responsible artificial intelligence (AI), predictive modeling, and AI risk management.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 在未知数据分布变化下的稳健预测建模：方法学评论
abstract_cn: 预测模型被广泛用于支持决策，但它们通常是在假设未来数据将遵循与训练数据相同分布的前提下构建的。在实际操作中，数据分布往往以无法预见的方式发生变化，导致模型性能下降和可靠性降低。本文方法论性评论强调了未见数据分布变化的风险，并指出这些风险在预测建模实践中经常被忽视。我们借鉴迁移学习、领域泛化和分布鲁棒优化，整理了处理数据变化的现有方法，并阐明了如何在实践中实施考虑不确定性的建模。最后，我们提出了可行的建议，以指导在不确定数据环境中设计、评估和使用预测模型。我们的研究对与可信和负责任的人工智能（AI）、预测建模及AI风险管理相关的政策和实践具有重要意义。

title: Leveraging Multiview Data Through Discrete and Regularized Deep Learning for Dynamic Financial Risk Prediction
abstract: Given the dramatic surge of demand for predictive insights into the dynamics of financial risk and the rich, yet entangled, information brought by proliferating multiview data, we propose a discrete and regularized deep learning (DRDL) method to better leverage such multiview data for dynamic financial risk prediction. Empirical evaluation demonstrates advantages of DRDL over benchmarked classic and state-of-the-art methods at both the model level (time-to-risk and out-of-time prediction performance) and the application level (identification and profitability performance). Besides performance gains, DRDL offers distinctive practical advantages. First, it enables explicit and controllable factor-level representations, allowing practitioners to inspect and regulate how cross-view signals are encoded. Second, it offers unique advantages in explicitly and precisely filtering out redundant information while extracting complementary information across heterogeneous data sources, allowing practitioners to better understand which unique informational components drive risk predictions. Third, it offers a practically viable and empirically effective way to promote functional disentanglement within a discrete and structured latent space. Fourth, it supports both time-wise and instance-wise monotonicity, aligning predictions with the cumulative and irreversible nature of financial risk escalation, which may be particularly valuable in risk monitoring and governance contexts.
title_cn: 通过离散和规则化深度学习利用多视角数据进行动态金融风险预测
abstract_cn: 鉴于对金融风险动态的预测洞察需求急剧上升，以及日益增多的多视角数据所带来的丰富而复杂的信息，我们提出了一种离散正则化深度学习（DRDL）方法，以更好地利用这些多视角数据进行动态金融风险预测。实证评估表明，DRDL在模型层面（风险时间和超时预测性能）以及应用层面（识别和盈利性能）上均优于基准经典方法和最先进的方法。除了性能提升，DRDL还提供了独特的实际优势。首先，它能够实现明确且可控的因子级表示，允许从业者检查和调节跨视角信号的编码方式。其次，它在明确且精确地过滤冗余信息的同时，从异构数据源中提取互补信息方面具有独特优势，使从业者更好地理解哪些独特的信息成分驱动风险预测。第三，它提供了一种在离散和结构化潜在空间内促进功能解耦的切实可行且经验有效的方法。第四，它支持时间和实例的单调性，使预测与金融风险升级的累积和不可逆特性相一致，这在风险监测和治理背景下可能特别有价值。

title: The Role of the User Information Environment in mHealth Effectiveness
abstract: Despite the promise of mobile health (mHealth) systems, about half of interventions fail to show significant effects. We examine how users’ information environments—the sources from which they obtain health information—shape mHealth effectiveness. Using information integration theory, we ran a 25-month field experiment with 4,629 expectant mothers in rural China, testing an SMS intervention to reduce unnecessary C-sections. The intervention produced a 25.9% overall reduction, but effects depended on how mHealth information integrated with public and private sources. Public information, consistent with theory, overlaps with mHealth content and can complement it for unplanned pregnancies. In contrast, integrating mHealth with private information entails dynamics beyond simple information addition, including physician behavior. Results show that mHealth coupled with private information—especially care-seeking content—prompted more visits and inadvertently enabled provider-driven overtreatment rather than informed patient choice. For practice, mHealth efficacy is inseparable from social context. Providers should recognize that visits and decisions reflect family and peer influence and app design, not just clinical need, to avoid overtreatment. Developers should design with users’ existing information ecosystems rather than treat apps as isolated tools. Clinical guidelines should be updated to reflect mHealth-environment interactions, and patients should build media literacy to synthesize information from multiple sources.
title_cn: 用户信息环境在移动健康（mHealth）有效性中的作用
abstract_cn: 尽管移动健康（mHealth）系统具有一定的潜力，但大约一半的干预措施未能显示出显著效果。我们研究了用户信息环境——即他们获取健康信息的来源——如何影响mHealth的有效性。基于信息整合理论，我们在中国农村进行了为期25个月的现场实验，涉及4,629名孕妇，测试了一项旨在减少不必要剖宫产的短信干预措施。该干预措施总体上实现了25.9%的降低，但效果依赖于mHealth信息与公共和私人信息源的整合方式。公共信息与理论一致，与mHealth内容重叠，并能在应对非计划怀孕时互为补充。相反，mHealth与私人信息的整合涉及超越简单信息增补的动态，包括医生的行为。结果显示，mHealth与私人信息，特别是寻求医疗的内容相结合，促使了更多的就诊，并无意中导致提供者主导的过度治疗，而非经过充分知情的患者选择。在实践中，mHealth的有效性与社会背景密不可分。提供者应当认识到，访视和决策反映了家庭和同龄人的影响，以及应用设计，而不仅仅是临床需求，以避免过度治疗。开发者应当考虑用户现有的信息生态系统进行设计，而非将应用程序视为孤立的工具。临床指南应更新，以反映mHealth与环境的互动，患者应提高媒体素养，以便从多个来源整合信息。

title: Contribute to MY IT Service: Encouraging Technology Extra-Role Behaviors in User-Artifact Interactions from a Psychological Ownership Perspective
abstract: “Contribute to MY IT Service: Encouraging Technology Extra-Role Behaviors in User-Artifact Interactions from a Psychological Ownership Perspective” This research aims to investigate how interactions with IT artifacts can sustain users’ continuance usage of, and encourage their voluntary contributions to, access-based and algorithm-empowered IT services (e.g., Spotify and Duolingo). This question is particularly important because in such contexts, users often have limited interactions with other human users—traditionally the main driver of the target behaviors in virtual communities. In the results, we found that users are more willing to use the technology and perform extra-role behaviors that benefit the technology when they develop a user-artifact relationship, after controlling the alternative mechanisms. We further explain how customization and personalization features facilitate users’ development of such a relationship by co-constructing an extended self with the IT artifact. For practitioners, our study mobilizes the user resources and promotes user voluntary contributions that benefit the technology (e.g., knowledge contribution, user feedback, new user referral, and voluntary payment). By incorporating the algorithm into self-concept as an extended self, we propose a new way of human-algorithm interaction, and hence are able to advise on algorithm appreciation and AI adoption in the non-competitive consumer technology context and provide guidelines and use cases on IT design regarding customization and personalization.
title_cn: 为我的IT服务做贡献：从心理所有权的角度鼓励用户与物品交互中的技术额外角色行为
abstract_cn: “贡献于我的 IT 服务：从心理所有权的角度鼓励用户与人工制品之间的额外角色行为”本研究旨在探讨与 IT 人工制品的互动如何能够支持用户持续使用并鼓励他们自愿参与基于访问及算法驱动的 IT 服务（例如，Spotify 和 Duolingo）。这一问题尤为重要，因为在这类环境中，用户往往与其他人类用户的互动有限——而后者通常是虚拟社区中目标行为的主要驱动因素。研究结果表明，当用户与人工制品建立关系后，在控制了其他可能机制的情况下，他们更愿意使用该技术并执行有利于技术的额外角色行为。我们进一步解释了定制和个性化功能如何通过与 IT 人工制品共同构建扩展自我，促进用户建立这样的关系。对于实践者而言，我们的研究动员了用户资源，促进了用户自愿的贡献，这些贡献对技术有益（例如，知识贡献、用户反馈、新用户推荐和自愿支付）。通过将算法纳入自我概念作为扩展自我，我们提出了一种新的人与算法之间的互动方式，从而能够在非竞争性的消费技术环境中就算法欣赏和人工智能采用提供建议，并就定制和个性化的 IT 设计提供指南和案例。

title: Beyond Truthful Reporting: Robust Strategies for Worst-Case Payoff Maximization in Large Markets
abstract: In many large-scale markets mediated by digital platforms, such as advertising, energy trading, transportation logistics, and spectrum auctions, platforms suggest that participants report true valuations to simplify strategic complexity.
