This recommendation is widely followed by smaller bidders who lack resources for sophisticated strategic analysis. This paper shows that simple deviations from truthful reporting can improve outcomes for such participants. Using a robust optimization framework, we derive practical bidding strategies for generalized first-price, generalized second-price, and core-selecting combinatorial auctions. Our distribution-free approach maximizes worst-case payoffs over a set of plausible competitor bids, without requiring detailed information about rival behavior. We demonstrate that simple strategies, specifically shading bids on preferred bundles, consistently outperform truthful bidding when bidders have straightforward valuation structures. This insight persists even in complex settings where closed-form optimal policies cannot be derived. The results provide actionable guidance for market participants with limited information who lack resources for deploying sophisticated bidding algorithms, while offering market designers insight into how participants might deviate from recommended strategies.
title_cn: 超越真实报告：在大市场中最大化最坏情况收益的稳健策略
abstract_cn: 在许多由数字平台调节的大规模市场中，例如广告、能源交易、运输物流和频谱拍卖，平台建议参与者报告真实的估值以简化战略复杂性。这个建议在缺乏复杂战略分析资源的小型竞标者中得到了广泛遵循。本文表明，对真实报告的简单偏离可以改善此类参与者的结果。通过使用稳健优化框架，我们为广义第一价、广义第二价和核心选择组合拍卖推导出实用的竞标策略。我们这种不依赖分布的方法在一组合理的竞争者出价中最大化最坏情况收益，而无需详细了解竞争对手的行为。我们展示了简易策略，特别是对优选组合进行出价遮蔽，在竞标者具有简单估值结构时，始终优于真实出价。这一见解即使在无法推导出闭合形式最优策略的复杂环境中也依然有效。研究结果为信息有限且缺乏资源以部署复杂竞标算法的市场参与者提供了可行的指导，同时也为市场设计者提供了有关参与者如何偏离推荐策略的洞察。

title: Balancing Acts: Unveiling the Dynamics of Post Removal on Social Media User-Generated Content
abstract: Policy and Practice Abstract User-generated content (UGC) is central to engagement and value creation on social media platforms, but policy violations and low-quality posts create significant reputational, legal, and financial risks. Platforms commonly respond by removing posts that violate community standards, yet it remains unclear whether such actions deter users from contributing or instead improve subsequent behavior. Analyzing data from 40 Reddit communities using a difference-in-differences design, we examine how post removal influences users’ future contributions. We find that removing a user’s post reduces subsequent rule violations and increases the average number of upvotes their later posts receive, an indicator of improved content quality. These effects are stronger when users experience repeated removals and when they observe peers’ posts being removed, highlighting both direct and vicarious learning mechanisms. For platform operators, the findings suggest that targeted, consistent, and transparent post removal can serve as an effective governance tool, not merely to suppress harmful content but to foster higher-quality participation over time. For policymakers and regulators, the results underscore the importance of moderation frameworks that promote user learning, accountability, and procedural fairness. Well-designed moderation systems can enhance community standards while maintaining legitimacy and trust in digital governance.
title_cn: 平衡行为：揭示社交媒体用户生成内容删除后的动态变化
abstract_cn: 政策与实践摘要 用户生成内容（UGC）在社交媒体平台上的参与和价值创造中占据核心地位，但政策违规和低质量帖子则带来了显著的声誉、法律和财务风险。平台通常通过删除违反社区标准的帖子来应对这一问题，但目前尚不清楚此类措施是否会阻止用户发表内容，或是改善后续行为。通过对40个Reddit社区的数据进行差异中的差异设计分析，我们研究了帖子删除如何影响用户未来的贡献。我们的研究发现，删除用户的帖子会减少后续规则违规行为，并增加后续帖子获得的平均赞数，这可以视为内容质量改善的指标。当用户经历多次删除或观察到同伴的帖子被删除时，这些效应更为显著，凸显了直接学习和间接学习的机制。对于平台运营商而言，这些发现表明，针对性的、一致的和透明的帖子删除可以作为有效的治理工具，不仅仅是为了抑制有害内容，同时也能够促进更高质量的参与。对于政策制定者和监管机构而言，结果强调了促进用户学习、问责和程序公正的重要性。设计良好的内容审核系统可以在维护数字治理的合法性和信任的同时，提升社区标准。

title: Translating Agile Development in Different Institutional Contexts: Dynamism, Pluralism, and Ratcheting over Time
abstract: Organizations of all sorts adopt agile software development, but they rarely implement it “by the book.” Instead, agile practices evolve after initial adoption and often drift in different directions as organizations translate agile into their institutional environments. We studied the implementation of agile development in four organizations from much different institutional contexts: a startup technology company, a consulting firm, a government organization, and an industrial manufacturer. We found two core dimensions of their institutional contexts that shape agile translation: dynamism and pluralism. Dynamism refers to how fast requirements and environments change, and pluralism refers to how many diverse stakeholders are involved. These two dimensions influence the direction of agile translation. We show that agile practices evolve through a “ratcheting” process, whereby a sequence of incremental, interdependent changes gradually move teams closer to or further away from canonical agile practices. High pluralism in the institutional context, for example, tends to increase documentation, whereas low dynamism appears to slow iteration cycles. Agile software development is no longer limited to startups or software teams; it is adapted by all sorts of organizations as a way to flexibly innovate. Understanding why agile evolves differently across contexts helps managers move beyond one-size-fits-all prescriptions and set realistic expectations for agile development in their organizations.
title_cn: 在不同制度背景下翻译敏捷开发：动态性、多元性及时间的逐步提升
abstract_cn: 各类组织都在采用敏捷软件开发，但它们很少完全按照书本上的方式实施。相反，敏捷实践在初次采纳后不断演变，往往在不同方向上漂移，因为组织将敏捷理念转化为其自身的制度环境。我们研究了四个来自截然不同制度背景的组织中敏捷开发的实施情况：一家初创科技公司、一家咨询公司、一家政府机构和一家工业制造商。我们发现，两种核心的制度背景维度影响着敏捷转化：动态性和多元性。动态性指的是需求和环境变化的速度，而多元性则指涉参与的利益相关者的多样性。这两个维度会影响敏捷转化的方向。例如，制度背景中的高多元性往往会导致文档记录的增加，而低动态性似乎会减缓迭代周期。敏捷软件开发不再仅限于初创公司或软件团队；各类组织都在将其调整为灵活创新的一种方式。理解敏捷在不同背景中为何会以不同的方式演变，将帮助管理者超越一刀切的推荐，设定更现实的期待，以促成其组织中的敏捷开发。

title: Reference Aware Delexicalization (RAD) Framework: Theory Driven Artificial Intelligence Modeling for Domain Generalization
abstract: Artificial intelligence systems often underperform in new contexts, limiting their reliability in business domains. This study introduces the reference aware delexicalization (RAD) framework, a theory-driven approach that improves artificial intelligence (AI) model performance across different domains without requiring massive computational resources. RAD addresses a fundamental problem: AI models often memorize surface patterns from training data rather than learning transferable reasoning skills. By systematically abstracting domain-specific terms while preserving semantic relationships, RAD enables models to focus on underlying logical structures that generalize across contexts. For practitioners, RAD offers measurable benefits. Healthcare organizations can deploy clinical decision support systems that maintain accuracy when processing records from different departments or institutions. Financial institutions can build fraud detection systems that adapt to emerging threats without extensive retraining. Social media platforms can improve content moderation consistency across languages and cultural contexts. For policymakers, RAD demonstrates that effective AI does not require ever-larger models with corresponding environmental and economic costs. Organizations can achieve robust, adaptable AI systems through principled data augmentation techniques. This finding supports policies encouraging efficient, interpretable AI development over resource-intensive scaling approaches, promoting both technological sustainability and broader access to reliable AI capabilities.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 参考意识去词化（RAD）框架：面向领域泛化的理论驱动人工智能建模
abstract_cn:
人工智能系统在新情境下的表现常常不尽人意，这限制了它们在商业领域的可靠性。本研究提出了参考感知去词法化（RAD）框架，这是一种理论驱动的方法，能够在不需要大量计算资源的情况下提高人工智能（AI）模型在不同领域的性能。RAD解决了一个根本性问题：AI模型往往从训练数据中记忆表面模式，而不是学习可转移的推理技能。通过系统地抽象领域特定术语，同时保持语义关系，RAD使模型能够专注于跨情境的基础逻辑结构。

对于从业者而言，RAD提供了可量化的好处。医疗保健机构可以部署临床决策支持系统，在处理来自不同部门或机构的记录时保持准确性。金融机构可以构建能够适应新兴威胁的欺诈检测系统，而无需进行广泛的再训练。社交媒体平台可以提高不同语言和文化背景下内容审核的一致性。

对于政策制定者来说，RAD表明有效的AI并不需要不断增大的模型，这样会带来相应的环境和经济成本。组织可以通过原则性的数据增强技术实现稳健且可适应的AI系统。这一发现支持了推动高效、可解释的AI发展政策，而不是资源密集的扩展方法，促进了技术的可持续性以及更广泛的可靠AI能力的获取。

title: Are You, You? Seamlessly Fighting Identity Fraud with Keystroke Dynamics
abstract: PRACTICE-ORIENTED ABSTRACT In September of 2017, Equifax disclosed a data breach that exposed the personal information of 147 million people, including names, Social Security numbers, and addresses. Such high-profile data breaches have rendered traditional forms of identity verification—especially knowledge-based authentication (KBA)—worse than useless: fraudsters have a 92% success rate in KBA screenings, compared to just 46% for genuine customers. In the face of these challenges, digital platforms are turning to sparse alternative data sources and overt verification technologies, often to the detriment of the user experience. The objective of this research is to design and build a novel approach to identity verification for new platform users using digital behavior data—features that describe how users type and interact during account setup. The system (1) evaluates identity fraud risk for all first-time users, and (2) minimizes the impact on the new user experience by seamlessly analyzing behavior during a platform’s existing onboarding experience. We evaluated and improved the design in four experiments, culminating in an identity fraud detection tool that effectively detects identity fraud for first-time users and supports seamless user experiences.
title_cn: 你是你自己吗？利用击键动态无缝对抗身份诈骗
abstract_cn: 实践导向摘要 2017年9月，Equifax披露了一起数据泄露事件，导致1.47亿人的个人信息被曝光，包括姓名、社会安全号码和地址。这类高调的数据泄露事件使得传统的身份验证方式——特别是基于知识的认证（KBA）——变得不堪一击：欺诈者在KBA筛查中的成功率高达92%，而真正客户的成功率仅为46%。面对这些挑战，数字平台开始转向稀疏的替代数据源和显性验证技术，往往以牺牲用户体验为代价。本研究的目的是设计并构建一种新颖的身份验证方法，针对新平台用户使用数字行为数据——描述用户在账户设置过程中输入和互动方式的特征。该系统（1）评估所有首次用户的身份欺诈风险，并（2）通过无缝分析用户在平台现有入职体验中的行为，最小化对新用户体验的影响。我们在四个实验中评估并改进了设计，最终形成了一种有效检测首次用户身份欺诈的工具，并支持无缝的用户体验。

title: Asymmetric and Contingent Value of Crowd Wisdom in Crowdfunding
abstract: Digital crowdfunding platforms operate under substantial uncertainty, where participants must assess platform viability with limited and imperfect information. Using data from the Chinese lending-based crowdfunding market, this study shows that platform growth depends not only on formal risk disclosures (e.g., interest rates, repayment ratios, and capitalization), but also on how users interpret the behavior of others as an informational signal. Specifically, we find that active user participation—particularly on the investor side—serves as a powerful form of “crowd wisdom” that shapes subsequent borrower participation, while borrower growth does not symmetrically attract investors. Importantly, the value of crowd-based signals is contingent: when formal risk indicators suggest greater uncertainty or weaker platform viability, users rely more heavily on observed participation by others; when risk signals are strong and favorable, the incremental influence of crowd cues diminishes. These findings offer several practical insights. Platform operators should recognize investor participation as a credibility signal and prioritize investor acquisition and retention, especially during periods of heightened uncertainty. Platform interface design and disclosure policies should balance formal risk information with transparent participation metrics, rather than treating them as substitutes. From a policy perspective, our results suggest that participation metrics can meaningfully shape user behavior even in the absence of misrepresentation, highlighting the need for regulators to consider how visibility rules, reporting standards, and disclosure requirements interact with social learning dynamics on digital financial platforms.
title_cn: 众筹中群体智慧的不对称性和依赖性价值
abstract_cn: 数字众筹平台在较大的不确定性下运作，参与者必须在有限且不完善的信息条件下评估平台的可行性。本研究利用中国基于借贷的众筹市场数据表明，平台的增长不仅依赖于正式的风险披露（例如，利率、还款比例和资本化），还取决于用户如何将他人的行为解读为信息信号。具体而言，我们发现，活跃的用户参与，特别是在投资者方面，作为一种强有力的“群体智慧”，在很大程度上影响后续借款人的参与，而借款人的增长并未对投资者产生对称的吸引力。重要的是，基于群体的信号价值是有条件的：当正式的风险指标显示出更大的不确定性或较弱的平台可行性时，用户会更加依赖他人的参与观察；而当风险信号强且有利时，群体提示的增量影响会减弱。这些发现提供了若干实用的见解。平台运营者应将投资者参与视为信誉信号，并优先考虑投资者的获取与留存，尤其是在不确定性加大的时期。平台界面设计和信息披露政策应在正式风险信息与透明的参与指标之间实现平衡，而不是将两者视为替代关系。从政策角度看，我们的结果表明，即使在没有虚假陈述的情况下，参与指标也能显著影响用户行为，这凸显了监管者需要考虑可见性规则、报告标准和披露要求如何与数字金融平台上的社会学习动态相互作用。

title: The Differential Diffusion of Exchange and Utility Value Blockchain Tokens
abstract: Blockchain tokens are widely used in digital markets, yet they do not spread in the same way. Our research shows that tokens designed primarily for financial exchange and those designed for functional or service use diffuse through fundamentally different mechanisms even though they operate on the same underlying technology. Analyzing more than 200 million transactions across more than 24,000 Ethereum-based tokens, we find that financial tokens spread faster when they are held as part of large, diversified user portfolios yet diffuse more slowly when adopted by highly visible lead users. In direct contrast, utility tokens benefit strongly from early adoption by lead users and from transaction platforms that facilitate repeated use, whereas portfolio diversification inhibits their diffusion. These findings have important implications for practice and policy. For managers and platform designers, strategies that successfully promote financial tokens may actively hinder the adoption of utility tokens, underscoring the need for value-specific design, marketing, and platform strategies. For regulators and policymakers, the results provide empirical evidence that blockchain tokens function differently depending on their value orientation, constituting a strong empirical basis for more nuanced, behavior-based regulatory frameworks rather than one-size-fits-all approaches to digital tokens.
title_cn: 交换和效用价值区块链代币的差异性扩散
abstract_cn: 区块链代币在数字市场中被广泛使用，但它们的传播方式却各不相同。我们的研究表明，主要用于金融交易的代币与用于功能或服务的代币尽管基于相同的底层技术，但其扩散机制却根本不同。通过分析超过2亿笔交易和24,000多种基于以太坊的代币，我们发现，金融代币在作为大型多样化用户投资组合的一部分时传播速度更快，而在被高度可视的引导用户采用时则传播较慢。相反，实用代币则非常依赖于引导用户的早期采纳以及促进重复使用的交易平台，而投资组合多样化则抑制了它们的扩散。这些发现对实践和政策具有重要意义。对于管理者和平台设计者来说，成功促进金融代币的策略可能会主动阻碍实用代币的采纳，强调了价值特定设计、营销和平台策略的必要性。对于监管者和政策制定者而言，这些结果提供了实证证据，表明区块链代币根据其价值导向的不同，而表现出不同的功能，这为建立更加细致、基于行为的监管框架提供了坚实的实证基础，而非一刀切的数字代币管理方法。

title: To Collect or to Purchase? Collaboration Between Manufacturer and E-Commerce Platform on Customization
abstract: More manufacturers are combining novel customer-to-manufacturer (C2M) with traditional make-to-order (MTO) customization to deliver tailored products. However, they face a critical choice between collecting data independently and purchasing data-driven insights from e-commerce platforms. This key decision remains ambiguous in practice and understudied in the information systems literature, with little rigorous analysis on data acquisition ways and their interaction with hybrid customization. This study addresses this gap by investigating firms’ data acquisition strategies in the context of hybrid customization. We find that when the marginal cost of data acquisition is high for both the manufacturer and the e-commerce platform, and customers have a stronger bias against tailored products, the manufacturer should still prefer collecting market data independently rather than purchasing data-driven insights. The e-commerce platform should not always provide insight support. Moreover, manufacturer-collected C2M may sometimes lead to a higher effort level of acquiring informative data and more customer welfare than platform-initiated C2M. These results provide valuable guidelines to manufacturers on choosing an appropriate data acquisition way, to e-commerce platforms on offering data-driven insights, and to policymakers on improving customer welfare. These results also contribute to the emerging literature in IS and related disciplines on data-driven production models.
title_cn: 收集还是购买？制造商与电子商务平台在定制化上的合作
abstract_cn: 越来越多的制造商将新型的客户到制造商（C2M）模式与传统的按订单生产（MTO）定制相结合，以提供量身定制的产品。然而，他们面临一个关键选择，即独立收集数据与从电子商务平台购买数据驱动的洞察之间。这一关键决策在实践中仍然模糊，并且在信息系统文献中尚未得到充分研究，对于数据获取方式及其与混合定制的互动缺乏严格的分析。本研究通过调查公司在混合定制背景下的数据获取策略来填补这一空白。我们的研究发现，当制造商和电子商务平台的数据获取边际成本都很高，并且客户对定制产品的偏见较强时，制造商仍然应该选择独立收集市场数据，而不是购买数据驱动的洞察。电子商务平台不应始终提供洞察支持。此外，制造商自己收集的C2M有时可能导致更高的信息数据获取水平及更多的客户福利，而非平台发起的C2M。这些结果为制造商选择合适的数据获取方式提供了宝贵的指导，为电子商务平台提供数据驱动的洞察提供了建议，并为政策制定者在提升客户福利方面提供了参考。这些结果还为信息系统及相关学科中新兴文献对数据驱动生产模型的研究作出了贡献。

title: SUVA: A Probabilistic Framework for Auditing LLMs with an Application to Social Preferences
abstract: Organizations are increasingly deploying large language models (LLMs) as customer service agents, decision aids, and semiautonomous agents. We develop State–Understanding–Value–Action (SUVA), a probabilistic auditing framework that turns an LLM’s response into structured evidence about how its decision was produced. SUVA treats the prompt as the state, codes the model’s reasoning to extract its understanding and stated values using a transparent codebook, and then estimates how these elements statistically predict the eventual action. We demonstrate SUVA on social preference games from behavioral economics and show how the same workflow can audit other delegated decisions by using domain-specific prompts and value codebooks. Across eight widely used LLMs, SUVA reveals systematic prosocial and reciprocity patterns and shows how posttraining alignment reshapes them. For practice and policy, SUVA supports a repeatable audit, align, and reaudit workflow for model selection, compliance, and ongoing monitoring of deployed LLM systems.
title_cn: SUVA：一种审计大型语言模型的概率框架及其在社会偏好的应用
abstract_cn: 组织越来越多地将大型语言模型（LLMs）作为客户服务代理、决策辅助工具和半自主代理进行部署。我们提出了状态–理解–价值–行动（SUVA）框架，这是一种概率审计框架，将LLM的响应转化为关于其决策如何产生的结构化证据。SUVA将提示视为状态，使用透明的编码册编码模型的推理，以提取其理解和陈述的价值观，然后估计这些元素如何在统计上预测最终的行动。我们在行为经济学的社会偏好博弈中演示了SUVA，并展示了如何通过使用特定领域的提示和价值编码册来审计其他委托决策。通过对八种广泛使用的LLM的分析，SUVA揭示了系统性的亲社会和互惠模式，并显示了后训练对齐如何重新塑造这些模式。在实践和政策方面，SUVA支持重复的审计、对齐和再审计工作流程，用于模型选择、合规性以及对部署的LLM系统的持续监测。

title: AI Governance and the Decentralization of Technology Production: An Investigation of AI-Based IPA Bots
abstract: We revisit the centralization–decentralization tension in the context of decentralized technology production at the AI frontier, focusing on Intelligent Process Automation (IPA) bots as a salient manifestation of the democratization of AI. IPA bots combine robotic process automation with AI technologies and process mining based on deep, mindful domain expertise. We collaborate with a Fortune 200 multinational to study how IPA projects yield successful governance outcomes of utilization and repeatability. Our research reveals that traditional centralized mandates, when paired with the unique learning and adaptive capabilities of AI systems, can actively suppress utilization and stifle organizational reuse of the bots. Conversely, democratization is no panacea. While empowerment of business users through decentralization usually leads to successful outcomes for the deployed bots, when certain boundary conditions are crossed, these same decentralized efforts can produce fragmentation in the form of one-off solutions. Our research challenges core tenets of the IT governance canon, demonstrating that centralization–decentralization logic at the AI frontier must expand to account for the evolution of governance, process, and technological characteristics to realize effective AI governance.
title_cn: 人工智能治理与技术生产的去中心化：基于人工智能的IPA机器人研究
abstract_cn: 我们重新审视了在人工智能前沿背景下，去中心化技术生产中的中心化与去中心化之间的紧张关系，重点关注智能流程自动化（IPA）机器人，这一现象突出体现了人工智能的民主化。IPA机器人将机器人流程自动化与基于深厚且专注的领域专业知识的人工智能技术和过程挖掘相结合。我们与一家财富200强跨国公司合作，研究IPA项目如何实现有效的治理成果，包括利用和重复使用。我们的研究表明，传统的中心化指令与人工智能系统独特的学习和适应能力结合时，可能会积极抑制利用率，并阻碍组织对机器人的重复使用。相反，民主化并非灵丹妙药。尽管通过去中心化赋能商业用户通常会导致已部署机器人的成功结果，但当某些边界条件被突破时，这些去中心化的努力可能会以一次性解决方案的形式产生碎片化。我们的研究挑战了信息技术治理经典的核心原则，证明在人工智能前沿的中心化与去中心化逻辑必须扩展，以考虑治理、流程和技术特征的演变，从而实现有效的人工智能治理。

title: NFT Disruption in Platform Competition: Evidence from Trading Card Collectibles
abstract: The rise of blockchain-based platforms is reshaping how digital and physical products interact, with important consequences for platform strategy and market regulation. Evidence from the introduction of NBA Top Shot shows that digital collectibles can directly reduce prices, sales volume, and market value in adjacent physical markets, indicating a clear cannibalization effect. However, the impact is highly uneven: Physical products with close digital substitutes and low digital scarcity become especially vulnerable, whereas low-cost items in certain segments can experience market expansion as new collectors enter through digital channels. These patterns demonstrate that digital transformation alters competition not only between platforms but also across product categories, making strategic decisions around scarcity, product design, and release timing critical for firms managing multiformat ecosystems. For practice, the findings highlight the need for companies to anticipate cross-market spillovers when launching digital offerings and to manage physical and digital product lines in an integrated way. For policy, the results underscore the importance of establishing transparent standards for digital collectibles and providing clear consumer guidance, while recognizing that many NFTs function as collectible goods rather than financial securities and may warrant distinct regulatory treatment.
title_cn: 平台竞争中的NFT颠覆：来自交易卡收藏品的证据
abstract_cn: 区块链平台的兴起正在重塑数字产品与实体产品之间的互动，这对平台战略和市场监管产生了重要影响。NBA Top Shot的引入证据表明，数字收藏品可以直接降低相邻实体市场的价格、销售量和市场价值，显示出明显的自我侵蚀效应。然而，这种影响并不均匀：与数字替代品紧密相关且数字稀缺性低的实体产品尤其脆弱，而某些细分市场中的低成本商品则可能因新收藏者通过数字渠道进入而实现市场扩张。这些模式表明，数字转型不仅改变了平台之间的竞争，也改变了产品类别之间的竞争，使得在管理多格式生态系统时，围绕稀缺性、产品设计和发布时机的战略决策变得至关重要。在实践中，研究结果强调了公司在推出数字产品时需要预见跨市场溢出效应，并以综合的方式管理实体和数字产品线。在政策层面，结果强调了建立数字收藏品透明标准和提供明确消费者指导的重要性，同时认识到许多NFT作为收藏品而非金融证券运作，可能需要不同的监管处理。

title: From Shield to Sword: How Data Privacy Can Undermine Data Security
abstract: What is the point in hacking computer systems when organizations voluntarily disclose personal data to anyone who asks convincingly? We show that the European GDPR is paradoxically exploitable for identity theft despite being designed to protect personal data. Subject access requests (SARs) according to its “right of access” (Article 15) can be weaponized by impersonating a victim and submitting fraudulent SARs in their name. We task attackers with stealing the personal data of three volunteers (highly privacy aware person, average user, and semipublic figure) in a real-world setting. These attacks could be replicated by just about anyone. Yet, they obtained sensitive personal data, including addresses, phone numbers, national ID and bank account information, and insurance data. Based on 718 submitted SARs and 21 interviews with data protection officers, we tell a frightening, yet fascinating story of how these identity thefts unfold, expose flaws in how organizations process SARs, and uncover a systemic weakness in the GDPR. We analyze the underlying factors enabling such attacks, assess their real-world impact, and explore mitigation options for individuals, organizations, and lawmakers. Our insights have important implications for how data privacy and data security interrelate and how we manage and regulate them.
title_cn: 从盾牌到剑：数据隐私如何削弱数据安全
abstract_cn: 为何黑客还要攻击计算机系统，既然组织自愿向任何能够说服他们的人披露个人数据？我们展示了尽管欧洲通用数据保护条例（GDPR）旨在保护个人数据，但在身份盗窃方面却有着自相矛盾的可利用性。根据其“获取权”（第15条）的信息请求（SARs）可以被武器化，攻击者通过冒充受害者以其名义提交欺诈性的信息请求。我们要求攻击者在真实环境中盗取三名志愿者的个人数据（一个高度关注隐私的人、一个普通用户，以及一个半公开人物）。这些攻击几乎任何人都可以复制。然而，他们成功获取了敏感的个人数据，包括地址、电话号码、国家身份证和银行账户信息，以及保险数据。基于718份提交的信息请求和对21名数据保护官员的访谈，我们讲述了一个令人恐惧但又引人入胜的故事，展示了这些身份盗窃事件是如何展开的，暴露了组织在处理信息请求时存在的缺陷，同时揭示了GDPR中的系统性弱点。我们分析了促成此类攻击的潜在因素，评估了其在现实世界中的影响，并探讨了个人、组织和立法者的应对措施。我们对此的见解对数据隐私与数据安全之间的关系及其管理和监管有重要影响。

title: Conform or Workaround? A Multilevel Analysis of the Effect of Group Cultural Tightness on Enterprise System Use
abstract: Enterprise systems (ESs) embed industrial best practices into adopting organizations through their system features, but employees frequently “work around” the system to get work done—sometimes in helpful ways, sometimes in risky ones. Our research shows that group cultural tightness (strongly enforced norms within a team) is a powerful lever for ES governance: tighter groups reliably increase conforming use while reducing both internal and external workarounds, and this pattern holds across Chinese and U.S. contexts and multiple organizational settings. Importantly, not all workarounds are equal. Evidence from multisourced, longitudinal field data indicates that conforming use and internal workarounds can improve job performance, whereas external workarounds harm performance—likely by creating fragmented processes, data gaps, and compliance and security exposure. For practice and policy, the message is clear: organizations should strengthen team-level norms and accountability to curb harmful “outside-the-system” behaviors, while simultaneously creating safe, sanctioned channels to surface, evaluate, and integrate beneficial internal workarounds (e.g., controlled extensions, approved templates, and rapid governance reviews). This balanced approach supports performance, compliance, and continuous improvement without shutting down frontline problem-solving.
title_cn: 遵从还是变通？群体文化紧张度对企业系统使用影响的多层次分析
abstract_cn: 企业系统（ESs）通过其系统功能将行业最佳实践嵌入采用该系统的组织中，但员工常常会“绕过”系统以完成工作——有时是出于有益的考虑，有时则存在风险。我们的研究表明，团队文化的紧密性（团队内强制执行的规范）是企业系统治理的一个强有力杠杆：紧密的团队能够可靠地增加合规使用，同时减少内部和外部的“绕过”行为，这种模式在中国和美国的不同语境及多个组织环境中均得到了验证。重要的是，并非所有的“绕过”行为都是等同的。来自多来源的长期实地数据的证据表明，合规使用和内部“绕过”可以改善工作表现，而外部“绕过”则有害于表现，可能是因为这些行为造成了流程的碎片化、数据的缺失，以及合规性和安全性暴露。对于实践和政策而言，信息非常明确：组织应加强团队层面的规范和责任，以遏制有害的“系统外”行为，同时创建安全、经过授权的渠道，用于暴露、评估和整合有益的内部“绕过”行为（例如，控制扩展、批准模板和快速治理审查）。这种平衡的方法支持绩效、合规性和持续改进，而不会阻碍一线的解决问题能力。

title: Analyzing Consumer Footprints on E-Commerce Platforms: A Multichannel Sequential Search Model with Reference Price
abstract: Accompanied by the popularity of mini-programs, consumers can easily browse products across both the e-commerce native app channel and the mini-program channel, leaving behind extensive click-through and purchase records across various channels. These multichannel footprints contain rich information about consumers’ search preferences, which offer great potential for optimizing platforms’ multichannel management. However, prior studies predominantly focus on single-channel contexts, which may not directly apply to analyzing consumers’ multichannel footprints. This research develops a multichannel sequential search (MSS) model to characterize consumers’ multichannel footprints as a threefold search process consisting of cross-channel, cross-product, and cross-page search, where consumers dynamically update their cross-channel reference prices as they navigate their search journeys. The estimation results of the MSS model reveal that consumers exhibit significant heterogeneity in channel preferences, cross-channel costs, and sensitivity to cross-channel reference prices, contributing to their diverse multichannel footprints. Drawing on a comprehensive understanding of the MSS process, our optimal policy recommends that the platform implement a promotion gap with an average discount percentage of 32% between the app and mini-program channels. The channel-specific promotion strategy fosters a strong cross-channel reference price effect, which uses a smaller promotion to achieve a significant profit improvement over the state-of-the-art model.
title_cn: 分析消费者在电子商务平台上的足迹：一种带参照价格的多渠道顺序搜索模型
abstract_cn: 随着小程序的普及，消费者可以轻松地通过电子商务原生应用程序和小程序渠道浏览产品，并在各渠道间留下广泛的点击和购买记录。这些多渠道足迹包含了丰富的关于消费者搜索偏好的信息，为优化平台的多渠道管理提供了巨大潜力。然而，先前的研究主要集中于单一渠道的背景，这可能无法直接应用于分析消费者的多渠道足迹。本研究开发了一种多渠道顺序搜索（MSS）模型，以三重搜索过程描述消费者的多渠道足迹，具体包括跨渠道、跨产品和跨页面搜索，消费者在搜索时动态更新其跨渠道参考价格。MSS模型的估计结果显示，消费者在渠道偏好、跨渠道成本和对跨渠道参考价格的敏感性上表现出显著的异质性，从而形成了多样化的多渠道足迹。基于对MSS过程的全面理解，我们的最优政策建议平台在应用程序和小程序渠道之间实施平均折扣比例为32%的促销差距。这种针对特定渠道的促销策略促成了强劲的跨渠道参考价格效应，通过较小的促销实现了相比于最先进模型的显著利润提升。

title: Human-Algorithm Collaboration in Gig Work: The Role of Experience, Skill Level, and Task Complexity
abstract: In this paper, we contribute to recent studies on human-algorithm collaboration by examining how experience, skill level, workload, and task complexity shape the impact of an algorithm-enabled decision-support tool for gig workers. We leverage a large-scale randomized field experiment on the Instacart platform from June 2022 to September 2022. The algorithm-enabled technology aims to revolutionize item picking by helping shoppers locate and collect items more efficiently, reducing picking time while maintaining service quality, as reflected by refund rates. We find that the technology complements experience: rather than diminishing the value of experience, it yields larger improvements for more experienced shoppers. We also find that it substitutes for skill levels by helping lower-skilled workers bridge the performance gap with higher-skilled peers, but lower-skilled workers need experience to fully benefit from the tool. Finally, treatment effects vary with workload and task complexity, clarifying when algorithmic guidance is most valuable. For policymakers, our findings suggest a simple rule: give workers some baseline experience before introducing AI tools, using a staggered rollout with basic training. We also show that these tools can make service more consistent by closing the gap between high performers and lower performers, reducing performance dispersion, and helping standardize quality.
title_cn: 在人类与算法的协作中：经验、技能水平与任务复杂性的作用
abstract_cn: 在本文中，我们通过研究经验、技能水平、工作负载和任务复杂性如何影响算法驱动的决策支持工具对临时工的影响，为最近的人类与算法协作的研究做出了贡献。我们利用了在2022年6月至2022年9月间在Instacart平台进行的大规模随机实地实验。该算法驱动技术旨在通过帮助购物者更高效地查找和收集商品来革新商品挑选，减少挑选时间，同时保持服务质量，这可以通过退货率反映出来。我们的研究发现，该技术与经验相辅相成：它不仅没有削弱经验的价值，反而为经验更丰富的购物者带来了更大的改善。我们还发现它在技能水平上起到了替代作用，帮助低技能工人缩小与高技能同事之间的表现差距，但低技能工人需要经验才能充分受益于该工具。最后，处理效果因工作负载和任务复杂性而异，明确了算法指导最有价值的时机。对于决策者，我们的研究结果建议一个简单的规则：在引入人工智能工具之前，给予工人一定的基础经验，通过分阶段推出并提供基础培训。我们还展示了这些工具如何通过缩小高表现者和低表现者之间的差距，使服务更加一致，减少表现离散，并帮助标准化质量。

title: A User Purchase Motivation-Aware Product Recommender System
abstract: Retailers struggle to match recommendations to why customers buy. We introduce a practical framework that distinguishes two core, actionable purchase motivations, stable preference and exploratory intent, and present STB, a data-efficient measure that infers which motivation drives each item purchase using only transaction sequences and item attributes. Building on STB, we develop UPSTAR, a motivation-aware recommender that separates users’ behavior into stable-preference and exploratory subsequences and fuses their signals for next-item prediction. Across three real-world e-commerce data sets, UPSTAR substantially improves accuracy and, importantly, advances the system’s ability to surface genuinely exploratory items that drive discovery and cross-category sales. For practitioners, our method enables more targeted marketing: promote reliable items to preference-driven buyers while exposing exploratory buyers to curated novelty, improving conversion and long-term engagement. For platform policy and operations, motivation-aware recommendations support inventory planning, personalized promotions, and responsible diversification of exposure without requiring surveys or extensive auxiliary data. Implementation requires only existing transaction logs and item metadata, making it immediately deployable for large-scale retail systems.
title_cn: 用户购买动机感知的产品推荐系统
abstract_cn: 零售商在将推荐与顾客购买原因匹配方面面临挑战。我们提出了一个实用框架，区分了两种核心的可操作购买动机：稳定偏好和探索意图，并提出了STB这一数据高效的度量指标，利用交易序列和商品属性推断每项商品购买背后的动机。在STB的基础上，我们开发了UPSTAR，这是一种关注动机的推荐系统，能够将用户的行为分为稳定偏好和探索性子序列，并将它们的信号融合用于下一个商品的预测。在三个真实世界的电子商务数据集中，UPSTAR显著提高了推荐的准确性，并且重要的是，增强了系统发现真正探索性商品的能力，从而推动发现和跨类别销售。对于从业者而言，我们的方法使得营销更加精准：向偏好驱动的消费者推广可靠商品，同时向探索性购买者推荐精心策划的新奇商品，从而提高转化率和长期参与度。对于平台政策和运营而言，关注动机的推荐支持库存规划、个性化促销及负责任的曝光多样化，而无需依赖调查或大量辅助数据。该方法的实施仅需现有的交易记录和商品元数据，使其能够立即在大规模零售系统中部署。

title: Content Exclusivity on Advertising Revenue–Sharing Platforms
abstract: Digital content platforms such as YouTube, TikTok, and Twitch rely on third-party providers and share advertising revenue to incentivize content production. Yet, as providers increasingly distribute content across multiple platforms, competition intensifies and platforms consider exclusive contracts to restrict providers’ multihoming behavior. Our research develops an analytical model to examine when exclusive contracts benefit or harm platforms, providers, consumers, and overall welfare. We find that exclusivity has two key forces: it limits the number of providers on each platform, reducing same-side crowding, but it also weakens the effectiveness of revenue sharing as a competitive tool for attracting providers. As a result, exclusivity benefits platforms only when consumers place low marginal value on content, leading platforms to offer lower sharing rates and earn higher profits. When consumer valuation is high, exclusivity can backfire, reducing platform profits. Importantly, exclusivity can increase provider surplus and even generate win–win outcomes for both platforms and providers at intermediate valuation levels. Although exclusivity reduces consumer surplus because of fewer providers, total social welfare may still increase because of reduced competition costs among providers. These findings suggest policymakers should take a nuanced stance toward regulating content exclusivity.
title_cn: 广告收入分成平台上的内容独占性
abstract_cn: 数字内容平台如YouTube、TikTok和Twitch依赖第三方提供者并通过分享广告收入来激励内容生产。然而，随着提供者越来越多地在多个平台上分发内容，竞争加剧，平台开始考虑独占合同，以限制提供者的多平台行为。本研究开发了一个分析模型，以审视独占合同何时对平台、提供者、消费者和整体福利有利或有害。我们发现独占性有两个关键因素：它限制了每个平台上的提供者数量，从而减少了同侧拥挤现象，但它也削弱了收入分享作为吸引提供者的竞争工具的有效性。因此，独占性仅在消费者对内容的边际价值较低时才对平台有利，这使得平台能够提供更低的分享率并获得更高的利润。当消费者的评价较高时，独占性可能适得其反，导致平台利润下降。重要的是，独占性可以增加提供者剩余，甚至在中等评价水平下为平台和提供者创造双赢局面。尽管独占性因提供者数量减少而降低了消费者剩余，但由于提供者之间竞争成本的降低，总社会福利可能仍然增加。这些发现表明，政策制定者在监管内容独占时应采取细致入微的立场。

title: Reactions by Actual Data Breach Victims over Time: Evidence from Facebook’s Cambridge Analytica Breach
abstract: When a data breach happens, both victims, whose data were breached, and nonvictims react negatively but not equally so. In this study, we used Facebook’s Cambridge Analytica data breach to identify to what extent reactions of data breach victims go beyond those of nonvictims. Our findings reveal that victims initially lose more trust, feel more violated, feel more strongly that a psychological contract has been breached, feel less belonging on Facebook, and intend to continue using Facebook less. However, these effects are short-lived, disappearing within six months. Intuitively, one might assume that this is because people are locked in on Facebook and are forced to change their attitudes because they cannot change their behavior by leaving it. Surprisingly, a follow-up experiment shows that this is not the case as we found people who are less locked in to improve their attitudes more over time. Our study adds to the mounting evidence that consumers are unable to act when their data are breached and their privacy is violated and that regulation may be needed to better protect data. The short-lived nature of victims’ reactions we identified in this case also raises questions about the role of postbreach compensation in different contexts.
title_cn: 实际数据泄露受害者随时间的反应：来自Facebook剑桥分析泄露事件的证据
abstract_cn: 当数据泄露发生时，受害者（数据被泄露的人）和非受害者都会产生负面反应，但反应的强度并不相同。在本研究中，我们利用了Facebook的剑桥分析数据泄露事件，以识别数据泄露受害者的反应在多大程度上超出了非受害者的反应。我们的研究发现，受害者最初失去的信任感更强，感到受到的侵犯更为严重，更强烈地觉得心理契约被违反，感到在Facebook上的归属感下降，并且打算减少使用Facebook的频率。然而，这些影响是短暂的，六个月内便消失。直观上，人们可能会认为这是因为用户在Facebook上受到束缚，被迫改变态度，因为他们无法通过离开平台来改变行为。然而，令人惊讶的是，后续实验显示事实并非如此，我们发现那些不那么依赖Facebook的人随着时间的推移态度改善更多。我们的研究为消费者在数据被泄露和隐私受到侵犯时无法采取行动的逐渐增多的证据提供了支持，也表明可能需要进行监管以更好地保护数据。我们在此案例中识别出的受害者反应短暂的特性，也引发了关于在不同情境下事后补偿作用的质疑。

title: The Economics of Password Sharing
abstract: Password sharing is widespread across subscription-based industries, such as streaming services like Netflix. Although sharing reduces out-of-pocket costs for users, it also creates sharing-related burdens, such as privacy concerns and coordination hassles. We develop a game-theoretic model in which a firm serves two consumer segments—password sharers and nonsharers—to analyze how password sharing affects firm performance and consumer outcomes. Our results show that sharing enables groups of users to “self-bundle” by aggregating their valuations and subscribing through a single shared account. It also creates implicit price discrimination; sharers self-select between sharing and subscribing individually under a uniform price. These mechanisms can increase a firm’s revenue when sharing costs are low. In addition, password sharing reshapes the disparity between sharers and nonsharers. When nonsharers have sufficiently higher willingness to pay, the firm is even more likely to benefit from sharing. However, password sharing poses policy concerns. We find that it reduces social welfare and consumer surplus across a broad range of conditions—especially when sharing costs are moderate. Moreover, the firm’s profit-maximizing strategy, particularly when it chooses to accommodate sharing, often conflicts with what is best for consumers or society. These insights highlight the need for firms to carefully evaluate sharing policies and in some cases, for regulators to intervene to protect consumer welfare.
title_cn: 密码共享的经济学
abstract_cn: 密码共享在诸如Netflix等基于订阅的行业中十分普遍。虽然共享可以降低用户的自付成本，但它也带来了与共享相关的负担，如隐私问题和协调烦恼。我们建立了一个博弈理论模型，其中一个公司服务于两类消费者——密码共享者和非共享者，以分析密码共享如何影响公司的业绩和消费者的结果。我们的研究结果显示，共享使得一群用户能够通过汇聚他们的评估价值，选择通过一个共享账户进行订阅，从而“自我捆绑”。这也造成了隐性的价格歧视；共享者在统一价格下自我选择在共享与独立订阅之间。这些机制可以在共享成本较低的情况下提高公司的收入。此外，密码共享重塑了共享者和非共享者之间的差异。当非共享者的支付意愿显著高于共享者时，公司更有可能从共享中获益。然而，密码共享也带来了政策方面的顾虑。我们发现，密码共享在广泛的条件下减少了社会福利和消费者剩余，特别是在共享成本适中的情况下。此外，公司的最大利润策略，尤其是在选择容纳共享时，往往与消费者或社会的最佳利益相冲突。这些洞察凸显了公司在审慎评估共享政策方面的必要性，并在某些情况下，监管者介入以保护消费者福利的必要性。

title: Learning from Earnings Calls: Graph-Based Conversational Modeling for Financial Prediction
abstract: Practice- and policy-oriented abstract Earnings conference calls are a critical channel through which public companies communicate with investors, analysts, and regulators. These conversations contain timely signals about firms’ future risk, yet their length and unstructured nature make systematic analysis difficult in practice. This study develops an artificial intelligence (AI)–based approach, motivated by a body of theoretical and empirical work from finance and accounting, that transforms earnings call transcripts into structured representations, allowing key aspects of managerial communication, such as topic flow, cross-referencing, sentiment, and other semantics, to be explicitly modeled. Empirical results show that the proposed model significantly improves the prediction of future financial risk compared with existing deep learning and large language model approaches, particularly for firms with complex and lengthy disclosures. The findings highlight that nuanced manager–analyst interactions within earnings calls contain value-relevant information for market participants. In particular, cross-referencing, the introduction of new topics, and a more positive tone are associated with lower subsequent risk as identified by the proposed approach. For researchers and practitioners, this work demonstrates how theoretical and empirical evidence on managerial communication can be incorporated into predictive model design, supporting more accurate, interpretable, and responsible use of AI in financial markets.
title_cn: 从财报电话会议中学习：基于图的对话建模用于金融预测
abstract_cn: 实践与政策导向摘要：财报电话会议是上市公司与投资者、分析师和监管机构沟通的重要渠道。这些对话包含有关公司未来风险的及时信号，但由于会议内容的长度和非结构化特征，系统分析在实践中变得困难。本研究开发了一种基于人工智能（AI）的方法，受到金融和会计领域理论与实证研究的启发，将财报电话会议记录转化为结构化表示，从而可以明确建模管理层沟通的关键方面，如主题流程、交叉引用、情感及其他语义。实证结果表明，与现有的深度学习和大型语言模型方法相比，所提出的模型显著提高了对未来财务风险的预测能力，尤其是在披露内容复杂且详尽的公司中。研究发现，财报电话会议中微妙的管理层与分析师互动包含了对市场参与者相关的重要信息。具体而言，交叉引用、新主题的引入以及更积极的语气与后续风险的降低相关，这些均由所提出的方法所识别。对于研究人员和从业者而言，这项工作展示了如何将管理层沟通的理论与实证证据融入预测模型设计，从而支持在金融市场中更准确、可解释和负责任地使用人工智能。

title: Workflow Automation in Open-Source Software Development: Accelerating Innovation Through Mechanization and Orchestration
abstract: This study develops a conceptual framework distinguishing two mechanisms of workflow automation: mechanization and orchestration. Mechanization automates discrete, self-contained, repeatable tasks through standardized execution to enhance consistency, reliability, and efficiency, while orchestration automates the communication between tasks, workers, and stages, which facilitates information flow and coordination. We theorize that these mechanisms differentially affect incremental versus substantive innovation. Using a multimethod approach integrating machine learning and econometrics, we analyze the effects of workflow automation in open-source software development, demonstrating that mechanization accelerates maintenance-oriented exploitative innovation, whereas orchestration accelerates development-oriented explorative innovation. This mechanization-orchestration distinction extends beyond software contexts. For practitioners, aligning automation strategies with innovation goals is essential: deploy mechanization to enhance operational efficiency and support incremental improvements in stable environments; and implement orchestration to enable adaptive coordination in exploratory, high-velocity development requiring creativity and flexibility. For policymakers, understanding this distinction informs workforce development and technology adoption policies, as automation reshapes work by shifting human contribution from routine execution toward coordinated problem solving and strategic decision making.
title_cn: 开放源代码软件开发中的工作流自动化：通过机械化和编排加速创新
abstract_cn: 本研究建立了一个概念框架，区分了工作流程自动化的两种机制：机械化和编排。机械化通过标准化执行自动化离散的、自我封闭的、可重复的任务，以增强一致性、可靠性和效率，而编排则自动化任务、工作人员和各个阶段之间的沟通，促进信息流和协调。我们理论推测，这些机制对增量创新和实质性创新的影响存在差异。通过结合机器学习和计量经济学的多方法研究，我们分析了工作流程自动化在开源软件开发中的影响，展示机械化加速了以维护为导向的剥削性创新，而编排加速了以开发为导向的探索性创新。机械化与编排的区分超越了软件领域。对于从业者而言，将自动化策略与创新目标对齐至关重要：在稳定环境中部署机械化以增强运营效率并支持增量改进；同时实施编排以在需要创造力和灵活性的探索性、高速开发中实现自适应协调。对于政策制定者而言，理解这一区分对于制定劳动力发展和技术采纳政策至关重要，因为自动化通过将人类的贡献从常规执行转向协调的解决问题和战略决策，重塑了工作。

title: Editor’s Comments
abstract: This year marks MIS Quarterly's 50th year in operation.The editorials in Volume 50 will pay tribute to the journal's 50 years in multiple ways.We begin by taking a journey through the history of the journal through the lens of the editorials. 1 In writing this editorial, I cannot help but feel a bit nostalgic as I think about the people who paved the path for us to be able to have conversations about shifting research topics, new and improved research methods, or how to solve the latest "crisis" in the discipline.In the late 1960s, some very visionary scholars were planning the future of a discipline-a discipline they felt would be important to the future of organizations, but one about which no one knew.And, so, the journal's history does not start in 1977, but rather a decade before.A great deal of work had to go on behind the scenes prior to launching such an endeavor.First and foremost, we had to have a discipline. A Discipline Is BornIn the late 1960s, Gordon Davis, Gary Dickson, and Tom Hoffman were planning a new degree program that would focus on how organizations used information systems.In 1968, they started the first formal degree program in MIS at the University of Minnesota.In 1974, Gordon wrote the first textbook for MIS-Management Information Systems: Conceptual Foundations, Structure and Development (Davis, 1974).Gordon's foundational work served as a model for other programs, and between 1968 and 1977, new MIS programs were launched in schools including the University of Georgia in 1971 and the University of Arizona in 1974. 2 We take for granted that MIS programs around the world exist to train the next generation of IS scholars, but that was not the case in those early times.In the 1980s, the University of Minnesota and Indiana University ran summer institutes to train people in MIS and provide a mechanism for transitioning scholars from other disciplines to teach and perform research in MIS. The First Journal for the FieldAfter years of planning and preparation, a new journal was born in March 1977.It was made possible by a joint venture of the MIS Research Center and the Society for Management Information Systems (SMIS), which today is the Society for Information Management (SIM). 3Due to the relationship with SMIS, it was important that there was content in the journal for practitioners; at the same time, the journal was supposed to be a place for researchers to communicate their results.Prior to the launch of MIS Quarterly, the work of MIS academics was published in various places, and also often rejected from those places due to lack of fit.The need for a journal was significant, but funding would prove to be a challenge: "Recognize that we wanted a journal in which MIS Academics could publish while our primary source of funding was a society primarily of information systems practitioners.As a result, the vast majority of our readers would be practitioners.The task was to define a product that could satisfy both groups. One feature we used in the early days to build circulation was interviews with CEOs" (Dickson, 1982, pp.vi-vii).1 Although there will be occasional acknowledgement of events happening outside of MIS Quarterly, I apologize for any omission of people, programs, or publications.Please recognize that this is my personal journey, and your experience may be different.
title_cn: 编辑意见
abstract_cn:
今年标志着《管理信息系统季刊》运营的第50年。第50卷的社论将以多种方式向期刊创办50周年致敬。我们首先通过社论的视角回顾该期刊的历史。撰写这篇社论时，我不禁感到有些怀旧，因为我想到那些为我们能够进行有关研究主题变化、新的改进研究方法或如何解决学科内最新“危机”的讨论铺平道路的人们。20世纪60年代末，一些富有远见的学者正在规划一个学科的未来——他们认为这个学科对组织的未来将至关重要，但当时却鲜有人知。因此，该期刊的历史开始于1977年之前的大约十年。在这样一个项目启动之前，幕后的工作需要付出大量的努力。首先，我们需要有一个明确的学科。

学科的诞生
在20世纪60年代末，戈登·戴维斯、加里·迪克森和汤姆·霍夫曼正在策划一个新的学位项目，聚焦于组织如何使用信息系统。1968年，他们在明尼苏达大学启动了第一个正式的管理信息系统（MIS）学位项目。1974年，戈登撰写了MIS领域的第一本教科书——《管理信息系统：概念基础、结构与发展》（Davis, 1974）。戈登的基础性工作为其他项目提供了模型，而在1968年至1977年间，包括乔治亚大学（1971年）和亚利桑那大学（1974年）在内的多所院校陆续开设了新的MIS项目。我们现在理所当然地认为全球有MIS项目来培养下一代信息系统学者，但在早期并非如此。在20世纪80年代，明尼苏达大学和印第安纳大学举办暑期研讨会，以培训人们在MIS领域的知识，并为其他学科的学者转型到MIS领域进行教学和研究提供机制。

该领域的第一本期刊
经过多年的规划和准备，一本新的期刊于1977年3月诞生。它的诞生是由MIS研究中心和管理信息系统协会（SMIS，现为信息管理协会SIM）共同推动的。由于与SMIS的关系，期刊内容需要兼顾从业者的需求；同时，这里也是研究人员交流研究成果的地方。在《管理信息系统季刊》创刊之前，MIS学者的研究成果刊登在各种地方，但往往由于不适合而被拒绝。期刊的需求非常显著，但资金问题却是一大挑战：“请认识到，我们希望有一本期刊，让MIS学者发表文章，而我们的主要资金来源是一个以信息系统从业者为主的协会。因此，我们的大多数读者将是从业者。我们的任务是定义一款可以同时满足这两个群体的产品。我们在早期吸引读者的一个特征是与首席执行官的访谈”（Dickson, 1982, pp.vi-vii）。尽管在社论中偶尔会提到《管理信息系统季刊》之外发生的事件，但我为可能遗漏的人物、项目或出版物表示歉意。请认识到，这是我个人的旅程，而您的经历可能会有所不同。

title: Trustworthiness in Computational Theory Construction: Dimensionalization and Category Surfacing1
abstract: In this methods article, we unpack how researchers can foster trustworthiness in dimensionalization and category surfacing (DCS), a key method family within the genre of computational theory construction (CTC). Information systems (IS), management, and organizational scholars are increasingly leveraging DCS tools such as topic modeling, word embeddings, and clustering to surface latent categories and dimensions from textual data for theory construction. Yet they struggle because evaluations of such research often default to transparency, operationalized as replicability and accountability, which obscures the analytical choices that actually make DCS research rigorous. In this study, we recast transparency as a means toward trustworthiness. We treat researchers’ analytical moves as the primary unit of methodological reasoning in how they design, conduct, and disclose their choices across research phases. We develop a framework that authors, reviewers, and editors can use to construct and evaluate DCS research. The framework specifies how trustworthiness arises from the interplay of two research design choices: primacy to theoretical versus practice lexicons, and whether the content of texts or the structure of the corpus carries the theoretical load. We articulate expectations for conduct and disclosure across these design choices, clarifying how proportionate reasoning anchors trustworthiness. We conclude with implications for advancing trustworthiness within the broader CTC community and across other computational approaches to research.
title_cn: 计算理论构建中的可信性：维度化与类别显现1
abstract_cn: 在本文中，我们探讨了研究人员如何在维度化和类别呈现（DCS）方面培养可信度，这是计算理论构建（CTC）这一领域中的一个关键方法家族。信息系统（IS）、管理和组织学者越来越多地利用DCS工具，如主题建模、词嵌入和聚类，从文本数据中提取潜在的类别和维度，以进行理论构建。然而，他们在评估这些研究时常常依赖于透明性，即可复制性和问责制，这掩盖了实际上使DCS研究严谨的分析选择。在本研究中，我们将透明性重新定义为实现可信度的一种手段。我们将研究人员的分析步骤视为方法论推理的主要单位，探讨他们在研究各个阶段如何设计、实施和披露选择。我们开发了一个框架，供作者、审稿人和编辑用于构建和评估DCS研究。该框架明确了可信度如何源于两种研究设计选择之间的相互作用：理论与实践词汇的优先性，以及文本内容或语料结构是否承担理论负荷。我们阐明了在这些设计选择中对行为和披露的期望，明确了如何通过适当的推理支撑可信度。最后，我们讨论了在更广泛的CTC社区及其他计算研究方法中推进可信度的意义。

title: When Bots Evaluate Humans: Delegation to Bots and the Reshaping of Authority
abstract: Information systems scholars typically frame the delegation of tasks to AI-based bots as a means of improving efficiency and supporting decision-making. Yet when evaluative tasks are delegated to supervisory bots, authority is transferred to them as well. This study examines how such authority, once conferred on bots, is contested and redistributed by the humans whose work is subject to the bot’s evaluation. We investigate this process in the context of Wikipedia, an online peer-production community in which an antivandalism bot was given the task of autonomously reverting vandalized, i.e., maliciously edited, contributions. Drawing on the concept of performative authority, we traced how community members negotiated the enactment of the bot’s newfound authority with the bot’s developers through authority-negotiation design moves. We found that these moves were the outcome of a recursive process marked by the redistribution of authority across actors in decisions on vandalism, the institutionalization of structures that shaped how authority was influenced, and the evolving actions of the bot itself, which triggered renewed contestation over time. Within the context of a peer-production community, our study offers fresh insight into how authority delegated to bots evolves as a dynamic cocreation process after delegation and how humans reclaim authority once it has been ceded to a supervisory bot. We shed light on how humans preserve authority, professional discretion, and the meaningfulness of their work in AI-mediated settings.
title_cn: 当机器评估人类：对机器人的委托与权力的重塑
abstract_cn: 信息系统学者通常将任务委托给基于人工智能的机器人视为提高效率和支持决策的一种手段。然而，当评估任务被委托给监督机器人时，权威也会转移到它们身上。本研究探讨了这种一旦赋予机器人的权威是如何被其工作的对象——即受到机器人评估的人类——所质疑和重新分配的。我们在维基百科这一在线协作社区的背景下调查了这一过程，其中一个反恶意破坏机器人被赋予自动恢复恶意编辑内容的任务。基于表演性权威的概念，我们追踪了社区成员如何通过权威-协商设计举措与机器人的开发者协商机器人的新获得权威的实施。我们发现，这些举措是受权威在决策中的重新分配、影响权威的结构的制度化以及机器人自身不断演变的行动所标志的递归过程的结果，后者随时间引发了新的质疑。在这个协作生产社区的背景下，我们的研究提供了有关被委托给机器人的权威如何作为一种动态共创过程在委托后演变的全新见解，以及人类如何在权威已经被交给监督机器人后重新夺回权威。我们揭示了人类如何在人工智能介导的环境中维护权威、专业裁量权及其工作的意义。

title: Thinking and feeling about novelty: How cognition and emotion shape investment in novel ideas
abstract: Abstract While prior research on the strategic framing of innovation highlights the cognitive mechanisms underlying novelty evaluation, we know little about the corresponding emotional mechanisms. Drawing on appraisal theory, construal level theory, and the literature on emotions, we theorize two distinct appraisal‐emotion pathways through which the framing of novel ideas evokes hope and awe among investors with different motives. We argue that high‐construal framing supplements economically motivated investors' low‐level feasibility orientation, which evokes hope and increases their willingness to invest. By contrast, low‐construal framing supplements non‐economically motivated investors' high‐level desirability orientation, which evokes awe and increases their willingness to invest. We test and find some support for these within‐motive pathways across three studies. Our study offers new theoretical and practical insights on the strategic framing of novel ideas.
title_cn: 思考与感知新事物：认知和情感如何影响对新想法的投资
abstract_cn: 摘要 先前关于创新战略框架的研究强调了新颖性评估的认知机制，但我们对相应的情感机制知之甚少。基于评价理论、构念层次理论以及情感文献，我们理论化了两条截然不同的评价-情感路径，通过这些路径，新颖观点的框架引发了具有不同动机的投资者的希望和敬畏。我们认为，高层次的框架补充了经济动机投资者的低层次可行性导向，进而引发希望并增加他们的投资意愿。相反，低层次的框架补充了非经济动机投资者的高层次可取性导向，激发了敬畏感，并提高了他们的投资意愿。我们在三项研究中测试并找到了一些对这些动机内路径的支持。我们的研究为新颖观点的战略框架提供了新的理论和实践见解。

title: When creation and capture diverge: Why breakthrough inventions do not break through alike
abstract: Abstract Reserch Summary Breakthrough inventions are central to firms' competitive advantage, yet what constitutes a breakthrough remains unclear. We examine the relationship between technological quality (measured by forward citations) and economic value (measured by grant‐day abnormal stock‐returns) of patents. Using U.S. patents assigned to publicly listed firms, we find that among the most exceptional inventions—that is, breakthroughs—the correlation between these two measures disappears: technologically outstanding patents are not necessarily the most economically valuable. We attribute this divergence to a structural tension between value creation and value capture in patenting, driven by novelty, the availability of complementary assets, and competitive dynamics. Firms that successfully manage both dimensions earn a disproportionate market premium. This outcome is often associated with firms that diversify their technological portfolios asynchronously across technology S‐curves. Managerial Summary Breakthrough innovations are widely viewed as the lifeblood of corporate success. Yet what truly defines a breakthrough—and how its value should be assessed—remains unclear. Companies typically rely on two indicators: technological quality (measured by forward citations) and economic value (captured by stock market reactions at patent grant). Conventional wisdom assumes these move together. Our analysis of U.S. patents challenges this view. For the most exceptional inventions, technological quality and economic value diverge. We identify the drivers of this tension and show that firms able to manage it earn disproportionate market returns.
title_cn: 当创造与捕捉发生分歧时：为何突破性发明并非总是以相同的方式突破
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 突破性发明是企业竞争优势的核心，但什么才构成突破性发明尚不明确。我们考察了专利的技术质量（通过向前引用来衡量）与经济价值（通过授予专利时的异常股票回报来衡量）之间的关系。以美国授予的专利为数据，针对公开上市公司，我们发现，在最为卓越的发明，即突破性发明中，这两种指标之间的相关性消失：技术上卓越的专利并不一定是经济上最有价值的。我们将这种差异归因于专利中价值创造与价值捕获之间的结构性紧张，这种紧张由新颖性、互补资产的可用性以及竞争动态驱动。成功管理这两个维度的公司能够获得不成比例的市场溢价。这种结果通常与那些在技术S曲线中非同步地多样化其技术组合的公司相关联。 管理总结 突破性创新被广泛视为企业成功的生命线。然而，真正定义突破的标准以及如何评估其价值仍不明确。公司通常依赖两个指标：技术质量（通过向前引用衡量）和经济价值（通过专利授予时的股市反应衡量）。传统智慧认为这两者是同步的。我们对美国专利的分析挑战了这一观点。对于最卓越的发明，技术质量和经济价值之间存在分歧。我们识别了这一紧张关系的驱动因素，并表明能够管理这一关系的公司能获得不成比例的市场回报。

title: Families in venture capital
abstract: Abstract Research Summary This exploratory paper introduces a new type of family business by studying the investment strategies of family‐managed venture capital funds (“Family VCs”) across a multi‐country setting. It shows that Family VCs are more likely to invest in (syndicate with) geographically proximate startups (investors), indicating a preference for local investments. This tendency is stronger when the VC is named after the family and the family is closely involved in the decision‐making process of the fund. I provide suggestive evidence that this pattern reflects both superior local knowledge (rational response) and home bias (non‐rational response), with the latter becoming more pronounced when performance pressure is lower. Managerial Summary Family‐managed VC funds (Family VCs), managing roughly $29 billion, represent an important segment of the venture capital industry. I show that family control shapes both the selection of startups and syndicate partners. Family VCs are indeed more likely to support ventures and partner with investors from their communities, particularly when family members are highly involved in investment decisions and the fund is named after the family. I provide suggestive evidence that this local preference stems from both rational factors, like superior local knowledge and networks, and a non‐rational preference for local investments. Their local focus becomes relatively less pronounced when families must demonstrate strong financial performance, such as when a follow‐on fund has not yet been raised and during competitive market conditions.
title_cn: 风险投资中的家庭
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究概要 本文探索性地介绍了一种新型的家族企业，研究了跨国背景下家族管理的风险投资基金（“家族风险投资基金”）的投资策略。研究表明，家族风险投资基金更倾向于投资于地理上接近的创业公司（投资者），显示出对本地投资的偏好。当风险投资基金以家族的名字命名，并且家族在基金的决策过程中紧密参与时，这种倾向更为明显。 我提供了暗示性证据，表明这一模式反映了优越的地方知识（理性反应）和家乡偏好（非理性反应），而当业绩压力较低时，后者的表现更为明显。 管理摘要 家族管理的风险投资基金（家族风险投资基金）管理约290亿美元，代表了风险投资行业的重要组成部分。 我指出，家族控制影响了创业公司的选择和合伙投资者的选择。家族风险投资基金确实更可能支持来自其社区的创业公司，并与来自社区的投资者合作，特别是当家族成员高度参与投资决策且基金以家族的名字命名时。我提供了暗示性证据，表明这一当地偏好源于理性因素，如优越的地方知识和网络，以及对本地投资的非理性偏好。当家族必须展示强劲的财务业绩时，例如当后续基金尚未筹集时以及在竞争市场条件下，其地方性关注相对减弱。

title: Information‐seeking lobbying and strategic stockpiling under trade policy uncertainty
abstract: Abstract Research Summary This study investigates how firms engage in information‐seeking lobbying to address trade policy uncertainty. I argue that lobbying enables firms to gain early insights into forthcoming tariff actions, allowing them to strategically stockpile products likely to be targeted. Using shipping records of US firms during the 2018 US–China trade war, I find that lobbying firms increased imports of soon‐to‐be‐tariffed products before tariff lists were publicly released, compared to non‐lobbying firms. This selective stockpiling pattern disappeared after tariff announcements. Further analysis shows that lobbying firms were less likely to request tariff exemptions for products they had preemptively stockpiled, suggesting that information‐seeking lobbying during policy formulation provides an additional benefit by reducing the need for costly government engagement during the implementation phase. Managerial Summary To manage heightened trade policy uncertainty, firms often adjust global supply chains or engage with the government—but how can they integrate these strategies? This study proposes that firms can engage in lobbying not just to influence policy outcomes, but to gain early insights into pending trade actions. Using data from the 2018 US–China trade war, I find that lobbying firms stockpiled more of the products that were later targeted by tariffs before those tariffs were publicly announced. These firms were also less likely to request tariff exemptions for products they had preemptively stockpiled, indicating potential cost savings by avoiding expensive government engagement. The findings underscore the strategic value of early‐stage lobbying and highlight the importance of coordination between government affairs and operation departments.
title_cn: 在贸易政策不确定性下的信息寻求游说与战略储备
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 本研究探讨了企业如何通过信息寻求游说来应对贸易政策不确定性。我认为，游说使企业能够提前洞察即将出台的关税措施，从而使它们能够战略性地囤积可能受到影响的产品。通过分析2018年美中贸易战期间美国企业的运输记录，我发现，与非游说企业相比，游说企业在关税清单公开发布之前增加了即将被征税产品的进口。这种选择性囤积模式在关税公告后消失。进一步分析表明，游说企业不太可能为其预先囤积的产品申请关税豁免，这表明在政策制定期间的信息寻求游说提供了额外的好处，减少了在实施阶段与政府进行高成本接触的需求。 管理总结 为了应对加剧的贸易政策不确定性，企业通常会调整全球供应链或与政府互动——但它们如何将这些策略整合起来呢？本研究提出，企业可以通过游说不仅影响政策结果，还可以获得即将进行的贸易行动的早期洞察。通过分析2018年美中贸易战的数据，我发现游说企业在关税公开宣布之前囤积了更多后来被征税的产品。这些企业也不太可能为其预先囤积的产品申请关税豁免，表明通过避免昂贵的政府接触可能实现成本节约。研究结果强调了早期阶段游说的战略价值，并突显了政府事务与运营部门之间协调的重要性。

title: Social comparison and the value of performance trajectory information: A field experiment in the workplace
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Many new employees leave their firms before realizing the returns to experience. One reason is that they cannot see how performance evolves with tenure. We study whether making performance trajectories visible improves retention and firm performance. In a randomized controlled trial at a multinational spa chain in China, workers received twice‐weekly information for 28 weeks about the performance path of a high‐performing senior coworker. The intervention reduces new‐worker attrition by 11–12% and increases revenue by 15% in stores with more new workers. These effects are largely driven by reduced stress and improved mental health, as the information lowers their beliefs about how well senior coworkers performed early in their careers. By contrast, showing only the current performance of a similar‐tenure peer has no detectable effect. Managerial Summary In many firms, new employees leave before realizing the returns to experience because they lack information about how performance evolves with tenure. We examine whether making senior workers’ performance trajectories visible improves retention and firm performance. In a randomized controlled trial involving over 7,000 workers at a multinational spa chain in China, employees received twice‐weekly information for 28 weeks about the performance trajectory of a high‐performing senior coworker. The intervention reduces new‐worker attrition by 11–12% and increases revenue by 15% in stores with more new workers. These effects are driven by reduced stress and improved mental health, as the information lowers beliefs about senior coworkers’ early‐career performance. Overall, our findings show that making senior workers’ performance trajectories visible can mitigate social comparison costs within firms.
title_cn: 社会比较与绩效轨迹信息的价值：一项职场中的实地实验
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 许多新员工在未能体验到经验回报前便离开了公司。其中一个原因是他们看不到绩效如何随任期而变化。我们研究了使绩效轨迹可视化是否能改善员工留任率和公司绩效。在中国一家跨国水疗连锁企业的随机对照试验中，员工在28周内每周两次接收一位高绩效高级同事的绩效发展信息。这一干预措施使新员工的流失率降低了11-12%，且在新员工较多的门店中，收入增加了15%。这些效果主要源于压力减轻和心理健康改善，因为该信息降低了他们对高级同事早期职业表现的期望。相反，仅展示类似任期同龄人的当前绩效没有显著影响。 管理摘要 在许多公司，新员工在未能体验到经验回报之前便离开，因为他们缺乏有关绩效如何随任期演变的信息。我们研究了使高级员工绩效轨迹可视化是否能改善留任率和企业绩效。在一项涉及7000多名员工的随机对照试验中，员工在28周内每周两次收到一位高绩效高级同事的绩效轨迹信息。这一干预措施使新员工的流失率降低了11-12%，并在新员工较多的门店中实现了15%的收入增长。这些效果源于压力的降低和心理健康的改善，因为该信息降低了对于高级同事早期职业表现的认知。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，使高级员工的绩效轨迹可视化能够缓解公司内部的社会比较成本。

title: Shaping expectations, losing flexibility: A study of <scp>CEO</scp> promises as strategic communication tools
abstract: Abstract Research Summary CEO promises are powerful but understudied communication tools. We develop a dual‐mechanism framework theorizing that while CEO promises elevate stakeholder expectations, they simultaneously constrain strategic flexibility. We argue that CEO promise‐making is shaped by two competing pressures: making more promises when the need to manage expectations upward is heightened and fewer promises when the need to preserve flexibility is increased. Further, we predict that under heightened uncertainty, CEOs preserve flexibility through strategic ambiguity (i.e., issuing promises with extended or vague time horizons and lower specificity). Leveraging Large Language Models (LLMs) to analyze over 69,000 earnings‐call transcripts from S&P 1500 firms (2010–2022), we identify 74,017 CEO promises and find support for our predictions. We contribute an original, publicly available dataset of CEO promises. Managerial Summary When CEOs publicly promise positive future results, they shape how investors and analysts view the company. These promises are a double‐edged sword: they can boost investor and stakeholder confidence, but they also lock the company into a pre‐determined path and make later shortfalls or pivots reputationally costly. Analyzing more than 69,000 earnings calls (2010–2022), we find that CEOs make more promises when needing to prove their legitimacy, such as during early tenure, when facing gender bias, or after missing earnings targets. However, in uncertain environments, CEOs often pull back from promise‐making or employ “strategic ambiguity” by making promises with vaguer timelines and details to maintain flexibility. Our analysis suggests that failing to deliver on these public commitments significantly increases the likelihood of CEO dismissal.
topics: Impact of AI and Big Data on Business and Society
title_cn: 塑造期望，失去灵活性：<scp>CEO</scp>承诺作为战略沟通工具的研究
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究摘要 首席执行官的承诺是一种强有力但尚未充分研究的沟通工具。我们构建了一个双机制框架，理论化认为，首席执行官的承诺虽然能提升利益相关者的期望，但同时也限制了战略灵活性。我们认为，首席执行官的承诺行为受到两种相互竞争的压力影响：在需要提高期望管理时，作出更多承诺，而在需要保持灵活性时，作出更少承诺。此外，我们预测在不确定性加剧的情况下，首席执行官通过战略模糊性来维持灵活性（即作出期限延长或模糊且不具体的承诺）。我们利用大型语言模型（LLMs）分析了来自标准普尔1500公司的69,000多份财报电话会议记录（2010–2022），识别出74,017个首席执行官的承诺，并支持我们的预测。我们贡献了一个原创的、公开可用的首席执行官承诺数据集。 管理总结 当首席执行官公开承诺积极的未来结果时，他们会影响投资者和分析师对公司的看法。这些承诺是一把双刃剑：它们可以增强投资者和利益相关者的信心，但也会将公司锁定在一个预定的路径上，使得后期的业绩不足或战略调整在声誉上代价高昂。分析超过69,000次财报电话会议（2010–2022），我们发现，在需要证明自己合法性的时候，如在任期初、面临性别偏见或财报未达标后，首席执行官会作出更多承诺。然而，在不确定的环境中，首席执行官往往会减少承诺的数量，或者通过作出模糊的时间表和细节的承诺来运用“战略模糊性”，以保持灵活性。我们的分析表明，未能兑现这些公开承诺显著增加了首席执行官被解雇的可能性。

title: Patent regime shift and firm innovation strategy: Evidence from the Second Amendment to China's Patent Law
abstract: Abstract Research Summary While changes in intellectual property rights (IPR) protection significantly shape firm innovation, the mechanisms driving firms' responses remain poorly understood. Leveraging the Second Amendment to China's Patent Law, which strengthens appropriability particularly for state‐owned enterprises (SOEs), as a natural experiment, we show that stronger IPR has mixed effects on SOEs' innovation. While SOEs increase the rate of innovation subsequent to the Amendment, they shift the direction of innovation toward more familiar areas in which they face a lesser need to adjust existing routines. This directional change suggests a quality decline in SOEs' innovation that may be attributed to path dependence. We further show that this change varies systematically depending on different firm‐ and industry‐level characteristics that loosen or tighten the historical grip of path dependence. Managerial Summary This study offers valuable insights for corporate leaders navigating intellectual property rights (IPR) reforms and shaping their firms' innovation strategies, particularly in emerging economies. While stronger IPR protection can increase innovation output, it may also lead firms to concentrate on familiar technologies rather than pursue more novel ideas. Thus, corporate leaders should look beyond patent volume as a performance metric and instead foster creative thinking and engage in external collaborations to access new, cutting‐edge knowledge. Such efforts can help firms move beyond established routines and strengthen their long‐term competitiveness. To promote innovation of greater novelty, policymakers must complement stronger IPR protection with broader institutional support, including enhancing economic freedom, encouraging market competition, and cultivating a culture that values breakthrough innovation.
title_cn: 专利制度变革与企业创新战略：来自中国专利法第二次修订的证据
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 虽然知识产权（IPR）保护的变化显著影响企业创新，但促使企业回应的机制仍未得到充分理解。我们利用中国专利法第二修正案作为自然实验，研究了加强对特别是国有企业（SOEs）收益性的保护如何影响创新。结果显示，较强的知识产权保护对国有企业的创新产生了复杂的影响。修正案后，国有企业的创新率有所提高，但创新方向却转向更为熟悉的领域，这些领域的调整需求较小。这样的方向性变化表明，国有企业的创新质量可能出现下降，这可以归因于路径依赖。我们进一步研究发现，这种变化在不同的企业和行业特征下表现出系统性差异，这些特征松动或加固了历史路径依赖的影响。 管理总结 本研究为企业领导者在应对知识产权（IPR）改革和制定公司创新战略方面提供了宝贵的见解，特别是在新兴经济体中。虽然更强的知识产权保护可以增加创新产出，但也可能导致企业更集中于熟悉的技术，而不是追求更新颖的想法。因此，企业领导者应超越专利数量这一绩效指标，促进创造性思维，并积极参与外部合作，以获取新的前沿知识。这些努力可以帮助企业超越既定的常规，增强其长期竞争力。为了促进更具创新性的成果，政策制定者必须在加强知识产权保护的同时，提供更广泛的制度支持，包括提升经济自由度、鼓励市场竞争和培养重视突破性创新的文化。

title: Hiring at the tip of the funnel: Externalizing the work of integrating and coordinating diverse human capital
abstract: Abstract Research Summary We adopt a network‐based perspective to examine the effects of hiring strategies in terms of the diversity of hiring sources. Considering the transferability of general and firm‐specific skills, we propose that firms can reduce integration costs while gaining diversity benefits when they hire from a focused set of firms that themselves hire broadly. We suggest that occupying this position in the mobility network enhances both innovation and productivity outcomes. Moreover, we posit that a strong cultural orientation, characterized by high intensity and consistency, further amplifies these benefits. Our analysis of mobility data from US public firms between 2005 and 2021 uncovers the pathways through which firms attain this position. Evidence from the panel matching method and fixed‐effects regressions provides support for our hypotheses. Managerial Summary We take a network perspective to understand how firms' hiring choices—particularly the range of companies they recruit from—shape their performance. We argue that firms can benefit when they hire from a small, consistent group of companies that themselves draw talent from many different firms. This approach allows firms to gain a wide variety of skills and experiences while keeping integration and onboarding challenges low, leading to more innovation and higher productivity. We also suggest that firms with a strong and consistent culture are even better positioned to take advantage of these benefits. Using data on employee movements among US public firms from 2005 to 2021, we show how firms attain this position, and find evidence in support of our hypotheses using panel matching and fixed effects models.
title_cn: 招聘的漏斗尖端：外部化整合和协调多元化人力资本的工作
abstract_cn:
摘要 研究总结 我们采用基于网络的视角来考察招聘策略对招聘来源多样性的影响。考虑到一般技能与公司特定技能的可转移性，我们提出公司可以通过从一组广泛招聘的公司中精心选择招聘对象，来降低整合成本并获得多样性带来的收益。我们认为，在流动网络中占据这一位置能够增强公司的创新和生产力成果。此外，我们假设强烈的文化导向，具有高度的强度和一致性，进一步放大了这些收益。我们对2005年至2021年间美国上市公司的流动数据分析揭示了公司获得这一位置的路径。来自面板匹配方法和固定效应回归的证据支持了我们的假设。

管理总结 我们采用网络视角来理解公司在招聘选择上的决策——特别是它们从哪些公司招募人才——如何影响其绩效。我们认为，当公司从一小组一致性的公司中招聘，而这些公司本身也从许多不同的公司吸引人才时，公司将会受益。这种做法使公司能够获得多样的技能和经验，同时保持整合和入职挑战较低，从而促进更多的创新和更高的生产力。我们还建议，拥有强大且一致文化的公司更能利用这些收益。通过分析2005至2021年间美国上市公司员工流动数据，我们展示了公司如何获得这一位置，并使用面板匹配和固定效应模型找到了支持我们假设的证据。

title: Resource redeployment in multi‐business firms: Centralized or decentralized?
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Although multi‐business firms can benefit from resource redeployment, we know little about the effects of alternative organizational arrangements on profits. This study examines a critical organizational choice, namely the centralization or decentralization of decision making. A formal model demonstrates that in the presence of business unit agency costs and costs of centralization, the profits from centralization versus decentralization depend not only on business relatedness—as emphasized in prior research—but also on return asymmetries between businesses. Moreover, in contrast with much of the research on contemporaneous resource sharing, the profitability of centralization does not increase monotonically with relatedness. The monotonic relationship holds only when relatedness leads to potential profits from redeployment in the intermediate range. As relatedness increases further, the advantage of centralization may decrease. Managerial Summary Diversified firms often redeploy resources from one business to another, and the firms must decide whether to centralize or decentralize their redeployment decisions. Much of the literature on related diversification in general, and with respect to redeployment in particular, suggests that related diversification will lead to higher profits when decisions are centralized. However, the analysis presented here shows that centralization may not lead to higher profits from redeployment for highly related diversification, and firms may be able to obtain equivalent or higher profits by decentralizing these decisions.
title_cn: 多业务企业中的资源再配置：集中式还是分散式？
abstract_cn: 摘要 研究总结 尽管多业务公司可以通过资源重组获益，但我们对替代组织安排对利润的影响知之甚少。本研究考察了一个重要的组织选择，即决策的集中化或分散化。一个正式模型表明，在存在业务单位代理成本和集中化成本的情况下，集中化与分散化的利润不仅依赖于业务相关性——如以往研究强调的——还依赖于不同业务之间的回报不对称性。此外，与许多关于同时资源共享的研究相反，集中化的盈利能力并不会随着相关性的增加而单调上升。只有当相关性导致在中间范围内有潜在的重组利润时，这种单调关系才成立。当相关性进一步增加时，集中化的优势可能会减弱。 管理总结 多元化企业通常会将资源从一个业务重组到另一个业务，这些公司必须决定是集中还是分散他们的重组决策。关于相关多元化的文献，特别是在重组方面的研究，普遍认为当决策集中化时，相关多元化将导致更高的利润。然而，本研究的分析显示，对于高度相关的多元化，集中化可能并未带来更高的重组利润，而企业可能通过分散这些决策获得相当或更高的利润。

title: When does category spanning hurt or help producers?
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Scholars have theorized many factors shaping whether category spanning helps or hurts producers. We first synthesize evidence by meta‐analyzing 25 years of empirical research, which reveals a null effect of spanning on average, yet with significant subsample heterogeneity. To unpack it, we theorize and find that spanning hurts producers more (i) when spanning occurs within bounded (vs. unbounded) category systems, (ii) when category associations are made by third parties (vs. insiders), (iii) when spanning is located at the product (vs. producer) level, and (iv) when spanning is occurring at once (vs. over time). Two mechanisms underpin these relationships: on the audience side, spanning influences evaluations when it is salient; on the producer side, spanning results in more positive outcomes when producers can control how their spanning behavior is conveyed to audiences. Because these two mechanisms operate jointly, their combined influence can result in spanning having a null, a positive, or a negative net effect. Our study identifies, across 16 theoretical configurations, where these three baseline effects should be expected and clarifies why. Managerial Summary Firms face a strategic dilemma: should they span across categories or stay focused? Prior studies show mixed results on whether spanning helps or hurts performance. Our findings suggest that outcomes depend on how salient spanning is to audiences and how controllable it is for producers. Spanning tends to hurt performance (i) when the categorization system is bounded (vs. unbounded), (ii) when third parties (vs. insiders) highlight the diversification, (iii) when individual products (vs. producers) span categories, and (iv) when spanning occurs simultaneously (vs. over time). Firms can benefit from spanning, but success depends on managing these four factors to reduce saliency and enhance controllability.
title_cn: 跨类别的拓展何时会对生产者造成伤害或带来帮助？
abstract_cn:
摘要 研究总结 学者们已理论化多种因素影响类别跨越对生产者的帮助或伤害。我们首先通过对25年实证研究的元分析综合证据，揭示跨越在平均水平上没有显著效应，但存在显著的子样本异质性。为了解释这一点，我们理论化并发现跨越对生产者的伤害更大，具体表现为：(i) 当跨越发生在有限（vs. 无限）类别系统内时，(ii) 当类别关联由第三方（vs. 内部人员）作出时，(iii) 当跨越发生在产品（vs. 生产者）层面时，以及(iv) 当跨越同时发生（vs. 随时间发生）时。这些关系背后有两个机制支撑：在受众方面，跨越在显著性时影响评估；在生产者方面，当生产者能控制跨越行为传达给受众的方式时，跨越结果更为积极。由于这两个机制共同作用，它们的综合影响可能导致跨越产生零、正或负的净效应。我们的研究识别了在16种理论配置中，这三种基线效应应预期存在的情境，并阐明了原因。

管理总结 企业面临战略困境：是应该跨越类别还是保持专注？以往研究对跨越是否有助于或伤害绩效显示出混合结果。我们的发现表明，结果依赖于跨越对受众的显著性和对生产者的可控性。跨越往往在以下情况下会伤害绩效：(i) 当分类系统是有限的（vs. 无限的），(ii) 当第三方（vs. 内部人员）强调多元化时，(iii) 当单个产品（vs. 生产者）跨越类别时，以及(iv) 当跨越同时发生（vs. 随时间发生）。企业可以从跨越中受益，但成功依赖于管理这四个因素，以降低显著性并增强可控性。

title: Inter‐platform ecosystems
abstract: Abstract Research Summary We extend ecosystem theory to cases in which platforms are complementors to each other: inter‐platform ecosystems. Analyzing web traffic data on 241 European platforms, we identify and characterize demand‐side inter‐platform ecosystems, and propose a theory of why they emerge. We posit that demand‐side inter‐platform ecosystems solve matching problems generated by externalities platforms impose on each other. We describe four strategies platforms implement to solve these problems: network fusion (hosting competitor content), user‐community‐driven interactions (facilitating cross‐posting), meta‐platform (aggregating another platform), and platform concatenation (referring users to another platform for customized complementary services). We link these strategies to the nature of the externalities, the types of platforms involved and their competitive relationship. We conclude with implications for theory and suggestions for further research. Managerial Summary Platforms increasingly act as complementors to each other, creating “inter‐platform ecosystems” to boost cross‐platform interactions and reduce search costs. Using web traffic data on 241 European platforms, we identify four strategies they use to that end: network fusion (hosting competitor content), user‐community‐driven interactions (facilitating cross‐posting), meta‐platform (aggregating another platform), and platform concatenation (referring users to another platform for customized complementary services). These strategies pose three main management challenges. First, because no single platform necessarily orchestrates the ecosystem, platforms must navigate complex multi‐party coordination through bilateral agreements. Second, platforms face coopetition tensions: cooperating multiplies interactions but increases disintermediation risk. Third, pricing structures must account for cross‐platform interdependencies, where a platform's value depends on how its users interact with other platforms’.
title_cn: 跨平台生态系统
abstract_cn:
摘要 研究总结 我们将生态系统理论扩展到平台之间互为补充的情况：跨平台生态系统。通过分析241个欧洲平台的网络流量数据，我们识别并描述了需求侧跨平台生态系统，并提出了其产生原因的理论。我们认为，需求侧跨平台生态系统解决了平台之间因外部性引发的匹配问题。我们描述了平台为解决这些问题而实施的四种策略：网络融合（托管竞争对手内容）、用户社区驱动的互动（促进跨发布）、元平台（聚合另一个平台）和平台串联（将用户引导至另一个平台以获取定制的互补服务）。我们将这些策略与外部性的性质、涉及的平台类型及其竞争关系联系起来。最后，我们总结了对理论的启示和进一步研究的建议。

管理摘要 平台越来越多地作为彼此的补充者，创建“跨平台生态系统”，以促进跨平台互动并降低搜索成本。通过对241个欧洲平台的网络流量数据的分析，我们识别出了它们为此使用的四种策略：网络融合（托管竞争对手内容）、用户社区驱动的互动（促进跨发布）、元平台（聚合另一个平台）和平台串联（将用户引导至另一个平台以获取定制的互补服务）。这些策略带来了三大管理挑战。首先，由于没有单一平台必然主导生态系统，平台必须通过双边协议来协调复杂的多方关系。其次，平台面临合作竞争的紧张局势：合作会增加互动，但也增加了去中介化的风险。第三，定价结构必须考虑跨平台的相互依赖性，即一个平台的价值取决于其用户与其他平台的互动方式。

title: Unlocking novel knowledge recombinations: The effect of artificial intelligence on inventive activity
abstract: Abstract Research Summary Complementing the role of AI in facilitating search and identifying combinations of high value in inventive activity, we argue that AI fundamentally alters the innovation landscape by unlocking new combinations that were previously infeasible. This effect arises because AI acts as a powerful shared layer due to its predictive capabilities and its ability to transmit solutions across domains, thereby creating a bridge between previously unconnected elements. Utilizing a matched sample of patents, we show that inventions incorporating AI exhibit a greater degree of novel recombinations compared to those without AI, and that our proposed bridging mechanism is consistent with these novel recombinations. Our study contributes by identifying a new mechanism by which recombinations emerge in inventive activity while also highlighting the role of enabling technologies such as AI in facilitating such recombinations. Managerial Summary How does AI impact inventive activity? We examine the question by studying the patenting activity of US firms over the period 2005–2023. We argue that AI fundamentally alters the innovation landscape by unlocking new combinations that were previously infeasible. This effect arises because AI acts as a powerful shared layer due to its predictive capabilities and its ability to transmit shared solutions, thereby creating a bridge between previously unconnected technological elements. Our analysis demonstrates that inventions that build on AI involve novel recombinations to a greater degree compared to inventions that don’t, and that AI bridges and connects knowledge domains that were hitherto disparate. These findings indicate that AI is more than just an invention of a new method of invention, and that it fundamentally reshapes the nature of inventive activity.
title_cn: 解锁新颖知识重组：人工智能对创造性活动的影响
abstract_cn:
摘要 研究摘要 在阐述人工智能（AI）在促进搜索和识别高价值的创新活动组合中的作用时，我们认为AI根本上改变了创新格局，通过解锁以前难以实现的新组合。此效应的产生是因为AI作为一个强大的共享层，凭借其预测能力及在不同领域间传递解决方案的能力，构建了之前未连接元素之间的桥梁。通过利用匹配样本的专利，我们展示了与AI相关的发明相比于没有AI的发明，展现了更大程度的新颖重组，并且我们提出的桥接机制与这些新颖重组是一致的。我们的研究贡献在于识别出创新活动中重组产生的一个新机制，同时也强调了像AI这样的支持技术在促进这些重组中的作用。

管理摘要 AI如何影响创新活动？我们通过研究美国公司在2005年至2023年期间的专利活动来探讨这一问题。我们认为，AI根本上改变了创新格局，通过解锁以前难以实现的新组合。此效应的产生是因为AI作为一个强大的共享层，凭借其预测能力和传递共享解决方案的能力，构建了之前未连接的技术元素之间的桥梁。我们的分析表明，依赖AI的发明相较于不依赖AI的发明，涉及了更大程度的新颖重组，并且AI跨越并连接了之前存在差异的知识领域。这些发现表明，AI不仅仅是一个新发明的方法，而是根本上重塑了创新活动的本质。

title: AI orchestrator: How recommendation algorithms shape complementor strategy and market equality
abstract: Abstract Research Summary This study investigates how AI recommendation algorithms shape complementor strategies and market equality on digital platforms. Using two quasi‐natural experiments from a food‐sharing platform, we examine impacts of sequential algorithmic upgrades: from a location‐based baseline to popularity‐based (PopRec) and then personalization‐based (PersRec). Analyses of over 1.7 million observations reveal that PopRec drives complementors to concentrate on a few offerings, while PersRec encourages new product introduction; yet these strategic shifts come at the expense of one another. Furthermore, PopRec reduces revenues of superstars but boosts revenues for long‐tail complementors, enhancing market equality. Conversely, PersRec exacerbates market inequality by asymmetrically benefiting superstars.
