Our study contributes to research on interfirm alliances, intraorganizational networks, and innovation while offering practical insights for managers. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2022.17230 .
title_cn: 防火墙背后的知识：联盟伙伴之间的竞争如何限制内部公司的创新
abstract_cn: 组织可以通过其联盟组合获得可观的知识协同效应，研究表明，当合作伙伴之间存在直接竞争时，企业可能会获得更大的利益。然而，企业只有在允许其内部发明者自由交流从这些合作伙伴那里获得的知识以创造新组合的情况下，才能捕获这种协同效应。我们对此前提出的假设提出质疑，并认为，由于在这种配置中，合作伙伴更关注知识向竞争对手泄露的风险，因此他们会施压焦点企业实施可靠的保护措施，以限制其组织内部知识的访问和处理。我们预测，这些保护措施所施加的限制会在焦点企业的发明者合作网络中体现为更高的孤立性，这些限制的程度与焦点企业在其合作伙伴中的相对技术谈判能力密切相关。重要的是，这些保护措施并非没有成本，我们预测所引发的孤立性将影响焦点企业的创新绩效，削弱其创造和获取发明价值的能力。通过对制药企业的纵向样本分析，我们发现了对这些论点的持续支持。本研究为企业间联盟、组织内部网络和创新研究贡献了新的视角，同时为管理者提供了实用的见解。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2022.17230 获得。

title: Trajectory Normalizing Work in Unstable Production Environments: When Adapting Production Means Appearing Authentic
abstract: Organizations emphasize specific production practices to deal with authenticity pressures, but the practices that signal authenticity to audiences must be continually adapted when production environments are unstable. Changes in the environment can make production practices suddenly infeasible, compelling organizations to perform in different ways the highly visible practices that audiences have come to associate with authenticity. However, authenticity research tends to take the continuity of production practices for granted, focusing on whether certain practices are made visible or not, and leaving unexamined how practices are made legible as they are adapted. Drawing on 16 months of ethnographic fieldwork at a renowned winery (Cal-Cru), I identify a novel form of authenticity work—trajectory normalizing work—that Cal-Cru’s production team performed internally, out of view from external audiences, to guide production changes. Specifically, the team created contrast cues to inform their actions. They avoided changes that would noticeably alter parts of production visible to audiences, or that clashed with their own understanding of authenticity. Doing so created a reassuring sense among the team that they were departing from audience expectations to sustain, not compromise, the practices that conveyed authenticity. My study highlights the backstage tensions constructing authenticity in unstable production environments.
title_cn: 在不稳定生产环境中轨迹规范化工作：当适应生产手段显得真实时
abstract_cn: 组织强调特定的生产实践以应对真实性压力，但当生产环境不稳定时，向受众传达真实性的实践必须不断调整。环境的变化可能使生产实践突然变得不可行，迫使组织以不同的方式执行那些受众认同为真实性的高度可见的实践。然而，真实性研究往往假定生产实践的延续性，关注某些实践是否被显现，而未对实践在适应过程中如何变得可理解进行审视。基于在一家知名酒庄（Cal-Cru）进行的16个月的民族志田野研究，我识别出一种新型的真实性工作——轨迹规范工作——这是Cal-Cru的生产团队在内部、远离外部受众的视野中进行的，以指导生产变革。具体而言，团队创造了对比提示来指导他们的行动。他们避免进行会明显改变受众可见的生产部分的改变，或者与他们自己对真实性的理解相冲突的改变。这样做在团队中创造了一种令人放心的感觉，即他们在偏离受众期待的同时，维护而不是妥协那些传达真实性的实践。我的研究突显了在不稳定的生产环境中构建真实性的后台张力。

title: These Are My (Micro)Confessions: An Episodic Theory of Employee Microconfessions
abstract: The trend of moralizing work presents a paradox for contemporary workers. Employees equate their failures to live up to “good employee” ideals (e.g., always available, highly motivated, passionate) with moral failings. Yet, consistently meeting these ideals is unattainable for most employees. This manuscript introduces and develops the phenomenon of microconfessions—informal, low-magnitude confessions—as an overlooked tactic that employees use to alleviate the ongoing moral dilemma of falling short on moralized work ideals. Integrating self-disclosure and work moralization scholarship with insights from fields that have explicitly studied confession, I build a theory of employee microconfessions. I suggest that microconfessions provide the sharer with a sense of relief and a restored sense of morality, which in turn, have downstream consequences. I also pinpoint guilt—an emotion particularly relevant to the moralization of work—as key to activating and strengthening the effects of microconfessions. Finally, I illuminate how the information shared and the setting in which it is shared jointly influence the effects that I outline. My work establishes microconfessions as a unique form of workplace self-disclosure and pivots existing theories to consider functions of disclosure historically overlooked in organizational scholarship. It also contributes new understanding to how employees may experience and offset the moralization of work as well as when it is most advantageous for them to do so.
title_cn: 这些是我的（微）忏悔：员工微忏悔的情节理论
abstract_cn: 道德化工作的趋势给当代员工带来了一个悖论。员工将未能达到“好员工”理想（例如，总是待命、高度积极、充满热情）视为道德上的失败。然而，对于大多数员工而言，一直满足这些理想是不可实现的。本文引入并发展了微自白这一现象——一种非正式的低强度自白——作为员工用来缓解在道德化工作理想上不达标的持续道德困境的被忽视的策略。通过将自我披露和工作道德化的研究与那些明确研究自白的领域的见解相结合，我构建了员工微自白的理论。我认为，微自白为分享者提供了一种解脱感和恢复的道德感，这反过来又会产生后续影响。此外，我还指出，内疚——一种与工作道德化尤其相关的情感——是激活和增强微自白效果的关键。最后，我阐明了所分享的信息及其共享环境如何共同影响我所描述的效果。我的研究将微自白确立为一种独特的职场自我披露形式，并将现有理论调整为考虑在组织学中历来被忽视的披露功能。同时，这也为员工如何经历和抵消工作道德化提供了新的理解，以及何时这样做对他们最为有利。

title: Post-M&A Retention of Top Managers: The Role of Structural Knowledge
abstract: This study examines the role of managerial structural knowledge in postacquisition integration (PAI) and its association with the retention of target firm managers. Although retaining top managers is often linked to improved acquisition outcomes, the conditions under which their retention may support integration remain underexplored. Drawing on organizational modularity theory, we theorize that structural similarity between acquiring and target firms is associated with higher managerial retention in related acquisitions. We propose that structural knowledge, defined as managers’ experience within specific organizational structures, can support PAI and is associated with improved postacquisition performance. Using a data set of 2,941 mergers and acquisitions (M&A) deals and 18,987 target firm managers (1994–2018), we find a positive relationship between structural similarity and the retention of target managers in related acquisitions. At the individual level, managers with structural knowledge aligned with the acquiring firm’s structure are more likely to be retained. Furthermore, the relationship between structural similarity and retention is stronger when the geographic distance between firms is greater or when the deal requires deep integration, as in absorption-type acquisitions. Finally, structural similarity between acquiring and target firms is positively associated with improved postacquisition performance. Our findings contribute to the M&A literature by introducing a structural knowledge perspective in understanding PAI. Our study also highlights the role of organizational modularity in M&As and advances the strategic human capital literature by identifying structural knowledge as a critical component of managerial capabilities. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.18686 .
title_cn: 并购后高管留任：结构性知识的作用
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了管理者结构知识在并购后整合（PAI）中的作用及其与目标公司管理者留任之间的关联。尽管保留高管通常与改善并购结果相关，但其留任可能支持整合的条件仍未得到充分探讨。基于组织模块理论，我们理论化地认为，收购方和目标公司之间的结构相似性与相关性收购中管理者的更高留任率相关。我们提出，结构知识定义为管理者在特定组织结构中的经验，可以支持PAI，并与改善并购后的绩效相关。通过分析1994年至2018年间2941宗并购交易及18987名目标公司管理者的数据集，我们发现结构相似性与相关性收购中目标管理者留任之间存在正相关关系。在个体层面上，与收购方结构对齐的结构知识的管理者更有可能被保留。此外，当公司之间的地理距离较大或交易需要深度整合（如吸收型收购）时，结构相似性与留任之间的关系更强。最后，收购方与目标公司之间的结构相似性与改善并购后的绩效呈正相关。我们的研究为并购文献贡献了一个结构知识视角以理解PAI。同时，我们的研究凸显了组织模块性在并购中的作用，并通过将结构知识识别为管理能力的关键组成部分，推进了战略人力资本文献。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.18686获取。

title: Dual Demands, Attention, and Organizational Learning: Spatial and Temporal Replication of Routines in Scaling Organizations
abstract: The replication of routines is fundamental to knowledge transfer and retention in organizations. Because research on routine replication has historically been divided, proceeding within knowledge transfer (spatial replication) or knowledge retention (temporal replication), respectively, our understanding of how replicating routines in new organizational units (knowledge transfer) affects an organization’s capacity to maintain adherence to those routines over time at existing units (knowledge retention) remains limited. Drawing on the organizational learning and related evolutionary economics literature on routines as well as the multiple goals literature and using data on a Fortune 100 franchise chain being scaled in the United States with thousands of outlets opened over a period of 10 years, we examine whether and how knowledge transfer affects knowledge retention. Our primary thesis is that knowledge transfer and knowledge retention create competing demands for limited attention and therefore the need to allocate attention between them. We posit that this gives rise to a negative relationship between the spatial (knowledge transfer) and temporal (knowledge retention) replication of routines, although the effect can be mitigated by organizational learning from experience. We find robust empirical support for our propositions, pointing to important attention and learning mechanisms that shape the organizational capacity to simultaneously navigate knowledge transfer and retention demands, that is, replicate routines across both space and time. Funding: This work was supported by Project PID2024-160548NB-I00 funded by MICIU/AEI /10.13039/501100011033 and by FEDER, EU as well as by by Fundação para a Ciência e a Tecnologia [UID/00124/2025, UID/PRR/124/2025, Nova School of Business and Economics] and LISBOA2030 [DataLab2030 - LISBOA2030-FEDER 01314200]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2022.16528 .
title_cn: 双重需求、注意力与组织学习：在扩展组织中例行程序的空间和时间复制
abstract_cn: 例行程序的复制对组织内知识的转移和保留至关重要。由于有关例行程序复制的研究历来分为两部分，分别关注知识转移（空间复制）或知识保留（时间复制），因此我们对在新组织单元中复制例行程序（知识转移）如何影响现有单元在时间上维持对这些例行程序的遵循能力（知识保留）的理解仍然有限。基于组织学习及相关的例行程序进化经济学文献，以及多重目标文献，并利用美国一家财富100强特许经营连锁店在10年期间开设数千个网点的数据，我们研究知识转移是否以及如何影响知识保留。我们的主要论点是，知识转移和知识保留对有限关注的需求产生了竞争，因而需要在两者之间分配关注。我们假设，这导致了例行程序的空间（知识转移）与时间（知识保留）复制之间存在负相关关系，尽管这一影响可以通过组织学习经验来缓解。我们发现对我们的论点有强有力的实证支持，指出了形塑组织能力以同时应对知识转移和保留需求的重要关注和学习机制，即在空间和时间上复制例行程序。资助：本研究得到了由MICIU/AEI资助的项目PID2024-160548NB-I00及FEDER、欧盟的支持，以及由Fundação para a Ciência e a Tecnologia（UID/00124/2025, UID/PRR/124/2025, Nova School of Business and Economics）和LISBOA2030（DataLab2030 - LISBOA2030-FEDER 01314200）资助的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2022.16528 获取。

title: Roadmap or Compass? The Value of Prior Collaborative Experience in an Unfamiliar Task Environment
abstract: When a temporary team faces an unfamiliar task environment, it should particularly benefit from including members who have collaborated before. Although several studies have made this prediction, it has not been supported empirically. We reconcile this discrepancy by distinguishing between prior collaborations in tightly versus loosely coupled roles, defined by the degree of interdependence among collaborators during prior work. Both forms of prior collaboration can help teammates communicate effectively, aiding team adaptation in new contexts. However, prior collaboration in tightly coupled roles also fosters shared routines that may create inertia and impede adaptation. As a result, we argue that the value of tightly coupled experience declines in unfamiliar environments, whereas the value of loosely coupled experience increases. We test these ideas using data from esports, where professional players with varying collaborative histories are randomly assigned to temporary teams. Unanticipated changes to the game exogenously alter teams’ familiarity with their task environments. Consistent with our theory, we find that tightly coupled collaborative experience enhances team performance in familiar task environments but degrades it in unfamiliar ones. Loosely coupled experience provides modest benefits in familiar environments but substantially enhances performance in unfamiliar ones. Overall, our findings suggest that when environments change, tightly coupled experience can act as a faulty roadmap—anchoring teams to outdated routines—whereas loosely coupled experience can serve as a compass that promotes coordination and adaptation. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19399 .
title_cn: 路线图还是指南针？在不熟悉的任务环境中先前协作经验的价值
abstract_cn: 当一个临时团队面临一个不熟悉的任务环境时，尤其应该从包括以前有过合作经验的成员中获益。尽管已有多项研究做出了这一预测，但实证支持不足。我们通过区分以紧密或松散耦合角色进行的先前合作来调和这一差异，这两种角色的定义基于先前工作的合作者之间的相互依赖程度。两种形式的先前合作都可以帮助团队成员有效沟通，从而促进团队在新环境中的适应。然而，以紧密耦合角色进行的先前合作也会促进共享常规，这可能导致惯性并妨碍适应。因此，我们认为，在不熟悉的环境中，紧密耦合经验的价值下降，而松散耦合经验的价值上升。我们通过来自电子竞技的数据检验这些观点，专业玩家根据各自的合作历史随机分配到临时团队中。游戏的意外变化在外部上改变了团队对任务环境的熟悉度。与我们的理论一致，我们发现，紧密耦合的合作经验在熟悉的任务环境中提升团队表现，但在不熟悉的环境中却降低了其表现。而松散耦合经验在熟悉环境中提供了适度的益处，但在不熟悉的环境中则显著提升了表现。总体而言，我们的发现表明，当环境发生变化时，紧密耦合经验可能成为错误的导航图——将团队固定在过时的常规上；而松散耦合经验则可以作为促进协调和适应的指南针。补充材料：在线附录可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19399 获取。

title: The Elephant and Donkey in the Room: Time-Varying Effects of Political Dissimilarity on Social Interactions at Work During U.S. Elections
abstract: Political polarization is recognized as a global risk. Although emerging studies on political dissimilarity at work highlight important implications for how employees behave and interact, findings are at times inconsistent. To provide a more nuanced understanding of when and why political dissimilarity disrupts workplace interactions, we draw on the social identity approach and threat processing to examine how political dissimilarity shapes perceptions of work relationships and behavior before and after election events. Across three studies, we demonstrate that political dissimilarity’s effects depend on political macro events and thus become temporally activated. Study 1, an experience sampling field study during the 2020 U.S. presidential election, showed no significant impact of political dissimilarity on negative interpersonal interactions before the election, but significance emerged on election day and persisted for six days after the election. In Study 2, an online experiment during the 2022 U.S. midterm elections, we found that actual political dissimilarity indirectly influenced negative interpersonal interactions via reduced social mindfulness after the election but not beforehand. Study 3, a longitudinal experiment over four weeks during the 2024 U.S. presidential election, replicated the election effect, demonstrating that these effects persisted for at least two weeks and were mediated by cognitive (i.e., perspective-taking) and affective (i.e., empathic concern) subdimensions of social mindfulness. Our findings highlight political orientation as a critical dimension of workplace dissimilarity. Although its impact may be subdued, it becomes pronounced during macro-political events, shaping workplace interactions in significant ways, with the political dissimilarity effects being more easily reactivated in the postelection phase. Funding: Data collection was partially supported by an Add-on Fellowship for Interdisciplinary Economics and Interdisciplinary Business Administration from the Joachim Herz Foundation, awarded to M. Reinwald. P. Bamberger’s involvement in this project was supported by a grant from the Henry Crown Institute of Business Research in Israel. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.18538 .
title_cn: 房间里的大象和驴：美国选举期间政治差异对工作社交互动的时间变化影响
abstract_cn: 政治两极化被视为全球性风险。尽管关于工作场所政治差异的新兴研究强调了其对员工行为和互动的重要影响，但研究结果有时并不一致。为了更深入地理解政治差异何时以及为何会干扰工作场所互动，我们借助社会身份理论和威胁处理理论，探讨政治差异如何在选举事件前后塑造对工作关系和行为的认知。在三项研究中，我们证明了政治差异的影响取决于政治宏观事件，从而在时间上被激活。在研究1中，我们进行了一项2020年美国总统选举期间的经验抽样实地研究，结果显示，在选举前政治差异对负面人际互动没有显著影响，但在选举日正式显现，并持续六天。在研究2中，通过2022年美国中期选举期间的在线实验，我们发现，实际的政治差异在选举后通过降低社交正念间接影响负面人际互动，而在选举前并没有这种影响。研究3是一项在2024年美国总统选举期间进行的为期四周的纵向实验，重复了选举效应，显示这些效应至少持续了两周，并且通过社交正念的认知（即换位思考）和情感（即共情关怀）子维度进行了中介。我们的研究结果突出了政治取向作为工作场所差异性的重要维度。尽管其影响可能不明显，但在宏观政治事件期间却变得显著，以重要的方式塑造工作场所互动，政治差异的效应在选举后的阶段更容易被重新激活。资助信息：数据收集部分得到乔阿希姆·赫茨基金会的跨学科经济学和跨学科商业管理附加奖学金的支持，颁发给M. Reinwald。P. Bamberger参与该项目的工作得到了以色列亨利·克朗商业研究所的资助支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.18538获得。

title: The Resource Insecurity Mindset: Why CEOs from Lower-Class Origins Are Both Greedier and More Generous
abstract: Understanding how executives’ backgrounds influence corporate behavior is essential for organizational science and society. Previous research offers conflicting predictions about whether childhood resource scarcity leads to self-focused or prosocial tendencies, with evolutionary theories predicting greed and social psychology theories pointing to generosity. This contradiction is especially relevant for chief executive officers (CEOs), whose decisions significantly impact stakeholders. Here, we show that CEOs from lower social class origins engage in both more greedy behaviors (e.g., pursuing excessive compensation) and more prosocial behaviors (e.g., internal corporate social responsibility) than their higher-class counterparts. Using survey data from 135 S&P 1500 CEOs, we demonstrate that both behaviors stem from the same psychological mechanism: a resource insecurity mindset formed during childhood. This mindset makes lower-class origin CEOs simultaneously vigilant about personal resource accumulation and compassionate toward others facing constraints. We examine how CEO job insecurity and overconfidence influence these effects. Through experiments, coded CEO interviews, and executive qualitative interviews, we find broad support for our theory. These findings resolve a significant theoretical contradiction by showing that self-serving and other-serving behaviors can coexist and share common roots. Understanding these dual behavioral tendencies has important implications for corporate governance, executive selection, and organizational inequality.
title_cn: 资源不安全心态：为何来自低收入背景的CEO既更加贪婪又更为慷慨
abstract_cn: 理解高管的背景如何影响企业行为对于组织科学和社会非常重要。以往的研究对童年资源匮乏是否导致自我导向或亲社会倾向提出了相互矛盾的预测，进化理论预测贪婪行为，而社会心理学理论则指出慷慨行为。这一矛盾在首席执行官（CEO）身上尤为相关，因为他们的决策对利益相关者有着显著影响。在本研究中，我们展示了来自较低社会阶层的CEO相较于高阶层的同僚，既表现出更多的贪婪行为（例如，追求过高的薪酬），也表现出更多的亲社会行为（例如，内部企业社会责任）。通过分析来自135位标准普尔1500指数CEO的调查数据，我们证明这两种行为源于相同的心理机制：在童年时期形成的资源不安全心态。这种心态使得低阶层出身的CEO在个人资源积累方面更加警惕，同时对面临困境的他人更具同情心。我们考察了CEO职位不安全感和过度自信如何影响这些行为。通过实验、编码的CEO访谈和高管定性访谈，我们发现我们的理论得到了广泛支持。这些发现通过表明自我服务与他人服务行为可以共存并共享相同根源，解决了一个重要的理论矛盾。理解这些双重行为倾向对公司治理、高管选拔和组织不平等具有重要意义。

title: From Founders to Funders: Generalized Reciprocity and Embeddedness in Founders’ Transition to Angel Investing
abstract: We examine how entrepreneurs transition to angel investing through the lens of generalized reciprocity and embeddedness. Using a multimethod approach combining archival analysis with three experiments, we reveal how psychological and social mechanisms shape this transition. We find that entrepreneurs who have received angel funding are more likely to become angel investors themselves, particularly when they share educational, professional, or geographic ties with their initial investors. While angel investors, like all investors, seek financial returns, we theorize that choosing angel investing over alternative investment vehicles reflects prosocial motivations rooted in reciprocity. Our mediation analyses demonstrate that gratitude, rather than reputation concerns, drives this initial transition. Furthermore, entrepreneurs who received embedded funding preferentially direct their investments toward entrepreneurs with whom they share embedded ties. This reveals a two-part process: emotional mechanisms drive the decision to become an angel investor, while structural embeddedness guides investment targeting. These findings integrate psychological accounts of generalized reciprocity with sociological perspectives on embeddedness, linking individual-level and structural explanations of prosocial behavior in economic contexts. Our study highlights how angel investing perpetuates itself through self-reinforcing cycles that create both opportunities and constraints for ecosystem development.
title_cn: 从创始人到投资者：创始人转型为天使投资者中的普遍互惠与嵌入性
abstract_cn: 我们通过广义互惠和嵌入性这一视角，考察创业者如何过渡到天使投资。采用结合档案分析与三项实验的多方法研究，我们揭示了心理和社会机制如何塑造这一过渡。研究发现，曾获得天使融资的创业者更有可能转而成为天使投资者，尤其是在他们与最初投资者之间存在教育、职业或地理联系时。虽然天使投资者和所有投资者一样，寻求财务回报，但我们理论认为，选择天使投资而非其他投资工具反映出基于互惠的利他动机。我们的中介分析表明，驱动这一初步过渡的是感激之情，而不是声誉顾虑。此外，获得嵌入式融资的创业者更倾向于将投资直接对准与自己有嵌入关系的创业者。这揭示了一个两步过程：情感机制驱动成为天使投资者的决定，而结构性嵌入性则引导投资的目标定位。这些发现将广义互惠的心理解释与社会学的嵌入性视角结合起来，连接了经济背景下利他行为的个体层面和结构性解释。我们的研究突显了天使投资如何通过自我强化的循环不断延续，创造出生态系统发展的机遇与限制。

title: Relationship Splintering and Repair: The Dynamics of Marginalization in Organizations
abstract: Drawing on a study of Syrian refugees engaged in informal work in Turkey, we examine how and why workplace relationships of marginalized groups break down and, in some cases, may be repaired. We develop a process model to explain the concept of relationship splintering—the gradual and recursive deterioration of relationships. We identify degrading, silencing, and distancing as key organizational mechanisms of splintering. These mechanisms are triggered by an attribution of blame and collectively constitute a system of organizational dehumanization. Over time, these mechanisms may cause complete relationship fracture, or, under certain conditions, be reversed to enable repair. Our work offers a more dynamic understanding of relationship processes extending theories of workplace marginalization. We also contribute to the literature on refugee workforce integration by foregrounding integration as a relational and processual phenomenon in organizational contexts characterized by structural inequality.
title_cn: 关系的分裂与修复：组织中边缘化的动态
abstract_cn: 通过对在土耳其从事非正式工作的叙利亚难民的研究，我们探讨了边缘化群体的工作场所关系是如何以及为何会崩溃，并在某些情况下可能得以修复。我们提出了一个过程模型，以解释关系分裂的概念——即关系的逐渐和递归性恶化。我们确定了降级、沉默和疏离作为分裂的关键组织机制。这些机制是由归责引发的，并共同构成了一个组织去人性化的体系。随着时间的推移，这些机制可能导致关系的完全破裂，或者在某些条件下得到逆转，从而实现修复。我们的研究为关系过程提供了更动态的理解，扩展了工作场所边缘化的理论。我们还通过将整合视为一种关系和过程现象，并强调其在结构性不平等特征的组织背景中的重要性，贡献了有关难民劳动力整合的文献。

title: Movin’ and Groovin’! Increased Prior Mobility Facilitates Newcomers’ Transitions Into Organizations
abstract: Integrating insights from research on newcomer socialization and generalization of learning, we theorize that individuals’ prior mobility across organizations may offer learning opportunities that mitigate the barriers they face as newcomers transitioning into subsequent employment contexts. Building on evidence that individuals experience a temporary decline in performance when they switch employers, we argue that more mobile individuals will experience a smaller performance decline and shorter time to performance recovery following entry into a new employer as they are better equipped to adapt to the norms, values, and expectations of new organizational social contexts. We further theorize that the benefits associated with prior mobility are likely to be greatest when newcomers’ social integration into a new organization is more challenging or more central to their new role. We find overall support for our theory using data on moves made by 8,693 hedge fund managers between 2,129 firms in the U.S. hedge fund industry from 2004 to 2019. We contribute to research on the influence of individuals’ career experiences on their transitions into new organizations, and offer insights to ongoing conversations related to the implications of employees’ investments in firm-specific human capital.
title_cn: 移动与适应！先前的流动性增强了新成员融入组织的过渡
abstract_cn: 我们整合了关于新员工社会化和学习普遍化的研究成果，提出理论认为个体在不同组织间的先前流动可能提供学习机会，从而减轻他们作为新员工在过渡到后续就业背景时所面临的障碍。基于证据，个体在转换雇主时通常会经历短期的绩效下降，我们认为，流动性更高的个体在进入新雇主后会经历较小的绩效下降和更短的绩效恢复时间，因为他们更能适应新组织社会背景中的规范、价值观和期望。我们进一步理论化认为，先前流动所带来的好处在新员工融入新组织的挑战更大或对他们的新角色更为关键时可能会达到最大。基于2004年至2019年间在美国对2,129家对冲基金行业公司的8,693位对冲基金经理的流动数据，我们对我们的理论提供了整体支持。我们的研究为个体职业经历对其过渡到新组织的影响提供了见解，并为关于员工在特定公司人力资本投资的后续讨论提供了思考。

title: Bricolage as Enacted Sensemaking in Emergent Response Groups: Organizing in Conditions of Extreme Equivocality
abstract: When crises strike, new forms of emergent organizing often arise to address urgent societal needs that formal institutions struggle to meet. Among these, emergent response groups (ERGs)—self-organized communities that form to respond to unexpected and extreme events—offer a particularly salient example of decentralized and nonhierarchical organizing. This multicase study investigates eight ERGs that formed during the COVID-19 pandemic to design and distribute critical medical supplies. Drawing on sensemaking theory, we show how bricolage—making do with at-hand resources—supports coordination and community structuring by reducing equivocality caused by distributed actors. Our findings describe how these ERGs grew rapidly by using bricolage to reduce action, goal, and resource equivocality, enabling coordinated and scalable crisis response efforts. We contribute to research on emergent organizing in crisis contexts by revealing how bricolage fosters coherence and rapid scaling in the absence of formal hierarchies. Our study also challenges the dominant assumption that bricolage is inherently limiting to organizational growth, showing that—in the context of self-organizing collectives—it offers a novel solution to the problem of coordinating action among distributed agents.
title_cn: 即兴拼凑作为新兴应对小组中的意义建构：在极端模糊条件下的组织行为
abstract_cn: 当危机来临时，新的应急组织形式往往会出现，以应对正式机构难以满足的紧迫社会需求。在这些组织中，紧急响应团体（ERGs）——自组织社区为应对意外和极端事件而形成——提供了去中心化和非等级化组织的一个特别突出例子。本研究通过多案例研究，探讨了在COVID-19疫情期间形成的八个ERGs，它们旨在设计和分发关键医疗用品。基于意义建构理论，我们展示了拼凑法——利用现有资源应对问题——如何通过减少分布式参与者造成的模糊性来支持协调和社区结构的形成。我们的研究结果描述了这些ERGs如何通过使用拼凑法来迅速增长，从而减少行动、目标和资源的模糊性，促成协调和可扩展的危机响应努力。我们为危机背景下的应急组织研究做出了贡献，揭示拼凑法如何在缺乏正式层级的情况下促进凝聚力和快速扩展。我们的研究还挑战了拼凑法在本质上限制组织增长的主导假设，表明在自组织集体的背景下，它为协调分布式代理之间的行动问题提供了一种新颖的解决方案。

title: Short-Term Demands and Long-Term Commitments: A Temporal Model of Stakeholder Governance
abstract: Current scholarship offers divergent views on whether broadening stakeholder governance creates joint gains or redistributes value away from equity holders. To address this tension, we develop a temporal model of stakeholder governance that specifies how these gains are distributed over time. We argue that broadening stakeholder governance initially reduces rewards for equity stakeholders because coordination costs rise and value is reallocated toward contracted stakeholders. However, over time, diminishing coordination costs and increasing returns from firm-specific investments increase rewards for equity stakeholders. Additionally, because contracted stakeholders make firm-specific investments, they may be willing to compromise their claims on firm resources when their firms face economic difficulties. Given these dynamics, we argue that broadening stakeholder governance is likely to increase firm survival. To test these arguments, we analyze longitudinal data for French firms with varying governance structures. Overall, our findings suggest that broadening stakeholder governance produces a dynamic balance in which stakeholders protect their interests yet deepen their commitments over time. In this way, we elevate survival as a primary outcome of stakeholder governance and offer guidance on the design of resilient democratic governance.
title_cn: 短期需求与长期承诺：利益相关者治理的时间模型
abstract_cn: 当前的学术研究对扩大利益相关者治理是否产生共同利益或将价值重新分配给股东存在不同的观点。为了应对这一紧张关系，我们建立了一个时间模型，以阐明这些利益在时间上的分配方式。我们认为，初期扩大利益相关者治理会减少股东的回报，因为协调成本上升，价值向合同利益相关者重新分配。然而，随着时间的推移，协调成本的下降和公司特定投资带来的回报增加，使得股东的回报得到提升。此外，由于合同利益相关者进行公司特定投资，他们可能愿意在企业面临经济困难时妥协对企业资源的要求。鉴于这些动态，我们认为扩大利益相关者治理可能会提高企业的生存率。为验证这些论点，我们分析了具有不同治理结构的法国企业的纵向数据。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，扩大利益相关者治理会产生一种动态平衡，在这种平衡中，利益相关者保护自己的利益，同时随着时间的推移加深承诺。通过这种方式，我们将生存提升为利益相关者治理的主要结果，并提供了关于设计韧性民主治理的指导。

title: How Mega-threats Influence Workplace Cooperation: Effect of #BlackLivesMatter Salience on Cooperation among and between Black and White Coworkers
abstract: Mega-threats—public, shocking, and identity-relevant events involving violence or injustice—can disrupt organizational life. Yet, research has largely overlooked the fact that such events may create asymmetric identity-based threats for employees who share identities with victims versus those who share identities with perceived perpetrators, leading to divergent psychological responses and workplace cooperation within and between groups. We examine how the salience of a race-based mega-threat shapes cooperation between Black and White employees. Drawing on self-categorization theory and intergroup interaction research, we propose that mega-threat salience more strongly increases intra-racial cooperation among Black versus White employees, due to heightened in-group identification among the former. Conversely, we hypothesize that mega-threat salience more strongly reduces White employees’ willingness to initiate cooperation with Black colleagues, driven by perceptions of a morally tainted social identity and concerns about social rejection. We argue that this negative effect is attenuated when White employees hold relatively lower (vs. higher) professional status than their Black interaction partners. We find support for these predictions in over 124,000 dyadic interactions between Black and White players in the National Basketball Association during periods of heightened Black Lives Matter salience. Two experimental studies replicate these findings and provide evidence for the envisioned mechanisms.
title_cn: 巨型威胁如何影响职场合作：#黑人的命也是命（#BlackLivesMatter）显著性对黑人和白人同事之间及其内部合作的影响
abstract_cn: 重大威胁——涉及暴力或不公的公共、震惊且与身份相关的事件——可能会扰乱组织生活。然而，研究在很大程度上忽视了这样一个事实：此类事件可能为与受害者共享身份的员工与与被认为是加害者共享身份的员工之间创造不对称的身份基础威胁，导致心理反应和群体内外合作的差异。我们考察了种族基础重大威胁的显著性如何影响黑人和白人员工之间的合作。基于自我分类理论和群际互动研究，我们提出，重大威胁的显著性更强地增加了黑人员工之间的同族合作，而不是白人员工，这源于前者更强烈的群体认同感。相反，我们假设，重大威胁的显著性更强地降低了白人员工与黑人同事合作的意愿，这种现象源于对道德上受污染的社会身份的认知和对社会拒绝的担忧。我们认为，当白人员工的职业地位相对低于（而不是高于）他们的黑人互动伙伴时，这种负面影响会减弱。我们在超过124,000个黑人和白人球员在国家篮球协会期间的互动中发现了这些预测的支持，尤其是在黑人的生命问题显著性提高的时期。两个实验研究重复了这些发现，并提供了所设想机制的证据。

title: Dynamic Demands versus Durable Skills: Career Dilemmas in Pharmaceutical R&D
abstract: Skill demands evolve over the course of individuals’ careers, as new roles demand different kinds of skills from previous jobs. Yet, skill portfolios can be slow to change. We posit that this tension between dynamic job demands and durable skills creates career dilemmas for building the right portfolio of skills for long-term success. Studying a group of scientists in the pharmaceuticals industry, we argue and find that while specialization helps scientists to advance faster initially, it holds scientists back once they reach managerial ranks where coordination skills are required. Within managerial ranks, scientists with broader experience will advance faster since their experience will develop broader knowledge and more diverse social capital, which in turn will help them build coordination skills. While we find some evidence that employees try to adapt to these changing needs over their careers, such efforts to adapt are insufficient. Instead, we find that the level of specialization acquired while working as a scientist continues to influence promotion rates after people are promoted into management. We thus show that a skill portfolio built to help advancement at one stage of the career may hold employees back at subsequent career stages.
title_cn: 动态需求与持久技能：制药研发中的职业困境
abstract_cn: 技能需求在个体职业发展的过程中不断演变，因为新岗位对技能的要求与以往工作截然不同。然而，技能组合的变化往往比较缓慢。我们认为，动态的工作需求与持久的技能之间的这种张力为建立适合长期成功的技能组合带来了职业困境。通过研究制药行业的一群科学家，我们发现，尽管专业化能够帮助科学家在初期更快地晋升，但一旦进入管理层，需要协调技能时，这种专业化反而会成为限制。进入管理层后，具有更广泛经验的科学家晋升更快，因为他们的经验可以培养更广泛的知识和更丰富的社会资本，进而帮助他们提升协调技能。尽管我们发现某些证据表明员工在职业生涯中试图适应这些不断变化的需求，但这种适应努力是不够的。相反，我们发现，科学家在专业化过程中获得的技能水平在他们晋升管理后仍会影响晋升率。因此，我们表明，为了在职业生涯某一阶段促进晋升而建立的技能组合，可能会在后续的职业阶段束缚员工的发展。

title: They Saw It Coming: Executive Experience and Foresight in Competitor Identification
abstract: How can a firm increase its chances of spotting an up-and-coming competitor? I examine how the experience of top management teams (TMTs) relates to the foresight needed to spot “rising stars”—that is, competitors that are currently ignored by other firms in a market but later grow to become prominent threats. My theory hinges on the primacy of relational versus categorical reasoning in mental models of competition. Firm mental models conceptualize competition through a relational lens, such that deep experience within the focal firm encourages fixation on familiar, proximate rivals while varied experience across firms redirects attention to the competitive periphery. In contrast, industry mental models rely on categorical reasoning, such that varied experience across industries yields a shallow understanding of divergent—and often irrelevant—categorical logics while deep experience in the focal industry builds the expertise to see which competitors will break out in the future. I further show that deep industry experience enables the TMT to draw more useful insights from varied firm experience, while a combination of varied firm and industry experience creates harmful information overload. I find support for my theory using a hand-collected dataset on competitor identification and TMTs in the enterprise software industry.
title_cn: 他们预见到了：高管经验与竞争对手识别中的前瞻性
abstract_cn: 一个公司如何增加发现新兴竞争对手的机会？我考察了高管团队（TMT）的经验与识别“新星”所需前瞻性之间的关系，即那些目前被市场上其他公司忽视但后来成长为显著威胁的竞争对手。我的理论基于竞争的心理模型中关系推理与类别推理的优先性。公司的心理模型通过关系视角来概念化竞争，使得焦点公司内部的深厚经验鼓励对熟悉且近距离的竞争者的固执关注，而跨公司多样化经验则将注意力转向竞争的边缘区域。相对而言，行业心理模型依赖于类别推理，这样跨行业的多样化经验往往导致对不同且常常无关的类别逻辑的肤浅理解，而在焦点行业的深厚经验则建立了识别未来会崭露头角的竞争者的专业知识。我进一步表明，深厚的行业经验使高管团队能够从多样化的公司经验中提取更有用的见解，而多样化的公司与行业经验结合则会产生有害的信息过载。我通过手动收集的企业软件行业竞争对手识别及高管团队数据集支持我的理论。

title: To Be or Not To Be (Aligned with Elites): Navigating Systemic Power within Informal Institutions
abstract: Social intermediaries play a critical role in addressing exclusion, but must navigate entrenched power relations within informal institutions. Drawing on comparative case studies of three social intermediaries, this study examines how intermediaries negotiate systemic power—manifested through domination and discipline—across intersecting caste–gender hierarchies. We identify three distinct approaches to elite engagement: elite delegation, elite co-optation, and creative accommodation. Each of these reflects a specific combination of communal positioning and power frame adopted by intermediaries. Elite delegation, grounded in a detached communal positioning and a zero-sum power frame, prioritizes rapid scaling but reproduces existing hierarchies. Elite co-optation, marked by pragmatic communal positioning and a conditional positive-sum power frame, fosters short-term cooperation yet achieves only partial inclusion. Creative accommodation, characterized by embedded communal positioning and a positive-sum power frame, enables social transformation by simultaneously empowering marginalized groups and constructively engaging elites. By demonstrating how communal positioning and power frames shape these approaches, the study advances understanding of how systemic power sustains exclusion and how it can be reconfigured from within. We contribute to research on informal institutions and inclusion by elucidating how intermediaries can leverage positive-sum engagements to reshape domination and discipline, fostering more equitable and enduring informal institutional change.
title_cn: 是否与精英对齐：在非正式制度中驾驭系统性权力
abstract_cn: 社会中介在应对排斥方面发挥着关键作用，但必须在非正式制度中应对根深蒂固的权力关系。基于对三种社会中介的比较案例研究，本研究考察了中介如何在交叉的种姓—性别等级中协商体系性权力——通过主导和约束表现出来。我们识别出三种不同的精英参与方式：精英委托、精英共同利用和创造性适应。这些方式各自反映了中介所采取的特定社区定位和权力框架的组合。精英委托基于超然的社区定位和零和权力框架，优先考虑快速扩展，但重现了现有的等级体系。精英共同利用则以务实的社区定位和有条件的正和权力框架为特征，促进了短期合作，但只实现了部分包容。创造性适应具有嵌入式的社区定位和正和权力框架，能够通过同时赋权边缘群体和建设性地参与精英来实现社会变革。通过展示社区定位与权力框架如何塑造这些参与方式，本文推进了对体系性权力如何维持排斥以及如何在内部重新构建的理解。我们通过阐明中介如何利用正和互动来重塑主导和约束，促进更公平和持久的非正式制度变革，贡献于非正式制度与包容的研究。

title: Knowledge Bridging: How Acquirers Leverage the Knowledge of Their Targets’ Prior Alliance Partners
abstract: Extensive research has examined how firms rely on alliances and acquisitions for sourcing technological knowledge, but we do not know whether acquirers can benefit from the technological knowledge of their targets’ pre-acquisition alliance partners. This study demonstrates that acquirers leverage relational assets inherited from their targets to access knowledge from the targets’ prior partners—knowledge that the target itself did not absorb during the alliance, including knowledge developed by the partner post-alliance. We term this form of knowledge absorption “knowledge bridging.” We reveal that knowledge bridging enables acquirers to more effectively absorb knowledge from their targets’ prior partners, compared to similar firms without prior alliances with the target. Knowledge bridging intensifies with the target’s previous knowledge absorption from its partners. Yet, this effect is weakened by the relatedness between the knowledge bases and business domains of the acquirer and the target’s partners and strengthened by the target’s post-acquisition autonomy.
title_cn: 知识桥接：收购方如何利用目标公司的前联盟合作伙伴的知识
abstract_cn: 大量研究考察了企业如何依靠联盟和收购来获取技术知识，但我们尚不知收购方是否能从其目标公司的收购前联盟伙伴那里受益于技术知识。本研究表明，收购方利用从目标公司继承的关系资产，以获取来自目标公司先前合作伙伴的知识——这些知识是目标公司在合作期间并未吸收的，包括合作伙伴在合作后开发的知识。我们将这种知识的吸收方式称为“知识桥接”。研究显示，知识桥接使收购方能够比没有与目标公司建立过联盟的类似企业更有效地吸收来自目标公司先前合作伙伴的知识。知识桥接的程度随目标公司从其合作伙伴处的先前知识吸收而增强。然而，这种效果受到收购方与目标伙伴之间知识基础和业务领域相关性的削弱，而由目标公司的后收购自主权所增强。

title: Market-Stigmatized Groups and the Effectiveness of Stigma Management Strategies: Evidence from Washington’s Marijuana Market
abstract: Some organizations in stigmatized markets are more successful than others at managing audience perceptions and attracting consumers. Despite extensive research on organizational stigma management, less is known about the conditions under which different strategies drive consumer patronage. This study examines two broad approaches—(1) distancing from the stigmatized market, and (2) displaying associations with the stigmatized market—that operate through opposing mechanisms and offer competing prescriptions for organizations. We consider how group stigma affects dynamics between organizations and consumers to influence the effectiveness of stigma management strategies. We introduce the concept of market-stigmatized groups and predict that the local concentration of these groups moderates the effectiveness of distancing and displaying in generating sales. Examining dispensaries in Washington state’s marijuana market, we find that displaying strategies are associated with lower sales in areas with higher concentrations of Black residents, a market-stigmatized group in this industry, whereas distancing strategies have diverging effects. Our study contributes to stigma research by demonstrating that the effectiveness of stigma management strategies is contingent on the local concentration of market-stigmatized groups, showing how stigmas interact across levels to affect organizational outcomes, and identifying a source of performance heterogeneity in stigmatized markets.
topics: Consumer Behavior in Brand Consumption and Identification
title_cn: 市场污名化群体与污名管理策略的有效性：来自华盛顿州大麻市场的证据
abstract_cn: 在受到污名化的市场中，一些组织在管理公众认知和吸引消费者方面比其他组织更加成功。尽管关于组织污名管理的研究已经相当广泛，但对于不同策略驱动消费者光顾的条件知之甚少。本研究考察了两种广泛的策略——（1）与污名化市场保持距离，和（2）展示与污名化市场的关联——这两者通过相对的机制运作，并为组织提供竞争性建议。我们考虑群体污名如何影响组织与消费者之间的动态，从而影响污名管理策略的有效性。我们引入了市场污名化群体的概念，预测这些群体的地方集中程度会调节保持距离和展示策略在销售生成中的有效性。在考察华盛顿州大麻市场的药品分销店时，我们发现，在黑人居民比例较高的地区（这一群体在该行业中受到污名化）的展示策略与较低的销售额相关，而保持距离的策略则产生了不同的效果。我们的研究为污名研究贡献了新的视角，表明污名管理策略的有效性依赖于市场污名化群体的地方集中程度，展示了污名在不同层面之间的相互作用如何影响组织结果，并识别出污名化市场中表现异质性的一个来源。

title: Role Rectification: How Hybrid Entrepreneurship Turns Entrepreneur Roles from Liability to Advantage in Hiring
abstract: Research shows that certain work roles constrain labor market success when individuals transition to new work roles, as they are viewed as discrediting by potential role partners. However, workers increasingly hold multiple roles simultaneously, which may alter the inferences drawn from roles that are discrediting in isolation. Building on role accumulation theory, we theorize that work roles that are net liabilities in isolation, such as the entrepreneur role, can become net assets as part of a compensatory role set, and we identify a new theoretical mechanism of role rectification through which this effect occurs. Mobilizing verbal protocol, experimental, and archival data sources, we find evidence for role rectification using the case of hybrid entrepreneurs, but we also find that the benefits of role rectification are attenuated in contexts where role accumulation magnifies role nonconformity risks.
title_cn: 角色矫正：混合型创业如何将创业者角色从负担转变为招聘中的优势
abstract_cn: 研究表明，当个体转变为新工作角色时，某些工作角色会限制他们在劳动市场上的成功，因为这些角色在潜在的角色伙伴中被视为贬损性。然而，工人在不断增加同时担任多个角色的情况，这可能会改变从孤立的贬损性角色中得出的推论。基于角色积累理论，我们提出理论认为，孤立存在时被视为净负担的工作角色，如企业家角色，可以作为补偿性角色组合的一部分而转变为净资产，并且我们识别出一种新的理论机制——角色修正，通过该机制产生这一效果。借助语言协议、实验数据和档案数据来源，我们通过混合型企业家的案例发现了角色修正的证据，但我们也发现，在角色积累放大角色不一致性风险的背景下，角色修正的好处会减弱。

title: Tied in or Tied Up? The Contrasting Effects of Social Ties on Employee Turnover
abstract: A key theoretical tension in organizational network research lies in understanding how interpersonal connections shape employee turnover. While extensive workplace networks can reduce turnover by granting access to valuable information and resources, they can also increase it by exposing employees to information overload, leading to cognitive strain and disengagement. Drawing on process theory, we bridge these two previously disconnected mechanisms—information access and information overload—to uncover how they jointly influence turnover. We propose that an intermediate number of instrumental workplace connections maximizes retention, as it balances the benefits of information access with the burdens of overload. Specifically, we theorize that information access exhibits diminishing marginal returns in mitigating turnover as additional connections provide less value, while information overload accelerates as employees struggle to process a growing volume of inputs, resulting in a U-shaped relationship between the size of an employee’s network and turnover. We test these arguments across four studies: two preregistered experiments and two field studies of employees in large organizations. Our findings challenge conventional wisdom that larger networks are universally beneficial, providing insights into how the structure of informal networks drives turnover dynamics.
title_cn: 纠缠还是束缚？社会关系对员工离职的对比影响
abstract_cn: 组织网络研究中的一个关键理论张力在于理解人际连接如何影响员工流动性。虽然广泛的工作场所网络可以通过提供有价值的信息和资源来减少流动性，但它们也可能因暴露于信息过载而增加流动性，从而导致认知压力和 disengagement。基于过程理论，我们将这两个先前不相关的机制——信息获取和信息过载——结合起来，揭示它们如何共同影响流动性。我们提出，适中的工具性工作场所连接数量可以最大化员工保留，因为它平衡了信息获取的好处与过载的负担。具体而言，我们理论化地认为，信息获取在减轻流动性方面呈现递减边际效应，因为额外的连接提供的价值较低，而信息过载加速发生，因为员工在处理越来越多的信息输入时感到困难，从而导致员工网络规模与流动性之间呈现 U 形关系。我们在四项研究中对这些论点进行了检验：两项预注册实验和两项对大型组织员工的现场研究。我们的发现挑战了网络越大就越有益的传统观点，提供了关于非正式网络结构如何驱动流动性动态的深刻见解。

title: Understanding Why and When Coworkers Undermine Employees Who Have Friends in High Places
abstract: This research examines why and when coworkers undermine employees who have social capital through high-level friends (i.e., friendship contact status). Drawing on appraisal theory, we theorize that coworkers envy—and subsequently undermine—such employees when they hold unfavorable core evaluations of the employees and perceive these employees’ friendship networks as sparse. For coworkers, unfavorable core evaluations of an employee signal that the person is undeserving of high-level friends, and sparse employee friendship networks signal a lack of guardian protection that increases coworkers’ own dominance-based control potential. These three components—high employee friendship contact status, low core evaluations (low employee deservingness) and low friendship network density (high coworker dominance-based control potential)—jointly drive the envy that fuels coworker undermining. We tested our theory and hypotheses across three studies. Study 1 supports our premise that coworkers negatively appraise employees’ high friendship contact status. Study 2 shows that coworkers’ core evaluations of employees and perceived friendship network density jointly moderate the effects of employee friendship contact status on coworker envy and undermining. Study 3 confirms that envy and undermining arise in response to high friendship contact status only when appraised employee deservingness is low and coworker dominance-based control potential is high. Our work highlights the liabilities of social capital, the role of perpetrator predation in workplace mistreatment, and how appraisal processes drive envy in organizations.
title_cn: 理解同事为何以及何时会破坏拥有高层朋友的员工的原因
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了同事为何以及何时会削弱具有社会资本的员工，特别是那些拥有高层友谊的员工（即友情联系状态）。基于评估理论，我们推测，当同事对员工持有不利的核心评估并且认为这些员工的友谊网络稀疏时，他们会对这些员工产生嫉妒并随后进行削弱。对于同事来说，对员工的不利核心评估表明该员工不配拥有高层友谊，而稀疏的员工友谊网络则表明缺乏保护，从而增加同事自身基于支配的控制潜力。这三者的共同作用——高员工友谊联系状态、低核心评估（员工不值得的低评价）以及低友谊网络密度（高同事基于支配的控制潜力）——共同驱动了催生同事嫉妒进而削弱的情感。我们通过三项研究对我们的理论和假设进行了检验。研究1支持了我们的前提，即同事对员工的高友谊联系状态持负面评价。研究2显示，同事对员工的核心评估和对友谊网络密度的感知共同调节了员工友谊联系状态对同事嫉妒和削弱的影响。研究3确认，嫉妒和削弱仅在员工的可得性评价低且同事的基于支配的控制潜力高时，才会因高友谊联系状态而产生。我们的研究强调了社会资本的负面影响、施害者在职场不当对待中的角色，以及评估过程如何推动组织中的嫉妒情绪。

title: When Women Stick Together: Network Dynamics and Shared Resources Following Disruptive Events
abstract: Social networks play a role in exacerbating or ameliorating inequality. The persistence of network-based inequality is well documented. However, the mechanisms that disrupt this unequal access to resources remain poorly understood. This study investigates how structurally disruptive events, such as mergers and acquisitions (M&As), reshape gender homophily and resource sharing in networks. We examine how 59 M&As shape the evolution of 82,064 physicians’ referral and patient-sharing networks. We find that disruptive events enhance women’s access to resources by altering gender-homophily dynamics in formation, and maintenance. Specifically, acquisitions intensify men’s tendency to form ties with other men. In contrast, women are more likely to preserve ties with other women, with all-women dyads exhibiting greater resilience and higher maintenance rates than mixed-gender or all-men dyads. This dynamic results in richer networks for women, shielding them from the adverse effects of organizational disruption. These results highlight contrasting network behaviors following disruption: women winnow their networks, reinforcing stable, trust-based relationships with women, while men widen theirs, forming new distant ties with men. By demonstrating how gendered network dynamics evolve in response to disruptions, this study contributes to scholarship on gender inequality, network resilience, and conditions under which homophilous ties can mitigate disparities.
title_cn: 女性团结时：破坏性事件后的网络动态与共享资源
abstract_cn: 社交网络在加剧或缓解不平等方面发挥着重要作用。基于网络的不平等持续性已得到充分记录。然而，破坏这种不平等资源获取的机制仍然不够清晰。本研究探讨了诸如并购（M&A）等结构性破坏事件如何重塑网络中的性别同类关系和资源共享。我们分析了59笔并购如何影响82,064名医生的转诊和患者共享网络的演变。研究发现，破坏性事件通过改变性别同类关系的形成和维护动态，增强了女性获取资源的能力。具体而言，并购加剧了男性与其他男性建立联系的倾向。相比之下，女性更有可能维持与其他女性的联系，而全女性对偶关系的韧性和维护率高于混合性别或全男性对偶关系。这一动态使女性的网络更加丰富，保护她们免受组织性破坏的不利影响。这些结果突显了破坏后网络行为的对比：女性收缩网络，强化与女性的稳定信任关系，而男性则扩大网络，建立与男性的新远程联系。通过展示性别化网络动态如何对破坏做出反应，本研究为性别不平等、网络韧性以及同类关系减轻差异的条件的研究提供了贡献。

title: Reckoning With the Ideal Worker Body: A Qualitative Study of Workers in Chronic Pain
abstract: Implicit in the ideal worker norm is the assumption of the ideal worker body, a body that is always ready and willing to meet work demands. Yet, bodies vary in their ability to meet this ideal. Through a qualitative study of 66 workers in chronic pain, we build theory on the experience of a chronic, stigmatized deviation from the ideal worker body. Our analysis uncovered that as informants’ pain interfered with their work, they attempted to pass as ideal-worker-bodied. However, attempting to pass ultimately increased their pain and its interference with their work, thus catapulting them into a vicious cycle. For two thirds of our informants, this cycle led to their pain becoming intolerable, forcing them to reckon with pervasive ableist norms as they turned to medical professionals for help. Informants who received validating cues from medical professionals were better able to relinquish, albeit with difficulty, the ideal worker body as necessary. They came to accept an alternative to the ideal worker body: a sufficient worker body. Informants who received invalidating cues continued in the vicious cycle of striving for the ideal worker body. Our findings contribute to scholarship on bodies at work, stigma at work, and the ideal worker norm.
title_cn: 应对理想工人身体：一项关于慢性疼痛工人的定性研究
abstract_cn: 理想员工规范中隐含着对理想员工身体的假设，即这一身体始终准备并愿意满足工作要求。然而，身体在满足这一理想方面的能力各不相同。通过对66名慢性疼痛工人的定性研究，我们对慢性且受到污名化的偏离理想员工身体的体验构建了理论。我们的分析揭示，随着受访者的疼痛干扰了他们的工作，他们试图表现得像理想员工那样。然而，试图伪装最终加剧了他们的疼痛及其对工作的干扰，从而将他们推入一个恶性循环。对于三分之二的受访者来说，这一循环导致他们的疼痛变得难以忍受，迫使他们在寻求医疗专业人士帮助时面对普遍的能力歧视规范。那些从医疗专业人士那里获得肯定信号的受访者更能够勉强放弃理想员工身体的要求。他们接受了一个替代理想员工身体的概念：一个足够的员工身体。而那些收到否定信号的受访者则持续陷入对理想员工身体的追求中。我们的发现为关于工作中身体、工作中的污名以及理想员工规范的研究贡献了新的见解。

title: When the Moon is Jealous of the Stars: Implications of Informal Leadership for Supervisor Downward Jealousy and Their Treatment of Other Subordinates
abstract: Informal leadership has received considerable attention over the last decade, yet the literature remains unclear about the interpersonal dynamics in teams where both informal and formal leadership coexist. Integrating the social functional view of emotions with recent theoretical advancements on workplace jealousy, we propose a theoretical model that explains how supervisors react emotionally and behaviorally to informal leadership. Specifically, we theorize that, when an informal leader is highly competent, their informal leadership will elicit supervisor downward jealousy stemming from the supervisor’s fear of losing valued relationships with the other subordinates; and this jealousy, in turn, will prompt more supervisor support and less abusive supervision toward the other subordinates who are also highly competent. We adopted a multiwave, multisource field study and an experiment using the critical incident technique to test our model and hypotheses. Results across these studies consistently supported our predictions. We discuss the theoretical and practical implications as well as future research directions of our work.
title_cn: 当月亮对星星心生嫉妒时：非正式领导对主管向下嫉妒及其对其他下属待遇的影响
abstract_cn: 非正式领导在过去十年中受到了相当多的关注，但文献对于非正式领导与正式领导共存的团队中的人际动态仍然不够明确。我们将情感的社会功能视角与最近关于职场嫉妒的理论进展相结合，提出了一个理论模型，解释了主管如何在情感和行为上对非正式领导作出反应。具体而言，我们理论化地认为，当非正式领导者具备较高的能力时，他们的非正式领导将引发主管的向下嫉妒，这种嫉妒源于主管对失去与其他下属之间宝贵关系的恐惧；而这种嫉妒反过来又会促使主管对其他同样具备高能力的下属提供更多支持，并减少对他们的虐待性监督。我们采用了多波次、多来源的实地研究以及使用关键事件技术的实验来检验我们的模型和假设。这些研究的结果一致支持了我们的预测。我们讨论了研究的理论和实践意义以及未来的研究方向。

title: CEO Regulatory Focus as an Interpretive Frame: An Empirical Examination of Investor Perceptions in the Context of Earning Deviations
abstract: Investors perceive a CEO’s regulatory foci based on the language they use. Complementing earlier studies on the direct effects of CEO regulatory focus, we propose a novel theoretical paradigm in which CEOs’ regulatory-focused language act as interpretive frames shaping investors’ reactions to earnings deviations—the positive or negative earnings deviations from analysts’ expectations. We propose that investor reactions to earnings deviations will be amplified when investors perceive a CEO to have higher promotion focus, and dampened when investors perceive a CEO to have higher prevention focus. We employ a multimethod approach to test our theorizing; we use an archival study of S&P 500 firms from 2003 to 2017 to test our hypotheses, and two preregistered randomized vignette experiments to explore the underlying investor attributions theorized in our framework. Across all studies, we find broad support for our theorization regarding how CEO regulatory-focused language acts as interpretive frames for investors, which has important implications for research on the social view of financial markets and CEO regulatory focus.
title_cn: CEO监管焦点作为一种解释框架：在收益偏差背景下对投资者感知的实证检验
abstract_cn: 投资者根据首席执行官所使用的语言感知其监管焦点。在前期研究对首席执行官监管焦点直接影响的基础上，我们提出了一个新的理论范式，其中首席执行官的监管焦点语言作为解释性框架，塑造投资者对盈余偏差的反应——即与分析师预期的正向或负向盈余偏差。我们提出，当投资者认为首席执行官具有更高的促进焦点时，对盈余偏差的反应会被放大；而当投资者认为首席执行官具有更高的预防焦点时，对盈余偏差的反应则会被减弱。我们采用多种方法来检验我们的理论假设；通过对2003年至2017年标准普尔500公司进行的档案研究来检验我们的假设，并通过两个预注册的随机情境实验来探索我们框架中理论化的投资者归因。在所有研究中，我们发现广泛支持我们的理论，即首席执行官监管焦点语言作为投资者的解释性框架，这对金融市场的社会视角和首席执行官监管焦点研究具有重要的启示。

title: Point Break? The Efficacy of Creative Differences as a Protective Label for Future Work
abstract: Creative projects require teams to both generate and integrate divergent ideas. While divergent ideas are necessary for creative success, they can also foster disagreements that can lead to collaborative breakdowns where individuals leave a project. Because creative work requires a strong reputation for moving from project to project, collaborative breakdowns threaten the ability to secure future work opportunities. We conduct a qualitative and a quantitative study to investigate the effectiveness of “creative differences” as a protective label for individuals that leave creative projects. Our inductive, qualitative analysis of interviews with Hollywood professionals reveals the potential for reputational damage following a collaborative breakdown, as well as the role of “creative differences” as a professionally ambiguous attribution meant to mitigate this damage. However, our informants offer conflicting views on its efficacy. From these insights, we abductively test hypotheses in a quantitative study examining directors who depart films due to creative differences, comparing them with those who leave for other reasons. Our study contributes by uncovering a novel dilemma in creative work—the role of collaborative breakdowns—and the potential hazards of relying on professionally ambiguous attributions as reputational shields for future career opportunities.
title_cn: 《冲破界限？创意差异作为未来工作的保护标签的有效性》
abstract_cn: 创意项目要求团队既要生成又要整合不同的想法。虽然不同的想法对于创意成功至关重要，但它们也可能引发分歧，导致合作破裂，从而使个体退出项目。由于创意工作需要在项目之间建立强大的声誉，合作破裂威胁到获得未来工作机会的能力。我们进行了一项定性和定量的研究，以探讨“创意差异”作为离开创意项目的个人的保护性标签的有效性。通过对好莱坞专业人士访谈的归纳性定性分析，我们揭示了合作破裂后潜在的声誉损害，以及“创意差异”作为一种旨在减轻这种损害的职业模糊归因的作用。然而，我们的被访者对其有效性提供了矛盾的看法。基于这些见解，我们在一项定量研究中采用归纳推理测试假设，考察因创意差异而离开电影的导演，并将其与因其他原因离开的导演进行比较。我们的研究通过揭示创意工作中一个新颖的困境——合作破裂的角色——以及依赖职业模糊归因作为未来职业机会的声誉保护伞的潜在危害，作出了贡献。

title: Political Segregation in the Labor Market and the Persistence of Pay Gaps
abstract: Many scholars assume that initiatives to promote gender and racial pay equality are largely performative, helping firms appear socially responsible while making little progress. However, the extent to which such initiatives are genuinely supported may depend on the ideological leaning of the field in which they occur. We propose that the higher the ratio of liberals in an industry or occupation, the more its members will be guided by logics that support the equal distribution of resources between gender and racial groups. Using large-scale archival samples of U.S. employees and recent data on U.S. firms and nonprofit organizations, we find support for our theory. The results indicate that membership in liberal-leaning industries and occupations is associated with stronger support for the use of pro-equality practices. Liberal-leaning industries and occupations also showed greater progress toward gender and racial pay equality over time. Notably, we controlled for various alternative explanations, such as demographic and geographic differences between fields. Thus, this paper suggests that the political composition of a field may give rise to logics and norms that shape how efforts to promote group equality are understood and pursued.
title_cn: 劳动市场中的政治隔离与薪酬差距的持续存在
abstract_cn: 许多学者认为，推动性别和种族薪酬平等的举措在很大程度上是表面的，帮助企业看起来具有社会责任感，但实际进展有限。然而，这些举措是否得到真正支持的程度可能依赖于其所在领域的意识形态倾向。我们提出，行业或职业中自由派的比例越高，其成员就越可能受到支持性别和种族群体资源平等分配逻辑的指导。通过对美国员工的大规模档案样本以及最近关于美国企业和非营利组织的数据进行分析，我们找到了支持这一理论的证据。结果表明，身处自由派倾向行业和职业的成员对使用促平等措施的支持更为强烈。自由派倾向的行业和职业在性别和种族薪酬平等方面随着时间推移也表现出更大的进展。值得注意的是，我们控制了不同领域之间的多种替代解释，例如人口和地理差异。因此，本文表明，某一领域的政治构成可能会产生影响逻辑和规范，从而塑造对促进群体平等努力的理解和追求方式。

title: Are You Looking at Me? Orchestrating Voyeuristic Events to Add Value for Those Being Observed
abstract: Voyeurism offers audiences a window into the private lives of others. Given the widespread appeal of voyeurism, it is unsurprising that organizations have sought to commercialize voyeuristic events across various industries. Prior research has focused on the audience’s role in voyeuristic experiences. However, those being observed (i.e., observees) play an essential role in shaping audiences’ voyeuristic experiences, making it crucial to explore how voyeuristic businesses strive to manage observees’ engagement. For this exploration, we used an inductive approach. We focused on the voyeuristic business of slum tourism and interviewed the observees (slum residents), audience members (tourists), and orchestrators (tour guides) in the Dharavi slum. We found that businesses attempt to orchestrate a voyeuristic event to ensure continued observee participation by scripting the event, claiming to improve the lives of those in the transgressed community, bounding audience behavior, personalizing the observees, and memorializing the voyeuristic experience. This orchestrated interaction can temporarily blur the traditional roles of audience and observee, with some observees momentarily taking on the perspective of the audience and the audience momentarily being observed. This temporary switching of roles can enhance the experience of the voyeuristic event for the audience and for some of the nonconsenting observees.
title_cn: 你在看我吗？策划偷窥事件为被观察者增值
abstract_cn: 偷窥行为为观众提供了一扇窥视他人私生活的窗口。考虑到偷窥的广泛吸引力，组织寻求在各个行业中将偷窥事件商业化并不足为奇。以往的研究集中于观众在偷窥体验中的角色。然而，被观察者（即观察对象）在塑造观众的偷窥体验中扮演着重要角色，因此深入探讨偷窥商业如何努力管理观察对象的参与变得至关重要。为此，我们采用了归纳研究的方法。我们的研究聚焦于贫民窟旅游这一偷窥商业，采访了达哈维贫民窟的观察对象（贫民窟居民）、观众（游客）和组织者（导游）。我们发现，商业机构试图通过策划事件来进行安排，以确保观察对象的持续参与，包括编排事件、声称改善被侵扰社区中人们的生活、限制观众行为、个性化观察对象以及纪念窥视体验。这种有组织的互动可以暂时模糊观众和观察对象的传统角色，其中一些观察对象短暂地采纳观众的视角，而观众则暂时被观察。这种角色的暂时切换能够增强观众和某些未同意的观察对象对偷窥事件的体验。

title: Seeking Greener Pastures: Employee Turnover Following Corporate Stakeholder Violations
abstract: Are employees willing to leave when their employer violates societal norms? We develop an event-based framework for understanding employee turnover in response to stakeholder violations—publicly announced, regulator-sanctioned harms to stakeholders. We theorize that intense violations prompt some employees to reassess their affiliation due to reputational concerns, especially when violations are broad in scope, occur in rapid succession, or diverge from past patterns. These features increase the likelihood that observers, including peers and future employers, will view the misconduct as systemic, elevating reputational risk for those who remain. Using eight years of job history data from 735 large U.S. public companies, sourced from LinkedIn by Revelio Labs, we find that violations amounting to 5% of a company’s annual revenues translate into a 3.93% increase in employee turnover. Turnover rates rise further when violations are broad, rapid, or historically atypical. Departing employees tend to join firms with fewer prior violations, indicating a form of values-based sorting. We also estimate the financial toll of violation-induced turnover for representative firms in our sample. Our findings offer a new lens on stakeholder violations as organizational events that drive interorganizational migration.
title_cn: 寻求更好的机会：企业利益相关者违规后员工离职现象
abstract_cn: 员工在其雇主违反社会规范时是否愿意离职？我们构建了一个基于事件的框架，以理解员工对利益相关者违规行为的离职反应——即对利益相关者造成的公开宣布的、受到监管机构制裁的伤害。我们理论化认为，激烈的违规行为促使一些员工出于声誉担忧重新评估与公司的关系，尤其是在当违规行为广泛、迅速发生或偏离过去模式时。这些特征增加了观察者（包括同事和未来雇主）将这种不当行为视为系统性的可能性，从而提高了留任员工的声誉风险。通过使用来自 LinkedIn 的 Revelio Labs 提供的735家大型美国上市公司的八年职务历史数据，我们发现，违规行为占公司年收入的5%会导致员工流失率增加3.93%。当违规行为广泛、迅速或在历史上不典型时，离职率进一步上升。离职的员工倾向于加入之前违规较少的公司，表明了一种基于价值观的选择。我们还估计了在我们样本中的典型公司中，违规导致的员工流失的财务损失。我们的发现为利益相关者的违规行为提供了一种新的视角，认为这些行为是推动组织间流动的组织事件。

title: Who I Am Not: Enhancing Self-Clarity through Cultivating Not-Me Identities
abstract: How do people develop and leverage self-definitions of who and what they are not, or their “not-me” identities, to navigate their work lives? In contrast to dominant portrayals of not-me identities as negative or oppositional, we explore how they can serve as resources in identity work. Drawing on a grounded theory study of 80 interviews with independent workers and clients, we identify a process we call “identity filtering.” Through this process, individuals identify and disconfirm misaligned role or relational elements, cultivating not-me identity repertoires that serve as reference points for how they engage in and shape their role-relationships. We identify two distinct pathways: some individuals enact their not-me identities through setting boundaries and role screening, which in turn enhance their self-clarity. Others suppress their not-me identities by engaging in enmeshment, which generates emotional strain. These diverging paths emerge through distinct underlying mechanisms: self-worth and desire for control both enable enactment, while adaptability constrains it. By reconceptualizing not-me identities as resources, this study advances identity theory and deepens understanding of how (independent) workers navigate fluid role-relationships and uncertainty in contemporary work.
title_cn: 我不是谁：通过培养非我身份来增强自我清晰度
abstract_cn: 人们如何发展和利用自我定义，即他们所不是什么的身份或“非我”身份，以在工作生活中进行导航？与主流对非我身份的负面或对立性描绘形成对比，我们探讨了这些身份如何作为身份工作的资源。通过对80个独立工作者和客户的访谈进行扎根理论研究，我们识别出一个名为“身份过滤”的过程。通过这个过程，个人识别并否定不契合的角色或关系元素，培养非我身份的资源库，作为他们参与和塑造角色关系的参考点。我们识别出两条不同的路径：一些个人通过设定界限和角色筛选来表现他们的非我身份，从而增强自我清晰感。而另一些个人则通过参与纠缠来压抑他们的非我身份，这会产生情感紧张。这些不同的路径通过不同的潜在机制浮现出来：自我价值感和控制欲都能促进非我身份的表现，而适应性则对其加以约束。通过重新构思非我身份为资源，这项研究推进了身份理论的发展，并加深了对（独立）工作者如何在当代工作中导航流动的角色关系和不确定性的理解。

title: The duality of duality: Generative and disruptive climate configurations for innovation
abstract: Organizational climate is seen as a key driver of organizational performance, including sustained innovation. However, there is limited work on the effects of climate duality on innovation. The co-existence of two distinct climate dimensions (duality) in an organization creates the potential for both generative and disruptive dualities. By dividing the innovation process into an idea generation stage and an innovation implementation stage, we develop a theory linking climate duality and the generative–disruptive dichotomy at each stage of the innovation process. In particular, we argue that climate duality should be generative at the idea stage and disruptive at the implementation stage. Using data from the 2018 Australian Public Service Employee Census ( N = 59,870), we test the distinct effects of climate duality at each stage. We conclude with a discussion of the implications of these findings for theories of work climate and innovation. • Advance workplace climate research with a configurational approach examining interactions among multiple workplace climates • Theorize relationship between duality (co-existence of go-getter and inclusive climates) and stages of innovation process • Use Australian Public Service Employee Census to show climate duality benefits idea generation (a divergent process) • Find climate duality hinders implementation (a convergent process), revealing paradoxical effects on innovation • Extend theories of climate duality and innovation to public organizations, contributing to cross-sector understanding
title_cn: 双重性的双重性：创新的生成性与破坏性气候配置
abstract_cn:
组织气候被视为推动组织绩效的关键因素，包括持续的创新。然而，目前关于气候双重性对创新影响的研究仍然有限。在一个组织中，两种不同气候维度的共存（双重性）为产生生成性和破坏性双重性的可能性创造了条件。通过将创新过程分为创意生成阶段和创新实施阶段，我们发展了一种理论，连接气候双重性与创新过程每个阶段的生成性—破坏性二分法。具体来说，我们主张在创意阶段气候双重性应该是生成性的，而在实施阶段则应该是破坏性的。通过使用2018年澳大利亚公共服务员工普查的数据（N = 59,870），我们检验了气候双重性在每个阶段的不同影响。最后，我们讨论了这些发现对工作气候和创新理论的启示。

• 采用配置方法推进职场气候研究，考察多个职场气候之间的互动  
• 理论化双重性（积极进取与包容性气候的共存）与创新过程阶段之间的关系  
• 使用澳大利亚公共服务员工普查数据展示气候双重性有助于创意生成（一个发散过程）  
• 发现气候双重性对实施（一个聚合过程）构成阻碍，揭示了对创新的悖论性影响  
• 将气候双重性和创新的理论扩展到公共组织，为跨部门理解做出贡献

title: Dinosaurs of the organizational landscape facing technological disruption: Liability of aging and exaptation in monastic orders
abstract: Some organizations remain adaptable across centuries while others struggle to evolve and ultimately fade into irrelevance. Only a handful of theories can explain this extraordinary adaptability. We test two competing theoretical perspectives in imprinting research: Liability of aging suggests that older organizations are at greater risk of disruption by modern technologies, but older organizations can also repurpose their imprinted structures and processes to their advantage in a process termed exaptation. To resolve this contradiction, we analyze Catholic religious orders and their monasteries. They represent the oldest extant organizations, were founded in various historical eras, and are facing contemporary challenges posed by digitalization. Our quantitative and qualitative findings indicate that the orders with historically decentralized imprints show higher adaptability in embracing digital innovation. Our results confirm that long-term adaptability is increased in organizations whose imprinted decentralized logics provide a propensity for exaptation. However, these long-standing organizations are also more wary of the negative effects of digital disruption and appear to shield their organizational core more strongly. We contribute to imprinting research by shedding light on the intricate relationship between historically imprinted organizational logics and contemporary organizational practice and highlight the often-underappreciated importance of exaptation for long-term adaptability. • Imprinting theory implies that aging organizations are less able to react to changes. • However, structures adapted for initial conditions may be repurposed. • We test both these assumptions in the organizational logics of Catholic orders. • Catholic orders were founded in diverse eras and face challenges with digitalization. • Historically decentralized organizational logics adapt best to digital innovation.
title_cn: 面对技术颠覆的组织生态中的恐龙：蒙哥华修道院中的老龄负担与再适应性
abstract_cn: 一些组织在几个世纪中保持适应性，而另一些则难以进化，最终陷入无关紧要的境地。只有少数理论能够解释这种非凡的适应性。我们测试了印记研究中的两种竞争理论视角：老化的负担理论认为，老组织更容易受到现代技术的干扰，但老组织也可以重新利用其印记结构和流程，以此在一个被称为“适应”的过程中获得优势。为了解决这一矛盾，我们分析了天主教修道院及其修道士。这些组织是现存最古老的组织，成立于不同的历史时期，并面临数字化带来的当代挑战。我们的定量和定性研究结果表明，历史上具有去中心化印记的修道院在接受数字创新方面表现出更高的适应性。我们的结果确认，长期适应性在那些印记的去中心化逻辑提供适应倾向的组织中得到了增强。然而，这些历史悠久的组织也对数字化干扰的负面影响更加警惕，并似乎更强烈地保护其组织核心。我们通过阐明历史印记的组织逻辑与当代组织实践之间复杂的关系，为印记研究做出了贡献，并强调了适应在长期适应性中的重要性，这一重要性常常被低估。 • 印记理论暗示老化组织对变化的反应能力较弱。 • 然而，适应于初始条件的结构可能被重新利用。 • 我们在天主教修道院的组织逻辑中测试了这两种假设。 • 天主教修道院成立于不同的时代，并面临数字化的挑战。 • 历史上去中心化的组织逻辑对数字创新的适应性最佳。

title: Automation, trade and multinational activity: Micro evidence from Spain
abstract: We use a rich dataset of Spanish manufacturing firms from 1990 to 2016 to shed light on how automation in a high-income country affects trade and multinational activity involving lower-income countries. We exploit variation in firm exposure to robotics inventions over time, as measured using ex ante task specialization and the tasks described in new robotics patents. We show that the deployment of robots in Spanish firms had a positive impact on their offshoring to lower-income countries. For firms that had not yet offshored production to lower-income countries, robot adoption caused them to start newly doing so. By contrast, for firms that were already offshoring to lower-income countries, robot adoption had no effect on their offshoring. • The deployment of robots in Spanish firms had a positive impact on offshoring to developing countries. • Firms that adopted robots started newly offshoring production. • Firms that were already offshoring saw no effect on their offshoring. • Robot adoption had no impact on offshoring to advanced economies.
title_cn: 自动化、贸易与跨国活动：来自西班牙的微观证据
abstract_cn: 我们使用1990年至2016年间西班牙制造企业的丰富数据集，探讨高收入国家的自动化如何影响与低收入国家的贸易和跨国活动。我们利用企业在不同时间段对机器人发明的接触程度的变化进行分析，这一接触程度是通过事先的任务专业化和新机器人专利中描述的任务来衡量的。我们发现，西班牙企业在机器人部署方面的积极影响促进了它们向低收入国家的外包。对于尚未将生产外包给低收入国家的企业，机器人采用促使它们开始进行新的外包。相反，对于已经向低收入国家外包的企业，机器人采用对其外包没有影响。 • 西班牙企业的机器人部署对向发展中国家的外包产生了积极影响。 • 采用机器人后，企业开始新的生产外包。 • 已经进行外包的企业在外包方面没有看到影响。 • 机器人采用对向发达经济体的外包没有影响。

title: Managing alliance portfolio interdependencies for innovation: The role of governance choice in new alliances
abstract: Firms can govern their alliances through contractual agreements or equity joint ventures, the latter involving the shared ownership of a newly formed legal entity. This paper argues that the governance choice in a new alliance can be a lever for a firm to manage interdependencies in its alliance portfolio. We examine two related ideas. The first is that the choice of governance structure for a new alliance depends on the composition of a firm's alliance portfolio. The second is that this governance choice has implications for the nature of the firm's innovation outputs. Using data on U.S.-listed dedicated biotechnology firms, we find that firms are more likely to govern a new alliance through a contractual agreement when the accessed resources are similar to the resources available in their existing alliance portfolio. This choice also increases innovation in these similar resource domains. In contrast, firms are more likely to choose an equity joint venture when the accessed resources are complementary to their existing alliance portfolio, a choice that increases innovation in these complementary resource domains. Our findings extend the alliance-portfolio perspective by linking portfolio interdependencies to the governance choices in new alliances and their implications for innovation. • Firms use governance choice in new alliances to manage alliance portfolio interdependencies. • Contracts are preferred when accessing resources similar as in existing alliances. • Joint ventures are preferred when accessing resources complementary to existing alliances. • Governance choice influences the types of innovation outputs the firm achieves. • Contracts foster innovation in similar domains and JVs in complementary domains.
title_cn: 管理联盟投资组合间的相互依赖性以促进创新：治理选择在新联盟中的作用
abstract_cn: 企业可以通过合同协议或股权合资企业来管理其联盟，后者涉及对新成立法律实体的共享所有权。本文认为，新联盟中的治理选择可以成为企业管理其联盟组合中相互依赖关系的杠杆。我们探讨了两个相关的观点。第一个是，新联盟的治理结构选择取决于企业联盟组合的构成。第二个是，这种治理选择对企业的创新产出性质具有重要影响。通过对美国上市专注于生物技术的公司的数据分析，我们发现，当获得的资源与企业现有的联盟组合中的资源相似时，企业更可能通过合同协议来管理新联盟。这种选择还会在这些相似资源领域中促进创新。相反，当获得的资源与现有联盟组合中的资源互补时，企业更可能选择股权合资企业，而这种选择将在这些互补资源领域中增强创新。我们的研究扩展了联盟组合的视角，通过将组合的相互依赖性与新联盟中的治理选择及其对创新的影响联系起来。 • 企业利用新联盟中的治理选择来管理联盟组合的相互依赖关系。 • 当获得的资源与现有联盟相似时，优先选择合同。 • 当获得的资源与现有联盟互补时，优先选择合资企业。 • 治理选择影响企业所实现的创新输出类型。 • 合同在相似领域促进创新，而合资企业在互补领域促进创新。

title: Specialisation and the career outcomes of inventors
abstract: Recent years have seen a reorganisation of innovation production to favour groups of collaborators, and increasingly specialised individual inventors. In this paper I construct a panel of highly prolific inventors, whom I observe frequently throughout their career. I develop a simple setting whereby inventors face a trade-off between acquiring knowledge depth and knowledge breadth. Empirically, I provide suggestive evidence that after conditioning upon the selection of inventors into specialised careers in certain technological fields, specialisation is associated with a lower probability of contributing to a top-cited invention over the remainder of their career. This suggestive evidence is consistent with a mechanism where specialised inventors are vulnerable to knowledge obsolescence in the late stages of their career. The negative relationship between specialisation and highly cited inventions is concerning given the disproportionate value of such inventions to society. • I create a novel dataset on the careers of prolific inventors. • I integrate career cycle effects into the study of specialisation and productivity. • I develop a measure of specialisation at the inventor-field-year level. • I find specialisation is negatively linked to contributing to top-cited inventions. • I present evidence that this is consistent with a knowledge obsolescence mechanism.
title_cn: 专业化与发明者的职业结果
abstract_cn: 近年来，创新生产的组织方式发生了重组，倾向于支持合作团队和日益专业化的个人发明者。在本文中，我构建了一个高产发明者的面板，这些发明者在其职业生涯中频繁被观察。我开发了一个简单的模型，其中发明者面临知识深度与知识广度之间的权衡。从实证上看，我提供了暗示性证据，表明在对发明者进入某些技术领域的专业化职业选择进行条件化后，专业化与他们职业生涯剩余时间内贡献高被引发明的概率呈负相关。这一暗示性证据与一个机制一致，即专业化发明者在职业晚期易受知识过时的影响。考虑到此类发明对社会的不成比例价值，专业化与高被引发明之间的负相关关系引发了担忧。 • 我创建了一个关于高产发明者职业生涯的新数据集。 • 我将职业周期效应纳入了专业化与生产力的研究中。 • 我开发了一个在发明者-领域-年份水平上衡量专业化的指标。 • 我发现专业化与贡献高被引发明之间存在负相关。 • 我提供了证据，表明这与知识过时机制一致。

title: AI users are not all alike: The characteristics of French firms buying and developing AI
abstract: In this work we characterise French firms using artificial intelligence (AI) in 2018 and explore the link between AI use and productivity. We distinguish AI users that source AI from external providers (AI buyers) from those developing their own AI systems (AI developers) based on the official French ICT survey, that provides information about the use of AI by firms. AI buyers tend to be larger than other firms, but this relation is explained by ICT-related variables. Conversely, AI developers are larger and younger beyond ICT. Other digital technologies, digital skills, and infrastructure play a key role for AI use, with AI developers leveraging more specialised ICT human capital than AI buyers. Overall, AI users tend to be more productive, however this is related to the self-selection of more productive and digital-intensive firms into AI use. This is not the case for AI developers, for which the positive link between AI use and productivity remains positive and significant. This relationship persists across multiple robustness checks, including analyses addressing endogeneity concerns. • We characterise French firms using AI, distinguishing buyers and developers. • AI developers are larger and younger, and leverage more specialised ICT skills. • Overall, AI users are more productive, but this appears driven by selection. • AI use positively affects developers’ productivity beyond such selection dynamics.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 人工智能用户并不相同：购买和开发人工智能的法国企业特征
abstract_cn:
在本研究中，我们对2018年使用人工智能（AI）的法国企业进行了特征分析，并探索了AI使用与生产力之间的关系。我们根据官方的法国信息通信技术（ICT）调查，将AI用户分为从外部供应商获取AI的企业（AI买方）和开发自有AI系统的企业（AI开发者）。AI买方通常比其他企业规模更大，但这种关系可以通过与ICT相关的变量来解释。相反，AI开发者在ICT之外也具有更大的规模和更年轻的特征。其他数字技术、数字技能和基础设施在AI的使用中发挥了关键作用，AI开发者相比AI买方更能利用专业化的信息通信技术人力资本。总体而言，AI用户的生产力倾向于更高，然而这与更具生产力和数字密集型的企业自我选择使用AI有关。对于AI开发者而言，这种情况并不成立，AI使用与生产力之间的正向联系仍然显著且积极。经过多次稳健性检验，包括针对内生性问题的分析，这种关系依然成立。  
• 我们对使用AI的法国企业进行了特征化，区分买方和开发者。  
• AI开发者更大且更年轻，并利用更多专业化的ICT技能。  
• 总体来说，AI用户的生产力更高，但这似乎是由选择驱动的。  
• AI使用对开发者的生产力产生了积极影响，超越了这种选择动态。

title: Unlocking firm innovation under regional disadvantage: Can psychological openness compensate?
abstract: Firm innovation is strongly shaped by regional endowment – defined here as regional supply- and demand-side conditions for innovation – yet many regions are disadvantaged by having low levels of such endowment. While recent research increasingly emphasizes the role of regional soft factors , such as psychological openness, we still know relatively little about how such factors influence firm innovation under conditions of low structural endowment. Theoretically, we draw on Schmookler's scissors metaphor to conceptualize regional supply and demand conditions as hard, structural endowments of regions. We argue that favorable regional soft conditions – specifically psychological openness – can partially offset these structural constraints, but only for firms that possess sufficient absorptive capacity to recognize, absorb, and exploit such favorable regional conditions. Using longitudinal firm-level data on Swedish firms from 2004 to 2018, we show that regional psychological openness does not have a universal positive effect on product innovation. Instead, our results indicate that the benefits of regional openness are concentrated among firms with higher absorptive capacity operating in regions with low endowment, while firms in regions with higher endowment do not benefit in the same way. Implications for research and policymaking are discussed. • Regional soft factors are associated with firm innovation outcomes. • Regional psychological openness may offset regional structural disadvantages. • Firms need absorptive capacity to benefit from regional psychological openness. • Hard and soft factors at firm and region levels jointly shape firm innovation. • In high-endowment regions, psychological openness may coincide with lower innovation.
title_cn: 在区域劣势下解锁企业创新：心理开放能否提供补偿？
abstract_cn: 企业创新在很大程度上受到区域禀赋的影响——在此定义为区域创新的供给和需求条件——然而，许多地区因其低水平的禀赋而处于不利地位。尽管近期研究日益强调区域软因素的作用，例如心理开放性，但我们对这些因素如何在低结构禀赋的条件下影响企业创新的认知仍然相对有限。从理论上讲，我们借鉴施穆克勒的剪刀隐喻，将区域的供给和需求条件视为区域的硬性结构性禀赋。我们认为，有利的区域软条件——特别是心理开放性——可以在一定程度上抵消这些结构性约束，但这仅适用于具备足够吸收能力的企业，以识别、吸收和利用这些有利的区域条件。通过对2004年至2018年间瑞典企业的纵向数据分析，我们发现区域的心理开放性并不对产品创新产生普遍的积极影响。相反，我们的结果表明，区域开放的好处集中在那些在低禀赋地区运营且具备较高吸收能力的企业中，而在高禀赋地区的企业并未以相同方式受益。研究和政策制定的启示也在探讨之中。 • 区域软因素与企业创新结果相关。 • 区域心理开放性可以抵消区域结构性劣势。 • 企业需要吸收能力来从区域心理开放性中获益。 • 企业和区域层面上的硬因素和软因素共同影响企业创新。 • 在高禀赋地区，心理开放性可能与较低的创新 coincide。

title: Entrepreneurs-as-Scientists and entrepreneurial team formation strategies: A randomized control trial experiment
abstract: This paper investigates whether a causal, theory-driven decision framework, such as the Entrepreneurs-as-Scientists ( E -a-S) framework, influences how entrepreneurs reconfigure their entrepreneurial teams. We conducted a randomized controlled trial on 132 early-stage startups that participated in a pre-incubation program. During the pre-incubation program, we randomly assigned the early-stage startups to either a treatment group, which learned how to apply the E -a-S framework to make decisions, or a control group, which learned the same tools and skills as the treatment group, but without the E -a-S framework. For startups in both groups, we tracked the composition of the initial entrepreneurial team and its subsequent reconfigurations over 64 weeks. Employing a question-driven approach, we investigated whether E -a-S entrepreneurial teams evolved differently from those in the control group. Our analysis reveals that the entrepreneurs who learned the E -a-S framework composed their entrepreneurial teams differently from the other entrepreneurs: entrepreneurs who learned an E-a-S framework were more likely to use a resource-seeking strategy to compose their teams than those in the control group. Specifically, E -a-S entrepreneurs decreased the proportion of team members with technical backgrounds, while selectively adding individuals with managerial and industry-specific experience. These findings demonstrate that E-a-S not only shapes venture pivots and terminations but also influences the formation of entrepreneurial teams. The implications of the results are discussed for research, entrepreneurs, and investors. • E -a-S entrepreneurs reconfigure their entrepreneurial teams differently compared to other entrepreneurs. • E-a-S entrepreneurs rely more on a resource-seeking strategy than non-E-a-S entrepreneurs when reconfiguring their teams. • E-a-S entrepreneurs do not differ from non-E-a-S in using an interpersonal attraction strategy when reconfiguring teams. • Randomized control trial experiment: Analysis based on 132 early-stage startups.
title_cn: 企业家作为科学家与创业团队形成策略：一项随机对照试验
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了因果性、基于理论的决策框架（如“创业者作为科学家”（E-a-S）框架）是否会影响创业者重新配置其创业团队的方式。我们对132家参与预孵化项目的早期创业公司进行了随机对照试验。在预孵化项目期间，我们随机将这些早期创业公司分为两组：一组是实验组，学习如何应用E-a-S框架进行决策；另一组是对照组，学习与实验组相同的工具和技能，但没有E-a-S框架。我们跟踪了两组创业公司初始创业团队的组成及其在64周内的后续重组情况。采用以问题为驱动的方法，我们调查了E-a-S创业团队是否与对照组的团队有不同的演变。我们的分析显示，学习E-a-S框架的创业者与其他创业者在构建其创业团队时表现出不同的方式：学习E-a-S框架的创业者在组成团队时更倾向于采用资源寻求策略，而对照组的创业者则相对较少。具体而言，E-a-S创业者减少了技术背景团队成员的比例，而选择性地增加了具备管理和行业专门经验的个体。这些发现表明，E-a-S不仅影响创业项目的转型和终止，还影响创业团队的形成。我们讨论了结果对研究、创业者和投资者的启示。• E-a-S创业者在重新配置团队时与其他创业者表现出不同的方式。• E-a-S创业者在重新配置团队时比非E-a-S创业者更依赖资源寻求策略。• 在团队重新配置时，E-a-S创业者与非E-a-S创业者在使用人际吸引策略方面没有差异。• 随机对照试验：基于132家早期创业公司的分析。

title: Towards disruptive sustainability: A multi-level analysis of business models driving sustainability transitions
abstract: This study examines how disruptive sustainable business models (DSBMs) drive sustainability transitions across micro, meso , and macro levels of socio-technical systems.
