My call here is to preserve, build, and expand ‘pockets of enjoyment’ within our current academic practices. Conferences and lab meetings are the cornerstones of our academic life; yet, we never explicitly take time to collectively celebrate pleasure. We could, therefore, dedicate a moment – let’s say at the start of every lab meeting – where we share a surprise or a delight from our recent work. It could be a work-related achievement, but also a more personal anecdote. On a lighter note, I remember that during an online department meeting, where it is particularly difficult to foster a good mood, we spent the first few minutes with a colleague cracking every possible ‘The Office’ joke and reference to Steve Carell’s character. Even those who did not know the show found it silly enough to have a good (online) laugh. The Office jokes aside, imagine we extend more enjoyable practices to another pivotal moment in our work: research seminars. Alongside the classical Q&A session, with its inquiries about methodological validity and conceptual rigour, why not ask: ‘Okay, thank you for this presentation; now I would like to know: what did you enjoy most while doing your research?’ A simple question, yet it makes all the difference. It would reconcile pleasure with the actual production of science. Sure, we could object: how would all of this rein in the academic hydra of systemic pressures and its all-too-many heads? Well, first, pleasure need not be about bursts of laughter and self-serving cheers. Sharing with others what we enjoy in our work also means opening up more vulnerably about who we are as individuals, and that would make a difference in building trust and more authentic relations among us in academia. In these troubled times, we might not vanquish the ‘publish-or-perish’ monster right away, but we might be more collectively ready to face it as a unified team. Yet, I admit: there’s a hitch here. Even the best-performing team cannot outrun self-defeating rules. For ‘pockets of enjoyment’ to achieve systemic change, institutional leaders must build on that momentum. So, in this last step of our ascension towards joyful scholarship, I urge Deans and journal editors to make pleasure an institutional priority. Pleasure, if preserved and championed, will be a powerful tool to create not only more robust institutions, but more interesting and relevant science. Pleasure is like a fine meal: you cannot prescribe it by decree, nor can enjoyment be mandated. Instead, we must focus on preserving and nurturing the conditions to let it shine. While Deans face immense pressure to deliver on metrics, they nonetheless remain uniquely positioned to become guardians of these ‘pockets of enjoyment’ in academia. As Bartunek (2019) argues, ‘contemplation’ makes academic life meaningful only when it is ‘particular’ and ‘real’ – this is true also for pleasure. So a first action from Deans would be to formally acknowledge what we collectively enjoy, for instance during faculty meetings. Institutional milestones are one thing, but leaders can take time to commend colleagues for non-traditional and less visible contributions, such as student mentorship, sharing research with a wider audience, maintaining a healthy work–life balance within a team, or leading a transdisciplinary project. As Deans put pleasure under the institutional spotlight, they send a strong signal favouring further autonomy and faculty involvement. Beyond visibility, Deans could also experiment with making these same contributions legitimate for career progression and tenure to expand the conditions for pleasure in academia. We should move with caution here, to avoid adding another bureaucratic layer that would burden both Deans and faculty. title_cn: 快乐的学术研究：重拾乐趣以激励学术界的变革
abstract_cn:
我用咖啡勺量度我的生活。——T.S.艾略特，《J·阿尔弗雷德·普鲁弗克的情诗》

星期五下午五点，外面下着雨。我在这里为我申请的另一个终身教授职位写脚注：“亲爱的同事们，这些发表在（咳咳……）‘排名中等’期刊上的文章。然而，进行这项田野调查、细致入微地研究、充满激情地写作，并与我的同事们分享结果，是多么令人振奋！难道研究的乐趣不值得全世界所有的星星吗？”简短的回答是“不”。但更长的回答则将我们深深扯入这种无乐趣的学术框架及其后果之中。作为学者，快乐听起来像个肮脏的秘密。在走廊里小声私语，或者更好：将它藏于心底。如果你足够幸运，能够在我们的成就之上享受你的工作——太棒了。但是在总体上，快乐是我们的禁忌。当然，作为学者，我们想保持可信度，因此我们以事实、客观性和严谨性为基础进行工作。炫耀星星、发表文章和艰苦努力？当然可以（虽然别太过分）。但告诉你的同事你有多享受工作？反应从“还好”到“嗯，不奇怪他享受他的工作：他根本没在工作”。然而，三年进入学术界后，我意识到，这种以发表为驱动的文化，抛弃快乐，最终只会导致我们陷入困境。当学术机构依赖狭隘的指标“咖啡勺”来衡量时，它们窒息了快乐；这滋生了顺从的研究，并使学者们疲惫不堪。因此，我们的毒性文化并不反映无乐趣的学术；它反而从中滋生而来。因此，快乐对学术来说并不是一种“可有可无”的东西，而是挑战我们实践和制度的关键火花。这里的快乐，我指的不仅是短暂的享受，而是我们在那些让我们的工作有意义的价值中寻找的内在满足（Schueller和Seligman，2010年）。这种内在的快乐陪伴着我们完成所有平凡甚至更雄心勃勃的任务：与同事聊天、参加会议、指导学生、推动科学知识、在实验室会议上讨论。快乐是学术界的动力：我们需要与之重新连接。回顾我作为年轻学者的旅程，我将首先深入探讨这种无乐趣学术的制造——在这里，我们用“成就券”和整洁的文章交换快乐。然后，我将追踪如何重新索回快乐能够激励学术界的持久变化。对于年轻学者而言，快乐是寻找声音的指南针，在各种压力中找到自我；集体而言，快乐通过促进真诚和培养积极情绪来建立归属感；从制度上讲，快乐为院长和期刊编辑提供了支持更具包容性的学术界的路径。这三个层面——个人、集体和制度——可以相互促进，引发学术界的积极滚雪球效应。最终，更愉快的学术为我们提供能量，去编织我们渴望激发的美好未来。

进入学术界的感觉有点像你在《搏击俱乐部》的第一天。你在学术界对快乐了解的第一条规则是：你不谈论快乐。这让开局模糊起来，因为我们开始学术旅程的初衷通常是由激情和内在动机构成的。我记得我博士项目的第一年；我时常看着我的榜样，想：他们真的是人吗？我在自欺欺人，认为这些天使般的形象坐落在社会科学的奥林匹斯山上，完全没受到我们这些凡人的快乐和痛苦的困扰。但随后我想——好吧，盖布里埃尔，来吧；全心投入科学的严谨到自我抹灭的地步。随着我的前行，我真的开始相信无私等同于客观性或科学的严谨。然而，这些错位的理想只给我们带来了准备进一步剥夺快乐的标准。注意：这只是被卷入这个系统真实运作之前的初步考验。我因此从理想化那些无私的标准转向了像僧侣般的苦行训练，在那里我们用“成就券”换取真正的快乐。我学习了风格上的苦行，以标准化发表格式和写作风格；理论上的苦行，使得我们的结果符合现存理论和主流话题；数量上的苦行，以确保字数保持在某个阈值以下；最后，知识上的苦行，只阐述一个想法——主流研究论文的定义。你立刻意识到，和同事谈论方法论严谨性（谢谢你，评审者2）或你的“对文献的贡献”（啊！注意间隙）、编辑外交（当然，亲爱的评审者，这个与我的理论框架相距甚远的参考文献，似乎完全相关），甚至是你的参考书目准确性（免责声明：所有归功于我的朋友Zotero）。关键是，在这段旅程中，我们不仅丢失了快乐，还丧失了通往个体化的更重要的道路。我的第一次同行评审经历可以作为一个警示故事，揭示了忽视快乐对你个人发展和学术生涯的危害。当时，我刚刚通过了我的博士论文的辩护。我花了几个月时间研究法国医院急救护士的情感经历；这些故事有时令人心痛，有时出人意料地有趣，但大多数时候涉及暴力甚至死亡。在某个时刻，我感到准备冒险，将我的工作投递到同行评审期刊。因此，我这么做了。几个月后，审稿人回复：我需要加强方法论，更清楚地解释数据收集，并（或许更出人意料的是）采用“较少批判”的视角。公道，我想，没什么是我没有预料到的。然而，我为什么感到越来越不安和失望呢？我起初感到困惑：在我最近阅读的这些方法论无可挑剔的文章中，那些“不纯”的内容到哪里去了？也许我的研究不够好？但随后，从困惑变得警觉。几个月后我才意识到——我工作的个人旅程在这无乐趣的学术机器中被撕毁了。抬头从失望中呆呆地看着我的脚，我环顾四周。一个连贯的模式浮现出来：我并不孤单。通过失去对快乐的关注，我们成为了这无乐趣学术机械中的另一个齿轮。路线图非常清晰：在上游，我们利用主流话题来最小化被退稿的风险；在下游，甚至商业学校也在狭隘的指标如h指数上加大力度。显然，这可能导致大量的文章——其中一些确实很优秀。然而，这是可持续的吗？仅仅三年进入学术界，我多次与对这一过程的复杂感情挣扎。一篇文章发表了，好吧。但接着我没有时间去享受它，而在我展望下一堆要阅读和写作的文章时，我心中那个讽刺的小声音在说：“是的，干得好，又一项在生产线上的条目”。除了集体的沮丧，这种学术“障碍赛”腐蚀人际关系，导致比较、冒名顶替综合症和孤独的文化。当学术界追求生产力以牺牲快乐的代价，就不仅危及学者的心理健康，还会 spiral down 到危及整个科学过程。这就是我们需要将快乐不仅视为个人愿望，而是整个学术文化的必然要求的原因。

在降入无乐趣学术的边缘后，我们现在面临一个关键时刻。快乐，就像雪球越滚越大，可以成为我们共同从悲叹走向升华的燃料：这是重拾我们作为学者的身份、建立更具包容性的集体实践，以及激励制度领导者支持学术文化持久变革的途径。我们是学者，还是在学术界工作的普通人？我在整个博士培训过程中一直在问自己这个问题——事实上，我对答案仍感到困惑。跳入学术界后，我们常常失去对学者背后那个人的关注，因而遵循多重要求：在“正确”的期刊上出版、指导学生、调整教学、参加最好的会议等等（哦，我提到申请资助了吗？）。但在这些波涛汹涌的海洋中，快乐可以成为导航的指南针，让我们自信地找到自己的声音和身份。然而，这种转变远非易事。首先，我们需要与那些要求牺牲和超脱的不切实际的学术理想保持距离。这导致了更进一步的复杂：当我们放弃那些理想时，我们发现了一个更痛苦的真相——隐藏在背后的恐惧。诚然，学术界的压力呈现出强大的障碍，即使请假也被视为对职业发展的阻碍决定（Fewer, 2025）。然而，当我们允许根深蒂固的焦虑支配我们的选择时，我们就集体助长了这个问题。随着我们的恐惧消散，我们意识到更根本的问题浮现：我在研究中沉浸真正享受什么？虽然痛苦，这种内省让我们增强了自我意识。在我完成博士后经历过这样一个时刻。那不是我设想的未来；我30岁快到了，却无从知晓自己要去哪里，甚至是否还有精力去追求学术生涯。与此同时，我的朋友们正踏入更成功和丰厚的职业（或者公平地说，从我当时愤懑的视角看，他们似乎是这般）。我认为自己的整个博士之旅都是浪费时间。然而，从这种痛苦中出现了一个洞察的时刻。我必须面对我最初的快乐与制度压力之间的差异。我处于一个能够为自己未来的职业及自我做出选择的位置，而这些选择应基于我所享受的事情。超越自我意识，追求我们所享受的东西可以为我们的领域带来益处，进而引导科学更具趣味性。确实，我们被告知科学发现需要冒险，并毫无畏惧地探索未知领域。然而，这条道路并不总是受到欢迎——更遑论被教授。这要求我们在逆境中保持韧性和果断；而更快乐的学术虽能将我们从竞赛中拉开，却使我们能够建立更真实的联系，超越发表和职业的工具性期待。

听着，我不想说谎：一两个同事嘲笑过我在“低级别”期刊上的发表或者我边缘化的兴趣，比如精神分析或艺术史。但你知道吗？说笑的是他们。因为最终，你所享受的东西成为了与同事建立更具意义的联系的更强内在指南针。然而，你的个人指南针只能带你到此为止；无论你多么有动力，只有健全的集体实践才能支持持久的变化。当我们利用和构建个人所享受的东西时，我们处于一个更好的位置，能够在学术界设计新的仪式和实践。无乐趣学术的框架并不是凭空出现的。虽然系统性压力很重要，但我们通过集体习惯和实践也是其中的一部分。以下是我们如何追随我们所享受的事物，建设和扩展学术界的“快乐小湾”。首先，让我们使博士旅程更加以成长为导向。目前的传统目标未能捕捉到与培训相关的个人旅程。因此，除了更传统的学术里程碑外，我们还需要设计具体的“成长目标”，包括建立在我们作为个体所享受的东西上的更个性化目标。这些目标在个体之间可能会有所不同，我们需要保持灵活，但它们可以为咨询会议提供指导。对于一些人来说，这可能意味着保持更好的工作与生活的平衡；对其他人来说，这可能是志愿服务或领导咨询任务。对我而言，这意味着在攻读博士学位的同时，暂时追逐我长久以来对表演的热爱。我知道，这些看似是分心——对于某些同行来说，他们的道路可能更直接，这没错。但看似的旁路其实是我们博士训练中被忽视的基本动力。持久的快乐可以意味着那些茁壮成长的人与那些陷入困境的人的区别。最终，我们需要确保在学术训练期间，博士项目是为真正拥有成长欲望和期望的人设计的。然而，培养更好的博士实践，感觉就像在无改变的集体仪式中培育植物。我的呼吁是在我们当前的学术实践中保留、建立和扩展“快乐小湾”。会议和实验室会议是我们学术生活的基石；然而，我们从未明确地花时间集体庆祝快乐。我们因此可以在每次实验室会议开始时专门腾出一段时间，分享我们近期工作中的惊喜或喜悦。这可能是与工作相关的成就，但也可以是更个人的轶事。在轻松的气氛中，我记得在一次线上部门会议中，在这特别困难营造良好气氛时，我们花了几分钟与一位同事调侃“办公室”中的每个可能的笑话和史蒂夫·卡瑞尔角色的引用。即便是那些不认识这个节目的同事也觉得足够可笑，乐得开怀（线上）大笑。抛开办公室的笑话，想象一下我们把这更多的愉悦实践延伸到我们工作中的另一个重要时刻：研究研讨会。在经典的问答环节中，除了询问方法论的有效性和概念的严谨性，为什么不问：“好的，谢谢你的演讲；现在我想知道：在进行研究的过程中你最享受的是什么？”这是一个简单的问题，却能产生巨大的区别。它将快乐与科学的实际生产调和在一起。当然，我们可能会反驳：这一切如何去应对系统压力的学术水怪及其众多头颅？那么，首先，快乐无需与爆笑和自我服务的欢呼相关联。与他人分享我们在工作中所享有的快乐也意味着更脆弱地打开自我，展现我们作为个体的真实的一面，这将有助于在学术界建立信任和更真实的人际关系。在这动荡的时期，我们可能无法立刻征服“发表或灭亡”的怪物，但我们可能会更团结地准备好面对它。不过，我承认：这里有个障碍。即便是表现最佳的团队，也无法逃避自我挫败的规则。为了实现“快乐小湾”的系统性改变，制度领导者必须在此基础上加以巩固。因此，在我们通往快乐学术的上升过程中的最后一步，我敦促院长和期刊编辑将快乐作为一种制度优先事项。快乐如果被保留并倡导，将成为创造更强健的制度以及更有趣和更有相关性的科学的强大工具。快乐就像一顿美餐：你不能通过法令来规定它，也无法强制享受它。我们必须专注于保留和培养让其闪耀的条件。虽然院长面临着巨大的压力去达成指标，但他们仍然处于独特的位置，能够成为学术界“快乐小湾”的守护者。正如巴图内克（2019年）所言，只有当“沉思”是“特别的”和“真实的”，学术生活才有意义——这一点也适用于快乐。因此，院长的第一项行动应该是在教职会议上正式承认我们共同享有的快乐。例如，制度性里程碑是一回事，但领导者可以花时间赞扬同事在非传统且不太显眼的贡献上，例如学生指导、与更广泛受众分享研究、在团队内维持健康工作与生活平衡，或领衔跨学科项目。当院长将快乐置于制度的聚光灯下时，他们传达出一个强烈的信号，鼓励更多的自主权和教职参与。除了可见性，院长还可以尝试将这些贡献合法化，以促进职业发展和终身教授来拓展学术界欢愉的条件。我们在这里应该谨慎行事，以免再增加一层官僚制度，使院长和教职都感到负担。然而，这并非科幻：一些学术机构，如乌得勒支大学，已经在此转变中开创了先例，重视学术工作的内在价值。院长不仅要关注学者的心理健康，还应致力于建立一个更新的包容性学术界。如果院长能够创造一个更快乐的学术氛围，那么期刊编辑就在此制度的基础上发挥作用。首先，为了让快乐融入研究并确保它潜在的存在，编辑可以在其评审的专题中，创建一个特定的部分，涉及到该研究的智力方面与其个人旅程之间的关系。毫无疑问，你将会从中了解到关于你的旅程的一些启示。交流的内容可能涉及简单的事情——例如与团队一起审视数据时所产生的惊叹之感；或是对领导这一项目的热情——虽然有些时候是艰难的，但评审委员们的时间也应该看到你的旅程是怎样度过的。因此，一个推荐的做法是，将快乐更好地融入整体评审流程，包括要求评审委员在评审中列出他们所欣赏的特定想法，或者是他们所享受到的知识。这不仅是一种对于更具启发性的评审有所期待；当评审者发现他们在自己研究中所享受的东西，并让这种乐趣融入其中时，我们会更愿意投入并帮助同行。

反思我作为年轻学者的旅程，我对我们工作的一个关键而又重要的方面有了新的认识：快乐。学术界享乐文化并不是在于回归到自私的享受——恰恰相反。快乐作为我们找寻声音的钥匙，使年轻学者能建立集体认同并激发制度反思，甚至超越学术范畴，成为推动下一个阶段的动力，以实现我们作为学者的理想和渴望。所以下次当你被要求用狭隘的“咖啡勺”指标来衡量你的学术生活时，记得为快乐留一份空间。

我特别感谢我的编辑支持团队，也要感谢为审稿及对此论文进行阅读与交流的人们。

title: Joining Decision‐Making, Moral Thinking, and Collective Action: Grand Challenges as a Phenomenology of Deliberation
abstract: Abstract This conceptual article argues that the mutual relevance of grand challenges and organization and management studies is best approached phenomenologically. Rather than constituting objects to be theorized or denoting special empirical contexts, grand challenges structure researchers’ attention and shape their interpretations of the processes and systems of deliberation through which collective action is coordinated. From this perspective, grand challenges require researchers to innovate their understandings of deliberation and to ensure that newly generated knowledge is redirected towards management and policymaking. The article integrates the Carnegie School theory of organization with French pragmatic sociology’s theory of justification, or economies of worth , to develop a phenomenological model of situated deliberation that links decision‐making with moral reasoning. This model highlights deliberation’s articulated, evaluative, contestable, and trans‐institutional character, as well as its grounding in the cognitive capacities and sociality of actors and observers – regardless of the scale, scope, or stratification of the underlying coordination problems. Building on this framework, the article advocates that grand challenge researchers adopt the standpoint of entrepreneurial observers : actors anchored by socio‐economic and scientific commitments who envision the integration of previously disjointed social systems of deliberation to orient collective action.
title_cn: 决策、道德思维与集体行动的结合：大挑战作为审议现象学
abstract_cn: 摘要 本概念性文章认为，宏大挑战与组织与管理研究的相互相关性最佳的研究方式是现象学的。宏大挑战并不构成需要理论化的对象或特殊的实证背景，而是通过结构化研究者的注意力并塑造他们对协调集体行动的论证过程和系统的解释。从这个角度来看，宏大挑战要求研究者创新他们对论证的理解，并确保新生成的知识被重新定向向管理和政策制定。本文将卡内基学派的组织理论与法国实用主义社会学的正当化理论或价值经济学相结合，发展出一种将决策与道德推理联系起来的处境论证的现象学模型。该模型强调论证的明确表达、评估性、争议性和跨制度特征，以及其根植于行为者和观察者的认知能力和社会性，无论潜在协调问题的规模、范围或分层如何。基于这一框架，文章倡导宏大挑战的研究者采用企业观察者的立场：即被社会经济和科学承诺所锚定的参与者，他们设想整合之前分离的论证社会系统，以引导集体行动。

title: Team Iungens Practice: A Behavioural Perspective to Bridge Demographic Faultlines and Relationship Conflicts for Team Creativity
abstract: Abstract Although employee diversity can contribute to team creativity, extant research has shown that, when diverse employees form strong demographic faultlines, subgroup identity separation and intensified relationship conflicts may be harmful to team creativity. Therefore, effective remedies in managing relationships and bridging identities between subgroups are urgently needed in these teams. Building on brokering research, we introduce team iungens practice (TIP) – so named from a Latin phrase meaning ‘joins or unites’ – as a new team process that team members or leaders can engage to forge and strengthen connections or facilitate new coordination among team members. We propose that teams can effectively utilize this behavioural strategy to bridge structural (faultline) and process (conflict) divides rooted in subgroup identity separation, thereby mitigating their negative impacts on team creativity. In Study 1, we developed and validated a scale to measure TIP. In Study 2, we found that TIPs effectively mitigated the positive effect of demographic faultline strength on relationship conflict and attenuated the negative impact of relationship conflict on team creativity from a multisource and multistage survey study. We demonstrate the value of TIPs as a behavioural strategy for managing demographic faultlines and relationship conflicts in teams.
title_cn: Iungens团队实践：从行为角度弥合人口分裂与关系冲突以促进团队创造力
abstract_cn: 摘要 尽管员工多样性能够促进团队创造力，但现有研究表明，当多元化员工形成强大的人口断层时，子群体身份分离和加剧的关系冲突可能对团队创造力产生负面影响。因此，在这些团队中，迫切需要有效的措施来管理关系并弥合子群体之间的身份差异。基于中介研究，我们提出了团队联合实践（TIP）——这一名称源自拉丁短语，意为“连接或联合”——作为一种新的团队过程，团队成员或领导者可以参与其中，以建立和强化连接或促进团队成员之间的新协调。我们建议团队可以有效利用这种行为策略来弥合根植于子群体身份分离的结构（断层）和过程（冲突）鸿沟，从而减轻其对团队创造力的负面影响。在研究1中，我们开发并验证了TIP的测量量表。在研究2中，我们发现TIP有效减轻了人口断层强度对关系冲突的积极影响，并减弱了关系冲突对团队创造力的负面影响，这一结果来源于多源和多阶段的调查研究。我们展示了TIP作为一种管理团队人口断层和关系冲突的行为策略的价值。

title: The Acceleration of Artificial Intelligence: Rethinking Organization and Work in an Era of Rapid Technological Change
abstract: Abstract Artificial intelligence (AI) is transforming the epistemic, interactional, and institutional foundations of contemporary organizations, yet management and organization studies are only beginning to theorise the implications of this shift. Existing research often treats “AI” as a singular construct, despite the fact that predictive, generative, agentic, and embodied systems rely on different logics and produce distinct organizational outcomes. This article interrogates the limits of this conceptual flattening and argues that cumulative theorising requires more precise specification of the technological systems under study. Drawing on developments across the field, we demonstrate how different modes of AI reshape core organizational constructs, including expertise, judgement, coordination, authority, and institutional adaptation. We advance a heuristic framework that differentiates among contemporary AI systems and clarifies their distinct affordances. The article concludes by outlining a research agenda that focusses on the shifting loci of agency, new decision architectures, and the normative and institutional challenges introduced by increasingly powerful AI systems.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 人工智能的加速：在快速技术变革时代重新思考组织与工作
abstract_cn: 摘要 人工智能（AI）正在改变当代组织的认知、互动和制度基础，然而管理与组织研究才刚刚开始理论化这一转变的影响。现有研究通常将“AI”视为一个单一的构造，尽管预测性、生成性、代理性和具身系统依赖于不同的逻辑，并产生不同的组织结果。本文探讨了这种概念性简化的局限性，并认为累积理论化需要对所研究的技术系统进行更精确的规范。基于该领域的发展，我们展示了不同类型的AI如何重塑核心组织构建，包括专业知识、判断、协调、权威和制度适应。我们提出了一个启发性框架，以区分当代AI系统并阐明其独特的功能。文章最后概述了一个研究议程，重点关注代理权的转变、新的决策架构，以及日益强大的AI系统所带来的规范性和制度性挑战。

title: Network‐Enabled Responses to Deglobalization: Examining How Firms Strategize During Eras of Global Disruption
abstract: Abstract Recent research has shown how cycles of globalization and deglobalization can disrupt firms and networks. Understanding this process requires a historical perspective on how firms and networks coordinate, strategize, and respond to the effects of deglobalization. This paper examines firm‐level, network‐enabled strategic responses to deglobalization by analysing a selection of key firms operating within the Liverpool (UK) and New York (USA) networks at the turn of the nineteenth century. The case study analyses firms within a broader network structure through network visualization, supplemented by various archival data sources. We explore the strategic responses of multiple firms and demonstrate how the network supported them, enabling them to address the challenges posed by deglobalization. We identify five categories of network‐enabled strategic responses to deglobalization: reinforcement, adaptation, shared risk, lobbying, and exit.
title_cn: 网络驱动的去全球化响应：探讨企业在全球危机时期如何制定战略
abstract_cn: 摘要 近期研究表明，全球化与去全球化的循环可以对企业和网络造成干扰。理解这一过程需要从历史的角度来看待企业和网络如何协调、制定战略以及应对去全球化的影响。本文通过分析19世纪末在利物浦（英国）和纽约（美国）网络中运营的若干关键企业，考察了企业层面和网络支持下的去全球化战略响应。案例研究通过网络可视化分析了企业在更广泛网络结构中的表现，并辅以多种档案数据来源。我们探讨了多家企业的战略响应，并展示了网络如何支持它们，使其能够应对去全球化带来的挑战。我们识别出五类网络支持的去全球化战略响应：强化、适应、共享风险、游说和退出。

title: When Opposites Don’t Attract: The New Information Environment, Polarization, and What Happens to Social Evaluations When ‘The World Goes to Hell in a Handbasket’
abstract: Abstract Organizations today operate in a new information environment, where changing technologies have enabled fundamentally different forms and pathways of information creation and dissemination while also generating unintended consequences – chief among them increased polarization. In combination, the new information environment and polarization have profoundly altered the social processes underpinning social evaluations. To animate social evaluations research on these issues, we consider how information environment shifts and increased polarization affect the value and durability of five social evaluation types – legitimacy, reputation, status, celebrity/infamy, and stigma/esteem. We highlight the implications for both theorizing about and empirically studying social evaluations in an ever more polarized world.
title_cn: 当对立面不再吸引：新信息环境、极化现象，以及当“世界陷入混乱”时社会评估会发生什么
abstract_cn: 摘要 现代组织在一个新的信息环境中运作，变化的技术使信息创造和传播的形式与路径发生了根本性的变化，同时也产生了意想不到的后果——其中最主要的是加剧了两极化。新的信息环境与两极化的结合，深刻改变了支撑社会评价的社会过程。为了推动关于这些问题的社会评价研究，我们考虑信息环境的变化和两极化加剧如何影响五种社会评价类型的价值和持久性——合法性、声誉、地位、名人/恶名以及污名/尊重。我们强调了在一个日益两极化的世界中，对社会评价进行理论构建和实证研究的意义。

title: Leadership and the Virtue of Humanity: Conceptual Clarity, Systematic Review, and Future Research Agenda
abstract: Abstract Humanity – the virtue enabling meaningful human connection – is vital to the leadership we need to survive our polycrisis context. As a prerequisite to sustainable human community, the virtue of humanity is considered universal. It has been claimed as a ‘higher‐order virtue’, comprised of and enacted by – but irreducible to – a suite of ‘lower‐order virtues’ such as compassion and kindness. This claim is evident in widely‐adopted virtues catalogues, but we lack consensus on how humanity is defined, and which attributes qualify as its virtuous dimensions. To address this, we develop a robust definition of humanity and apply criteria distilled from virtue ethics to theorize the lower‐order virtues that comprise its virtuous dimensions. We thus determine the virtuous dimensions of humanity include empathy, compassion, forgiveness, love, kindness, and generosity. Our processual model illustrates how, when expressed by leaders and followers, these virtuous dimensions represent the fullest expression of the higher‐order virtue of humanity and sustain human community. Our systematic review details what is known empirically about each virtuous dimension of humanity in relation to leadership. Drawing on this, we propose a research agenda to advance understanding of how the virtue of humanity might enable the leadership needed today and into the future.
title_cn: 领导力与人性的美德：概念清晰性、系统评审与未来研究议程
abstract_cn: 摘要 人性——这一使人类能够建立有意义联系的美德——对我们在多重危机背景下所需的领导力至关重要。作为可持续人类共同体的前提，人性的美德被认为是普世的。有人声称它是一种“高级美德”，由一系列“低级美德”构成并体现，但不可还原于这些“低级美德”，例如同情心和善良。这一主张在广泛采用的美德目录中得到了体现，但我们对人性的定义以及哪些特质构成其美德维度仍缺乏共识。为了解决这个问题，我们制定了一个坚实的人性定义，并应用从美德伦理中提炼出的标准，理论化构成其美德维度的低级美德。因此，我们确定人性的美德维度包括同理心、同情心、宽恕、爱、善良和慷慨。我们的过程模型展示了当这些美德维度由领导者和追随者表述时，如何充分体现人性这一高级美德，并维持人类共同体。我们的系统评审详细介绍了在领导力相关的人性每个美德维度上已有的实证研究。基于此，我们提出了一项研究议程，以推进对人性这一美德如何促进当今及未来所需领导力的理解。

title: Whom Should Entrepreneurs Approach? The Effect of Contact Status on Referring New Ventures for Acquisition
abstract: Abstract Prior entrepreneurial network literature has primarily examined how entrepreneurs’ networking efforts facilitate interorganizational exchanges, while giving little attention to the agency of their contacts. In this study, we investigate how contacts’ intra‐organizational status shapes their actions of referring entrepreneurs to their organizations for acquisition. Drawing on middle‐status conformity theory and interviews, we argue that, compared to high‐ or low‐status actors, middle‐status actors are more concerned about status loss and face a higher likelihood of such loss; therefore, they have a lower tendency to connect entrepreneurs with their organizations, resulting in a U‐shaped effect of contact status on referring actions including quantity, quality, and efficiency. Furthermore, this U‐shaped effect is moderated by organizational ownership and norms. The results based on 12,103 venture‐acquirer dyads support most of our hypotheses. Our study contributes to the entrepreneurial network literature by identifying the agency of contacts and their specific referring actions. It also adds to the network agency literature by highlighting the organizational context in which the contacts are situated as a critical enabler or inhibitor of such agency. In addition, it enriches the mergers and acquisitions literature by revealing the roles of actors at various organizational levels in facilitating corporate engagement with new ventures.
title_cn: 企业家应接触谁？接触状态对推荐新创企业进行收购的影响
abstract_cn: 摘要 以往的创业网络文献主要考察创业者的网络努力如何促进跨组织交流，而对其联系人的代理性关注较少。在本研究中，我们探讨了联系人的内部组织地位如何影响他们向组织推荐创业者以获取资源的行为。基于中位地位顺应理论和访谈，我们认为，与高地位或低地位的参与者相比，中位地位的参与者更关注地位损失，并面临更高的地位损失风险，因此他们更不倾向于将创业者与其组织连接，这导致联系人地位对推荐行为（包括数量、质量和效率）呈现U型效应。此外，这一U型效应受组织所有权和规范的调节。基于12,103对风险投资者与收购方的数据结果支持了我们的大部分假设。我们的研究通过识别联系人的代理性及其具体的推荐行为，为创业网络文献做出了贡献。同时，它还为网络代理性文献增添了内容，强调了联系人的组织背景在这种代理性中的关键促进或抑制作用。此外，它还通过揭示不同组织层级的参与者在推动企业与新创公司互动中的角色，丰富了并购文献。

title: The Ebbs and Flows of Reputation as Meaningful Signals: Market Reactions to Firms’ Reputation Instability
abstract: Abstract While prior studies typically treat firm reputation as a stable, intangible resource reflecting cumulative competence, we extend a socio‐constructionist perspective by shifting the focus to reputation instability – erratic fluctuations in a firm’s reputation over time relative to its industry peers. We argue that reputation instability functions as a distinct and often overlooked market signal by introducing ambiguities that influence investor valuation of a firm in a stock market context. Crucially, the impact of reputation instability is further shaped by contextual cues that anchor investor expectations. A firm’s current reputation and industry dynamism condition how instability may be regarded, either as a warning sign or a potential indication of improvement. Using panel data across four major US industry groups over 21 years, we find evidence consistent with our theoretical framework and identify critical boundary conditions under which reputation instability is penalized or rewarded by the market. By reframing reputation as a dynamic and unstable construct, our study advances theory on reputation signals, offering novel insights into how reputational temporal dynamics – not just established levels – shape firms’ market outcomes.
title_cn: 声望的起伏作为有意义信号：市场对企业声望不稳定的反应
abstract_cn: 摘要 以往的研究通常将企业声誉视为一种稳定的、无形的资源，反映了累积的能力，而我们则通过转变关注点至声誉的不稳定性——企业声誉相对于行业同行的波动——来扩展社会建构主义的视角。我们认为，声誉的不稳定性作为一种独特且常被忽视的市场信号，通过引入模糊性影响投资者在股市环境中的企业估值。至关重要的是，声誉不稳定性的影响还受到情境线索的进一步塑造，这些线索为投资者的预期提供了锚定。企业当前的声誉和行业动态决定了不稳定性可能被视为警示信号或潜在改善的指示。通过对四个主要美国行业组在21年间的面板数据进行分析，我们发现了与我们的理论框架一致的证据，并识别出声誉不稳定性在市场中受到惩罚或奖励的关键边界条件。通过将声誉重新构建为一种动态和不稳定的构造，我们的研究推动了关于声誉信号的理论发展，提供了新的见解，揭示了声誉的时间动态——而不仅仅是既定水平——如何影响企业的市场结果。

title: CEO Activism and Corporate Reputation: How Authenticity and CSR Mitigate Stakeholder Misalignment
abstract: Abstract Previous research suggests that the effect of CEO activism depends on its alignment with stakeholders’ political ideology. We examine when and why CEO activism can enhance corporate reputation across the ideological spectrum. Integrating signalling theory with a cognitive perspective on reputation formation, we argue that the reputational impact of CEO activism depends on the firm’s corporate social responsibility (CSR), which fosters perceptions of organizational authenticity. Using a national survey and an experiment, we find that CEO activism improves corporate reputation through perceived moral authenticity. This effect is stronger when firms hold B Corp certification, engage in philanthropic donations, or are perceived as more socially responsible. Although stakeholders rate firms as more reputable when their political ideology aligns with the CEO’s activism, this relationship weakens when firms engage in CSR, thereby signalling authenticity. These findings demonstrate how non‐market strategies interact to shape corporate reputation and inform corporate sociopolitical advocacy among heterogeneous audiences.
title_cn: 首席执行官活跃主义与企业声誉：真实感和企业社会责任如何缓解利益相关者之间的不一致性
abstract_cn: 摘要 先前的研究表明，CEO的激进主义效果取决于其与利益相关者政治意识形态的一致性。我们探讨了CEO激进主义在何种情况下以及为何能增强跨意识形态光谱的企业声誉。我们将信号理论与声誉形成的认知视角相结合，认为CEO激进主义的声誉影响依赖于公司的企业社会责任（CSR），这促进了对组织真实性的认知。通过利用全国性调查和实验，我们发现CEO的激进主义通过感知的道德真实性来改善企业声誉。当公司获得B级企业认证、进行慈善捐赠或被认为更具社会责任时，这一效果更为显著。尽管当利益相关者的政治意识形态与CEO的激进主义一致时对公司的声誉评价更高，但当公司参与CSR时，这种关系会减弱，从而传递出真实性的信号。这些发现展示了非市场策略如何相互作用以塑造企业声誉，并为异质受众的企业社会政治倡导提供了信息。

title: Board Gender Diversity and Firm Financial Performance: Exploring the role of Directors’ Family Affiliations
abstract: Abstract Recent studies acknowledge that the contribution of female directors at the board may not be uniform but instead varies depending on their individual characteristics and board context. In this study we focus on a pivotal yet insufficiently explored facet of female directors – their affiliation with the business owning family – and assess its implications for family firm financial performance. Drawing upon the ‘doing gender’ perspective, we contend that family‐affiliation creates a formidable barrier for female family directors, impeding their legitimacy within the board and ultimately reducing their contribution to firm financial performance. Our empirical analysis spanning 127 Italian listed family firms from 2003 to 2019 reveals that family female directors exhibit a less positive influence on firm financial performance than their non‐family counterparts. We further show that this effect is contingent on the presence of male family members on the board – being positive when their presence is low but turning negative when their presence is high. In essence, our study represents an important advancement in understanding the intricate and contingent effects of female directors within a distinct context of family firms.
title_cn: 董事会性别多样性与企业财务表现：探讨董事家庭关系的作用
abstract_cn: 摘要 最近的研究承认，女性董事在董事会中的贡献可能并不均匀，而是因其个体特征和董事会背景而异。本研究聚焦于女性董事的一个关键但尚未充分探讨的方面——她们与家族企业的关系，并评估其对家族企业财务绩效的影响。基于“性别的实践”视角，我们认为家族关系为女性家族董事设置了一个巨大的障碍，阻碍了她们在董事会中的合法性，最终降低了她们对企业财务绩效的贡献。对2003年至2019年间127家意大利上市家族企业的实证分析显示，女性家族董事对企业财务绩效的影响不如非家族董事积极。我们进一步表明这一影响取决于董事会中男性家族成员的存在——当男性家族成员的存在较低时，其影响为正，但当男性家族成员的存在较高时，其影响则为负。总的来说，我们的研究在理解女性董事在家族企业这一特定背景下复杂且有条件的影响方面，代表了一个重要的进展。

title: Navigating Grief: A Call for Loving, Nurturing, and Wholly Generative Academic Friendships
abstract:
This essay is a vulnerable sharing of personal stories, lessons learned, but most of all, a call for action for management researchers and educators to engage in the development of loving, nurturing, and wholly generative academic friendships. The experiences we share with you here are grounded in an academic friendship which has flourished during a time of immense loss and grief. The brutal reality is that one of us is dying of cancer, one of us recently lived through 11 years of cancer treatment, and one of us wears the invisible scars of watching her brother and stepbrother die of the same disease. As we write
this, two of us are living through the journey of watching a close and dear co-author, research partner, and friend battle an inoperable brain tumour; the other is devastated beyond words but is trying to live every day as fully as she can. Together, we are navigating this challenging time – one in which we have bridged our personal and professional lives. Here, we have built an academic friendship which is supporting us in complex and myriad ways to navigate one of life’s most difficult yet inescapable challenges – one that remains taboo within and outside of our organizations – death.
title_cn: 驾驭悲伤：呼吁建立充满爱、关怀与全面创造力的学术友谊
abstract_cn: 这篇文章是对个人故事和所学经验的脆弱分享，但最重要的是，它呼吁管理研究者和教育工作者积极参与建立充满爱、关怀和完全创造性的学术友谊。我们在这里与您分享的经历根植于一段在巨大的失落和悲痛中茁壮成长的学术友谊。残酷的现实是，我们中的一位正在与癌症作斗争，另一位最近经历了长达11年的癌症治疗，而另一位则承受着目睹她的兄弟和异父异母兄弟死于同一种疾病所留下的无形伤痕。在我们写下这些文字时，我们中的两位正在经历看着一位亲密而亲爱的合著者、研究伙伴和朋友与无法手术的脑肿瘤作斗争的旅程；而另一位则心碎不已，但努力尽可能充实地生活每一天。我们共同应对这一艰难时刻——一个我们将个人生活与职业生活结合在一起的时刻。在这里，我们建立了一段学术友谊，以复杂而多样的方式支持我们应对生活中最困难但又无法避免的挑战之一——在我们组织内外仍然是禁忌的话题——死亡。

title: Disentangling the Leadership Theory Jungle: A Reconciliation of Bright and Dark Side Leadership Theories
abstract: Abstract The literature on the relationship between leader behaviours and effectiveness is a jungle of complementary yet often conflicting leadership theories that perplexes researchers and practitioners alike, as indicated by various theories of bright and dark side leadership (i.e., leader behaviours reflecting widely considered positive and negative leadership qualities, respectively). We disentangle this jungle by offering a conceptual model that improves our understanding of bright and dark side leadership and their respective effectiveness, based on the concepts of leader character and context integrity. Our theory helps to reconcile the various bright and dark side leadership theories at a general level and suggests critical implications for leadership theory and practice.
title_cn: 理清领导理论的复杂性：亮面与暗面领导理论的调和
abstract_cn: 摘要 领导行为与效能之间关系的文献如同一片交织且时常矛盾的理论丛林，令研究者和实践者都感到困惑，这一点通过关于领导明亮面和阴暗面的多种理论得以体现（即，领导行为分别反映一般认为的积极和消极的领导素质）。我们通过提供一个概念模型来理清这一丛林，从而提升对领导明亮面和阴暗面的理解及其各自效能的认识，该模型基于领导者特质和情境完整性的概念。我们的理论有助于在一般层面上调和各种明亮面和阴暗面领导理论，并对领导理论和实践提出了重要的启示。

title: Are Social Media Platforms a Threat to Democracy? An Ecosystem Governance Perspective
abstract: Abstract Castello, Colleoni, Scherer, and Trittin contend that social media platforms threaten democratic processes by facilitating the spread of misinformation and fostering polarized debates – dynamics that ultimately serve to monetize user attention. We acknowledge the problem but challenge their proposed solution of conceptualizing social media as political spaces. Instead, drawing on ecosystem theory, we propose an ‘ecosystem failure’ analysis as a more robust analytical framework. Within this perspective, we see these information‐related problems as negative externalities that weaken the entire platform ecosystem. These externalities are structurally distinct due to algorithmic curation that selectively amplifies content in ways that reinforce user biases, strong network effects with almost zero replication costs, and engagement‐based monetization that decouples production from editorial standards. We therefore advance a reflexive ecosystem governance approach that accounts for broader ecosystem value, shifting the focus beyond short‐term economic performance to encompass overall ecosystem health. This approach transforms the management of negative externalities into a core strategic interest for the platform and aligns the incentives of individual actors ex ante, by design, prioritizing risk‐adjusted reach and demotion of low‐integrity content over ex post moderation. We analyse the mechanisms that align private incentives with democratic resilience and highlight the inherent trade‐offs involved.
title_cn: 社交媒体平台是否对民主构成威胁？一种生态系统治理的视角
abstract_cn: 摘要 Castello、Colleoni、Scherer和Trittin主张，社交媒体平台通过促进错误信息的传播和加剧两极化辩论，威胁到民主进程，这些动态最终旨在货币化用户注意力。我们承认这一问题，但对他们提出将社交媒体视为政治空间的解决方案提出质疑。相反，我们借鉴生态系统理论，提出一种“生态系统失败”分析作为更为强健的分析框架。在这一视角下，我们将这些与信息相关的问题视为削弱整个平台生态系统的负外部性。这些外部性在结构上是独特的，因为算法的策展有选择性地放大内容，以方式重申用户偏见，强大的网络效应伴随着几乎零的复制成本，以及基于参与度的货币化，使生产与编辑标准脱钩。因此，我们提出了一种反思性生态系统治理方法，这种方法考虑了更广泛的生态系统价值，将重点从短期经济表现转向整体生态系统健康。这一方法将负外部性的管理转变为平台的核心战略利益，并通过设计将个体行为者的激励机制在事前对齐，优先考虑风险调整后的覆盖面和降低低诚信内容的优先级，而不是事后进行审查。我们分析了将私人激励与民主韧性对齐的机制，并强调了其中固有的权衡。

title: How Are Skills Changing with Digital Technologies? Clarifying Boundary Conditions in Management Research
abstract: Abstract This article contributes to discussions about the future of work by providing a systematic review of the broad yet fragmented management literature on how skills are changing with digital technologies (DTs). Our aim was to understand the nature of scholarly engagement with this relationship to inform a future research agenda. Our systematic review identified 225 original empirical articles that explicitly examined skills and DTs. We highlight the diverse categories of context, mechanisms, and outcomes in the form of an analytical matrix, guided by an organizational conceptualization of skill that spans positivist and social constructivist approaches. Our analysis generates four theoretical framings of how skills are changing with DTs: market shift , control shift , recombination , and imbrication . These framings are derived from two analytical dimensions of skill change: transactional versus transformational and objective versus relational. We interrogate the fit between each theoretical framing and the affordances of DTs, bringing to light how skill change with DTs is entangled with shifting temporal dimensions and a rich variety of interactions and interdependencies. Our theoretical framings, analytical dimensions, and insights into the relationship between skill change and DTs provide the basis for a more coherent management research agenda.
topics: Human Resource Development and Performance Evaluation
title_cn: 数字技术如何改变技能？管理研究中的边界条件澄清
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文通过对管理文献中关于技能如何随着数字技术（DTs）变化的广泛而碎片化的研究进行系统回顾，为未来的工作讨论提供了贡献。我们的目标是理解学术界与这一关系的互动，以便为未来的研究议程提供参考。我们的系统回顾确认了225篇明确考察技能与DTs关系的原创实证文章。我们通过一个分析矩阵突出显示了在上下文、机制和结果方面的多样化类别，借助于一种横跨实证主义和社会建构主义的方法的技能组织概念。我们的分析产生了四种关于技能如何随着DTs变化的理论框架：市场转移、控制转移、重组和嵌入。这些框架源于技能变化的两个分析维度：交易性与转型性，以及客观性与关系性。我们探讨了每个理论框架与DTs的适应性，揭示了技能变化与DTs如何交织在一起，受时间维度的变化以及丰富的互动和相互依赖性的影响。我们的理论框架、分析维度以及对技能变化与DTs关系的洞察，为更加连贯的管理研究议程提供了基础。

title: Pathways to upscaling: aligning capabilities with supply chain design in automotive manufacturing
abstract: Purpose Taking innovation to scale and accelerating the development of new technologies puts pressure on manufacturers to perform frequent ramp-ups in increasingly volatile markets. Such pressures inevitably bring the role of supply chain right at the centre of the challenge to design supply chains that are ready to upscale. This research aims to explore how manufacturers can design their supply chain and deploy the required capabilities to respond to the upscaling demands. Design/methodology/approach Drawing on the dynamic capabilities (DCs) theory, this study develops a conceptual framework which is validated through multiple case studies. Data was collected and analysed from 14 upscaling projects in automotive manufacturing. Findings This study identified specific DCs (e.g. dynamic relational capabilities) that manufacturers deployed in their upscaling projects, explored their micro-foundations, showed how these are coupled with different supply chain designs (SCDs) and how those matches evolve over time. A distinctive finding is the need for automotive manufacturers involved in innovative and technological upscaling projects, to move away from the traditional binary SCD choice (i.e. modular vs integral) to a less rigid SCD which we called “evolving SCD” and proved to be particularly valuable for companies with limited resources and evolving market positions. Practical implications This research outlines actionable pathways for upscaling and offers guidance on aligning SCD with capabilities. The findings also illustrate how managers can leverage temporal configurational shifts to strategically address evolving priorities from initial market entry concerns like IP protection and capability access, to later-stage challenges around supplier reliability and volume capacity. Originality/value This study introduces the concept of the evolving SCD which is particularly suitable for start-up companies in meeting the upscaling requirements. This research enriches the understanding on how to manage upscaling projects by offering fresh empirical insights into how manufacturers can successfully upscale by streamlining the SCD with capabilities.
title_cn: 提升路径：在汽车制造中协调能力与供应链设计
abstract_cn: 目的 将创新规模化和加速新技术的发展使得制造商面临在愈加动荡的市场中进行频繁扩张的压力。这种压力不可避免地将供应链的角色置于设计可随时扩张的供应链所面临挑战的中心。本研究旨在探讨制造商如何设计其供应链并部署所需的能力以应对扩张需求。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究基于动态能力理论（DCs），构建了一个概念框架，并通过多个案例研究进行验证。数据来源于14个汽车制造领域的扩张项目，并进行了分析。 发现 本研究识别出制造商在其扩张项目中部署的特定动态能力（如动态关系能力），探讨了这些能力的微观基础，展示了它们如何与不同的供应链设计（SCD）相结合，以及这些匹配是如何随时间演变的。一项独特的发现是，参与创新和技术扩张项目的汽车制造商需要摆脱传统的二元供应链设计选择（即模块化与整体化），转向一种不那么严格的供应链设计，称为“演变型供应链设计”，并且这种设计对于资源有限且市场地位不断变化的公司尤为有价值。 实践意义 本研究为扩张提供了可操作的途径，并提供了将供应链设计与能力对接的指导。研究结果还说明了管理者如何利用时间配置变化来战略性地应对从初始市场准入关注（如知识产权保护和能力获取）到后期挑战（如供应商可靠性和产能）的演变优先事项。 创新/价值 本研究引入了演变型供应链设计的概念，这特别适合初创公司满足扩张要求。该研究通过提供新的实证见解，丰富了对如何管理扩张项目的理解，并指出制造商如何通过与能力相结合来成功进行扩张。

title: Regulatory design, institutional pressures and the coupling of human rights due diligence
abstract: Purpose This paper evaluates how the design of the Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (CSRD) influences corporate disclosures on modern slavery and human rights due diligence (HRDD) in global supply chains. It aims to examine whether this new regulatory framework addresses the limitations of earlier disclosure laws, particularly in overcoming organisational policy−practice coupling and superficial compliance. Design/methodology/approach A deductive content analysis was conducted on 21 sustainability reports from companies headquartered in Ireland, assessing disclosures under the European Sustainability Reporting Standards, specifically Social Standard 2 (S2) on value chain workers. Semi-structured interviews with 32 sustainability and supply chain managers provided complementary insights into the reporting process and practical challenges of HRDD implementation. Findings While most companies had a basic HRDD policy and conducted various risk assessments for their tier-1 suppliers, far fewer reported meaningful engagement with value chain workers or effective remediation mechanisms. The CSRD’s requirement for double materiality assessment and third-party assurances appears to strengthen procedural transparency. However, companies continue to use proxies in place of direct worker engagement, and audit-based disclosures rarely capture structural risks such as forced labour. Originality/value This paper offers early empirical evidence on supply chain HRDD disclosures under the CSRD. It elaborates on the concept of the double materiality assessment and highlights how regulatory designs can tighten HRDD policy−practice coupling. The findings advance debates on the effectiveness of reporting frameworks in tackling modern slavery within sustainable supply chain management.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 监管设计、制度压力与人权尽职调查的耦合
abstract_cn: 目的 本文评估了企业可持续报告指令（CSRD）的设计如何影响企业在全球供应链中关于现代奴役和人权尽职调查（HRDD）的信息披露。旨在考察这一新的监管框架是否解决了早期披露法律的局限性，尤其是在克服组织政策与实践脱节及表面合规方面的问题。 设计/方法论 本研究对21份总部位于爱尔兰的公司的可持续发展报告进行了演绎性内容分析，评估了根据欧洲可持续发展报告标准，特别是关于价值链员工的社会标准2（S2）进行的信息披露。通过对32位可持续发展和供应链管理人员进行半结构化访谈，提供了关于报告过程和HRDD实施面临的实际挑战的补充见解。 发现 尽管大多数公司拥有基本的HRDD政策，并对其一级供应商进行了各种风险评估，但很少有公司报告与价值链工人进行有意义的接触或有效的补救机制。CSRD对双重重大性评估和第三方证明的要求似乎增强了程序透明度。然而，公司仍然倾向于使用代理而非直接与工人接触，基于审计的信息披露很少能捕捉到如强迫劳动等结构性风险。 独创性/价值 本文提供了关于CSRD下供应链HRDD信息披露的早期实证证据。阐述了双重重大性评估的概念，并强调了监管设计如何能够加强HRDD政策与实践的结合。研究结果推进了关于报告框架在应对可持续供应链管理中现代奴役有效性的辩论。

title: Corporate human rights governance across borders: insights from a German MNC operating in China
abstract: Purpose This paper aims to examine how multinational corporations (MNCs) organise labour governance and manage labour-rights risks in global supply chains when operating in politically constrained host-country labour regimes. Focusing on China, it analyses how a German automotive MNC navigates tensions between politically bounded workplace representation and extra-territorial due diligence expectations linked to European markets. Design/methodology/approach A qualitative, in-depth case study methodology was used. Evidence is drawn from 21 semi-structured interviews, conducted between June 2024 and March 2025, complemented by corporate documents, media reporting and NGO materials. Data were analysed inductively using a Gioia-informed coding process to develop an empirically grounded analytical framework. Findings The case study reveals a dual configuration of labour governance. Firstly, the firm practices minimalist adaptation in day-to-day employment relations by operating within China’s enterprise union and contract-centred regime, where collective bargaining is legally present but organisationally non-central. Secondly, it deploys progressive compliance measures – risk assessment, audits, grievance channels and supplier standards – consistent with home-country institutional expectations and mandatory due diligence regimes. These approaches are coordinated through cross-border organisational mechanisms, including transnational engagement involving the German works council, which functions as an internal accountability channel that can trigger investigation and escalation when credible risk signals arise. The analysis also shows persistent limits: due diligence tools can expand monitoring and responsiveness, yet they cannot readily substitute for autonomous worker representation and remedy under political constraint. Originality/value This paper develops an empirically grounded analytical configuration linking host-country political constraints, home-country labour institutions and mandatory due diligence expectations. It clarifies how due diligence-oriented corporate governance is operationalised in practice in China and specifies the organisational conditions under which such governance expands responsiveness while remaining structurally constrained.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 跨国界的企业人权治理：来自一家在中国运营的德国跨国公司的见解
abstract_cn: 目的 本文旨在探讨跨国公司（MNCs）在政治约束的东道国劳动制度下如何组织劳动治理和管理全球供应链中的劳动权利风险。以中国为例，分析一家德国汽车跨国公司如何在政治限制的工作场所代表性与与欧洲市场相关的超国界尽职调查期望之间调和矛盾。 设计/方法论 采用定性深入案例研究方法。根据2024年6月至2025年3月期间进行的21次半结构化访谈，并辅以企业文件、媒体报道和非政府组织资料，收集证据。数据通过Gioia-informed编码过程进行归纳分析，以建立一个实证基础的分析框架。 研究结果 案例研究揭示了劳动治理的双重配置。首先，该公司在日常雇佣关系中采取了极简的适应措施，运作于中国的企业工会和以合同为中心的制度之内，在这一制度中，集体谈判在法律上存在但在组织上并不居于中心地位。其次，它实施与本国制度期望和强制性尽职调查制度相一致的进步合规措施——风险评估、审计、申诉渠道和供应商标准。这些做法通过跨国组织机制进行协调，包括与德国职工理事会的跨国互动，该理事会作为内部问责渠道，在出现可信风险信号时可以触发调查和升级。分析还显示了持续的限制：尽职调查工具可以扩展监测和响应能力，但在政治约束下，它们并不能轻易替代自主工人代表性和救济。 原创性/价值 本文发展了一个实证基础的分析配置，链接东道国的政治约束、本国劳动机构和强制性尽职调查期望。它澄清了在中国如何将以尽职调查为导向的公司治理付诸实践，并具体说明了这种治理在保持结构性约束的同时扩展响应能力的组织条件。

title: Investigating the determinants of intention to use IoT for preventing food waste by UK food supply chain companies
abstract: Purpose Food companies are still unsure about using Internet of Things (IoT) based sensors and remain reluctant to adopt them for the purpose of food waste prevention. To address this problem, this study aims to examine the determinants of the intention to use IoT-based sensors for preventing food waste by the food supply chain companies in the UK. Design/methodology/approach This research develops a comprehensive Motivation–Opportunity–Ability–Trust (MOAT) model that extends and contextualises the original MOA model in the context of using IoT sensors in food supply chain companies for preventing food waste. The MOAT model is tested using data collected from a questionnaire survey with 315 senior managers in the UK food sector. Findings The findings show that opportunity and trust positively influence the managers’ behavioural intention to use IoT for food waste prevention and are therefore key determinants of IoT adoption for food waste prevention. Data analysis highlighted the role of trust as the underlying principle in food supply chains when adopting IoT sensors in all operational-level activities. Originality/value This study contextualises and extends the original MOA model into the MOAT framework to reflect the characteristics and applications of IoT in food waste prevention in food supply chains. The MOAT model provides a foundation for further research and practical strategies. This study makes valuable contributions to the theoretical development and practical understanding of the influence of ability, opportunity, motivation and trust on IoT sensor adoption for preventing food waste among food companies.
title_cn: 探讨英国食品供应链公司使用物联网技术预防食品浪费的意愿决定因素
abstract_cn: 目的 食品公司对采用基于物联网（IoT）的传感器仍存不确定性，并对其在食品废弃物预防中的应用持谨慎态度。为了解决这个问题，本研究旨在探讨英国食品供应链公司使用基于物联网的传感器预防食品废弃物的意图的决定因素。 设计/方法论 本研究构建了一个综合性的动机–机会–能力–信任（MOAT）模型，该模型在食品供应链中使用物联网传感器以预防食品浪费的背景下扩展和情境化了原有的MOA模型。MOAT模型是基于从315名英国食品行业高管收集的问卷调查数据进行验证的。 研究结果 研究结果表明，机会和信任对管理者使用物联网进行食品废弃物预防的行为意图产生积极影响，因此，它们是推动物联网在食品废弃物预防中应用的关键决定因素。数据分析强调了信任在食品供应链中采用物联网传感器时作为底层原则的作用。 独创性/价值 本研究将原有的MOA模型情境化并扩展为MOAT框架，以反映物联网在食品供应链中预防食品废弃物的特点和应用。MOAT模型为进一步研究和实际策略提供了基础。本研究为理论发展和对能力、机会、动机与信任对食品公司采用物联网传感器以预防食品废弃物的影响的实际理解做出了重要贡献。

title: Hierarchical sequencing of resilience capabilities: a complex adaptive systems (CAS) analysis of Nigeria’s downstream oil and gas supply chain
abstract: Purpose The supply chain resilience (SCR) literature has largely conceptualised governance, technology and collaboration as parallel, independently deployable capabilities. This study aims to re-examines that assumption by investigating how resilience capabilities are hierarchically sequenced in supply chains (SCs). Focusing on the downstream oil and gas SC in Nigeria, the study enriches debates on the design and coordination of SCR capabilities. Design/methodology/approach Drawing on complex adaptive systems (CAS) theory, this study adopts a qualitative research design. Semi-structured interviews were conducted with key SC actors, including refinery operators, distributors and regulators, and were analysed thematically to examine how governance, technology and collaboration interact under conditions of institutional voids. Findings The findings reveal that SCR capabilities do not operate in parallel. Instead, resilience emerges through a hierarchical sequence in which macro-level governance stability enables meso-level technology adoption, which, in turn, facilitates micro-level collaboration. Resilience is therefore produced through bricolage that combines formal institutional arrangements with grassroots improvisation. Practical implications For SC managers and policymakers operating in volatile environments, the findings promote prioritising governance stability before advanced digital investments and recognising informal coordination mechanisms as foundational components of resilience. Originality/value This study conceptualises governance, technology and collaboration as an emergent, sequentially interdependent system of capabilities shaped by institutional constraints. By integrating CAS theory into SCR research, this approach extends the dominant parallel-capability perspective and offers new insights into how resilience develops in fragile and regulated SCs.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 韧性能力的层级排序：尼日利亚下游石油和天然气供应链的复杂适应系统（CAS）分析
abstract_cn: 目的 供应链韧性（SCR）文献在很大程度上将治理、技术和合作视为平行的、独立可部署的能力。本研究旨在重新审视这一假设，通过调查韧性能力在供应链（SC）中的层级序列。研究聚焦于尼日利亚下游石油和天然气供应链，丰富了关于SCR能力设计和协调的讨论。 设计/方法论/方法 本研究基于复杂适应系统（CAS）理论，采用定性研究设计。通过对包括炼油厂运营商、分销商和监管者在内的关键供应链参与者进行半结构化访谈，并对其进行主题分析，以考察在制度空缺条件下治理、技术和合作的互动。 发现 研究结果表明，SCR能力并不是并行运作的。相反，韧性通过层级序列产生，其中宏观层面的治理稳定性促进中观层面的技术采纳，而后者又促进微观层面的合作。因此，韧性是通过结合正式制度安排和草根即兴创作的拼凑而产生的。 实际意义 对于在动荡环境中运营的供应链管理者和政策制定者而言，研究结果鼓励在进行先进数字投资之前优先保证治理的稳定，并将非正式协调机制视为韧性的基础组成部分。 原创性/价值 本研究将治理、技术和合作概念化为一个新兴的、按顺序相互依赖的能力系统，该系统受到制度约束的影响。通过将CAS理论融入SCR研究，这一方法扩展了主流的平行能力视角，提供了关于脆弱和受监管的供应链中韧性如何发展的新见解。

title: Motivations and institutional perspectives on Authorised Economic Operator certification
abstract: Purpose Companies certified under the Authorised Economic Operator Program (AEO) typically receive priority in customs control and access to additional trade facilitation when crossing borders. However, the cost-effectiveness of obtaining certification, such as AEO, remains unclear. Many companies do not participate because the benefits are neither clearly measured nor well defined. This research aims to examine the primary motivations driving companies to join the programme and evaluates operators’ perceptions of its effects. The research instrument was developed based on literature concerning ISO standards. Design/methodology/approach The methodology combined quantitative and qualitative methods, structured in four stages: (i) a survey of certified companies to identify internal and external motivations; (ii) interviews with experts during the AEO World Customs Organisation Conference; (iii) a seminar with representatives from the private sector, consultants and the Brazilian Customs administration; and (iv) a focus group involving the customs authority, consultants and representatives of certified companies. Findings The results indicate that motivations are linked to recognition as a secure operator, image enhancement, risk reduction and strengthening the culture of compliance. However, the perceptions reveal that not all expectations are met, especially regarding competitiveness, cost reduction and market share. Practical implications For companies, this study enhances understanding of the factors influencing AEO membership and may assist in evaluating the attractiveness of potential new members. For governments, the findings offer a strong justification for strengthening the programme. This research may affect society by providing a rationale for participation in the AEO programme. Originality/value The analysis, grounded in organisational isomorphism, shows that coercive, mimetic and normative institutional pressures shape motivations and perceptions. However, this study offers a new perspective on the interconnected concepts of the iron cage and institutional theory by providing a positive reinterpretation of the theoretical framework. AEO certification promotes organisational similarity, enhances supply chain predictability and demonstrates improvements in process efficiency.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 对授权经济运营者认证的动机与制度视角
abstract_cn:
目的 在获得授权经济运营商计划（AEO）认证的公司通常在海关控制和跨境贸易便利化方面享有优先权。然而，获得AEO认证的成本效益尚不明确。许多公司不参与该计划，因为其好处既未明确测量也未良好定义。本研究旨在探讨推动公司加入该计划的主要动机，并评估运营商对其效果的看法。研究工具的开发基于有关ISO标准的文献。

设计/方法论/方法 该方法论结合了定量和定性方法，分为四个阶段：(i) 对认证公司进行调查，以识别内部和外部动机；(ii) 在世界海关组织AEO会议期间与专家进行访谈；(iii) 与私营部门、咨询公司及巴西海关管理部门代表举行研讨会；(iv) 组织一个焦点小组，涉及海关当局、咨询公司和认证公司代表。

研究结果 结果表明，动机与被认可为安全运营商、形象提升、风险降低和加强合规文化有关。然而，感知结果显示，并非所有期望都得以实现，尤其是在竞争力、成本降低和市场份额方面。

实践意义 对于公司而言，本研究加深了对影响AEO会员资格因素的理解，并可能帮助评估潜在新会员的吸引力。对于政府而言，研究结果为加强该计划提供了有力的理由。本研究可能通过提供参与AEO计划的理由影响社会。

原创性/价值 基于组织同构理论的分析表明，强制性、模仿性和规范性机构压力塑造了动机和感知。然而，本研究通过对理论框架的积极再解释，提供了对铁笼和制度理论相互关联概念的新视角。AEO认证促进了组织相似性，增强了供应链的可预测性，并展示了流程效率的改善。

title: Exploring the potential for zero-knowledge proofs in supply chain management
abstract: Purpose Sharing information is crucial for the success of supply chains. However, sharing information requires a careful balance between privacy and transparency. This study aims to explore the potential of zero-knowledge proofs (ZKPs) to improve this balance by enabling partial information sharing. Design/methodology/approach The authors apply a three-stage methodology to inductively generate a set of use cases for ZKPs in SCM. The authors expand and validate this set of use cases through a series of interviews and analyze the technology based on the use cases and further insights generated in the interviews. Findings The authors find that ZKPs can provide trust and privacy, increase speed and reduce costs across supply chain functions and relationships. The authors identify the two mechanisms responsible for these benefits and theorize on the relationship between the novel type of trust provided by ZKPs and interpersonal trust. Research limitations/implications This explorative study shows that ZKPs have the potential to make a substantial impact on SCM. They increase the attractiveness of information sharing and enable transactional relationships where more strategic relationships were previously required. However, their implementation and reliance on accurate input data require further investigation. Originality/value The authors expand existing literature on partial information sharing by investigating the partial sharing of one individual item of information. In doing so, the authors explore a novel technology with unique characteristics relevant to SCM. To the authors’ knowledge, they conduct the first study regarding ZKPs in SCM.
title_cn: 探讨零知识证明在供应链管理中的潜力
abstract_cn: 目的 共享信息对于供应链的成功至关重要。然而，信息共享需要在隐私和透明度之间找到微妙的平衡。本研究旨在探讨零知识证明（ZKP）在改善此平衡方面的潜力，以实现部分信息共享。 设计/方法论/流程 作者应用三阶段的方法论，归纳生成一组ZKP在供应链管理（SCM）中的用例。通过一系列访谈扩展和验证这组用例，并基于这些用例及访谈中产生的进一步见解分析该技术。 研究结果 作者发现，ZKP能够提供信任和隐私，提高速度并降低供应链各功能和关系的成本。作者识别出两种机制，负责这些好处，并对ZKP所提供的新型信任与人际信任之间的关系进行理论探讨。 研究局限性/影响 本研究探索表明，ZKP有潜力对SCM产生重大影响。它们增加了信息共享的吸引力，并使得在以往需要更为战略性关系的情况下，也能实现交易关系。然而，其实现和对准确输入数据的依赖需要进一步调查。 原创性/价值 作者通过研究单一信息项的部分共享，扩展了关于部分信息共享的现有文献。在此过程中，作者探讨了一种具有独特特征的新技术，这些特征与SCM相关。据作者所知，这是关于SCM中ZKP的首个研究。

title: Blockchain as information processing: experiences in recycling chains
abstract: Purpose Blockchain is often claimed to have significant potential for tackling recycling chains’ challenges, particularly in facilitating information processing. However, such claims are often based on hypothetical, conceptual arguments. This study aims to explore how focal companies use blockchain to address information processing needs in the recycling chain. Design/methodology/approach This paper contains in-depth case studies exploring three pioneer blockchain applications in multi-tier recycling chains. Findings The authors found that blockchain offers four distinct information processing capabilities: transparency, immutability, integration and trust. These capabilities are instrumental in addressing the specific information processing needs at the levels of firm, supply chain and industry. However, the findings also suggest that blockchain-enabled mechanisms do not, by themselves, resolve all information processing needs in recycling chains. Instead, the application should account for functional, contextual and systemic fit. Originality/value By critically exploring pioneer blockchain applications, the authors move beyond prevailing views of blockchain as an information processing tool by situating its role within the multi-level information processing needs of recycling chains. Rather than conceiving blockchain applications as mechanically matched to these needs, the authors propose a more nuanced conceptualization of fitting mechanisms, showing that information processing fit unfolds through functional, contextual and systemic pathways operating across multiple levels.
title_cn: 区块链作为信息处理：回收链中的经验
abstract_cn: 目的 区块链常被认为在解决回收链面临的挑战方面具有显著潜力，特别是在促进信息处理方面。然而，这种说法通常基于假设性的概念论证。本研究旨在探讨重点公司如何利用区块链来满足回收链中的信息处理需求。 设计/方法论/途径 本文通过深入的案例研究，探讨了在多层级回收链中三种先驱性区块链应用。 研究结果 作者发现，区块链提供了四种独特的信息处理能力：透明性、不可篡改性、整合性和信任。这些能力在满足公司、供应链和行业层面的特定信息处理需求方面发挥了重要作用。然而，研究结果也表明，区块链使能的机制并不能单独解决回收链中的所有信息处理需求。相反，应用应考虑功能、情境和系统的适配性。 原创性/价值 通过批判性地探讨先驱性区块链应用，作者超越了将区块链视为信息处理工具的主流观点，将其角色置于回收链多层级信息处理需求的语境中。作者提出一种更加细致的适配机制概念，展示信息处理的适配性是通过在多个层面运作的功能性、情境性和系统性途径展开的。

title: Influence of IoT implementation on supply chain performance: role of information integration and decision-making uncertainty
abstract: Purpose Implementing Internet of Things (IoT) is fundamental to the digitalisation of modern supply chains. This paper aims to provide a theory-based explanation for the impact of IoT implementation on information integration, decision-making uncertainty and hence supply chain performance. Design/methodology/approach This study adopts a qualitative multiple-case study approach to investigating three fast-fashion supply chains in China through 30 semi-structured interviews. Findings The findings demonstrate that IoT is implemented in the information collection, selection and sharing processes of information integration. Implementing firm-level information collection and selection processes impacts information quality and is linked to environmental uncertainty. Whereas implementation in the supply chain level information sharing process impacts information accuracy and efficiency and is linked to industry uncertainty. Research limitations/implications This research advances the theoretical understanding of IoT’s role in supply chain management through a two perspective Information Processing Theory-based framework, capturing the mechanisms which underpin the interactions between IoT-enabled information integration and decision-making uncertainty and resultant impact on performance. Practical implications This research provides a road map for supply chain managers demonstrating how IoT implementation in information integration processes within the firm can improve operational performance. However, when this implementation progresses to supply chain level information-sharing processes, management costs improvements are ultimately realised. Originality/value This study contributes an empirical, evidence-based explanation of the impact of IoT implementation on supply chain performance. Case study evidence from firms in the early and middle stages of IoT implementation reveal that the mechanisms governing the interactions between information integration, decision-making uncertainty and their impact on performance are fundamentally different for firm and supply chain IoT implementation processes. It is only in implementing the information sharing process at the supply chain level that cost benefits are achieved.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 物联网实施对供应链绩效的影响：信息集成与决策不确定性的作用
abstract_cn: 目的 实施物联网（IoT）对现代供应链的数字化至关重要。本文旨在提供基于理论的解释，以说明IoT实施对信息集成、决策不确定性及因此对供应链绩效的影响。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究采用定性多案例研究的方法，通过30份半结构式访谈，调查了中国三条快时尚供应链。 研究发现 实证结果表明，IoT在信息集成的信息收集、选择和共享过程中的实施起着重要作用。实施企业层面的信息收集和选择过程会影响信息质量，并与环境不确定性相关联。而在供应链层面信息共享过程中的实施则影响信息的准确性和效率，并与行业不确定性相关联。 研究局限性/启示 本研究通过基于信息处理理论的双重视角框架，推动了对IoT在供应链管理中作用的理论理解，揭示了IoT驱动的信息集成与决策不确定性之间相互作用的机制及其对绩效的影响。 实践意义 本研究为供应链经理提供了一条实施路线图，展示了在企业内部信息集成过程中实现IoT可以提升运营绩效。然而，当这一实施进展到供应链层面的信息共享过程时，最终会实现管理成本的改善。 原创性/价值 本研究提供了有关IoT实施对供应链绩效影响的实证、基于证据的解释。来自于在IoT实施早期和中期的公司的案例研究证据表明，支配信息集成、决策不确定性及其对绩效影响之间相互作用的机制，在企业和供应链的IoT实施过程中是根本不同的。只有在实施供应链层面的信息共享过程时，成本收益才能得以实现。

title: How do supply chain finance platforms adopt blockchain to achieve better service performance? An information processing perspective
abstract: Purpose This study aims to investigate how supply chain finance (SCF) platforms adopt blockchain technology (BCT) to improve service performance. The benefits of using BCT to enhance SCF efficiency are understood, but the mechanisms through which BCT drives service performance remain underexplored. This study seeks to clarify the role of BCT in aligning platforms’ information processing capacities with their task-related requirements. Design/methodology/approach Building on information processing theory, this study used a multi-case approach that included 54 semi-structured interviews across four SCF platforms. This study redefines SCF uncertainties – task characteristics, environment and interdependence – that shape information processing requirements and identifies technological and organizational barriers that exacerbate these uncertainties. Findings The findings reveal that BCT enables a “fit” between platforms’ information processing capacity and information processing requirements, thereby improving the service performance of the platform. Upstream SCF platforms adopt BCT directly. Downstream platforms tend to integrate BCT with the Internet of Things (IoT) to handle more complex data flows. This study proposes an acceptance-based evaluation framework that assesses SCF service performance from the perspectives of multiple actors, such as banks, small- and medium-sized enterprises and focal firms. Originality/value This study makes three novel contributions. First, it is the first to reveal that differences in information characteristics across SCF businesses and give rise to distinct BCT adoption pathways that enable platforms to achieve a “fit” between information processing requirements and capacities: direct BCT adoption for upstream receivables-based financing and IoT-integrated BCT for downstream collateral-based financing. Second, it proposes an acceptance-based measurement of SCF service performance and demonstrates that achieving a “fit” between information processing requirements and capacities leads to service performance improvement. Third, it contextualizes and extends information processing theory to a blockchain-enabled SCF setting by specifying SCF-specific uncertainties and showing how blockchain enables information processing capacity to achieve fit to the information processing requirements across stakeholders.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 供应链金融平台如何采用区块链技术以提高服务绩效？一种信息处理视角
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究旨在探讨供应链金融（SCF）平台如何采用区块链技术（BCT）来提升服务绩效。虽然使用BCT来增强SCF效率的好处已被理解，但BCT如何驱动服务绩效的机制仍未得到充分探索。本研究旨在阐明BCT在对齐平台的信息处理能力与其任务相关要求中的作用。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究基于信息处理理论，采用多案例研究方法，对四个SCF平台进行了54次半结构化访谈。研究重新定义了影响信息处理需求的SCF不确定性——任务特征、环境和相互依赖性，并识别了加剧这些不确定性的技术和组织障碍。 研究结果 研究结果表明，BCT使平台的信息处理能力与信息处理需求之间实现了“匹配”，从而提高了平台的服务绩效。上游SCF平台直接采用BCT，而下游平台则倾向于将BCT与物联网（IoT）结合，以处理更复杂的数据流。本研究提出了一种基于接受度的评估框架，从银行、中小企业和核心企业等多个参与者的角度评估SCF服务绩效。 原创性/价值 本研究做出了三项新颖的贡献。首先，首次揭示了SCF业务中信息特征的差异导致了不同的BCT采用路径，使平台能够实现信息处理需求与能力之间的“匹配”：上游应收账款融资直接采用BCT，而下游抵押融资则采用集成IoT的BCT。其次，提出了一种基于接受度的SCF服务绩效测量方法，并证明实现信息处理需求与能力之间的“匹配”会导致服务绩效的提升。第三，本研究将信息处理理论在区块链支持的SCF环境中进行了情境化和扩展，明确了SCF特有的不确定性，并展示了区块链如何使信息处理能力与各利益相关者的信息处理需求实现匹配。

title: Passive information blockade and proactive information sharing: impact of asymmetric digitalization on supply chain financing risks and role of governance
abstract: Purpose Asymmetric level of supply chain digitalization (SCD) is particularly prevalent between core companies and enterprises using supply chain finance (SCF enterprises), while the interactions between them are the operational foundation and process carrier of SCF. Based on resource dependence theory (RDT), this study aims to explore the impact of SCD asymmetry on supply chain financing risks (SCFR), and the mechanism of hindering information sharing which put SCF enterprises into passive information blockade. Also, we investigate the effectiveness of governance, which act as proactive information sharing behaviors in weakening the impact of SCD asymmetry. Design/methodology/approach The authors collect dyadic survey data from 412 matched SCF enterprises and core companies in China and analyzed them using multiple regression models. Findings SCD asymmetry exacerbates SCFR by hindering information sharing. Relational governance weakens the negative impact of SCD asymmetry on information sharing, and moderates the mediation effect of SCD asymmetry on SCFR. Contractual governance only works when risk management culture is strong. Originality/value This study takes the perspective of inter-organizational relationship to break through the individual perspective and focuses on the reconstructive effect of digital resource on SCF dependence relationships. By deconstructing RDT, the authors provide unique insights for the mechanism of RDT and the governance logic in SCF context to understand how SCF enterprises use resource, rely on resource and adjust dependency to facilitate information sharing and reduce SCFR.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 被动信息封锁与主动信息共享：不对称数字化对供应链融资风险的影响及治理角色
abstract_cn:
目的 供应链数字化（SCD）水平的不对称性在核心企业与使用供应链金融的企业（SCF企业）之间尤其普遍，而它们之间的互动正是供应链金融的运营基础和过程载体。本研究基于资源依赖理论（RDT），旨在探讨SCD不对称性对供应链融资风险（SCFR）的影响，以及阻碍信息共享机制所造成的SCF企业信息封锁的被动局面。同时，我们还研究了治理的有效性，作为主动信息共享行为，能够弱化SCD不对称性的影响。

设计/方法 研究者收集了来自中国412对匹配的SCF企业与核心公司的双边调查数据，并使用多元回归模型进行分析。

发现 SCD不对称性通过阻碍信息共享加剧了SCFR。关系治理削弱了SCD不对称性对信息共享的负面影响，并调节了SCD不对称性对SCFR的中介效应。合同治理仅在强大的风险管理文化下才有作用。

原创性/价值 本研究从组织间关系的视角出发，突破了个体视角，重点关注数字资源对SCF依赖关系的重构效应。通过对RDT的解构，研究者为理解SCF企业如何利用资源、依赖资源以及调整依赖关系以促进信息共享和降低SCFR提供了独特的见解。

title: The vertical governance of modern slavery risks in supply chains: a social exchange theory perspective
abstract: Purpose The purpose of this study is to explore the form vertical supply chain governance has taken in response to the Modern Slavery Act 2015. Specifically, this study asks whether relational governance has developed to counteract the shortcomings of using contractual governance to address modern slavery risks. Design/methodology/approach A qualitative methodology is used via a case study of the UK construction industry. In all, 50 interviews were conducted, primarily with actors working at different levels of the supply chain, from principal contractors to small subcontractors, among others. The Social Exchange Theory is used to identify the dimensions of social exchange present in vertical governance. Findings This study finds two dimensions of social exchange that act as inhibitors of relational governance – mutual mistrust and conflictual relations – and one as a promoter – collaborative commitment. These mixed results represent tentative forms of collaboration, which are undermined by the largely antagonistic nature of supply chain relations. Originality/value In terms of responses to modern slavery legislation, this study reveals tensions and conflict between firms, rather than within them, by including firms from different points in supply chains rather than only those at the top. In doing so, the findings of this study problematise the focus on, and value of, horizontal collaboration where this does not translate into effective vertical governance. Finally, to the best of the author’s knowledge, this is the first application of Social Exchange Theory to understand how modern slavery risks are being managed in supply chains.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 现代奴役风险在供应链中的垂直治理：社会交换理论视角
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究旨在探索在2015年现代奴隶制法案背景下，垂直供应链治理所采取的形式。具体而言，本研究旨在探讨关系治理是否已经发展起来，以应对利用合同治理解决现代奴隶风险的不足之处。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究采用定性方法，通过对英国建筑行业的案例研究进行。共进行了50次访谈，主要与来自供应链不同层次的参与者进行交流，包括主要承包商和小型分包商等。研究使用社会交换理论来识别垂直治理中存在的社会交换维度。 发现 本研究发现两种制约关系治理的社会交换维度——相互不信任和冲突关系，以及一种促进因素——合作承诺。这些混合结果代表了初步的合作形式，但受到供应链关系本质上对抗性特征的削弱。 创新/价值 针对现代奴隶制立法的响应，本研究揭示了不同行业间的公司之间的紧张关系和冲突，而非公司内部的矛盾，重点研究了来自供应链不同环节的公司，而不仅限于顶层公司。本研究的发现使得人们对水平合作的关注及其价值产生了问题，尤其是在这些合作未能转化为有效的垂直治理时。最后，据作者所知，这是社会交换理论首次应用于理解现代奴隶风险在供应链中的管理方式。

title: What are waste-to-resource supply chains: exploring their unique dynamics and implications for circular economy
abstract: Purpose Circularity requires that materials never become waste and remain in productive activities. This necessitates the creation of new supply chains (SCs), where discarded waste items are transformed into secondary resources. The author refers to these as waste-to-resource SCs. This study aims to explore how material, finance and information flow in these waste-to-resource SCs. Design/methodology/approach Presenting evidence from a unique single case, an organisation established to receive waste consumer items for repair or refurbishment and resale to new consumers. Findings The study findings indicate the upstream supply of material, finance and information flow to be unique to waste-to-resource SCs. Here, the author identifies supply push with a lack of control over incoming waste material and seasonal fluctuations. This was complemented by a disrupted information flow and consequently a need to recreate information by the focal organisation through detailed inspection of the waste items. The author compares these findings to flows in forward and reverse SCs and identify the uniqueness of waste-to-resource SCs. Originality/value This research contributes to the discussion on implementing circularity by identifying the unique characteristics of waste-to-resource SCs, which form a missing link for transforming waste into valuable resources and keep it from leaving the cycles of productive activities. The author also details types of waste-to-resource SCs based on the type of involved actors and the value of material streams.
title_cn: 废物转资源供应链是什么：探索其独特动态及其对循环经济的影响
abstract_cn: 目的 圆形经济要求材料决不能成为废物，必须保持在生产活动中。这需要创造新的供应链（SCs），在这些供应链中，被丢弃的废弃物品会被转化为二次资源。作者将其称为废物转资源供应链。 本研究旨在探索这些废物转资源供应链中的材料、资金和信息流动情况。 设计/方法论 通过一个独特单一案例提供证据，该组织成立的目的是接收废弃的消费品进行修理、翻新并转售给新消费者。 发现 研究发现，上游的材料、资金和信息流动在废物转资源供应链中是独特的。在这里，作者发现供应推动力与对进入废弃材料的缺乏控制以及季节性波动相结合。这种情况伴随着信息流的中断，因此需要通过对废物品的详细检查，重新创建信息。作者将这些发现与前向和逆向供应链中的流动进行比较，并确定废物转资源供应链的独特性。 创新/价值 本研究通过识别废物转资源供应链的独特特征，促进了关于实施循环经济的讨论，这些特征构成了将废物转化为有价值资源并防止其脱离生产活动循环的缺失环节。作者还根据参与者类型和材料流的价值详细描述了废物转资源供应链的类型。

title: Operational efficiency as a contingent, not universal mechanism: evidence from Pakistani SME supply chains
abstract: Purpose This study aims to critically investigate the presumed universal mediating role of operational efficiency between core supply chain capabilities integration, agility, adaptability and overall performance. It questions the established paradigm that positions operational efficiency as an indispensable conduit to competitive advantage, particularly within the volatile context of small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in an emerging economy Pakistan. Design/methodology/approach To empirically test this theoretical contention, a quantitative, positivist approach using a cross-sectional survey of 400 Pakistani SMEs was employed. This design was chosen to objectively measure the complex relationships between latent constructs within a population facing significant volatility and resource constraints, a context that provides a critical test for universal mechanism. Established scales were rigorously adapted and pretested for contextual relevance. Data were analyzed using partial least squares structural equation modeling in R. This method was specifically selected for its ability to model complex mediation pathways without strict distributional assumptions, making it ideal for an exploratory test of the hypothesized contingencies in this emerging economy setting. Findings The results reveal a critical contingency; operational efficiency does not universally mediate the capability performance relationship. While it transmits the effects of supplier and internal integration to performance, it fails to be a significant mediator for supply chain adaptability and agility. Furthermore, customer integration, while improving operational efficiency, does not directly enhance overall performance. This demonstrates that the efficacy of operational efficiency is not automatic but is instead bounded by the type of capability deployed and the firm’s specific contextual constraints. Originality/value This research provides a significant practical recalibration by challenging the universal application of operational efficiency as a core mediator in supply chain models. To the best of the authors’ knowledge, it is the first study to empirically demonstrate that this mechanism can fail in specific, high importance contexts. The findings offer a crucial contingency perspective, emphasizing that the path to supply chain performance in emerging economies is more nuanced than prevailing theories suggest, requiring a move beyond one size fits all, efficiency centric strategies.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 作为一种应变机制，而非普遍机制的运营效率：来自巴基斯坦中小企业供应链的证据
abstract_cn:
目的 本研究旨在深入探讨操作效率在核心供应链能力整合、敏捷性、适应性与整体绩效之间的普遍中介作用的假设。它质疑将操作效率设定为竞争优势不可或缺的通道的既定范式，特别是在波动较大的新兴经济体巴基斯坦的小型和中型企业（SMEs）背景下。 

设计/方法论/方法 为了实证测试这一理论论断，采用了定量的实证主义方法，通过对400家巴基斯坦中小企业进行横断面调查。这一设计旨在客观测量面对显著波动和资源约束的人群中潜在构念之间的复杂关系，这一背景为普遍机制提供了关键测试。现有量表经过严格的调整和预测试，以确保其在特定语境中的相关性。数据使用R中的偏最小二乘结构方程建模进行分析。该方法的选择是因为它能够建模复杂的中介路径，并且不依赖严格的分布假设，因此非常适合在新兴经济环境下对假设的偶然性进行探索性测试。

发现 结果揭示了一个关键的偶然性；操作效率并不普遍地中介能力与绩效之间的关系。尽管它能够传递供应商和内部整合对绩效的影响，但对于供应链适应性和敏捷性而言，它并未成为一个显著的中介。此外，虽然客户整合有助于提高操作效率，但并不直接提升整体绩效。这表明操作效率的有效性并非自动的，而是受到所部署能力类型和企业特定背景约束的限制。

原创性/价值 本研究通过质疑操作效率作为供应链模型核心中介的普遍适用性，提供了重要的实践性再校准。据作者所知，这是第一项实证展示在特定、高重要性情境下这一机制可能失效的研究。研究结果提供了一个关键的偶然性视角，强调在新兴经济体中，供应链绩效之路比现有理论所暗示的更为细致，要求超越单一模式的效率中心化策略。

title: Congruence of digital technology adoption level and supply chain resilience: a resource orchestration and re-institutionalization perspective
abstract: Purpose Based on socio-technical systems theory, this research aims to explore how (in)congruence between technological intelligence level (TIL) and supply chain cooperation level (SCCL) influences supply chain resilience (SCR). The study further analyzes the mediating role of resource orchestration (REO) and the moderating effect of re-institutionalization (REI). Design/methodology/approach The polynomial regression combined with a response surface analysis was conducted to analyze the survey data from 318 Chinese firms. Additionally, a block variable approach was used to examine the mediating mechanism of REO. Findings The empirical analysis shows that the congruence between TIL and SCCL enhances SCR. Moreover, high−high congruence of TIL and SCCL leads to a greater enhancement of SCR than low−low congruence. In cases of incongruence, high SCCL/low TIL matching patterns result in greater SCR, whereas high TIL/low SCCL patterns do not. Originality/value By overcoming the limitations of traditional single-technology or collaborative perspectives, this study offers a more nuanced understanding of digital technology adoption levels. It also systematically examines the joint effects of TIL/SCCL congruence (or incongruence) from a socio-technical systems perspective for the first time. This study contributes to the body of knowledge on SCR driven by digital technology and provides valuable insights for managers on how to leverage supply chain cooperation and technological resources.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 数字技术采用水平与供应链韧性的相符性：一种资源调度与再制度化的视角
abstract_cn: 目的 基于社会技术系统理论，本研究旨在探讨技术智能水平(TIL)与供应链合作水平(SCCL)之间的（不）一致性如何影响供应链韧性(SCR)。研究进一步分析了资源协调(REO)的中介作用和再制度化(REI)的调节效应。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究采用多项式回归结合响应面分析，分析了来自318家中国公司的调查数据。此外，采用区块变量方法检验REO的中介机制。 研究结果 实证分析表明，TIL与SCCL之间的一致性增强了SCR。此外，TIL与SCCL的高-高一致性对SCR的提升效果超过低-低一致性。在不一致的情况下，高SCCL/低TIL的匹配模式使SCR显著提高，而高TIL/低SCCL的模式则未能达到同样效果。 原创性/价值 本研究克服了传统单一技术或协作视角的局限，提供了对数字技术采纳水平更细致的理解。它首次从社会技术系统的角度系统地检查了TIL/SCCL一致性（或不一致性）的联合效应。本研究为由数字技术驱动的SCR的知识体系做出了贡献，并为管理者如何利用供应链合作和技术资源提供了宝贵的见解。

title: The implications of additive manufacturing for hospital supply chain operations: an exploratory study
abstract: Purpose Grounded in the resource-based view, this study aims to explore the implications of adopting additive manufacturing (AM), also known as three-dimensional (3D) printing, for hospital supply chain operations in Norway. Design/methodology/approach An exploratory qualitative approach is used. Comparative design is used to explore the implications of using AM for two of the largest hospitals in Norway. Semistructured interviews are conducted to collect primary data from experts involved in AM technology and hospital supply chain operations. Inductive thematic analysis is used to examine, organize and interpret the data. Findings Major implications of AM adoption for hospital supply chain operations in Norway are identified and discussed. The findings suggest that AM can reduce supply risks and provide hospitals with greater control over medical part availability. AM offers diversification benefits, enabling hospitals to produce a wide range of products in-house and reduce reliance on foreign suppliers. However, for hospitals to fully leverage AM’s potential, critical barriers such as quality assurance, cost-effectiveness and regulatory compliance should be addressed. Research limitations/implications The focus of the study is on Norwegian hospital supply chains. Future research is required to validate the findings in other supply chain settings for generalizability. Practical implications Practitioners can draw on the findings to assess the advantages and challenges of AM technology adoption in the context of hospital supply chain operations. Originality/value To the best of the authors’ knowledge, this is among the first studies to empirically examine the effects of AM technology adoption on hospital supply chain operations.
title_cn: 增材制造对医院供应链运营的影响：一项探索性研究
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究基于资源基础观，旨在探讨采用增材制造（AM），即三维（3D）打印，对挪威医院供应链运营的影响。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究采用探索性定性方法。通过比较设计探索增材制造对挪威两家大型医院的影响。通过半结构化访谈收集参与AM技术和医院供应链运营的专家的主要数据。采用归纳主题分析对数据进行审查、组织和解释。 发现 确定并讨论了挪威医院供应链运营中采用增材制造的主要影响。结果表明，增材制造可以降低供应风险，使医院对医疗部件的可用性有更大的控制能力。增材制造提供了多样化的好处，使医院能够在内部生产多种产品，减少对外国供应商的依赖。然而，为了使医院充分利用增材制造的潜力，需要解决质量保障、成本效益和监管合规等关键障碍。 研究局限性/影响 本研究关注于挪威的医院供应链。未来的研究需要在其他供应链环境中验证这些发现，以实现一般性。 实际意义 从业者可以根据这些发现评估在医院供应链运营中采用AM技术的优势和挑战。 创新/价值 据作者所知，这是首批实证研究增材制造技术采用对医院供应链运营影响的研究之一。

title: From information asymmetry to transparency: blockchain-enabled digital transformation in manufacturing supply chains
abstract: Purpose Blockchain serves as a vital technology for digital transformation within manufacturing supply chains through its improved security and transparent tracking capabilities. Blockchain technology emerges as a promising solution for supply chain stakeholders who face ongoing information asymmetries and trust deficits amidst growing demands for sustainable practices and ethical sourcing from consumers and regulators. This paper aims to explore the potential of blockchain technology to improve transparency within supply chain operations, particularly in the Australian electrical manufacturing industry. Design/methodology/approach This research uses a multimethod research design encompassing three phases: Phase 1, a comprehensive literature review; Phase 2, semistructured interviews; and Phase 3, a case study to explore the application of distributed ledger technology for secure real-time supply chain activity monitoring. Findings The results suggest that integrating blockchain with Internet of Things technologies and sensor-based data leads to substantial improvements in data integrity while reducing fraud risks and enabling more efficient supply chain actor collaboration. Practical implications Manufacturing firms can benefit from our research findings, which provide actionable steps for using blockchain to achieve sustainable operations and improved efficiency. The authors offer strategic guidance for firms to develop supply chains that ensure transparency and resilience, along with alignment to environmental, social and governance goals. Originality/value The study advances digital supply chain transformation research by showing how blockchain serves as an essential technology to improve transparency and trust while boosting performance in manufacturing supply chains.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 从信息不对称到透明化：区块链赋能的制造供应链数字化转型
abstract_cn:
目的 区块链作为制造供应链数字化转型的重要技术，通过提高安全性和透明追踪能力，发挥着关键作用。区块链技术成为面对持续信息不对称和信任不足的供应链利益相关者的有希望的解决方案，尤其是在消费者和监管机构对可持续实践和道德采购需求日益增长的背景下。本文旨在探讨区块链技术在提高供应链运营透明度方面的潜力，特别是在澳大利亚电气制造行业中的应用。

设计/方法论 本研究采用多方法研究设计，分为三个阶段：第一阶段，进行全面的文献综述；第二阶段，开展半结构化访谈；第三阶段，进行案例研究，探讨分布式账本技术在安全实时供应链活动监控中的应用。

研究结果 结果表明，将区块链与物联网技术和基于传感器的数据整合，可以显著提高数据完整性，同时减少欺诈风险，促进供应链参与者之间更高效的协作。

实际启示 制造企业可以从我们的研究结果中受益，这为利用区块链实现可持续运营和提高效率提供了可行步骤。作者提供了战略指导，帮助企业发展确保透明性和韧性的供应链，同时与环境、社会和治理目标保持一致。

原创性/价值 本研究推动了数字供应链转型的研究，展示了区块链如何作为改善透明度与信任的关键技术，同时提升制造供应链的绩效。

title: Implementing environmentally sustainable practices in multi-tier fashion supply chains: the influence of institutional pressures
abstract: Purpose Implementing sustainable practices, particularly those aimed at reducing environmental impact, is challenging across multi-tier fashion supply chains operating within complex institutional contexts. These difficulties are most pronounced at the upstream level, where limited resources, restricted visibility and a lack of strategic control and support can hinder progress.
