This study aims to explore how institutional pressures influence the implementation of environmentally sustainable practices and strategic responses of upstream suppliers, offering theoretical and practical insights beyond the first tier of the supply chain. Design/methodology/approach Bangladesh, a key manufacturing hub for global fashion, provides a valuable emerging economy context for examining sustainability challenges. This study uses an exploratory multiple-case approach to investigate institutional pressures in multi-tier fashion supply chains. Data from 43 suppliers and 16 stakeholders were analysed thematically to uncover how such pressures shape sustainable responses across supply chain tiers. Findings The findings reveal how institutional pressures shape manufacturing operations and influence the adoption of sustainable practices, reflecting the perspectives of upstream fashion suppliers. These pressures, along with supplier responses, strategies and challenges, vary across different tiers of the supply chain, particularly lower-tier suppliers who often face greater resource constraints and limited visibility. This research offers theoretical and practical insights beyond the first tier and provides six propositions and a conceptual model that highlight the complexity and diversity of sustainability implementation across multi-tier supply chains. Research limitations/implications Although the study is empirically situated in the fashion industry, this study offers theoretical insights that are broadly applicable to multi-tier supply chains across diverse sectors. By examining how institutional pressures operate within complex supply chain environments, the research contributes to a wider understanding of sustainability implementation beyond the first tier. However, the scope of the study is limited to environmental practices. Originality/value This study focuses on multi-tier upstream fashion supply chains, a sector that faces unique regulatory, economic, cultural and competitive pressures, particularly in developing country contexts. It offers a supplier-centric perspective on how institutional pressures are interpreted and enacted in these contexts, while also providing practical guidance for organisations seeking to improve environmental practices throughout their supply networks.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 在多层级时尚供应链中实施环境可持续实践：制度压力的影响
abstract_cn: 目的 实施可持续实践，尤其是那些旨在减少环境影响的实践，面临着多层级时尚供应链在复杂制度环境中运营的挑战。这些困难在上游层面最为明显，有限的资源、受限的可见性以及缺乏战略控制和支持可能会阻碍进展。本研究旨在探讨制度压力如何影响环境可持续实践的实施以及上游供应商的战略响应，提供理论和实践视角，超越供应链的第一层级。 设计/方法论/方法 孟加拉国作为全球时尚的主要制造中心，为 examining 可持续性挑战提供了有价值的新兴经济体背景。本研究采用探索性多案例方法，调查多层级时尚供应链中的制度压力。对来自43个供应商和16个利益相关者的数据进行了主题分析，以揭示这些压力如何塑造供应链各层级的可持续响应。 发现 结果揭示了制度压力如何塑造制造运营并影响可持续实践的采纳，反映了上游时尚供应商的观点。这些压力以及供应商的响应、战略和挑战在供应链的不同层级之间有所不同，尤其是较低层级的供应商往往面临更大的资源限制和有限的可见性。本研究提供了超越第一层级的理论和实践视角，并提出了六个命题和一个概念模型，突出多层级供应链中可持续性实施的复杂性和多样性。 研究局限性/启示 尽管本研究在时尚行业中进行了实证研究，但其理论见解在不同领域的多层级供应链中具有广泛适用性。通过考察制度压力在复杂供应链环境中的运作，本研究有助于更广泛地理解可持续性实施的情况，超越第一层级。然而，研究的范围仅限于环境实践。 原创性/价值 本研究专注于多层级上游时尚供应链，这是一个面临独特的法规、经济、文化和竞争压力的领域，尤其是在发展中国家的背景下。它提供了一个以供应商为中心的视角，探讨制度压力如何在这些背景下被解读和执行，同时为希望改善整个供应网络环保实践的组织提供了实际指导。

title: Developing pharmaceutical supply chain resilient capabilities: the role of Industry 4.0 technologies
abstract: Purpose The purpose of this study is to advance understanding of how PSCs can re-imagined, re-designed and strengthened by leveraging industry 4.0 (I4.0) technologies. Building resilience in Pharmaceutical Supply Chains (PSCs) has become imperative in the wake of COVID-19 and other global disruptions. Design/methodology/approach This study adopted a qualitative approach using thematic analysis and the Gioia method on a corpus of data from 114 articles published in 84 peer-reviewed academic journals. The authors conducted a problematising review to critically analyse the contributions of I4.0 technologies to PSCs and demonstrate the distinctiveness of PSC resilience. Findings The thematic analysis revealed the advantages and barriers to I4.0 implementation in PSCs, emphasising on how these technologies support sensing, seizing and reconfiguring capabilities. Drawing on dynamic capability theory, this study proposes the pharmaceutical supply chain resilient capabilities (PSCRC) model, which conceptualises the capability building required to withstand and adapt to disruption. Originality/value The authors argue that the PSCRC model provides i) a theoretical contribution by clarifying the micro foundations of resilience, and ii) a practical roadmap for supply chain leaders seeking to deploy I4.0 technologies to coordinate processes, secure materials and build sustainable and adaptive PSCs. The paper also outlines future research avenues to advance scholarly and managerial understanding of PSC resilience.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 开发制药供应链韧性能力：工业4.0技术的作用
abstract_cn: 目的 本研究旨在深化对如何通过利用工业4.0（I4.0）技术来重新构想、重新设计和增强制药供应链（PSC）的理解。在COVID-19及其他全球性干扰的背景下，增强制药供应链的韧性已变得至关重要。 设计/方法论/方法 本研究采用定性方法，通过主题分析和Gioia方法，对114篇发表在84个同行评审学术期刊上的文章进行分析。作者进行了一项问题化回顾，以批判性分析I4.0技术对制药供应链的贡献，并展示制药供应链韧性的独特性。 发现 主题分析揭示了I4.0在制药供应链实施中的优势和障碍，强调了这些技术如何支持感知、把握和重构能力。基于动态能力理论，本研究提出了制药供应链韧性能力（PSCRC）模型，概念化了承受和适应干扰所需的能力建设。 originality/价值 作者认为，PSCRC模型提供了i)理论上的贡献，通过阐明韧性的微观基础；以及ii) 为寻求部署I4.0技术以协调流程、保障材料并构建可持续和适应性制药供应链的供应链领导者提供实践路线图。本文还概述了未来的研究方向，以促进对制药供应链韧性的学术和管理理解。

title: Can buyer digital information sharing improve supplier innovativeness in the automotive manufacturing industry?
abstract: Purpose Previous research on supplier innovativeness literature has focused on how buyers can effectively “pull” innovations from their suppliers. Yet little is currently known about how suppliers proactively seize opportunities to enhance their innovativeness to survive within increasingly complex supply chain environments. This study fills this gap from the supplier’s perspective, with a particular focus on buyer digital information sharing. Specifically, this study aims to explore (i) the relationship between buyer digital information sharing and supplier innovativeness; and (ii) the contingency factors that impact this fundamental relationship. Design/methodology/approach Drawing on the motivation-opportunity-ability (MOA) theory, this study constructed a moderated moderation model that incorporates supplier learning intent and supplier realized absorptive capacity as moderators of the association between buyer digital information sharing and supplier innovativeness. Survey data were collected from automotive manufacturing suppliers in China. Hierarchical moderated regression analysis was used to test the proposed conceptual framework. Findings Research findings indicate that buyer digital information sharing positively affects supplier innovativeness, with this direct effect being amplified by supplier learning intent. Moreover, supplier realized absorptive capacity further strengthens the moderating role of supplier learning intent. Practical implications This study guides supply managers in effectively leveraging relationship-based interactions to enhance their innovation capabilities. It particularly emphasizes the necessity of cultivating supplier learning intent and supplier realized absorptive capacity to unlock the full potential of buyer digital information sharing. Moreover, for buyers, the timely sharing of high-quality digital information with suppliers can also strengthen long-term competitiveness and sustainability within the buyer-supplier network. Originality/value This study advances the understanding of how buyer digital information sharing fosters supplier innovativeness. By extending the MOA theory to a cross-organizational context, it further demonstrates that supplier innovativeness arises from the synergistic interaction among opportunity (buyer digital information sharing), motivation (supplier learning intent) and ability (supplier realized absorptive capacity). This refined theoretical perspective explains why and when buyer-provided digital information can be effectively transformed into supplier innovativeness.
title_cn: 买方的数字信息共享能否提升汽车制造行业供应商的创新能力？
abstract_cn: 目的 以往关于供应商创新能力的研究主要集中在买方如何有效“拉动”供应商的创新上。然而，目前对于供应商如何主动抓住机会以提升其创新能力以在日益复杂的供应链环境中生存的了解仍然有限。本研究从供应商的角度填补了这一空白，特别关注买方数字信息共享。具体而言，本研究旨在探讨（i）买方数字信息共享与供应商创新能力之间的关系；以及（ii）影响这一基本关系的应变因素。 设计/方法论/途径 本研究基于动机-机会-能力（MOA）理论，构建了一个调节的调节模型，将供应商学习意图和供应商实现的吸收能力作为买方数字信息共享与供应商创新能力之间关系的调节变量。调查数据来自中国的汽车制造供应商。采用分层调节回归分析来检验所提出的概念框架。 发现 研究结果表明，买方数字信息共享对供应商创新能力有积极影响，而这一直接影响受到供应商学习意图的增强。此外，供应商实现的吸收能力进一步加强了供应商学习意图的调节作用。 实践意义 本研究为供应链管理者提供了有效利用基于关系的互动来增强创新能力的指导。特别强调了培养供应商学习意图和供应商实现的吸收能力的必要性，以充分释放买方数字信息共享的潜力。此外，对于买方而言，及时与供应商共享高质量的数字信息也可以增强买方-供应商网络中的长期竞争力和可持续性。 原创性/价值 本研究深化了对买方数字信息共享如何促进供应商创新能力的理解。通过将MOA理论扩展到跨组织的背景，它进一步证明了供应商创新能力源于机会（买方数字信息共享）、动机（供应商学习意图）和能力（供应商实现的吸收能力）之间的协同互动。这一精炼的理论视角解释了为什么以及何时买方提供的数字信息能够有效转化为供应商的创新能力。

title: Battlelines of Accountability: The Discursive Production of Digital Responsibility
abstract: Abstract Public inquiries have become pivotal arenas in which the ethical responsibilities of digital platforms are publicly constructed and contested. Yet scholarship has paid limited attention to the linguistic mechanisms through which these contests unfold. This paper examines the 2024 Australian Joint Select Committee on Social Media and Australian Society as a high-stakes moral forum in which technology firms, regulators, and civil society actors engage in discursive struggles over adolescent harm and platform responsibility. Drawing on a qualitative analysis of more than 3000 pages of submissions and hearing transcripts, we show that accountability in this setting is not simply revealed but actively produced through language. Extending prior research on dialogic accountability, we incorporate Searle’s speech act theory to identify how presuppositions and indirect speech acts function as micro-level tools for shaping epistemic contests about what harms occur and responsibility contests about who ought to be held to account. Our findings demonstrate that corporate actors often deploy these linguistic devices to maintain ambiguity, diffuse blame, or perform symbolic responsibility, while legislators and advocates use them to assert duties, establish harms, and press for substantive accountability. We argue that “digital responsibility” emerges as a contingent discursive accomplishment rather than an intrinsic organizational property, highlighting the performative and strategic nature of ethical claims in contemporary platform governance. By theorizing accountability as a linguistically mediated moral practice, the paper advances business ethics scholarship on discursive legitimation, contributing to ongoing debates about how societies should evaluate and regulate the conduct of powerful digital firms.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 问责的战线：数字责任的论述性生产
abstract_cn: 摘要 公共调查已成为数字平台伦理责任在公众中构建和争论的重要场所。然而，学术界对这些争论展开的语言机制关注有限。本文考察了2024年澳大利亚社交媒体与澳大利亚社会联合特别委员会作为一个高风险的道德论坛，在该论坛中，科技公司、监管机构和民间社会参与者就青少年伤害与平台责任进行话语斗争。通过对3000多页提交材料和听证会记录的定性分析，我们表明，在这一背景下，问责不仅是被揭示的，而是通过语言积极生成的。扩展了先前关于对话性问责的研究，我们结合赛尔的言语行为理论，识别出前提假设和间接言语行为如何作为微观层面的工具，塑造关于何种伤害发生及谁应被问责的认知争论。我们的研究结果显示，企业参与者通常利用这些语言工具以维护模糊性、扩散责任或进行象征性问责，而立法者和倡导者则利用它们来主张责任、确立伤害并推动实质性问责。我们认为，“数字责任”作为一种有条件的话语成就出现，而非内在的组织特性，突出了当代平台治理中伦理主张的表演性和战略性。通过将问责理论化为一种通过语言媒介的道德实践，本文推动了商业伦理在话语合法化方面的学术研究，并为社会如何评估和规范强大数字公司的行为的持续论战做出了贡献。

title: Generative Artificial Intelligence and Ethicality in Entrepreneurs’ Creativity
abstract: Abstract We explore the complex relationship between generative artificial intelligence (G-AI) and the ethical aspects of creative activities. Based on the dual concepts of attribution theory and entrepreneurs’ self-regulation, we examine how G-AI impacts entrepreneurs’ creativity, including unethical creativity, and those displaying traits linked to the ‘dark side’ of the human personality. Using data from India and Bangladesh, we test the core hypothesis that G-AI increases creativity within an entrepreneurial context. Contrary to prevailing narratives about G-AI’s ability to enhance human creativity, our findings show that G-AI’s direct influence on creativity is statistically insignificant. More importantly, our results highlight that G-AI use is positively related to unethical creativity—a form of innovation that breaches normative standards—especially among entrepreneurs with high levels of narcissistic and Machiavellian traits. Our study advances attribution theory and self-regulation by revealing how entrepreneurs’ internal conflicts, such as the tension between aspirational creativity and opportunistic self-interest, interact with their self-control to produce unethical creativity. We offer important insights into how G-AI can be employed responsibly and ethically in entrepreneurial venturing.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 生成性人工智能与企业家创造力中的伦理问题
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文探讨了生成性人工智能（G-AI）与创作活动伦理方面之间的复杂关系。基于归因理论和企业家自我调节的双重概念，我们考察了G-AI如何影响企业家的创造力，包括不道德的创造力，以及表现出与人类性格“黑暗面”相关特征的个体。通过来自印度和孟加拉国的数据，我们检验了G-AI在创业环境中增加创造力的核心假设。与关于G-AI增强人类创造力的主流叙述相反，我们的研究结果显示，G-AI对创造力的直接影响在统计上并不显著。更重要的是，我们的结果表明，G-AI的使用与不道德的创造力（即违反规范标准的创新形式）呈正相关，特别是在具有较高自恋和马基雅维利主义特征的企业家中。我们的研究推进了归因理论和自我调节的理解，揭示了企业家内部冲突（如期望创造力与机会主义自我利益之间的紧张关系）如何与他们的自控力相互作用，从而产生不道德的创造力。我们提供了有关如何在创业活动中负责和伦理地使用G-AI的重要见解。

title: Divine Limitation or Enabler? Understanding How Religion Influences the Relationship Between Ethics and Creativity
abstract: We recognize the longstanding debate about whether (or not) religion is required for ethics.Instead, we focus on the notion religion can serve as a mechanism for ethics in certain situations and highlight its relevance in the relationship between ethics and creativity.
title_cn: 神圣的限制还是促进者？理解宗教如何影响伦理与创造力之间的关系
abstract_cn: 我们认识到关于宗教是否必需于伦理的长期辩论。相反，我们关注的是宗教在某些情况下可以作为伦理机制的概念，并强调其在伦理与创造力关系中的相关性。

title: Family Ownership and CSR Overspending: Evidence from India on the Mediating Role of CSR Committee Composition
abstract: Abstract Why do some firms voluntarily exceed legally mandated requirements for corporate social responsibility (CSR)? We examine this question in the context of India, an emerging economy where the Companies Act of 2013 mandates eligible firms to spend 2% of profits on CSR. This institutional setting provides a clear benchmark for identifying firms’ CSR overspending, voluntary spending beyond the mandated threshold, as a substantive form of CSR engagement rather than compliance. Drawing on agency and stakeholder theories, we argue that family ownership influences CSR overspending through specific governance mechanisms: (a) overlapping membership between CSR and stakeholder relations committees and (b) female representation on the CSR committee. From an agency perspective, family owners pursue non-economic objectives such as preserving the family’s legacy and reputation. From a stakeholder perspective, they are particularly attentive to maintaining societal legitimacy. We propose that as family ownership increases, CSR governance becomes less oriented toward CSR spending compliance and more toward stakeholder preferences, leading to CSR overspending. Using panel data from 601 publicly listed Indian firms (2015–2024), we find robust empirical support for our research model. Our findings suggest that in a context where family ownership is widespread, CSR overspending represents a strategic choice shaped by family owners’ preferences and channeled through CSR governance mechanisms. This study contributes to research on family-firm ethics and CSR governance in emerging economies by clarifying how ownership and CSR committee composition influence CSR spending beyond compliance.
title_cn: 家族所有权与企业社会责任超支：来自印度的证据及企业社会责任委员会组成的中介作用
abstract_cn: 摘要 为什么有些企业自愿超越法律规定的企业社会责任（CSR）要求？我们在印度这一新兴经济体的背景下探讨这一问题，2013年的《公司法》要求符合条件的企业将2%的利润用于CSR。这一制度环境为识别企业的CSR超支提供了明确的基准，即自愿支出超出法定阈值的部分，作为一种实质性的CSR参与形式，而非单纯的合规行为。基于代理理论和利益相关者理论，我们认为家族所有权通过特定的治理机制影响CSR超支：（a）CSR委员会与利益相关者关系委员会之间的重叠成员资格，以及（b）CSR委员会中的女性代表性。从代理的角度来看，家族所有者追求非经济目标，如维护家族的遗产和声誉。从利益相关者的角度来看，他们特别关注维护社会合法性。我们提出，随着家族所有权的增加，CSR治理变得不再以CSR支出合规为导向，而是更倾向于利益相关者的偏好，从而导致CSR超支。通过对601家印度上市公司（2015-2024年）的面板数据分析，我们发现了对研究模型的强有力实证支持。我们的研究结果表明，在家族所有权普遍存在的背景下，CSR超支代表了一种战略选择，受到家族所有者偏好的影响，并通过CSR治理机制进行引导。本研究通过阐明所有权和CSR委员会组成如何影响超出合规的CSR支出，为新兴经济体中家族企业伦理和CSR治理的研究做出了贡献。

title: Civil Society, Multiple Publics, and Relational Recognition: Recognising Women Garment Workers and Organising Situated Responsibility in Bangladesh’s Apparel Industry
abstract: Abstract This research discusses relational recognition and the organisation of situated responsibility by exploring how diverse civil society actors from various local, national, and transnational levels, individually and collectively, facilitate safe and sustainable work for women workers in the Bangladeshi garment industry. Drawing on Nancy Fraser and Richa Nagar’s theoretical conversations into the mobilisation of publics and situated solidarity—where recognition is central to justice-seeking—we examine how public actions and debates within the gendered global apparel production network (GAPN) have the potential to democratise relations of recognition that can transcend the boundary for transformative changes to address equity. Through a 7-year qualitative, in-depth study, our analysis highlights how situated solidarity, rooted in a felt responsibility that entails accountability, is mobilised as collective “we”. This solidarity addresses struggles for recognition and offers a relational frame of recognition that integrates demands for redistribution—advancing equity, equality, and status for women workers within the GAPN—and representation, by promoting inclusion within production practices and institutional cultures. By examining the interplay between political-economic and localised conditions, alongside transnational dynamics involving multiple publics, we demonstrate how various actors situate their solidarity. This reveals how relational recognition, grounded in mutual recognition, contributes to the democratisation of GAPN governance by illustrating how accountability shapes the structuring of situated responsibilities.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 公民社会、多重公众与关系性认同：在孟加拉国服装产业中识别女性 garment 工人及组织情境责任
abstract_cn: 摘要 本研究探讨了关系认同与情境责任的组织方式，分析了来自不同地方、国家和跨国层面的多样化公民社会参与者是如何在孟加拉国服装产业中，个体或集体地促进女性工人的安全和可持续工作。基于南希·弗雷泽和里查·纳加尔关于公众动员和情境团结的理论对话——在这一过程中，认同是寻求正义的核心——我们考察了在性别化的全球服装生产网络（GAPN）中，公众行动和辩论如何有潜力实现认同关系的民主化，从而超越边界，进行变革性改变，以解决公平问题。通过为期7年的定性深入研究，我们的分析凸显了情境团结是如何被作为集体“我们”的形式动员，根植于一种需要责任感的情感责任中。这种团结应对认同的斗争，并提供一个整合再分配要求的关系性认同框架——推动女性工人在GAPN中的公平、平等和地位——以及代表性，通过在生产实践和制度文化中促进包容性。通过考察政治经济与地方化条件之间的相互作用，以及涉及多个公众的跨国动态，我们展示了各种参与者是如何定位其团结的。这揭示了基于相互认同的关系认同如何通过展示责任感如何塑造情境责任的结构，为GAPN治理的民主化做出贡献。

title: Good Cops in a Greedy Institution? Dutch Police Officers’ Stories of Compound Moral Injury
abstract: Abstract The notion of moral injury is receiving considerable scholarly attention as a concept that can capture the lasting imprint of moral transgressions on frontline professionals and others. Whereas most studies adopt a clinical perspective to interpret this phenomenon, this study offers an inductive exploration of the organisational dimensions of moral injury in the context of police work, drawing on police officers’ stories of moral injury. To this end, in-depth interviews were conducted with morally injured police officers, which were analysed using narrative inquiry. This study shows that police moral injury needs to be understood in relation to the particularities of police work, its unique occupational culture, and circumstances. Thus, it shows the relevance of officers’ experiences of working in a ‘greedy institution’ that keeps demanding effort without providing the requisite trust or support. Theoretically, this study proposes the notion of ‘compound moral injury’ that was found to stem from multiple contributions, both on the frontline and in the organisation.
title_cn: 在贪婪体制中的好警察？荷兰警察的复合道德创伤故事
abstract_cn: 摘要 道德伤害的概念正受到相当大的学术关注，因为它能够捕捉前线专业人员及其他人群在道德失范事件后留下的持久印记。尽管大多数研究采用临床视角来解读这一现象，但本研究提供了一个关于警务工作中道德伤害的组织维度的归纳探索，基于警察对道德伤害的故事。为此，研究者对经历道德伤害的警察进行了深入访谈，并运用叙事研究方法进行了分析。本研究表明，理解警察的道德伤害需要考虑到警务工作的特殊性、其独特的职业文化以及相应的环境。因此，研究揭示了警察在一个“贪婪机构”中工作的经历的相关性，这种机构不断要求努力，却未能提供所需的信任或支持。从理论上讲，本研究提出了“复合道德伤害”的概念，这种伤害源于前线和组织内部的多重因素。

title: How Racial Minority Representation in Brand Communication Affects Social Media Engagement
abstract: Abstract Consumers increasingly appreciate racial diversity in brand communication, though the ultimate impact of racial minority representation remains ambiguous. Previous research typically finds a positive effect among racial minority target groups, but it generally ignores or offers conflicting effects for (larger) nonminority groups. We aim to address this gap by establishing the overall effect of racial minority models on social media engagement. Our multimethod approach combines large-scale field data (more than 14,000 posts by 75 brands) with a series of four experiments and a conjoint study ( N = 1,456) and offers consistent evidence of a positive relationship between racial minority representation and social media engagement, including among nonminority groups. The results also provide evidence for a mediating role of brand morality, such that consumers (regardless of racial background) perceive brands with greater minority representation as more moral. Brand motive acts as a boundary condition, such that the positive effect of racial minority representation disappears with an external (stakeholder-driven) motive. These findings provide compelling implications for the development of inclusive social media content.
topics: Consumer Behavior in Brand Consumption and Identification
title_cn: 种族少数群体在品牌传播中的代表性如何影响社交媒体参与度
abstract_cn: 摘要 消费者越来越重视品牌传播中的种族多样性，但种族少数群体的代表性对品牌的最终影响仍不明确。以往的研究通常发现这种代表性对种族少数群体目标群体具有积极影响，但对于（更大规模的）非少数群体则一般忽视或呈现出矛盾的效果。我们旨在填补这一空白，建立种族少数模特对社交媒体参与度的总体影响。我们采用多种方法相结合的研究方式，整合了超过14,000条由75个品牌发布的社交媒体贴文的大规模实地数据，以及四个实验和一项联合研究（N = 1,456），并提供了一致的证据表明种族少数代表性与社交媒体参与度之间存在积极的关系，包括在非少数群体中。研究结果还表明，品牌道德在这一关系中起到中介作用，即消费者（无论种族背景如何）都会将具有更大少数群体代表性的品牌视为更具道德。品牌动机作为边界条件出现，表明当品牌动机为外部（利益相关者驱动）时，种族少数代表性的积极效应消失。这些发现对发展包容性的社交媒体内容提供了重要启示。

title: Lonely Work: Gig Work, Workplace Technology and Working-Class Loneliness
abstract: Abstract In this paper, I argue that changes in the structure of low-income work and developments in workplace technology have stripped away many of the essential social goods provided by such work. I identify the rise of platform gig work, adoption of automation tools, and use of employee efficiency monitoring technologies as developments that have both squeezed opportunities for socialization out of the workday and made it more difficult to find and plan social activities outside the workplace. I argue that the desocialization of work is a matter of justice that should concern states and suggest a number of potential regulations and pro-worker reforms to address the problem.
title_cn: 孤独的工作：零工经济、职场科技与工人阶级的孤独感
abstract_cn: 摘要 在本文中，我论证了低收入工作结构的变化和职场技术的发展剥夺了许多此类工作的基本社会价值。我指出，平台零工工作、自动化工具的采用以及员工效率监测技术的使用，是压榨工作日内社交机会并使得在工作场所外寻找和规划社交活动变得更加困难的发展。我认为，工作的去社交化是一个应引起国家重视的正义问题，并提出了一些潜在的监管和支持工人的改革建议，以应对这一问题。

title: Effectiveness of Formal and Informal Controls in Deterring Misreporting: The Role of Whistleblowing Mechanism and Ethical Leadership
abstract: Abstract Our paper examines the effectiveness of formal control (i.e., whistleblowing mechanism) and informal control (i.e., ethical leadership) on the relationship between delegation of decision rights and displacement of responsibility on managers’ misreporting. We find delegation of decision rights affects managers’ misreporting indirectly through displacement of responsibility. We also find that whistleblowing mechanism and ethical leadership negatively moderate the relationship between delegation of decision rights and managers’ misreporting under low displacement of responsibility situations. This result suggests that whistleblowing mechanism and ethical leadership are effective formal and informal controls, respectively, to deter managers’ misreporting only when displacement of responsibility is low. The theoretical and practical implications of our findings are discussed.
title_cn: 正式与非正式控制在遏制虚假报告中的有效性：举报机制与伦理领导的作用
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文探讨了正式控制（即举报机制）和非正式控制（即伦理领导）对决策权委托与责任转移之间关系对管理者错误报告影响的有效性。我们发现，决策权的委托通过责任转移间接影响管理者的错误报告。同时，我们还发现，在责任转移较低的情况下，举报机制和伦理领导对决策权委托与管理者错误报告之间的关系具有负向调节作用。这一结果表明，举报机制和伦理领导分别作为有效的正式和非正式控制手段，仅在责任转移较低时能够有效遏制管理者的错误报告。我们讨论了研究结果的理论和实践意义。

title: Bridging Different Institutional Logics: The Role of Institutional Work in Translating Sustainable Product-Service Systems Across Contexts
abstract: Abstract Product-service systems (PSS) are increasingly adopted by firms seeking to pursue environmental and social responsibilities alongside commercial goals, often with near-term trade-offs. Yet, their implementation across diverse national contexts is often fraught with tensions between competing institutional logics, constraining the scalability and robustness of PSS strategies. While institutional theory highlights how logics guide organizational behavior, less is understood about how firms transfer global sustainability logics across organizational and national boundaries and translate them into locally viable practices in differing institutional environments. This study addresses this gap through a comparative qualitative case study of a global heating system provider, drawing on 43 in-depth interviews and complementary field data from its headquarters in Japan and its subsidiary and customers in Türkiye. We identify three institutional logics—sustainability, state, and commercial—that jointly influence PSS adoption but interact differently across contexts. Our findings reveal three mechanisms of institutional work that underpin the transfer and translation of logics: strategic creation of sustainability practices, tight and loose coupling of logics under varying institutional conditions, and negotiation of disruption trade-offs between environmental and profitability priorities. We develop a conceptual model that specifies the mechanisms through which sustainability logics are transferred across organizational and national boundaries and translated into locally enacted practices, leading to either tight, incremental, or symbolic integration of PSS strategies. Theoretically, this research advances institutional theory by demonstrating that institutional logics are not fixed determinants of behavior but resources that actors actively interpret, recombine, and sometimes only nominally adopt when transferring them across contexts. Practically, it provides guidance for managers and policymakers on designing harmonization strategies, aligning incentives, and overcoming infrastructural barriers to enable substantive sustainability transitions.
title_cn: 跨越不同制度逻辑的桥梁：制度性工作在不同背景下翻译可持续产品服务系统中的作用
abstract_cn: 摘要 产品服务系统（PSS）越来越受到企业的青睐，这些企业希望在追求商业目标的同时，承担环境和社会责任，尽管这往往伴随着短期的权衡。然而，在不同国家背景下实施PSS时，往往会面临竞争性制度逻辑之间的紧张关系，这限制了PSS战略的可扩展性和稳健性。尽管制度理论强调了逻辑如何指导组织行为，但对于企业如何在组织和国家边界之间转移全球可持续性逻辑，并将其转化为在不同制度环境中可行的本地实践的理解仍然较少。本研究通过对一家全球供热系统提供商的比较定性案例研究来填补这一空白，基于对其总部位于日本及其在土耳其的子公司和客户的43次深入访谈和补充实地数据的分析。我们识别出三种制度逻辑——可持续性、国家和商业——共同影响PSS的采用，但在不同背景下的互动方式各异。我们的研究结果揭示了支撑逻辑转移和转化的三种制度工作机制：可持续性实践的战略性创造、在不同制度条件下逻辑的紧密和松散耦合，以及在环境与盈利优先事项之间进行干扰权衡的协商。我们提出了一个概念模型，明确了可持续性逻辑跨越组织和国家边界转移并转化为本地实施实践的机制，从而导致PSS战略的紧密、渐进或象征性整合。从理论上讲，本研究通过证明制度逻辑不是行为的固定决定因素，而是行为者积极解释、重新组合，并在跨越不同背景时有时仅名义上采纳的资源，推动了制度理论的发展。从实践上讲，它为管理者和政策制定者提供了关于设计协调策略、对齐激励机制以及克服基础设施障碍以实现实质性可持续转型的指导。

title: Unethical Organizational Practices as a Stressor, Mediated by Moral Emotions and Moderated by Ethical Leadership
abstract: Abstract Theory and research have focused on the well-being and attitudinal costs of unethical actions committed by individuals, yet increasingly workers may care about their organization’s unethical practices. Drawing from social identity theory and cognitive dissonance theory, we theorized that moral emotions elicited by unethical organizational practices would be associated with negative mental health symptoms (depression symptoms and psychological strain) and organizational attitudes (affective commitment and turnover intentions). We proposed that these relationships would be moderated by ethical leadership. We conducted two studies with participants working for organizations and recruited from Prolific to test relationships. Study 1 was a time-lagged survey ( N = 334), and Study 2 was a replication and extension recall experiment ( N = 713). Guilt, shame, and moral anger about unethical organizational practices were associated with greater psychological strain and depression symptoms. In both studies, ethical leadership strengthened some negative relationships between moral emotions and organizational attitudes. Results suggest that ethical leadership does not buffer employees’ negative attitudes in response to unethical organizational practices. Instead, the typical attitudinal benefits of ethical leadership may be nullified when employees perceive unethical organizational practices, possibly through a sense of moral hypocrisy. Results extend theory on unethical behavior and well-being to the organization as the transgressor and further indicate how employee perceptions of ethicality at multiple levels (organizational, leadership) inform attitudes. These studies underscore the need for organizations to prioritize ethical practices to avoid potential costs to employee mental health and highlight the nuanced role of ethical leadership, with practical implications.
title_cn: 不道德的组织行为作为压力源，通过道德情感进行中介，并受到伦理领导的调节
abstract_cn: 摘要 理论与研究主要关注个体不道德行为所带来的福祉和态度成本，然而，员工对于组织的不道德行为的关注也日益增强。基于社会认同理论和认知失调理论，我们推测由不道德组织行为引发的道德情感与负面心理健康症状（抑郁症状和心理压力）以及组织态度（情感承诺和离职意图）之间存在关联。我们提出这些关系会受到伦理领导的调节。我们进行了两项针对在职员工的研究，并从Prolific平台招募参与者以测试这些关系。研究1为一项时间滞后调查（N = 334），研究2为复制和扩展回忆实验（N = 713）。关于不道德组织行为所引发的内疚、羞耻和道德愤怒与更高的心理压力和抑郁症状相关联。在两项研究中，伦理领导增强了道德情感与组织态度之间某些负面关系的强度。结果表明，伦理领导并未缓解员工对不道德组织行为的负面态度。相反，当员工感知到不道德的组织行为时，伦理领导所带来的典型态度利益可能会被抵消，这可能是由于道德虚伪感造成的。结果将关于不道德行为和福祉的理论扩展到了组织作为违法者的视角，并进一步表明员工对多个层级（组织、领导）的伦理性的感知如何影响其态度。这些研究强调了组织需要优先考虑伦理实践，以避免对员工心理健康的潜在成本，并突显了伦理领导的细致作用，具有实际意义。

title: From Welfare to Well-Groomed: How Income Conditions Influence Moral Perception of Beauty Consumption
abstract: While consumers across all income conditions participate in beauty consumption, how people view such consumption made by consumers from different income conditions remains unclear. Across eight experiments (including two supplementary studies), this research identifies income condition as a key factor shaping moral judgments of beauty consumption. Specifically, we found that a consumer’s income condition and consumption choice on beauty interactively shape how others evaluate his or her perceived morality, such that welfare recipients are judged as less moral when purchasing beauty products (vs. daily necessities), whereas no such effect emerges for middle-income earners. This effect is mediated by perceived deservingness, such that welfare recipients are viewed as less deserving of spending freedom than middle-income earners. Such evaluations are indirectly linked to reduced financial support to welfare recipients who engage in beauty consumption compared to those who do not. Furthermore, when welfare recipients’ beauty consumption is framed as driven by utilitarian (vs. hedonic) motives, they are perceived as more deserving and, in turn, more moral. Finally, debiasing interventions that increase perceived deservingness were shown to be effective in alleviating moral condemnation toward welfare recipients’ beauty consumption. Together, this research provides insights for consumers and beauty industry firms seeking to understand biases toward welfare recipients’ beauty spending and foster a more inclusive marketplace.
topics: Consumer Behavior in Brand Consumption and Identification
Psychology of Moral and Emotional Judgment
title_cn: 从福利到修饰：收入状况如何影响对美丽消费的道德感知
abstract_cn: 尽管所有收入水平的消费者都参与美容消费，但人们对不同收入条件的消费者进行此类消费的看法仍然不清楚。通过八个实验（包括两个补充研究），本研究确定了收入条件作为塑造对美容消费道德判断的关键因素。具体而言，我们发现消费者的收入条件和美容消费选择相互作用，影响他人对其感知道德的评估；即福利接受者在购买美容产品时（相对于日常必需品）被判断为道德较低，而中等收入者并未出现此类效果。该效应通过感知应得性来中介，即福利接受者被视为不如中等收入者更有支配花费的资格。这种评估与对参与美容消费的福利接受者支持减少间接相关。此外，当福利接受者的美容消费被阐述为基于功利动机（相对于享乐动机）时，他们的应得性被认为更高，进而被视为更具道德。最后，能够提高感知应得性的去偏见干预被证明有效，缓解了对福利接受者美容消费的道德谴责。总的来说，本研究为希望理解对福利接受者美容支出的偏见和促进更具包容性的市场的消费者及美容行业公司提供了见解。

title: The Goldilocks Effect of Ethical Climate: How ‘Just Right’ Levels Drive Service Innovation
abstract: Abstract Eliciting employees’ service innovation is crucial for service firms to meet diverse customer needs, foster customer loyalty, and enhance competitiveness. Although ethical climate is often presumed to facilitate service innovation, its influence may not be uniformly positive. Excessive ethical pressure can suppress innovative behavior, suggesting a curvilinear relationship that warrants further investigation. Drawing on social learning theory and behavioral plasticity theory, this study proposed and tested a multilevel model examining the curvilinear effect of ethical climate on service innovation. Two independent studies were conducted using paired data from the Chinese hospitality industry (Study 1) and the Chinese high-tech service industry (Study 2). Results from both studies revealed that ethical climate had a curvilinear (inverted U-shaped) relationship with service innovation. Ethical climate was positively related to ethical efficacy, which in turn exhibited a curvilinear (inverted U-shaped) relationship with service innovation. Ethical efficacy mediated the curvilinear association between ethical climate and service innovation. Additionally, openness moderated the curvilinear relationship between ethical climate and service innovation. Although openness moderated the linear impact of ethical climate on ethical efficacy in Study 1, this moderating effect was not observed in Study 2. Theoretical and practical implications are discussed accordingly.
title_cn: 伦理气候的金发姑娘效应：如何“刚刚好”的水平推动服务创新
abstract_cn: 摘要 激发员工的服务创新对于服务企业满足多样化客户需求、培养客户忠诚度以及增强竞争力至关重要。尽管通常认为伦理气候有助于推动服务创新，但其影响可能并非始终积极。过度的伦理压力可能会抑制创新行为，这表明二者之间存在一个值得进一步探讨的曲线关系。本研究基于社会学习理论和行为可塑性理论，提出并验证了一个多层次模型，以考察伦理气候对服务创新的曲线效应。研究中使用了来自中国酒店业（研究1）和中国高科技服务业（研究2）的配对数据进行两项独立研究。研究结果显示，伦理气候与服务创新之间存在曲线（倒U形）关系。伦理气候与伦理效能正相关，而伦理效能与服务创新之间也表现出曲线（倒U形）关系。伦理效能在伦理气候与服务创新之间的曲线关联中起到了中介作用。此外，开放性在伦理气候与服务创新之间的曲线关系中起到了调节作用。尽管在研究1中开放性调节了伦理气候对伦理效能的线性影响，但在研究2中并未观察到这种调节效应。相应地讨论了理论和实践的启示。

title: Marginalized Stakeholder Theory: A Normative Foundation for Decolonization
abstract: Abstract Whether they address issues of marginalization or study organizations in general, traditional management and business ethics scholars predominantly focus on firms’ engagement with powerful stakeholders. This represents a severe problem globally, manifesting acutely in postcolonial contexts, as firms’ engagement with marginalized stakeholders is either neglected or ignored. This neglect also highlights the problem of epistemic obfuscation in management and business ethics scholarship, through which existing works on decolonization and marginalized stakeholders are either overlooked or co-opted by the mainstream. To advance decolonial organizational scholarship and counter epistemic obfuscation, I propose marginalized stakeholder theory. This theory establishes new pathways for firms to revise their normative principles and decolonize their corporate activities. It enables firms to overcome colonial legacies, reject neocolonial logics embedded in instrumental approaches, and develop decolonial engagement with marginalized stakeholders. To this end, I reconceptualize three engagement approaches—proactive, reactive, and defensive—which are generally used by firms for instrumental purposes. I argue that this reconceptualization provides a starting point for the necessary structural and agentic transformation toward decolonization in epistemic and organizational practices.
title_cn: 边缘化利益相关者理论：去殖民化的规范基础
abstract_cn: 摘要 无论是关注边缘化问题还是研究组织，一般的管理和商业伦理学者主要关注企业与强势利益相关者的互动。这在全球范围内都是一个严重的问题，尤其在后殖民背景下表现得尤为突出，因为企业与边缘化利益相关者的互动往往被忽视或遗忘。这种忽视也突显了管理和商业伦理研究中存在的认知混淆问题，现有关于去殖民化和边缘化利益相关者的研究要么被忽视，要么被主流学术所同化。为了推动去殖民化的组织学术研究并对抗认知混淆，我提出了边缘化利益相关者理论。该理论为企业修订其规范原则和去殖民化其企业活动建立了新的路径。它使企业能够克服殖民遗留问题，拒绝嵌入工具性方法中的新殖民逻辑，并发展与边缘化利益相关者的去殖民化互动。为此，我对企业通常出于工具性目的使用的三种互动方式——主动、反应和防御进行了重新概念化。我认为，这种重新概念化为追求在认知和组织实践中实现去殖民化所必需的结构性和代理性转变提供了切入点。

title: Let’s Talk Stigma Out: An Interaction-Based Process of Stigma Recognition and Removal within Organizational Fields
abstract: Stigma is relational and intersubjective, as it depends on how stigmatizing audiences and stigmatized actors make sense of it. However, little research has investigated the nuances of the interaction process through which stigma comes to be recognized and eventually removed. We address this puzzle by studying stigma in the field of cooperatives in the Lazio region of Italy. Following the involvement of one cooperative in illegal activities, cooperatives in the region were stigmatized by its exchange partners: nonprofit organizations and local governments. Cooperatives’ initial strategy to remove stigma led their exchange partners to change their perception of the root causes of the stigma affecting cooperatives. Cooperatives recognized this change through interaction with their exchange partners and therefore adapted their stigma-related strategy. This process successfully removed the stigma and transformed the way in which cooperatives engaged in exchanges with their partners. Building on this evidence, we develop an interaction-based process model of stigma recognition and removal that reconnects and extends the research streams on stigma and organizational fields.
title_cn: 让我们消除污名：一种基于互动的污名识别与去除过程在组织领域中的应用
abstract_cn: 污名是相互关联且具主体间性，因为它取决于污名化的受众和被污名化的主体如何理解它。然而，关于污名被识别及最终消除的互动过程的细微差别，相关研究较少。我们通过研究意大利拉齐奥地区合作社的污名现象来解决这一难题。在一起合作社参与非法活动后，该地区的合作社被其交易伙伴（非营利组织和地方政府）污名化。合作社最初的消除污名策略导致其交易伙伴改变了对影响合作社的污名根源的看法。合作社通过与交易伙伴的互动认识到这种变化，并因此调整了与污名相关的策略。这一过程成功地消除了污名，并改变了合作社与交易伙伴之间的交流方式。在此证据的基础上，我们提出了一个基于互动的污名识别和消除过程模型，重新连接并扩展了关于污名和组织领域的研究方向。

title: The Tragedy of Cemeterial Work: Exploring Ethics Between Polis, Kinship, and Genos
abstract: Abstract Working in a cemetery carries ethical weight – getting it ‘right’ matters. How might tragedy help us to illuminate the meaning, nature, and ethical significance of this work? This paper draws from a feminist reading of the Greek tragedy Antigone, via the theoretical work of Adriana Cavarero, to show what we can learn about the ethico-political significance of cemeterial work as an enactment of grievability. It showcases the power of tragedy through vignettes drawn from a research project on cemeterial work in the UK and Italy, offering valuable insight into the ethical challenges such work entails, as well as its ethical importance. Bringing the empirical and philosophical concerns of the paper together, the analysis shows how cemeterial work is simultaneously ‘dirty’ and meaningful, imbued with ethical responsibility. In so doing, the paper contributes to debates surrounding the relationship between tragedy and business ethics, while also providing insights into a socially and culturally significant yet under-researched type of work.
title_cn: 墓地工作的悲剧：探索城邦、亲属关系与族群之间的伦理
abstract_cn: 摘要 在墓地工作承载着伦理分量——做对的事情至关重要。悲剧如何帮助我们阐明这一工作的意义、性质和伦理重要性？本文借鉴了对希腊悲剧《安提戈涅》的女性主义解读，以及亚德里安娜·卡瓦雷罗的理论工作，以展示我们可以从中学到关于墓地工作作为悲伤表现的伦理政治重要性。通过来自对英国和意大利墓地工作研究项目的片段，文章展示了悲剧的力量，提供了对这项工作所涉及的伦理挑战以及其伦理重要性的宝贵见解。通过将实证与哲学关切结合，分析表明墓地工作既是“肮脏”的，又是有意义的，充满了伦理责任。由此，本文为围绕悲剧与商业伦理关系的讨论做出了贡献，同时也为一种社会和文化具有重要意义但研究不足的工作类型提供了见解。

title: Who Invests, Who Gets Funded: Gender and Racial Bias in LLM-Generated Investment Advice
abstract: Abstract Do large language models (LLMs) generate unbiased financial advice across investor and fund manager demographics? We develop a two-sided audit framework to evaluate demographic bias in LLM-generated investment advice and apply it to multiple large language models, with GPT-4 Turbo as the primary baseline. On the investor side, fund selections are similar across demographic groups and rely on financial criteria, but recommended investment amounts vary when investor names signal race or gender, despite identical age and income. On the fund manager side, capital allocations favor non-Black and male managers: racial disparities persist even under explicit disclosure, while gender-related differences are more pronounced under name-based cues. Bias patterns are qualitatively similar across models, with differences in magnitude between implicit and explicit demographic signaling. These results suggest that, even when LLMs incorporate core financial reasoning, demographic signals can affect allocation decisions, with effects that tend to be stronger under implicit signaling, potentially replicating existing market inequalities and raising concerns about impartiality in financial advising. The proposed audit framework provides a generalizable approach for identifying and evaluating demographic bias in AI-driven financial advisory systems.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 谁在投资，谁获得资金：大型语言模型生成的投资建议中的性别和种族偏见
abstract_cn: 摘要 大型语言模型（LLMs）是否在不同投资者和基金经理的人口统计特征下生成无偏见的财务建议？我们开发了一种双向审核框架来评估LLM生成的投资建议中的人口统计偏见，并将其应用于多个大型语言模型，以GPT-4 Turbo作为主要基准。在投资者方面，不同人口群体之间的基金选择相似，并依赖财务标准，但当投资者的名字暗示种族或性别时，推荐的投资金额会有所不同，尽管年龄和收入相同。在基金经理方面，资本分配倾向于非黑人和男性经理：即使在明确披露的情况下，种族差异仍然存在，而基于姓名的提示下性别相关的差异则更为显著。模型间的偏见模式在质上是相似的，但隐性和显性人口信号之间的差异在幅度上存在差异。这些结果表明，即使LLM融入核心财务推理，人口信号仍会影响分配决策，而在隐性信号下，这种影响往往更强，可能会复制现有的市场不平等，并引发对财务建议公正性的担忧。所提出的审核框架提供了一种可推广的方法，用于识别和评估由人工智能驱动的财务顾问系统中的人口统计偏见。

title: Platonic Business Ethics: A Survey of the Past and a Discussion of the Future
abstract: Abstract This paper discusses the achievements, the possibilities, and the challenges of Platonic business ethics. Through a systematic scoping review of 695 articles published in 13 business and management journals, it undertakes a knowledge-stock analysis of the almost complete range of Plato’s written texts that have influenced business ethicists and identifies five prominent ways in which they have applied his work. It finds that Plato’s Republic has had the most enduring influence throughout the history of the discipline and details how Plato’s work has been applied to ethical, philosophical, political, managerial, and methodological considerations. Through a brief reading of Protagoras , we highlight the ambiguity of Plato’s dialogical approach to contemporary business ethicists. We then close with Plato’s Ion , indicating difficulties in initiating such dialogues.
title_cn: 柏拉图式商业伦理：过去的回顾与未来的探讨
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文讨论了柏拉图商业伦理的成就、可能性和挑战。通过对13个商业与管理期刊中发表的695篇文章进行系统的范围审查，进行了一项知识库存分析，几乎涵盖了所有影响商业伦理学家的柏拉图著作，并识别出五种其作品被广泛应用的显著方式。研究发现，柏拉图的《理想国》在这一学科的历史中产生了最持久的影响，并详细说明了柏拉图的理论在伦理、哲学、政治、管理和方法论等方面的应用。通过简要阅读《普罗泰戈拉》，我们强调了柏拉图对当代商业伦理学者对话方式的模糊性。最后，通过柏拉图的《伊安》指出了开展此类对话的困难。

title: Why Do Companies Engage in the Creation of Private Governance? A Systematic Literature Review and Research Agenda
abstract: Abstract Many companies create private governance—collectively designed arrangements such as ecological or social standards that guide corporate conduct. Yet explanations for why firms engage in such governance creation remain fragmented across a wide range of studies and disciplines. This article synthesizes existing research into a comprehensive framework that integrates macro-level institutional conditions with meso- and micro-level drivers and barriers, thereby clarifying the antecedents of corporate engagement in the creation of private governance. We also develop a research agenda addressing these gaps within debates on political corporate social responsibility (PCSR). While PCSR articulates normative ideals of legitimate corporate engagement, empirical findings show governance creation often serves instrumental reasons. Our framework clarifies why and under what conditions firms engage in the creation of private governance.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 为什么企业参与私人治理的创建？系统文献综述与研究议程
abstract_cn: 摘要 许多公司创建私有治理——共同设计的安排，如指导企业行为的生态或社会标准。然而，关于企业为何参与此类治理创建的解释在众多研究和学科中仍然零散。本文综合现有研究，构建了一个综合框架，将宏观层面的制度条件与中观和微观层面的驱动因素及障碍结合起来，从而阐明企业参与私有治理创建的前因。此外，我们还制定了一个研究议程，以解决政治企业社会责任（PCSR）讨论中的这些空白。虽然PCSR阐明了合法企业参与的规范理想，但实证研究表明，治理创建往往服务于工具性原因。我们的框架澄清了企业在何种情况下及为何参与私有治理的创建。

title: Against Spiritual Leadership in (For-Profit) Organizations
abstract: Abstract Spiritual leadership has become a prominent approach within the family of horizontal and non-hierarchical leadership styles, aiming to integrate employees’ spiritual needs into organizational life. While existing literature often highlights benefits such as increased well-being, cooperation, and performance, this paper critically examines the ethical and conceptual implications of spiritual leadership in for-profit contexts. It argues that current models tend to emphasize the instrumental value of spirituality, using it as a means to align employees’ motivations with organizational goals, typically centered on productivity and profitability. Building on the philosophy of Gabriel Marcel, the paper contends that spirituality and transcendence inherently resist objectification and measurement, and their integration into the workplace should preserve their depth. Two core problems are identified: the alignment problem , in which spirituality is subordinated to organizational objectives; and the conceptual problem , where reductive definitions obscure its essential qualities. Ultimately, this paper suggests abandoning the leader–follower model when considering spirituality in for-profit organizations.
title_cn: 反对在（营利性）组织中的精神领导力
abstract_cn: 摘要 精神领导已成为一种重要的方法，属于水平和非等级领导风格的范畴，旨在将员工的精神需求融入组织生活中。尽管现有文献通常强调诸如提升福祉、促进合作和提高绩效等好处，但本文对精神领导在营利性环境中的伦理和概念影响进行了批判性审视。作者认为，当前的模型往往强调精神性在工具层面的价值，将其作为将员工动机与组织目标（通常以生产力和盈利能力为中心）对齐的手段。基于加布里埃尔·马尔塞尔的哲学，本文主张，精神性和超越性本质上抵制物化和量化，其在工作场所的整合应保留其深度。本文识别出两个核心问题：对齐问题，即精神性被置于组织目标之下；以及概念问题，即简化的定义模糊了其本质特征。最终，本文建议在考虑营利性组织中的精神性时，摒弃领导者-追随者模型。

title: Thinking-Being With a Garden: Developing Ecocentric Ethics for Sustainable Organising
abstract: Abstract In this paper, we turn to gardens to offer a new ethics of being with the world that can inform sustainable organising. For this, we develop an ecocentric ethics perspective informed by the writing of Karen Barad, in particular her notion of ‘agential cuts’. By reviewing gardening literatures, and exploring our embodied gardening practices, we attempt to ‘step out’ of institutionalised ways of thinking and working to reach for different embodied and relational ways of being with earth-others. We contribute to debates by: (a) tracing multispecies mutualities of ‘cutting-together apart’ within the gardens we tend, to show how such cutting can develop understandings of an entangled ethics in which human involvement can at times be peripheral; and, (b) showing how garden(ing)s can help enrich understandings of ‘ethico-onto-epistemologies’ by situating embodied practices of organising within planetary processes and rhythms which are variously consequential for sustaining forms of life. These contributions stemming from garden(ing)s can help to inform ecocentric thinking-being in business organisations by developing possibilities for (re)conceptualising: how businesses practices, and connected imaginaries, are entangled in creating conditions that can diminish and enhance earth-others existences; and, how the fluidities and temporalities of specifically located webs of life in which businesses activities are part necessitate sensitivities to working with unknowing.
topics: Environmental and Cultural Studies in Latin America and Beyond
title_cn: 与花园共思：为可持续组织发展生态中心伦理
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文探讨了园艺，以提供一种新的与世界共存的伦理观，进而为可持续组织提供启示。为此，我们基于Karen Barad的著作，特别是她的“代理切割”概念，发展了一种生态中心伦理视角。通过回顾园艺文献并探索我们具体的园艺实践，我们试图“走出”制度化的思维和工作方式，寻求与地球及其他生物的不同具体和关系性共存方式。我们的贡献体现在以下两个方面：(a) 在我们照料的花园中考察“共同切割”的多物种相互关系，以展示这样的切割如何发展出一种纠缠伦理的理解，其中人的参与有时可能是边缘化的；(b) 显示园艺如何有助于丰富对“伦理-存在-知识”之间关系的理解，通过将具体的组织实践置于行星过程和节奏中，从而展现它们在维持生命形式方面的多重影响。这些源于园艺的贡献可以帮助在商业组织中形成生态中心的思维与存在，开发出对商业实践及相关想象的重新概念化的可能性，揭示这些实践如何在创造影响地球及其他生物存在条件的过程中相互纠缠，以及商业活动所处的特定生命网络的流动性和时间性如何要求对未知的敏感性。

title: ESG Controversies and Non-Audit Service Fees: European Evidence
abstract: Lapses in environmental, social, and governance (ESG) conduct often manifest through controversies like environmental violations, social misconduct, or governance failures, creating reputational and informational risks for firms and their auditors. While many studies focus on how ESG performance influences audit and assurance outcomes, few examine how adverse ESG events, particularly controversies, shape auditor behavior and market pricing. This study examines whether such controversies affect non-audit services (NAS) pricing and explores how auditors incorporate ESG-related reputational risks into advisory engagements. Drawing on a panel of 4,552 firm-year observations from European listed firms between 2014 and 2023, ESG controversy data from Refinitiv Eikon are analyzed with two-way fixed-effects and instrumental variable (IV) estimations. The findings suggest that ESG controversies and NAS fees are positive and significantly correlated only for severe controversies, indicating that auditors selectively respond to material ethical risks. Supplementary analyses indicate that, in Europe, this relationship is not systematically conditioned by cross-country institutional strength or firm-level governance characteristics, suggesting their limited moderating role. The IV analysis reveals a weak instrumental relationship, implying the observed associations may partially reflect correlated omitted factors rather than definitive causal effects. Overall, the findings suggest ESG controversies have economic repercussions for firms through advisory cost adjustments, particularly when reputational risk is salient. The study enhances understanding of how auditors price ethical and reputational risks, contributing to ongoing debates regarding auditor independence, ESG accountability, and corporate ethics in assurance markets, while offering insights for regulators, managers, and auditors regarding pricing of ESG-related advisory risk.
title_cn: ESG争议与非审计服务费用：欧洲证据
abstract_cn: 环境、社会和治理（ESG）行为的失误常通过环境违规、社会不当行为或治理失败等争议表现出来，这给公司及其审计师带来了声誉和信息风险。虽然许多研究集中在ESG表现如何影响审计和保障结果，但很少有研究探讨不利的ESG事件，尤其是争议，如何形塑审计师行为和市场定价。本研究考察了此类争议是否影响非审计服务（NAS）的定价，并探讨审计师如何将与ESG相关的声誉风险纳入顾问工作中。该研究利用2014年至2023年间欧洲上市公司的4552个公司-年份观测数据，分析了来自Refinitiv Eikon的ESG争议数据，采用了双向固定效应和工具变量（IV）估计方法。研究结果表明，ESG争议与NAS费用之间仅在严重争议的情况下呈现出正相关且显著，这表明审计师对重大伦理风险的反应是有选择性的。补充分析表明，在欧洲，这一关系并未受到跨国制度强度或公司层面治理特征的系统性调节，暗示其调节作用有限。IV分析揭示了一个弱工具变量关系，这意味着观察到的关联可能部分反映了相关遗漏因素，而非明确的因果效应。总体而言，研究结果表明，ESG争议通过顾问成本调整对公司产生了经济影响，尤其是在声誉风险显著时。该研究增进了对审计师如何定价伦理和声誉风险的理解，贡献于有关审计师独立性、ESG问责制和企业伦理在保障市场中的持续讨论，同时为监管者、管理者和审计师在定价ESG相关顾问风险方面提供了洞见。

title: When are Customer Boycotts Permissible?
abstract: Abstract This paper examines ethical customer boycotts, instances where individuals choose to boycott for ethical reasons. By focusing on the commercial freedom of the customer, it offers a new framework for distinguishing between permissible and impermissible boycotts. It concludes that individual ethical boycotts are almost never morally impermissible. The scope of the paper is limited. It does not attempt to answer the important question of when an individual boycott decision is objectively good or bad. Rather, it attempts to answer the prior question of when a decision to boycott—made by someone who believes their decision is morally right—is doing something that is morally permissible . In defending this position, the paper distinguishes between “objective ought” and moral permissibility. The paper argues that focusing on the right of a consumer to choose is the best way to approach the question, “May I boycott this product?” The approach shifts the emphasis in the boycott debate from prevailing frameworks based on democratic values, intentional harm, and libertarianism, toward a customer’s right to choose. It proposes a cosmopolitan interpretation that relies on the default right of market participants to refrain from commercial exchanges except under extraordinary circumstances. Among other benefits, this approach addresses gaps in alternative accounts that overlook a significant portion of customer boycott decision-making. The paper explains why the threshold for boycott impermissibility is very high: (1) because any claim of impermissibility must overcome the default presumption of freedom in commercial exchange; (2) because an unusual “hard duty” follows from a determination of boycott impermissibility; (3) because a boycotter’s true intent is difficult to discern; and (4) because boycotts serve as alternatives to violence. The account offered here implies that even decisions to boycott that are objectively wrong may be morally permissible. Finally, the paper shows why certain kinds of anti-boycott laws threaten an individual’s moral right to boycott.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 消费者抵制在何种情况下是被允许的？
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文探讨了伦理客户抵制的情况，即个人出于伦理原因选择进行抵制的行为。通过聚焦于消费者的商业自由，本文提供了一个新的框架，用以区分可允许的抵制和不可允许的抵制。结论指出，个体的伦理抵制几乎在道德上总是被允许的。本文的范围较为有限，并未试图回答个人抵制决策在客观上何时是好的或坏的问题。而是试图回答一个优先的问题：由认为其决策在道德上是正当的人所作出的抵制决策，何时是在做一种道德上被允许的事情。为捍卫这一立场，本文区分了“客观应然”和道德许可性。论文认为，关注消费者选择的权利是探讨“我可以抵制这个产品吗？”这个问题的最佳方式。这种方法将抵制辩论的重点从基于民主价值观、故意伤害和自由主义的现有框架转向消费者的选择权。它提出了一种全球主义的解读，依赖于市场参与者在非常规情况下可以不进行商业交易的默认权利。除其他好处外，该方法还填补了替代解释中的空白，这些替代解释忽视了客户抵制决策过程中的重要部分。论文解释了为什么抵制不可许可的门槛非常高：（1）因为任何不可许可的声称都必须克服在商业交易中自由的默认假设；（2）因为抵制不可许可的判断之后会带来一种不寻常的“硬性义务”；（3）因为抵制者的真实意图往往难以识别；（4）因为抵制作为暴力的替代手段。这里提供的观点暗示，即使那些客观上错误的抵制决策，在道德上也可能是被允许的。最后，论文指出某些类型的反抵制法律如何威胁到个体的道德抵制权利。

title: Examining the Importance of Accountability as a Virtue
abstract: Abstract Given the continued number and impact of governance and accountability failures, improving accountability and accountability systems is receiving increased attention. Instead of improving accountability systems , we examine the role a virtue of accountability can play in developing accountable individuals , and we provide an integrated analysis of the virtue of accountability’s prominent role and place in moral relationships, moral theory, and moral action. Individuals with a virtue of accountability internalize accountability, voluntarily embrace moral obligations to others, and welcome being accountable. We posit that developing a virtue of accountability can help individuals resolve the tension between self-interested autonomy and others-interested accountability in moral relationships by providing them with a moral mindset to willingly use their autonomy to fulfill responsibilities to others accountably. We theoretically consider the importance of accountability as a moral virtue using Adam Smith’s moral principles and the concept of imago Dei . We conceptually examine the virtue of accountability’s role in and impact on moral action by integrating virtue ethics theory with models of moral action and theories of intrinsic motivation, and we consider implications of our work for research, education, and practice. Crucially, the virtue of accountability makes important contributions to the richness and depth of business and accounting ethics by bringing attention to the role of accountability and moral motivation.
title_cn: 探讨责任感作为一种美德的重要性
abstract_cn: 摘要 鉴于治理和问责失效的数量及其影响持续存在，改善问责机制和问责体系得到了越来越多的关注。本研究不是着眼于改善问责体系，而是探讨问责美德在培养负责任个体方面可能发挥的作用，并对问责美德在道德关系、道德理论和道德行动中的重要作用和地位进行综合分析。具有问责美德的个体能够内化问责，自觉承担对他人的道德义务，并乐于接受问责。我们认为，培养问责美德可以帮助个体解决道德关系中自我利益的自主性与关注他人的问责之间的紧张关系，因为这为他们提供了一种道德心态，使他们愿意利用自主性来履行对他人的责任。我们从理论上考察了问责作为一种道德美德的重要性，运用了亚当·史密斯的道德原则和“神之形象”（imago Dei）的概念。我们通过将美德伦理学理论与道德行动模型和内在动机理论相结合，概念性地探讨了问责美德在道德行动中的作用及其影响，并考虑了我们的研究对研究、教育和实践的启示。关键是，问责美德通过引起对问责和道德动机角色的关注，为商业和会计伦理的丰富性和深度作出了重要贡献。

title: Whose Justice? A Turn to Relational Equality from the Experiences of Ethno-Racially Marginalised Women in Australian Workplaces
abstract: Abstract This paper examines how ethno-racially marginalised women in Australian workplaces continue to be constrained by enduring organisational norms that privilege whiteness, masculinity, and Western/Anglo-cultural modes of participation. Further, we show how mainstream diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) initiatives reproduce exclusion and marginalisation in unintended and new ways by misrecognising or sidelining intersectional experiences. Through an intersectional reading of survey and interview data, we show how DEI initiatives frequently reflect narrow settings for equity that privilege dominant norms while rendering others invisible or “risky”. We engage with Elizabeth Anderson’s theory of relational equality to show that the shortcomings of these initiatives result not from idiosyncratic error or oversight but from the foundational logics that underpin them, including a business-case rationale and a default to distributive justice logics. We suggest that DEI should be reimagined as a practice of enabling equal participation, mutual recognition, and interpersonal justifications within organisational life. In doing so, the paper contributes both empirically and theoretically to current debates on workplace justice, intersectional equality, and the ethics of inclusion.
title_cn: 谁的正义？从在澳大利亚职场中经历的种族边缘化女性的视角转向关系平等
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文探讨了在澳大利亚职场中，民族种族边缘化的女性是如何继续受到持久的组织规范的制约，这些规范优先考虑白人、男性和西方/盎格鲁文化的参与模式。此外，我们还展示了主流的多样性、公平与包容（DEI）倡议是如何通过误识或边缘化交叉身份体验，以意想不到和新的方式重现排斥和边缘化现象。通过对调查和访谈数据的交叉阅读，我们显示出DEI倡议通常反映出狭隘的公平设定，优先考虑主导规范，而让其他规范变得隐形或“有风险”。我们借助伊丽莎白·安德森的关系平等理论，指出这些倡议的不足并非源于偶发的错误或疏漏，而是源于支撑其基础的逻辑，包括商业案例的合理性和对分配正义逻辑的默认。我们建议应将DEI重新构想为一种在组织生活中促进平等参与、相互认同和人际正当性的实践。通过这一手段，本文在实证和理论上为当前关于职场正义、交叉平等和包容伦理的讨论做出了贡献。

title: Certified Sustainability: Third-Party Certification of Sustainable Ventures and its Relationship to Venture Funding
abstract: Abstract This study explores how sustainability certifications help attract investor funding to sustainable ventures, depending on the venture’s stage at the time of certification. Sustainable ventures secure financing at every stage to build viable businesses and achieve ethical missions, such as addressing climate change and social inequalities. To signal their genuine commitment to sustainability efforts, these ventures seek third-party certifications. Research has investigated third-party certification as a means to reduce information asymmetries between ventures and investors. However, it has yielded ambiguous results regarding the financial implications of such certifications for sustainable ventures. In our study, we use propensity score matching on a sample of 748 certified and comparable non-certified sustainable ventures. We examine the role of sustainability certifications in attracting investor funding and the moderating role of venture stage at certification. Drawing on signaling theory, we show that the positive relationship between sustainability certification and funding weakens at later venture stages. Our findings highlight third-party sustainability certification as a key signal in venture financing, enabling sustainable ventures to prove the materiality of their sustainability efforts and increase funding. We thus advance the literature on business ethics and sustainable finance.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 认证可持续性：可持续企业的第三方认证及其与企业融资的关系
abstract_cn: 摘要 本研究探讨了可持续性认证如何帮助吸引投资者资金进入可持续企业，这取决于企业在认证时所处的阶段。可持续企业在每个阶段都需要融资，以建立可行的商业模式并实现诸如应对气候变化和社会不平等的伦理使命。为了向外界展示其对可持续性努力的真诚信念，这些企业寻求第三方认证。研究已经对第三方认证作为减少企业与投资者之间信息不对称的手段进行了探讨。然而，关于此类认证对可持续企业财务影响的研究结果却模糊不清。在本研究中，我们对748个认证企业和可比较的非认证可持续企业样本进行了倾向评分匹配。我们考察了可持续性认证在吸引投资者资金方面的作用，以及在认证时企业阶段的调节作用。借鉴信号理论，我们显示出可持续性认证与资金之间的积极关系在后期企业阶段会减弱。我们的研究结果突显了第三方可持续性认证在企业融资中作为一个关键信号的作用，使可持续企业能够证明其可持续性努力的实质性并增加融资。因此，我们推动了商业伦理和可持续金融领域的文献发展。

title: Games on Multiplex Networks
abstract: We develop a simple multilayer network model in which agents allocate effort across layers with heterogeneous structures, subject to an aggregate effort constraint. Incentives are shaped by agents’ network positions within each layer, and equilibrium behavior reflects both within- and cross-layer interactions. We analyze how shocks propagate through the network and characterize optimal targeting interventions. Our results show that effective policy design must account for effort allocation across layers. We also demonstrate that predictions from monolayer models can diverge sharply from those of multilayer models, underscoring the importance of accounting for network complexity in both empirical and policy analyses. (JEL C70, D78, D82, D85, H41, Z13)
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 多重网络上的游戏
abstract_cn: 我们构建了一个简单的多层网络模型，其中代理人在异质结构的各层之间分配努力，受到总努力约束的限制。激励因素由代理人在每一层中的网络位置决定，均衡行为反映了层内和层间的相互作用。我们分析了冲击如何在网络中传播，并界定了最佳的针对性干预措施。我们的研究结果表明，有效的政策设计必须考虑跨层的努力分配。我们还展示了单层模型的预测可能与多层模型的结果大相径庭，强调了在实证和政策分析中考虑网络复杂性的重要性。（JEL C70, D78, D82, D85, H41, Z13）

title: Similarity of Information and Collective Action
abstract: We study a canonical collective action game with incomplete information. Individuals attempt to coordinate to achieve a shared goal, while also facing a temptation to free-ride. More similar information can help them coordinate, but it can also exacerbate free-riding. Our main result shows that more similar information facilitates (impedes) achieving the common goal when it is sufficiently challenging (easy). We apply this insight to show why less powerful authoritarian governments may face larger protests if they restrict press freedom, when committee diversity is beneficial in costly voting, and when a more diverse community contributes more to public good provision. (JEL C71, D71, D72, D81, D82, D83, H41)
title_cn: 信息相似性与集体行动
abstract_cn: 我们研究一个具有不完全信息的经典集体行动博弈。个体试图协调以实现共同目标，同时也面临着搭便车的诱惑。更相似的信息可以帮助他们协调，但也可能加剧搭便车现象。我们的主要结果表明，当共同目标足够具有挑战性（简单）时，更相似的信息有助于（阻碍）实现该目标。我们将这一见解应用于说明，为什么较不强大的威权政府在限制新闻自由时可能面临更大规模的抗议，当委员会多样性在有成本的投票中是有利的，以及当一个更具多样性的社区在公共物品提供中贡献更多时。（JEL C71，D71，D72，D81，D82，D83，H41）

title: Market Power and Capital Constraints
abstract: We explore how traders’ equity capitalization influences asset prices in a framework that accounts for market power. In our model, traders with capital constraints engage in transactions in an imperfectly competitive market. We demonstrate that looser capital constraints elevate both asset prices and price impact, the latter diminishing market liquidity. Using Canadian Treasury auction data, we illustrate how to apply our model to quantify these effects. We estimate the shadow costs of capital constraints by leveraging a temporary policy exemption during 2020–2021. We show that while these constraints are only infrequently binding, their relative impact when activated can be sizable. (JEL E63, G12, G14, G23, G41, L13)
title_cn: 市场势力与资本约束
abstract_cn: 我们探讨了交易者的股本资本化如何在考虑市场力量的框架中影响资产价格。在我们的模型中，受到资本约束的交易者在一个不完全竞争的市场中进行交易。我们表明，宽松的资本约束会抬升资产价格和价格影响，后者会降低市场流动性。通过使用加拿大国债拍卖数据，我们展示了如何应用我们的模型来量化这些效应。我们通过利用2020-2021年期间的一项临时政策豁免来估计资本约束的隐性成本。我们显示，尽管这些约束很少是约束性的，但在激活时，它们的相对影响可能会很大。（JEL E63, G12, G14, G23, G41, L13）

title: Negative Control Falsification Tests for Instrumental Variable Designs
abstract: The validity of instrumental variable (IV) designs is typically tested using two types of falsification tests. We characterize these tests as conditional independence tests between negative control variables—proxies for unobserved variables posing a threat to the identification—and the IV or the outcome. We describe the conditions variables must satisfy in order to serve as negative controls. We show these falsification tests examine not only independence and the exclusion restriction but also functional form assumptions. Our analysis reveals conventional applications of these tests may flag problems even in valid IV designs. We offer implementation guidance to address these issues. (JEL C12, C18, C26, C52)
title_cn: 工具变量设计中的负控制伪造测试
abstract_cn: 工具变量（IV）设计的有效性通常通过两种类型的伪造测试进行检验。我们将这些测试表征为在负控制变量——即代表未观察到的对识别构成威胁的变量的代理——与IV或结果之间的条件独立性测试。我们描述了变量必须满足的条件，以便作为负控制变量。我们的研究表明，这些伪造测试不仅检验独立性和排除限制，还检验功能形式假设。我们的分析揭示，常规应用这些测试可能会在有效的IV设计中标记出问题。我们提供了实施指导以解决这些问题。（JEL C12, C18, C26, C52）

title: Making Bricks from Straw: Resources and Productivity in Health Care
abstract: Why do health facilities in developing countries do so poorly? This paper examines the role of financial constraints. I describe an experiment in which we surprised health workers in randomly selected public health clinics in Nigeria with a N600,000 grant paid out in installments over one year. Its administration was left entirely to health workers. I show that the award led to large productivity gains. Using expenditure data combined with novel textual data I provide an explanation for these effects. I show that the award increased investments in physical and human capital, led to lower prices for patients and inspired health workers to do better.
title_cn: 用稻草制造砖块：医疗保健中的资源与生产力
abstract_cn: 为什么发展中国家的卫生设施表现如此不佳？本文探讨了财务约束的作用。我描述了一个实验，我们在尼日利亚随机选择的公共卫生诊所中，给卫生工作者惊喜地发放了一笔60万奈拉的补助金，该补助金将在一年内分期支付。补助金的管理完全由卫生工作者自行决定。我展示了这一奖励带来了显著的生产力提升。利用支出数据结合新颖的文本数据，我为这些效果提供了解释。研究表明，该奖励促使对物质和人力资本的投资增加，患者的医疗费用降低，同时激励卫生工作者提高工作表现。

title: Spillovers in State Capacity Building: Evidence from the Digitization of Land Records in Pakistan
abstract: Digitization reforms have been hailed as an effective way of strengthening state capacity. However, digitization can also fundamentally reshape the organization of bureaucracies. Using a unique administrative dataset on agricultural taxation and surveys of local bureaucrats from Punjab, Pakistan, we show that digitization reforms can have unintended consequences for state capacity. We exploit the staggered rollout of the digitization of land records in Punjab to show that digitization had a negative effect on tax collection. The fall in taxes was not due to a decrease in the tax base. Instead, digitization affected the bureaucrats’ capacity to collect taxes. (JEL D73, H11, H71, O12, O17)
title_cn: 国家能力建设中的溢出效应：来自巴基斯坦土地记录数字化的证据
abstract_cn: 数字化改革被誉为增强国家能力的有效途径。然而，数字化也可能从根本上重塑官僚机构的组织。通过使用来自巴基斯坦旁遮普省有关农业征税的独特管理数据集和当地官僚的调查，我们表明数字化改革可能对国家能力产生意想不到的后果。我们利用旁遮普省土地登记数字化的分阶段实施来展示数字化对税收征 collecte 产生了负面影响。税收的下降并不是由于税基的减少。相反，数字化影响了官僚征税的能力。（JEL D73, H11, H71, O12, O17）

title: A Long and a Short Leg Make for a Wobbly Equilibrium
abstract: We provide a model to explain how the interaction between the spot and lending markets for stocks can lead to abrupt changes in short selling activity. Furthermore, rational short sellers may choose to abandon the market even as mispricing widens. We document empirically that the dynamics of short selling are fat tailed and subject to abrupt changes, especially for the stocks that the model identifies as susceptible to such dynamics. (JEL G11, G12, G14, G41)
topics: Complex Systems and Time Series Analysis
title_cn: 长腿与短腿构成了一个不稳定的平衡
abstract_cn: 我们提供了一个模型，以解释股票现货市场和借贷市场之间的互动如何导致短期卖空活动的突然变化。此外，理性的短期卖空者可能会选择退出市场，即使在失真加大的情况下。我们实证记录到，卖空动态具有厚尾特性，并且容易发生突变，特别是对于模型识别出的易受此类动态影响的股票。 （JEL G11, G12, G14, G41）

title: Abundance from Abroad: Migrant Income and Long-Run Economic Development
abstract: We study how international migrant income prospects affect long-run development in origin areas. We leverage the 1997 Asian Financial Crisis exchange rate shocks in a shift-share identification strategy across Philippine provinces. Initial migrant income shocks are magnified six-fold over time, increasing domestic income, education levels, migrant skills, and high-skilled migration. Remarkably, 74.9 percent of long-run income gains come from domestic rather than migrant income. Trade driven impacts of exchange rate shocks are orthogonal to effects via migrant income. A structural model reveals that 19.7 percent of long-run income gains stem from educational investments. International migration fosters broad economic development in origin communities. (JEL F22, F31, G01, J24, J82, O15, O16)
title_cn: 来自海外的丰盈：移民收入与长期经济发展
abstract_cn: 我们研究国际移民收入前景如何影响出发地区的长期发展。我们利用1997年亚洲金融危机的汇率冲击，通过一种转移份额识别策略分析菲律宾各省的情况。初始的移民收入冲击在时间上放大了六倍，增加了国内收入、教育水平、移民技能及高技能移民。值得注意的是，74.9%的长期收入增长来自于国内收入，而非移民收入。汇率冲击的贸易驱动影响与通过移民收入所带来的影响是正交的。结构模型揭示，19.7%的长期收入增长源于教育投资。国际移民促进了出发社区的广泛经济发展。（JEL F22, F31, G01, J24, J82, O15, O16）

title: Robust Misspecified Models
abstract: This paper studies which misspecified models are likely to persist when decision-makers compare them with competing models. The main result characterizes such models based on two features that can be derived from primitives: The model’s asymptotic accuracy in predicting the equilibrium distribution of observed outcomes and the “tightness” of the prior around such equilibria. Misspecified models can be robust, persisting against any arbitrary competing model—including the true model—despite decision-makers observing an infinite amount of data. Moreover, simple misspecified models equipped with entrenched priors can be more robust than complex correctly specified models. (JEL C11, C52, D11, L82)
title_cn: 鲁棒性错设模型
abstract_cn: 本文研究了在决策者将错误设定的模型与竞争模型进行比较时，哪些错误设定的模型可能会持续存在。主要结果基于两个可以从基本要素推导出的特征来表征这些模型：模型在预测观察结果的均衡分布时的渐近精确性以及围绕这些均衡的先验的“紧张程度”。错误设定的模型可以是鲁棒的，能够抵御任何任意的竞争模型——包括真实模型——尽管决策者观察到无限的数据。此外，配备有根深蒂固的先验的简单错误设定模型可能比复杂的正确设定模型更具鲁棒性。（JEL C11, C52, D11, L82）

title: Real Credit Cycles
abstract: We embed diagnostic expectations in a workhorse neoclassical model with heterogeneous firms and risky debt. A realistic degree of overreaction estimated from US firms’ earnings forecasts generates realistic credit cycles. Good times produce economic and financial fragility, predicting future disappointment of expectations, low bond returns, and investment declines. To generate the size of spread increases observed during 2007–2009, the model requires only moderate negative shocks. Diagnostic expectations offer a realistic, parsimonious way to produce financial reversals in business cycle models. (JEL D84, E13, E22, E32, E44, G12, G32)
topics: Italy: Economic History and Contemporary Issues
title_cn: 真实信用周期
abstract_cn: 我们在一个包含异质企业和高风险债务的基础新古典模型中嵌入了诊断期望。从美国公司的盈利预测中估计出的现实程度的过度反应会产生现实的信用周期。良好的经济时期会导致经济和金融脆弱性，预测未来期望的失望、低债券回报和投资下降。为了生成2007-2009年观察到的利差增长幅度，该模型仅需适度的负冲击。诊断期望为在商业周期模型中产生金融逆转提供了一种现实且简约的方法。 (JEL D84, E13, E22, E32, E44, G12, G32)

title: The Price of War
abstract: We assemble a new dataset spanning 150 years and 60 countries to study the economic toll of war. A war of average intensity is associated with an output drop of close to 10 percent in the war-site economy, while consumer prices rise by approximately 20 percent. The capital stock, total factor productivity, and equity returns all decline sharply. The economic ramifications of war are not confined to the war site. The evidence points to adverse economic outcomes in other belligerent and third-party countries if they are exposed to the war site through trade linkages or share a common border. (JEL D74, E23, E32, F43, F51, N40)
title_cn: 战争的代价
abstract_cn: 我们汇编了一个涵盖150年和60个国家的新数据集，以研究战争的经济代价。平均强度的战争与战争发生地区经济近10%的产出下降相关，同时消费者价格大约上涨20%。资本存量、全要素生产率和股票收益率均大幅下降。战争的经济影响并不仅限于战争发生地点。证据表明，如果其他交战国或第三方国家通过贸易联系暴露于战争区域，或与战争区域共享共同边界，它们也会出现不利的经济结果。（JEL D74, E23, E32, F43, F51, N40）

title: Sequential Cursed Equilibrium
abstract: We propose an extensive-form solution concept, with players who neglect information from hypothetical events but make inferences from observed events. Our concept modifies cursed equilibrium (Eyster and Rabin 2005) and allows that players can be cursed about endogenous information. (JEL C73, D44, D71, D81, D83, D91)
title_cn: 顺序诅咒均衡
abstract_cn: 我们提出了一种扩展形式的解概念，其中玩家忽略假设事件的信息，但会根据观察到的事件进行推断。我们的概念修改了被诅咒的均衡（Eyster和Rabin 2005），并允许玩家对内生信息产生被诅咒的判断。（JEL C73, D44, D71, D81, D83, D91）

title: Temporary Layoffs, Loss-of-Recall, and Cyclical Unemployment Dynamics
abstract: We revisit the role of temporary layoffs in the business cycle. While some have emphasized a stabilizing effect due to recall hiring, we quantify from the data an important countercyclical destabilizing effect due to “loss-of-recall,” whereby workers in temporary-layoff unemployment lose their job permanently. We develop a quantitative model allowing for endogenous flows of workers across employment and both temporary-layoff and jobless unemployment. The model captures both pre- and post-pandemic unemployment dynamics, including the contractionary role of loss-of-recall. We use our structural model to show that the Paycheck Protection Program generated sizable employment gains, in part by significantly reducing loss-of-recall. (JEL E24, E32, I12, J41, J63, J64)
topics: Labor market dynamics and wage inequality
title_cn: 临时裁员、失去召回权与周期性失业动态
abstract_cn: 我们重新审视了临时裁员在经济周期中的作用。虽然一些研究强调了由于重新雇佣所带来的稳定效应，但我们的数据定量分析显示了由于“失去重新雇佣机会”而产生的一个重要的反周期不稳定效应，即临时裁员失业的工人永久性失去工作。我们开发了一个定量模型，允许在就业状态以及临时裁员和失业之间进行内生的劳动流动。该模型捕捉了疫情前后失业动态的变化，包括失去重新雇佣机会的收缩作用。我们利用结构模型证明，薪酬保护计划产生了可观的就业增长，部分原因是显著减少了失去重新雇佣机会的情况。(JEL E24, E32, I12, J41, J63, J64)

title: Zero-Sum Thinking and the Roots of US Political Differences
abstract: We investigate the origins and implications of zero-sum thinking: the belief that gains for one individual or group tend to come at the cost of others. Using a new survey of 20,400 US residents, we measure zero-sum thinking, political preferences, policy views, and a rich array of ancestral information spanning four generations. We find that a more zero-sum mindset is strongly associated with more support for government redistribution, race- and gender-based affirmative action, and more restrictive immigration policies. Zero-sum thinking can be traced back to the experiences of both the individual and their ancestors, encompassing factors such as the degree of intergenerational upward mobility they experienced, whether they immigrated to the United States or lived in a location with more immigrants, and whether they were enslaved or lived in a location with more enslavement. (JEL C83, D72, D91, H23, J15, J16, Z13)
title_cn: 零和思维与美国政治差异的根源
abstract_cn: 我们研究了零和思维的起源及其影响：即一个个体或群体的收益往往是以其他人的损失为代价的信念。通过对20,400名美国居民进行的新调查，我们测量了零和思维、政治偏好、政策观点以及跨越四代的丰富祖先信息。我们发现，更倾向于零和思维的心态与对政府再分配、基于种族和性别的 affirmative action 以及更严格的移民政策的支持程度显著相关。零和思维可以追溯到个体及其祖先的经历，涵盖了他们所经历的代际向上流动的程度、是否移民到美国或生活在移民较多的地区，以及他们是否曾经遭受奴役或生活在奴役现象更为普遍的地区等因素。 (JEL C83, D72, D91, H23, J15, J16, Z13)

title: Equal Pay for Similar Work
abstract: Equal pay laws increasingly require that workers with different group identities doing “similar” work are paid equal wages within firm. We study such “equal pay for similar work” (EPSW) policies theoretically and test our models’ predictions empirically using evidence from a 2009 gender-based Chilean EPSW. Under EPSW, firms segregate their workforce by gender. When there are more men than women in a labor market, EPSW increases the gender wage gap. (JEL J16, J31, J38, K31, O15)
topics: Labor market dynamics and wage inequality
title_cn: 相似工作同酬
abstract_cn: 平等薪酬法日益要求在同一公司中，不同群体身份的员工在从事“相似”工作的情况下获得相同的工资。我们从理论上研究了这种“相似工作平等薪酬”（EPSW）政策，并利用2009年基于性别的智利EPSW的证据对我们的模型预测进行了实证检验。在EPSW下，公司按性别对员工进行隔离。当劳动力市场中男性人数多于女性时，EPSW会加大性别工资差距。（JEL J16, J31, J38, K31, O15）

title: Work from Home and the Office Real Estate Apocalypse
abstract: We show remote work led to large drops in lease revenues, occupancy, and market rents in the commercial office sector. We revalue New York City office buildings, taking into account both the cash flow and discount rate implications of these shocks, and find a 46 percent decline in long-run value. For all US office markets combined, we find a $556.8 billion value destruction. Higher-quality buildings were buffered against these trends due to a flight to quality, while lower-quality offices are at risk of becoming a stranded asset. These valuation changes have repercussions for financial stability and local public finances. (JEL E31, E32, G12, J22, M51, R33)
title_cn: 居家办公与办公房地产的末日危机
abstract_cn: 我们展示了远程工作导致商业办公领域的租赁收入、入住率和市场租金大幅下降。我们重新评估了纽约市的办公楼，考虑了这些冲击对现金流和贴现率的影响，发现长期价值下降了46%。对于整个美国办公市场，我们发现价值损失达5568亿美元。由于高品质建筑受到“优质逃逸”的影响，对这些趋势有一定的缓冲，而低品质办公楼则面临成为被遗弃资产的风险。这些估值变化对金融稳定和地方公共财政产生了深远的影响。(JEL E31, E32, G12, J22, M51, R33)

title: “Potential” and the Gender Promotion Gap
abstract: We show that subjective assessments of employee “potential” contribute to gender gaps in promotion and pay. Using data on 29,809 management-track employees from a large retail chain, we find that women receive substantially lower potential ratings despite receiving higher performance ratings. Differences in potential ratings account for approximately half of the gender promotion gap. Women’s lower potential ratings do not reflect accurate forecasts of future performance: Women subsequently outperform male colleagues, both on average and on the margin of promotion. We highlight two mechanisms driving the gender potential gap: strategic retention and stereotyping. (JEL J16, J31, J71, L81, M12, M51)
title_cn: “潜力”与性别晋升差距
abstract_cn: 我们表明，对于员工“潜力”的主观评估导致了晋升和薪酬中的性别差距。根据来自一家大型零售连锁店的29,809名管理层候选员工的数据，我们发现女性尽管获得了更高的绩效评分，却仍然得到显著较低的潜力评估。潜力评估的差异大约解释了性别晋升差距的一半。女性较低的潜力评分并不反映对未来表现的准确预测：女性随后在平均水平和晋升边际上都优于男性同事。我们强调了推动性别潜力差距的两种机制：战略性留用和刻板印象。（JEL J16, J31, J71, L81, M12, M51）

title: Evaluating the Impact of Urban Transit Infrastructure: Evidence from Bogotá’s TransMilenio
abstract: This paper estimates the effects of improving public transit infrastructure on city structure and welfare. It develops a quantitative urban model with multiple worker groups and transit modes, and derives a special case yielding sufficient statistics for aggregate welfare in a broad class of models. The paper estimates reduced-form elasticities to implement the approach using data spanning construction of the world’s largest Bus Rapid Transit system in Bogotá, Colombia. This class of models explains observed adjustments in economic activity. Standard value-of-time calculations capture only 52 percent of welfare gains. Accounting for reallocation and general equilibrium effects, distributional impacts are modest. (JEL H76, L92, L98, O18, R42, R53)
title_cn: 评估城市交通基础设施的影响：来自波哥大的TransMilenio的证据
abstract_cn: 本文估计了改善公共交通基础设施对城市结构和福利的影响。它开发了一个包含多个工人群体和交通模式的定量城市模型，并推导出一个特殊情况，为广泛类别模型中的整体福利提供了充分统计量。本文利用覆盖世界上最大的快速公交系统建设的数据，估计了简化形式的弹性，以实施该方法。该类模型解释了经济活动的观察调整。标准的时间价值计算仅捕捉到福利增益的52%。考虑到资源重新配置和一般均衡效应，分配影响是适度的。（JEL H76, L92, L98, O18, R42, R53）

title: Financial Frictions: Micro versus Macro Volatility
abstract: We argue that consumer credit spreads matter for household choices and that time-varying spreads have important distributional consequences. Studying Danish household data, we show that consumer credit spreads have heterogeneous impact on asset dynamics and consumption choices across the wealth distribution and that time-varying spreads induce a countercyclical marginal propensity to consume. We study a HANK model where banks provide consumer credit and corporate loans. Through countercyclical credit spreads, frictional finance amplifies aggregate shocks and induces consumption inequality. Economies with less leveraged banks experience reduced aggregate volatility but may face higher volatility and lower welfare at the household level. (JEL D12, D31, E12, E21, E32, E52, G51)
topics: Italy: Economic History and Contemporary Issues
title_cn: 金融摩擦：微观与宏观波动性
abstract_cn: 我们认为消费者信贷利差对家庭选择具有重要影响，并且时间变化的利差带来了重要的分配后果。通过研究丹麦家庭数据，我们发现消费者信贷利差在财富分配中对资产动态和消费选择的影响存在异质性，并且时间变化的利差导致了反周期的边际消费倾向。我们研究了一个家庭-银行-国家（HANK）模型，其中银行提供消费者信贷和企业贷款。通过反周期的信贷利差，摩擦性金融放大了总量冲击，并导致消费不平等。资本杠杆较低的银行所在的经济体经历了较小的总量波动，但在家庭层面可能面临更高的波动和更低的福利。 (JEL D12, D31, E12, E21, E32, E52, G51)

title: Competition under Incomplete Contracts and the Design of Procurement Policies
abstract: We study the effects of intensifying competition for contracts in the context of US Defense procurement. Leveraging a discontinuous regulation that mandates agencies to publicize certain contract opportunities, we document that expanding the set of bidders reduces award prices but deteriorates post-award performance in terms of cost overruns and delays. We develop and estimate an auction model with endogenous entry and stochastic execution performance, in which the buyer endogenously chooses the intensity of competition. Model estimates indicate substantial heterogeneity in performance across contractors and show that simple adjustments to the current regulation could provide significant savings in procurement spending.
