(JEL D22, D24, D44, D82, D86, H56, H57)
title_cn: 不完全合同下的竞争与采购政策的设计
abstract_cn: 我们研究了在美国国防采购背景下，合同竞争加剧的影响。利用一项不连续的法规，该法规要求机构公开某些合同机会，我们记录到，扩大投标者的范围虽然降低了授标价格，但在成本超支和延误方面却恶化了授标后的表现。我们开发并估计了一个具有内生性进入和随机执行表现的拍卖模型，在该模型中，买方内生地选择竞争的强度。模型估计表明，承包商之间的表现存在显著异质性，并且简单调整当前法规可能在采购支出上带来显著节省。（JEL D22, D24, D44, D82, D86, H56, H57）

title: A Theory of Supply Function Choice and Aggregate Supply
abstract: Modern theories of aggregate supply are built on the foundation that firms set prices and commit to producing whatever the market demands. We remove this strategic restriction and allow firms to choose supply functions, mappings that describe the prices charged at each quantity of production. Theoretically, we characterize firms’ optimal supply function choices in general equilibrium and study the resulting implications for aggregate supply. Aggregate supply flattens under lower inflation uncertainty, higher idiosyncratic demand uncertainty, and less elastic demand. Quantitatively, our theory can rationalize the flattening of aggregate supply during the Great Moderation and steepening during the 1970s and 2020s. (JEL D21, D43, E13, E23, E31, E32)
title_cn: 供应函数选择及总供给理论
abstract_cn: 现代的总供给理论建立在企业设定价格并承诺生产市场所需产品的基础上。我们去除了这一战略限制，允许企业选择供给函数，即描述每种生产数量下所收取价格的映射。理论上，我们在一般均衡中刻画了企业的最优供给函数选择，并研究了由此对总供给的影响。在较低的通货膨胀不确定性、更高的个体需求不确定性和需求弹性较低的情况下，总供给趋于平坦。从定量上看，我们的理论可以解释在“大 moderation”期间总供给的平坦化，以及在1970年代和2020年代的陡峭化现象。（JEL D21, D43, E13, E23, E31, E32）

title: Raising the Stakes: Physician Facility Investments and Provider Agency
abstract: Principal-agent problems often extend beyond what can be directly addressed through conventional incentive arrangements. We examine a context where physicians are likely under-incentivized to minimize total medical costs until their private financial interests align with those of patients. Leveraging novel data on physician ownership of ambulatory surgery centers——that is, same-day facilities——we show that these equity holdings cause a substitution away from higher cost, rival settings that lowers Medicare spending by 10–40 percent per physician. We find no clear evidence of perverse behavior following these investments. Instead, our findings demonstrate how entrepreneurial activity can indirectly limit principal-agent problems and improve efficiency. (JEL D82, D91, G51, I11, I18, L84)
title_cn: 提高赌注：医生设施投资与提供者代理性
abstract_cn: 代理问题往往超出了常规激励安排所能直接解决的范围。我们考察了一个背景，即医生在私人经济利益与患者利益未能一致之前，往往未能获得足够的激励去减少医疗总成本。利用关于医生拥有门诊手术中心（即同日手术设施）的新数据，我们发现这些股权持有促使医生减少在更高成本竞争环境中的操作，从而使每位医生的医疗保险支出降低10%至40%。我们没有发现投资后出现不当行为的明确证据。相反，我们的研究结果表明，创业活动如何间接限制代理问题并提高效率。（JEL D82, D91, G51, I11, I18, L84）

title: Consumer Credit and the Incidence of Tariffs: Evidence from the Auto Industry
abstract: Captive finance subsidiaries create a channel for trade policy to affect consumer credit. Examining the impact of the Trump administration’s metal tariffs on captive automobile lenders, we find that consumers received higher interest rates from captive lenders after the tariffs relative to unaffected noncaptive lenders. Further, we document a disparate impact on low-income borrowers and in areas with less lending competition. Our results suggest that tariffs may impact not only the price of goods but also the financing terms of purchases. Thus, focusing solely on directly affected product prices may underestimate tariff pass-through significantly. (JEL F13, F14, G21, L22, L61, L62)
title_cn: 消费者信贷与关税发生率：来自汽车行业的证据
abstract_cn: 被控股金融子公司创造了一条贸易政策影响消费者信贷的渠道。我们研究了特朗普政府对金属加征关税对汽车控股贷款机构的影响，发现消费者在关税实施后从控股贷款机构获得的利率高于未受影响的非控股贷款机构。此外，我们记录了低收入借款人和竞争较少地区受到的差异性影响。我们的结果表明，关税可能不仅影响商品价格，还影响购买的融资条款。因此，单纯关注直接受影响的产品价格可能会显著低估关税传递的影响。（JEL F13, F14, G21, L22, L61, L62）

title: Gender Differences in Economics Seminars
abstract: We assess whether men and women are treated differently when presenting their economics research. We collected data across thousands of seminars, job market talks, and conference presentations, leveraging human judgment and audio-processing algorithms to measure the number, tone, and type of interruptions. Within a seminar series, women are interrupted more than men. This holds when controlling for characteristics of the presenter, paper, and audience. Interruptions that are negative in tenor or tone or cut off the presenter mid-sentence increase for women presenters. We also find greater engagement of female audience members with female presenters, suggesting a potential role model effect. (JEL A11, C45, J16, J44)
title_cn: 经济研讨会中的性别差异
abstract_cn: 我们评估男性和女性在展示其经济研究时是否受到不同待遇。我们收集了数千个研讨会、求职演讲和会议报告的数据，利用人类判断和音频处理算法来测量中断的数量、语气和类型。在研讨会系列中，女性的被中断次数多于男性。即使控制了演讲者、论文和观众的特征，这一现象依然成立。对女性演讲者而言，消极情绪或语调的中断，或在演讲者还未说完的情况下被打断的情况也有所增加。我们还发现女性观众在与女性演讲者互动时表现出更大的参与度，这暗示了潜在的榜样效应。(JEL A11, C45, J16, J44)

title: Take the Goods and Run: Contracting Frictions and Market Power in Supply Chains
abstract: This paper studies the efficiency of self-enforced relational agreements, a common solution to contracting frictions, when sellers have market power and contracts cannot be externally enforced. To this end, I develop a dynamic contracting model with limited enforcement in which buyers can default on their trade credit debt and estimate it using a novel dataset from the Ecuadorian manufacturing supply chain. The key empirical finding is that bilateral trade is inefficiently low in early periods of the relationship, but converges toward efficiency over time, despite sellers’ market power. Counterfactual simulations imply that both market power and enforcement contribute to inefficiencies in trade. (JEL D86, G32, K12, L14, L60, O14)
title_cn: 拿了货就跑：供应链中的契约摩擦与市场权力
abstract_cn: 本文研究了自我执行的关系协议的效率，这是一种常见的解决合约摩擦的方案，特别是在卖方拥有市场权力且合同无法得到外部强制执行的情况下。为此，我建立了一个具有有限执行力的动态合约模型，在该模型中，买方可以违约其贸易信用债务，并使用来自厄瓜多尔制造业供应链的新颖数据集进行估计。关键的实证发现是，在关系的早期阶段，双边贸易效率低下，但随着时间的推移趋向于效率，尽管卖方拥有市场权力。反事实模拟表明，市场权力和执行力都对贸易中的低效率产生了影响。(JEL D86, G32, K12, L14, L60, O14)

title: What makes an internationalizing firm entrepreneurial?
abstract: Abstract Zahra et al. (2024) argue that prior research has insufficient understanding of the entrepreneurial nature of internationalization. To address this, they integrate theories from management and international business to develop a firm-level typology that incorporates (1) the degree of radicalness of the firm’s entrepreneurial behavior and (2) the firm’s level of foreign market commitment. We advance these efforts by proposing that, to understand what makes an internationalizing firm entrepreneurial, researchers will also benefit from direct insights from entrepreneurship research. We retain Zahra et al.’s (2024) behavioral focus in our arguments but shift attention to the individuals that guide the firm’s pursuit of international opportunity, regardless of whether the firm is a new venture or an MNE. We also argue that, when compared to typologies, a process-based perspective is better suited to both differentiating firms and to understanding and explaining the dynamic nature of entrepreneurial internationalization behavior and outcomes.
title_cn: 什么使得一个国际化企业具有创业精神?
abstract_cn: 摘要 Zahra等人（2024）认为，以往研究对国际化的创业特性理解不足。为了解决这一问题，他们整合了管理学和国际商业的理论，提出了一个企业层面的分类体系，该体系包括（1）企业创业行为的激进程度和（2）企业对外国市场的承诺水平。我们进一步推进这一研究，提出为了理解国际化企业的创业特质，研究者还能从创业研究中获得直接的见解。我们在论述中保留了Zahra等人（2024）的行为焦点，但将注意力转向引导企业追求国际机会的个人，无论该企业是新创公司还是跨国企业（MNE）。我们还认为，与分类体系相比，基于过程的视角更适合于区分企业，以及理解和解释创业国际化行为与结果的动态特性。

title: Guilty as charged? Reassessing the problem of single-country samples in cultural distance studies
abstract: Abstract Concerns have been raised about the use of single host- or home-country samples in analyzing the effects of cultural distance (CD). That is, the estimated effects of CD may be confounded with those of the underlying cultural dimensions or other contextual factors correlated with CD. This study reassesses the risk of confounding when using single-country samples through simulation analyses conducted under various conditions, including different sample sizes and structures, within- and between-country variances, and analysis methods. The results indicate that when other cultural or contextual variables related to the outcome are also included and multilevel modeling is applied, the risk of confounding is not significant across diverse settings. The problem of confounding becomes significant only when using ordinary least squares, which does not take into account the potential nonindependence of observations in hierarchical data. However, in multilevel analyses using single-country samples, statistical power may become insufficient when controlling for cultural variables correlated with CD, particularly when the effect size of CD is small. To address this issue, we present a statistical technique that researchers can use to identify potential confounders and provide guidelines on the sample size required to maintain adequate power.
title_cn: 被指控有罪？重新评估文化距离研究中的单一国家样本问题
abstract_cn: 摘要 有关使用单一主机或本国样本分析文化距离（CD）影响的问题引发了关注。也就是说，CD的估计效应可能与基础文化维度或其他与CD相关的背景因素混淆。本研究通过在不同条件下进行模拟分析，重新评估使用单国样本时混淆风险，包括不同的样本大小和结构、国家内外的方差以及分析方法。结果表明，当也考虑其他与结果相关的文化或背景变量并应用多层次建模时，混淆风险在各种环境中都不显著。混淆问题在使用普通最小二乘法时变得显著，因为该方法未考虑层次数据中观察值的潜在非独立性。然而，在使用单国样本的多层次分析中，当控制与CD相关的文化变量时，统计效能可能不足，尤其是在CD的效应大小较小时。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了一种统计技术，研究人员可以用来识别潜在的混淆因素，并提供维持充分效能所需样本大小的指导。

title: Financial statement comparability and employment stability around the world
abstract: Abstract In a global economy prone to demand shocks, firms increasingly rely on implicit contracts to stabilize employment. We investigate whether financial statement comparability strengthens these contracts by enabling employees to benchmark their firm’s performance against that of peers, facilitating mutual risk sharing. Using firm-level data from 44 countries, we find that higher comparability reduces layoffs during downturns and tempers aggressive hiring during upturns, consistent with balanced labor adjustment under implicit contracting. Employees at high-comparability firms are also more willing to accept lower wages without compromising productivity, reflecting enhanced trust and cooperation. Further analyses suggest that comparability improves employees’ ability to monitor firm behavior, particularly when social safety nets are strong, earnings are transparent, industries are competitive, and firms deviate from peer norms. Exploiting the mandatory adoption of International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS) as an exogenous shock to comparability supports causal inference. Overall, our findings highlight comparability as a powerful governance mechanism that aligns firm–employee incentives in implicit employment contracts and offers practical guidance for managers and policymakers seeking to strengthen labor market resilience across diverse institutional contexts.
topics: Labor market dynamics and wage inequality
title_cn: 全球财务报表可比性与就业稳定性
abstract_cn: 摘要 在一个容易受到需求冲击的全球经济中，企业越来越依赖隐性合同来稳定就业。我们研究财务报表可比性是否通过使员工能够将自身企业的表现与同行进行基准比较，从而加强这些合同，促进共同风险分担。利用44个国家的公司层面数据，我们发现较高的可比性在经济下行期间减少了裁员，并在经济上行期间抑制了激进的招聘，这与隐性合同下的平衡劳动调整相一致。可比性高的公司的员工也更愿意接受较低的工资而不影响生产力，反映出增强的信任和合作。进一步的分析表明，在社会保障网强大、收益透明度高、行业竞争激烈以及企业偏离同行规范的情况下，可比性提高了员工监测公司行为的能力。利用国际财务报告准则（IFRS）强制采用作为可比性的外生冲击，支持了因果推断。总的来说，我们的研究结果强调了可比性作为一种强有力的治理机制，在隐性就业合同中对齐企业与员工的激励，并为希望在多元化制度背景下增强劳动力市场韧性的管理者和政策制定者提供了实用的指导。

title: Do political systems affect economic outcomes? The geography of inward FDI and its relationships with growth and inequality
abstract: Abstract This paper explores the complex interplay between political systems, foreign direct investment (FDI), and income inequality. Building on Acemoglu and Robinson’s Nobel Prize-winning work on institutions, we develop a framework to analyze governments’ political incentives to attract FDI. We argue that highly entrenched autocracies, facing little internal competition for rents, and democracies with strong political competition, eager to secure growth for electoral advantage, exhibit strong incentives to attract FDI. In contrast, weaker autocracies with internal competition for rents and entrenched democracies, where rulers face less pressure to deliver growth, have lower incentives to do so. Rising inequality introduces an additional layer of complexity: while democracies may encounter public resistance to FDI when its benefits are perceived as unevenly distributed, autocracies remain less constrained by public opinion. We analyze data from 144 countries spanning 1990–2018, assessing how political incentives shape FDI inflows and their subsequent impact on economic growth. Our findings suggest that in democracies, robust political competition underpins a country’s incentive to remain attractive to investors, while autocracies require regulatory stability and credible long-term commitments to achieve this outcome. Ultimately, our research underscores a paradox—democratic freedoms, though vital, may at times hinder economic competitiveness relative to autocratic regimes.
title_cn: 政治体系是否影响经济结果？外商直接投资的地理分布及其与经济增长和不平等的关系
abstract_cn: 摘要 本文探讨了政治体系、外国直接投资（FDI）与收入不平等之间的复杂相互作用。在建立在阿西莫格鲁和罗宾逊获得诺贝尔奖的制度理论基础上，我们发展了一个框架来分析政府吸引FDI的政治激励。我们认为，深 entrenched 的专制政体，在内部竞逐租金的竞争几乎不存在的情况下，以及在强烈的政治竞争中，为了在选举中获得增长而迫切希望吸引FDI 的民主政体，展现出吸引FDI 的强烈激励。相反，内部存在租金竞争的弱专制体制和 entrenched 的民主政体，统治者在推动经济增长方面面临的压力较小，因此其吸引FDI 的激励较低。日益上升的不平等增加了复杂性：即便在民主国家，当公众认为FDI收益分配不均时，可能会遇到公众反对，但专制政体受到公众舆论的约束相对较少。我们分析了1990年至2018年间144个国家的数据，评估政治激励如何影响FDI流入及其对经济增长的后续影响。我们的研究发现，在民主政体中，强劲的政治竞争是国家保持对投资者有吸引力的激励基础，而专制政体则需要监管的稳定性和可信的长期承诺才能实现这一结果。最终，我们的研究强调了一个悖论——尽管民主自由至关重要，但在某些时候可能会阻碍相对于专制政体的经济竞争力。

title: Banking system stability: a global analysis of cybercrime laws
abstract: Abstract We examine the role of cybercrime legislation globally in shaping the stability of the banking system. We compile a novel dataset covering the enactment of cybercrime legislation in 132 developed and developing countries to test this research question empirically. We find that the enactment of cybercrime laws enhances the stability of the banking sector. This key finding holds across a comprehensive suite of robustness tests, including alternative measures of bank stability and model specifications. We document significant cross-sectional heterogeneity, with the effect being more pronounced in countries with heavier penalties for illegal cyber activities and legal frameworks that hold banks accountable for their cybersecurity practices. Moreover, the positive impact is stronger in jurisdictions with greater international legal cooperation and effective enforcement mechanisms. We further investigate two channels (i.e., funding liquidity and operational risk) through which cybercrime laws may influence bank stability. Our results indicate that these laws can significantly bolster bank stability by enhancing funding liquidity and mitigating operational risk. Overall, our study provides evidence of the crucial role of cybercrime legislation in fostering a secure and resilient banking environment. It offers new insights into how these laws contribute to bank stability on both individual and systemic levels.
title_cn: 银行系统稳定性：网络犯罪法律的全球分析
abstract_cn: 摘要 我们研究了网络犯罪立法在全球范围内对银行系统稳定性的影响。我们编制了一份新颖的数据集，涵盖132个发达国家和发展中国家实施网络犯罪立法的情况，以实证检验这一研究问题。我们的研究发现，实施网络犯罪法律增强了银行部门的稳定性。这一关键发现通过全面的稳健性测试得到了验证，包括对银行稳定性的替代测量和模型规格的检验。我们的研究还记录了显著的横截面异质性，发现这一效果在对非法网络活动处以更重罚款的国家以及对银行网络安全实践负责的法律框架下更为明显。此外，这一积极影响在国际法律合作更为广泛和执法机制更为有效的司法管辖区内更为强烈。我们进一步探讨了网络犯罪法律可能通过两个渠道（即资金流动性和操作风险）影响银行稳定性。我们的结果表明，这些法律可以通过增强资金流动性和降低操作风险显著提升银行稳定性。总体而言，我们的研究提供了证据，表明网络犯罪立法在促进安全和韧性银行环境中的关键作用。它为理解这些法律如何在个体和系统层面上促进银行稳定提供了新的见解。

title: High-investment human resource practices and firm performance in the context of national education systems and labor markets: A cross-national meta-analysis
abstract: Abstract Organizations—especially multinational corporations (MNCs)—do not always realize comparable performance gains from investing in people across national borders. Prior research has attempted to explain such variation in the effects of high-investment human resource practices (HIHRPs) by emphasizing their fit with national cultural values, yet empirical support for this cultural fit perspective has been limited. To address this gap, we focus on national institutional factors that more directly shape how HIHRPs influence performance. Drawing on human capital resources (HCR) theory and institutional perspectives in International Business (IB), we identify two institutional conditions—national education quality and labor market flexibility—that moderate HIHRP effectiveness. We theorize that high-quality education systems enhance the HIHRPs–performance relationship by supplying workers with strong general human capital and that this effect is amplified in flexible labor markets where employees are motivated to contribute. A meta-analysis of 1,285 effect sizes from 170,938 organizations across 29 countries offers nuanced evidence: HIHRPs were more effective when national education quality and labor market flexibility were both high or both low than when they were mismatched. These findings advance comparative and strategic HRM research and guide organizations about how comprehensively or selectively to invest in managing people in what institutional contexts.
title_cn: 高投资人力资源实践与企业绩效：在国家教育系统和劳动市场背景下的跨国元分析
abstract_cn: 摘要 组织，尤其是跨国公司（MNCs），并不总是能够从跨国人力投资中获得相当的绩效提升。 prior Research 尝试通过强调高投资人力资源实践（HIHRPs）与国家文化价值观的契合来解释这种绩效差异，但对这种文化契合视角的实证支持有限。为了解决这一问题，我们聚焦于更直接影响 HIHRPs 绩效的国家制度因素。基于人力资本资源（HCR）理论和国际商业（IB）中的制度视角，我们确定了两个制度条件——国家教育质量和劳动市场灵活性——它们对 HIHRP 的有效性有调节作用。我们理论化认为，高质量的教育体系通过向工人提供强大的普通人力资本来增强 HIHRPs 与绩效之间的关系，而这种效果在灵活的劳动市场中被放大，因为员工更有动力做出贡献。对来自 29 个国家、170,938 个组织的 1,285 个效应规模的元分析提供了细致的证据：当国家教育质量和劳动市场灵活性均高或均低时，HIHRPs 的有效性更强，而在二者不匹配时则较弱。这些发现推动了比较和战略人力资源管理研究，并指导组织如何在何种制度背景下全面或选择性地投资于人力管理。

title: Privacy trade-offs in international markets
abstract: Abstract Even as data privacy regulations expand globally, their strategic implications for international business remain underexplored. Prior research mostly treats data privacy regulation as a compliance issue, overlooking how firms strategically manage cross-border variations and respond to stakeholder pressures. Drawing on institutional economics and stakeholder theory, this article conceptualizes two trade-offs generated by data privacy regulations: (1) a regulatory, cost–benefit trade-off between privacy compliance costs and customer privacy empowerment and (2) a firm performance, temporal trade-off in which early compliance costs undermine short-term outcomes, before longer-term, trust-based benefits emerge. An international event study of ten regulations across 24 countries affirms that data privacy regulations impose short-term financial setbacks but generate long-term gains. These effects vary across contexts: At regulation, industry, and firm levels, conditions in which internal pressures to minimize risk dominate (intense privacy regulation, strong data dependence, limited resources) intensify early losses. At national levels, environments dominated by external pressures for credible compliance (high formal and informal institutional effectiveness) offset short-term losses and magnify long-term benefits. For international business theory, this study reframes data privacy regulation as a strategic opportunity and highlights how internal versus external legitimacy pressures shape trade-offs that firms must balance to navigate cross-border compliance demands.
title_cn: 国际市场中的隐私权权衡
abstract_cn: 摘要 尽管数据隐私法规在全球范围内持续扩展，但其对国际商业的战略影响仍未得到充分探讨。以往的研究主要将数据隐私法规视为合规问题，忽视了企业如何战略性地管理跨境差异并应对利益相关者的压力。本文基于制度经济学和利益相关者理论，概念化了数据隐私法规所产生的两个权衡： (1) 一个监管成本-效益权衡，即隐私合规成本与客户隐私赋权之间的权衡；(2) 一个企业绩效的时间权衡，其中早期的合规成本损害短期成果，而长期基于信任的收益随之而来。对24个国家10项法规的国际事件研究证实，数据隐私法规在短期内会造成财务上的损失，但却能带来长期的收益。这些影响在不同背景下有所不同：在法规、行业和企业层面，内部减少风险压力占主导的情况下（如严苛的隐私法规、数据高度依赖、资源有限），早期损失会加剧；而在国家层面，外部对可信合规的压力（如高效的正式和非正式制度）则能抵消短期损失并放大长期收益。对于国际商业理论而言，本研究重新框定了数据隐私法规为一种战略机遇，并强调了内部与外部合法性压力如何塑造企业必须平衡的权衡，以应对跨境合规要求。

title: Trapped in the MNE matrix: liminal identity at the local–corporate–global nexus
abstract: Abstract Managers’ identities in large matrixed MNE structures are complex and pliable. While research has examined the identities of individual actors located in headquarters (HQ) or local subsidiaries, the unique identity challenges faced by those operating outside these conventional units are less predictable. Our study explores how managers experience and manage a ‘liminal identity’—feeling ‘betwixt and between’ multiple identity positions. Focusing on US MNEs in the life sciences sector, we interviewed managers who assumed global responsibilities from corporate HQ while remaining situated in their local (Irish) subsidiary. We find that operating between corporate HQ, a global network, and the local subsidiary forged a liminal identity. Straddling this local–corporate–global nexus was a profoundly ambiguous, precarious, and destabilizing experience. Yet, individuals also sought to leverage their liminal identity by adopting multiple identities, depending on the audience. This involved ‘switching’ between renouncing a local identity, assimilating a corporate identity and co-constructing a global identity. However, this produced an intense identity struggle, eroding a clear sense of self and belonging. Our study cautions firms to be attentive when supporting managers in these ‘in-between’ spaces to avoid the trap of ‘identity limbo’, where individuals risk becoming disconnected and isolated.
title_cn: 陷入跨国企业矩阵：地方、公司与全球交汇处的边缘身份
abstract_cn: 摘要 大型矩阵型跨国企业（MNE）结构中的管理者身份复杂且灵活。虽然研究已考察位于总部（HQ）或地方子公司的个体行为者的身份，但在这些传统单位之外运作的管理者所面临的独特身份挑战则较难预测。本研究探讨了管理者如何体验和管理“阈限身份”——在多重身份位置之间感到“介于两者之间”。我们聚焦于生命科学领域的美国跨国企业，采访了那些在公司总部承担全球责任但仍位于其地方（爱尔兰）子公司的管理者。我们发现，在公司总部、全球网络和地方子公司之间的运作形成了一种阈限身份。跨越这一地方—公司—全球的交汇点是一种极其模糊、不稳定且令人不安的体验。然而，个体也试图通过根据受众的不同采用多重身份来利用其阈限身份。这涉及到在放弃地方身份、同化公司身份和共同构建全球身份之间进行“切换”。然而，这导致了激烈的身份斗争，侵蚀了清晰的自我感和归属感。我们的研究提醒企业在支持管理者在这些“中间”空间时要保持警惕，以避免陷入“身份悬置”的陷阱，在这种情况下，个体面临断裂和孤立的风险。

title: Privacy-Preserving Data Fusion
abstract: This paper proposes a generative methodology enabling companies to combine data sets with strong privacy guarantees and near-optimal performance in customer analytics.
title_cn: 隐私保护的数据融合
abstract_cn: 本文提出了一种生成性方法，使得企业能够结合具有强隐私保障的数据集，并在客户分析中实现近乎最优的性能。

title: A Bayesian Dual Clustering Approach for Selecting Data and Parameter Granularities
abstract: We propose a Bayesian dual clustering method that infers both data and parameter granularities.
title_cn: 一种贝叶斯双重聚类方法用于选择数据和参数粒度
abstract_cn: 我们提出了一种贝叶斯双聚类方法，该方法推断数据和参数的细粒度。

title: Algorithmic Targeting and the Precision-Recall Tradeoff
abstract: We examine the implications of competitive algorithmic targeting when outcomes of targeting algorithms are the individual consumer-level predicted probabilities of conversion. In these situations, firms implicitly face the well-known precision-recall tradeoff while choosing their targeting strategies. They can choose to target a smaller set of consumers with a high probability of conversion (precision) but miss out on many consumers who might still be interested in their product. Conversely, firms can target a larger set of consumers (recall), but this results in a greater probability that their targeting is wasted on uninterested consumers. We analyze this precision-recall tradeoff under competition between firms that strategically choose their algorithmic targeting policies. We show that competing firms favor a targeting policy that has higher precision but lower recall compared with a monopoly. Firms target fewer consumers when their algorithms are more correlated. They also have the incentive to strategically decrease the precision of their targeting policies in order to reduce competition. If firms endogenously choose their algorithmic correlation, then there is an equilibrium incentive to decrease the correlation. History: Anthony Dukes served as the senior editor for this article. Supplemental Material: The online appendix is available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mksc.2024.0930 .
title_cn: 算法定向与精确率-召回率权衡
abstract_cn: 我们考察了在竞争性算法定向情况下的影响，其中定向算法的结果是个别消费者转化的预测概率。在这些情况下，企业在选择其定向策略时隐含地面临着众所周知的精确度-召回率权衡。企业可以选择定向于一小部分拥有较高转化概率的消费者（精确度），但这会错过许多可能仍对其产品感兴趣的消费者。相反，企业可以选择定向于更大一部分消费者（召回率），但这会导致更高的概率，使其定向浪费在不感兴趣的消费者身上。我们分析了在企业间竞争下的这种精确度-召回率权衡，企业在此情况下战略性选择其算法定向政策。我们发现，与垄断相比，竞争企业倾向于选择精确度更高但召回率较低的定向政策。当算法之间的相关性增强时，企业定向的消费者数量会减少。它们还有动力战略性地降低其定向政策的精确度以减少竞争。如果企业内生选择其算法相关性，那么将存在降低相关性的均衡激励。历史：安东尼·杜克斯为本文担任高级编辑。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mksc.2024.0930获取。

title: Advertiser Learning in Direct Advertising Markets
abstract: By pooling information across many advertisers, direct buy ad networks can alleviate advertiser uncertainty about where to place ads, increasing publisher revenue and advertiser welfare.
title_cn: 直销市场中的广告主学习
abstract_cn: 通过整合众多广告主的信息，直接购买广告网络能够减轻广告主对于广告投放位置的不确定性，从而增加出版商的收入和广告主的福利。

title: Large Language Models for Market Research: A Data-Augmentation Approach
abstract: This paper proposes a statistical data augmentation approach that efficiently integrates LLM-generated data with real data in conjoint analysis.
title_cn: 市场研究中的大型语言模型：一种数据增强方法
abstract_cn: 本文提出了一种统计数据增强方法，能够有效地将大型语言模型生成的数据与实际数据结合用于联合分析。

title: Consumer-Driven Class Pricing
abstract: This paper proposes a consumer loss aversion-based rationale for class pricing, which is the practice of assigning only a few price points to many differentiated products.
title_cn: 消费者驱动的课程定价
abstract_cn: 本文提出了一种基于消费者损失厌恶的阶级定价理论，即将少数价格点赋予众多差异化产品的做法。

title: Leveraging Large-Scale Granular Single-Source Data for TV Advertising: An Identification Strategy
abstract: This paper introduces a new instrumental variable to estimate the causal effects of linear TV advertising, using granular household-level viewing and purchase panel data.
title_cn: 利用大规模细粒度单一来源数据进行电视广告的识别策略
abstract_cn: 本文引入了一种新的工具变量，以估算线性电视广告的因果效应，使用细致的家庭层级收视和购买面板数据。

title: The Design of Centralized Matching Systems on Two-Sided Platforms: Evidence from the Ride-Hailing Market
abstract: This paper develops a dynamic structural model to investigate the tradeoff between matching efficiency and agent autonomy in the ride-hailing market.
title_cn: 两面平台集中匹配系统的设计：来自打车市场的证据
abstract_cn: 本文建立了一个动态结构模型，以研究网约车市场中匹配效率与代理自主性之间的权衡。

title: How Do Content Producers Respond to Engagement on Social Media Platforms?
abstract: We examine how receiving engagement affects users’ subsequent behavior on social media platform, using a large-scale field experiment from Twitter.
title_cn: 内容生产者如何应对社交媒体平台上的互动？
abstract_cn: 我们研究了接收到互动如何影响用户在社交媒体平台上的后续行为，基于一项来自Twitter的大规模实地实验。

title: Bargaining and Network Effects in Two-Sided Platforms: Evidence from Online Healthcare
abstract: A generalizable modeling framework integrating bargaining and participant-specific network effects to guide growth strategies for platforms built on negotiated partnerships.
title_cn: 双边平台中的谈判与网络效应：来自在线医疗的证据
abstract_cn: 一个通用的建模框架，将协商和参与者特定的网络效应结合起来，以指导基于协商合作伙伴关系的平台的增长策略。

title: A Deep-DiD Method to Estimate Heterogeneous Treatment Effects: Application to Content Creator Selection
abstract: This paper develops a Deep-DiD method that integrates two deep neural networks into a difference-in-differences framework to estimate heterogeneous treatment effects and applies it to optimizing platform creator selection.
title_cn: 一种深度双重差分方法用于估计异质性处理效应：内容创作者选择的应用
abstract_cn: 本文提出了一种深度差分法（Deep-DiD），该方法将两种深度神经网络整合进差分法框架中，以估计异质性处理效应，并将其应用于平台创作者选择的优化。

title: Strategic Capacity Commitment: A Channel Competition Perspective
abstract: This paper examines how capacity commitment shapes strategic interactions between asymmetric channels—one centralized and one decentralized—and reveals that a centralized manufacturer’s capacity commitment can mitigate price competition and benefit both channels.
title_cn: 战略能力承诺：渠道竞争视角
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了产能承诺如何塑造非对称渠道之间的战略互动——一个是集中式渠道，另一个是分散式渠道，并揭示了集中式制造商的产能承诺能够缓解价格竞争，从而使两个渠道受益。

title: The Value of Silence: The Effect of UMG’s Licensing Dispute with TikTok on Music Demand
abstract: This study examines how the dispute between TikTok and Universal Music Group (UMG) impacted music demand on streaming platforms.
title_cn: 沉默的价值：UMG与TikTok的版权争议对音乐需求的影响
abstract_cn: 本研究考察了TikTok与环球音乐集团（UMG）之间的争端如何影响了音乐在流媒体平台上的需求。

title: When Compassion Constricts: Identity Threat and Organizational Responses to Suffering
abstract: Organizations devoted to care, morality, and social purpose sometimes generate rather than relieve suffering. Paradoxically, such suffering often persists not because it is unseen, but because acknowledging it threatens the organization and its members’ identities as benevolent and caring. We develop a process theory explaining how organizations respond to organizationally caused suffering under identity threat, and why responses diverge toward either propagation or mitigation. Drawing on systems psychodynamics, compassion research, and identity threat theory, we argue that identity-threatening harm activates threat appraisal concerning valued self-definitions. This appraisal channels responses along two pathways. “Constriction” narrows responsibility, localizes blame, and produces bounded or performative forms of compassion that stabilize personal identity while leaving systemic injuries unaddressed. “Expansion” distributes ownership of harm and enables responsible compassion that more substantively engages suffering. We further theorize how internal sensegivers and organizational conditions shape movement both along and between these pathways. By foregrounding identity threat appraisal as a central mechanism, we explain why compassionate intentions do not reliably produce compassionate outcomes, and why suffering may be compounded in organizations most committed to alleviating it.
title_cn: 当同情变得狭窄：身份威胁与组织对痛苦的回应
abstract_cn: 致力于关怀、道德和社会目标的组织有时会引发而非减轻痛苦。矛盾的是，这种痛苦之所以持续，并不是因为它未被察觉，而是因为承认痛苦会威胁到组织及其成员作为慈善和关爱的身份。我们发展了一个过程理论，解释了在身份受到威胁的情况下，组织如何应对由自身造成的痛苦，以及为什么其反应会向传播或减轻两种方向分化。基于系统心理动力学、同情心研究和身份威胁理论，我们认为，身份威胁所引发的伤害激活了对于有价值自我定义的威胁评估。这种评估使反应沿两个路径进行。“收缩”使责任缩小，归责于局部，并产生有限或表演性的同情形式，巩固个人身份，却无视系统性创伤。“扩展”分配了伤害的归属，促进了更具责任感的同情，使其更加深入地参与痛苦。我们进一步理论化了内部意义提供者和组织条件如何在这两条路径之间及沿着路径的移动上产生影响。通过将身份威胁评估置于核心机制，我们解释了为何同情的意图并不总能产生同情的结果，以及为何在最致力于减轻痛苦的组织中，痛苦可能会加剧。

title: Syncing Minds and Machines: Hybrid Cognitive Alignment as an Emergent Coordination Mechanism in Human–AI Collaboration
abstract: As humans and AI increasingly work together in organizations, how can they dynamically allocate tasks and roles amid evolving task demands? Humans and AI represent the world in distinct yet complementary ways, creating both performance opportunities and coordination challenges for human–AI collaboration (HAIC). Tackling this, we advance a novel theory of “hybrid cognitive alignment” (HCA) as an emergent coordination mechanism that explains microprocesses leading to a functional compatibility between human and AI, enabling both parties to anticipate and adapt to each other. We apply the taskwork–teamwork framework to explain what needs to align, and create an AI-typology to elucidate how HCA can be achieved. We delineate how humans collaborate with “tool-like,” “assistant-like,” “rigid-teammate-like,” and “teammate-like” AI through four distinct pathways to develop instrumental, contextualized, prescribed, and reciprocal alignments. Our theory complements the current top-down organization design approach with a bottom-up, emergent perspective. We highlight AI’s material properties as a distinctive driver of emergent coordination in HAIC, in parallel to human–AI’s iterative exchanges. Our work creates a new theoretical frontier for the coordination literature, helps to synthesize mixed findings regarding HAIC effectiveness, and generates implications for designing and deploying AI as a collaborator.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 同步心智与机器：混合认知对齐作为人类与人工智能协作中的一种新兴协调机制
abstract_cn: 随着人类和人工智能（AI）在组织中日益协作，如何在不断变化的任务需求中动态分配任务和角色？人类和AI以独特而互补的方式理解世界，从而为人类与AI协作（HAIC）创造了性能机会和协调挑战。为了解决这一问题，我们提出了一种新理论——“混合认知对齐”（HCA），作为一种新兴协调机制，解释实现人类与AI之间功能兼容性的微观过程，从而使双方能够预见并适应彼此。我们应用任务工作–团队工作框架来解释需要对齐的内容，并创建了一种AI类型分类，以阐明如何实现HCA。我们细分了人类与“工具型”、“助手型”、“刚性队友型”和“队友型”AI之间的合作，通过四条不同路径发展工具性、情境化、规定性和互惠性的对齐。我们的理论补充了当前自上而下的组织设计方法，提供了一种自下而上的新兴视角。我们强调AI的物质属性作为HAIC中新兴协调的独特驱动因素，与人类与AI之间的迭代交流并行。我们的研究为协调文献开辟了新的理论前沿，有助于综合有关HAIC有效性的混合发现，并为设计和部署AI作为协作者提供了启示。

title: Corrective Governance in the Boardroom: A Negotiated Order Perspective
abstract: We leverage negotiated order theory to develop a model of board corrective governance concerning CEO leadership. We extend research on corporate governance to theorize that a board’s response to concerns about CEO leadership is a dynamic process of social order disruption and negotiation. When a disruption of an existing social order occurs, the CEO–board relationship is renegotiated by the board and, potentially, the CEO. We identify two critical relational dimensions—board affiliation with the CEO and board dependence on the CEO—that create four distinct negotiation conditions. Our model delineates the manner in which these negotiation conditions, in conjunction with the negotiation approach (cooperative or competitive) of the board and the CEO, give rise to a spectrum of first-order (i.e., retention, discipline, empowerment, dismissal) and second-order (i.e., changes to board dependence and affiliation) outcomes that influence the CEO–board relationship and subsequent corrective governance episodes. Our theoretical framework has important implications for governance research and practice, underscoring the need to view corrective governance decisions as interrelated negotiated outcomes shaped by evolving relational dynamics.
title_cn: 董事会中的纠正治理：一种协商秩序的视角
abstract_cn: 我们利用协商秩序理论来构建关于首席执行官领导的董事会纠正治理模型。我们拓展了企业治理的研究，理论化董事会对首席执行官领导关切的回应是一个社会秩序破坏和协商的动态过程。当现有社会秩序发生破坏时，董事会与首席执行官之间的关系将被重新协商，可能还会涉及首席执行官本人。我们确定了两个关键的关系维度——董事会与首席执行官的关联性和董事会对首席执行官的依赖性——这构成了四种不同的协商条件。我们的模型 delineates（描述）了这些协商条件如何与董事会和首席执行官的协商方式（合作或竞争）结合，产生一系列的第一阶（即，保留、纪律、赋权、解雇）和第二阶（即，对董事会依赖性和关联性的改变）结果，这些结果影响董事会与首席执行官之间的关系以及随后的纠正治理事件。我们的理论框架对治理研究和实践具有重要意义，强调需要将纠正治理决策视为由不断发展的关系动态塑造的相互关联的协商结果。

title: Construct Fallacies and Construct Validation in Theories of Management and Organization
abstract: Constructs are broadly considered as the foundation of theory. In this paper, we review past writings on constructs and construct validity and highlight how logical errors, or fallacies, are frequent in how constructs are developed and validated in management research. We elaborate four common construct fallacies—a novelty, a self-referential, a reification, and a weak or false analogy fallacy—that affect the validity of a claimed construct and contribute to construct proliferation. As existing construct validity procedures are insufficient in avoiding such construct fallacies, we conceptualize a complementary argumentation-based view of constructs that we extend into a framework for construct validation. We illustrate the uses and value of the framework in developing stronger constructs and in detecting construct fallacies, and, in doing so, draw out its broader implications for theory development and research.
title_cn: 构造谬误与管理与组织理论中的构造验证
abstract_cn: 构念被广泛认为是理论的基础。在本文中，我们回顾了关于构念和构念有效性的过去文献，并强调在管理研究中，构念的发展和验证过程中，逻辑错误或谬误的出现是频繁的。我们详细阐述了四种常见的构念谬误——新颖性谬误、自我指称谬误、具象化谬误以及薄弱或错误类比谬误——这些谬误影响了所宣称构念的有效性，并促进了构念的泛滥。由于现有的构念有效性程序不足以避免这些构念谬误，我们概念化了一种基于论证的互补视角，并将其扩展为构念验证的框架。我们展示了该框架在发展更强构念及识别构念谬误方面的用途和价值，并由此揭示其对理论发展和研究的更广泛意义。

title: Competitive Externalities in Acquisitions
abstract: While acquisitions are a popular means of corporate development, it is often uncertain whether acquirers capture positive value. This uncertainty is further compounded by the profound competitive implications associated with acquisitions. To shed more light on these implications, we develop the concepts of negative and positive competitive externalities in acquisitions in more detail and outline a framework that explains which acquisitions give rise to which competitive externalities. We then predict their impact on acquirers’ and rivals’ value capture under different synergy and information conditions, providing several insights: First, when negative competitive externalities exist, when no bidder can create unique synergies and bidders are aware of the synergies and externalities, bidders engage in value-destroying acquisitions to avoid negative externalities. A bidder with unique synergies only captures positive value if the unique synergies exceed a rival’s negative competitive externalities. Second, information advantages of one bidder over others are a key factor enabling positive value capture even when competitive externalities exist. Third, faced with positive competitive externalities, bidders may lack incentives to acquire even if further synergies exist, and the most capable acquirer may not capture the most value. Our paper sheds light on competitive externalities in acquisitions and provides important insights for strategic management research.
title_cn: 收购中的竞争外部性
abstract_cn: 尽管收购是企业发展的常见手段，但收购方能否获得正向价值常常存在不确定性。这种不确定性因收购所带来的深远竞争影响而进一步加剧。为了更深入地探讨这些影响，我们详细阐述了收购中的负向和正向竞争外部性概念，并概述了一个框架，用以解释哪些收购会导致哪些竞争外部性。接着，我们在不同的协同效应和信息条件下预测这些外部性对收购方和竞争对手价值获取的影响，并提供了若干见解：首先，当存在负向竞争外部性时，若无投标者能够创造独特的协同效应且投标者意识到协同效应和外部性，投标者会进行价值破坏型收购以避免负向外部性。只有当独特的协同效应超过竞争对手的负向竞争外部性时，具有独特协同效应的投标者才能捕获正向价值。其次，一名投标者相较于其他投标者的信息优势是使其能够在存在竞争外部性的情况下仍然实现正向价值获取的关键因素。第三，面对正向竞争外部性，投标者可能缺乏收购的激励，即便存在进一步的协同效应，最有能力的收购方也未必能够捕获最多的价值。我们的论文揭示了收购中的竞争外部性，并为战略管理研究提供了重要见解。

title: Designing Dual-Purpose Organizations: The Role of Soft Governance
abstract: Although the phenomenon of dual-purpose organizations (DPOs)—market-based organizations that pursue both private (commercial) and broader social objectives simultaneously—has been explored extensively in prior literature, the role of organization design in addressing the distinct coordination problems inherent to DPOs has been largely overlooked. We develop a theoretical framework that conceptualizes how design considerations can influence organizational outcomes for DPOs. We identify two central coordination challenges faced by DPOs: an aggregation problem, in which heterogeneous individual preferences and organizational goals must be effectively aligned; and a consolidation problem, in which the dual-purpose nature of DPOs prevents the consolidation of goals into a single organizational meta-goal, resulting in nonhierarchical decision-making structures. We argue that formal organization design processes and mechanisms alone may fail to resolve these coordination problems, and we conceptualize the role and notion of soft governance, which we define as the agentic deployment of informal design mechanisms that shape an organization’s informal decision-making structure. Our core contribution lies in developing an integrative model of dual-purpose organizing that demonstrates how soft governance may complement formal organization design in alleviating the coordination problems inherent in DPOs, thereby supporting their stability and growth.
title_cn: 设计双重目的组织：软治理的作用
abstract_cn: 尽管双重目的组织（DPOs）这一现象——即兼顾私营（商业）目标和更广泛的社会目标的市场基础组织——在之前的文献中已被广泛探讨，但组织设计在解决DPOs特有的协调问题上的角色却鲜有关注。我们建立了一个理论框架，概念化了设计考量如何影响DPOs的组织成果。我们识别出DPOs面临的两个核心协调挑战：一是聚合问题，即必须有效对齐异质的个体偏好和组织目标；二是整合问题，即DPOs的双重目的特性阻碍了目标向单一组织元目标的整合，导致非等级化的决策结构。我们认为，单靠正式的组织设计流程和机制可能无法解决这些协调问题，因此我们概念化了软治理的角色和内涵，定义为形塑组织非正式决策结构的非正式设计机制的主动运用。我们的核心贡献在于开发了一个双重目的组织的整合模型，展示了软治理如何补充正式组织设计，以缓解DPOs固有的协调问题，从而支持其稳定与发展。

title: The Role of Deliberate Silence in Institutional Change
abstract: In this article, I develop insights into deliberate silence as a facilitator of institutional change. I argue that deliberate silence constitutes a form of text that can influence dynamics of discourse positions and discourse content, thereby affecting relationships among relevant actors as well as institutional dynamics. This makes it a useful resource for change proponents located at the center of fields to inconspicuously shift voice toward more peripheral allies, facilitate the visibility of problematizations and novel theorizations, and mitigate the effect of defense strategies from central opponents of change. Starting from a basic discourse-based model of institutional change, I show how a systematic acknowledgment of deliberate silence facilitates a better understanding of discursive dynamics. Specifically, I synthesize four types of deliberate silence—activating, suppressing, affirming, and concealing—in institutional change processes, and model a set of communication strategies based on these types of silence that support change in various ways. These ideas contribute to existing literature by suggesting novel ways of understanding how actors navigate barriers to institutional change, and how interactions between different types of actors during institutional dynamics unfold.
title_cn: 深思熟虑的沉默在制度变革中的角色
abstract_cn: 在这篇文章中，我探讨了有意沉默作为推动制度变革的促进因素。我认为，有意沉默构成了一种文本形式，可以影响话语位置和话语内容的动态，从而影响相关行动者之间的关系及制度动态。这使得它成为处于领域中心的变革倡导者一个有用的资源，可以不显眼地将声音转向更边缘的盟友，促进问题化和新理论的可见性，并减轻来自中央变革对手的防御策略的影响。从一个基于话语的基本制度变革模型开始，我展示了系统性地承认有意沉默如何促进对话语动态的更好理解。具体而言，我在制度变革过程中综合了四种类型的有意沉默——激活、压制、确认和隐蔽，并基于这些沉默类型建模了一套支持变革的沟通策略。这些观点通过提出理解行动者如何应对制度变革障碍以及在制度动态中不同类型行动者之间的互动如何展开的新的视角，丰富了现有文献。

title: Transaction Governance: Firm-Level Influences and the Organizational Identity Paradox
abstract: We propose a conceptual framework of transaction governance that augments the existing transaction cost economics (TCE) model with research on organizational identity orientation. Our focus is on how particular identity orientations imply preferences for formal versus informal governance mechanisms. These preferences, in turn, are activated when a firm faces particular transaction hazards. In general, the identity orientation construct augments the current perspective on governance choice and helps expand the current TCE model. We also discuss how a firm’s identity orientation is itself systematically shaped (strengthened or weakened) by transactional outcomes. These feedback processes involve certain paradoxes. For instance, even successfully governed transactions may actually weaken a firm’s identity orientation, to the extent that the governance choice is incompatible with the firm’s prevailing identity orientation.
title_cn: 交易治理：企业层面的影响与组织身份悖论
abstract_cn: 我们提出了一种交易治理的概念框架，该框架通过组织身份取向的研究增强了现有的交易成本经济学（TCE）模型。我们的重点是特定的身份取向如何暗示对正式与非正式治理机制的偏好。这些偏好反过来在公司面临特定交易风险时被激活。一般来说，身份取向的构念增强了当前对治理选择的视角，并有助于扩展现有的TCE模型。我们还讨论了公司的身份取向如何被交易结果系统性地塑造（加强或削弱）。这些反馈过程涉及某些悖论。例如，即使是成功治理的交易，可能也会削弱公司的身份取向，前提是治理选择与公司现有的身份取向不兼容。

title: Fading Memories: The Role of Machine Learning in Organizational Knowledge Depreciation
abstract: Organizational knowledge is essential for sustained competitive advantage, yet it naturally depreciates over time. Traditional rule-based technologies help counter this erosion by serving as stable repositories of knowledge. In contrast, machine learning (ML) systems—an increasingly prevalent and relied-upon technology—introduce new risks. Because their predictive models depend on historical training data, ML systems are vulnerable to model drift: a gradual misalignment with evolving operational realities that creates recurring needs for human-led repair. We develop a multilevel process model showing how and when repeated cycles of ML use and repair can unintentionally accelerate organizational knowledge depreciation. In doing so, we highlight the distinct vulnerabilities of ML systems, challenge the conventional view of technologies as stable repositories of knowledge, and emphasize the importance of deliberate human engagement alongside automation to sustain organizational knowledge over time.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
Personal Information Management and User Behavior
title_cn: 渐逝的记忆：机器学习在组织知识贬值中的作用
abstract_cn: 组织知识对持续的竞争优势至关重要，但它会随着时间自然贬值。传统的基于规则的技术通过作为知识的稳定存储库来帮助抵消这种贬值。相比之下，机器学习（ML）系统——一种日益普遍且被广泛依赖的技术——引入了新的风险。由于它们的预测模型依赖于历史训练数据，ML系统容易受到模型漂移的影响：这是一种与不断变化的操作现实逐渐不匹配的现象，导致需要人力进行修复的重复需求。我们开发了一个多层次过程模型，展示了反复使用和修复ML的循环如何在不经意间加速组织知识的贬值。通过这一研究，我们强调了ML系统的独特脆弱性，挑战了技术作为知识稳定存储库的传统观念，并强调了在自动化过程中人类参与的必要性，以维持组织知识的持续性。

title: Tackling the Complexity Challenge: When and How to Engage in Configurational and Hybrid Theorizing
abstract: Management phenomena are often causally complex, and management research has increasingly turned to a configurational perspective to better account for this complexity. Yet, despite recent attention to configurational theorizing, we still lack comprehensive guidance on when a configurational approach is most appropriate, leading to confusion and avoidable disputes in the review process. Moreover, despite growing calls for theoretical triangulation, our understanding of how configurational theorizing can be effectively combined with other theorizing approaches is limited, slowing the development of novel organizational theories and confining configurational inquiry to largely abductive research and ex post theorizing. We address these challenges in two ways. First, we articulate a framework of four key indications—causal conjunction, causal disjunction, outcome asymmetry, and outcome intentionality—that provide systematic guidance on when a configurational approach is warranted. Second, we introduce two configurational hybrid theorizing approaches that integrate configurational theorizing with propositional and process grammars. Specifically, we demonstrate how configurational-propositional theorizing can generate novel predictions about complex causal relationships, and how configurational-process theorizing can incorporate temporal dynamics through temporal-configurational layering. Together, these contributions broaden the theoretical toolkit for studying complexity and offer new ways to advance the configurational perspective and management theory more generally.
title_cn: 应对复杂性挑战：何时以及如何参与配置性和混合理论的构建
abstract_cn: 管理现象通常是因果复杂的，管理研究越来越多地采用构型视角，以更好地解释这种复杂性。然而，尽管近年来对构型理论的关注增加，我们仍然缺乏关于何时采用构型方法的全面指导，这导致在审查过程中的混淆和不必要的争议。此外，尽管对理论三角化的呼声日益高涨，我们对如何有效地将构型理论与其他理论方法结合的理解仍然有限，这减缓了新型组织理论的发展，并将构型研究局限于主要的溯因研究和事后理论化。我们通过两种方式应对这些挑战。首先，我们阐明了一个包含四个关键指示的框架——因果结合、因果分离、结果不对称性和结果意图性——为何时适用构型方法提供系统性的指导。其次，我们介绍了两种将构型理论与命题和过程语法相结合的构型混合理论方法。具体而言，我们展示了构型-命题理论如何生成关于复杂因果关系的新预测，以及构型-过程理论如何通过时间-构型分层来纳入时间动态。总的来说，这些贡献拓宽了研究复杂性的理论工具，并为推进构型视角和管理理论提供了新的途径。

title: Empirically Based Response Strategies: When and How Empirical Debate Allows Firms to Resist Stakeholders
abstract: While stakeholder support is essential for firm survival, when stakeholder pressures are at odds with firm interests, resistance becomes imperative for the firm. We theorize when and how empirically based responses enable firms to effectively resist stakeholders, without losing critical support, by following societal norms encouraging empirical debate. Extending arguments that stakeholder pressure progresses through phases, we argue that empirical debate is most influential before and after the phase when stakeholder deliberation occurs—that is, in the preceding phase, when issues are defined, and the subsequent phase, when remedies are debated. We detail two empirically based response strategies: (1) validity disputing and (2) validity promoting. While validity disputing sows doubt and uncertainty on the empirical elements of issues and remedies, validity promoting advances the empirical merits of the firm’s preferred remedy relative to stakeholders’ proposed remedy. Together, these strategies seek to mitigate stakeholder pressures by disrupting an issue’s rise to salience, and, failing that, to avoid remedies constituting more substantive concessions. We complete our model by examining three contingencies: firm dependence on stakeholders, causal complexity, and the strength of stakeholders’ values. Detailing empirical debate as a basis of response complements well-established, values-based approaches to address stakeholder pressures.
title_cn: 基于实证的应对策略：何时以及如何通过实证辩论使企业抵制利益相关者
abstract_cn: 虽然利益相关者的支持对企业生存至关重要，但当利益相关者的压力与企业利益相悖时，企业就必须进行抵抗。我们理论化了在何种情况下以及如何通过基于实证的回应使企业能够有效抵御利益相关者的压力，而不失去关键支持，方法是遵循鼓励实证辩论的社会规范。我们扩展了利益相关者压力逐步发展的论点，认为实证辩论在利益相关者审议发生的阶段之前和之后最具影响力——即在前一个阶段，当问题被定义时，以及在随后的阶段，当补救措施被辩论时。我们详细阐述了两种基于实证的回应策略：（1）有效性争议和（2）有效性促进。有效性争议在问题和补救措施的实证要素上播下怀疑和不确定的种子，而有效性促进则相对推进企业首选补救措施的实证优点，相较于利益相关者提出的补救措施。这两种策略共同旨在通过干扰问题的显著性上升来缓解利益相关者的压力，若未能做到这一点，则避免采取更具实质性让步的补救措施。我们通过考察三个偶然因素来完善我们的模型：企业对利益相关者的依赖、因果复杂性以及利益相关者价值观的强度。将实证辩论作为回应的基础，与已建立的基于价值观的方法相辅相成，以应对利益相关者的压力。

title: Occupational Identity Formation in Unsaturated Spaces: The Layered Accretion of the American Astronaut’s Identity
abstract: How does the process of identity formation unfold in emerging occupations? While extant research has focused primarily on occupational identity formation through differentiation from other occupational groups, we theorize identity formation in occupations that emerge in unsaturated spaces, where competitive dynamics are less salient. We address this question through a qualitative historical analysis of American astronauts at the inception of space exploration (1958–1974). Our work theorizes layered accretion as a distinct identity formation process whereby a new occupation’s identity begins with importing an identity from an existing occupation (proto identity), refinement of the identity through work–identity alignment (core identity), and subsequent layering of new, distinct identities that are accreted on to the core. We specify the mechanisms underpinning layered accretion and contribute to deeper understanding of how multiple identities are managed in the early stages of identity formation in new occupations.
title_cn: 在未饱和领域中的职业身份形成：美国宇航员身份的分层积累
abstract_cn: 新兴职业的身份形成过程是如何展开的？现有研究主要集中在通过与其他职业群体的区分来形成职业身份，而我们则理论化在竞争动态不那么显著的未饱和领域中出现的职业身份形成。我们通过对美国宇航员在太空探索初期（1958-1974）的定性历史分析来探讨这个问题。我们的研究理论化了“分层积累”作为一种独特的身份形成过程，其中新职业的身份始于从现有职业（原型身份）引入身份，通过工作与身份的对齐来完善身份（核心身份），随后在核心身份上叠加新的、独特的身份。我们明确了支撑分层积累的机制，并为深入理解在新职业身份形成早期阶段如何管理多重身份做出了贡献。

title: Democratic Deviations: How Organizations Sustain Decentralization Commitments in the Face of Centralization Pressures
abstract: Organizations that have committed to decentralizing authority can face situations in which centralized decision making is useful or necessary. However, centralization risks undermining an organization’s perceived commitment to decentralization, which can threaten employees’ motivation and commitment, as well as organizational legitimacy. Leveraging a comparative case study of four organizations that had explicitly committed to decentralize authority and that subsequently centralized authority during the COVID-19 crisis, we identify a process by which organizations can deviate from decentralization commitments while keeping those commitments in place. This process, which we call “democratic deviation,” involves leaders and workers collectively authorizing centralization and then leaders enacting that authority with openness and transparency. In the three of our four cases that deviated democratically, decentralization commitments were upheld. Conversely, when centralization occurred implicitly through leader fiat and was then enacted opaquely by leaders, a process we label “monocratic deviation,” decentralization commitments were undermined. Through this study, we develop a theory of the structural antecedents and processes of durable commitments to decentralization, prompting re-evaluation of decentralization’s assumed fragility. More broadly, our theory suggests how organizations can uphold shared commitments even when they must deviate from them in the face of situational pressures.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 民主偏差：组织如何在面对集中化压力时维持去中心化承诺
abstract_cn: 承诺去中心化权力的组织可能会面临在某些情况下集权决策是有益或必要的情况。然而，中心化的风险在于可能削弱组织对去中心化的承诺，这可能威胁到员工的动机和承诺，以及组织的合法性。通过对四个明确承诺去中心化权力的组织在COVID-19危机期间随后实施中心化的比较案例研究，我们识别了一种过程，组织可以在保持去中心化承诺的同时偏离这些承诺。我们称之为“民主偏离”的这一过程，涉及领导者和员工共同授权中心化，然后领导者以开放和透明的方式实施这种权力。在我们四个案例中的三个民主偏离的案例中，去中心化的承诺得到了维护。相反，当中心化是通过领导者的专断隐含发生，并且被领导者不透明地执行时，我们将其称为“单一偏离”，去中心化的承诺则遭到削弱。通过这项研究，我们发展了一种关于去中心化持久承诺的结构前因和过程的理论，促使重新评估去中心化的脆弱性假设。更广泛地说，我们的理论提出了组织如何在面临情境压力时保持共同承诺，即便必须偏离这些承诺。

title: Interpreting Violence: How Community Context Shapes Corporate Responses to Street Protests
abstract: Violence that erupts in communities invites complex interpretations that can create a dilemma for business leaders about how to respond. Investigating how organizations respond to violence in protests, we build on the community embeddedness literature and propose that business leaders’ responses to protest violence depend on their perceptions of whether the violence is justified. Leaders may view reported protest violence as evidence of either social disorder or a valid grievance in the community where the violence occurs and where their companies are headquartered. We theorize that business leaders’ interpretations of violence are influenced by their community’s recent history: A history of protest violence unrelated to the social cause underlying the current protest weakens the managerial perception that the social issue is relevant to the community, while a history of grievance-validating events strengthens this perception. Using hand-collected data on corporate announcements following the 2020 Black Lives Matter (BLM) movement, we find that firms are less likely to announce diversity actions in response to reported protest violence in communities marked by persistent violence in previous non-BLM protests, but they are more likely to do so in communities with records of more police shootings. These same community conditions also shape the effect of violence on whether firms decide to publicly endorse the movement when they announce their corporate actions. Demonstrating that violence reshapes the ways that organizations respond to protests, we discuss the implications of our findings for research on violence, social movements, and corporate activism.
title_cn: 解读暴力：社区背景如何影响企业对街头抗议的反应
abstract_cn: 社区中爆发的暴力事件引发了复杂的解读，这对于商业领袖关于如何应对该情况形成了困境。在研究组织如何应对抗议中的暴力时，我们基于社区嵌入性文献，提出商业领袖对抗议暴力的反应取决于他们对该暴力是否正当的看法。领导者可能将报道的抗议暴力视为社会失序的证据，或是暴力发生地及其公司总部所在社区的有效诉求。我们理论化认为，商业领袖对暴力的解读受到其社区近期历史的影响：与当前抗议所依据的社会原因无关的抗议暴力历史，削弱了管理者认为该社会问题与社区相关的认知，而赋予诉求有效性的事件历史则强化了这一认知。通过收集2020年“黑人的命也是命”（BLM）运动后企业公告的数据，我们发现，在先前非BLM抗议中暴力持续的社区中，企业宣布多样性行动的可能性较低，但在警察枪击事件频发的社区中则更有可能这样做。这些相同的社区条件也影响暴力对企业决定是否公开支持该运动的影响，尤其是在宣布其企业行动时。我们的研究表明，暴力重塑了组织应对抗议的方式，我们讨论了这一发现对暴力、社会运动和企业行动主义研究的意义。

title: Unequal in the Spotlight: Gender Differences in How Serving on Prominent Firms Affects Directors’ New Board Appointments
abstract: Does gaining a foothold in the upper echelons of the corporate landscape carry different implications for women and men? We address this question by examining gender differences in how serving on the boards of prominent firms leads to new board appointments. While prominent affiliations are widely recognized as advantageous, research has yet to ask whether these benefits vary by gender. Using data on the population of directors in the FTSE-100 between 2010 and 2017, we find that women are, on average, more likely than men to obtain additional board appointments, consistent with prior literature showing that pressures to increase diversity stimulate demand for incumbent women relative to men. However, serving on more-prominent boards within the FTSE-100 increases men’s likelihood of obtaining new appointments but decreases it for women. Thus, women’s advantage diminishes and eventually reverses, becoming a disadvantage, as firm prominence increases. Our systematic evaluation of potential demand- and supply-side explanations for this pattern finds limited support for both. We propose, instead, that women’s experiences of greater scrutiny and of informal demands on more-prominent boards may shape their willingness to pursue additional appointments. We highlight the dual role of prominent affiliations as sources of both opportunity and constraint, with implications for individual careers and organizational diversity.
title_cn: 在聚光灯下的不平等：担任知名公司的董事对董事新任命的性别差异影响
abstract_cn: 在企业高层中获得立足点对女性和男性是否有不同的影响？我们通过研究性别差异，探讨担任知名公司的董事如何影响新董事会任命来回答这个问题。尽管广泛认识到知名附属关系具有优势，但研究尚未探讨这些利益是否因性别而异。利用2010年至2017年间FTSE-100董事的相关数据，我们发现，女性在获得额外董事会任命的可能性上，平均比男性更高，这与先前文献表明的压力增加多样性以促进在位女性的需求相一致。然而，在FTSE-100内担任更具知名度的董事会会增加男性获得新任命的可能性，但对女性则是相反。这意味着，随着公司知名度的提升，女性的优势减弱并最终逆转，转变为劣势。我们对这一模式潜在需求和供给侧解释的系统评估发现了有限的支持。因此，我们提出，女性在更知名董事会上的经历，包括更大的审查压力和非正式要求，可能会影响她们追求额外任命的意愿。我们强调，知名附属关系在为个人职业和组织多样性提供机会的同时，也充当了约束的双重角色。

title: Trust and fairness in platform–supplier contracts: Navigating supplier concerns in the sharing economy
abstract: Abstract Trust and fairness are critical to the sustainable development of the sharing economy, particularly in platform–supplier relationships, where numerous individual suppliers offer access to their durable assets without transferring ownership. Motivated by the real‐world phenomenon of personalized wages and informed through direct interactions with relevant constituents, this study examines a contracting problem between a share‐based platform and its supplier, where the platform designs contracts that differ in information‐sharing and revenue‐sharing structures. The supplier evaluates these contracts based on their expected utility, incorporating trust in the information shared and fairness concerns over revenue sharing. In addition to trust and fairness, we incorporate deception cost for both parties: for the platform, they operationalize trustworthiness as a reluctance to misrepresent information, while for the supplier, they constrain opportunism such as underreporting revenue. Using a game‐theoretical model, we derive the optimal contracting mechanism under different conditions. Our results reveal that trustworthiness, rather than trust alone, shapes optimal contracting outcomes. Under platform‐managed contracts, the revenue‐sharing ratio increases with either trust or fairness—but not both simultaneously. For supplier‐managed contracts, dishonesty leads to a vicious cycle between commission fees and underreporting and the supplier who seeks to be treated fairly will cheat more, resembling fairness‐driven supplier opportunism. Our findings offer actionable insights for platforms in designing contracts that consider suppliers' trust and fairness, ensure compliance, and mitigate opportunism, contributing to sustainable and ethical supplier relationships.
title_cn: 平台-供应商合同中的信任与公平：在共享经济中应对供应商关切
abstract_cn: 摘要 信任和公平是共享经济可持续发展的关键，特别是在平台与供应商的关系中，众多个体供应商在不转让所有权的情况下提供对其耐用资产的访问。受到个性化工资的现实现象驱动，并通过与相关利益相关者的直接互动获取信息，本研究考察了基于共享的平台与其供应商之间的合同问题，平台设计了在信息共享和收入共享结构上有所不同的合同。供应商根据预期效用来评估这些合同，考虑了对共享信息的信任以及对收入分享的公平关注。除了信任和公平，我们还为双方引入了欺骗成本：对于平台而言，他们将信任度操作化为不愿意歪曲信息，而对于供应商，他们限制了机会主义行为，如少报收入。通过博弈论模型，我们在不同条件下推导出最优合同机制。我们的结果表明，信任度而非单纯的信任塑造了最优合同结果。在平台管理的合同下，收入共享比例随着信任或公平的增加而增加，但不会同时增加。对于供应商管理的合同，不诚实导致了佣金费用和少报收入之间的恶性循环，寻求公平对待的供应商会更加欺骗，这类似于以公平为驱动的供应商机会主义。我们的发现为平台提供了可行的见解，以设计考虑供应商信任和公平的合同，确保合规性并减轻机会主义，从而促进可持续和伦理的供应商关系。

title: Founders for hire? The role of venture studios in breaking the individual-opportunity nexus
abstract: Entrepreneurship theory has often posited the founder as the central agent of venture creation; from identifying opportunities, to mobilizing resources, and driving execution. We examine how venture studios – organizations that systematically create new ventures by taking over traditionally founder-led processes – challenge this assumption. Drawing on an inductive multiple case study of 16 venture studios with 50 primary and secondary interviews, we reveal how venture studios develop and validate ideas independently from founders prior to recruiting them, and how they coordinate the entrepreneurial process when these functions are separated. Our findings contribute to the literature on the individual-opportunity nexus, the entrepreneurial process and open the research agenda on venture studios as a new phenomenon in entrepreneurship. • Venture studios challenge the assumption that founder and idea are connected. • We provide qualitative evidence from 16 venture studios using 50 interviews. • Venture studios disentangle opportunity discovery from venture creation. • They coordinate the entrepreneurial process through managerial mechanisms. • Venture studios shift entrepreneurial agency from individual to the organization.
title_cn: 雇佣创始人？风险工作室在打破个人与机会联系中的作用
abstract_cn:
创业理论通常将创始人视为创业的中心主体；从识别机会到动员资源，再到推动执行。我们考察了创业工作室——通过接管传统由创始人主导的流程，系统地创建新企业的组织——如何挑战这一假设。基于对16个创业工作室的归纳多案例研究，结合50次主要和次要访谈，我们揭示了创业工作室如何在招募创始人之前独立开发和验证想法，以及当这些功能分离时，它们是如何协调创业过程的。我们的发现对个体与机会的联系、创业过程的文献作出了贡献，并为创业工作室作为一种新现象的研究议程开辟了新方向。

• 创业工作室挑战了创始人与创意之间存在联系的假设。
• 我们提供了来自16个创业工作室的定性证据，使用了50个访谈。
• 创业工作室将机会发现与企业创建分开。
• 他们通过管理机制协调创业过程。
• 创业工作室将创业代理权从个人转向组织。

title: When venture capital comes to town: Local ecosystem effects beyond funded ventures
abstract: When venture capital (VC) investment flows into a local economy, does it yield economic activity beyond the receiving ventures? While a large literature studies the effect of VC investments on venture-level activity, its consequences for broader economic activity are less well understood. We study the effect of VC investment flows on destination county employment, wages, and venture creation, using a novel instrument based on the ‘social connectedness’ of counties to major non-local sources of VC investment. Using detailed data on investor-to-venture VC flows, we find substantial positive effects: using instrumental-variable estimates, each million dollars invested into a county yields approximately one new venture, 41 jobs, and seven million dollars in payroll. We also document positive spillovers across industries, particularly toward those supplying VC-backed ventures—thereby contributing to the resource munificence of the local economy and its entrepreneurial ecosystem. • We study effects of VC flows across the US on destination-county economic activity. • We combine FE with a novel IV: social connectedness to major non-local sources of VC. • Each million $ invested yields at least 1 venture, 41 jobs, and 7 mln $ in payroll. • Effects spread beyond VC-receiving ventures to other industries through spillovers. • Supplier services benefit, helping to grow the local entrepreneurial ecosystem.
title_cn: 当风险投资进入城镇：超越资金支持项目的地方生态系统效应
abstract_cn:
当风险投资（VC）流入一个地方经济时，它是否会产生超出接受企业的经济活动？虽然大量文献研究了风险投资对创业层面的影响，但其对更广泛经济活动的后果则不那么明确。我们使用一种基于县与主要非本地风险投资来源之间“社会连通性”的新型工具，研究风险投资流对目的县的就业、工资和企业创立的影响。通过详细的投资者与企业之间的风险投资流数据，我们发现了显著的积极影响：利用工具变量估计，每投资一百万美元到一个县，约产生一个新企业、41个就业岗位和700万美元的工资支出。我们还记录了跨行业的积极溢出效应，尤其是对那些为风险投资支持的企业提供服务的行业——从而促进了地方经济资源的丰盈和其创业生态系统的发展。

• 我们研究了风险投资流对美国各地目的县经济活动的影响。
• 我们结合了固定效应与一种新型工具变量：与主要非本地风险投资来源的社会连通性。
• 每投资一百万美元至少带来1个企业、41个工作岗位和700万美元的工资。
• 影响超越接受风投资助的企业，向其他行业通过溢出效应扩散。
• 供应商服务受益，帮助发展地方创业生态系统。

title: Are language models intelligent enough for entrepreneurial work? A language-centered perspective
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are poised to fundamentally reshape entrepreneurial work, but it remains unclear whether this technology can support judgment-intensive entrepreneurial tasks. Prevailing skepticism holds that LLMs are inherently unreliable for such deep augmentation because, despite their language competence, they do not think. In contrast, we draw on Ludwig Wittgenstein and Alan Turing to advance a language-centered perspective on entrepreneurial work. Wittgenstein demystifies thought as linguistic activity and treats reasoning and understanding as linguistic abilities exercised in thinking. Extending this stance to the domain of machine intelligence, Turing grounds claims about intelligence in testable performances of language use. Together, they enable us to (1) conceptualize LLMs as an epistemic technology whose linguistic competence may suffice for the deep augmentation of entrepreneurship and (2) reorient research from skepticism toward fine-grained Turing tests of entrepreneurial work. We illustrate and support the language-centered perspective through two studies on crafting effective entrepreneurial narratives, a judgment-intensive task. Initially, we document that the LLM competently blends expert rhetorical strategies to create and refine narratives that effectively align with stakeholder needs. We then experimentally demonstrate that, when coupled with stakeholder-guided iterations, LLMs produce measurable improvements in narratives tailored to distinct stakeholder priorities. More broadly, our rethinking of entrepreneurial work through language-centered lenses helps theoretically support bold predictions about what entrepreneurs can accomplish with a nonhuman intelligence that has “only” mastered human language. • Challenges the philosophical underpinnings of skepticism about LLMs in entrepreneurial judgment • Positions LLMs as epistemic technologies for deep augmentation in entrepreneurship • Proposes a research program of fine-grained, task-specific Turing tests for entrepreneurial work • Demonstrates LLMs can craft and iteratively refine effective entrepreneurial narratives across diverse stakeholder priorities • Documents that LLMs help remove a key entry barrier to entrepreneurship
title_cn: 语言模型是否足够智能以进行创业工作？一种语言中心的视角
abstract_cn:
大型语言模型（LLMs）有望从根本上重塑创业工作，但尚不清楚这项技术是否能够支持判断密集型的创业任务。当前的怀疑论认为，由于LLMs尽管在语言能力上表现出色，却并不具备思考能力，因此在深度增强方面固有的不可靠性。与此相对，我们借鉴路德维希·维特根斯坦和艾伦·图灵的观点，推进一种以语言为中心的创业工作视角。维特根斯坦将思维阐释为语言活动，并将推理和理解视作在思考中运用的语言能力。将这一立场扩展到机器智能的领域，图灵将关于智能的主张基于可测试的语言使用表现。两者共同使我们能够（1）将LLMs概念化为一种认识论技术，其语言能力或许足以深度增强创业活动；（2）将研究的方向从怀疑转向对创业工作进行细致的图灵测试。我们通过两项关于 crafting effective entrepreneurial narratives（有效创业叙事制作）的研究，来阐明并支持这一以语言为中心的视角，这是一项判断密集型的任务。最初，我们记录到LLMs能够熟练结合专家的修辞策略，创造和完善有效对接利益相关者需求的叙事。随后，我们通过实验展示，当结合与利益相关者指导的迭代时，LLMs能够在针对不同利益相关者优先事项定制的叙事中实现可衡量的改善。更广泛地说，通过语言中心视角重新思考创业工作，有助于理论上支持关于创业者能通过“仅仅”掌握人类语言的非人类智能所能实现的大胆预测。 
• 挑战了怀疑论对LLMs在创业判断中基础哲学的支撑
• 将LLMs定位为深度增强创业的认识论技术
• 提出了针对创业工作的细致、任务特定的图灵测试的研究计划
• 展示了LLMs如何能够针对不同利益相关者优先事项，创造并迭代完善有效的创业叙事
• 记录了LLMs帮助消除创业的一项关键准入障碍

title: Debiasing entrepreneurial careers: A field experiment on female role model effects on entrepreneurial self-efficacy and early-stage career choices
abstract: Women remain underrepresented not only as founders but also as employees – or "joiners" – in young and small firms, limiting their exposure to entrepreneurial environments that often serve as critical pathways to venture creation. To address this gap, we investigate whether introducing female entrepreneur role models in educational settings can shape young women's entrepreneurial self-efficacy and early career choices. Drawing on role congruity theory and social cognitive career theory (SCCT), we conducted a field experiment involving over 430 university students and 98 early-stage entrepreneurs. Using a pre-test/post-test design and longitudinal tracking of early career choices, we explore the causal effects of exogenously assigned female role models on students' decisions to join a young or small firm. We find that exposure to social interactions with female entrepreneurs significantly boosts female students' entrepreneurial self-efficacy. More importantly, women who were paired with a female entrepreneur were over 10% more likely to join a young firm after graduation compared to those assigned to a male entrepreneur. Mediation analysis confirms that entrepreneurial self-efficacy is a key mechanism linking exposure to same-sex role models with women's decision to join a young firm. These findings highlight the potential of targeted role model interventions to reduce gender disparities in entrepreneurial entry pathways and expand the diversity of entrepreneurial ecosystems.
title_cn: 去偏见创业职业：关于女性榜样对创业自我效能和早期职业选择影响的实地实验
abstract_cn: 女性在初创企业中不仅作为创始人的比例不足，作为员工或“加入者”的比例也同样偏低，这限制了她们接触到通常被视为创业创立关键途径的创业环境。为了解决这一问题，我们考察了在教育环境中引入女性创业者榜样是否能够塑造年轻女性的创业自我效能感和早期职业选择。基于角色一致性理论和社会认知职业理论（SCCT），我们进行了一项涉及430多名大学生和98名早期创业者的实地实验。通过前测/后测设计以及对早期职业选择的纵向跟踪，我们探讨了外源性分配的女性榜样对学生选择加入年轻或小型企业的因果影响。研究发现，与女性创业者的社会互动显著提升了女性学生的创业自我效能感。更重要的是，与女性创业者配对的女性，在毕业后加入年轻企业的概率相比与男性创业者配对的女性高出10%以上。中介分析确认，创业自我效能感是将与同性榜样的接触与女性选择加入年轻企业之间联系起来的关键机制。这些发现突显了针对性榜样干预在减少创业入场途径中的性别差异和扩大创业生态系统多样性方面的潜力。

title: The power of consumer solidarity framing in scaling up social impact
abstract: We study how a French social venture helped scale up social impact by selling fair-priced milk. Besides market success, the venture became a symbol of fair pricing for farmers, influencing public discourse and inspiring new laws. We develop a process model where energized consumer solidarity framing serves as a catalyst for mobilizing ecosystem actors, leading to the widespread adoption of the venture's solution to an economic and social crisis. This distributed process of scaling up social impact unfolds outside the venture's direct control, relying on community enactment as well as engagement and energizing from the media, incumbent retailers and competitors, as well as politicians. We contribute to research on scaling up social impact by explaining how and why entrepreneurial framing can mobilize diverse ecosystem actors. We also advance entrepreneurial framing research by offering a social-emotional explanation of how framing can enable change. • French co-op helping farmers scaled up social impact with limited resources • Social entrepreneur used energized consumer solidarity framing to engage ecosystem actors • Diagnostic, prognostic, and motivational frames mobilized ecosystem actors • Continuous energizing between the entrepreneur and ecosystem actors enabled scaling up • Positive and negative emotions can be regulated in entrepreneurial framing
title_cn: 消费团结框架在扩大社会影响力中的力量
abstract_cn: 我们研究了一家法国社会企业如何通过出售公正定价的牛奶来扩大社会影响力。除了市场成功之外，这家企业还成为农民公正定价的象征，影响了公共话语并激励了新法律的制定。我们发展了一个过程模型，其中充满活力的消费者团结框架作为催化剂，动员生态系统参与者，从而促成了该企业解决经济和社会危机的方案的广泛采纳。这一分散的社会影响扩展过程在企业的直接控制之外展开，依赖于社区的实施以及媒体、现存零售商和竞争对手以及政治家的参与和激励。我们通过解释创业框架如何以及为何能够动员多样的生态系统参与者，为社会影响扩展的研究做出了贡献。我们还通过提出社会情感的解释，推进了创业框架研究，说明框架如何能够促进变革。• 法国合作社以有限的资源帮助农民扩大了社会影响 • 社会企业家使用充满活力的消费者团结框架来吸引生态系统参与者 • 诊断性、预见性和激励性框架动员了生态系统参与者 • 企业家与生态系统参与者之间的持续激励促进了扩展 • 积极和消极情绪可以在创业框架中被调节

title: Replication Studies in Entrepreneurship: Mapping Current Efforts and Identifying Future Opportunities
abstract: Although scholars recognize the importance of replication for advancing scientific progress, little is known about the extent to which replication efforts have informed entrepreneurship research. This research brief systematically reviews the body of replication studies in the field, examining which replication designs have been employed and where future efforts could be directed. We find that conceptual extension and empirical generalization replication designs dominate, while checking of analysis and exact replications remain rare. We advocate for greater use of diverse replication designs, highlight promising avenues for future replication efforts, and propose specific practices to strengthen transparency, documentation, and reproducibility.
title_cn: 创业领域的重复研究：绘制当前努力的图谱并识别未来的机会
abstract_cn: 尽管学者们认识到复制研究对推动科学进步的重要性，但关于复制努力在创业研究中所发挥的作用程度知之甚少。本研究简报系统地回顾了这一领域的复制研究，考察了采用了哪些复制设计以及未来努力的可能方向。我们发现，概念扩展和经验推广的复制设计占主导地位，而对分析的检查和精确复制则仍然较为少见。我们提倡更广泛地使用多样化的复制设计，强调未来复制努力的有前景的方向，并提出具体实践以加强透明度、文档记录和可重复性。

title: Startup Evaluations with Generative Artificial Intelligence: An Exploratory Study on Early-Stage Investments and Survival Predictions by Large Language Models
abstract: We examine the capabilities of large language models (LLMs) in evaluating early-stage ventures. In pre-registered experiments, we prompt selected LLMs to generate investment evaluations and survival predictions for an archival dataset of 171 new venture pitches under systematically varied information cues. We compare these LLM-generated evaluations with realized fundraising outcomes, post-campaign survival rates, and evaluations provided by a benchmark sample of human investors. LLMs show strong capabilities in mirroring real fundraising outcomes. In contrast, their apparent accuracy in predicting venture survival largely reflects prior exposure to some ventures’ digital footprints rather than genuine reasoning under uncertainty. Providing LLMs with scientific, contextual, and social information cues can improve their evaluations, but can also activate human-like heuristics, including anchoring and herding. Our study highlights LLMs’ potential in venture evaluations while cautioning that unobserved influences can mislead interpretations of their capabilities.
title_cn: 利用生成性人工智能的创业公司评估：大型语言模型对早期投资和存活预测的探索性研究
abstract_cn: 我们研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）在评估早期创业企业方面的能力。在预注册的实验中，我们提示选定的LLMs生成对171个新创企业项目的投资评估和存活预测，这些项目的信息线索经过系统性变化。我们将这些LLM生成的评估与实际的融资结果、活动后的存活率以及一组基准人类投资者提供的评估进行了比较。LLMs在反映实际融资结果方面表现出强大的能力。相较之下，它们在预测创业企业存活方面的表面准确性在很大程度上反映了对某些创业企业数字足迹的先前接触，而不是在不确定性下的真实推理。为LLMs提供科学、上下文和社会信息线索可以改善它们的评估，但同时也可能激活类人类的启发式思维，包括锚定效应和从众效应。我们的研究突显了LLMs在创业评估中的潜力，同时也提醒人们未观察到的影响可能导致对其能力的解释产生误导。

title: Accent Discrimination in Entrepreneurial Fundraising
abstract: Accent is a powerful, yet still socially acceptable, basis of discrimination that shapes interpersonal evaluations and access to opportunities, potentially disadvantaging entrepreneurs seeking funding. Bridging role congruity theory with sociolinguistic literature, we hypothesize that entrepreneurs whose regional accents align with the stereotypical entrepreneur are more likely to secure funding. We test this hypothesis in entrepreneurial pitching contexts using an observational study and two pre-registered experiments that manipulate entrepreneurs’ accents in pitch videos through a professional voice actor and AI. Across the UK, Italy, and the United States, the results support our hypothesis, providing robust evidence of accent-based discrimination in entrepreneurial fundraising.
title_cn: 创业融资中的口音歧视
abstract_cn: 口音是一种强有力但仍然社会可接受的歧视基础，它影响人际评估和机会获取，可能使寻求资金的企业家处于不利地位。我们将角色一致性理论与社会语言学文献相结合，假设那些地方口音与刻板印象中企业家的口音相符的企业家，更有可能获得资金支持。我们在企业 pitching 的情境中测试了这一假设，通过一项观察性研究以及两个预注册实验，利用专业配音演员和人工智能操控企业家的 pitch 视频中的口音。结果在英国、意大利和美国均支持我们的假设，为企业融资中的口音歧视提供了有力证据。

title: Cognitive Processes of Signal Set From Entrepreneurs and the Importance of Herds in Equity Crowdfunding
abstract: Drawing on a theoretical framework associated with the cognitive perspective, we propose that investors will rely on heuristic cognitive processes when signals from entrepreneurs are congruent or imbalanced incongruent. However, when signals are balanced incongruent, investors will engage in systematic cognitive processes that incorporate additional information from the herding behavior of other investors. We find evidence supporting our hypotheses in a sample of campaigns listed on a UK equity crowdfunding platform. Further analysis employing advanced machine learning techniques reveals that investors engage more in systematic processes when signals from entrepreneurs are in a weak form of balanced incongruence rather than a strong form.
title_cn: 创业者信号集的认知过程及其在股权众筹中的羊群效应的重要性
abstract_cn: 基于与认知视角相关的理论框架，我们提出，当企业家发出的信号一致或不平衡不一致时，投资者将依赖启发式认知过程。然而，当信号处于平衡不一致状态时，投资者将进行系统性的认知过程，这一过程纳入了来自其他投资者的羊群行为的额外信息。我们在一份列在英国股权众筹平台上的项目样本中发现了支持我们假设的证据。进一步的分析采用了先进的机器学习技术，揭示投资者在企业家发出的信号处于弱平衡不一致状态时比在强平衡不一致状态时更倾向于采用系统性过程。

title: Loss Aversion and Hybrid Entrepreneurship: Economic Insecurity, Low-Income Wage Work, and Side Hustles
abstract: Hybrid entrepreneurship as a side hustle is a widespread yet understudied coping strategy among low-income wage workers. This study examines how loss aversion is associated with such side-hustle activities and their links to well-being. We conducted a mixed-method study in Bangladesh. Quantitative analysis, based on surveys and lab experiments, indicates that loss aversion is associated with a higher likelihood of engaging in hybrid entrepreneurship, which is in turn linked to higher well-being. Qualitative analysis, based on in-depth interviews, illustrates mechanisms that may underlie these associations. Together, these findings provide insights into the protective role of hybrid entrepreneurship in poverty contexts.
title_cn: 损失厌恶与混合创业：经济不安全、低收入工资工作和副业
abstract_cn: 混合创业作为副业在低收入工资工人中是一种广泛存在但研究不足的应对策略。本研究探讨了损失厌恶与此类副业活动之间的关联及其与幸福感的联系。我们在孟加拉国进行了一项混合方法研究。基于调查和实验室实验的定量分析表明，损失厌恶与从事混合创业的可能性更高相关，而这又与更高的幸福感相关。基于深入访谈的定性分析则展示了可能潜藏于这些关联背后的机制。综合这些发现，为我们理解混合创业在贫困环境中的保护作用提供了新的视角。

title: Measuring Entrepreneurial Activities in the U.S.: Introducing the Entrepreneurship in the Population Survey
abstract: This paper introduces the Entrepreneurship in the Population (EPOP) survey, a nationally representative data source for understanding entrepreneurial activities across the United States since 2022. The EPOP survey is distinguished by its focus on a broad set of entrepreneurial activities and collects a wealth of information on the behaviors, challenges, and resources available to entrepreneurs. This data brief provides information on the design and measurement approach of the survey, discusses how to work with EPOP data, and outlines future plans for the survey, including a longitudinal data collection to support research on trajectories of current and prospective entrepreneurs.
title_cn: 在美国测量创业活动：引入人口调查中的创业研究
abstract_cn: 本文介绍了自2022年以来在美国进行的全国性代表性数据源——创业人群调查（EPOP），旨在理解美国的创业活动。EPOP调查的特点在于其关注广泛的创业活动，并收集有关创业者行为、挑战和可用资源的丰富信息。本文简要介绍了调查的设计和测量方法，讨论了如何使用EPOP数据，并概述了该调查的未来计划，包括进行纵向数据收集，以支持对当前及潜在创业者发展轨迹的研究。

title: Damned If You Do, Damned If You Don’t: How Counterfactuals Shape Early-Stage Investment Decision-Making
abstract: This study explores the role of investors’ counterfactual thinking regarding errors of commission and omission and how these relate to willingness to invest in new ventures. Drawing from behavioral economics and psychology, we focus on the salience of prospective counterfactuals at the screening stage. Our experimental findings demonstrate that increasing the salience of commission-related counterfactuals, particularly social counterfactuals, significantly reduces investors’ willingness to invest. This effect underscores the influence of anticipated regret, social comparison, and emotional responses in shaping investment behavior. By contrast, omission-related counterfactuals show no measurable impact, suggesting a prevailing not-investing norm and limited effect of potential fear of missing out among new-venture investors. Our results provide a deeper understanding of how investors navigate the tension between avoiding missed opportunities and minimizing losses, emphasizing the salience of situational triggers as opposed to stable traits or market-wide factors. These insights highlight the importance of counterfactual thinking as a theoretical lens for studying decision-making in the high-risk, high-reward context of new-venture investing.
title_cn: 做了就错，不做也错：反事实如何影响早期投资决策
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了投资者的反事实思维在错误恶性和遗漏方面的作用，以及它们如何与投资新兴企业的意愿相关。我们借鉴行为经济学和心理学的观点，重点关注在筛选阶段潜在反事实的显著性。我们的实验结果表明，增加与行为错误相关的反事实的显著性，特别是社会反事实，显著降低了投资者的投资意愿。这一效应强调了预期遗憾、社会比较和情感反应在塑造投资行为中的影响。相反，遗漏相关的反事实并未表现出可测量的影响，表明在新兴企业投资者中，存在一种普遍的“不投资”规范以及潜在的错失恐惧感的有限影响。我们的结果提供了更深刻的洞察，揭示了投资者如何在避免错失机会与最小化损失之间进行权衡，强调了情境触发因素的重要性，相较于稳定特质或市场广泛因素。这些见解突显了反事实思维在高风险、高回报的新兴企业投资决策研究中的重要性。

title: Perceived Pain or Gain: Role Identity, Gratification, and the Well-Being of Hybrid Entrepreneurs
abstract: Hybrid entrepreneurship—pursuing a venture while maintaining paid employment—can enhance or undermine well-being. Based on a longitudinal, qualitative study, we identify two distinct trajectories shaped by envisioned future selves: delayed entrepreneurial gratification with cumulative strains on well-being, and present gratification with supportive effects on well-being. Drawing on role identity theory, we theorize how role internalization and identity centrality relate to the well-being experiences of hybrid entrepreneurs and introduce gratification and rationalization as ways to handle strains on well-being. Our findings offer a deeper understanding of the divergent well-being experiences in hybrid entrepreneurship.
title_cn: 感知痛苦或收益：角色身份、满足感与混合型创业者的幸福感
abstract_cn: 混合创业——在保持有偿就业的同时追求创业——可以增强或削弱福祉。基于一项纵向定性研究，我们识别出两条由设想的未来自我塑造的不同轨迹：延迟的创业满足感伴随着对福祉的累积压迫，以及现时的满足感对福祉的支持性影响。借助角色认同理论，我们理论化了角色内化和身份中心性如何与混合创业者的福祉体验相关，并引入满足感和合理化作为处理福祉压力的方式。我们的研究结果提供了对混合创业中不同福祉体验的更深入理解。

title: The Double-Edged Sword of Entrepreneurial Orientation: Product Recalls and the Role of COO Power
abstract: This study examines how entrepreneurial orientation (EO) influences firms’ likelihood of product recalls. Integrating EO and upper echelons theory, we first argue that EO’s bold, variance-enhancing actions increase a firm’s product recall risk by diverting managerial attention away from quality control. Using 23 years of data on U.S. public firms, we find that EO increases recall likelihood.
