Second, we argue that this relationship is moderated by chief operating officer (COO) power, and the effectiveness of COO power is contingent on the firm’s product life cycle context. Empirical analyses support our theory and offer new insights about EO’s potential downsides.
title_cn: 创业导向的双刃剑：产品召回与首席运营官权力的作用
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了创业导向（EO）如何影响企业产品召回的可能性。通过整合EO与高层领导理论，我们首先认为EO的大胆、增强差异的行动会通过转移管理层的注意力使得质量控制受到影响，从而增加企业的产品召回风险。基于对美国上市公司23年的数据分析，我们发现EO确实会增加召回的可能性。其次，我们主张这一关系受到首席运营官（COO）权力的调节，而COO权力的有效性取决于企业产品生命周期的背景。实证分析支持我们的理论，并提供了关于EO潜在负面影响的新见解。

title: Mediated Reference Point Shifts: Breaking Free of the Family DNA
abstract: Institutional alignment comprises the integration of sanctioned organizational models and standardized managerial roles, thus reconstructing traditional organizations as contemporary actors with homogenous global identities. We adopt this perspective to illuminate the processes by which a business family homogenizes to conform to the global world order, through extensive use of advisors and management consultants. To do so, we narrate the experience of a third-generation Israeli-based multinational enterprise. We find that the cumulative adoption of standardized corporate organizational models periodically shifts the family’s decision-making reference points, enabling it to expand its product and geographic scope and act as a global player.
title_cn: 媒介化的参考点偏移：打破家庭基因的束缚
abstract_cn: 制度性对齐包括对授权的组织模型和标准化管理角色的整合，从而将传统组织重构为具备同质化全球身份的当代参与者。我们采用这一视角以阐明商业家庭通过广泛利用顾问和管理咨询公司的方式，使自身同质化以符合全球秩序的过程。为此，我们叙述了一家第三代以色列跨国企业的经验。我们发现，标准化企业组织模型的累积采纳定期改变了家庭的决策参考点，使其能够扩大产品和地理范围并成为全球参与者。

title: Founding Experience and Tech-Based Ventures’ Innovation: The Mediating Role of Absorptive Capacity
abstract: Drawing on insights from the knowledge-based view of the firm, we introduce a path that links founders’ founding experience to organizational design choices in tech-based ventures that instill absorptive capacity, which, in turn, allows them to produce innovation output at scale. We hypothesize that founders’ recognition of the importance of knowledge management, and their acquisition of skills to implement knowledge management systems effectively, underlie this venture-building path. We also suggest that this path is stronger when experienced founders have been exposed to venture capital investors in their prior ventures. We test our theoretical predictions with a longitudinal sample of 1,560 U.S. tech-based ventures.
title_cn: 创始经验与基于技术的创业公司创新：吸收能力的中介作用
abstract_cn: 根据知识基础视角的见解，我们提出了一条将创始人的创业经验与技术型企业的组织设计选择联系起来的路径，这种设计选择增强了吸收能力，从而使它们能够大规模地产生创新输出。我们假设，创始人对知识管理重要性的认识，以及他们获得有效实施知识管理系统所需技能的能力，是这一创业路径的基础。我们还建议，当有经验的创始人在之前的创业中接触过风险投资者时，这条路径会更加强烈。我们利用一项对1,560个美国技术型企业的纵向样本进行实证测试，以验证我们的理论预测。

title: Sustainability-Oriented Institutions and the Success of Green Reward-Based Crowdfunding Campaigns
abstract: Previous research has produced mixed evidence on the success of green crowdfunding campaigns. We investigate whether country-level environmental institutions help explain these inconsistencies by moderating backers’ responses. While such institutions may enhance campaign legitimacy, they can also reduce the perceived urgency to contribute by offering alternative support channels. Analyzing a large Kickstarter dataset with machine learning, we find that green campaigns are less likely to succeed, particularly in countries with stronger environmental institutions. Post-hoc analyses point to a crowding-out effect of institutional support, which dampens individual backing, and suggest that omitted variable bias may partly account for prior conflicting results.
title_cn: 面向可持续发展的机构与绿色奖励型众筹活动的成功
abstract_cn: 之前的研究对绿色众筹活动的成功与否提供了混合的证据。我们探讨国家层面的环境制度是否能帮助解释这些不一致现象，通过调节支持者的响应来影响结果。尽管这些制度可能增强活动的合法性，但它们也可能通过提供替代的支持渠道来降低贡献的紧迫感。通过分析一个大型的Kickstarter数据集并应用机器学习方法，我们发现绿色众筹活动的成功率较低，尤其是在环境制度较为健全的国家。后续分析指出了制度支持的挤出效应，这种效应抑制了个体的支持，并且建议遗漏变量偏差可能部分解释了之前结果的矛盾。

title: Still Waiting for Rewards? User Entrepreneur’s Reward Delivery Performance in Crowdfunding
abstract: Research on crowdfunding has largely focused on fundraising success, overlooking post-success outcomes. Drawing on Self-Determination Theory, we hypothesize that user entrepreneurs show higher intrinsic but lower extrinsic motivation than non-users, with intrinsic motivation boosting delivery performance and extrinsic motivation hindering it. Using a mixed-method approach—an exploratory qualitative study and an analysis of 322 crowdfunded ventures—we find that user entrepreneurs deliver rewards more timely than non-user entrepreneurs, and that intrinsic motivation significantly mediates this relationship, while extrinsic motivation’s mediating role is insignificant. We contribute to the user entrepreneurship and crowdfunding literatures by highlighting drivers of post-campaign success.
title_cn: 仍在等待回报？用户创业者在众筹中的回报交付表现
abstract_cn: 对众筹的研究主要集中在筹款成功上，忽视了成功后的结果。基于自我决定理论，我们假设用户企业家的内在动机高于非用户，但外在动机则较低，内在动机促进交付表现，而外在动机则会阻碍交付表现。通过混合方法研究——一项探索性的定性研究以及对322个众筹项目的分析——我们发现用户企业家比非用户企业家更及时地交付奖励，并且内在动机在这一关系中起到了显著的中介作用，而外在动机的中介作用则不显著。我们通过强调影响众筹活动后成功的驱动因素，为用户创业和众筹文献作出了贡献。

title: Enhancing Transparency and Replicability in Entrepreneurship Research with Preregistrations, Registered Reports, and Registered Revisions: A Call for Papers
abstract: Entrepreneurship Theory and Practice ( ETP ) is committed to advancing transparency, replicability, credibility, and rigor in research. To support this commitment, we encourage authors to preregister their research plans, submit empirical studies as Registered Reports, and engage with our evolving editorial processes, such as Registered Revisions. Drawing on practices across multiple disciplines, we offer guidance for integrating these publication formats into our field. We also provide multiple resources to support authors in adopting these approaches and to address the unique challenges of applying such formats to, for example, secondary data. By more widely embracing the Registered Report approach, we envision a future for entrepreneurship research that is characterized by greater credibility, replicability, transparency, and scientific impact. In this editorial, we motivate and, hopefully, guide future work by making a specific call for manuscripts for a virtual special issue of ETP focused on Registered Reports, strengthening ETP ’s longstanding commitment to methodological innovation. We offer a prospective vision—what we believe would be good for future literature—and our aim is to empower scholars to proactively shape new theoretical and empirical foundations in entrepreneurship research that enhance the credibility and replicability of entrepreneurship research.
title_cn: 提高创业研究的透明度和可重复性：关于预注册、注册报告和注册修订的征稿启事
abstract_cn: 《创业理论与实践》（ETP）致力于推动研究的透明度、可重复性、可信性和严谨性。为了支持这一承诺，我们鼓励作者预注册研究计划，将实证研究作为注册报告提交，并积极参与我们不断发展的编辑流程，如注册修订。基于多个学科的实践，我们提供关于如何将这些出版形式整合到本领域的指导。我们还提供多种资源以支持作者采用这些方法，并解决将这些格式应用于二手数据等独特挑战。通过更广泛地采纳注册报告的方法，我们设想创业研究的未来将体现更高的可信性、可重复性、透明度和科学影响力。在本编辑中，我们激励并希望为未来的工作提供指导，特别呼吁提交关于注册报告的手稿，以召开ETP的虚拟特刊，进一步加强ETP对方法创新的长期承诺。我们提供一个前瞻性的愿景——我们认为将对未来文献有利的方向——我们的目标是使学者们能够主动塑造在创业研究中提升可信性和可重复性的新的理论和实证基础。

title: Transformational Family Leaders in Multi-Unit Complex Family Firms: A Multilevel Analysis
abstract: Transformational leadership is recognized for bringing family members together; however, its role in multi-unit complex family firms that rely on nonfamily managers is poorly theorized. We find that transformational family chief executive officers (CEOs) positively affect the performance of business units run by nonfamily managers, suggesting that transformational family CEOs significantly influence nonfamily managers’ behavior. But the efficacy of that influence matters. Political skill enhances the transformational family CEO’s impact on business unit entrepreneurial orientation and financial performance. Business unit entrepreneurial orientation also mediates the relationship between the transformational family CEO and business unit financial performance, particularly when CEO’s political skill is high.
title_cn: 多单位复杂家庭企业中的转型家庭领导者：多层次分析
abstract_cn: 变革型领导被认为能够将家庭成员凝聚在一起；然而，其在依赖非家庭管理者的多单位复杂家庭企业中的作用却未得到充分理论化。我们的研究发现，变革型家庭首席执行官（CEO）对非家庭管理者所经营的业务单元的绩效产生积极影响，这表明变革型家庭CEO对非家庭管理者的行为有显著影响。但这种影响的有效性至关重要。政治技能增强了变革型家庭CEO对业务单元创业导向和财务绩效的影响。业务单元的创业导向在变革型家庭CEO与业务单元财务绩效之间起到中介作用，尤其是在CEO的政治技能较高时。

title: When Family Firm Reputation Backfires: The Role of Controllability in Consumer Responses to Negative CSR Incidents
abstract: We apply attribution theory to examine how family ownership status shapes consumer attitudes toward companies after negative corporate social responsibility incidents, focusing on incident controllability. Two longitudinal experiments reveal that, when controllability is unknown , consumers infer lower controllability for family firms and thus hold more favorable attitudes toward them than non-family firms. However, when controllability is known , low-controllability incidents lead to similar attitudes across firm types, whereas high-controllability incidents reverse the effect, resulting in more negative attitudes toward family firms than non-family firms. These findings challenge the prevailing assumption that family firms consistently benefit from their reputation and inform stakeholder communication strategies.
title_cn: 当家族企业声誉反弹时：可控性在消费者对负面企业社会责任事件反应中的作用
abstract_cn: 我们运用归因理论来研究家庭拥有状态如何影响消费者对公司在负面企业社会责任事件后的态度，重点关注事件的可控性。两项纵向实验表明，当可控性未知时，消费者对家庭企业推断出较低的可控性，因此对其持有比非家庭企业更为积极的态度。然而，当可控性已知时，低可控性事件导致各类型企业的态度相似，而高可控性事件则逆转了这一效果，导致消费者对家庭企业的态度比对非家庭企业更为负面。这些发现挑战了家庭企业始终受益于其声誉的普遍假设，并为利益相关者的沟通策略提供了重要启示。

title: Family Governance and Home Country’s Family Collectivism in Internationalization: A Meta-Analysis of Family Firm Heterogeneity
abstract: Family firms are not a homogeneous group. Thus, we theorize and empirically validate how governance differences among family firms (family governance heterogeneity) influence internationalization, considering the home country’s level of family collectivism as a moderator. Drawing on the bifurcation bias approach, we conduct a multilevel meta-analysis on 33,493 family firms. Our findings suggest that family CEOs and greater family involvement on the board hamper internationalization, but family collectivism improves these relationships. In contrast, non-founding generations promote internationalization independently of this country-level moderator. Our study reconciles the theoretical and empirical inconsistencies in the relationship between family governance and family firm internationalization.
title_cn: 家庭治理与本国的家庭集体主义在国际化中的影响：家族企业异质性的一项元分析
abstract_cn: 家族企业并不是一个同质化的群体。因此，我们理论化并实证验证了家族企业之间的治理差异（家族治理异质性）如何影响国际化，并考虑了母国的家族集体主义水平作为调节变量。基于二分偏差方法，我们对33,493家家族企业进行了多层次元分析。我们的研究结果表明，家族首席执行官和董事会中更高的家族参与度会阻碍国际化，但家族集体主义改善了这些关系。相反，非创始代际的领导者则独立于这一国家层面的调节变量，促进国际化。我们的研究调和了家族治理与家族企业国际化之间关系的理论与实证不一致性。

title: How Do Entrepreneurs Form Social Business Opportunity Beliefs? An Opportunity Actualization Perspective
abstract: The opportunity actualization perspective has recently gained attention as a key framework for exploring entrepreneurial opportunity. The perspective’s theorizing, however, predominantly focuses on profit-driven opportunities, limiting its applicability across the spectrum of entrepreneurial behavior. To broaden applicability, we examine how entrepreneurs motivated by social and economic considerations form their opportunity beliefs. We use a qualitative research approach that combines think-aloud protocols and semi-structured interviews with 24 impact entrepreneurs. Our findings allow us to develop a holistic model of social business opportunity belief formation, incorporating market and non-economic considerations, emphasizing the role of non-market stakeholders. We derive important implications for both theory and practice.
title_cn: 企业家如何形成社会商业机会信念？一种机会实现的视角
abstract_cn: 机会实现视角最近引起了关注，成为探索创业机会的关键框架。然而，该视角的理论主要集中在以利润为驱动的机会上，限制了其在创业行为范围内的适用性。为了拓宽适用性，我们考察了受到社会和经济考虑驱动的创业者如何形成他们的机会信念。我们采用了一种结合思维外化协议和对24位影响力创业者进行半结构化访谈的定性研究方法。我们的研究结果使我们能够构建一个全面的社会商业机会信念形成模型，融入市场和非经济考虑，强调非市场相关者的角色。我们为理论和实践提供了重要的启示。

title: Is My Boss Gaslighting Me? Uncovering the Nomological Network of Gaslighting In Leader-Employee Relationships
abstract: The term gaslighting is widely used today to describe deliberate attempts to undermine a person’s sense of reality. Although predominantly studied in romantic relationships, research suggests that gaslighting can occur in any context where a power imbalance exists. In this research, we provide a theoretical framework for understanding gaslighting in the workplace, highlighting its unique position within the workplace mistreatment literature. Next, focusing on the leader-employee dyad, we differentiate between the gaslighting tactics leaders employ (leader gaslighting) and target employees’ psychological experience of being gaslit (employee-experienced gaslighting). We also examine whether the consequences of leader gaslighting are conditional on the (in)formal power imbalance between the employee and leader. To test our conceptual model, we first develop separate measures of leader gaslighting tactics and employee-experienced gaslighting and accumulate construct validity evidence across multiple studies (Studies 1a-c, 3). Notably, we find consistent evidence of a bi-factor structure with a “global” destructive leadership factor, and “specific” leader gaslighting, abusive supervision, and social undermining factors. In Study 2, we show that leader gaslighting is positively associated with employee-experienced gaslighting, which in turn adversely impacts self-focused (organizational-based self-esteem and turnover intentions), performance-focused (task performance and workplace deviance), and leader-focused (impression management and affective commitment) outcomes. In Study 4, we show that the direct and indirect negative effects of leader gaslighting are weaker for employees who have relatively greater (versus less) informal (referent and expert) power than their leaders. We conclude with theoretical and practical implications of gaslighting in organizations.
title_cn: 我的老板在精神操控我吗？揭示领导与员工关系中精神操控的名义网络
abstract_cn: “煤气灯效应”这一术语如今被广泛使用，以描述故意试图削弱一个人现实感的行为。尽管主要是在浪漫关系中进行研究，但研究表明，煤气灯效应可以发生在任何存在权力失衡的情境中。在本研究中，我们提供了一个理论框架，以便理解职场中的煤气灯效应，强调其在职场不当行为文献中的独特位置。接下来，聚焦于领导者与员工的互动，我们区分了领导者所采用的煤气灯效应策略（领导者煤气灯效应）和员工对于被煤气灯效应影响的心理体验（员工体验的煤气灯效应）。我们还考察了领导者煤气灯效应的后果是否依赖于员工与领导者之间的（非）正式权力失衡。为了验证我们的概念模型，我们首先开发了领导者煤气灯效应策略和员工体验的煤气灯效应的单独测量，并在多项研究中积累了构念效度证据（研究1a-c, 3）。特别值得注意的是，我们发现有一致的双因子结构证据，包含一个“全球”的破坏性领导因子，以及“特定”的领导者煤气灯效应、虐待性监督和社会削弱因子。在研究2中，我们显示领导者煤气灯效应与员工体验的煤气灯效应之间呈正相关，后者反过来对自我关注的（基于组织的自尊和离职意图）、绩效关注的（任务表现和职场越轨）以及领导关注的（形象管理和情感承诺）结果产生不利影响。在研究4中，我们发现，领导者煤气灯效应的直接和间接负面影响对于那些相较于领导者拥有相对较大（而非较小）非正式（参照和专家）权力的员工较弱。最后，我们总结了煤气灯效应在组织中的理论和实践意义。

title: Leadership Behaviors: A Synthesis of Schools of Thought
abstract: We identify a divide between two schools of thought in leadership behavior research. The classical behavioral school (CBS) categorizes leadership behaviors based on their latent functions and meanings—task, relations, change, and moral—with the aim of achieving intersubjective agreement among evaluators. In contrast, the neo-behavioral school (NBS) focuses on the observable forms and manifestations of behavior—choices, embodiment, interactions, textual markers, and temporal patterns—in the pursuit of objective description. In this article, we conduct a metasynthesis to systematically describe, evaluate, and integrate these two schools. We identify their distinct research logics, showing that CBS categories enable cross-contextual generalization but conflate behavioral description with evaluative judgment, thereby risking causal indeterminacy and limiting actionability. Conversely, NBS approaches enable causally well-determined analyses of what leaders concretely do but risk reductionism and limited generalizability of meaning when studied in isolation. Building on this analysis, we identify school-specific best practices and distinguish limitations that can be mitigated within each school from those that require cross-school integration. We then develop an integrative framework that assigns distinct causal roles to concrete behavioral manifestations and to evaluations of their function and meaning, explicating how leadership behaviors acquire meaning across contexts and how CBS evaluations emerge as downstream consequences of NBS-specified behavioral aspects and various contextual factors. Finally, we propose a generative research agenda that advances leadership behavior research across schools of thought. The framework also has practical implications, enabling behaviorally grounded leadership development through actionable feedback, as well as more equitable and evidence-based leadership selection anchored in observable behavior.
title_cn: 领导行为：思想流派的综合分析
abstract_cn: 我们识别出领导行为研究中两种思潮之间的分歧。经典行为学派（CBS）根据领导行为的潜在功能和意义——任务、关系、变革和道德——对领导行为进行分类，旨在实现评估者之间的主体间一致性。相对而言，新行为学派（NBS）则关注行为的可观察形式和表现——选择、体现、互动、文本标记和时间模式——以追求客观描述。在本文中，我们进行了一项元综合研究，系统地描述、评估并整合这两种学派。我们识别出它们各自独特的研究逻辑，表明CBS的分类能够实现跨情境的概括，但将行为描述与评估判断混为一谈，从而面临因果不确定性风险，并限制可操作性。相反，NBS的方法能够对领导者具体所做的事情进行因果明确的分析，但在孤立研究时可能面临简化主义和意义的有限概括性风险。基于这一分析，我们识别出各学派特有的最佳实践，并区分出在每个学派内可以缓解的局限性与需要跨学派整合的局限性。随后，我们开发了一个整合框架，为具体的行为表现和对其功能与意义的评估分配了不同的因果角色，阐明了领导行为如何在不同情境中获得意义，以及CBS评估如何作为NBS指定的行为方面和各种情境因素的下游结果而出现。最后，我们提出了一个生成性的研究议程，以推动跨思潮的领导行为研究。该框架还具有实际意义，能够通过可操作的反馈促进基于行为的领导力发展，以及更公平和基于证据的领导选拔，扎根于可观察的行为。

title: Applicant Reactions to Criminal History Hiring: Stereotype Processes, Diversity Rationale, and Individual Difference
abstract: Given the recent evaluation and reduction of Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) initiatives in response to stakeholder concerns, we consider the context of applicant reactions to Fair Chance Hiring policies used to support the hiring of a stigmatized population: individuals with a criminal history. We draw on stigma and stereotyping literatures to examine non-stigmatized (those without a criminal history) applicants’ reactions to organizations’ use of Fair Chance Hiring language in recruitment. Specifically, we suggest that these third-party applicants will assign negative stereotypes to organizations with Fair Chance Hiring initiatives, subsequently impacting their job pursuit intentions. We also draw upon the diversity policy rationale literature to explore the effectiveness of moral and business case justifications in reducing negative stereotypes and increasing job pursuit intentions. Additionally, we consider an identity-based individual difference that qualifies these relationships. Through a vignette experiment and two behavioral experimental simulations exploring both active and passive job seekers, our results show that companies with Fair Chance Hiring policies are assigned higher levels of negative stereotypes, and that these stereotypes result in lower job pursuit intentions. However, using moral case (but not business case) justifications reduces applicants’ assignment of negative stereotypes to companies with these policies and improves applicants’ job pursuit intentions. In all, our results suggest that applicants’ negative stereotyping of organizations for upholding certain DEI policies is not inevitable; there are actionable approaches organizations can take to reduce negative reactions. Contributions and practical implications are discussed.
title_cn: 申请者对犯罪历史招聘的反应：刻板印象过程、多样性理由与个体差异
abstract_cn: 鉴于近期针对多样性、公平性和包容性（DEI）倡议的评估与减少是基于利益相关者的关注，我们考虑申请者对公平机会招聘政策的反应，该政策旨在支持雇佣一个有污名化背景的人群：有犯罪历史的个人。我们借鉴污名和刻板印象的相关文献，检视没有犯罪历史的申请者（非污名化申请者）对组织在招聘中使用公平机会招聘语言的反应。具体而言，我们认为这些第三方申请者将对实施公平机会招聘倡议的组织赋予负面刻板印象，进而影响他们的求职意向。我们还借助多样性政策的论证文献，探讨道德和商业案例的正当性在减少负面刻板印象和增加求职意向方面的有效性。此外，我们考虑一种身份基础的个体差异，这使这些关系有了更为深入的理解。通过一个情景实验和两种行为实验模拟，研究了主动和被动求职者，我们的结果显示，拥有公平机会招聘政策的公司被赋予更高水平的负面刻板印象，这些刻板印象导致更低的求职意向。然而，使用道德案例（而非商业案例）的论证减少了申请者对实施这些政策的公司的负面刻板印象，并提高了申请者的求职意向。总体而言，我们的结果表明，申请者对支持某些DEI政策的组织的负面刻板印象并非不可避免；组织可以采取一些切实可行的方法来减少负面反应。最后，我们讨论了研究贡献和实际意义。

title: Success and Failure in Blockchain-Based Interorganizational Ecosystems: A Governance Perspective
abstract: Interorganizational ecosystems require governance arrangements that can align diverse and often competing organizations around a shared value proposition. Although blockchain, as a form of digital governance, promises to facilitate large-scale collaboration by codifying and enforcing rules, decentralizing control, and ensuring verifiable data exchange, many blockchain-based interorganizational ecosystems nevertheless fail. Leveraging 155 interviews and detailed internal records from a large technology provider covering 81 interorganizational blockchain projects across 25 industries, supplemented by archival evidence on the trajectories of 196 projects and 70 podcast interviews, we develop a grounded theory explaining how governance misalignments trigger collaboration breakdowns. Specifically, we identify three underlying governance tradeoffs that expose tensions between blockchain’s network-centric rules and actor-centric needs: consistency versus flexibility in coordination, system reliance versus actor reliance in trust and control, and ecosystem utility versus member utility in incentives. These tradeoffs are amplified or attenuated by corresponding boundary conditions related to scale and cohesion (for coordination), co-opetition (for trust and control), and value logics (for incentives). Our study advances governance theory by explaining how blockchain interacts with traditional governance, shapes critical tradeoffs, and influences ecosystem success and failure. We also offer design principles to help managers navigate the inherent governance tradeoffs in ecosystem collaboration.
title_cn: 基于区块链的跨组织生态系统中的成功与失败：治理视角
abstract_cn: 跨组织生态系统需要治理安排，以便将多样化且常常存在竞争关系的组织围绕共同的价值主张进行协调。尽管区块链作为一种数字治理形式，承诺通过规范和执行规则、去中心化控制以及确保可验证的数据交换来促进大规模合作，但许多基于区块链的跨组织生态系统仍然失败。我们利用来自一家大型技术提供商的155次访谈和详细的内部记录，涵盖25个行业的81个跨组织区块链项目，并辅以对196个项目的轨迹的档案证据和70次播客访谈，发展出一种扎根理论，解释治理不对齐如何引发合作崩溃。具体而言，我们识别出三种潜在的治理权衡，这些权衡暴露了区块链的网络中心规则与参与者中心需求之间的紧张关系：协调中的一致性与灵活性、信任与控制中的系统依赖与参与者依赖，以及激励中的生态系统效用与成员效用。这些权衡受到与规模和凝聚力（对于协调）、竞争合作（对于信任和控制）以及价值逻辑（对于激励）相关的相应边界条件的放大或减弱。我们的研究通过解释区块链如何与传统治理互动、塑造关键权衡以及影响生态系统的成功与失败，推动了治理理论的发展。我们还提供了设计原则，以帮助管理者在生态系统合作中应对固有的治理权衡。

title: Controlling the Control Condition: A Critical Methodological Review of Control Conditions in Experimental Management Research
abstract: Control conditions are essential to establishing causal relationships in experimental management research, yet they receive little attention compared to treatments. This study thus examines the current state of control-condition selection and design in top-tier management journals, reviewing 958 experiments from 421 study papers published from 2021 to 2023. Our review shows that researchers use true and pseudo-control conditions. True control conditions—such as no-treatment, all-but-treatment, and treatment-as-usual controls—provide a baseline for interpreting the effect of the treatment condition. In contrast, pseudo-control conditions (e.g., opposite-treatment-level or alternative-treatment designs) allow relative comparisons across conditions without providing a baseline. Notably, 20% of the studies we examined presented causal claims that were not supported by their designs, opening the risk of their results being misinterpreted and their effect sizes being exaggerated. These issues were further exacerbated by a lack of method transparency and construct validity. In response, we offer guidelines not only for primary study researchers to support the selection and design of control conditions, thereby enhancing transparency and yielding valid interpretations of causal claims, but also for research synthesists, reviewers, and editors to evaluate the same.
title_cn: 控制控制条件：实验管理研究中控制条件的一个关键性方法论回顾
abstract_cn: 控制条件在实验管理研究中建立因果关系至关重要，但相比于处理条件，它们却很少受到关注。因此，本研究考察了顶级管理期刊中控制条件的选择和设计现状，回顾了2021年至2023年间发表的421篇研究论文中的958个实验。我们的回顾显示，研究者使用了真实控制条件和伪控制条件。真实控制条件——如无处理、除处理外的所有处理和常规处理控制——为解释处理条件的效果提供了基准。相反，伪控制条件（例如，相反处理水平或替代处理设计）允许在条件之间进行相对比较，但并未提供基准。值得注意的是，我们审查的20%的研究提出的因果主张并未得到其设计的支持，这增加了结果被误解和效应大小被夸大的风险。这些问题因缺乏方法透明性和构念效度而进一步加剧。对此，我们提供了指导方针，不仅供主要研究者支持控制条件的选择和设计，从而增强透明性并产生有效的因果主张解释，也供研究综合者、审稿人和编辑进行评估。

title: Venture Exits: A Review and Future Research Agenda
abstract: Exits are key events in the life cycles of entrepreneurial ventures. Venture exits have immense practical impacts on a variety of stakeholders, including founders, employees, organizations, resource providers, and broader ecosystems. As a result, the phenomenon of venture exits is of interest to a broad community of scholars across fields such as general management, entrepreneurship, finance and accounting, strategy, economics, organizational behavior, and psychology. We examine the multidisciplinary literature on venture exits, including initial public offerings, acquisitions, buy-outs, secondary sales, and related exit events, by analyzing 317 research articles published from 1991 to 2025. We integrate extant findings into a unified model describing the pre-exit, exit execution, and post-exit phases across multiple units of analysis: the individual, venture, resource provider, and environment. We identify common themes, predominant tensions, and important gaps, laying the foundation for a reinvigorated research agenda. Central to this agenda is embracing a process perspective that considers the fluidity of the actors, interests, and resources shaping venture exit decisions and outcomes. Grounded in our review, this perspective offers new insights into venture exits while creating opportunities to meaningfully challenge and advance existing approaches and theories.
title_cn: 风险投资退出：综述与未来研究议程
abstract_cn: 退出是创业企业生命周期中的关键事件。企业退出对创始人、员工、组织、资源提供者以及更广泛的生态系统等多方利益相关者有着巨大的实际影响。因此，企业退出现象吸引了来自一般管理、创业、金融与会计、战略、经济学、组织行为学和心理学等多个领域的学者的广泛关注。我们通过分析1991年至2025年间发表的317篇研究文章，审视关于企业退出的多学科文献，包括首次公开募股、收购、买断、二次销售及相关退出事件。我们将现有研究成果整合为一个统一模型，描述多个分析单元（个体、企业、资源提供者和环境）中的退出前、执行退出和退出后的阶段。我们识别出共同主题、主要紧张关系和重要空白，为重新激活研究议程奠定基础。这一议程的核心在于采用过程视角，考虑影响企业退出决策和结果的参与者、利益和资源的流动性。基于我们的综述，这一视角为企业退出提供了新的见解，同时创造了有意义地挑战和推动现有方法和理论的机会。

title: A Review of Systems Perspectives in Sustainability: How Systems Properties Convey Systems-Wide Dynamics
abstract: As seven of nine planetary boundaries are breached, management scholars face an urgent challenge: how can organizations address complex social-ecological crises that transcend traditional organizational boundaries and objectives? Responding to this need, researchers have leveraged a plurality of systems perspectives, yet current approaches remain nascent and fragmented. In this paper, we review 25 years (2000–2024) of empirical sustainability management research across 17 leading journals. We identify core systems properties—interrelatedness, nestedness, non-linearity, and emergence—that collectively illuminate four critical systems-wide dynamics: equilibrium, disequilibrium, adaptation, and organized systems change. This systematic review offers scholars a unified framework for theorizing and addressing critical sustainability challenges facing organizations, society, and the planet.
title_cn: 可持续性系统视角综述：系统属性如何传达系统整体动态
abstract_cn: 随着九大行星边界中的七个被突破，管理学者面临着一个紧迫的挑战：组织如何应对超越传统组织边界和目标的复杂社会生态危机？为应对这一需求，研究者们利用了多种系统视角，然而当前的方法仍然处于初步阶段，且碎片化严重。本文回顾了2000年至2024年间在17本领先期刊上发表的25年实证可持续性管理研究。我们确定了核心系统属性——相互关联、嵌套性、非线性和涌现——这些属性共同揭示了四个关键的系统动态：平衡、失衡、适应和有组织的系统变革。该系统性综述为学者们提供了一个统一的框架，以理论化和应对组织、社会及地球面临的关键可持续性挑战。

title: From Judgment to Action: Toward a Behavioral Perspective on Legitimacy
abstract: Research grounded in the legitimacy-as-perception perspective has primarily conceptualized legitimacy as a socio-cognitive judgment, assuming that evaluators act in line with their propriety judgments by supporting legitimacy objects they deem appropriate and opposing those they judge as inappropriate. However, this assumed alignment between legitimacy judgments and behaviors has rarely been tested directly. Advancing a behavioral perspective of legitimacy therefore requires systematically examining when and why legitimacy manifests in action rather than judgment alone. We pursue this agenda through two experiments that disentangle evaluative and behavioral responses to legitimacy objects. Study 1 (MTurk; n = 1,889) manipulates self-interest through incentives, norm congruence through framing, and whether propriety judgments are measured prior to behavioral responses or not. Study 2 (Prolific; n = 801) replicates this design, focusing on norm congruence and propriety judgment measurement prior to behavioral responses. Our results reveal several inconsistencies between the evaluative and behavioral manifestations of legitimacy. Specifically, the effects of norm violations and self-interest on behavior diverge from their effects on propriety judgments. In addition, Study 1 reveals a “neutralization effect,” whereby eliciting propriety judgments attenuates behavioral responses, an effect that was not observed in Study 2. Together, these findings challenge the assumption that legitimacy judgments reliably translate into behavior and underscore the need to distinguish between evaluative and behavioral manifestations of legitimacy. By identifying conditions under which legitimacy judgments guide, or fail to guide, action, this study advances a behavioral perspective on legitimacy and offers methodological guidance for future experimental research.
topics: Psychology of Moral and Emotional Judgment
title_cn: 从判断到行动：向合法性行为视角的转变
abstract_cn: 基于合法性感知视角的研究主要将合法性概念化为一种社会认知判断，假设评估者会根据他们的适当性判断行事，支持他们认为合适的合法性对象，而反对他们认为不合适的对象。然而，这种对合法性判断与行为之间的假定一致性很少被直接测试。因此，推进合法性的行为视角需要系统地检视合法性如何在行动中而非仅仅在判断中表现出来。我们通过两个实验来追求这一目标，这些实验拆解了对合法性对象的评估反应和行为反应。研究1（MTurk；样本量=1,889）通过激励操控自利性，通过框架操控规范一致性，并检查适当性判断是在行为反应之前测量还是之后测量。研究2（Prolific；样本量=801）复制了这一设计，重点关注规范一致性及在行为反应之前测量适当性判断。我们的结果揭示了合法性在评估和行为表现之间的几处不一致。具体而言，规范违反和自利性对行为的影响与它们对适当性判断的影响存在偏差。此外，研究1揭示了一种“中和效应”，即引发适当性判断会削弱行为反应，而这一效应在研究2中并未观察到。总体来看，这些发现挑战了合法性判断能够可靠转化为行为的假设，并强调了区分合法性的评估表现和行为表现的必要性。通过识别合法性判断指导或未能指导行动的条件，本研究推动了合法性的行为视角，并为未来的实验研究提供了方法论指导。

title: Organizations as Stages: A Dramaturgical Theory of the Societal Integration of Stigmatized Groups
abstract: This paper theorizes how organizations enable the societal integration of stigmatized groups. Drawing on Goffman’s relational perspective on stigma and his dramaturgical metaphors, we conceptualize organizations as “stages” on which stigmatized groups are presented to diverse audiences. We identify two fundamental forms of staging—concealing and normalizing—through which organizations can reduce sanctions from stigmatizing audiences and elicit acceptance among more supportive ones, thereby ultimately enabling societal integration. Our model specifies the structural antecedents that shape the likelihood of each form of staging, offering a nuanced understanding of when organizations adopt them as well as the tensions that may arise from doing so. Based on this, we extend research on organizations’ management of stigma by advancing a dramaturgical theory of the societal integration of stigmatized groups. Whereas prior work has largely assumed that managing the stigmatized attributes of groups is central (and often sufficient) for their broader integration, we demonstrate that integration ultimately depends on the management of audiences and must therefore be understood as an inherently audience-focused process.
title_cn: 组织作为舞台：对受污名群体社会整合的戏剧理论分析
abstract_cn: 本文理论探讨了组织如何促进被污名化群体的社会融入。基于戈夫曼关于污名的关系视角及其戏剧性隐喻，我们将组织概念化为“舞台”，在这些舞台上，被污名化的群体向不同的观众展示。我们识别出两种基本的展示形式——隐蔽和正常化——通过这两种方式，组织可以减少来自污名化观众的制裁，并在更具支持性的观众中获得接受，从而最终实现社会融入。我们的模型明确了塑造每种展示形式可能性的一系列结构性前因，提供了对组织何时采用这些形式以及由此可能产生的紧张关系的细致理解。在此基础上，我们通过推进被污名化群体社会融入的戏剧理论，扩展了关于组织管理污名的研究。尽管以往的研究主要假设管理群体的污名特征是其更广泛融入的核心（且往往足够），但我们证明，融入最终依赖于对观众的管理，因此必须将其理解为一个本质上以观众为中心的过程。

title: Pulling the Trigger Hurts: How Family CEOs Use Sensemaking to Overcome Hesitancy to Dismiss Managers
abstract: Managerial dismissal decisions are a common yet challenging task for CEOs, particularly those joining as new CEOs in organizations characterized by strong values. The purpose of this research is to shift the perspective on such decisions from being a quick rational cost–benefit analysis to being value-based and relational, thus creating an ambiguous and often time-consuming decision situation. We take a sensemaking perspective to understand how new CEOs make sense of potential managerial dismissals and how such sensemaking affects their ultimate dismissal decisions. We investigate this question through a multi-case approach, drawing on evidence from six family firms, which represent an extreme context of value-based organizations. We present a model of how dyadic and prospective sensemaking mechanisms shape whether CEOs are able to overcome their hesitancy to engage in managerial dismissals and, thus, engage in reasoned or rejected dismissals. Our findings extend knowledge on managerial dismissals, provide new insights into how new CEOs build their managerial teams, and explain how CEOs of family firms and other value-based organizations balance non-financial goals in difficult decisions.
title_cn: 触发痛苦：家族首席执行官如何运用意义构建克服解雇管理者的犹豫
abstract_cn: 管理解雇决策是首席执行官（CEO）面临的一项普遍而又具有挑战性的任务，尤其是那些在价值观强烈的组织中担任新任CEO的领导者。本研究的目的是将对这些决策的视角从快速的理性成本–收益分析转变为基于价值和关系的分析，从而创造出模糊且通常耗时的决策情境。我们采用意义构建的视角来理解新任CEO如何理解潜在的管理层解雇，以及这种理解如何影响他们最终的解雇决策。我们通过多案例研究的方法，借助六家家族企业的证据进行探索，这些企业代表了以价值为基础的组织的极端背景。我们提出了一个模型，说明双向和前瞻性的意义构建机制如何影响CEO克服对管理解雇的犹豫，从而决定进行合理或拒绝的解雇。我们的研究扩展了对管理解雇的知识，为新任CEO如何构建管理团队提供了新的见解，并解释了家族企业和其他以价值为基础的组织的CEO在困难决策中如何平衡非财务目标。

title: Detachment and Attachment: A Dual-Pathway Model of Leader Succession Rituals
abstract: Leader succession, the transition of a leadership position from a former leader to a new one, is a common yet potentially disruptive organizational process. Leader succession inherently carries risks and uncertainties, while rituals are often employed to instill order and provide stability. Building on this theoretical link between leader succession and rituals, we explored different types of leader succession rituals and investigated their impacts on succession outcomes. In a qualitative study (Study 1), we identified six types of leader succession rituals: artifact adoption, endorsement act, welcome ceremony, artifact return, closure act, and farewell ceremony. A duality emerged in our data: The first three ritual types focus on building attachment to the new leader, while the other three emphasize detachment from the former leader. Based on the findings from Study 1, we conducted a quantitative field study (Study 2) in a technology firm undergoing large-scale leader succession following an acquisition, as well as an experiment (Study 3) with full-time working adults from diverse organizational contexts via an online platform. Across Studies 2 and 3, we tested the dual-pathway model. The results not only confirm that the effects are transmitted through new leader attachment and former leader detachment but also reveal differential effectiveness among ritual types, with endorsement act, welcome ceremony, and farewell ceremony proving more effective in influencing succession outcomes.
title_cn: 离任与接任：一种双路径的领导继任仪式模型
abstract_cn: 领导接替，即将领导职位从前任领导者转移到新领导者，是一种常见但可能会造成干扰的组织过程。领导接替本质上伴随着风险和不确定性，而仪式通常被用来建立秩序并提供稳定性。在这一领导接替与仪式之间的理论联系基础上，我们探讨了不同类型的领导接替仪式，并研究了它们对接替结果的影响。在一项定性研究（研究1）中，我们识别出了六种类型的领导接替仪式：物品采纳仪式、认可行为、欢迎仪式、物品归还仪式、结束行为和告别仪式。在我们的数据中出现了一种二元性：前三种仪式类型侧重于建立与新领导者的情感联系，而后面三种则强调与前任领导者的情感脱离。基于研究1的发现，我们进行了一个定量现场研究（研究2），该研究在一家在收购后经历大规模领导接替的科技公司进行，同时在一个在线平台上对来自不同组织背景的全职工作成人进行了实验（研究3）。在研究2和研究3中，我们测试了双路径模型。结果不仅确认了其影响是通过新领导者的情感依附和前任领导者的情感脱离来传递的，还揭示了不同仪式类型的有效性差异，其中认可行为、欢迎仪式和告别仪式在影响接替结果方面更为有效。

title: Qualitative Research on Incumbents’ Responses to Discontinuous Technologies: Distilling an Integrative Framework of Context
abstract: Scholars have long and effectively used qualitative-inductive methodologies to understand the heterogeneous responses of established organizations—so-called incumbents—to emerging discontinuous technologies. However, after nearly 30 years of nuanced, contextualized qualitative research in this area, there is a unique opportunity—and essentially a need—for its distillation, integration, and critical reflection. In particular, while qualitative studies on heterogeneous incumbent responses aspire to develop “theories of the middle range,” and, thus, to acknowledge boundary conditions and contextual nuances, in practice, they rarely discuss a given theory’s range systematically. This disconnect limits the comparability, generalizability, and integration of findings. To address this instability, we inductively and critically review 127 qualitative studies on incumbents’ responses to discontinuous technologies published between 1998 and 2024. The central outcome of our review is an integrative framework of core contextual dimensions of incumbent responses to emerging discontinuous technologies, organized along six attributes related to the overarching domains of technology, market, and organization and institutions. Our distilled framework provides a taxonomic map for systematically comparing different empirical contexts of incumbent adaptation to discontinuous technologies and critically considering the boundary conditions of qualitatively induced theorizing in this regard. Our framework also enables us to present an encompassing program for future qualitative research on incumbent heterogeneity, one of the core phenomena underlying the overall process of creative destruction.
title_cn: 对现有企业对不连续技术反应的定性研究：提炼一个整合的背景框架
abstract_cn: 学者们长期以来有效地采用定性归纳方法论来理解既有组织——即所谓的“ incumbents”——对新兴不连续技术的异质性反应。然而，在这一领域经过近30年的细致、具体的定性研究后，我们面临着一次独特的机遇——实际上也有必要对这些研究进行提炼、整合和批判性反思。特别是，尽管关于既有组织对异质性响应的定性研究旨在发展“中程理论”，并因此承认边界条件和上下文细微差别，但实际上，它们很少系统地讨论特定理论的范围。这种脱节限制了研究结果的可比性、普遍性和整合性。为了解决这种不稳定性，我们对1998年至2024年间发表的127项关于既有组织对不连续技术反应的定性研究进行了归纳性和批判性的回顾。我们回顾的核心成果是一个整合框架，概述了既有组织对新兴不连续技术反应的核心上下文维度，该框架围绕与技术、市场、组织及制度相关的六个属性进行组织。我们提炼的框架为系统比较既有组织适应不连续技术的不同实证背景提供了一种分类图，并批判性地考虑了在这方面定性引导理论建构的边界条件。我们的框架还使我们能够提出一个全面的未来定性研究计划，以探讨既有组织的异质性，这是创造性破坏整体过程的核心现象之一。

title: How Gender Diversity and Equality in R&D Departments Jointly Affect Firm-Level Innovation Through Innovation Capabilities
abstract: Innovation research has long shown that firms depend on their R&D personnel to strengthen their innovation capabilities, sparking scholarly interest in how to best staff R&D departments for competitive advantage, with a focus on gender diversity. However, left unexamined are the mechanisms linking gender diversity in R&D departments and firm-level innovation. Further, despite growing interest in the conditions under which diversity may enhance innovation, researchers have not adequately addressed how department-level gender rank inequality—the disproportionate concentration of men and women at various hierarchical ranks—interacts with numerical diversity to affect innovation outcomes. We address both limitations by integrating insights from the information/decision-making perspective on diversity and research on inequality with research on innovation capabilities. Specifically, we develop and test a model explaining how R&D department gender diversity and gender rank equality jointly affect three firm-level innovation capabilities: breadth of external knowledge search, use of external knowledge, and quality of the innovation implementation process. We also examine the indirect effects of gender diversity on firm-level innovation, conditional on gender rank equality, via these capabilities. Our analyses of 552 corporate R&D departments over 12 years show how gender diversity and gender rank equality in R&D departments jointly relate to higher levels of all three firm-level innovation capabilities and, indirectly, to greater firm-level innovation. Our findings suggest that improving a firm’s innovation capabilities and performance requires both increased representation of women in R&D departments and proportional representation of men and women at all ranks of R&D departments.
title_cn: 性别多样性和研发部门的性别平等如何通过创新能力共同影响企业层面的创新
abstract_cn: 创新研究长期以来显示，企业依赖其研发人员来增强创新能力，这引发了学术界对如何最佳配置研发部门员工以获得竞争优势的关注，尤其是性别多样性的探讨。然而，性别多样性与企业层面创新之间的关联机制却鲜有研究。此外，尽管对多样性可能促进创新的条件日益关注，研究者们尚未充分讨论部门层级性别等级不平等——即男性和女性在不同层级的失衡集中——是如何与数量多样性相互作用，从而影响创新成果的。我们通过将信息/决策视角下的多样性洞察与不平等研究和创新能力研究相结合，来解决这两个局限性。具体而言，我们构建并测试了一个模型，解释研发部门的性别多样性和性别等级平等如何共同影响三个企业层面的创新能力：外部知识搜索的广度、外部知识的利用以及创新实施过程的质量。我们还考察了性别多样性在性别等级平等的条件下，通过这些能力对企业层面创新的间接影响。我们对552个企业研发部门在12年间的分析显示，研发部门的性别多样性和性别等级平等如何共同与所有三个企业层面的创新能力的高水平相关，并且间接促成更高的企业层面创新。我们的研究结果表明，提高企业的创新能力和业绩需要在研发部门增加女性代表性，并确保各层级的男性和女性的比例代表。

title: A CEO-Driven Process Model of Firm Responsiveness to Secondary Stakeholder Demands: The Roles of CEO Values and Passion
abstract: Secondary stakeholder demands represent increasingly important strategic issues for firms. However, the principal drivers of firm response remain poorly understood. We extend research on firm responsiveness to secondary stakeholders by introducing a new theoretical perspective to detail the cognitive processes through which key CEO attributes—namely, personal values and passion—shape the trajectories of firm responsiveness. We first outline key aspects of secondary stakeholder demands to explain why CEO values and passion are important determinants of a firm’s response to secondary stakeholder demands. We then explain how a CEO’s values and passion influence the process of firm responsiveness. Finally, we extend our arguments to illustrate how values and passion-infused responses may influence social (dis)approval among key organizational stakeholders. By focusing on the cognitive processes of CEOs, we offer novel theoretical contributions to stakeholder theory, strategic leadership research, and the literature on firm social evaluations.
title_cn: 一个以首席执行官为驱动的企业对次级利益相关者需求响应过程模型：首席执行官价值观和热情的作用
abstract_cn: 次要利益相关者的需求代表了对企业日益重要的战略问题。然而，企业对这些需求的反应主要驱动因素仍然不甚明了。我们通过引入一个新的理论视角，扩展了针对企业对次要利益相关者响应研究，详细阐述了关键CEO属性——即个人价值观和激情——如何塑造企业响应的轨迹。我们首先概述了次要利益相关者需求的关键方面，以解释为什么CEO的价值观和激情是企业应对次要利益相关者需求的重要决定因素。然后，我们解释了CEO的价值观和激情如何影响企业响应的过程。最后，我们扩展论证，说明融入价值观和激情的响应可能会影响关键组织利益相关者之间的社会（不）认可。通过关注CEO的认知过程，我们为利益相关者理论、战略领导力研究以及企业社会评价文献提供了新的理论贡献。

title: When Overconfident CEOs Deliver Higher Returns: Evidence From Acquisition Waves
abstract: Overconfident CEOs are frequently criticized for making value-destroying corporate acquisitions in which they acquire excessively and overpay for their acquisitions. By contrast, we argue that overconfident CEOs can deliver higher returns in acquisition waves because the motivation and the requirement for action speed that occur in acquisition waves are different from other acquisition contexts. Specifically, we hypothesize and find that overconfident CEOs are more likely to capture preemption opportunities by acting earlier in acquisition waves, and such rapid moves enable overconfident CEOs to achieve higher acquisition returns. In addition, drawing upon organizational learning research, we hypothesize and find that in acquisition waves, pre-wave experience with large and related acquisitions facilitates overconfident CEOs to pursue acquisitions even more quickly during acquisition waves, which further enhances acquisition returns. Contributions to the acquisitions and CEO overconfidence literatures are discussed.
title_cn: 当过于自信的首席执行官带来更高的回报：来自收购潮的证据
abstract_cn: 过于自信的首席执行官（CEO）常常因进行破坏价值的企业收购而受到批评，其中他们倾向于支付过高的价格和过度收购。相反，我们认为，过于自信的首席执行官在收购潮中能够实现更高的回报，因为收购潮中的动机和行动速度要求与其他收购情境有所不同。具体而言，我们假设并发现，过于自信的首席执行官更有可能通过在收购潮中较早行动来捕捉抢先机，而此类快速决策使他们能够获得更高的收购回报。此外，基于组织学习研究，我们假设并发现，在收购潮中，之前在大型相关收购中的经验有助于过于自信的首席执行官在收购潮中更快地进行收购，从而进一步提升收购回报。本文讨论了对收购和首席执行官过度自信文献的贡献。

title: “I Hold On”: How Country Music Songwriters Cope With the Precarity of Craft Work
abstract: Careers in creative crafts are perceived to be precarious: workers face constant rejection and receive low and erratic pay. Yet, some creative craft workers handle these challenges better than others. Precarity sometimes subsides as careers progress, and the core-periphery structure that typifies creative craft production systems is navigable. This raises the question of how creative craft workers can cope productively with the precarity of craft work. We research a prominent creative craft worker collective: country music songwriters. Our study captures the voices of 90 creative craft workers, drawing on secondary interviews with 66 songwriters working at the core of Nashville’s highly corporatized country music production system, and 24 operating at its social and spatial periphery. We find that the key to coping with precarity lies in achieving supportive patterns of social embeddedness by investing in primary craft skills, advancing higher-order vocational skills, and navigating the core-periphery structure of the creative craft production system. As apprentice songwriters practice their craft and learn how to organize their songwriting routines, they become increasingly vested in the system. Once they become master songwriters, they broaden their networks by liaising more with other industry stakeholders and engage with the system more reflexively to ensure their continued relevance. Peripheral workers engage in allyship and develop ties with workers positioned at the system’s core. We incorporate these social strategies in a grounded theoretical model capturing how songwriters cope with precarity. We conjecture that elements of the model generalize theoretically towards other corporatized creative craft production systems.
title_cn: “我坚持着”：乡村音乐创作者如何应对工艺工作的不稳定性
abstract_cn: 创意工艺职业被认为是脆弱的：工作者面临不断的拒绝，并且薪水低且不稳定。然而，一些创意工艺工作者应对这些挑战的能力比其他人更强。随着职业的发展，脆弱性有时会减弱，而典型的创意工艺生产系统中的核心-边缘结构也是可以导航的。这引发了一个问题：创意工艺工作者如何能够有效应对工艺工作的脆弱性。我们研究了一个著名的创意工艺工作者集体：乡村音乐词曲作家。我们的研究捕捉了90位创意工艺工作者的声音，依据对66位在纳什维尔高度企业化的乡村音乐生产系统核心工作的词曲作家的二次访谈，以及对24位在其社会和空间边缘操作的词曲作家的访谈。我们发现，应对脆弱性的关键在于通过投资于基本的工艺技能、提升更高阶的职业技能，以及驾驭创意工艺生产系统的核心-边缘结构，来实现支持性社会嵌入模式。作为学徒的词曲作家在练习他们的工艺和学习如何组织自己的创作例行时，逐渐增强对系统的投资。一旦他们成为大师级词曲作家，他们通过与其他行业利益相关者的联系来拓宽网络，并更加反思性地参与系统，以确保他们的持续相关性。边缘工作者则通过建立盟友关系，与处于系统核心的工作者发展联系。我们将这些社会策略纳入一个扎根的理论模型中，以捕捉词曲作家如何应对脆弱性。我们推测，该模型的元素在理论上可以推广到其他企业化的创意工艺生产系统中。

title: Structural Choices at Alliance Formation: Accounting for Partner Asymmetry in Industry Distance
abstract: Parties in an alliance aim to capture both common and private benefits. As they transfer and jointly create knowledge to generate common gains, differences in private benefits can arise due to asymmetric knowledge spillovers. Our model of alliance structural choices incorporates the alliance itself—the channel through which partner knowledge flows—to reflect the fact that partners and the alliance may operate in different industry contexts. We propose that partners select structural governance mechanisms (equity governance and alliance scope) to enable valuable knowledge flows while protecting themselves from unwanted spillovers. Analyzing a large sample of U.S. alliances from 1985 to 2024, we find that asymmetric distance predicts these governance choices and that it is linked to the simultaneous use of multiple structural safeguards, including equity governance and a narrow alliance scope.
title_cn: 联盟形成中的结构选择：考虑行业距离中的合作伙伴不对称性
abstract_cn: 联盟中的各方旨在获取共同利益和私人利益。当它们转移并共同创造知识以产生共同收益时，由于知识溢出不对称，私人利益之间可能出现差异。我们的联盟结构选择模型将联盟本身纳入考虑——即合作伙伴知识流动的渠道——以反映合作伙伴和联盟可能在不同产业背景下运作这一事实。我们提出，合作伙伴选择结构性治理机制（股权治理和联盟范围），以促进有价值的知识流动，同时保护自己不受不必要的知识溢出影响。通过分析1985年至2024年间大量美国联盟的数据，我们发现不对称距离能够预测这些治理选择，并且与同时使用多种结构性保障措施相关，包括股权治理和狭窄的联盟范围。

title: Social Media and Organizations: An Integrative Review and Future Research Directions
abstract: Social media have fundamentally reshaped how organizations and audiences interact, challenging theoretical assumptions in the management literature. With this integrative literature review, we take stock of a fragmented body of research, based on an analysis of 647 articles across 9 disciplines. Our synthesis identifies three dominant perspectives: an organization-centric perspective that views social media as tools for strategic action; an audience-centric perspective that emphasizes audience empowerment and contestation; and a platform-centric perspective that highlights how platform features and algorithms condition organizational outcomes and audience interactions. Building on these perspectives, we develop an integrative framework of organizational enablement, audience empowerment, and platform mediation that captures how social media extend and redirect established theories. We distill five major research areas—identity and community, social evaluations, corporate social responsibility, false narratives, and organizational outcome drivers—that capture the core themes of management scholarship to date. Our analysis shows how social media distinctiveness—heightened emotionality, many-to-many diffusion, and expanded actor visibility—has generated theoretical extensions while leaving key debates unresolved. We argue that management research must better integrate across perspectives, expand attention to platform mediation, and incorporate insights from related fields. We conclude with a bold future research agenda for researchers who aim to advance theorizing on organization audience relationships in a complex media ecosystem.
title_cn: 社交媒体与组织：综合性回顾与未来研究方向
abstract_cn: 社交媒体从根本上重塑了组织与受众之间的互动，挑战了管理文献中的理论假设。通过这项整合性文献综述，我们对一系列零散的研究进行了梳理，基于对647篇文章的分析，涉及9个学科。我们的综合分析识别出三种主导视角：以组织为中心的视角，视社交媒体为战略行动的工具；以受众为中心的视角，强调受众的赋权与争论；以及以平台为中心的视角，强调平台特性和算法如何影响组织成果与受众互动。基于这些视角，我们构建了一个整合框架，涵盖组织赋能、受众赋权和平台中介，反映社交媒体如何扩展和重定向既有理论。我们提炼出五个主要研究领域——身份与社区、社会评估、企业社会责任、虚假叙事以及组织成果驱动因素——这些领域反映了迄今为止管理学研究的核心主题。我们的分析表明，社交媒体的独特性——增强的情感性、多对多的传播方式和扩大的参与者可见性——促成了理论的扩展，但同时留下了关键争论未得到解决。我们认为，管理研究必须更好地整合不同视角，扩展对平台中介的关注，并结合相关领域的见解。最后，我们提出了一项大胆的未来研究议程，旨在推进在复杂媒体生态系统中组织与受众关系的理论研究。

title: Physical Disability in the Workplace: A Comprehensive Review and Unifying Framework
abstract: In the United States, more than a quarter of the working-age population experiences physical disabilities that shape workplace participation and career outcomes. Drawing on 168 articles, we synthesize the management literature to develop a unifying framework of focal mechanisms, workplace outcomes, and boundary conditions. In doing so, we offer a clear definition of physical disability, long absent from management research. We also highlight the fragmented theoretical and methodological landscape, in which most studies aggregate disability types, overlooking critical heterogeneity. Our review charts a path forward by identifying key gaps, outlining directions for future scholarship, and emphasizing the need for stronger theoretical grounding and methodological rigor. Finally, we discuss implications for policy and practice, underscoring how greater inclusion of persons with physical disabilities can advance various workplace outcomes.
title_cn: 工作场所中的身体残疾：全面综述与统一框架
abstract_cn: 在美国，超过四分之一的工作年龄人群经历身体残疾，这些残疾影响着工作场所的参与度和职业结果。我们基于168篇文章，对管理文献进行了综合分析，构建了一个统一的框架，其中涵盖了重点机制、工作场所结果和边界条件。在这一过程中，我们提供了一个明确的身体残疾定义，这一方面在管理研究中长期缺失。我们还强调了理论和方法论的碎片化现状，大多数研究将残疾类型进行汇总，忽视了关键的异质性。我们的回顾为前进的道路进行了规划，识别了关键的研究空白，概述了未来学术研究的方向，并强调了加强理论基础和方法严谨性的必要性。最后，我们讨论了政策和实践的影响，强调了如何更大程度地包容身体残疾人士能够推动各种工作场所结果的改善。

title: Family Political Embeddedness: A Double-Edged Sword For Entrepreneurial Entry in China
abstract: Political embeddedness and family embeddedness are two influential yet distinct areas of entrepreneurship research. In this study, we integrate these two streams of research to focus on family political embeddedness and its implications for new venture creation. Drawing on the social embeddedness perspective and utilizing a longitudinal dataset of 17,084 individuals from the China Family Panel Studies (2014–2022), complemented by 32 qualitative interviews, we examine the relationship between family political embeddedness and entrepreneurial entry, revealing a nuanced interplay. Our theory and related findings reveal a general negative relationship between family political embeddedness and entrepreneurial entry. However, we also unveil an indirect pathway through which family political embeddedness can foster entrepreneurial entry through political news consumption. Finally, we theorize and find that perceived government efficiency strengthens the relationship between political news consumption and entrepreneurial entry. Our work yields important theoretical and practical implications.
title_cn: 家庭政治嵌入：在中国创业进入中的双刃剑
abstract_cn: 政治嵌入性和家庭嵌入性是创业研究中两个有影响力但截然不同的领域。本研究将这两个研究领域整合在一起，聚焦于家庭政治嵌入性及其对新创企业创建的影响。基于社会嵌入性视角，并利用中国家庭面板调查（2014-2022）的17,084名个体的纵向数据，辅以32次定性访谈，我们考察了家庭政治嵌入性与创业进入之间的关系，揭示了其中的细微相互作用。我们的理论及相关发现表明，家庭政治嵌入性与创业进入之间普遍存在负相关关系。然而，我们还发现一个间接路径，即家庭政治嵌入性通过政治新闻消费促进创业进入的可能性。最后，我们提出理论并发现，感知政府效率增强了政治新闻消费与创业进入之间的关系。我们的研究产生了重要的理论和实践意义。

title: Custodians at the Crossroads: Managing Change at Institutionally Significant Places
abstract: Custodians are integral to institutional maintenance, and instrumental to preserving institutionally significant places. Yet when institutional decline impacts institutionally significant places, we do not know how custodians manage the tensions between preservation efforts aimed at saving these places and the need for adaptation. Using a rich qualitative dataset of interviews with custodians from and participant observation at 26 rural church buildings in England, we examine custodian responses when institutional decline in belief in Christian religion impacts sacred church buildings. We find that in response to experiencing place materiality, relational, and practices tensions, custodians are torn between preserving the institutional role of place and the need to find resources to maintain such places. Custodians manage these tensions by deliberatively evaluating materiality alterations and adopting innovative practices within the bounds of institutional appropriateness and resource constraints. The process we flesh out leads to distinct outcomes: place augmentation, practices augmentation, and, in a few instances, no augmentation. Our model portrays the pathways followed by institutional custodians that are rooted in the tensions they experience between the attachment to the institutional role of place and the need for change in response to institutional decline. Our study contributes to research on custodianship and place by uncovering divergent custodian responses when institutional decline impacts institutionally significant places and place as an institutional carrier and the locus of custodian place work.
title_cn: 十字路口的守护者：在制度重要场所管理变革
abstract_cn: 看护者在机构维护中扮演着不可或缺的角色，并对保护具有机构重要性的场所至关重要。然而，当机构衰退影响到这些重要场所时，我们尚不清楚看护者如何管理保护努力与适应需求之间的紧张关系。通过对来自英格兰26座乡村教堂的看护者进行访谈和参与观察，我们利用丰富的定性数据集，研究了当对基督教信仰的机构性衰退影响到神圣教堂建筑时，看护者的反应。我们发现，在经历场所的物质性、关系性和实践紧张时，看护者在保留场所的机构角色与寻找资源以维护这些场所之间感到左右为难。看护者通过深思熟虑地评估物质性变化，并在机构适当性和资源限制的范围内采用创新实践来管理这些紧张关系。我们阐述的过程导致了不同的结果：场所增强、实践增强，以及在少数情况下没有增强。我们的模型描绘了机构看护者所遵循的路径，这些路径根植于他们在对场所的机构角色的依附与对机构衰退所需变化之间所经历的紧张关系。我们的研究通过揭示在机构衰退影响机构重要场所时看护者的不同反应，及场所作为机构载体和看护者场所工作的中心，为看护和场所研究做出了贡献。

journal_name: Organizational Behavior and Human Decision Processes
title: The downside of generosity: How rare giving fosters stronger social connection
abstract: Giving serves not only to benefit others and society but also to foster social connections between givers and recipients. However, more giving is not necessarily merrier. This research finds that social connection depends not only on the act of giving but also on how many others receive the gesture from the same giver. Rare givers—those who give to fewer recipients—are perceived as more socially connected to each recipient than broad givers—those who give to many (the rare giving effect). This effect emerges across diverse contexts, including interpersonal gift exchanges in both new and existing relationships and corporate donations. As a result, rare givers enjoy a relational advantage: their gifts are valued more, and they are more likely to receive reciprocation (e.g., a gift in return or purchasing from the firm), even though they are perceived as less generous than broad givers. However, the negative effect of the number of recipients on perceived connection is attenuated when recipients are closely connected (e.g., donations to multiple charities supporting the same cause) or when gifts reinforce connections between recipients (e.g., friends sharing items in a matching set). These findings highlight an overlooked cost of broad generosity, with implications for managing interpersonal relationships and firms’ giving strategies.
title_cn: 慷慨的弊端：稀有的给予如何促进更强的社会连接
abstract_cn: 赠予不仅旨在造福他人和社会，还有助于建立施予者与受赠者之间的社会联系。然而，更多的施予并不一定意味着更快乐。本研究发现，社会联系不仅依赖于施予的行为，还依赖于同一施予者给予多个受赠者的次数。稀有施予者——那些只给予少数受赠者的人——被认为与每位受赠者之间的社会联系更紧密，而广泛施予者——那些给予很多受赠者的人——则相对较弱（稀有施予效应）。这一效应在不同场景中普遍存在，包括新关系和旧关系中的人际赠礼交换，以及企业捐赠。因此，稀有施予者享有关系上的优势：他们的礼物更具价值，他们更有可能获得回报（例如，回赠礼物或从企业购买），尽管他们的慷慨程度被认为低于广泛施予者。然而，当受赠者之间存在紧密联系时（例如，向多个支持相同事业的慈善机构捐款）或当礼物强化受赠者之间的联系时（例如，朋友共享一套相同的物品），受赠者人数对感知联系的负面影响会减弱。这些发现突显了广泛慷慨所带来的被忽视的成本，且对管理人际关系和企业的施予策略具有重要启示。

journal_name: Organizational Behavior and Human Decision Processes
title: Responses to Outcome Disclosure: People Asymmetrically Disclose or Hide Their Outcomes to Protect Others’ Emotions
abstract: This paper examines how what people disclose about their successes or failures depends on what others have disclosed. We propose that these decisions are guided less by self-focused motives and more by a concern for how one’s words will affect the other person’s emotions. Across nine studies (N = 8,229, including preregistered experiments, 2,216 self-written responses, and 473 real conversation dyads), we find that responders are consistently more likely to disclose matching outcomes (e.g., failures in response to failures) than non-matching ones (e.g., failures in response to successes), but with two asymmetries not predicted by prior theories. First, responders are more likely to disclose matching failures (failures in response to failures) than matching successes (successes in response to successes). Second, when experiencing non-matching outcomes, responders are more likely to disclose failures in response to successes than they are to disclose successes in response to failures. These patterns reflect other-focused attempts to comfort those who have failed and avoid exacerbating their distress. Beyond whether they disclosed, responders also adjusted how they disclosed, for instance, softening success disclosures in response to failures with consolation or apologies. These effects generalized across domains (e.g., health, career, financial), across relationships varying in closeness and status, and emerged in choices between pre-written responses, self-generated responses, and live conversations involving actual interpersonal disclosures. Disclosure decisions were moderated by factors such as liking and domain relevance. By demonstrating that responders’ outcome disclosures are systematically shaped by concern for the wellbeing of others, this work reframes disclosure as an intended conversational tool for protecting others’ emotions rather than managing self-presentation.
title_cn: 结果披露的反应：人们不对称地披露或隐瞒自己的结果，以保护他人的情感。
abstract_cn: 本文探讨了人们关于成功或失败的披露如何受到他人披露内容的影响。我们提出，这些决策更少受到自我中心动机的驱动，而更多地关心个体的言辞将如何影响他人的情感。在九项研究中（N = 8,229，包括预注册实验、2,216篇自撰回应和473对真实对话），我们发现回应者更倾向于披露匹配结果（例如，以失败回应失败）而非不匹配结果（例如，以失败回应成功），但存在两个之前理论未预测的非对称现象。首先，回应者更可能披露匹配的失败（以失败回应失败），而不是匹配的成功（以成功回应成功）。其次，当经历不匹配的结果时，回应者更可能以成功回应失败，而不是以失败回应成功。这些模式反映了关注他人的尝试，以安慰那些经历失败的人，并避免加剧他们的痛苦。除了是否披露外，回应者还调整了披露的方式，例如，在回应失败时用安慰或道歉来软化成功的披露。这些效果在不同领域（如健康、职业、财务）、不同亲密度和地位的关系中得到了广泛的验证，并出现在预先撰写的回应、自生成回应和涉及真实人际披露的现场对话选择中。披露决策受到诸如喜好和领域相关性等因素的调节。通过展示回应者的结果披露是系统地受他人福祉关切的影响，这项研究将披露重新框架为一种旨在保护他人情感的对话工具，而非管理自我呈现的手段。

title: Juggling ambiguity in sustained ignoring work: The persistent dismissal of warnings at a university hospital
abstract: How do actors overlook uncomfortable information? We add to the understanding of how potential problems can be ignored over long periods, in spite of recurrent warnings. Ignoring then becomes a dynamic process of responding to evolving ignoring ‘threats’ or triggers by combining knowledge-seeking and knowledge avoidance in ways that must be continuously legitimated, both in one’s own eyes and in those of relevant parts of the environment. Drawing on a longitudinal case study, we find that ambiguity-juggling – mutually supporting acts foregrounding and backgrounding ambiguity – constitute a key element of such ignoring work. Our study adds to the literatures on strategic or wilful ignorance and ambiguity management by providing a novel explanation for how actors dynamically mobilize motives for ignoring and thereby navigate uncomfortable information that evolves over time. As we show, sustained forms of ignoring involves interactions between shifting ignoring triggers, adaptive ignoring work, and evolving states of organized ignorance. This conceptualization contributes to the ignoring literature by extending current accounts of the ‘why’, ‘how’, ‘how much’, and ‘who’ of ignoring, as well as its outcomes.
title_cn: 在持续忽视的工作中平衡模糊性：一所大学医院对警告的持续不理
abstract_cn: 演员如何忽视不舒服的信息？我们对潜在问题在长时间内被忽视的理解有所补充，尽管有反复的警告。忽视因此成为一个动态过程，涉及对不断演变的忽视“威胁”或触发因素的响应，通过结合寻求知识和避免知识的方式，这种方式必须在自己和环境中相关部分的眼中不断合法化。基于一项纵向案例研究，我们发现模糊性 juggling——相互支持的行为，突出和背景化模糊性——构成了这种忽视工作的关键要素。我们的研究通过提供一种新颖的解释，说明演员如何动态动员忽视的动机，从而应对随着时间演变的不舒服信息，进一步丰富了战略性或故意忽视和模糊性管理的文献。正如我们所展示的，持续的忽视形式涉及不断变化的忽视触发因素、适应性的忽视工作和不断演变的有组织的无知状态之间的互动。这种概念化为忽视文献做出了贡献，扩展了当前对忽视的“为什么”、“如何”、“多少”和“谁”的解释，以及其结果。

title: Unlearning for Democratic Organizing
abstract: This article advances empirical and conceptual understanding of how unlearning can help to sustain democratic organizing. While learning to confront persistent tensions is widely recognised as a central element of democratic organizing, there is surprisingly little research on its practice. In exploring this gap, unlearning emerged as a distinct yet integral aspect of individual and collective learning in democratic organizing – and to sustaining democratic organizing across time and scale. Our abductive analysis of qualitative research across four established (>20 years) and scaled (>50 members) UK-based worker cooperatives uncovered the centrality of relational processes of unlearning habitual beliefs, values, and patterns of behaviour in interaction with others, the organization, and the environment. Empirically, we discern three relational dynamics that create a need for unlearning and three relational practices for engaging in unlearning. We offer conceptual depth by formulating three analytical propositions for future research and practice.
title_cn: 为民主组织而非主流化的再学习
abstract_cn: 本文推进了对如何通过“去学习”来维持民主组织的实证和概念理解。尽管学习应对持久紧张关系被广泛认为是民主组织的核心要素，但对其实践的研究却出乎意料地少。在探索这一空白时，“去学习”作为个体和集体学习在民主组织中的一个独特而又不可或缺的方面浮现出来，并且对在时间和规模上维持民主组织至关重要。我们对四个成立超过20年且规模超过50名成员的英国工人合作社的定性研究进行了溯因分析，揭示了在与他人、组织和环境的互动中，去学习习惯性信念、价值观和行为模式的关系过程的中心性。从实证上看，我们辨识出三种关系动态，这些动态创造了去学习的需求，以及三种参与去学习的关系实践。我们通过提出三个分析命题，为未来的研究和实践提供了概念深度。

title: Tech will save us: The semiotic construction of utopian myth
abstract: Utopian myth provides hope and social dreaming of a radically different future society, while simultaneously naturalising contemporary social and political order. This study explores the semiotic production and organising role of utopian myth in tech entrepreneurship. Drawing upon Roland Barthes, we apply a multimodal semiotic analysis to examine the promotional videos of TechBBQ, the organisers of the largest tech event in the Nordics. We demonstrate how multiple semiotic modes collectively construct and signify the utopian myth of a tech ecosystem possessing the potential to shape a radically different future and to innovate solutions to the grand challenge of climate change. Based on our findings, we conclude that utopian myth equips organisational fields with semiotic tools to engage with grand challenges and to attain ‘ownership’ of these issues, without any commitment to concrete courses of action. We propose that the organising role of utopian myth is to legitimise organisational fields as agents capable of transforming society, to instil hope, and to justify any means necessary to realise the utopian dream. Our study contributes to the literature on the role of myth and utopianism in organisations by describing and conceptualising the semiotic construction and role of utopian myth in the organisation of fields.
title_cn: 技术将拯救我们：乌托邦神话的符号学构建
abstract_cn: 乌托邦神话为一个截然不同的未来社会提供了希望和社会梦想，同时又自然化了当代的社会和政治秩序。本研究探讨了乌托邦神话在科技创业中的符号生产及其组织角色。我们借鉴罗兰·巴特的理论，采用多模态符号学分析方法，研究北欧最大科技事件TechBBQ的宣传视频。我们展示了多种符号模式如何共同构建和表征科技生态系统的乌托邦神话，该生态系统具有塑造截然不同未来和创新应对气候变化重大挑战的潜力。基于我们的研究结果，我们得出结论：乌托邦神话为组织领域提供了符号工具，以应对重大挑战，并“拥有”这些问题，而无需承诺具体的行动方案。我们提出乌托邦神话的组织角色在于合法化组织领域作为能够改变社会的参与者，激发希望，并为实现乌托邦梦想提供必要手段的正当性。我们的研究通过描述和概念化乌托邦神话在组织领域中的符号构建和角色，为有关神话和乌托邦主义在组织中作用的文献做出了贡献。

title: Vanguard Actors: The Role of Researchers in the Emergence of Ethics Review Procedures in the Social Sciences in Europe
abstract: The convergence of bureaucratic systems in higher education is fueled by a variety of actors. However, academics in their roles as researchers are typically conceptualized as recipients or resisters. In this paper we study an instance of non-convergence – the slow, scattered, and sparse emergence of ethics review procedures for social science in Europe – and identify the role of researchers in movement towards convergence. We examine the actors, pressures, and actions that lead to the emergence of ethics review procedures for social science research in three theoretically sampled countries – Denmark, Finland, and France. Contrary to established theory we do not observe change emanating from states, professional associations, or intermediary organizations. Instead, we show that pockets of researchers sought out, created, and expanded ethics review procedures for social science. We conceptualize these researchers as vanguard actors: members of a profession who seek out practices that will allow them to continue their work in a changing environment and expand it to include new audiences, methodologies, phenomena, resources, and collaborators. In establishing new practices that ensure the viability of their work, vanguard actors are a distributed, unintentional, bottom-up engine of practice change. We contribute to the literature on the convergence of forms and practices in higher education by showing how vanguard actors are distributed points of action that organize movement towards convergence as they engage in their daily research work. We enlarge understandings of professions and stratification by showing how practicing members, operating as vanguard actors, create profession-level changes in practices. Finally, we complicate critical conversations about ethics review procedures in social sciences by calling attention to the heterogeneity of researchers, including those who understand ethics review procedures to be a resource.
title_cn: 先锋行动者：研究人员在欧洲社会科学伦理审查程序出现中的角色
abstract_cn: 高等教育中官僚系统的趋同受到多种参与者的推动。然而，学者在其研究者角色中通常被视为接受者或抵制者。本文研究了一个非趋同的实例——欧洲社会科学伦理审查程序的缓慢、分散和稀疏的出现，并识别了研究者在趋同进程中的作用。我们考察了导致社会科学研究伦理审查程序在三个理论抽样国家（丹麦、芬兰和法国）出现的参与者、压力和行动。与既有理论相反，我们并未观察到变化源自国家、专业协会或中介组织。相反，我们展示了研究者的群体寻求、创造并扩展社会科学的伦理审查程序。我们将这些研究者概念化为先锋行动者：他们是追求能够在变化环境中继续工作并扩展到新受众、新方法论、新现象、新资源和新合作者的职业成员。在建立确保其工作可行性的新实践时，先锋行动者成为一种分散的、非故意的、自下而上的实践变革引擎。我们通过展示先锋行动者作为分散的行动点如何在日常研究工作中组织趋同的运动，丰富了关于高等教育中形式和实践趋同的文献。我们通过展示作为先锋行动者的实践成员如何在实践中创造职业层面的变化，拓展了对职业和分层的理解。最后，我们通过关注研究者的异质性，包括那些将伦理审查程序视为资源的研究者，复杂化了关于社会科学伦理审查程序的批判性讨论。

title: Your silence speaks loudly. A ventriloquial approach to corporate silence about commitment in argumentative polylogues
abstract: Corporate social responsibility research often emphasizes the commissive effects of corporate discourse, ignoring silence or considering it a deliberate strategy to evade stakeholder pressure. From this perspective, only corporate discourse commits, and silence is the absence of discourse. This paper challenges this approach. Drawing on ventriloquial theory (Cooren, 2010) and the notion of metaventriloquism (Castor, 2020), this paper develops the concept of corporate commissive silence (CCS) to theorize how corporate silence on commitments operates as a malleable sign and a contested semiotic space. Specifically, it interprets CCS as an absence of message that different agents identify, attribute to a company, and imbue with meaning to promote their own opinions about what animates and/or should animate that company. As this concept highlights, not only words but also silence can generate commissive dynamics for corporations. The communicative force of this type of silence does not depend on corporate intentionality, but rather on the operations of appropriation and reinterpretation executed by other agents. To illustrate the utility of this concept, I describe several metaventriloquial practices executed by various agents in a recent controversy surrounding Disney’s silence on Florida’s HB 1557 law.
title_cn: 你的沉默发出强烈的信号。一种关于企业在议论性多声对话中对承诺保持沉默的腹语术方法
abstract_cn: 企业社会责任研究通常强调企业话语的承诺效应，忽视沉默或将其视为避免利益相关者压力的刻意策略。从这一角度来看，只有企业话语才具有承诺性，而沉默则被视为话语的缺席。本文对这一观点提出质疑。借助言语代言理论（Cooren, 2010）和元言语代言的概念（Castor, 2020），本文提出了“企业承诺沉默”（CCS）的概念，以理论化企业在承诺沉默时的操作方式，作为一种可塑的符号和有争议的符号空间。具体而言，CCS被解读为一种信息缺失，不同主体能够识别、归因于某个公司并赋予其意义，以推动自己对该公司应该或正在被动员的事项的看法。正如这一概念所强调的，不仅仅是语言，沉默也可以为企业产生承诺动力。这种类型的沉默的传播力并不依赖于企业的意图，而是取决于其他主体执行的占有与再解释的操作。为了说明这一概念的实用性，我描述了在最近围绕迪士尼对佛罗里达州HB 1557法律的沉默而引发的争议中，各种主体所执行的几种元言语代言实践。

title: Contesting the future: Utopian politics and the defence of fossil fuel hegemony
abstract: Despite national and corporate commitments to carbon neutrality, global greenhouse gas emissions continue to rise, causing worsening climate change impacts. Within this context, climate protesters around the world are demanding a different future. In this paper, we are interested in how the fossil fuel industry and its political supporters have responded to these challenges and maintained fossil fuel hegemony. Based on interviews with influential informants from the political, lobbying and fossil fuel sectors as well as texts from media, speeches and press releases, our analysis shows how hegemony is defended by critiquing protesters’ imaginaries as utopian (impossible) or dystopian (undesirable) and by constructing a conservative counter-utopia that is linked to the status quo of fossil fuel dominance. The findings explain how utopian politics is employed to defend hegemony by i) spatially fragmenting opponents and incorporating protesters’ future imaginaries within a conservative counter-utopia, and ii) temporally constructing a pathway from the status quo to this conservative counter-utopia. Our discussion of utopian politics contributes to the literature on imaginaries by understanding how constructed futures are politically navigated, and to discussions on hegemony by explaining the expansive (spatially and temporally) discursive strategies of maintaining hegemony. We conclude by arguing for the importance of utopian thinking in addressing climate change.
title_cn: 争夺未来：乌托邦政治与化石燃料霸权的防卫
abstract_cn: 尽管国家和企业承诺实现碳中和，全球温室气体排放仍在持续上升，导致气候变化影响的加剧。在这种背景下，世界各地的气候抗议者正在呼吁不同的未来。本文关注化石燃料行业及其政治支持者如何应对这些挑战并维持化石燃料霸权。我们的分析基于对来自政治、游说和化石燃料部门的影响力信息提供者的访谈，以及媒体、演讲和新闻稿等文本。结果显示，霸权通过将抗议者的想象批评为乌托邦式（不可能的）或反乌托邦式（不理想的）来被捍卫，同时构建与化石燃料主导现状相关的保守反乌托邦。研究结果解释了乌托邦政治如何通过 i) 空间上分割对手，并将抗议者的未来想象纳入保守反乌托邦来捍卫霸权，以及 ii) 时间上构建从现状到这个保守反乌托邦的路径。我们对乌托邦政治的讨论为想象的文献贡献了新的视角，理解了构建的未来是如何在政治上进行导航的，同时也对霸权的讨论阐释了维持霸权的广泛（空间和时间上的）话语策略。最后，我们强调乌托邦思维在应对气候变化中的重要性。

title: Caught in a “Triple Bind”: How the physical body experiences paradox
abstract: What does it mean to “embody” paradox? In this paper, we adopt a "literal" interpretation of this question, examining how physical bodies experience, enact, and respond to knotted paradoxical tensions within the context of interpersonal and structural power relationships. We draw on a qualitative study of self-employed, community midwives (N=47) whom we interviewed jointly with their family members (N=51). Our findings paint a rich picture of how midwives experience knotted tensions through embodied polarities of presence-absence and energy-fatigue. We also elucidate how paradox knotting and power relations combine to transform midwives’ experiences of embodied tensions into a restrictive “triple bind,” where physical depletion adds a “third dimension” of material constraint to the interpersonal and structural constraints that characterize double binds. We detail three response patterns midwives use in attempting to navigate the triple bind, highlighting both the importance and limits of interpersonal support and gendered role negotiations. Our work advances understanding of paradox as a non-rational, embodied phenomenon, the navigation of which may require radical systemic change.
title_cn: 被困于“三重束缚”：身体如何体验悖论
abstract_cn: “体现”悖论是什么意思？在本文中，我们采用了一种“字面”的解读，探讨身体如何在人际和结构权力关系的背景下体验、表现和回应纠结的悖论张力。我们基于对自雇社区助产士（N=47）和她们家属（N=51）的联合访谈的定性研究进行分析。我们的研究发现生动描绘了助产士如何通过存在-缺席和能量-疲惫的身体极性体验到这些纠缠的张力。同时，我们阐明了悖论的纠结和权力关系如何结合将助产士的身体张力体验转变为一种限制性的“三重束缚”，其中身体的耗竭为人际和结构性约束（特征为双重束缚）增加了“第三维度”的物质限制。我们详细描述了助产士在尝试应对三重束缚时使用的三种应对模式，强调了人际支持和性别角色协商的重要性和局限性。我们的研究深化了对悖论作为一种非理性的、身体化现象的理解，而应对这种现象可能需要根本性的系统变革。

title: Reactivity to Benchmarking Corporate Human Rights: A configurational perspective
abstract: Corporate sustainability rankings have become integral to global governance but their growing influence contrasts sharply with limited progress on urgent societal challenges. This raises critical questions about the value of rankings and the conditions under which rankings may drive substantive adoption of corporate social practices. In the context of the Corporate Human Rights Benchmark (CHRB), we find that (non)reactivity to rankings emerges under different combinations of commitment alignment, pressure and capacity for organizational transparency. Specifically, we find that societal pressure amplifies commensuration, capacity enables self-disciplining, while rankings can be ignored or avoided when commitment or pressure are absent. Furthermore, we find that lacking capacity leads to superficial or symbolic compliance depending on the pressure faced by ranked organizations. Our study advances research on rankings by reframing reactivity through a configurational lens, demonstrates how external–internal alignment fosters substantive implementation of social practices, and identifies the conditions under which rankings contribute to pluralistic governance in business and human rights.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 对企业人权基准的反应：一种配置视角
abstract_cn: 企业可持续性排名已成为全球治理的重要组成部分，但其日益增长的影响与在紧迫社会挑战上取得的有限进展形成了鲜明对比。这引发了关于排名价值和排名可能驱动企业社会实践实质性采纳的条件的重要问题。在企业人权基准（CHRB）的背景下，我们发现，针对排名的（非）反应在承诺一致性、压力和组织透明度能力的不同组合下出现。具体而言，我们发现社会压力会增强可比性，能力则促进自我规范，而当缺乏承诺或压力时，排名可能会被忽视或规避。此外，我们还发现，缺乏能力会导致根据被排名组织面临的压力产生表面或象征性的合规。我们的研究通过构型视角重新构建了反应性，推动了关于排名的研究，展示了外部与内部一致性如何促进社会实践的实质性实施，并识别了排名在商业与人权领域中促进多元治理的条件。

title: Love Thy Neighbour: The impact of social cohesion on community economic resilience
abstract: This study examines the role of social cohesion in fostering communities’ economic resilience, defined as their ability to positively adjust and maintain economic functioning while facing adversity. Covid-19 caused worldwide disruptions, forcing firms to close overnight as a measure to stop the virus from spreading. However, considerable within-country regional heterogeneity manifested in the impact of the various applied measures. Focusing on organization exits across 379 Dutch municipalities and applying a mixed methods approach, we argue and find that social cohesion – conceptualized as involving kinship and residential stability – increases communities’ economic resilience and that family firms are a conduit through which social cohesion affects economic resilience. Kinship creates the willingness to help other members, even if this means suffering some losses. Residential stability fosters a social infrastructure that is necessary for the quick mobilization of a community’s resources. Family firms mediate the relationship between social cohesion and economic resilience, by leveraging their long-term orientation, strong, community-embedded relationships, and internal resources.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 爱邻如己：社会凝聚力对社区经济韧性的影响
abstract_cn: 本研究考察了社会凝聚力在促进社区经济韧性中的作用，经济韧性被定义为在面对逆境时积极调整和维持经济运作的能力。新冠疫情导致全球范围内的干扰，迫使企业在一夜之间关闭，以遏制病毒传播。然而，各国内部在实施措施的影响上表现出显著的区域异质性。我们聚焦于379个荷兰市镇的组织退出情况，并采用混合方法论，论证并发现社会凝聚力——被概念化为亲属关系和居住稳定——能够增强社区的经济韧性，而家族企业则是社会凝聚力影响经济韧性的一个渠道。亲属关系促使成员之间愿意互相帮助，即使这意味着要承受一些损失。居住稳定则促进了社区资源快速动员所需的社会基础设施。家族企业通过利用其长期导向、强大的社区嵌入关系和内部资源，调解了社会凝聚力与经济韧性之间的关系。

title: Unpacking the Paradoxes of Trust in Uncertain Times
abstract: Trust has been recognized as a foundational pillar underpinning the functioning of organizations and society. However, contemporary developments have unleashed unprecedented uncertainty, challenging established notions of social order and raising urgent questions about how trust will operate in the years to come. A deeper understanding of the interface between uncertainty and trust is needed, elaborating how institutions and advanced technologies offer pathways for building and maintaining trust. Our analysis identifies three core paradoxes: trust–uncertainty, trust–institution, and trust–technology. These paradoxes highlight that trust proves indispensable where it is hardest to build, that trusted institutions falter when uncertainty is high and they are needed most, and that technologies designed to reduce uncertainty can in fact increase it. This special issue curates five studies that illuminate these paradoxes. A qualitative study of whistleblowing reveals tensions in how organizations signal ability, benevolence, integrity, transparency, and identification across stakeholders and over time (trust–uncertainty). A mixed‑methods study of a high court theorizes fidelity mechanisms—recognition, selection, socialization—that stabilize the production of “trust objects” (trust–institution). A multilevel network analysis of a corporate top‑management team shows that shared organizational vocabularies foster trust; when those words align with organizational identity, trust ties traverse unit boundaries (trust–institution). A study of a Covid‑19 mutual‑aid platform shows how digital affordances catalyze institution‑based trust that seeds emotional trust among strangers (trust–technology). Finally, a study of a peer‑to‑peer market shows that accreditation (technology verification) and reputation have opposite effects as cultural distance grows—accreditation narrows trust gaps while reputation can widen them—with implications for inequality (trust–technology). Building on these insights, our editorial articulates across the piece a forward-looking research agenda emphasizing the recursive interplay between trust and uncertainty and calling for research to illuminate the emergent, paradoxical, and often nonlinear patterns of trust development.
title_cn: 解读不确定时期信任的悖论
abstract_cn: 信任被视为支撑组织和社会运作的基础支柱。然而，当代的发展带来了前所未有的不确定性，挑战了既有的社会秩序观念，并提出了关于未来信任运作方式的紧迫问题。我们需要更深入地理解不确定性与信任之间的接口，阐明机构和先进技术如何为建立和维持信任提供路径。我们的分析确定了三个核心悖论：信任与不确定性、信任与机构、信任与技术。这些悖论突显出，在最难建立信任的地方，信任是不可或缺的；在不确定性高且最需要的时候，受信机构往往会动摇；而旨在减少不确定性的技术实际上可能会增加不确定性。本特刊精选了五项研究，以阐明这些悖论。一项对揭发者行为的定性研究揭示了组织在不同利益相关者间及时间上如何发出能力、善意、正直、透明度和认同感的信号所产生的紧张关系（信任与不确定性）。一项对高等法院的混合方法研究理论化了忠诚机制——认知、选择、社会化——这些机制稳定了“信任对象”的产生（信任与机构）。对企业高层管理团队的多层次网络分析显示，共享的组织语言能够促进信任；当这些词语与组织身份对齐时，信任联系能够跨越单位的边界（信任与机构）。对一个Covid-19互助平台的研究展示了数字功能如何催化基于机构的信任，从而在陌生人之间播种情感信任（信任与技术）。最后，一项关于点对点市场的研究表明，认证（技术验证）和声誉在文化距离增大时产生相反的效应——认证缩小信任缺口，而声誉则可能扩大信任缺口，这对不平等产生影响（信任与技术）。基于这些洞见，我们的编辑在整篇文章中阐明了一个前瞻性的研究议程，强调信任与不确定性之间的递归互动，并呼吁研究揭示信任发展的新兴、悖论性和常常非线性模式。

title: Media Review: The Past as a Safe House, and the Afterlives of Clandestine Organizing AndersonPaul ThomasOne Battle after AnotherWarner Bros. Pictures
abstract: International audience
title_cn:
媒体评论：过去作为安全的庇护所，以及隐秘组织的余生  
安德森·保罗·托马斯  
一场又一场的战斗  
华纳兄弟电影公司
abstract_cn: 国际观众

title: ‘. . . All Stakeholders Are Equally Unhappy’: The politics of frame consensus
abstract: Consensus is often seen as a necessary condition for collaboration in multi-stakeholder initiatives and in multilateral settings. Yet, how the requirement of consensus shapes deliberations and negotiations of global governance issues – and at what costs – remains underexamined. This article raises the questions: How are contested frames revised for consensus in multilateral contexts, and what are the implications for the issues framed?
