We trace contestations over the framing of sustainable diets across diverse actors in the United Nations (UN). Based on a frame analysis of official policy documents, substantiated by insights from interviews with UN staff and experts on UN policy, we develop a processual model of frame revision in multilateral governance that explains how different forms of frame consensus – integrative, antagonistic and evasive – are reached. We advance framing research by theorizing how frames are revised for consensus through compartmentalization and subversion of contentious issues, thereby masking incommensurable differences. We also contribute to research on deliberative tensions through a processual take on consensus in multilateral settings. These contributions have wider implications for understanding global governance, highlighting why UN consensus politics are often associated with incremental rather than radical changes.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: “. . . 所有利益相关者都同样不满”：框架共识的政治学
abstract_cn: 共识常被视为多利益相关者倡议和多边环境中合作的必要条件。然而，共识的要求如何影响全球治理问题的讨论和谈判 — 以及所付出的代价 — 仍然鲜有研究。本文提出了以下问题：在多边环境中，如何修订有争议的框架以达成共识？所框定问题的意义又是什么？我们追踪了不同参与者在联合国（UN）中对可持续饮食框架的争论。通过对官方政策文件的框架分析，并结合对联合国工作人员和政策专家的访谈见解，我们发展了一个关于多边治理中框架修订的过程模型，解释了如何达成不同形式的框架共识——综合型、对抗型和逃避型。我们通过理论化框架修订的过程增强了框架研究，揭示了框架是如何通过对争议问题的划分和颠覆进行修订，以掩盖不可通约的差异。同时，我们还通过过程性视角对多边环境中的共识进行研究，为讨论张力的研究做出了贡献。这些研究成果对理解全球治理具有更广泛的意义，突显了为什么联合国的共识政治往往与渐进而非激进的变化相关。

title: In the Name of Internationalization: Varied organizational actorhood of universities in the global higher education arena
abstract: Drawing on neo-institutional theories, this study explores how universities engage in internationalization as organizational actors embedded in national and global contexts. Using a mixed-method approach and based on a sample of 500 universities across 89 countries, we analyse how a country’s global competitiveness and liberal tendencies shape the ways its universities organize structures and activities around internationalization, particularly amid today’s intensified global competition among countries and universities and the resurgence of illiberalism. Our quantitative analyses show that national competitiveness is positively associated with internationalization activities, whereas national liberalism is positively associated with internationalization structures. Additionally, our qualitative analyses reveal variations in how universities motivate and emphasize different aspects of internationalization across the continuum of national competitiveness and liberalism. Together, our findings extend neo-institutionalist research by highlighting distinct aspects of organizational actorhood and the heterogeneity demonstrated across contexts.
title_cn: 以国际化之名：大学在全球高等教育领域的多元组织角色
abstract_cn: 本研究基于新制度理论，探讨了大学作为嵌入国家和全球背景中的组织主体如何参与国际化。采用混合方法研究，基于来自89个国家的500所大学样本，我们分析了一个国家的全球竞争力和自由倾向如何影响其大学围绕国际化组织结构和活动的方式，尤其是在当今国家和大学之间日益激烈的全球竞争以及非自由主义复苏的背景下。我们的定量分析显示，国家竞争力与国际化活动之间存在正相关关系，而国家自由主义与国际化结构之间也存在正相关关系。此外，我们的定性分析揭示了大学在国家竞争力和自由主义的连续体中，在激励和强调国际化的不同方面存在的变异性。综上所述，我们的研究结果通过突显组织主体的独特方面和跨背景表现出的异质性，拓展了新制度主义的研究。

title: Collectively Committing to ‘What Is Interesting’ in Qualitative Research: A methodological application of interactional sociolinguistics
abstract: Selecting which aspects of empirical phenomena to investigate is a fundamental yet underexplored challenge in qualitative research. This paper introduces an interactional sociolinguistic methodology to examine how a qualitative research team navigated this challenge during a three-year project. By analysing real-life team discussions, we identify four types of interactionally co-constructed commitments – straightforward , uncertain , repeated and withheld commitments – that enable teams to balance exploratory openness with the need to narrow their focus within the interplay between the observed empirical field and academic discourse. Building on these insights, we propose an interactional sociolinguistic model of collective commitments to ‘what is interesting’ in qualitative research. Our study contributes to methodological scholarship by revealing how linguistic interaction shapes shared direction and methodological decision-making in team-based qualitative inquiries.
title_cn: 共同承诺于定性研究中的“有趣之处”：互动社会语言学的一个方法论应用
abstract_cn: 选择研究经验现象的哪些方面是一项基本但尚未深入探讨的挑战，特别是在定性研究中。本文介绍了一种互动社会语言学的方法，旨在考察一个定性研究团队在三年项目期间如何应对这一挑战。通过分析真实的团队讨论，我们识别出四种互动共同构建的承诺类型——明确承诺、不确定承诺、重复承诺和保留承诺——这些承诺使团队能够在观察的经验领域与学术话语之间的互动中平衡探索的开放性和聚焦的必要性。在这些见解的基础上，我们提出了一个互动社会语言学的集体承诺模型，以界定“有趣的事物”在定性研究中的重要性。我们的研究通过揭示语言互动如何塑造团队定性研究中的共同方向和方法决策，为方法论的学术研究做出了贡献。

title: Juggling Paradoxical Goals: Unpacking persisting dysfunctional dynamics
abstract: Paradoxical goals, such as demands in industrial R&D for exploratory learning and short-term business performance, may foster synergistic possibilities, but also surface tensions that can paralyse actors. Defensive responses can trigger vicious cycles, where over-focusing on one goal provides actors with temporary comfort, but intensifies the pull from the neglected goal. Paradox studies identify typical initiators of vicious cycles and have started to unpack managerial interventions to reverse into virtuous dynamics. Yet, we still know little about how dysfunctional dynamics drive persisting vicious cycles. Our in-depth longitudinal qualitative case study of an ICT corporate research lab reveals multifaceted and nested dysfunctional dynamics at the heart of persisting vicious cycles. Our study makes three interconnected contributions to the paradox literature. First, while extant studies suggest that managerial interventions can enable organizations to reverse vicious into virtuous cycles, our findings show that interventions may backfire and instead re-fuel dysfunctional dynamics. Particularly when paradoxical goals are almost impossible to attain in practice, managerial interventions that treat the symptoms of over-focusing on one goal instead of addressing the impossibility of the task, can feed dysfunctional dynamics. Second, our process model shows how defensive responses are continually ‘becoming’. Unpacking the shifting nature of defensive responses introduces granularity into current conceptualizations of paradox dynamics but also enriches our understanding of how the management of paradoxes may sometimes feature as an impossible task. Third, our model shows how dysfunctional dynamics are nested across organizational levels. Extending current insights on paradox nestedness, we show that persisting vicious cycles are fuelled by the interlocking effects of senior management interventions to restore dynamic equilibrium and counter-balancing defensive responses at lower organizational levels. We stress the key role of middle managers in contextualizing paradoxical demands into concrete everyday activities that employees can comprehend, while attending to employees’ concerns.
title_cn: juggling 矛盾目标：剖析持续的功能失调动态
abstract_cn: 矛盾目标，例如工业研发中对探索性学习和短期业务绩效的要求，可能会促进协同的可能性，但也会显现出能够使参与者陷入瘫痪的紧张关系。防御性反应可能引发恶性循环，过于关注某一目标会给参与者带来暂时的舒适感，但也会加剧被忽视目标的吸引力。矛盾研究已经识别出典型的恶性循环发起因素，并开始探讨管理干预以转变为良性动态。然而，我们对功能失调动态如何驱动持续的恶性循环知之甚少。我们对一家信息通信技术企业研究实验室的深入纵向定性案例研究揭示了持续恶性循环的核心存在多面且嵌套的功能失调动态。我们的研究对矛盾文献做出了三个相互关联的贡献。首先，虽然现有研究表明管理干预可以使组织逆转恶性循环为良性循环，但我们的发现显示干预措施可能适得其反，反而会加剧功能失调的动态。特别是当矛盾目标在实践中几乎无法实现时，管理干预如果只针对关注某一目标的症状，而不去解决任务的不可能性，会进一步助长功能失调动态。其次，我们的过程模型显示防御性反应的持续“生成”。梳理防御性反应的变化性质为当前对矛盾动态的概念化引入了细致性，同时也丰富了我们对矛盾管理在某些情况下如何成为不可能任务的理解。第三，我们的模型展示了功能失调动态在组织层级中的嵌套。我们扩展了目前对矛盾嵌套的认识，指出持续的恶性循环是由高层管理干预以恢复动态平衡和下层组织中反向防御性反应的相互作用所推动。我们强调中层管理者在将矛盾要求转化为员工易于理解的具体日常活动中发挥着关键作用，同时关注员工的关切。

title: Addiction and Organization Studies
abstract: Addiction is not just an individual or public health issue. It is also embedded in organizational practices. We argue that addiction is engineered through the design of addictive goods and the structuring of habitual patterns of behaviour incentivized by organizations. We conceptualize how organizing sustains addictive behaviours by creating and reinventing what we term new objects and subjects of addiction. By conceptualizing addiction as an organizational phenomenon, we foreground its embeddedness in institutional, technological and economic arrangements. We then set out an agenda for further research on its organizational dimensions and the mechanisms that sustain and mitigate it.
title_cn: 上瘾与组织研究
abstract_cn: 成瘾不仅是一个个体或公共健康问题，它还嵌入在组织实践中。我们认为，成瘾是通过上瘾商品的设计以及组织激励的习惯行为模式的构建而被工程化的。我们概念化了组织如何通过创造和重塑我们所称的新成瘾对象和主体来维持成瘾行为。通过将成瘾视为一种组织现象，我们突出了其在制度、技术和经济安排中的嵌入性。随后，我们提出了一个进一步研究其组织维度及维持和缓解成瘾机制的议程。

title: The importance of not looking the other way: Prehire on- and off-the-job misbehavior predicts subsequent police misconduct.
abstract: This research addresses an often-overlooked opportunity for police reform: the predictive value of prehire misbehavior data for reducing posthire police misconduct. While most reform efforts focus on officers' actions after they are hired, our findings highlight the impact of rigorous screening before hire. We examined how specific prior employment and nonwork misbehaviors related to general occupational instability, trouble in previous law enforcement roles, prior temper problems and violence, and irresponsible behaviors predicted future misconduct among 6,075 police officers tracked over 5 years. Notably, some prehire behaviors significantly elevated risks of citizen complaints and misconduct-related lawsuits, with hazard ratios up to 14.59. Contrary to common assumptions, candidates with prior law enforcement experience showed increased liability, including excessive use of force, suggesting that this background does not inherently reduce misconduct risk. After identifying the strongest predictors of police misconduct, we also examined their relation to termination for cause and assessed how agency decision makers respond differently to prehire versus posthire misbehaviors. By integrating findings on the predictive value of specific prehire misbehaviors, we offer targeted, evidence-based guidance and actionable recommendations for police agencies and policymakers. This work provides a scientifically grounded foundation for effective and consistent police screening decisions, offering a framework for establishing long-overdue national police hiring standards. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 不容忽视的重要性：入职前的工作内外不当行为预测后续警察不当行为。
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了一个常被忽视的警务改革机会：雇前不当行为数据的预测价值，以减少雇后警察不当行为。尽管大多数改革努力集中在警员被雇佣后的行为上，我们的研究结果强调了在雇佣前进行严格筛选的影响。我们考察了特定的先前就业和非工作不当行为如何与一般职业不稳定性、在之前执法角色中的麻烦、先前的情绪问题和暴力行为以及不负责任的行为相关，并预测了6075名警察在五年内的未来不当行为。值得注意的是，一些雇前行为显著提高了公民投诉和与不当行为相关的诉讼风险，风险比高达14.59。与普遍假设相反，具有先前执法经验的候选人显示出更高的责任风险，包括过度使用武力，这表明这种背景并不固有地降低不当行为风险。在识别出警察不当行为的最强预测因素后，我们还考察了这些因素与因故解雇的关系，并评估了机构决策者对雇前与雇后不当行为的不同反应。通过整合关于特定雇前不当行为的预测价值的发现，我们为警察机构和政策制定者提供了有针对性的、基于证据的指导和可行的建议。这项工作为有效且一致的警务筛选决策提供了科学基础，为建立长期以来亟需的国家警察招聘标准提供了框架。（PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: The gendered costs of voice (un)enacted: Differential effects on belonging in traditionally male-dominated contexts.
abstract: Recent research indicates that performance benefits on complex tasks accrue when members with diverse social identities speak up and their voice is enacted-that is, incorporated into the team's approach to the task. In this article, we argue that the cost of not enacting diverse members' voice may extend beyond performance to negatively affect their belonging. Integrating social belonging theory with the literature on gender and voice, we examine the case of women in traditionally male-dominated contexts. Archival data from teams of active-duty Marines (Study 1) and student engineering project teams (Study 2) showed that voice enactment was more strongly associated with women's belonging than men's, and women's belonging was disproportionately harmed when voice enactment was low. A preregistered scenario study set in a male-dominated high-tech organization (Study 3) further showed that these differences were explained by the gender-based voice threat women experience when presented with a voice opportunity. This unique sense of threat amplified the relationship between voice enactment and belonging for women and, by extension, their future voice. A supplemental study showed that the costs in belonging when women's voice was not enacted could be mitigated when the leader framed voice as having value for the group even if it is not enacted. Still, only when voice enactment was high did women's sense of belonging reach parity with that of men, showcasing the power of acting on voice as a way of achieving belonging for all in diverse organizations. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 声音的性别化成本（未）实施：在传统男性主导环境中归属感的差异性影响。
abstract_cn: 最近的研究表明，当具有多样社会身份的成员积极发声并且其声音被纳入团队的任务方法时，复杂任务的表现效益会得到提升。本文认为，不实施多样成员的声音所带来的成本可能超越表现，负面影响他们的归属感。我们结合社会归属理论与性别与发声的文献，考察了在传统男性主导环境中女性的案例。来自现役海军陆战队队伍（研究1）和学生工程项目团队（研究2）的档案数据表明，与男性相比，发声音的实施与女性的归属感之间的关系更为密切，而在发声实施较低的情况下，女性的归属感受到的损害不成比例。设定在男性主导的高科技组织中的一项预注册情景研究（研究3）进一步表明，这些差异可以通过女性在面对发声机会时所经历的性别基础发声威胁来解释。这种独特的威胁感增强了发声实施与女性归属感之间的关系，并且进而影响了她们未来的发声。补充研究表明，当女性的声音未被实施时，领导者如果将发声框架为对团队有价值，即便未被实施，也可以缓解归属感的损失。然而，只有在发声实施较高的情况下，女性的归属感才会与男性达到相等，彰显了在多样化组织中通过付诸实践发声实现归属感的力量。（PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: When (collective) losses loom larger than voice pains: The effect of loss framing on willingness to speak up at work.
abstract: Previous research indicates that employees often believe that it is too risky to voice their concerns about organizational problems; however, prospect theory suggests that people are more willing to take risks when problems are framed in terms of potential losses rather than potential gains. To reconcile these perspectives, we draw on prospect theory and the principle of loss aversion to explain why loss framing (compared to gain framing) will increase employees' willingness to engage in voice behavior. In Study 1, we used a scenario experiment and found that participants who considered potential losses (compared to gains) after writing about a problem at work were more willing to speak up. Further, integrating prospect theory with research on other orientation, we extended these findings in Study 2 by hypothesizing an interaction between loss (compared to gain) framing and collective (compared to self) framing. Using experimental vignette methodology, we found the most voice behavior with framing that highlights potential for collective losses. In Study 3, we conducted a multiwave, multisource survey study using three organizational samples from different industries-health care, consulting, and auditing-and again found that employees were more willing to engage in voice when framing made collective losses salient. Altogether, our three studies integrate prospect theory and research on other orientation to show that framing, particularly in terms of losses and collective outcomes, is an important tool for eliciting employee voice. Theoretical and practical implications of our work, as well as ideas for future research, are also discussed. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 当（集体）损失超过语音痛苦时：损失框架对在工作中勇于发声意愿的影响。
abstract_cn: 以往的研究表明，员工通常认为表达对组织问题的担忧风险太大；然而，前景理论则指出，当问题以潜在损失而非潜在收益的方式进行框架化时，人们更愿意冒险。为了调和这些观点，我们借助前景理论和损失厌恶原则来解释为何损失框架（与收益框架相比）会增加员工参与表达行为的意愿。在研究1中，我们使用情境实验发现，在写作关于工作中问题后，考虑潜在损失（与收益相比）的参与者更愿意发声。此外，通过将前景理论与他人导向研究相结合，我们在研究2中扩展了这些发现，假设损失（与收益）框架与集体（与自我）框架之间存在交互作用。采用实验情境方法，我们发现强调集体损失潜力的框架下，员工的发声行为最为显著。在研究3中，我们进行了多波次、多来源的调查研究，使用来自不同产业（医疗、咨询和审计）的三个组织样本，再次发现当框架使集体损失显著时，员工更愿意参与发声。总体而言，我们的三项研究整合了前景理论和他人导向研究，表明框架化，特别是以损失和集体结果为重点，是引发员工发声的重要工具。我们还讨论了研究的理论和实践意义，以及未来研究的思路。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）

title: For good and for bad: The distinctive effects of successors’ leadership behavior on collective engagement and organizational performance.
abstract: Leadership transitions are a fact of organizational life, yet the impact of successors' leadership behavior on organizational outcomes is little understood. Building on change readiness, uncertainty management, and romance of leadership theory and research, we propose a novel theory describing the distinctive effects of successors' versus incumbents' leadership behavior in driving change in collective engagement and organizational performance. We theorize that when employees perceive a great need for organizational change, successors' vision communication and coaching are more likely than incumbents' to yield improvements in collective engagement and organizational performance. But when employees perceive little need for change, successors' vision communication and coaching are more likely than incumbents' to yield declines. To test our model, we conducted a longitudinal, quasi-experimental study of principal succession in a sample of 113 U.S. elementary schools. As predicted, when employees perceived a great need for change, successors' coaching sparked gains in collective engagement and organizational performance. When employees perceived little need for change, successors' coaching backfired, spurring declines in collective engagement and organizational performance. As predicted, the effects of incumbents' coaching were muted. Finally, contrary to our predictions, neither successors' nor incumbents' vision communication drove change in collective engagement and performance. Our theory and findings illuminate the distinctive risks and benefits of successors' leadership behavior in driving change in collective engagement and organizational performance. For good and for bad, successors' coaching changes their organizations in ways that incumbents' leadership does not. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 好的与坏的：继任者领导行为对集体参与和组织绩效的独特影响。
abstract_cn:
领导权交接是组织生活中的一项现实，但继任者的领导行为对组织结果的影响尚不十分清楚。基于变革准备、变化管理以及领导魅力理论和研究，我们提出了一种新理论，描述了继任者与在任者在推动集体参与和组织绩效方面领导行为的独特影响。我们理论推测，当员工感受到对组织变革的强烈需求时，继任者的愿景传达和辅导比在任者更可能带来集体参与和组织绩效的提升。然而，当员工感受到对变革的需求较小，继任者的愿景传达和辅导则更可能导致下降。

为了验证我们的模型，我们对113所美国小学的校长更替进行了纵向准实验研究。正如我们预测的那样，当员工感受到强烈的变革需求时，继任者的辅导促进了集体参与和组织绩效的提升。当员工感受到变革需求不大时，继任者的辅导却适得其反，导致集体参与和组织绩效的下降。与预测一致的是，在任者的辅导效果则较为疲软。最后，与我们的预期相反，无论是继任者还是在任者的愿景传达均未推动集体参与和绩效的变化。我们的理论和研究结果揭示了继任者在推动集体参与和组织绩效方面领导行为的独特风险和收益。无论是好是坏，继任者的辅导以在任者的领导所无法实现的方式改变了他们的组织。 (PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，版权所有)。

title: The effects of food insecurity on work outcomes.
abstract: Food insecurity-insufficient access to safe and nutritious foods-is one of the most crucial societal grand challenges the world faces today. It affects 2.3 billion people globally, and addressing it is one of the United Nations' Sustainable Development Goals of 2030 (Food and Agriculture Organization of the United Nations et al., 2025). Despite its prevalence and importance, the field of applied psychology has ignored this problem with the implicit assumption that food insecurity is not an issue relevant to the workplace. Contrary to this view, we hypothesize and demonstrate that food insecurity is detrimental to the three core work outcomes: task performance, work engagement, and organizational citizenship behaviors. To test our hypotheses, we employed a multimethod design across three empirical studies: (a) an experimental recall study, (b) a within-person diary study, and (c) a field experiment. Our findings consistently demonstrate that food insecurity leads to higher anxiety, which subsequently has a negative effect on task performance, work engagement, and organizational citizenship behavior. In our field experiment, we further demonstrated that providing food to those experiencing food insecurity can improve work outcomes. This research highlights that food insecurity is a significant issue with important implications for the workplace that requires greater attention from both researchers and business leaders. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
topics: Food Security and Health in Diverse Populations
title_cn: 食品不安全对工作结果的影响。
abstract_cn: 食品不安全——对安全和营养食品的获取不足——是当今世界面临的最重要的社会重大挑战之一。全球有23亿人受到其影响，解决这一问题是联合国2030年可持续发展目标之一（联合国粮食及农业组织等，2025）。尽管食品不安全的普遍性和重要性，应用心理学领域却忽视了这一问题，隐含假设食品不安全与工作场所无关。与这一观点相反，我们假设并证明食品不安全对三个核心工作结果具有负面影响：任务绩效、工作投入和组织公民行为。为了检验我们的假设，我们在三项实证研究中采用了多方法设计：（a）实验回忆研究，（b）个体内日记研究，以及（c）现场实验。我们的研究结果一致表明，食品不安全导致更高的焦虑水平，进而对任务绩效、工作投入和组织公民行为产生负面影响。在我们的现场实验中，我们进一步证明，为经历食品不安全的人提供食物可以改善工作结果。这项研究强调，食品不安全是一个重要的问题，对工作场所有着重要的影响，亟需研究人员和商业领袖给予更多关注。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: The hidden cost of courage: How oppositional courage shapes trans employees’ diminished image belief.
abstract: Fulfilling the promise of greater workplace inclusion increasingly hinges on advantaged group employees' oppositional courage (OC)-a nonnormative form of allyship involving significant risk to the actor. Research suggests OC may not only offer instrumental benefits to marginalized employees but also convey a powerful "message of value" from the actor. Yet these courageous acts do not occur in a vacuum, suggesting they may carry social consequences for marginalized employees. Drawing from theory on helping relations and research on social cognition, we argue these risky acts can inadvertently signal unique strength in the actor, triggering marginalized employees' diminished image belief-a concern others see them as weak and unable to stand up for themselves. We further propose that this perceived "image cost" depends on the actor's humility as it relates to OC-what we term OC-specific humility-and that these dynamics have implications for marginalized employees' avoidance reactions. Our investigation utilized data from 959 trans employees. In Study 1, a qualitative analysis identified three behavioral themes reflecting humility in relation to OC (i.e., OC-specific humility) and provided initial support for its role in shaping how OC is perceived. In Study 2, we tested our hypotheses experimentally. In Study 3, we sought to replicate the results with a time-lagged survey. Three supplemental studies included a scale development effort aimed at validating a measure of OC-specific humility and two additional experiments. Overall, results provided partial support for our model. We conclude by discussing the implications of our research, as well as avenues for future work. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 勇气的隐性代价：对立勇气如何影响跨性别员工的自我形象信念。
abstract_cn: 实现更大工作场所包容性的承诺越来越依赖于优势群体员工的对抗勇气（OC）——这是一种涉及显著风险的非规范陪伴形式。研究表明，对抗勇气不仅可能为边缘化员工提供工具性利益，还能传达出行动者的强有力“价值信息”。然而，这些勇敢的行为并不是在真空中发生的，表明它们可能对边缘化员工带来社会后果。基于帮助关系的理论和社会认知的研究，我们认为这些冒险行为可能无意中向边缘化员工发出行动者独特优势的信号，从而触发他们对自身形象的担忧——即他人认为他们软弱，无法为自己辩护。我们进一步提出，这种被感知的“形象成本”取决于行动者在与对抗勇气相关的谦逊程度——我们称之为特定于对抗勇气的谦逊——而这些动态对边缘化员工的回避反应具有影响。我们的研究利用了959名跨性别员工的数据。在研究1中，通过定性分析识别出三个反映与对抗勇气相关的谦逊行为主题（即特定于对抗勇气的谦逊），并初步支持其在塑造对抗勇气如何被感知方面的作用。研究2中，我们通过实验测试了我们的假设。在研究3中，我们寻求通过时间滞后的调查重复实验结果。三项补充研究包括一项旨在验证特定于对抗勇气的谦逊衡量工具的量表开发工作和另外两项实验。总体结果为我们的模型提供了部分支持。最后，我们讨论了研究的意义以及未来工作的方向。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，保留所有权利）

title: Personal self-disclosure as a mixed blessing in teams: Effects through relational and cognitive mechanisms.
abstract: Although personal self-disclosure has been increasingly encouraged in organizations and teams to enhance authenticity and workplace effectiveness, the nature of its impact in team contexts remains debated. Existing literature predominantly focuses on the relational effects of receiving personal self-disclosure but ignores its cognitive effects and key contextual contingencies that help elucidate when it has positive versus negative consequences. This study provides a more comprehensive theoretical account of the effects of self-disclosure in team contexts by combining social penetration and information processing perspectives into a multilevel theoretical framework. We tested our theoretical model in two team samples. Supporting our hypotheses, we found that personal self-disclosure had complex, countervailing impacts on team members receiving disclosure through relational and cognitive mechanisms. In addition, team self-disclosure norms were found to moderate the effects of receiving personal self-disclosure, buffering the relational and cognitive costs. Our research lays the foundation for future research on personal self-disclosure in teams and offers practical implications for teams and organizations seeking to maximize the utility of personal self-disclosure in the workplace. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 个人自我披露在团队中的双重影响：通过关系和认知机制的作用。
abstract_cn: 尽管在组织和团队中，个人自我揭露被越来越多地鼓励以增强真实性和工作效率，但其在团队环境中的影响性质仍然存在争论。现有文献主要关注接收个人自我揭露的关系效应，而忽视了其认知效应和一些关键的情境因素，这些因素有助于阐明何时自我揭露会产生积极或消极的后果。本研究通过将社会渗透理论和信息处理视角结合，构建了一个多层次的理论框架，从而提供了关于团队环境中自我揭露影响的更全面的理论说明。我们在两个团队样本中验证了我们的理论模型。支持我们的假设，我们发现个人自我揭露对接收信息的团队成员有着复杂的、相互抵消的影响，这些影响通过关系和认知机制表现出来。此外，团队自我揭露规范被发现可以调节个人自我揭露接收的影响，减缓了关系和认知成本。我们的研究为未来关于团队中个人自我揭露的研究奠定了基础，并为希望在工作场所最大化个人自我揭露效用的团队和组织提供了实际的启示。

title: Clusters of general counterproductive behavior and associated personality profiles.
abstract: Counterproductive behavior (e.g., aggression, theft, dishonesty) is a persistent societal problem with a substantial dispositional basis. Despite broad interest in the subject, little scholarship has studied relations of variables associated with counterproductive behavior and their dispositional antecedents across work and nonwork domains. Drawing on cybernetic theories of personality, we posit that personality malfunction (an imbalance between cybernetic processes responsible for maintaining homeostasis and facilitating change) contributes to general counterproductive behavior (GCB). To test this theory, we conduct a quantitative review and synthesis of meta-analyses that report Big Five personality trait relations to variables indicative of GCB. Overall, we locate 46 articles reporting associations with 62 variables, which represent k > 1,200 studies and N > 850,000 participants. First, we examine the extent to which GCB variables are predicted by Big Five traits. Then, we use meta-analytic criterion profile analysis (Wiernik et al., 2021) to determine how much of the prediction from personality is due to profile-level effects (elevation of traits) or profile-pattern effects (configuration of traits). Finding that configurations indicative of personality malfunction dominate prediction, finally, we cluster analyze similarity coefficients among personality profiles across GCB variables. We discover two metaclusters and four subordinate clusters. These clusters may represent archetypical forms of GCB, and their related profiles may reflect archetypical forms of personality malfunction. Clusters also strongly parallel the externalizing superspectrum of psychopathology, suggesting a potential general taxonomy of GCB. We conclude by discussing implications for theory and practice, as well as limitations and future research directions. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 反生产行为的群集及相关的人格特征。
abstract_cn: 反生产行为（例如，攻击、盗窃、不诚实）是一个持久的社会问题，其根源在于相当大的个性因素。尽管对此主题有广泛的兴趣，但很少有学术研究探讨与反生产行为相关的变量及其个性前因在工作和非工作领域的关系。基于个性网络理论，我们提出个性功能障碍（维持体内平衡和促进变化的网络过程之间的不平衡）会促成一般反生产行为（GCB）。为了测试这一理论，我们对报告大五人格特质与GCB指示变量关系的元分析进行了定量回顾和综合分析。总体而言，我们定位了46篇报告62个变量关联的文章，这些变量代表了超过1200项研究和超过85万名参与者。首先，我们考察了GCB变量在多大程度上受到大五特质的预测。然后，我们使用元分析标准特征剖面分析（Wiernik等，2021）来确定个性对预测的影响有多少是由于剖面层级效应（特质的提升）或剖面模式效应（特质的配置）。我们发现，指示个性功能障碍的配置主导了预测，最后对GCB变量之间个性剖面的相似性系数进行聚类分析。我们发现了两个元集群和四个下级集群。这些集群可能代表反生产行为的原型形式，其相关剖面可能反映个性功能障碍的原型形式。集群也与外化心理病理学的超光谱高度平行，暗示了GCB的潜在一般分类法。最后，我们讨论了对理论和实践的影响，以及局限性和未来研究方向。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，保留所有权利）。

title: Investigating measurement invariance for multiple covariates in organizational research using exploratory factor analysis and confirmatory factor analysis trees.
abstract: Organizational research often deals with unobservable (latent) variables such as, for example, job satisfaction or leadership styles. When comparing these latent variables across groups, a comparability of the measurements is important-so-called measurement invariance (MI) considered a prerequisite. Common methodology to test whether MI holds or to explore noninvariance can only be used with established measurement models and specific hypotheses about potential violations of MI in mind. Therefore, exploratory factor analysis trees and confirmatory factor analysis trees have recently been developed. They promise to be an effective tool for early investigations of MI during the development of measurement models (e.g., scale development) and with many (continuous) covariates defining countless groups for which MI may be violated. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 在组织研究中，通过探索性因子分析和验证性因子分析树探讨多个协变量的测量不变性。
abstract_cn: 组织研究通常涉及不可观察（潜在）变量，例如工作满意度或领导风格。在比较这些潜在变量时，不同组之间测量的一致性显得尤为重要，即所谓的测量不变性（MI），被视为前提条件。测试MI是否成立或探索不变性的方法通常仅限于已有的测量模型，并需要针对潜在的MI违背制定具体假设。因此，最近开发了探索性因子分析树和验证性因子分析树。这些方法有望成为测量模型开发过程中（例如，量表开发）及在众多（连续性）协变量定义的无数可能违反MI的组中，早期调查MI的有效工具。（PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，保留所有权利）。

title: Socially rewarded or penalized at work? The mixed reputational implications of disclosing one’s positive nonwork events on social evaluations and workplace gossip.
abstract: Existing research implicitly assumes that disclosing one's positive events-known as capitalization-is socially valuable in the workplace because such events are work-related and therefore relevant to coworkers and organizational goals. Indeed, management research has focused on how disclosers of positive work events and their coworkers feel about themselves. Broadening the focus of workplace capitalization to disclosure of positive nonwork events, which we refer to as nonwork-work interpersonal capitalization, we draw from boundary theory to investigate whether disclosers gain and/or lose social value at work because such capitalization is evaluated against normative expectations around the work-nonwork boundary. Specifically, we theorize that nonwork-work interpersonal capitalization carries mixed reputational implications for disclosers in terms of how they are evaluated by coworkers (i.e., perceived as other-focused and/or distracted from work) and, in turn, how coworkers spread evaluative information of disclosers to others (i.e., in terms of positive and/or negative workplace gossip about disclosers). Moreover, we propose that such reputational implications will be moderated by the discloser's workplace status. We test our model using a source- and time-separated field study (Study 1) and an experimental causal chain design (Study 2). Both studies showed that disclosers of positive nonwork events are more likely to be perceived as other-focused and thereby become targets of positive gossip. Across both studies, the effect of nonwork-work interpersonal capitalization on being perceived as distracted was stronger for lower status employees, who in turn were more likely to be gossiped about negatively. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 在工作中受到社会奖励还是惩罚？披露个人积极非工作事件对社会评价和职场八卦的混合声誉影响。
abstract_cn: 现有研究隐含地假设，披露自身的积极事件（称为资本化）在工作场所具有社会价值，因为这些事件与工作相关，因此对同事和组织目标具有相关性。确实，管理研究集中在积极工作事件的披露者及其同事对自我的感受上。将工作场所的资本化扩展到对积极非工作事件的披露，我们称之为“非工作-工作人际资本化”，并借用边界理论来探讨披露者是否因这种资本化而获得和/或失去在工作上的社会价值，因为这种资本化是基于工作与非工作边界的规范性期望进行评估的。具体而言，我们理论化认为，非工作-工作人际资本化在声誉方面对披露者存在混合的影响，体现在同事对他们的评估（即被认为是以他人为中心和/或对工作分心），进而影响同事将对披露者的评估信息传播给他人的方式（即有关披露者的积极和/或消极的工作场所八卦）。此外，我们提出这种声誉影响将受到披露者工作地位的调节。我们使用一个来源和时间分离的实地研究（研究1）和一个实验因果链设计（研究2）来测试我们的模型。这两项研究均显示，积极非工作事件的披露者更可能被认为是以他人为中心，从而成为积极八卦的目标。在两项研究中，非工作-工作人际资本化对被认为分心的影响在低地位员工中更强，而这些员工更有可能成为负面八卦的对象。（PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，保留所有权利）。

title: Dirty work history and future career success: Does the “dirt” stick?
abstract: Although research has identified the negative experiences and attitudes of individuals currently holding dirty jobs, it remains unclear whether holding these jobs relates to future career outcomes for individuals once they leave their dirty work roles. Drawing on the public and self-stigma model, we argue the outcomes of dirty work do not cease after employees exit dirty jobs but extend to predict future career success. We tested our hypotheses using a multidecade nationally representative longitudinal sample, a simulated hiring experiment, and a qualitative study of previous dirty workers. The results indicate individuals with career histories that included dirty work experience both public and self-stigma, which relates to lower income and prestige in future jobs as well as a higher likelihood and longer length of unemployment between jobs, compared to individuals with no previous dirty jobs. Moreover, the negative associations with individuals' future career outcomes were shown to be stronger with greater amounts of dirty work experience previously accumulated throughout their careers (i.e., the number of prior dirty jobs, total length of dirty work, dirtiness of jobs held). These findings suggest deleterious outcomes of holding dirty work remain even after employees leave those roles, shedding light on the enduring associations between stigmatized work experiences and individuals' future career success. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 肮脏的工作历史与未来的职业成功：污点是否会残留？
abstract_cn: 尽管研究已经识别出当前从事肮脏工作的个体所经历的负面体验和态度，但尚不清楚这些工作的经历是否与个体离开肮脏工作后的未来职业成果相关。基于公众与自我污名模型，我们认为肮脏工作的结果并不会在员工离开这些工作后终止，而是延续并预测未来职业成功。我们使用了一个具有多年代代表性的纵向样本、一次模拟招聘实验以及对以前肮脏工作的从业者的定性研究来检验我们的假设。结果表明，职业历史中包括肮脏工作经历的个体，存在公共和自我污名，这与未来工作的收入和声望较低，以及在工作之间失业的可能性更高和失业时间更长相关，相较于没有肮脏工经历的个体。此外，个体未来职业成果的负面关联在其职业生涯中累积的肮脏工作经历越多时表现得越强（即以前肮脏工作的数量、肮脏工作的总时长、所从事工作的肮脏程度）。这些发现表明，从事肮脏工作的负面结果即使在员工离开这些角色后仍然存在，揭示了带有污名的工作经历与个体未来职业成功之间的持续关联。(PsycInfo数据库记录(c) 2026 APA，保留所有权利)。

title: Capitalizing on proactive personality over organizational socialization tactics in newcomer learning: A meta-analytic investigation.
abstract: The evolving workplace dynamics make it difficult for organizations to meet the customized learning needs of newcomers through standardized socialization programs. Consequently, attention has shifted toward leveraging newcomer proactivity as another pathway for facilitating newcomer learning. However, it remains unclear whether and when newcomer proactive personality can produce desired learning outcomes as organizational socialization tactics. We conducted a meta-analysis encompassing 85 independent samples (N = 24,293) to directly address this issue. Our findings indicate that proactive personality accounts for additional variance in newcomer learning outcomes beyond organizational socialization tactics. Importantly, the relative effectiveness of newcomer proactive personality compared to organizational socialization tactics is less salient among veteran (vs. neophyte) newcomers and in higher (vs. lower) individualistic cultures. Our findings also show that newcomer proactive behaviors serve as the crucial mechanism linking organizational socialization tactics and newcomer proactive personality to individual learning outcomes. Implications for how to facilitate newcomer learning are discussed. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 利用积极主动的人格特点超越组织社会化策略在新员工学习中的作用：一项元分析研究。
abstract_cn: 不断演变的工作场所动态使得组织难以通过标准化的社会化程序满足新员工的个性化学习需求。因此，关注点转向利用新员工的主动性作为促进新员工学习的另一条路径。然而，关于新员工的主动性人格是否以及何时能够作为组织社会化策略产生预期学习结果，仍然不清楚。我们进行了一项涵盖85个独立样本（N = 24,293）的元分析，以直接解决这一问题。我们的研究结果表明，主动性人格在新员工学习结果中解释了超出组织社会化策略的额外方差。重要的是，与组织社会化策略相比，新员工的主动性人格的相对有效性在老员工（相对于新手员工）和更高（相对于较低）个体主义文化中不太明显。我们的研究结果还显示，新员工的主动行为作为一个关键机制，连接了组织社会化策略和新员工的主动性人格与个人学习结果之间的关系。我们讨论了如何促进新员工学习的启示。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，保留所有权利）。

title: Are they really just words? Investigating the prevalence and impact of physical disability biased language in job advertisements.
abstract: Disability bias is ingrained in how individuals speak, and its impact can be widespread. When biased language is used in recruitment, it could impact application rates of diverse and qualified applicants. This article examines the prevalence and impact of biased (ableist) and inclusive (equal employment opportunity [EEO] and accommodation statements) language on individuals with and without disabilities. In Study 1, a content analysis of 1886 job ads found that ableist language was present in 84.09% of the job ads, whereas EEO and accommodation statements were only present in 19.25% and 9.28% of job ads, respectively. Study 2 examined the effect of biased and inclusive language and found that individuals with and without disabilities were (a) negatively affected by ableist language and (b) positively affected by EEO and accommodation statements. Ableist language was associated with lower perceptions of person-organization fit and intentions to apply. In contrast, EEO and accommodation statements were associated with higher intentions to apply. Accommodation statements were also associated with increased fit perceptions. These effects were more pronounced for individuals with disabilities. Study 3 sought to replicate these results while manipulating the desirability of jobs through pay levels. Ableist language continued to have a negative impact on fit and likelihood to apply, and EEO and accommodation statements maintained a positive impact. However, unlike Study 2, these effects were not stronger for those with physical disabilities. This research demonstrates the negative effects of ableist language in recruitment materials and the positive effect of EEO and accommodation statements. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 它们真的只是文字吗？调查招聘广告中身体残疾偏见语言的普遍性及其影响。
abstract_cn: 残疾偏见深植于人们的言语表达中，其影响广泛。当偏见语言用于招聘时，可能会影响多元和合格申请者的申请率。本文考察了偏见（能力歧视）和包容性（平等就业机会[EEO]及便利性声明）语言对有无残疾个体的普遍性和影响。在研究1中，对1886份招聘广告进行了内容分析，发现84.09%的广告中存在能力歧视语言，而EEO声明和便利性声明仅分别出现在19.25%和9.28%的广告中。研究2考察了偏见和包容性语言的影响，发现有无残疾的个体均受到(a)能力歧视语言的负面影响以及(b)EEO和便利性声明的正面影响。能力歧视语言与较低的组织契合感和申请意图相关联。相比之下，EEO和便利性声明与较高的申请意图相关联。便利性声明还与更高的契合感知相关联。这些效应在残疾人群体中更加明显。研究3试图通过薪资水平操纵工作的吸引力来复制这些结果。能力歧视语言仍然对契合感和申请可能性产生负面影响，而EEO和便利性声明则持续产生正面影响。然而，与研究2不同，这些影响在身体残疾者中并没有显著增强。本研究展示了能力歧视语言在招聘材料中的负面效果以及EEO和便利性声明的正面效果。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）

title: The implications of pay range transparency on job application preferences and negotiations.
abstract: Pay range transparency laws, which require employers to disclose salary ranges in job postings, have gained traction as a strategy for narrowing the gender pay gap by strengthening workers' access to pay information. However, these policies often give employers considerable latitude in setting how wide or narrow those ranges are, raising questions about whether certain implementations might inadvertently sustain-or even exacerbate-existing wage disparities. Our research addresses this issue by examining how the width of disclosed pay ranges influences women's and men's job application and negotiation behaviors and whether providing more clarity around typical salary outcomes can mitigate these unintended consequences. Across four studies-encompassing a large archival data set (Study 1), surveys and field experiments with prospective and actual job seekers (Studies 2 and 3), and an experimental intervention (Study 4)-we consistently find that women exhibit a stronger preference for jobs with narrower pay ranges than men, largely driven by women's higher risk aversion. Moreover, choosing narrower pay ranges is associated with less assertive negotiation behaviors, suggesting a path through which pay range disclosures may perpetuate gender gaps in compensation. By providing explicit information about the typical starting salary and the criteria used to determine final offers, we show that organizations can reduce these effects and support more equitable outcomes, offering practical insights for policymakers and employers aiming to ensure that pay transparency fulfills its aim of closing, rather than reinforcing, the gender wage gap. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 薪酬范围透明对求职偏好和谈判的影响。
abstract_cn: 薪资范围透明法要求雇主在职位发布中披露薪资范围，这一策略在缩小性别薪酬差距方面越来越受到关注，因为它增强了员工获取薪酬信息的能力。然而，这些政策往往给予雇主在设定薪资范围宽窄上的相当灵活性，这引发了人们对某些实施方式是否可能无意中维持甚至加剧现有薪酬差距的质疑。我们的研究通过考察所披露薪资范围的宽度如何影响女性和男性的求职申请及谈判行为，以及提供更清晰的典型薪资结果是否能缓解这些意外后果，来探讨这一问题。通过四项研究——包括一项大型档案数据集（研究1）、对潜在和实际求职者的调查和实地实验（研究2和3），以及一项实验干预（研究4）——我们一致发现，女性对薪资范围较窄的工作表现出比男性更强的偏好，这在很大程度上源于女性更高的风险厌恶。此外，选择较窄薪资范围与不那么积极的谈判行为相关，这表明薪资范围的披露可能通过这一途径延续性别薪酬差距。通过提供有关典型起始薪资和确定最终报价所用标准的明确信息，我们展示了组织可以减少这些影响，促进更公平的结果，为旨在确保薪酬透明性实现缩小而非加固性别薪酬差距的政策制定者和雇主提供了实用的见解。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）

title: The perils of peer bubbles: How early newcomer communication network composition shapes organizational integration and early turnover.
abstract: Investigating early turnover among organizational newcomers, our study reveals how excessive communications with fellow newcomers during initial entry significantly increase departure risk. Through analyzing daily behavioral data of communications between 8,043 newcomers and nearly 20,000 existing employees in a high-tech firm, we demonstrate that when newcomers spend a disproportionate amount of their early communications with cohort newcomers rather than established employees, they face elevated turnover risk. By integrating first impression research with network theory, we show how these early communication patterns trigger self-reinforcing dynamics that shape newcomers' structural position within the organization. We introduce the concept of "core embeddedness" to explain how initial network choices affect turnover decisions, finding that the critical window for effective socialization is considerably shorter than previously understood-with the first 10 days being particularly decisive. Supplementary analyses reveal that interunit newcomer communications are especially problematic for core embeddedness and subsequent turnover. These insights challenge conventional assumptions about cohort-based socialization, demonstrating how seemingly supportive peer communications can paradoxically constrain organizational integration through homophily effects, with important implications for contemporary workforce retention. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 同伴泡沫的风险：早期新入者的沟通网络构成如何影响组织整合与早期离职。
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了组织中新成员的早期流失情况，揭示了在初期入职期间与其他新成员的过度沟通显著增加了离职风险。通过分析一家高科技公司中8043名新成员与近20000名现有员工之间的日常沟通行为数据，我们证明了当新成员在早期与同批新成员而非资深员工进行过多沟通时，他们面临更高的离职风险。通过将第一印象研究与网络理论相结合，我们展示了这些早期沟通模式如何触发自我强化的动态，从而影响新成员在组织内的结构位置。我们引入“核心嵌入性”概念，以解释初始网络选择如何影响离职决策，发现有效社会化的关键窗口期显著短于之前的理解——前10天尤为决定性。补充分析显示，跨单位的新成员沟通对核心嵌入性和随后离职特别有害。这些见解挑战了关于基于群体的社会化的传统假设，显示看似支持的同伴沟通如何通过同质性效应悖论性地限制组织整合，对当代员工留存产生重要影响。（PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，版权所有）

title: Turning the envious boss into a friend or a foe: The emotional and behavioral reactions to being envied by one’s supervisor and its impact on leader–member exchange.
abstract: In recent years, research on workplace envy has expanded beyond its traditional focus on peer-to-peer envy to examine the envy felt by supervisors toward their subordinates (termed as "downward envy"). We contribute to this emerging research stream by examining the emotional and behavioral reactions of employees who are targets of such downward envy, as well as the relational consequences that follow. We tested our model, which is based on the appraisal theory of emotions, across two studies-a multisource, multiphase field study and a vignette-based experimental study-that offer converging evidence in its support. Aligned with our theory, we found that employees appraise downward envy as a relational threat to, or a relational opportunity for, their leader-member exchange relationship, which results in the emotions of relationship anxiety and hope, respectively. These emotions, in turn, elicit contrasting employee behaviors toward the supervisor: anxiety motivates avoidance, while hope encourages approach-oriented citizenship behaviors, which, respectively, have a negative and positive effect on the quality of the leader-member exchange relationship. Furthermore, employees' sense of power with respect to their supervisor was found to mitigate the anxiety-based pathway but played a limited role in influencing the hope-based pathway. Our research advances the nascent literature on downward envy and leader-member exchange instability and also offers practical insights for managing downward envy in organizations. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 将嫉妒的上司变成朋友还是敌人：被上级嫉妒的情感和行为反应及其对领导-成员交换的影响。
abstract_cn: 近年来，关于工作场所嫉妒的研究已超越以往对同级之间嫉妒的传统关注，开始探讨上级对下属所感受到的嫉妒（称为“向下嫉妒”）。我们通过研究作为这种向下嫉妒目标的员工的情感和行为反应，以及随之而来的关系后果，来为这一新兴研究方向贡献力量。我们在两项研究中测试了基于情感评价理论的模型——一项多来源、多阶段的实地研究和一项基于情景的实验研究——为模型提供了相互支持的证据。与我们的理论一致，我们发现员工将向下嫉妒评估为对其领导-成员交换关系的关系威胁或关系机会，从而分别引发关系焦虑和希望这两种情感。这些情感进而引发员工对上级的对立行为：焦虑促使员工回避，而希望则鼓励员工采取接近型的公民行为，这两者分别对领导-成员交换关系的质量产生负面和正面的影响。此外，员工与其上级的权力感在减轻基于焦虑的路径中起到了缓释作用，但在影响基于希望的路径方面的作用有限。我们的研究推动了有关向下嫉妒和领导-成员交换不稳定性的初步文献发展，并为组织中管理向下嫉妒提供了实际洞见。（PsycInfo数据库记录 © 2026 APA，版权所有。）

title: Uncovering a motherhood advantage: How parenthood impacts perceptions of the meaning of work and work outcomes.
abstract: Working parents constitute a substantial segment of the workforce. Nevertheless, misconceptions surrounding how parental role impacts working parents, particularly working mothers, have perpetuated stigma and workplace discrimination. To better understand the contributions of parents in professional contexts, we developed the construct of family-centered symbolic meaning of work (FCSMW), which captures individuals' cognitive orientation to construe work meaning through its symbolic relevance to family. Specifically, it refers to individuals' perception of their work as a vehicle for expressing their professional ethics and principles to their family and serving as role models. We then draw upon self-construal theory to theorize that, in comparison to nonparents, working parents are more likely to develop higher FCSMW. We further posit that the positive association between parental status and FCSMW is more pronounced for women than for men. Additionally, we argue that FCSMW positively correlates with employees' display of exemplary behaviors at work, such as increased work effort and organizational citizenship behavior. Finally, we propose that the indirect effects of parental status on work outcomes via FCSMW are stronger for women than men. To assess our proposed model, we first developed and validated a scale for measuring FCSMW. We then tested our hypotheses using three sets of data: two multisource, field samples from China, and one field sample from the United States, all of which supported our hypotheses. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 揭示母亲优势：亲子关系如何影响对工作的意义及工作结果的认识。
abstract_cn: 在职场中，工作父母构成了一个重要的群体。然而，围绕父母角色如何影响工作父母，尤其是工作母亲的误解，导致了污名化和职场歧视。为了更好地理解父母在专业环境中的贡献，我们提出了“以家庭为中心的工作象征意义（FCSMW）”这一概念，它捕捉了个体通过工作与家庭的象征性关联来理解工作意义的认知取向。具体而言，它指的是个体将工作视为向家庭表达其职业伦理和原则的工具，并作为榜样的感知。我们进一步借助自我构念理论提出，与非父母相比，工作父母更有可能发展出更高的FCSMW。我们还假设，父母身份与FCSMW之间的正相关关系在女性中比男性更为显著。此外，我们认为FCSMW与员工在工作中表现出的模范行为（如增加工作努力和组织公民行为）之间存在正相关关系。最后，我们提出父母身份通过FCSMW对工作结果的间接影响在女性中比男性更强。为了评估我们提出的模型，我们首先开发并验证了一种测量FCSMW的量表。随后，我们使用三组数据测试了我们的假设：两组来自中国的多源现场样本和一组来自美国的现场样本，所有样本均支持我们的假设。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）

title: The referral penalty: Decreased perceptions of merit undermine helping behavior toward referred employees.
abstract: Employee referrals are commonly used by organizations due to their numerous benefits. However, it remains unclear how organizational incumbents, who are uninvolved in the hiring process, perceive and react to referral beneficiaries. Although traditional views suggest that the presence of a referral signals merit, incumbents' perceptions may differ. We theorize that incumbents are more likely to perceive referral beneficiaries as less merited than nonreferred employees due to perceived legitimacy concerns stemming from a simplified view that reliance on network contacts de facto compensates for lower qualifications. Drawing on equity theory, we then theorize that lower merit perceptions lead to less positive and more negative behaviors toward referral beneficiaries as an attempt to restore the equilibrium between beneficiaries' perceived inputs (e.g., driven by perceived lower merit) and outputs (e.g., being on payroll). Sampling employees from industries in which referrals are normative (Study 1a) and from a cultural context that is positively predisposed toward referrals (Study 1b) confirmed our theorizing. In a subsequent study, aiming to enhance the generalizability of our findings, we found supporting evidence for perceived equity violations, leading incumbents to engage in corrective behaviors toward referral beneficiaries (Study 2). Finally, testing our hypotheses more conservatively, we found that negative attributions toward referral beneficiaries persisted even when the referred employees had demonstrated high performance, thereby underscoring the robustness of our findings (Study 3). This article elucidates important unintended consequences of one of the most widely used recruitment methods-employee referrals-and draws implications for both theory and practice. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 推荐惩罚：对能力的降低认知削弱了对被推荐员工的帮助行为。
abstract_cn: 员工推荐因其众多优点而被组织广泛使用。然而，尚不清楚那些未参与招聘过程的在职员工如何看待和反应推荐受益者。传统观点认为，推荐的存在表明其能力，但在职员工的看法可能有所不同。我们理论化认为，在职员工更可能认为推荐受益者的能力低于未推荐员工，这主要源于对合法性问题的认知，即简化认为依赖人际关系实际上弥补了其较低的资格。基于公平理论，我们进一步推测，较低的能力认知会导致在职员工对推荐受益者表现出更少的积极行为和更多的消极行为，以试图恢复受益者感知的投入（例如，因认为能力较低而驱动）与输出（例如，在薪资表上的收入）之间的平衡。对行业中推荐行为较为常见的员工进行抽样（研究1a），以及对具有积极倾向于推荐文化背景的员工进行抽样（研究1b），都证实了我们的理论预测。在后续研究中，为了增强我们的发现的普遍性，我们发现了对感知公平侵犯的支持证据，这导致在职员工对推荐受益者采取纠正行为（研究2）。最后，在更为保守地测试我们的假设时，我们发现对推荐受益者的负面归因即使在被推荐员工表现出高绩效的情况下依然存在，从而突显了我们发现的稳健性（研究3）。本文阐明了员工推荐这一广泛使用的招聘方法的重要意想不到的后果，并对理论和实践提出了启示。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: The cost of coping with infertility: Extending theory on stressor appraisal.
abstract: Despite research on the workplace challenges of pregnancy, there has been notable inattention toward those struggling to become pregnant-women experiencing infertility (one of the most stressful and life-altering experiences women endure that affects around 13% of women of childbearing age). From the perspective of transactional stress theory, a coping response that addresses the cause of infertility (assisted reproductive technology treatment, ART) should reduce anxiety. However, for millions of working women coping with infertility via treatment, their anxiety persists, with consequences for occupational prestige and income. This divergence between scholarly consensus on coping and the lived experience reflects a puzzle with theoretical, practical, and societal implications. To reconcile this, we explain that the consensus is misaligned with the fundamental tenets of transactional stress theory. We posit that the cost of treatment creates a context whereby its efficacy for coping is hindered-a phenomenon called financial toxicity. We hypothesize that insurance may detoxify infertility treatment and reduce anxiety as predicted. Across two studies (an Australian longitudinal panel data set [N = 2,728] and a cross-sectional U.S. survey [N = 192]), we triangulate tests of our hypotheses and find support for our arguments. We discuss implications for transactional stress theory and illustrate how scholars can expand their conceptualization of coping to consider its potential toxicity. We further call attention to the critical societal and public policy implications of our findings, and we provide a roadmap with clear and actionable solutions. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 应对不孕症的成本：扩展压力源评估理论。
abstract_cn: 尽管已有研究关注怀孕过程中的职场挑战，但对于那些努力怀孕的女性——经历不孕症的女性（这是女性所承受的最具压力和改变生活的经历之一，影响约13%的育龄女性）却明显缺乏关注。从交易性压力理论的角度来看，针对不孕症原因（辅助生殖技术治疗，ART）的应对反应应能降低焦虑。然而，对于数百万通过治疗应对不孕症的职场女性而言，她们的焦虑依然存在，并对职业声望和收入产生影响。这种学术共识与实际经历之间的差异反映了一个具有理论、实践和社会意义的难题。为了解释这一点，我们指出，这一共识与交易性压力理论的基本原则不符。我们认为，治疗的成本创造了一种情境，使得其在应对中的有效性受到阻碍——这一现象被称为财务毒性。我们假设，保险可能会减轻不孕症治疗的财务毒性，并降低焦虑，正如预测的那样。在两项研究中（一个是澳大利亚的纵向面板数据集 [N = 2,728]，另一个是美国的横断面调查 [N = 192]），我们对我们的假设进行了三角验证，并发现支持我们论点的证据。我们讨论了对交易性压力理论的影响，并阐明学者们如何扩展他们对应对的概念化，以考虑其潜在的毒性。我们进一步关注我们的发现对社会和公共政策的重大影响，并提供了一条具有明确和可行解决方案的路线图。（PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: Family socioeconomic status and job search: Pathways to job quality improvement for young adults without college degrees.
abstract: Improving job quality through job transitions is crucial in early adulthood. However, young adults without college degrees, particularly those from lower socioeconomic status (SES) families, can struggle to break out of lower quality jobs. Integrating socioeconomic and psychological perspectives, this research examines how family SES impacts job quality improvement through job search among young adults without college degrees when they transition from one job to another. We develop and test a model that explicates how family SES influences job quality improvement through constraints and resources for job search and self-regulated job search processes. Partnering with a Midwest state government agency, we collected data from young job seekers without college degrees through four longitudinal surveys over 6 months. Our findings revealed that job seekers from lower (vs. higher) SES families faced more basic needs constraints and had fewer college degree holders in their job search networks. These factors, in turn, influenced job seekers' wage increase goals and their job search metacognition. We also found that job seekers with higher wage increase goals achieved larger wage improvement between their previous and new jobs, and those who engaged in more job search metacognition were more likely to secure improvements in benefits, find new jobs with promotion opportunities, and perceive improvements in working conditions. These findings extend the literature on job quality, job search, socioeconomic mobility, and inequality and provide practical implications for multiple stakeholder groups. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
topics: Labor market dynamics and wage inequality
title_cn: 家庭社会经济地位与求职：提升没有大学学位的年轻人工作质量的途径。
abstract_cn: 通过工作转变改善工作质量在早期成年阶段至关重要。然而，尤其是来自低社会经济地位（SES）家庭的年轻成年人，缺乏大学学位，往往难以摆脱低质量工作。结合社会经济和心理学视角，本研究探讨了家庭SES如何影响没有大学学位的年轻成年人在工作转换过程中通过求职实现工作质量的提升。我们开发并测试了一个模型，阐明家庭SES如何通过求职的限制与资源以及自我调节的求职过程影响工作质量的改善。与中西部某州政府机构合作，我们通过四次纵向调查在6个月内收集了没有大学学位的年轻求职者的数据。研究结果显示，来自低SES家庭的求职者面临更多基本需求的限制，并且在求职网络中拥有的大学学位持有者较少。这些因素反过来影响了求职者的工资增长目标和求职的元认知。我们还发现，设定更高工资增长目标的求职者在之前和新工作的工资改善上取得了更大的提升，而那些进行更多求职元认知的求职者更有可能获得福利改善、找到具有晋升机会的新工作，并感知到工作条件的改善。这些发现扩展了关于工作质量、求职、社会经济流动性和不平等的文献，并为多个利益相关者群体提供了实践意义。(PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，版权所有)。

title: Amicable rivalries and hostile rivalries: Divergent profiles of motivation and unethical conduct.
abstract: Rivalries motivate competitive performance but can also increase unethical intentions. Although extant theorizing treats this moral-motivational trade-off as inevitable, we show that rivalry's effect on unethical intentions depends on the tenor of the rivalry. Colder competitive relationships (hostile rivalries) exhibit the competitive profile documented in the literature: stronger motivation and increased unethical intentions. But warmer competitive relationships (amicable rivalries) involve a different competitive profile: stronger motivation without increased unethical intentions. Study 1 supported the assumption that participants could identify both amicable and hostile rivalries in their lives. These different rivalries evoked different judgments of warmth, but they did not differ in relationship duration, importance, or competitive domain. Study 2 demonstrated that amicable and hostile rivalries involve higher motivation compared to nonrival competition, but only hostile rivalries provoked stronger unethical intentions. This divergence can be partly explained by individuals' relative focus on the outcome of winning versus the process of competing against hostile (relative to amicable) rivals (Studies 2 and 3). Prompting participants to reflect on the value they derive from the process of competing against their hostile rival significantly reduced unethical intentions (Study 3). These findings encourage more nuanced theorizing about rivalry and identify pathways for organizations to leverage the motivational benefits of rivalry without the ethical trade-offs. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 友好的竞争与敌对的竞争：动机与不道德行为的不同特征。
abstract_cn: 竞争关系激励竞争表现，但也可能增加不道德意图。虽然现有理论将这种道德动机权衡视为不可避免，但我们表明，竞争关系对不道德意图的影响取决于竞争关系的性质。较为冷漠的竞争关系（敌对竞争）表现出文献中记录的竞争特征：更强的动力和增加的不道德意图。然而，较为温暖的竞争关系（友好竞争）则表现出不同的竞争特征：更强的动力但没有增加的不道德意图。研究1支持了参与者能够识别他们生活中的友好和敌对竞争关系的假设。这些不同的竞争关系激发了不同的温暖判断，但在关系持续时间、重要性或竞争领域上并无区别。研究2证明，友好和敌对竞争关系相比非竞争对手的竞争，涉及更高的动力，但只有敌对竞争关系引发了更强的不道德意图。这种差异部分可以通过个体对赢得结果与与敌对（相对于友好）竞争对手竞争过程的相对关注来解释（研究2和3）。促使参与者反思他们从与敌对竞争者竞争的过程中获取的价值，显著减少了不道德意图（研究3）。这些发现鼓励对竞争关系进行更细致的理论思考，并识别出组织利用竞争关系的动机利益而不牺牲伦理的途径。

title: Sharing is ethicizing: Examining the impact of sharing observed unethical behavior with family members on ethical voice at work.
abstract: "It takes a village" to build an ethical workplace, and employees who witness unethical behavior in the workplace play a crucial role in alerting organizations to wrongdoing and preventing its recurrence. While prior research has primarily focused on personal and intraorganizational factors shaping observer responses to workplace unethical behavior, the potential influence of extraorganizational factors has been largely overlooked. Recognizing that employees often share workplace experiences with close others, such as their family members, we explore how the extent of sharing with family members influences employee responses to observed unethical behavior. Integrating the functional perspective of rumination and social sharing research, we theorize that the extent of sharing with family members increases observer reflective rumination about the unethical behavior and their tendency to engage in ethical voice at work. We found empirical evidence in two critical incident surveys (Studies 1 and 4), an experiment (Study 2), and a cross-lagged panel survey (Study 3). Finally, we discuss the theoretical and practical implications of this research. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 分享就是伦理化：考察与家庭成员分享观察到的不道德行为对工作中伦理表达的影响。
abstract_cn: “建设一个伦理的工作场所需要‘整个社区的参与’，而目睹工作场所不道德行为的员工在提醒组织不当行为和防止其再次发生方面发挥着至关重要的作用。尽管以往的研究主要集中在影响观察者对工作场所不道德行为反应的个人和组织内部因素上，但对组织外部因素的潜在影响则大多被忽视。我们认识到，员工往往会与他们的家庭成员分享工作经历，因此我们探讨与家庭成员分享的程度如何影响员工对所观察到的不道德行为的反应。结合反思性沉思和社会分享研究的功能视角，我们推测与家庭成员分享的程度会增加观察者对不道德行为的反思性沉思，并提高他们在工作中积极表达伦理意见的倾向。在两个关键事件调查（研究1和4）、一项实验（研究2）和一项交叉滞后面板调查（研究3）中，我们发现了实证证据。最后，我们讨论了这项研究的理论和实践意义。(PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，所有权利保留)。

title: What’s your 5 to 9? Antecedents and outcomes of profiles of daily recovery experience trajectories across the evening.
abstract: Every day at work employees are faced with resource depleting demands, necessitating recovery after work to avoid health and well-being detriments. Recovery theory and empirical results suggest that the four main recovery experiences that underlie employee recovery-psychological detachment, relaxation, mastery, and control-can occur concurrently. At the same time, each of these recovery experiences are dynamic and change across the evening. However, previous recovery research has not investigated and empirically examined both notions at the same time. Using a combined person-centered, dynamic approach across two experience sampling studies, we examine daily profiles of trajectories of all four recovery experiences across an entire evening after work. We also examine how daily job demands and resources relate to these profiles, and how profile membership relates to next-day work and well-being outcomes. Results revealed three profiles of recovery experience trajectory combinations that were predicted by job demands and resources. Results also revealed that having psychological detachment, relaxation, and control experiences early and often across the evening results in the most optimal daily recovery process for next-day well-being. This work represents an important stride forward as it is the first to examine how the recovery process unfolds, along with providing practical recommendations for how employees should best recover daily. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 你的五到九是什么？晚间日常恢复体验轨迹的前因与结果。
abstract_cn: 在工作中，员工每天面临资源耗竭的需求，因此需要在工作后进行恢复，以避免对健康和福祉的损害。恢复理论及实证结果表明，员工恢复所依赖的四种主要恢复体验——心理脱离、放松、掌控感和自我提升——可以同时发生。同时，这些恢复体验是动态的，会在晚上发生变化。然而，之前的恢复研究尚未同时调查和实证检验这两个概念。通过结合个人中心的动态方法，我们在两项体验采样研究中考察了员工在工作后整个晚上四种恢复体验的日常轨迹轮廓。我们还研究了每日工作需求和资源如何与这些轮廓相关，以及轮廓成员身份与次日工作和福祉结果之间的关系。结果显示，恢复体验轨迹组合存在三种轮廓，这些轮廓受到工作需求和资源的预测。结果还表明，在晚上早期和频繁地体验心理脱离、放松和掌控感可为次日的福祉提供最优的日常恢复过程。这项研究是重要的进展，因为它首次考察了恢复过程的展开方式，并提供了关于员工如何最佳进行日常恢复的实用建议。 (PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，版权所有)。

title: Translating human capital amid varying intentions to stay: An integrative conceptual review of the immigrant employment attainment process.
abstract: Immigrants face a unique challenge in translating their home country human capital to secure employment in their host country's labor market, potentially leading to underemployment. In this integrative conceptual review, we formalize a framework to explain the process of human capital translation for immigrants, specifically laborers and professionals. Synthesizing findings across disciplines, we explicitly model and consider the theoretical role of intended duration of stay, which refers to the amount of time an immigrant desires to stay in their host country. We derive this notion from socioemotional selectivity theory to theorize that an immigrant's intended duration of stay influences proximal social goals central to human capital translation, and in turn, employment speed (i.e., how quickly they attain a job) and quality (i.e., the extent to which the job aligns with their knowledge, skills, and abilities). We contribute to scholarship by (a) enhancing the conceptual accessibility and precision of the "immigrant" construct for future organizational psychology and management scholarship; (b) synthesizing and integrating multidisciplinary literature on the labor and professional immigrants' employment attainment process to advance a foundational framework that explains human capital translation and how underemployment may occur for these immigrants; and (c) generating a future research agenda and delineating practical implications for practitioners. We also develop and showcase a novel approach for using supervised machine learning, unsupervised machine learning, and large language models to conduct high quality, multidisciplinary systematic reviews more efficiently. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 在人力资本翻译中，应对不同的留任意图：移民就业成就过程的综合概念性回顾。
abstract_cn: 移民在将其母国的人力资本转化为在东道国劳动力市场获得就业时，面临着独特的挑战，这可能导致低就业适配。在本次综合性概念综述中，我们构建了一个框架，以解释移民的人力资本转化过程，特别是劳动者和专业人士。通过跨学科的研究结果进行综合，我们明确建模并考虑了预期停留时间的理论角色，指的是移民希望在东道国停留的时间长短。我们从社会情感选择理论中引出这一概念，理论推断移民的预期停留时间影响与人力资本转化密切相关的近期社会目标，进而影响就业速度（即他们多快能获得工作）和就业质量（即工作与他们的知识、技能和能力的契合程度）。我们的研究贡献在于：(a) 提高了“移民”这一构念在未来组织心理学和管理学研究中的概念可及性和准确性；(b) 综合和整合了关于劳动和专业移民就业获取过程的多学科文献，进而推动一个基础框架的形成，以解释人力资本转化以及这些移民如何可能遭遇低就业适配；以及(c) 制定未来研究议程，并为从业者划定实际应用意义。我们还开发并展示了一种新颖的方法，利用监督学习、非监督学习及大型语言模型，更高效地进行高质量的多学科系统性综述。(PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，保留所有权利)。

title: Roadblocks: Evaluating the impact of fines-related driver’s license suspension on work-related outcomes for socioeconomically disadvantaged workers.
abstract: Loss of transportation access is likely to compromise individuals' ability to get to work. Taking an interdisciplinary approach, we triangulate across complementary methodologies to examine the far-reaching impact of driver's license suspension for nonpayment of court-ordered legal fees. Reflexive thematic analysis of preliminary qualitative interview data (N = 21) yielded themes related to compromised social mobility and well-being, with subthemes indicative of job/income loss and un(der)employment resulting from unpaid fines and license suspension, inability to afford additional fees, subsequent transportation challenges, resource acquisition beyond the formal workforce, and a desire for betterment. We build on this qualitative richness via a two-study approach. In Study 1, we draw on quantitative survey data (N = 879), evidencing a positive association between license suspension and unemployment, and indicating that this relationship is mediated by compromised access to transportation. License suspension was also positively associated with turning toward the informal shadow economy for employment, with some individuals reporting turning to sex work and crime to make ends meet. Data bore out a number of employment- and well-being-related consequences of nonpayment policies, and suggested that effects may function differentially by race, with Black individuals experiencing disproportionately negative effects. In Study 2, archival data indicated that enforcement of license suspensions is likely to result in a net loss to state revenue, incentivizing policy revision. Collectively, our data suggest that fine and fee imposition, and associated driver's license suspension, are likely to have a number of negative effects for individuals, employers, and society alike. We offer policy and practice implications related to reevaluating license suspension for nonpayment of court-ordered legal financial obligations. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 障碍：评估与罚款相关的驾驶执照吊销对社会经济弱势工人工作相关结果的影响。
abstract_cn: 失去交通通行权可能会影响个人的工作能力。我们采取跨学科的方法，通过互补的方法论三角测量，考察因未支付法庭命令的法律费用而导致的驾驶执照暂停的深远影响。对初步定性访谈数据的反思性主题分析（N = 21）揭示了与社会流动性和福祉受损相关的主题，副主题则表明因未支付罚款和执照暂停而导致的失业/收入损失和低（未）就业问题、无法承担额外费用、随之而来的交通挑战、在正式劳动力之外获取资源的困难，以及对改善现状的渴望。我们通过两项研究的方法深化这种定性丰富性。在研究1中，我们利用定量调查数据（N = 879），证实了执照暂停与失业之间的正相关关系，并指出这一关系受制于交通通行权的受损。执照暂停还与向非正式影子经济寻求就业之间存在正相关，有些人报告因维持生计而转向性工作和犯罪。数据证实了未付款政策所带来的多种与就业和福祉相关的后果，并表明这些影响可能因种族而有所不同，黑人群体经历了不成比例的负面影响。在研究2中，归档数据表明，执法执行驾照暂停可能导致国家收入的净损失，从而激励政策修订。总体而言，我们的数据表明，罚款和费用的征收以及相关的驾照暂停，可能对个人、雇主和整体社会产生多种负面影响。我们提出了与重新评估因未支付法庭命令的法律经济义务而暂停驾驶执照相关的政策和实践建议。(PsycInfo数据库记录(c) 2026 APA，版权所有)。

title: An integrative conceptual review of gender bias in leader evaluations: An observer-focused motive-driven process model.
abstract: Over the past decades, research on gender bias in leader evaluations has proliferated across multiple disciplines, significantly expanding contexts, outcomes, and theoretical perspectives examined. Despite these valuable contributions, the literature remains fragmented in explaining the persistent variability in how and why gender bias manifests, from severe penalties against women leaders in certain contexts to evaluative advantages in others. To resolve these discrepancies, we shift the focus from leaders to the motivated processes driving observer evaluations. We begin with an integrative review of research, revealing that observers, ranging from supervisors and subordinates to clients and investors, are not conduits of stereotypes but active evaluators whose motives shape how they selectively appraise women leaders. Drawing on motivated cognition theory, we develop a novel motive-driven process model that identifies three core directional motives: identity protection, value alignment, and resource dependence. Using this model, we integrate the literature by highlighting individual-level and contextual antecedents of each motive and explicating how motives drive distinct selective appraisal processes. By unpacking "why" and "how" observers evaluate women leaders through motivated processes, our model also offers targeted interventions that address observer motives rather than changing women's behaviors, underscoring a pressing need to engage various stakeholders in addressing gender bias in leader evaluations. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 对领导者评估中的性别偏见进行整合性概念评述：一种以观察者为中心的动机驱动过程模型。
abstract_cn: 在过去几十年中，有关领导者评估中的性别偏见的研究在多个学科中迅速发展，显著拓展了所研究的情境、结果和理论视角。尽管这些贡献很有价值，但相关文献在解释性别偏见的持续变异性方面仍然零散，从某些情境中对女性领导者的严重惩罚到其他情境中对其的评估优势。为了解决这些差异，我们将关注点从领导者转向驱动观察者评估的动机过程。我们首先进行了整合性研究回顾，揭示了观察者（包括监督者、下属、客户和投资者等）并非成见的传递者，而是积极的评估者，其动机塑造了他们如何选择性地评估女性领导者。基于动机认知理论，我们开发了一个新颖的以动机为驱动的过程模型，识别出三种核心方向性动机：身份保护、价值一致性和资源依赖。利用该模型，我们通过强调每种动机的个体层面和情境前因，整合了文献，阐明了动机如何驱动不同的选择性评估过程。通过剖析观察者如何以及为何通过动机过程评估女性领导者，我们的模型还提供了针对观察者动机的干预措施，而非单纯改变女性的行为，强调了在解决领导者评估中的性别偏见时各方利益相关者参与的迫切需求。

title: The psychology of following: Conceptualizing and validating the Fundamental Follower Needs Inventory.
abstract: Humans possess an evolved followership psychology that enables them to identify and endorse different types of leaders depending on situational demands. But what fundamental needs guide these follower endorsements? Across a preliminary study and five validation studies (N = 3,514), we developed and validated the Fundamental Follower Needs Inventory (FFNI)-a psychometrically robust measure that identifies six core follower needs: protection, affiliation, status, guidance (including vision and expertise), and fairness. In Studies 1 and 2, we conducted content validation, tested reliability, and confirmed the factor structure of the FFNI across three domains (general, political, and workplace), three countries (the United States, the United Kingdom, and China), and multiple time points. Study 3 demonstrated FFNI's convergent and discriminant validity. Studies 4 and 5 explored the nomological network, examining its antecedents, consequences, and both predictive and incremental validity. The FFNI provides a novel tool for researchers to investigate how follower needs vary across contexts and cultures and how these needs shape leader endorsements and perceptions of leadership effectiveness. Practically, the FFNI offers leaders a framework to better understand and respond to the psychological needs of those they lead. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 跟随心理学：构思与验证基本跟随者需求清单。
abstract_cn: 人类具备一种进化出的追随者心理，使他们能够根据情境需求识别并支持不同类型的领导者。那么，哪些基本需求指导这些追随者的支持呢？在一项初步研究和五项验证研究中（N = 3,514），我们开发并验证了基本追随者需求量表（FFNI）——一项具有心理测量学可靠性的工具，用于识别六种核心的追随者需求：保护、归属、地位、指导（包括愿景和专业知识）以及公平性。在研究1和2中，我们进行了内容验证，测试了可靠性，并确认了FFNI在三个领域（一般、政治和工作场所）、三个国家（美国、英国和中国）以及多个时间点的因子结构。研究3展示了FFNI的聚合有效性和区分有效性。研究4和5探讨了其认知网络，检查了其前因、后果及预测性和增量有效性。FFNI为研究人员提供了一种新工具，以探讨追随者需求在不同背景和文化中的变化，以及这些需求如何塑造对领导者的支持和对领导效能的看法。在实践中，FFNI为领导者提供了一个框架，以更好地理解和响应他们所领导者的心理需求。（PsycInfo 数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有。）

title: If it does not kill you, does it make me stronger? The double-edged consequences of observing resilience in the workplace.
abstract: The literature on resilience has focused predominantly on the consequences of resilience for the resilient individuals themselves. Yet, current theorizing on workplace events suggests that the critical and eye-catching nature of demonstrating resilience is likely to draw the attention of other employees. We explore these interpersonal dynamics surrounding resilience by developing and testing a model that delves into the consequences of employees observing their coworkers' resilience. Drawing from social comparison theory, we explain how observing resilience is related to both positive (inspiration) and negative (anxiety) social comparison emotions, based on perceptions of similarity with the resilient individual. We further theorize about the downstream consequences of these emotions for the observer's attitudes (positive mindset about stress) and behavior (adaptive performance). Across a combination of lab and field studies, we found that observing resilience is related to feelings of anxiety when the observer perceives themselves as being dissimilar to the resilient individual. However, the significant positive effect of observing resilience on inspiration was not conditional upon similarity perceptions. In turn, these feelings of inspiration and anxiety were associated with the observer having a more, or less, positive attitude toward stress, respectively, which was ultimately related to helping or hindering their adaptive performance in the workplace. We discuss how our research provides a rich avenue for future studies on the social dynamics surrounding employee resilience. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 如果这并不能致你于死地，它会让我更强大吗？职场中观察韧性的双刃剑效应。
abstract_cn: 关于韧性的文献主要集中在韧性对韧性个体自身的影响。然而，当前对职场事件的理论研究表明，展现韧性的关键性和引人注目的特征可能会吸引其他员工的注意。我们通过开发和测试一个模型来探讨围绕韧性的这些人际动态，该模型深入研究员工观察同事韧性的后果。基于社会比较理论，我们解释了观察韧性如何与积极（灵感）和消极（焦虑）社会比较情绪相关，这取决于观察者与韧性个体的相似性感知。我们进一步理论化了这些情绪对观察者态度（对压力的积极心态）和行为（适应性表现）的下游影响。在实验室和现场研究的组合中，我们发现，当观察者感知自己与韧性个体存在差异时，观察韧性会导致焦虑情绪的产生。然而，观察韧性对灵感的显著积极影响并不依赖于相似性感知。反过来，这些灵感和焦虑的感觉分别与观察者对压力的态度（更加或较少积极的态度）相关，而这最终影响了他们在职场中的适应性表现。我们讨论了我们的研究为未来关于员工韧性社会动态的研究提供了丰富的切入点。

title: Correction to “Build or buy? The individual and unit-level performance of internally versus externally selected managers over time” by DeOrtentiis et al. (2018).
abstract: Reports an error in "Build or buy? The individual and unit-level performance of internally versus externally selected managers over time" by Philip S. DeOrtentiis, Chad H. Van Iddekinge, Robert E. Ployhart and Tom D. Heetderks (Journal of Applied Psychology, 2018[Aug], Vol 103[8], 916-928; see record 2018-16525-001). In the article, in Table 1, most of the values in the columns for Variables 2 and 3 were incorrectly transposed. The columns with the corrected values are shown in the erratum. (The following abstract of the original article appeared in record 2018-16525-001). At some point, hiring managers in all organizations face the decision of whether to fill open positions with internal candidates (e.g., through promotions) or to hire external candidates (e.g., from competitors or new entrants into the labor market). Despite this ubiquitous choice, surprisingly little research has compared the effectiveness of internal and external selection or has identified situations in which 1 approach may be better than the other. The authors use theory on human capital resources to predict differences between internal and external hires on manager- and unit-level outcomes. Analysis of data from a quick-service retail organization (N = 3,697) suggested that internally hired managers demonstrated higher levels of individual job performance and commanded lower starting salaries than externally hired managers. At the unit-level, operations led by internal hires demonstrated higher performance on organization-specific criteria (i.e., service performance), whereas no internal-external differences were found on more general criteria (i.e., financial performance). They also found some evidence that differences in unit service performance decreased over time (but did not diminish completely) as external hires improved at a slightly faster rate than internal hires. Overall, these findings underscore the complexity of the recurring "build or buy" decision. The results also suggest that internal hires generally outperform external hires, both individually and collectively, and they do so for less money. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 对DeOrtentiis等人（2018）“自建还是购买？内部与外部选拔经理在时间上的个人和单位绩效”一文的更正。
abstract_cn: 在Philip S. DeOrtentiis、Chad H. Van Iddekinge、Robert E. Ployhart 和 Tom D. Heetderks 的文章“是构建还是购买？内部与外部选拔的管理者在个人与单位层面的表现随时间变化”（《应用心理学杂志》，2018年8月，第103卷，第8期，916-928；见记录2018-16525-001）中报告了一处错误。该文章中的表1中，大多数变量2和变量3的列值被错误地调换了。更正后的值列在更正通知中显示。（原文章的以下摘要出现在记录2018-16525-001中）。在某个时刻，所有组织的招聘经理都面临决策，即是否用内部候选人（如通过晋升）填补空缺职位，或是雇用外部候选人（如来自竞争对手或新入劳动力市场者）。尽管这种选择普遍存在，但对内部与外部选拔效果的比较研究却令人惊讶地很少，且没有明确识别出某种方法可能优于另一种的情境。作者利用人力资本资源理论预测内部和外部招聘在管理者和单位层面结果上的差异。对一家快餐零售组织（N = 3,697）的数据分析表明，内部聘用的管理者表现出更高的个人工作绩效，起始薪资也低于外部聘用的管理者。在单位层面，由内部聘用的管理者领导的运营在组织特定标准（即服务绩效）上表现更佳，而在更一般的标准（即财务绩效）上则没有发现内部与外部的差异。他们还发现，单位服务绩效的差异随着时间的推移有所减小（但并未完全消失），因外部聘用的管理者改进的速度略快于内部聘用的管理者。总体而言，这些发现强调了“构建还是购买”决策的复杂性。结果还表明，内部聘用的管理者在个人和整体上通常优于外部聘用，且成本更低。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，保留所有权利）。

title: The unintended consequences of state policies on entrepreneurial activity and quality of work life: A social impact study.
abstract: The United States and other countries enacted various policies aimed at containing the spread of COVID-19. Though the pandemic itself took a physical, psychological, and economic toll on society, it is unclear how specific containment policies influenced longer term aspects of employment. Taking up this challenge, this research uses human agency theory to study the effects of U.S. state policy COVID-19 strictness, defined along the spectrum from the absence to the presence (e.g., none, recommended, and mandated) of nine containment policies, on critical macro and micro outcomes. Study 1, using an objective measure of public containment policies enacted during 2020, finds stricter policies (i.e., more restrictions) negatively related to opportunity-based entrepreneurship in 2021. Study 2, using the same public policy strictness measure and a national sample of 801 participants, finds strict policies in 2020 negatively related to residents' entrepreneurial self-efficacy (ESE) in 2024, which in turn related to their entrepreneurial intentions and quality of work life (QWL). The hypothesized interaction between state policy and sex on ESE was not significant, but post hoc analysis reveals that women residing in states with stricter policies reported lower life and career satisfaction than women in states with less strict policies and that the effects of state policy strictness on career and life satisfaction were more negative for women than for men. A supplemental preregistered experimental vignette study reinforced Study 2 findings such that manipulated state policy strictness caused a decrease in ESE, entrepreneurial intentions, and QWL; manipulated ESE also had a significant effect on entrepreneurial intentions and QWL. We discuss the broader implications of these results for theory and policymaking. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
topics: Impact of AI and Big Data on Business and Society
title_cn: 国家政策对创业活动和工作生活质量的意外影响：一项社会影响研究。
abstract_cn: 美国及其他国家实施了各种政策，旨在遏制COVID-19的传播。尽管大流行对社会造成了身体、心理和经济上的影响，但尚不清楚具体的遏制政策如何影响就业的长期方面。为了应对这一挑战，本研究利用人类能动性理论，研究美国各州COVID-19政策严格程度（定义为从没有到有的九项遏制政策的存在程度，例如：无、建议和强制执行）对关键宏观和微观结果的影响。研究1使用2020年实施的公共遏制政策的客观衡量，发现更严格的政策（即更多的限制）与2021年机会型创业呈负相关。研究2使用相同的公共政策严格性衡量，并采取全国801名参与者的样本，发现2020年的严格政策与2024年居民的创业自我效能（ESE）呈负相关，而创业自我效能又与他们的创业意图和工作生活质量（QWL）相关。假设的州政策与性别对创业自我效能的交互作用未能显著，但事后分析揭示，居住在政策 stricter 州的女性报告的生活和职业满足感低于居住在政策相对宽松州的女性，并且州政策严格性对职业和生活满意度的影响对女性的负面影响大于男性。补充的预注册实验片段研究强化了研究2的发现，即操控的州政策严格性导致创业自我效能、创业意图和工作生活质量的下降；操控的创业自我效能也对创业意图和工作生活质量产生了显著影响。我们讨论了这些结果对理论和政策制定的更广泛影响。（PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，保留所有权利）。

title: ‘We are the backbone of the community’: Precarious multiple employment and the complex dynamics of dignity in, out and between work
abstract: This article critically examines the complex dynamics related to dignity at work (DAW) in contemporary precarious employment in the United Kingdom. It argues that current DAW frameworks are typically focused on workers with one job, but what about the experiences of those who need to work in multiple jobs to make ends meet? To consider this, the article focuses on the complex experiences related to dignity when navigating between and participating in different workplaces, presenting the notion of ‘dignity in, out and between work’. It provides a four-dimensional framework to renew DAW debates. The first two reflect original DAW frameworks revealing ‘work intensification’ and ‘poor management, exploitation and abuse’. However, this article expands these conceptually and empirically by presenting a thematic broadening of work intensification and extensification across a mixture of jobs, with fragmented and complex temporal and spatial aspects of work. The third and fourth dimensions contribute two significant elements to DAW discussions. ‘Stigma, humiliation and shame’ incorporates issues such as in-work poverty and foodbank use. Finally, we emphasise tensions related to ‘the value of work’, where workers’ contribution was not appreciated even if they held socially significant jobs.
title_cn: “我们是社区的支柱”：不稳定的多重就业及工作内外及其之间尊严的复杂动态
