abstract_cn: 本文批判性地审视了当代英国不稳定就业中与工作尊严（DAW）相关的复杂动态。文章认为，当前的DAW框架通常关注于只有一份工作的工人，但那些需要通过多份工作来维持生计的人的经历又如何呢？为此，文章聚焦于在不同工作场所之间穿梭和参与时与尊严相关的复杂体验，提出了“工作中的尊严、工作之外的尊严以及工作之间的尊严”的概念。文章提供了一个四维框架，以更新DAW的讨论。前两维反映了原有的DAW框架，揭示了“工作强度加大”和“管理不善、剥削与虐待”。然而，本文在概念和实证上对这些进行了扩展，呈现了在多份工作中工作强度和扩展的主题拓展，以及工作的碎片化和复杂的时间与空间方面。第三和第四维为DAW讨论贡献了两个重要元素。“污名、羞辱与耻辱”涵盖了诸如工作贫困和使用食品银行等问题。最后，我们强调了与“工作的价值”相关的紧张关系，即使工人从事的是社会重要的工作，他们的贡献也未得到应有的认可。

title: The communicative constitution of calling: From individual possession to relational processes of meaningful work
abstract: Precarious employment, artificial intelligence (AI), and disengagement are eroding work’s role as a reliable source of meaning—namely, that one’s work is or should be one’s calling. Although psychological research typically frames calling as stable, beneficial, and individual; communication theory reveals it as collectively co-authored, relationally sustained, and thus inherently fragile and open to disruption. This tension raises the question of whether calling functions as a safeguard or becomes a source of added vulnerability when its promised meaning can no longer be maintained. Drawing on communicative practices and Communicative Constitution of Organization (CCO), we reposition calling as an emergent communicative process (rather than individual possession or ontological given) that takes shape through everyday talk, storytelling, and power-laden interactions. Purpose, therefore, is not possessed but continually constituted. This reconceptualization advances three shifts in the literature—from individual perception to collective co-authorship; from static ontology to emergent process; and from “having” to “doing” a calling. These shifts pivot theory toward process- and context-sensitive models; call for multi-level, longitudinal, and narrative methods to trace how everyday communication aggregates into institutional norms and identities; and reorient communicative practices toward cultivating spaces where diverse voices co-author adaptive callings through collective, ongoing sensemaking rather than imposed ideals of what constitutes meaningful work.
title_cn: 呼叫的交际构成：从个体拥有到有意义工作的关系过程
abstract_cn: 不稳定的就业、人工智能（AI）和脱离感正在侵蚀工作的可靠意义——即一个人的工作应是其使命。尽管心理学研究通常将使命视为稳定、有益和个体化的；但传播理论揭示了使命是集体共创的、依赖关系维持的，因此本质上是脆弱的，并且容易受到干扰。这种紧张关系提出了一个问题：当承诺的意义无法维持时，使命是否作为一种保护机制发挥作用，或者成为额外脆弱性的来源。基于沟通实践和组织的沟通宪法（CCO），我们将使命重新定位为一种新兴的沟通过程（而不是个体的占有或本体论的既定），通过日常对话、讲故事和权力充斥的互动而形成。因此，目的不是拥有的，而是持续构成的。这种重新概念化推动了文献中的三个转变——从个体感知到集体共创；从静态本体论到新兴过程；以及从“拥有”使命到“实践”使命。这些转变将理论转向过程和情境敏感的模型；呼吁采用多层次、纵向和叙事的方法，以追踪日常沟通如何聚合成制度规范和身份认同；并重新调整沟通实践，培养多元声音通过集体和持续的意义构建共同创作适应性使命的空间，而不是被施加的关于什么构成有意义工作的理想。

title: Playing with trash: How gamification fostered the early adoption of zero-waste practices
abstract: We have only a limited understanding of the micro-level interactions that enable individuals to overcome the social and technical challenges associated with adopting socially beneficial practices. This article explores this question by zooming in on a case in which gamification mechanisms foster such adoption over the long term. Drawing on an abductive analysis of longitudinal qualitative data—including interviews, observations, and secondary sources—we examine how local authorities in France leveraged gamification to encourage households to adopt innovative waste management practices. Our findings identify three social mechanisms—affiliation with the group of adopters, insulation from pushback, and extension of the gamified experience. Through those mechanisms, gamification not only facilitates adoption but also transforms sympathizers into committed advocates, reinforcing engagement over time. These findings contribute to the literature on practice adoption and social dynamics by demonstrating how gamification sustains early adopters’ long-term engagement with practices that require overcoming technical complexity and social adversity. In addition, the analysis advances the gamification literature by offering a processual perspective on the social mechanisms that drive the long-term impact of gamification.
title_cn: 玩转垃圾：游戏化如何促进零废弃实践的早期采纳
abstract_cn: 我们对个体如何克服与采纳社会福利实践相关的社会和技术挑战的微观层面互动了解有限。本文通过深入探讨一个案例，旨在研究游戏化机制如何促进这种实践的长期采纳。我们基于纵向定性数据的溯因分析——包括访谈、观察和次级资料——研究了法国地方政府如何利用游戏化来鼓励家庭采纳创新的废物管理实践。我们的研究结果识别出三种社会机制——与采纳者群体的归属感、抵御反对意见的隔离以及游戏化体验的扩展。通过这些机制，游戏化不仅促进了采纳，还将同情者转变为坚定的倡导者，增强了长期参与感。这些发现为实践采纳和社会动态的文献贡献了新的视角，展示了游戏化如何维持早期采纳者对需要克服技术复杂性和社会逆境的实践的长期参与。此外，本文的分析还通过提供关于驱动游戏化长期影响的社会机制的过程视角，推动了游戏化文献的发展。

title: “He gives me everything all the time, and I feel bad that I can’t even throw him the ball”: Relational care agency in interspecies care work
abstract: What might we learn about care and agency by attuning to the sensory dynamics of human-canine care collaborations? While most research on care focuses on humans, this paper extends the relational care work debate by engaging with interspecies care, foregrounding the nuanced relational care agency that entails nonhuman animal–human interdependency. Drawing on relational and interspecies care literature affording agency to nonhuman animals, we studied 13 assistance dog teams to explore how care is co-created between disabled humans and educated, yet vulnerable, animal workers. The empirical material includes ethnographic observations, interviews with human clients, and photographs. Our findings illustrate often invisible, nonverbal aspects of interspecies care, grounded in mutual trust and the aesthetic “reading” of one another, thereby contributing to a more granular understanding of relational care agency. Second, by showing how dogs, long understood through limited human conceptions, “shift” from care receivers to embodying agential care professionals who disrupt power dynamics and human-centered care norms, we nuance the carer–cared-for relationship in OS. Third, we offer novel insights into interspecies care, encompassing a broader range of animal-driven care practices than previous literature recognized. Finally, our study aims to foster more ethical relationships for working animals and humans alike.
title_cn: “他一直给予我一切，我感到很愧疚，因为我连扔球给他都做不到”：跨物种护理工作中的关系关怀能动性
abstract_cn: 通过关注人犬照护合作中的感官动态，我们能了解到关于关怀与主体性的哪些内容？尽管大多数对照护的研究集中在人的身上，本论文通过参与跨物种照护的探讨，延续了关系照护工作辩论，凸显了涉及非人类动物与人类之间相互依赖的微妙关系照护主体性。我们基于赋予非人类动物主体性的关系与跨物种照护文献，研究了13个助理犬团队，以探索残疾人类与受过教育但又脆弱的动物工作者之间如何共同创造关怀。实证材料包括民族志观察、与人类客户的访谈以及照片。我们的研究结果揭示了跨物种照护中常常隐形的非语言层面，这些层面根植于相互信任以及对彼此的美学“解读”，从而为关系照护主体性的更微观理解做出了贡献。其次，通过展示犬只如何从传统上被狭隘的人类观念理解中的“照护接受者”转变为具备主体性的照护专业人士，打破权力动态和以人为中心的照护规范，我们对照护者与被照护者之间的关系进行了细致的探讨。第三，我们提供了关于跨物种照护的新见解，涵盖了比以往文献所认可的更广泛的动物驱动的照护实践。最后，我们的研究旨在促进人与工作动物之间更加伦理的关系。

title: TMT cognitive and affective trust, psychological safety and corporate entrepreneurship
abstract: What enables top management teams (TMTs) to turn trust into entrepreneurial action? This article answers this question by proposing a novel theoretical account to explain why and when trust-based relationships within TMTs create strategic benefits. Drawing on social exchange theory, we examine a moderated-mediation model that shows how: (a) TMT psychological safety mediates the effect of TMT cognitive and affective trust on corporate entrepreneurship (CE; the why ) and (b) social integration within TMTs moderates this mediated effect (the when ). We tested our model through a multi-wave survey of 372 TMT members in 124 established firms in Ghana. Our findings reveal that the two distinct dimensions of trust (i.e. cognitive and affective) influence CE through TMT psychological safety. Our results also demonstrate that the mediated effects are more pronounced when TMT social integration is high rather than low. Implications of these findings for theory and practice are discussed.
title_cn: 高管团队的认知与情感信任、心理安全与企业创业精神
abstract_cn: 是什么使高层管理团队（TMT）能够将信任转化为创业行动？本文通过提出一种新的理论框架来回答这个问题，以解释在何种情况下TMT内部的基于信任的关系能够创造战略利益。基于社会交换理论，我们考察了一个调节-中介模型，展示了：（a）TMT心理安全感在TMT认知信任和情感信任对企业创业（CE；即“为什么”）的影响之间起中介作用；（b）TMT内部的社会整合在这一中介效应中起调节作用（即“何时”）。我们通过对加纳124家成熟企业中372名TMT成员进行的多波次调查测试了我们的模型。研究结果揭示，信任的两个不同维度（即认知信任和情感信任）通过TMT心理安全感影响企业创业。我们的结果还表明，当TMT的社会整合程度较高时，中介效应更加显著。本文讨论了这些发现对理论和实践的启示。

title: Being and selling yourself: Unemployment, employability and the limits of identity regulation
abstract: Are there limits on what we can reasonably be asked to become? The concept of employability teaches the construction of new models of working identity – ones that emphasise personal traits and passions. It motivates recipients to become employable by ‘working’ on the self – such that a person’s identity becomes saleable on the job market. This article examines employability through its impact on those specifically asked to become employable – members of work clubs for the unemployed. Stemming from a 12-month, primarily ethnographic, study of unemployed experience, the article describes the nature of employability in practice and specifically the tensions experienced by long-term unemployed people who are repeatedly asked to manufacture a more employable version of themselves. Employability is assessed as a form of identity regulation which prompts individuals to construct themselves as continuously employable over time. The struggles surrounding this endeavour – as experienced by the unemployed research participants – point to the parameters and limits of identities specified within relations of power and the social consequences for those unable or unwilling to become what they are expected to be.
title_cn: 存在与自我推销：失业、就业能力与身份规范的局限性
abstract_cn: 我们可以被合理要求成为什么人吗？就业能力的概念促使我们构建新的工作身份模型——这些模型强调个人特征和激情。它激励受益者通过“自我修炼”来提升就业能力，使个人身份在就业市场上变得可售。本文考察了就业能力对那些被特别要求具备就业能力的人群的影响——即失业工作俱乐部的成员。文章基于对失业经历为期12个月的主要民族志研究，描述了就业能力在实践中的特征，尤其是长期失业者在被反复要求制造出一个更具就业能力的自我时所经历的张力。就业能力被评估为一种身份调节形式，促使个体不断构建自己，以保持持续的就业能力。这一努力所带来的挣扎——正如失业研究参与者所经历的——指向了权力关系中所规定的身份的参数和限制，以及对于那些无法或不愿意成为他们被期待成为什么的人所带来的社会后果。

title: Proverbs as other-than-human actants in corporate social responsibility communication: A ventriloquial analysis of corporate-community dialogues
abstract: How do proverbs play a role in the evolution of corporate-community communication about social responsibility? We show that these everyday sayings can act as powerful, other-than-human actants in corporate social responsibility (CSR) dialogues. Drawing on 32 interviews with CSR managers in Vietnam, supported by ethnographic notes and observations from 8 corporate–community presentation sessions, we trace how proverbs enter conversations and redirect the flow of interaction. Using a ventriloquial lens, we identify three mechanisms—authoring, re-authoring, and counter-authoring—through which proverbs speak on behalf of participants, challenge corporate narratives, and reopen space for community voice. Our findings reveal how proverbs become resources through which community members reclaim authority, rework the meaning of CSR, and negotiate more equal communicative ground with corporations. By foregrounding how these cultural resources participate in interaction, our study encourages communication constitutes organization scholarship to take seriously the organizing role of material and other-than-human actants. We argue that attending to proverbs not only enriches our understanding of communication in the Global South but also unsettles dominant assumptions about who, and what, gets to participate in organizational life.
title_cn: 作为非人类行为者的谚语在企业社会责任传播中的作用：企业与社区对话的言语分析
abstract_cn: 谚语在企业与社区之间关于社会责任的沟通演变中发挥了什么作用？我们表明，这些日常谚语可以作为企业社会责任（CSR）对话中强大的非人类行动者。通过对越南32位CSR经理的访谈，辅以8场企业与社区呈现会的民族志笔记和观察，我们追踪了谚语如何进入对话并重新引导互动的流向。运用代言的视角，我们识别出了三种机制——创作、再创作和对抗创作，通过这些机制，谚语代表参与者发声，挑战企业叙事，并为社区声音重新开启空间。我们的研究结果揭示了谚语如何成为社区成员重新夺回权威、重新构建CSR意义以及与企业协商更平等沟通基础的资源。通过突显这些文化资源如何参与互动，我们的研究鼓励组织沟通领域的学者认真对待物质及其他非人类行动者在组织中的组织作用。我们认为，关注谚语不仅丰富了我们对全球南方沟通的理解，还动摇了关于谁以及什么能够参与组织生活的主流假设。

title: From pre-disruption success to disruption survival: The role of pre-disruption job performance evaluation in work outcomes during disruption
abstract: Organizations increasingly face sudden disruptions, such as the COVID-19 pandemic, which can create profound uncertainty for employees. Drawing on conservation of resources (COR) theory, this study examines how job performance evaluation prior to a disruption is associated with employees’ work outcomes during the disruption. We argue that these recognition signals, as contextual resources, help employees maintain psychological resources under uncertainty, in the form of career satisfaction. We also propose supervisor support during the disruption as a moderator of this relationship, as it renders performance evaluation a socially conferred contextual resource and reinforces its impact. Furthermore, we find that career satisfaction during disruption is positively associated with employees’ perceptions of COVID-19’s impact on the future success of the company, a perceived condition resource, which in turn relates to organizational commitment and lower turnover intentions. Our findings highlight how configurations of resources, such as performance evaluation and supervisor support, are linked to employee responses during periods of high uncertainty. We discuss implications for COR theory, highlight connections to resilience, career shocks, and signaling processes, and provide practical strategies for managing employee attitudes in disruptive contexts.
topics: Supply Chain Resilience and Risk Management
title_cn: 从干扰前的成功到干扰中的生存：干扰期间工作成果中干扰前工作表现评估的作用
abstract_cn: 组织越来越面临突发的干扰，例如COVID-19疫情，这可能会给员工带来深刻的不确定性。本研究基于资源保护理论（COR），探讨了干扰发生前的工作表现评估如何与干扰期间员工的工作结果相关联。我们认为，这些认可信号作为情境资源，帮助员工在不确定性下维持心理资源，表现为职业满意度。我们还提出，干扰期间的主管支持作为这一关系的调节变量，因为它使得表现评估成为一种社会赋予的情境资源，并增强其影响。此外，我们发现，干扰期间的职业满意度与员工对COVID-19对公司未来成功影响的看法之间存在正相关，这被视为一种条件资源，进而与组织承诺和较低的离职意向相关联。我们的研究结果突显了资源配置（如表现评估和主管支持）如何与员工在高不确定性时期的反应相连接。我们讨论了对资源保护理论的启示，强调了与韧性、职业冲击和信号传递过程的联系，并提供了在干扰环境中管理员工态度的实际策略。

title: TMT task-related faultlines and firm innovation: Differential impacts on incremental and radical innovation
abstract: Why do some firms drive radical innovation, while others only deliver incremental innovation? We argue that the answer may lie in the latent divisions within top management teams (TMTs). Drawing on the categorization–elaboration model, we propose that TMT task-related faultlines create a paradoxical effect: while they enhance incremental innovation by promoting within-subgroup cohesion, they simultaneously hinder radical innovation by stimulating between-subgroup fragmentation. Using a sample of Chinese listed manufacturing firms, we conduct empirical analysis which reveals that the strength of TMT task-related faultlines is positively associated with firms’ incremental innovation but negatively associated with radical innovation. Further analysis demonstrates that CEO functional diversity attenuates the negative relationship between TMT task-related faultlines and radical innovation. TMT ownership share weakens both the positive link between TMT task-related faultlines and incremental innovation and the negative link between TMT task-related faultlines and radical innovation. This research advances scholarly understanding of TMT composition, particularly TMT task-related faultlines and their dual effects on innovation typologies, contributing to the literature at the intersection of TMT composition and firm innovation, and offering actionable guidance for firms when making strategic choices about whether to prioritize incremental innovation or pursue radical innovation.
title_cn: TMT任务相关的裂隙与公司创新：对渐进式创新和激进式创新的差异影响
abstract_cn: 为什么某些企业能够推动激进创新，而另一些企业只能实现渐进创新？我们认为答案可能与高层管理团队（TMT）内部的潜在分歧有关。基于分类-阐 elaboration模型，我们提出TMT任务相关的断层线会产生一种悖论效应：虽然它通过促进小组内部的团结来增强渐进创新，但同时也通过刺激小组之间的分裂来阻碍激进创新。通过对中国上市制造企业的样本进行实证分析，我们发现TMT任务相关断层线的强度与企业的渐进创新呈正相关，而与激进创新呈负相关。进一步的分析表明，CEO的功能多样性减弱了TMT任务相关断层线与激进创新之间的负相关关系。TMT的持股比例则削弱了TMT任务相关断层线与渐进创新之间的正向联系，同时也削弱了TMT任务相关断层线与激进创新之间的负向联系。本研究推进了学术界对TMT组成的理解，特别是TMT任务相关断层线及其对创新类型的双重影响，为高层管理团队组成与企业创新交叉领域的文献贡献了新的视角，并为企业在战略选择上是否优先考虑渐进创新或追求激进创新提供了可行的指导。

title: The human side of self-managing organizations: Unlearning the learned helplessness
abstract: Why do so many attempts to distribute authority fail—even in organizations deeply committed to decentralization of authority? In this article, I argue that the answer lies in the cognitive, motivational, and emotional residues of learned helplessness shaped by prolonged exposure to hierarchical conditioning. From this perspective, I conceptualize the adoption of distributed authority as a process of unlearning the learned helplessness . Drawing on ethnographic action research into the adoption of Holacracy as a specific form of a self-managing organization, my study demonstrates how learned helplessness inhibits individuals from acknowledging, internalizing, and enacting the authority embedded in distributed authority frameworks—and how this cycle can be broken through deliberate practices. I identify three human-centered boundary conditions— clarity of role boundaries and responsibilities, purpose-driven proactive behavior , and complex social interaction —that interrupt habitual patterns of deference and managerial intervention. These conditions enable the overarching process of unlearning the learned helplessness, allowing self-organization to emerge. Theoretically, the study reveals why distributed authority so often collapses in practice and outlines the human-centered boundary conditions required for its long-term viability. Practically, it highlights the need to address the psychological effects of learned helplessness—not just redesign formal structures—to implement and sustain distributed authority.
title_cn: 自我管理组织的人性面：忘却已学会的无助感
abstract_cn: 为什么许多分权尝试会失败——即使在那些深度致力于权力下放的组织中？在本文中，我认为答案在于由长期接触等级制所塑造的认知、动机和情感残留的无助感。从这个角度来看，我将分权的采用概念化为一个去学习无助感的过程。通过对Holacracy作为一种自我管理组织特定形式的采用进行民族志行动研究，我的研究展示了无助感如何抑制个体承认、内化和实施分权框架中蕴含的权威，以及如何通过有意识的实践打破这一循环。我识别出三个以人为本的边界条件——角色边界和责任的清晰性、以目的驱动的主动行为，以及复杂的社会互动——这些条件打断了对权威的习惯性顺从和管理干预模式。这些条件促进了去学习无助感的整体过程，使自我组织得以出现。从理论上讲，这项研究揭示了为什么分权在实践中如此频繁地崩溃，并概述了其长期可行性所需的人本边界条件。从实践上讲，它强调了需要解决无助感的心理影响——而不仅仅是重新设计正式结构——以实施和维持分权。

title: Legacy imprints and categorisation shifts: How interpretations of job demands and resources change in abrupt transitions to virtual work
abstract: What happens when workers experience abrupt transitions to virtual working? Drawing on interviews with employees who were unexpectedly shifted to virtual work overnight, we show that people carry legacy imprints : expectations from face-to-face settings that shape how they initially classify job features as demands or resources. When lived experience in the virtual context contradicts these expectations (e.g. online social gatherings feel exhausting; proximity to family while working proves energising), workers reclassify job characteristics. We show that expectation–experience mismatch explains this categorisation shift at the individual level. On the contrary, when expectations are confirmed (or cognitive overload crowds out reflection) reclassification does not occur. We recast demands/resources as interpretive and dynamic during abrupt transitions rather than fixed attributes, offering an extension to Job Demands-Resources theory. We discuss implications for supporting employee well-being through sudden change and turbulent contexts, including designing short feedback loops for reflection and avoiding static assumptions about what counts as a demand or a resource.
topics: Personal Information Management and User Behavior
title_cn: 遗留印记与分类转换：工作需求与资源的解释如何在突然而至的虚拟工作转变中发生变化
abstract_cn: 当员工经历突然而至的虚拟工作转换时会发生什么？通过对那些在一夜之间意外转入虚拟工作环境的员工进行访谈，我们发现人们承载着遗留印记：来自面对面情境的期望，这些期望塑造了他们最初将工作特征归类为要求或资源的方式。当在虚拟环境中的实际体验与这些期望相悖时（例如，线上社交活动令人感到疲惫；在工作时与家人保持亲近反而令人振奋），员工会重新分类工作特征。我们表明，期望与体验之间的不匹配解释了这种个体层面的分类转变。相反，当期望得到确认（或认知负荷排挤了反思的空间）时，重新分类并不会发生。我们重新阐释了在突发转型过程中，要求/资源的关系为解释性和动态的，而非固定属性，从而扩展了工作需求-资源理论。我们讨论了在突变和动荡的环境中支持员工福祉的启示，包括设计短期反馈循环以促进反思，并避免对什么算是要求或资源的静态假设。

title: Short-term fit, long-term trap: The career development lock of low-skilled gig workers
abstract: Why do low-skilled gig workers remain stuck in work they originally intended as temporary? Although gig work is widely portrayed as flexible and temporary, our study shows that platforms can gradually trap workers in place. Drawing on grounded theory and fieldwork—including 70 interviews with 42 food delivery riders and 14 ride-hailing drivers, 30 hours of firsthand riding experience, and observations of online communities totalling 820 riders—this study develops a conceptual framework of career development lock, identifying four interrelated forms: lock-out, lock-in, lock-up, and lock-down. We find that career development lock stems from a structural conflict between workers’ long-term aspirations, grounded in a continuous temporal narrative, and platform algorithms’ need for flexible, on-demand labor that operates through a fragmented temporal logic. This conflict generates short-term person–career fit but long-term misfit. Under the structural constraints of algorithmic management, workers turn to adaptive self-exploitation, intensifying short-term fit while undermining long-term misfit, which ultimately traps them in their roles. The study advances understanding of non-linear careers in non-standard employment and reframes algorithmic control as a career-structuring force beyond a day-to-day control mechanism. It also offers practical implications for platforms and policymakers to prevent new forms of career entrapment in the gig economy.
title_cn: 短期适应，长期困境：低技能零工工人的职业发展锁定
abstract_cn: 为什么低技能的零工工作者会停留在他们最初打算作为临时工作的岗位上？尽管零工工作普遍被视为灵活和临时的，但我们的研究表明，平台可能会逐渐使工人陷入困境。本研究基于扎根理论和实地调研，包括对42名食品配送员和14名打车司机进行的70次访谈、30小时的亲身骑行体验，以及对820名骑行者在线社区的观察，发展出职业发展锁定的概念框架，识别出四种相互关联的形式：锁定外、锁定内、锁定上和锁定下。我们发现，职业发展锁定源于工人长期愿望与平台算法对灵活、按需劳动的需求之间的结构性冲突，这种需求通过支离破碎的时间逻辑运作。该冲突导致短期的个人与职业的契合，却造成长期的不匹配。在算法管理的结构性约束下，工人转向适应性自我剥削，增强短期的契合感，同时削弱长期的不匹配，最终使他们陷入既定角色。该研究深化了对非标准就业中非线性职业发展的理解，并将算法控制重新框定为一种超越日常控制机制的职业结构力量。它还为平台和政策制定者提供了实践上的启示，以防止在零工经济中出现新的职业困境形式。

title: Organizational telework access dispersion and firm performance
abstract: This study investigates how disparities in access to telework arrangements within organizations influence collective outcomes. By incorporating social identity with justice theories, we develop a conceptual model and hypothesize that greater dispersion in organizational telework access correlates with diminished organizational performance, primarily due to its association with lower collective positive affective tone. However, we argue that collective organizational identification can mitigate this negative impact. Our empirical analysis, leveraging a multisource dataset of 26,783 employees across 186 companies, substantiates this model. These findings advocate for the importance of intra-organizational variation of telework access in enriching our understanding of both the advantages and disadvantages associated with this prevalent work modality.
title_cn: 组织远程办公接入分布与企业绩效
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了组织内部远程工作安排的获取差异如何影响集体结果。通过将社会身份与公平理论相结合，我们建立了一个概念模型，并假设组织内远程工作获取的更大差异与组织绩效降低相关，主要是由于这一差异与集体正向情感基调的降低相关。然而，我们认为集体组织认同可以减轻这一负面影响。我们的实证分析利用了来自186家公司中26,783名员工的多源数据集，验证了这一模型。这些发现强调了组织内部远程工作获取差异的重要性，从而丰富了我们对这种普遍工作模式所带来的优势与劣势的理解。

title: The dark side of illegitimate tasks: How revenge motives and moral identity shape deviant silence
abstract: Can illegitimate task assignments that go beyond what might be reasonably expected from employees lead to deviant silence in which employees withhold vital information to harm organizational functioning? Using stress-as-offense-to-self and retributive justice theories, our research explains how organizations produce employee silence and illuminates that employees’ revenge motives help explain the link between illegitimate tasks and deviant silence. We also propose that moral identity may serve as a boundary condition in the relationship between illegitimate tasks and deviant silence. We conduct two studies to test the hypothesized model. An experimental field study (Study 1) shows that illegitimate tasks are significantly related to deviant silence. A three-wave time-lagged study (Study 2) confirms the positive direct relationship between illegitimate tasks and deviant silence, as well as an indirect relationship through the revenge motives of employees. We argue that illegitimate tasks represent an indirect form of communicating incompetence and social devaluation and highlight how employees retaliate with a similarly covert punishment in the form of deviant silence, foregoing opportunities to improve working lives and discouraging future illegitimate task assignments. Also, we demonstrate that moral identity acts as a self-regulatory mechanism, which reduces the strength of the relationship between illegitimate tasks and deviant silence.
topics: Psychology of Moral and Emotional Judgment
title_cn: 非法任务的阴暗面：复仇动机和道德身份如何塑造偏差沉默
abstract_cn: 不合理的任务分配超出了员工可能合理预期的范围，是否会导致员工选择沉默，以隐瞒关键信息，从而损害组织的运作？基于自我攻击与压力理论以及报复公正理论，我们的研究解释了组织如何导致员工的沉默，并揭示了员工的报复动机在不合理任务与偏差沉默之间的联系中所起的作用。我们还提出，道德身份可能在不合理任务与偏差沉默之间的关系中作为一个边界条件。我们进行了两项研究以检验假设模型。一项实验性实地研究（研究1）显示，不合理的任务与偏差沉默显著相关。一项三波时间滞后研究（研究2）确认了不合理任务与偏差沉默之间存在正向直接关系，以及通过员工的报复动机间接关系。我们认为，不合理的任务代表了一种间接传达无能和社会贬值的方式，并强调了员工如何以类似隐蔽的惩罚形式——偏差沉默进行报复，从而放弃改善工作生活的机会，并对未来的不合理任务分配表示不满。此外，我们展示了道德身份如何作为一种自我调节机制，降低不合理任务与偏差沉默之间关系的强度。

title: The leisure crafting intervention: Effects on work and non-work outcomes and the moderating role of age
abstract: Leisure crafting (i.e. the proactive pursuit of leisure activities targeted at goal-setting, learning, and human connection) enhances people’s lives. Because employees are more than just workers, this study examines whether leisure crafting not only improves non-work outcomes but also spills over to benefit work, particularly for older employees. We conducted an online leisure crafting intervention among working adults, to examine its effects on non-work benefits (meaning in life, need satisfaction, affective well-being, and sense of community), work benefits (meaning at work, employee creativity, and work engagement), and the moderating role of age. A 5-week randomized controlled trial compared our intervention comprising 196 participants against a passive control group comprising 266 participants. Analyses revealed that the intervention group experienced a greater increase in leisure crafting (i.e. the manipulation check was significant), employee creativity, and meaning at work. In addition, the intervention positively impacted affective well-being but only for participants older than 61 years. The findings suggest that leisure crafting has the potential to positively affect people’s work lives and can serve as an effective organizational tool to help older employees sustain satisfactory affective well-being.
title_cn: 闲暇手工艺干预：对工作和非工作结果的影响以及年龄的调节作用
abstract_cn: 休闲创造（即主动追求针对目标设定、学习和人际联系的休闲活动）可以提升人们的生活质量。因为员工不仅仅是工作者，本研究考察了休闲创造是否不仅改善非工作领域的结果，同时也能溢出到工作中，从而使工作受益，尤其是对年长员工。本研究在在职成年人中开展了一项在线休闲创造干预，以考察其对非工作收益（生活意义、需求满足、情感幸福感和社区感）、工作收益（工作意义、员工创造力和工作参与感）以及年龄的调节作用的影响。为期5周的随机对照试验将包括196名参与者的干预组与包括266名参与者的被动对照组进行了比较。分析结果显示，干预组在休闲创造（即操控检查显著）、员工创造力和工作意义方面的提升程度更高。此外，该干预对情感幸福感产生了积极影响，但仅限于61岁以上的参与者。研究结果表明，休闲创造有潜力对人们的工作生活产生积极影响，并可以作为一种有效的组织工具，帮助年长员工维持令人满意的情感幸福感。
